4196580.title: IFCATWORKFORME
4196580.short_description: A casual idle cultivation 2D pixel-style game where you earn rewards through idling or offline play, and collect three types of beautiful cards

4196660.title: Christmas Wonderland 16: Collector's Edition
4196660.short_description: A family friendly festive hidden object game

4196670.short_description: Equip yourself with upgradeable weapons of your choice and survive the onslaught of your opponents for 5 minutes in one of five different arenas. Improve your character with a selection of passive abilities to prove your skills in further challenging game modes.

4196740.title: After the Crash : Colony
4196740.short_description: Build order on a strange planet, keep your crew alive, and gather the parts needed to repair the crashed main ship. Manage resources, explore new areas, face growing threats, and strengthen your colony a little more with each passing day.

4196750.title: The King's Follower
4196750.short_description: The King was called and he needs protection to get through the grueling forest. That's where you come along! Equipped with your trusty enchanted weapon that gets stronger everytime it kills a bunch of enemies, journey through the depths of the forest to slay monsters while also protecting the King!

4196770.short_description: Become an indie game developer. Create simple games for your clients. Be creative and succeed in this cozy, relaxing game.

4196920.short_description: A routine night turns into a true nightmare. You are a psychologist trapped in a building filled with unsettling secrets and rooms that seem to watch you, while an unknown presence follows you without rest.

4196950.title: RETURN TO COMPANY OZIISAN
4196950.short_description: Get him to the company. A huge, dark, and powerful conspiracy will engulf you. It's like a solo player race where you spray fire extinguishers to reach the goal from the starting position.

4196960.title: 妄想少女
4196960.short_description: 『妄想で逃げ切る。ノンストップ配信サバイバー』配信中のイライラを妄想の怪物へ変換して迎え撃つ、実況UI連動型の縦シューティングアクションゲーム。 害悪リスナーやアンチが敵として襲いかかる中、画面上を逃げ回りつつスキルで撃破し、ストレス値を正常にせよ！ イライラ度が上がるほどゲームに影響がが現れ、凶悪かつ理不尽に襲いかかる。

4197100.title: Texplore

4197130.title: the Changjiang Gorges
4197130.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4197170.title: IES0.97
4197170.short_description: 『IES0.97』 is a metafiction puzzle action game where slightly surreal conversations add to the fun. You must choose the right spell from the many magic spells Lorena possesses to proceed. Your choices will be tested.

4197210.title: 它说山雨欲来
4197210.short_description: 25+结局！主文游视觉小说+少量解谜+微量2d小游戏！ 古风纯架空世界观！主要元素为武侠/权谋/伪克苏鲁——具体哪个元素多看你怎么选择！ 剧本欢乐剧情阴间，结局更是阴到没边！ 你被卷入一场巨大的阴谋，三大势力向你抛出橄榄枝，是追随疯美的革命者，依附蛊惑人心的神棍，还是效忠唯利是图的富商？你的选择将解锁完全不同的剧情和人物。切记，你看到的未必是真相；小心，别让自己成了棋子。 但相信能“开挂”的你，预知、夺舍、知识碾压都会变成你的武器。你必须用你的方式打破规则，对他们造成降维打击，书写属于你自己的传奇！

4197250.title: Happy Village: The Broken Timeline
4197250.short_description: A narrative RPG of three intertwined stories, hidden secrets, and a broken timeline only the player can repair. Every ending reveals new paths — if you know where to look.

Take on fierce rivals in an intense street racing league, either solo or in local multiplayer (splitscreen). Bolts, shockwaves, mines and other race tech at your disposal. Trust me, you'll need it.

4197410.title: The Larper
4197410.short_description: The Larper is a short Incremental game about auto-clicking on keys and solving passwords. Buy Upgrades and unlock Secret Key Combinations, while listening to Classical Music and generating Beautiful Paintings in the background!

4197990.short_description: Cargo Hunters is the singleplayer/co-op extraction shooter where you control a humanoid robot scavenging the remains of humanity on an abandoned, dystopian Earth.

4198010.title: Jixo 4: Magical Nights Collector’s Edition
4198010.short_description: A cosy, glowing celebration of festive nights filled with colourful picture puzzles, gentle logic challenges, hidden-object fun, and delightful bonus surprises.

4198030.title: Stereoscopy
4198030.short_description: A virtual theater experience for Desktop PC with VR support - capable of playing Standard and 3D Video files. Supports Keyboard/Mouse, Gamepad, and XR Controllers.

4200200.short_description: The demon from the void calls you to play. If you lose, he pulls the trigger! Complete the various mini-games that appear before you and use the points you earn to survive!

4200240.title: Fresh Tracks VR
4200240.short_description: The critically acclaimed rhythm roguelite, Fresh Tracks, is now in VR! Jump, dodge, and fight to the rhythm of the gods in this thrilling music-action game on skis. It is not a place you will find on any map, nor in any book, it is hidden from the eyes and minds of all those but the few souls that it chooses to bring home.

4200720.short_description: "The Adventure of Natsuki Hinomiya" is an Action RPG that prioritizes the joy of exploration and is designed for short-cycle, repeatable runs.Gather items scattered across the open field, defeat the enemies blocking your path, and empower your protagonist.

4201140.short_description: Trapped in a mysterious cave system, four dungeon explorers struggle to find a way out before the light fades forever... A game with the core gameplay of drawing with a ruler, involving conventional drawing, single ruler drawing, and single ruler drawing. The difficulty increases (slightly difficult), with tests of foundation, thinking, and even endurance.

4201210.title: All Me Action Game
4201210.short_description: [WARNING][WARNING][WARNING][WARNING][WARNING] Clear rate 0.000000000000000001%. You'll regret buying it. Welcome to ultra-hard 2D action "Madness World".

4201220.title: Abyss Bistro
4201220.short_description: A restaurant romance simulation set in the shadowed world of the Abyss! As you meet its strange residents and grow closer to them, their hidden stories gradually come to light.

4201310.title: RATNAVATI: Curse of Bhangarh
4201310.short_description: A first-person supernatural horror inspired by the legend of Ratnavati and the cursed Bhangarh Fort. Explore India’s most haunted place, uncover your brother’s disappearance, and survive the ancient curse that still haunts the ruins.

4201330.title: Dino Station

4201330.short_description: Build your base, gather resources, craft items, and develop your station. Catch dinosaurs and assign them to work! Complete quests and help the local residents. Play solo or with friends.

4201740.short_description: Adapt or crash! WING-IT is a 2.5D shooter where your arsenal is a slot machine. Shoot down drones to trigger the Toy Box Gacha and swap weapons on the fly. Fight through Medy's house, survive the bullet hell, and defeat the mechanical monstrosities ruling the house.

4201750.title: CUPIES
4201750.short_description: A 3D platformer where CU tries to reunite his clumsy friends PI and ES while navigating a world full of absurd dangers and “design choices” that test your sanity. Free, chaotic, and surprisingly challenging.

4201760.title: Don't Breathe or They Might Hear
4201760.short_description: The story of a fun guy who works in the porn industry. You will have adventures in a creepy place that is covered in mystery and a tense atmosphere. Overcome challenges, survive, and live through these days surrounded by beautiful girls.

4201770.title: Epic O'clock
4201770.short_description: Senor epic is awoken from his epic slumber when he hears destiny calling to him. "hello" it says. and then it's gone. "i will go for a walk" says senor epic. uh oh mr stupid idiot guy put up danger. Move left, right, up, and even down through many levels so you can kill him!!! no z axis though!!!!!!

4201780.title: The Cradle
4201780.short_description: You are Alex, a curious journalist who has decided to investigate the mysterious disappearance of the entire staff of Synergy Soft. Six months ago, all the employees went mad at once, staging a bloody massacre. The official version is mass psychosis. But the truth is much more terrifying.

4201890.title: Estória
4201890.short_description: An epic 2D coming of age adventure story, similar in style to Sierra and LucasArts classics like "King's Quest." Use items to solve puzzles, talk to characters, and unravel the mystery threatening the Kingdom of Estória. *iPhone / iPad version available on the App Store.

4201950.title: Namiko
4201950.short_description: A PSX-style psychological horror adventure inspired by folklore and emotional storytelling. Awaken in a haunted bathhouse, explore a corrupted village, solve puzzles, face spirits, and uncover the truth behind Namiko’s past.

4202020.title: Koimori
4202020.short_description: Turn your desktop into a living pond with this peaceful idle overlay. Let koi drift around while you work or relax, drop snacks to see them gather, and unlock rare koi patterns as you spend more time with your little friends.

4202040.title: Drunken Cowboys
4202040.short_description: Perforate, blow up, and take down friends and foes in tight, dusty Wild West arenas - all after you’ve all had a solid drink at the saloon. Drink, reload, shoot, drink again, and repeat. A stylish hat is guaranteed, so you can leave yours at home.

4202100.title: Money Garden Simulator
4202100.short_description: In the Money Garden Simulator, money literally grows on trees! Grow diverse currencies, expand your empire, and dominate the global economy. Crush markets, manipulate exchange rates, builde the ultimate Money Machine.

4202130.title: MicroMechanica
4202130.short_description: MicroMechanica is a top-down factory-building puzzle game across unique biomes. Build machines, collect resources, and optimize factories in 20 handcrafted levels. Unlock new mechanics, colors, and patterns, with more levels and a procedurally generated world coming soon!

4203490.title: Typing English
4203490.short_description: Typing × English! “Typing English” is a two-in-one game where you practice typing and learn English vocabulary. It includes 2,809 words covering 94% of TOEIC vocabulary — great for exams and daily study.

4203600.title: Lofi Neko Girl: Idle Companion
4203600.short_description: A soothing lofi idle companion for your desktop. Watch the girl study, wind down, and fall asleep as her energy resets. Upgrade her stamina, improve her focus, and decorate her cozy lofi window scene while you work or unwind.

4203610.title: Last Gate
4203610.short_description: Last Gate follows Eddi, a villager who fights back after the monster Danav destroys his home. With portal gates unleashing armies across forests and mountains, Eddi must destroy them all and face Danav at the final hidden gate to save his village.

4203690.title: 思い出せ！更生日記女苑ちゃん！！
4203690.short_description: 1文字、もしくは2文字だけを入力して単語や動詞を作り出して日記を書き記し、女苑ちゃんの更生のための日記を完成させよう！

4203780.title: Memory Keeper
4203780.short_description: Create cozy, realistic rooms and save them to your digital album. A relaxing interior design simulator with no rules or restrictions.

4203790.title: それいけ!!杉城園芸部
4203790.short_description: ジャンル：ハートフル園芸ADV。 テキストを読み進める恋愛シュミレーションゲームです。 傷ついた少年少女たちが園芸部に所属することによってお互いのきずなを深めあっていく。 はずが、主人公の母の病気によって生活は一変する。 高額な医療費の支払いのために主人公はあるとんでもないことをして治療費を稼ごうとするがそんなことはうまくいくはずもなく、トラブル続きの毎日が訪れる。

4203810.title: Raahi
4203810.short_description: In Raahi you play as Sandy, an auto rickshaw driver exploring 1990s Goa. Drive freely, meet passengers, and enjoy their small stories. Wander through beaches and markets with a day and night cycle, and take part in mini games like the friendly street race and traditional Goan fenny making

4203880.title: THE SCREAM OF DARKNESS
4203880.short_description: the scream of darkness is a first person psychological horror with multiple endings, it shows the story about one guy that gets his whole life ruined in days. can you discover the truth?

4203890.title: Pirate Panic!
4203890.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4203890.short_description: You are drunken pirates exploring the sea with a very unstable physics boat and your movement affects its balance. Find treasure using paper maps and haul it across a treacherous ocean in your pirate quest for riches. 1-4 players and yes, the treasure *will* fall on the way back, sorry!

4203900.title: War Land TD
4203900.short_description: War Land TD is a strategic tower-defense card battler where you defend a single vulnerable tower by summoning heroes and bosses with cards. Build your deck, manage gold tokens, and fight challenging enemies across 12 levels in 4 unique locations.

4203910.title: VHS Vermin
4203910.short_description: Step into a grotesque 80s B-Movie nightmare in VHS> Vermin. With nowhere to run and limited ammo, you must fight through relentless hordes of mutated horrors. Every shadow hides something vile — your only hope is to annihilate anything that moves.

4203980.title: Trushybin & Removin: What I Couldn’t Delete
4203980.short_description: A 3D platformer where Trushybin and Removin, two innocent PC icons, try to understand why the girl who uses them wants to delete everything… even memories and parts of herself.

4204010.title: New Elysium
4204010.short_description: “A single wingbeat can destroy everything.” New Elysium is a cinematic narrative drama where every choice reshapes the story. Explore a shattered utopia, survive the night, and decide the final wingbeat of destiny.

4204080.title: Memories To Kill - The Silent Chalet
4204080.short_description: Evelyn travels to the chalet she inherited from her father and finds herself caught in a relentless blizzard and dark secrets. Silence is sometimes the loudest scream. Atmospheric tension and the fight for survival await. Can you kill the past?

4204150.title: Endless Nightbreak: Blood Horde
4204150.short_description: Survive endless nights of deadly zombie hordes. Gather resources, fight through relentless rain, unlock a tank, and face prehistoric beasts. Only by growing stronger can you reach the helicopter and escape the nightmare.

4204180.title: The Propagandist
4204180.short_description: Step into the desk of a state Propagandist! Design posters, shape public opinion, and censor any media that challenges the state. Enlighten the people, serve your glorious country, and uphold the vision of the Mother. Every poster you create can shift the fate of the nation ; or your own life.

4204190.title: 大国崛起：1860
4204190.short_description: The setting is in mid-19th century China, an era when the great Qing Empire, rotten to the core, was plagued by both domestic troubles and foreign invasions.

4204320.title: Wugong Mountain in Jiangxi
4204320.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4204370.title: Tetra Troopers
4204370.short_description: Assemble modular squads in this Tower Defense Puzzle Roguelike Auto-battler. Stack units to fuse upgrades, survive the daily frontlines, and retreat to your persistent fortress to withstand the night.

4204390.title: Tarot Spell
4204390.short_description: Mindless typing has never been so magical. Sharpen your typing speed and accuracy while learning the meanings behind all 78 Tarot cards. This fast-paced typing survival game turns each keystroke into a spell!

4204530.title: Knights End
4204530.short_description: Work together to survive the knight shift in this co-op PvE horror game. Serve your villagers’ as a disgraced knight by completing their commands in a cursed kingdom. Reclaim your lost honor to earn items and a chance at your freedom.

4204540.title: Random Realms Hero Under Siege
4204540.short_description: Random Realms Hero Under Siege is a fast-paced single player tower defense RTS where every match is a fresh roll of the dice. Build bases from randomized building options, lead a leveling hero and their army, and hold the line against escalating enemy waves.

4204550.title: Sadistic Love: Christmas Hentai Party
4204550.short_description: Experience a night with Taya, your sadistic, cute, big-breasted Christmas Eve hookup.

4204590.title: Reincarnated as a Dark Lord Before Taking Over the World with Power 999999999
4204590.short_description: An idle incremental RPG where you play as a dark lord with the power to reincarnate. Choose different paths with each life to grow progressively stronger, eventually gaining enough power to conquer the world.

4204650.title: Self Recurse
4204650.short_description: Self Recurse blends card-battling and permanent progression. Delve into branching simulations with cards, dice, spellbooks, and artifacts to best your foes. Choose a theme to determine which rewards appear and shape evolving builds with every run.

4204820.title: WEB STORIES: Graveyard Protocol
4204820.short_description: The abandoned cemetery always intrigued you. Today you finally entered. While exploring, time distorted. It's midnight now. A chapel appears before you. Inside there's a manual: "Survival Protocol. Follow the rules until dawn or something worse than death awaits you."

4204840.title: You All Know! Arm Tank Volley
4204840.short_description: Thank you for waiting! The legendary "You All Know! Arm Tank Volley" is finally here! Master the way of the Arm Tank!

4204850.title: SALT: Super Awesome Laser Tag
4204850.short_description: Fast-paced single player and online laser tag arena where you parkour and battle with bots or other players across different maps in Elimination, Domination, and Capture the Flag game-modes.

4204880.title: Hajimeow: Tiny Box Cat
4204880.short_description: Hajimeow: Tiny Box Cat is a cute companion that responds to every keystroke and mouse click by raising signs. With an integrated Pomodoro timer, this little buddy accompanies you through your daily tasks, making work and study sessions more enjoyable and focused.

4204950.title: Marshmallow's Adventure
4204950.short_description: Let's go on an adventure with cute marshmallows. This is an automatic log-like shooting indie game. Open up a variety of weapons through the challenge to defeat the enemy and move forward.

4204990.title: GagImpact
4204990.short_description: Violence-themed,"Conversation & Violence Simulation Game!"As the rowdy lad Mike S Brown,knock the annoying blokes flying! Talk! Spew abuse!What will become of the lad's future as a result...?

4205020.title: Aurora Zen
4205020.short_description: Paint the sky with vibrant aurora. Relax and find your zen by filling the sky with brilliant ribbons of beautiful colour and shapes.

4205060.title: DopePie Survivors 3D
4205060.short_description: *DopePie Survivors 3D* is a 3D shooting game with survivor-like mechanics! Countless different little girls, giant corrupted female bosses, and a variety of weapons! Skills! Building! Piloting helicopters and tanks! Gliding through the city! can you lead them to escape?

4205070.title: Lost & Found Simulator
4205070.short_description: You are an airport security officer. Your job is to screen passengers' luggage, search for contraband, and make decisions that help maintain order and safety.

4205110.title: WonderLang English
4205110.short_description: Learn English through immersive quests, interactive dialogues, and spaced repetition combat challenges. Help a young hero lift a magical curse by mastering English. Customize your learning experience and explore a vibrant world filled with unique characters. Start your journey in English today!

4205190.title: Project: Latticeborn
4205190.short_description: A fast-paced 3D survival action roguelite. Upgrade your Bastion, forge shard-powered weapons, and battle through chaotic procedural arenas as an expendable Shardborn. Build, fight, die, and grow stronger each run.

4205250.title: Hentai Age Running
4205250.short_description: A calming tile-sliding puzzle game where each completed stage reveals a beautiful illustration. Play at your own pace with no time limits, enjoy relaxing music, and unlock a gallery of charming artwork as difficulty gradually increases.

4205290.title: PROJECT AROMA
4205290.short_description: A cozy VR experience set in a retro cyberpunk apartment. Light up, slow down, and enjoy the night.

4205320.title: Grandma's Little Store
4205320.short_description: Run the last surviving store in a tiny forgotten town as a grandma. Serve human customers by day and wandering spirits by night. Manage your cozy little shop, listen to heartfelt stories, and uncover the truth behind this mysterious place where the living and the dead quietly meet.

4205330.title: Mortal Destiny
4205330.short_description: The classic indie JRPG finally arrives on Steam in an enhanced edition. Join Jack Slater and the Resistance in their fight against the dictator Powell and change the fate of Orcania forever through a tense, raw, and emotional story.

4205370.title: CLICKBAIT
4205370.short_description: CLICKBAIT is a short incremental game about catching larger and larger fish.

4205450.title: Echo Factory
4205450.short_description: The world has gone silent. Tap into the void, generate echoes, and automate the restoration of sound in this neon-soaked, sci-fi idle game. Build powerful machines, unlock complex frequencies, and rebuild the cosmic core to bring harmony back to the universe.

4205590.title: We Are The Wall
4205590.short_description: We Are The Wall is a city-builder / RTS where you lead a hardy dwarf settlement fighting to protect their mountain home. Train armies, gather vital resources, explore the surrounding lands, and defend the Heart of the Mountain at all costs. We Are The Wall!

4205600.title: StimDock
4205600.short_description: Tiny games and mini-simulations that live on your desktop. Interact with them whenever you like, tweak how they behave, or let them run in the background while you work or play.

4205730.title: Urban Ascend
4205730.short_description: A casual incremental city builder where growth is constant, production chains expand, citizens thrive, and upgrades push your city toward a bustling metropolis.

4205740.title: My Boss' Futanari Secret
4205740.short_description: WARNING: Futanari on Male only! with male in submissive positions. You are working overtime as usual. But tonight, your Boss is here as well. Things take an unexpected turn when Boss asks you to do extra favors for her. A visual novel with a branching choice to obtain 3 different endings.

4205780.title: Skybound
4205780.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4205780.short_description: Skybound is a 3D exploration platformer focused on fun, fluid movement mechanics, parkour and environmental puzzle solving.

4205860.title: World Without
4205860.short_description: World Without is an open-world anime fantasy action RPG where you follow the story of Naoya. Explore the continent, unlock characters, equip and upgrade your team, then challenge Miladonia's many ruthless bosses and monsters !

4205900.title: Mining Wizards
4205900.short_description: Mining Wizards is an incremental mining game. Mine minerals, gather materials, upgrade a massive skill tree, level up, unlock talents, discover artifacts, and attract artifact visitors!

4205960.title: OutBreak: The Last Survivor
4205960.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4205960.short_description: OutBreak is a multiplayer post-apocalyptic survival game. Explore a ruined world, face other players, gather resources, and make tough choices to survive one more day.

4206000.title: Zin & Zan
4206000.short_description: A cooperative puzzle adventure set inside a zinc refinery. Play as two tiny workers, solve industrial challenges, carry molten zinc, operate machinery, and work together to keep the factory running.

4206030.title: List
4206030.short_description: LIST is a 3D anime action-RPG where you slow time, grab weapons mid-air, and study a single evolving boss. Every death makes you stronger as you search for the monster’s weakness in a fast, strategic shōnen-style duel.

4206090.title: MY KILLER HAREM
4206090.short_description: A psychological survival horror visual novel where you navigate dangerous relationships with three obsessed women trapped in an abandoned mansion. Make critical choices that determine who lives and dies as you uncover the truth about your past and survive their deadly love.

4206180.title: Freak Accident
4206180.short_description: Freak Accident is a first-person survival horror game. Stay silent and hidden to escape a violent serial killer. Explore to uncover the mystery behind a killer’s past and the tragic events that fell on his family. Find clues and items to escape an intense nightmare of being hunted by a psychopath.

4206310.title: Warvox
4206310.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4206310.short_description: Warvox is a next-generation action MMORPG (Massively Multiplayer Online Role-Playing Game) built for players who love fast combat, open-world exploration, and a community-driven gaming experience

4206850.title: R.I.P.
4206850.short_description: A co-op horror game where you manipulate your own gravity to traverse a procedurally generated 3D maze filled with supernatural threats. Work alone or with your team to rescue kidnapped victims.

4206870.title: Greeny The Blox
4206870.short_description: Speed on through the adventurous world of Greeny The Blox! The fast-platforming cube with a burst of energy!

4206980.title: Toilet Femdom: Christmas Party
4206980.short_description: Experience being used as a human toilet by 11 different women, ranging from MILFs to goth punks to sadistic teachers, and even your own sadistic, big-breasted friend.

4207000.title: Curse of Cards
4207000.short_description: Battle through a shifting cosmic library in this roguelike card-crawler. Combine satisfying card strategy with first-person exploration. Unleash ancient creatures of British folklore, gather relics, collect powerful cards, and fight to shape your own story escaping the cursed library’s grasp.

4207060.title: 金烬秋明
4207060.short_description: A visual novel set in an ancient, alternate world. Explore this stormy and unstable country alongside Jiang Jin and Zhaoming, gradually encountering the shifting intrigues of the court. Whether you choose to stay on the sidelines or step forward is up to you

4207140.title: Imago Season
4207140.short_description: A true narrative roleplaying experience. Explore an alien city inhabited by human-insect hybrids. Roll dice, join a revolution, become a mutant yourself. The choices are yours, but so are the consequences.

4207160.title: Vampire's Kiss: Time Paradox
4207160.short_description: Vampire's Kiss: Time Paradox – is a romantic anime novel about vampires and the distortion of time. Your choices will determine the fate of the heroine and her chosen one. Meet mysterious guys, uncover secrets, and find your unique ending!

4207190.title: HeroIsVeryArrogant
4207190.short_description: "Hero Is Very Arrogant" is a battle game that combines Auto-Chess and Roguelike elements! You will become a battlefield commander, recruiting warriors with diverse abilities and combining various artifacts to build an unstoppable legendary troop.

4207240.title: Little Fiefdom: Medieval
4207240.short_description: A medieval sandbox build/war game. Start as a peasant, become a lord, manage your fiefdom. Gather resources, construct buildings, train people & an army to defend or attack.

4207330.title: Yayos
4207330.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4207330.short_description: Yayos is a cooperative survival gamewhere you control an elderly person who mustmanage your day:shopping, cooking, taking medication, and savingto survive.Improve your mobility, play slots, watch TV and enjoy this retirement life simulator alone or with a friend.

4207360.title: 2P连接中
4207360.short_description: This is a game centered around "Stealth" and "Bugs." In the virtual world, all sorts of strange bugs lie hidden... Getting stuck on barriers, falling through the ground, stepping on invisible bridges —wait, are these really not bugs? Who says there's only one path to the destination?

4207530.title: Sip Or Die
4207530.short_description: A psychological party horror where every sip could kill you. Take a Gamble, and Choose a vial, drink, and pray it’s not poison.

4207540.title: Memory Chip
4207540.short_description: "Memory Chip" is an innovative indie game that perfectly combines Chinese traditional culture learning with sci-fi shooting. In this cyberpunk-styled world, you become a Memory Restorer, using the power of knowledge to fight data viruses and save precious cultural memories.

4207560.title: Gay It Loud
4207560.short_description: Dating in the dreamy shopping mall of 1995! Hang out at the food court, have sloppy makeouts in the dressing room, loiter in the arcade, and collect nostalgic toys.

4207580.title: Bag of Dreams
4207580.short_description: Dream with us! Bag of Dreams is our new cozy roguelite Dreambuilder. Draw fragments and grow your dream space in pursuit of the perfect night's sleep but look out for nightmares along the way...

4207610.title: Down We Go
4207610.short_description: A roguelite horror descent, the deeper you go, the harder it'll be to climb.

4207660.title: Whispers of the Forgotten
4207660.genre: Action, Adventure, RPG, Free To Play
4207660.short_description: 《无名之诗》是一款奇幻冒险+横版ARPG。故事发生在一个魔法与科技交织的世界，在这里你将结识性格各异的新朋友，探索世界的各个大陆，一起战斗冒险。一场沉浸式奇幻冒险，等你亲启！

4207670.title: Starlit Bottle
4207670.short_description: Starlit Bottle is a casual stress-relief game themed around starry sky bottles.

4207690.title: Dungeon Bomber
4207690.short_description: Dungeon Bomber is a chain-reaction roguelite where you place bombs and blow through the dungeon. Drop a bomb each turn, earn coins, and upgrade your deck. Fuse bombs to boost range and effects. Defeat advancing monsters and destroy the required blocks before your HP runs out.

4207720.title: HorSteal
4207720.short_description: The journey of a thief horse targeting the Louvre's Mona Lisa begins! Control 4 legs and neck individually in this physics action game. Steal masterpieces, sell loot, and upgrade your hideout. Ready? Take the first hoof towards the Mona Lisa!

4207790.title: Extinct Forest
4207790.short_description: Fight for your life in a mysterious, abandoned open world. In Extinct Forest, there are no crosshairs and no HUD — just you and your weapon against intelligent dinosaurs. Explore the desolate wilderness, solve environmental puzzles, and master realistic combat mechanics in this immersive shooter.

4207800.title: Hunter's Journey: Nightmare Hunting Collector's Edition
4207800.short_description: Hunt the truth behind the Rot and the awakening Blight. Explore a corrupted forest, solve magical puzzles, and uncover ancient lore hidden beneath roots, rituals, and shadows.

4207810.title: Re-Do U
4207810.short_description: A time-bending visual novel where you're trapped in an endless loop, reliving the same day with four women who are also aware of the cycle. Build relationships that transcend time as you make choices that echo through multiple iterations to break free from the temporal anomaly.

4207860.title: エレベーション
4207860.short_description: A horror adventure set in a department store. The story revolves around the sedative "Elevation," once popular for its strange uses. Two security guards patrol the store, aiming for the upper floors, and investigate the truth behind the strange happenings on each floor.

4207870.title: The Heishui River in Chongzuo City
4207870.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4207890.title: Giri-Jump Star Rush
4207890.short_description: Use jumps and skills to aim for the goal! "Giri-Jump Star Rush" is a slightly challenging, classic 2D action game. The main action of the protagonist, Giriko, is "jumping." Additionally, use the "Spin Attack" and "Charge Attack" to break certain blocks and clear your path!

4207980.title: Cook Together
4207980.short_description: Cook Together is a chaotic co-op drug creating game where you and your friend run a basement lab, to create drugs for big boss. Finish the product in time without blowing yourselves up. Upgrade your lab, perfect the purity of your products and become the biggest producer in town.

4208000.title: Grainhold
4208000.short_description: Grainhold is an open world mining game where player build their own settlement, which they must then defend against waves of enemy attacks. To construct buildings, players must gather resources and grow vegetables, which they can sell to buy better equipment from the merchant.

4208050.title: Tetra Rise
4208050.short_description: Defeat countless enemies and escape the abyss! Tetra Rise is an action-platformer with roguelite elements, where you upgrade your equipment and face ever-growing hordes as you climb toward the surface.

4208370.title: Festival Journey: Highland Dreams Collector's Edition
4208370.short_description: Join the Brooks on a vibrant puzzle journey through Edinburgh’s festivals—solve, explore, and capture the magic of Scotland!

4208390.title: DELUCID
4208390.short_description: An atmospheric horror game set within an inescapable dream. Trapped in a dark forest, you must explore, forage, and uncover rare ingredients to craft the one potion capable of waking you up.

4208420.title: As Sweetberry Falls
4208420.short_description: In this card-based town-builder, your touch is a curse. Manage the decay you create as you fight to delay a world's inevitable end.

4208430.title: Rogue Planet
4208430.short_description: Rogue Planet is a roguelite FPS set on a remote planet. Combine active skills and leveling elements to assemble a powerful build and save the planet from invaders

4208460.title: A Bad Christmas Story
4208460.short_description: Christmas lights, winter snow, and a serial killer on the loose. Follow a gifted detective through a twisted holiday night in this story-driven, interactive horror game. Your choices determine who lives, and who dies. Can you outsmart the killer?

4208480.title: Unlimited Ammo Survivor
4208480.short_description: Unlimited Ammo Survivor is a survivor game but in FPS mode. Defeat tons and tons of enemies in a collapsing world, collect experience stones and gold to buy and upgrade your weapons, purchase abilities, and grow from weak to strong To Survive! And save the world maybe.

4208530.title: Meyow
4208530.short_description: Meyow is a fast-paced survival arena game where you play as a spinning, gun-wielding cat fighting off endless waves of zombies. Dodge, rotate, shoot, and stay alive as long as you can while chaos unfolds around you.

4208620.title: Project Diaspora  : Planet Exploration
4208620.short_description: Project Diaspora: Planet Exploration is a game set in a virtual jungle planet called Diaspora, which is a dangerous unknown planet. Do the mission given by exploring planets and ruins, and check out the story that happens to the main character.

4208630.title: Wheels Echo: The Winter Chronicle
4208630.short_description: Wheels Echo is a winter survival story where your thoughts shape the journey. As Fred Walker, explore a silent frozen world, write down clues in your notebook, uncover mysteries, survive the cold, and piece together what happened to everyone — and to you.

4208640.title: Dead Exposure
4208640.short_description: Use an instant camera to reveal hidden realities and shape the house itself. Not everything stays where it belongs.

4208680.title: summer story
4208680.short_description: Summer Story: An adventure game where you investigate and make choices that shape the story.

4208770.title: Launch Window
4208770.short_description: Launch Window is a single player physics-based automation game where you establish supply chains across an entire solar system using Newtonian orbital mechanics.

4208840.title: DuneHaven
4208840.short_description: Build your oasis town with up to 8 friends. Defend it from threats that emerge at night. Hunt down powerful bosses. Work the land, gather resources, and trade with travelling merchants. Explore distant lands and grow your town’s influence.

4208950.title: Mystery Case Files: House That Love Built Collector's Edition
4208950.short_description: In the latest Mystery Case Files adventure, stop Angelica from claiming the secret legacy beneath Ravenhearst!

4209010.title: Lakehopper
4209010.short_description: Take flight in a seaplane flight simulator through a rugged world where you are responsible for the care and maintenance of your plane. Deliver cargo between far-flung communities in a flooded landscape that challenges your piloting skills! Fix your plane and keep flying!

4209090.title: Dead Hand
4209090.short_description: Dead Hand is a retro-styled, high-tension Blackjack game focused on quick matches, smart decisions, and duels that can flip in an instant. The rules are simple, but every round hits hard, one card can make you a legend or wipe you out instantly.

4209110.title: 東方恋物語 ~ Locked Together
4209110.short_description: The first of its kind on Steam. A retro-style Touhou Project fangame with a modern feeling. Beat some sense into the great library in love!

4209140.title: adventure of Y
4209140.short_description: 《Adventure of Y》是一款策略冒险 RPG，玩家通过选择触发不同事件，推动旅程发展，并在遭遇敌人时进行快速回合制战斗。核心玩法集中在对路线、资源与风险的判断，使整个冒险更偏向策略模拟体验。

4209150.title: treasure of Y
4209150.short_description: 《Treasure of Y》是一款冒险主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将在地图中探索遗迹与未知区域，通过移动、收集与解谜推进故事，并在遭遇敌人时进行策略性的回合制战斗。玩家需要选择技能、制定行动顺序并合理分配资源来战胜不同类型的敌人，同时通过装备与遗物构建适合自己的战斗风格。游戏的主要吸引力在于探索带来的新发现、回合制战斗的策略深度，以及收集秘宝碎片时逐渐呈现的神秘世界背景。

4209180.title: Escape
4209180.short_description: A small-scale, lightweight platformer, solo-dev game. You need to open locked doors by collecting ID cards, and then escape this strange place.

4209230.title: 土界鎮 Tujie Town
4209230.short_description: A suspenseful 2.5D adventure game where you return to your hometown, use the “Sight” ability to read memories from old objects, investigate clues, evade monsters, and uncover the hidden truth.

4209240.title: 欧皇VS非酋
4209240.short_description: "Lucky Dog VS Unlucky Dog" is a Roguelike card game where success depends entirely on luck—not wealth or effort. Your progress is determined by random draws. When your perfect card set crushes the boss, just ask: "Buddy, how come you haven't cleared the game yet？"

4209300.title: Vacation Terminal
4209300.short_description: Vacation Terminal is a short 2D Psychological thriller, horror and survival based visual novel with evading based puzzle elements. Following the story of two strangers.

4209330.title: AlienSunny
4209330.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4209330.short_description: Custom characters, custom maps, planting, raising livestock, chopping trees, weeding, fishing, building houses, constructing bridges, mining, driving away enemies who steal crops, and so on. You can skip tasks if you don't want to do them, and running out of stamina won't cause any loss.

4209350.title: 美女，游泳健身了解一下
4209350.short_description: 《美女，游泳健身了解一下》是一款融合了都市创业与多线恋爱的互动影像游戏。你将扮演一位刚毕业的大学生，临危受命接手舅舅濒临倒闭的“蔚蓝游泳健身中心”。在这段绝地逆袭的旅程中，与六位身份各异、魅力非凡的女性命运交织。

4209370.title: Girl Island
4209370.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4209370.short_description: This is a casual island survival game.

4209400.title: Omega Man
4209400.short_description: "Omega Man" is an interactive fiction game . After a global viral outbreak, as the only surviving male, players bears the responsibility to perpetuate the human races. Throughout the game, players' numerous choices will determine multiple possible endings.

4209430.title: CTRLSINK
4209430.short_description: A submerged post-apocalyptic retro-style FPS set in a world swallowed by the ocean after a human/AI war. Blast through flooded facilities, battle corrupted machines, explore radioactive ruins, and uncover the last buried secrets of humanity’s collapse.

4209500.title: Show Docs
4209500.short_description: Follow your character’s adventure as they navigate in-game embassy visits, document preparation, and the steps required to begin an overseas trip. As the story unfolds, you will meet helpful NPCs, gather important items, and explore various locations that shape your character’s personal journey.

4209560.title: To the Basement. Before
4209560.short_description: To the Basement. Before is a fast-paced side-scrolling action platformer that reveals the story before the events of the first game. You'll encounter flying, dangerous corridors, traps, a virus that has taken over the bunker, and the only robot that has managed to escape infection.

4209570.title: Jiuzhaigou Valley Scenic and Historic Interest Area
4209570.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4209590.title: Town Diggers
4209590.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4209590.short_description: Dig up items from the earth and trade them in your shop. To grow your business in a ruthless capitalist world: sell items, smuggle, forge items, expand your shop, hire workers. With strong financial power be the town’s mafia boss. Take down the rival mafia.

4209600.title: LostVein:The Sunken Vestige
4209600.short_description: A third-person action-adventure game focused on exploration and flexible playstyles. As a novice adventurer, you explore ruins, visit towns, gather materials, and craft through alchemy. After a sudden link to the mysterious Vestige, you journey across the land to uncover its secrets.

4209630.title: ELbab
4209630.short_description: ELbab is a pixel-art roguelite set in an endless library. Choose tiles to progress through dungeon-like paths and enjoy a build-crafting experience similar to ARPG planning tools. All battles are automated, letting you relax with coffee, videos, or even other games while refining your build.

4209650.title: 北洋花开-恋爱咏叹调
4209650.short_description: 在一座百卅之年的校园中发生的青春恋爱故事，以视觉小说为主要表达形式，每一次选项的抉择最终编织成每一个结局，在这命运注视的春夏秋冬，和四位少女其中之一走向更加遥远的未来——这是一场青春的成人礼。

4209690.title: Snekoban
4209690.short_description: Snekoban is a puzzle game, inspired by Snake and Sokoban. Help Sneko tidy up his space by pushing boxes, eat apples and earn a well deserved sleep on his favorite pillow : his own tail !

4209740.title: 松峰镇:诅咒
4209740.short_description: This is a suspenseful puzzle visual novel game. You play as a character who was born in Pine Peak as a child and returns to this long-lost town after many years. You get involved in a series of mysterious disappearances happening in the town and try to explore and solve the mystery.

4209750.title: Life's Too Short
4209750.short_description: A little adventure game featuring a problem solving ghost. In Life's Too Short, this little ghostly adventure game, you have been called in to settle a feud between two vampires who have dramatically fallen out.

4209810.title: Cadentia Farnese
4209810.short_description: 12 chances to discover "the Dice"! Immerse yourself in the history of the Farnese Palace in Rome with this unique narrative video game.

4209820.title: Close to Light
4209820.short_description: Follow the music and stay close to the lights in this rhythm game! Avoid hazards and do not let the darkness absorb you.

4209850.title: Slum Story
4209850.short_description: A story-driven action-adventure set in a slum inhabited by infected outcasts suffering from cognitive decline. Receiving a letter from her missing father after three years of silence, can she find him in this lawless zone? 'Slum Story': A tender dystopia dedicated to those weary of hatred.

4209900.title: Let Me In
4209900.short_description: Let Me In is a psychological indie horror game with a realistic visual style and intense atmosphere. The main character finds himself in an abandoned house on one of the scariest nights of his life. Will he be able to survive? The answer remains unknown...

4209930.title: 挂机后花园.放置牧场AFK back garden.idlepasture
4209930.short_description: Create your personal oasis in the corner of your desktop.​ This is a laid-back idle simulation game where simple clicks allow you to grow plants and feed adorable animals. Watch them thrive and multiply, receive surprise letters and gifts, and let the serene ambiance of nature fill your screen.
developers: 她山之石Stones from Other Hills
publishers: 她山之石Stones from Other Hills

4210010.title: Incremental Infinity
4210010.short_description: An incremental game where your size and power grow with your number. Use an infinite, procedurally generated skill tree to defend yourself against ever larger incoming numbers and strive to reach infinity.

4210030.title: W.A.R.D.
4210030.short_description: Assume control of an evil intergalactic megacorporation in this sci-fi tower defense. Build a mining infrastructure on alien moons and exoplanets, exploit their precious resources, and defend your operation against defiant natives.

4210100.title: AENIGMA - The Light At The End Of The Tunnel Is A Train
4210100.short_description: Set in the year 4XXX, humanity lives disconnected inside underground megastructures to escape the threat of the ever-expanding silicon-based lifeforms.

4210120.title: Trash Talkers
4210120.short_description: Come and trash talk in a 1V1 face off against another opponent! Use your wit to beat your opponent and convince the referee why you should be the winner! Or play as the referee and be the one to pick the winner yourself.

4210130.title: Zaya: Rise to the Gods
4210130.short_description: A gore action and adventure game where you'll learn about the Mayan culture while you explore, obtain new abilities and defeat enemies to save Zaya's lands from the curse that ravages humankind and deities.

4210140.title: Brofish: Fishing Autobattler
4210140.short_description: Autobattler Tower Defense Rogue-like about fishing! Reel in creatures with unique abilities and build an imbalanced build to fight off waves of undead!

4210210.title: Macropolis
4210210.short_description: A cozy 2D city-building game where you gather resources, upgrade buildings, and grow a small pixel town brought to life with cars, weather, and a day-night cycle.

4210240.title: WomboCombo
4210240.short_description: Fight through hordes of mobs in a roguelike-style challenge by hitting the correct key sequence. Test your reflexes, build your character, and survive the chaos as each stage ramps up. Rack up massive combos and push your limits with every run.

4210250.title: Logic Arrows
4210250.short_description: Logic Arrows is a sandbox game where you design your own mechanisms: from logic gates to an entire computer. Use simple elements to build complex systems, solve engineering challenges, and master computer logic.

4210260.title: Project: Station
4210260.short_description: A 4-player co-op sci-fi horror game where you stealth through unstable research stations, scavenge vital resources, complete high-risk contracts, and extract before the facility overwhelms your team.

4210300.title: Pawbay
4210300.short_description: Take part in the most coziest cat adventure! Explore a lively open-world town through the eyes of a mischievous cat. Create chaos, discover secrets, and turn everyday life in Pawbay upside down.

4210370.title: Guardians Planetfall
4210370.short_description: From the creators of Guardians Frontline, Guardians Planetfall drops you into a galaxy-wide war for the fate of humanity. Fight assembled into squads of up to 4 soldiers in fast, tactical VR combat across space and dangerous planets filled with aliens, Void soldiers, and massive war machines.

4210400.title: Lounge Café
4210400.short_description: Lounge Café is an atmospheric coffee shop simulator where you play as Sara from Lucerne, running a small café in Binoville. Choose beans, craft drinks, and compete in the city’s major coffee tournament to become the best.

4210410.title: Santa's Hunt
4210410.short_description: Santa's Hunt is an action thriller game. James is a naughty boy who hates Christmas and Santa Claus. Santa Claus is coming to visit him, but he won't be the same Santa Claus we know.

4210550.title: Pigmen's Challenge
4210550.short_description: Two Piggies in one wild restaurant. Chaos, pressure, panic — served fresh!

4210630.title: Goob Wants an Android Girlfriend
4210630.short_description: A short and silly puzzle game about fixing cute android girls!

4210660.title: Retrovolver
4210660.short_description: Retro roguelite shooter set in the Wild West. Raid towns, upgrade your stats, survive as long as possible.

4210670.title: 遗忘凶间 - Forgotten Terror
4210670.short_description: 搬入亲近的学长的家中，却噩梦连连。恐怖的鬼影，似乎有所隐瞒的学长。无法打开的房门又有什么秘密？

4210700.title: Chicky Blocks
4210700.short_description: A fresh twist on block puzzle games. Quick rounds, smart moves, instant fun! This is not your grandma tetris!

4210730.title: DRUNKEN BARON
4210730.short_description: DRUNKEN BARON is a fast-paced 2D arcade shooter inspired by classic flappy-style games. Keep your plane in the air by tapping the button, fly through chaotic corridors, shoot invading aliens, drop bombs, and survive as long as you can!

4210870.title: Blather
4210870.short_description: Blather is a Match-3 game that teaches real languages. Translate phrases to clear customers from lines, match topics for bonus combos, and use hints when you need help. Features 14 languages, over 60,000 voiced phrases, and difficulty settings for casual or hardcore play.

4211070.title: Puppy Link - Tile Connect
4211070.short_description: Relax with Puppy Link, a cute tile-connect puzzle game! Match adorable dogs across 300+ levels featuring Small, Medium, and Large boards. Enjoy soothing music, customize your wallpaper, and interact with the puppies by clicking them. Fill your Hall of Honor with achievements in this cozy adventure!

4211110.title: Ashes of Paradise
4211110.short_description: Ashes of Paradise is a cinematic visual novel set between a neon city and its underworld, following Ash as she uncovers hidden truths and shapes her path through key choices and emotional moments.

4211120.title: Maneuver Warfare 2: BTG
4211120.short_description: A simulation of the 2022 Russo-Ukrainian War where the player maneuvers battalion tactical groups on a map and controls assets such as aircraft, special forces teams, satellites, field hospitals, and repair facilities to support these. The player can play single battles or a campaign game.

4211130.title: The Withered
4211130.genre: Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4211130.short_description: Step into a decaying open world where every decision means survival. The Withered is our upcoming zombie survival game, blending horror, exploration, and crafting in a vast post-apocalyptic environment. Face the undead, gather scarce resources, and uncover the truth hidden in the ruins.

4211210.title: Tailgunner: The Allgunner
4211210.short_description: Tailgunner, the Allgunner, is a JRPG, Inspired by classic PS1 games. Set on the distant planet of Valoria. In a Universe where guns are a religion, and War Is second nature, The Allgunner, the creator of the universe, Steps down from his podium In the sky, to intervene yet again with mortals lives.

4211240.title: AstroWars
4211240.short_description: AstroWars is a top down 2d shooter with monsters and a blue gun. Earn score by killing monsters and try to beat your top score.

4211260.title: Villain Academy
4211260.short_description: A dark fantasy visual novel set in Villain Academy. Interact with supernatural characters including witches, vampires, dark elves, succubi, and fallen angels. Make choices that shape your path as you build relationships and uncover secrets.

4211310.title: Oswego Quest for the Golden Pin
4211310.short_description: Oswego Quest for the Golden Pin is a retro adventure game where you play as a failing student, exploring your college campus looking for a mythical pin that will supposedly help him pass his final exams.

4211340.title: Biryado
4211340.short_description: Biryado is a billiard roguelike with deck-building elements. Strategically combine various artefact powers and unique balls to create synergies, earn extreme scores, and beat Billy.

4211350.title: MAEVOR
4211350.short_description: Maevor is a 1–4 player co-op horror game where every sound you make can kill you. Use 3D positional voice chat to coordinate with your team as you hunt harpy-vampire demons deep in the cursed forests but be warned: your footsteps and even your whispers can draw the creatures straight to you.

4211380.title: Loop Tower
4211380.short_description: Loop Tower tells the story of adventurers climbing an endless tower. Place it on a corner of your desktop and help them continue their ascent. Experience a fresh blend of desktop idle gameplay + roguelike + RPG right now!

4211460.title: SherloCAT Nonogram Bahia
4211460.short_description: Take on 120 nonograms and embark on Sherlock Holmes' adventures in Bahia. Choose between relaxing in Classic Mode or testing your limits in Challenge Mode. Guaranteed fun for everyone from beginner to puzzle master!

4211490.title: Fast Food Wars
4211490.short_description: Fast Food War is a bullet hell dungeon crawler following a burger seeking to shoot, dash, cook, destroy enemy fast foods that stops him from reclaiming burger restaurants that has been overtaken by other fast foods.

4211570.title: Gift Drop Machine: Life Simulator
4211570.short_description: Build your life with surprise gifts falling from the machine! Sell, use, or invest. Manage your hunger and energy, handle your bank account, grow with your credit card, and buy homes and cars. Every choice shapes your fate—survive by balancing luck and strategy.

4211580.title: Mk50TWL Vehicle Battler Custom Slider
4211580.short_description: Vehicle real time tactics with slider based vehicle designer including customizable weapons, components, missiles.  Realism inspired battle system with vision, accuracy, target size, terrain, weather or electronic warfare.

4211620.title: Scary Cave Diving
4211620.short_description: Can you hold your breath when panic sets in? Experience the terror of deep-sea cave diving. Scavenge resources and fight to survive as you navigate procedurally generated underwater caves stalked by an apex predator!

4211720.title: Mine puzzle pieces of flower garden world
4211720.short_description: A puzzle game with the feature of randomly generating puzzle shapes for each round.

4211730.title: Miracle Revolution
4211730.short_description: A fantastical Bullet Hell game where you absorb and control enemy bullets to create your own firepower! Manipulate food-infused bullets to break through any formation, and use the power of Eggs to overthrow the wicked food goddesses!

4211780.title: Tales of Evion: Forgotten Dreams
4211780.short_description: Play as Tashy, a girl with no past, guided by mysterious Voices locked inside ancient pearls. Battle through illusions, unlock powerful Dreamcaster spells, face the darkness within yourself, and reclaim the world that was stolen.

4211820.title: Backrooms (2026)
4211820.short_description: An ultra-realistic co-op Backrooms experience for 1–6 players. Backrooms (2026) offers a mix of “classic” and brand-new, all original levels. Explore the levels, discover hidden routes, and cooperate with your team to escape.

4211830.title: Terminal Breach: Final Dawn
4211830.short_description: Year 2436. An unimaginable disaster has occurred on the 'Dawn' space station. You are the sole survivor of an elite marine squad. Your mission is to fight your way deep into the station and uncover the mystery behind the catastrophe.

4211840.title: HIDDEN CATS 8: Happy New Year 🎄🥂🎅
4211840.short_description: Explore the fairytale New Year's town while finding cute cats and paint black - white locations with colored paints.

4211860.title: Mushroom Nook
4211860.short_description: Mushrooms of all kinds—adorable, quirky, and even some with unique abilities—are spring up randomly on your computer! Collect and nurture them, then decorate with various objects to create your own cozy mushroom haven, keeping you company while you work, study, or simply unwind.

4211870.title: Pet.Net
4211870.short_description: Hatch and raise your very own PET, evolve them, train their stats, compete in competitions AND MUCH MORE! Designed for either active or passive play, sitting in the corner of your screen while you work on other things.

4211900.title: Baseball Scouter
4211900.short_description: You awaken as the manager of the league's worst team, burdened by the disastrous legacy of your predecessor. Your only edge is a secret ability: to see the hidden baseball potential in anyone. Scout overlooked talent, rebuild the roster, and uncover the truth behind the team's ruin.

4211910.title: Final Word Royale
4211910.short_description: Think fast, spell faster — your life depends on it. Join the deadly 40 player word battle royale, Solve word puzzles or face brutal consequences. Only one will remain.

4211930.title: Fireplace Game
4211930.short_description: It's a game where you can build a cozy fire. You can add logs, stoke it, use bellows (the accordion looking thing), and more. There are also cute themes for different holidays. Put it on your TV or your second monitor at work. It's an interactive fireplace. You get it.

4211980.title: Naughty New Year
4211980.short_description: A festive lewd jigsaw puzzle game featuring 20 uncensored winter-themed hentai artworks, cozy holiday music, and unlockable achievements.

4212050.title: Supreme Experiment
4212050.short_description: In a world abandoned by humans, machines have evolved into a new species—and found their own gods. Survive, explore, and fight to uncover the truth and realize that... nothing is what it seems. Perhaps, you can still save what remains of humanity.

4212070.title: 只有文字的挂机刷宝游戏
4212070.short_description: Start at 8x speed! Farm top-tier fellow cultivators and raise top-tier spirit pets, easily ascending to higher levels while AFK farming for treasure.

4212150.title: Vampire Instinct
4212150.short_description: Survive as long as you can as a thirsty vampire. Will you hide your kills to avoid the guards? Cause panic in the middle of a crowd? Graze on your victims, turning them into cursed killing machines? Vampire Instinct features an infinite world of procedurally generated towns and townsfolk to eat.

4212200.title: Scrap Squadrons
4212200.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4212200.short_description: A round-based spaceships-themed game with deckbuilding elements about squadrons of scrap ships turning each other into scrap.

4212280.title: UnderDark: Defense
4212280.short_description: Team up and take on this roguelite tower defense challenge. Strategically place towers to block enemy paths, draft random buffs to evolve your build, and withstand the dangers of the Underdark through online co-op with a friend. Only the synergy between you and your ally can hold back the darkness.

4212340.title: 100 Radioactive Cats
4212340.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4212400.title: Santa's War on Christmas
4212400.short_description: Santa’s War on Christmas is a top-down action game where Santa is fighting to stop the naughty Cabal with Coal, Gingerbread Stars, Candy Canes and Walnuts to once more be able to spread happiness and joy for all.

4212420.title: Thriving in Ruins – The End of Humanity is not the End of the World
4212420.short_description: Explore a post-post-apocalyptic world thriving without humans. Collect drawings to solve environmental riddles, unlocking biomes from mycelium roots to underwater seas. Piece the story together through exploration while enjoying cinematic views and atmospheric soundtracks.

4212520.title: Alice In Pumpkinland
4212520.short_description: Alice In Pumpkinland is a third person over-the-shoulder-camera comedy horror game.

4212530.title: Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming
4212530.short_description: 🎸 Get wild with Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming! 😈🔥 Click to collect ❤️, unlock punk outfits, and enjoy explicit scenes with the hottest rock-loving rebel!

4212590.title: Orangino
4212590.short_description: Orangino is a top-down roguelike shooter where you play a heroic orange on a mission to rescue his kidnapped love from a horde of mischievous vegetables. Equip a wild mix of medieval, modern, and magical weapons, and upgrade your skills to survive chaotic waves of enemies.

4212610.title: SALANN
4212610.short_description: A 1-bit exploration through a decaying city of the dead. Get lost in dialogue trees, leaf through weighty tomes, and make friends or enemies with the superstitious locals.

4212650.title: Horns
4212650.short_description: A dark third-person action RPG with fast, punishing combat, limited inventory, execution-driven abilities, and evolving horned powers that push you to survive the relentless, unforgiving challenges of Velharion.

4212710.title: Trader Traveler
4212710.short_description: Trader Traveler is a sandbox game. You will roam around the world to buy and sell stuff in cities. There will be prices fluctuations, material losses, thefts and disasters. In all this mayhem, you will try to maximize your profit.

4212740.title: Fable Infinity
4212740.short_description: This game is a meme puzzle game. The primary mechanics include starting or quitting the game using the title screen's "play" and "quit" option and using the arrow keys to move your character when you start the game, to find the exit which brings the win screen The appeal of this game is my artwork.

4212830.title: Void Nebula
4212830.short_description: Dive into Void Nebula, a roguelike deckbuilder inspired by Balatro and Cobalt Core. Battle foes, upgrade your deck, and break the game with absurd synergies and hilariously stupid builds.

4212870.title: Alliance Tales: Battle for the Frontier
4212870.short_description: Alliance Tales is a linear, story-driven space combat sim inspired by 90s classics like Wing Commander and Tie Fighter. Take part in fast-paced space battles in a campaign takes you on the search for a missing friend while foiling a plot to take over the Frontier Colonies.

4212900.title: Super Sticker Studio - Creative Fun for Everyone
4212900.short_description: Create cozy sticker art, personalized greeting cards & comics! Drag & drop cute stickers from Christmas, Farm, Dinosaurs, Space, Knights, Halloween, Ocean, Construction & more. Relaxing creative fun for kids and adults – design, share, enjoy!

4212910.title: Space Romance 🌌
4212910.short_description: Young cadet Aiya has scored the position of her dreams! Her beloved captain is her academy crush, and now they’re going to spend a whole year together in space! Alone on his research vessel! What she doesn’t know is that he too has been waiting for this very moment!

4212920.title: The Last Endure: Dungeon Escape
4212920.short_description: A brutal roguelike dungeon crawler where you lead a squad of three heroes through deadly traps and status-inflicting monsters. Build synergies, stack potions and Ancient Coins, and try to escape the dungeon before it consumes you.

4212930.title: Meteor Expedition
4212930.short_description: "Meteor Expedition" is a space science fiction shooter game where players lead a diverse and cool team of intelligent mechanical forces to blast the alien enemies into the sky!

4213000.title: Argonauts Agency:  Patterns of Morpheus
4213000.short_description: Jason, Medea, and Asclepius fight nightmares to restore the balance between sleep and waking life.

4213060.title: Late Night Tales
4213060.short_description: Late Night Tales is a visual novel with cinematic visuals, a choice based story and 10+ different endings. Play as Alfred of Wildrivers fight against the danger rising from the North. The night is waiting for you to tell its tale. 🌙✨

4213140.title: Femboy House
4213140.short_description: A romantic thriller visual novel where you wake up trapped in a smart home with four femboys and an AI that won't let anyone leave. Build relationships, uncover secrets, and choose whether to escape or stay in this mystery dating sim with multiple endings.

4213160.title: Data Strafer
4213160.short_description: Data Strafer is a chaotic bullet hell shoot 'em up that tasks you with infiltrating a network to destroy forbidden knowledge. Defeat enemies to absorb their power and activate your own upgrades.

4213190.title: Recollect
4213190.short_description: Recollect is a 2D adventure puzzle game based on typing, where you explore a world of lost memories. Solve unique puzzles, uncover forgotten spells and look for meaning in dreams to find out who you really are.

4213300.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: Purple Grape
4213300.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful purple grape mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

4213310.title: Cardaver
4213310.short_description: Cardaver is a tower defense, deckbuilder, with roguelike looping gameplay. Using a wide variety of monsters and spells to defend each lane, help the Dragon Queen protect her Castle Kingdom against an army of fantasy do-gooders and tyrannical princesses.

4213370.title: Panel Attack
4213370.short_description: Fast, flashy, and free.A modern twist on classic Panel de Pon / Tetris Attack–style match-3 action. Swap tiles, trigger insane chains, and push your skills to the limit as the board rises beneath you. Easy to learn, hard to master, and built for pure, arcade-speed fun.

4213380.title: Incremental Dungeon
4213380.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4213380.short_description: Incremental Dungeon is an incremental game in which you fight combatants with exponentially increasing strength via an auto-battler system. Each defeated opponent on the main path unlocks new equipment, shops, or other ways of empowering your build!

4213440.title: SONS OF POSEIDON
4213440.short_description: First-person naval strategy and colony building game set in ancient Greece. Found a colony, gather resources, and build your fleet. Embark on missions to pilot your ship and command your fleet. Sink enemy vessels from the helm of your ship, or board them and deal the killing blow.

4213510.title: Trauma playground
4213510.short_description: Trauma playground is a horror playground simulator, where some toys are dangerous, and some are fun. Your goal is to spot which is which.

4213520.title: GEODE
4213520.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4213520.short_description: In this top-down, multiplayer, co-op game, you must protect your Core Crystal by any means necessary. Build up your defenses, explore, refine, and upgrade to reach your goal. Play alone or with up to 8 people.

4213530.title: Fuck the Infected 🧟
4213530.short_description: Eden’s sense of adventure has put her in a difficult place in this post-apocalyptic world. She’s suddenly discovered a creature that hungers for something besides her brains and the meat on her bones. Well, he wants her flesh, but what he wants to do with it is something Eden may not mind after all.

4213650.title: Hazen's Children
4213650.short_description: Save your family or save your friends.

4213660.title: ScavRail
4213660.short_description: ScavRail is a survival extraction game with no combat. Explore procedurally-generated environments to scavenge for resources and supplies. Survival depends entirely on strategic inventory and resource management.

4213680.title: Urban runaway
4213680.short_description: Urban Runaway is a dynamic, endless arcade runner about escaping a relentless city. Collect coins, avoid enemies, find the best paths, and see how long you can last in this fast-paced game where the main rule is: don't stop.

4213730.title: Protocol X
4213730.short_description: In the semi-open world horror game Protocol X, you must uncover a dark past set in 1975 Germany, survive deadly experiments, save your family and the Weltel family, and race against time in a historical story that offers 7 different endings.

4213750.title: Zareck: The VideoGame
4213750.short_description: Play as Záreck, a prince condemned by darkness, in a brutal action-adventure with intense melee combat. Explore wild lands, face demonic creatures, and fight to rescue your sister from the fanatical monks of the underworld.

4213760.title: Battleline: Pacific
4213760.short_description: The Pacific is at war! Take command of an Arleigh Burke destroyer, hunt submarines, guard the U.S. carrier group, & master anti‑submarine warfare. Free Early Access proof of concept, tested & positively evaluated at the U.S. Naval Postgraduate School; your feedback will shape the fleet’s future.

4213940.title: Idle Shooter
4213940.short_description: IDLE SHOOTER: A unique hybrid of an arcade shooter and an idle game. Smash blocks, collect various currencies, and boost your power and income. Use the prestige system, deploy idle turrets, or invest in mining for passive income. Choose your path!

4213960.title: Messenger of Death: Blood Bond
4213960.short_description: The dead are piling up and the curse is growing stronger… Uncover the evil plaguing the ancient Gordon family. The legendary Czech game returns to its roots. Messenger of Death: Blood Bond, is a classic point-and-click adventure game focusing on story, puzzles, dark atmosphere and proven gameplay.

4213990.title: Panic Sell 2
4213990.short_description: The continuation of the trading simulator is here! Try to build insane capital in this game while avoiding a total balance wipeout.

4214010.title: A.I. P.I.
4214010.short_description: A.I. P.I. ( Artificial Intelligence Private Investigator ) - A fun and challenging interactive multipath visual novel mystery!

4214110.title: Entwined: The Visual Novel
4214110.short_description: Entwined is a visual novel horror game set in a hospital. A lockdown has occurred and no one can escape. Team up with either a nurse or a patient in order to escape the hospital. Make your choice for the path ahead…

4214140.title: BioMech Vendetta
4214140.short_description: An action RPG shooter where you battle biomechanical monsters, evolve your soldier, and command a powerful companion as you fight to reclaim a planet reborn.

4214220.title: Pirate's Dual
4214220.short_description: A 2D pixel-art PvP ship battle game where you outplay opponents with smart attack and defense tactics. Climb matchmaking, join tournaments, earn in-game currency, unlock skins, and more.

4214230.title: Final 4 Survival
4214230.short_description: Final 4 Survival is an Arcade style top-down shooter. You play as an elemental soldier and are tasked with having to defeat waves of enemies!

4214260.title: Vespertales
4214260.short_description: Restore light, explore surreal worlds, and confront a creeping darkness to save your brother from a corrupted dream

4214270.title: Sneaky All-Nighter 2
4214270.short_description: It's time for another sneaky all-nighter! Play to your heart's content in all-new situations—just don't get caught!

4214320.title: 我的美味丈夫 My Tasty Husband
4214320.short_description: 你将扮演主角芽，跟随她的视角展开一段关于美食和爱的故事。奇怪的丈夫、莽撞的快递员、尽职尽责的警察……一桩又一桩的杀人案在悄无声息中改变了你的生活，而你甚至分不清那是真实还是虚幻。你做出正确的选择，迎来自己的结局。

4214360.title: Dead-End Bounty
4214360.short_description: Dead-End Bounty is an open-world top-down shooter set in the wild west! A frontier with 3 kinds of people: the ones on wanted posters, the ones printing them, and people like Charlie—a bounty hunter with his eyes set on one particular bounty that has slipped through his hands a few too many times.

4214540.title: KAFAK
4214540.short_description: KAFAK – Survival Card-Building & Base Management Game Build your deck with 150+ unique cards, upgrade characters and your base, craft Thai dishes, hunt and farm to survive, and face 10+ powerful bosses in a post-apocalyptic world.

4214610.title: 100FRIENDS
4214610.short_description: The Loneliness Epidemic is coming, and we need your help! It's time to join 100FRIENDS to destroy the Legions of Sadness, and bring the world back together once and for all... <3

4214640.title: Dreams
4214640.short_description: A meditative incremental / idle game where you weave dreams, collect memories, and dive ever deeper into the dreamscape.

4214650.title: Day Of The Harvesters
4214650.short_description: Become a Shi’kegnt harvester and travel to distant planets to harvest food and resources for your civilization. Rise in the ranks and become the Supreme Shi’kegnt. Stay alive at all costs. Survive, construct, harvest, and progress in this pixel art, sci-fi, survival game set in a distant future.

4214660.title: At the Mount Leng of madness
4214660.short_description: Four female college students visit a mountain where spirits live. There had been a number of disappearances there in the past, and it was known as a dangerous place. This work is a visual novel that depicts the secrets of Mount Leng and the adventures of college students.

4214720.title: ナフダサガシ
4214720.short_description: “Nafuda Sagashi” is a psychological exploration game set in the liminal spaces of a Japanese school, where you wander through the building searching for lost name tags.

4214730.title: Defragmenting
4214730.short_description: The outside is being ravaged by a mysterious downpour of a glass, you are forced to take shelter in a seemingly innocuous rundown hotel. Yet, stuck with you are people who you wish you would never see again. What will you do to survive?

4214790.title: Cropacalypse
4214790.short_description: A cozy themed farm where the crops are alive! Harvest your crop with a Harvester AKA W.H.E.A.T. (Weaponized Harvest Extraction Assault Tool). Challenge progressively difficult levels while changing the harvest to reduce Crop stats, buy and upgrade weapons, and level up to make the ultimate farmer.

4214890.title: Magebook Marketplace
4214890.short_description: Help two wizards sell a cauldron on Magebook Marketplace, the only app banned in eight kingdoms. Chat with bizarre buyers, stalk their profiles, and examine borderline illegal listings as you try to make back the gold lost on a bad bet! Remember, It's lowball or be lowballed!

4214900.title: Conquest
4214900.short_description: Conquest is a turn-based open-world fantasy game that allows you to explore a world created by multiple stages of randomness. Every card, interaction, map location, and character is linked to several layers of physical (and internal) decks of cards to ensure you never have the same experience twice!

4214970.title: Kanji Collect!
4214970.short_description: Learn Japanese by collecting 2,209 commonly used kanji and steadily improving your reading skills. Two game modes help reinforce your learning, while a dedicated kana-training level enables you to quickly and confidently master hiragana and katakana.

4215000.title: Hentai Horny Maid
4215000.short_description: Hentai Horny Maid - Every day the maids will clean your room — help them! Solve puzzles and collect pictures. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4215520.title: Godfinger
4215520.short_description: GodFinger is a high-score-driven roguelike card game where every card has multiple uses and every run is a hunt for the perfect synergy. Push your luck as far as you dare—until the deck bites back.

4215690.title: Dreamstory
4215690.short_description: Dreamstory is an RPG about a world where Dreams are real.

4215700.title: Goldmourne
4215700.short_description: A roguelike wave survival game where greed is your greatest weapon—and your deadliest risk. Fight as 8 unique heroes, upgrade weapons infinitely, and choose from 30 perks with powerful benefits and painful drawbacks. How far will your greed take you?

4215780.title: Hidden Things Beach Elves
4215780.short_description: Cozy hidden object game, where you will explore the beach full of elves who are engaged in all sorts of cool activities. There are many cute and funny stories happening, you just need to look closely!

4215800.title: LOOP THE LOOP The Mansion of Gluttony
4215800.short_description: A closed-circle mystery visual novel where twelve people are trapped in a secluded mansion and a string of murders begins. Read from Remi’s point of view as you slowly piece together the truth through his thoughts and conversations. Linear, text-focused, Japanese/English supported.

4215830.title: 疯狂传奇
4215830.genre: Action, Adventure, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play, Early Access
4215830.short_description: In a world where future technology merges with prehistoric behemoths, Mad Legend is a fun game that blends mecha breeding and side-scrolling adventure: You’ll step into the role of a mecha dragon tamer, build your exclusive mechanical dinosaur army, and embark on a perilous survival adventure!

4215840.title: The beach in Sanya
4215840.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4215850.title: Sweet Kitten
4215850.short_description: Sweet Kitten - A simple and beautiful puzzle game featuring catgirls. It depicts the daily lives of five pretty and adorable catgirls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the catgirl's photos in the gallery.

4215910.title: Dream Village
4215910.short_description: Immerse yourself in the cozy world of village life! Set up your home, buy groceries or order home delivery, cook delicious soups, manage your farm and earn real estate. Dream Village - dreams become reality!

4215970.title: Fairywren
4215970.short_description: After the war, your crew of human smugglers tries to make a living in the Commonwealth outskirts. Pilot and upgrade your ship, evade patrols, use decoys, explore, trade and improve your crews ability to talk themselves out tight situations in this 2,5D 80s-themed Scifi Western Stealth Space Sim.

4216090.title: Clash of Peaks: Dynasty in Your Grasp
4216090.short_description: This is a PC basketball game. Its core features are fast-paced battles and diverse gameplay, allowing players of all skill levels to experience the thrill of basketball. It primarily features fast-paced 1v1 matches with freely controllable game length, suitable for fragmented entertainment.

4216170.title: Prostitute Pimp 2
4216170.short_description: The only simulator that allows you to live as a pimp who runs a brothel is back: Prostitute Pimp 2!

4216200.title: Maze Nightmare-Edge of Darkness
