4216200.short_description: 《Maze Nightmare-Edge of Darkness》 is a first-person survival game. Trapped in a foggy, procedural maze, use limited ammo and faint breath sounds to locate the key-carrying zombie, find the key, and escape—or be lost forever.

4216280.title: Dverghold
4216280.short_description: When the Dwarves of Dverghold awakened something ancient beneath the isle of Rekestt, King Sterren sent word across the Shattered Sea: brave the haunted depths, or let the darkness rise. Oldschool dungeon crawler with turn-based combat and atmospheric soundtrack by Dungeon Synth artist Splendorius.

4216460.title: Session Notes: Night Vigil
4216460.short_description: Face the terror of the night shift. Luna is trapped in her hospital, stalked by a vengeful obsession. Survive the shifts, evade the jumpscares, and escape the nightmare in this psychological horror.

4216480.title: FOTR
4216480.short_description: A quasi-documentary trip that leads to a phone booth in 2002, where feelings of nostalgia and pain from broken parental relationships intertwine.

4216540.title: Eclipse Protocol 2130
4216540.short_description: “A fast-paced action roguelite arena shooter where you battle relentless enemy waves, unlock new weapons and upgrades, and push your limits with every run. Survive dynamic challenges, face unique bosses, and become the final line of defense in 2130.”

4216600.title: Rebel Knights
4216600.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4216600.short_description: Forget everything about chivalry! Rebel Knights is a chaotic, physics based 3D Action FPS.  A rebellious knight decided swords are boring, arrows are for peasants, and the only honorable way to capture a castle is by blowing it up!

4216630.title: NIGHTBELL
4216630.short_description: Nightbell is a first-person Christmas Eve horror told through the eyes of a boy who stayed home with his mother. After a bedtime story about a witch with a bell, he wakes up to that same familiar chime, discovers his mother is missing, and comes face to face with a creature eerily similar to her.

4216690.title: Gem Brawl Duel
4216690.short_description: A gem war testing reflexes, strategy, and hauling! On shared screen, precious gems rain down as you battle for territory. Drag gems to your camp to score, disrupt rivals, and fight for supremacy. Every gem can change the battle!

4216730.title: Truck Clash Duel
4216730.short_description: In limited-round battles, drive your war machine and crush all! Truck Clash Duel is a fast-paced shooter for 2-player split-screen duels. Control your unique vehicle, build momentum with every kill, and crown the points champion!

4216740.title: Toot Odyssey
4216740.short_description: Leap forward! Toot Odyssey is a physics-based action platformer for 1-2 players. Master fart power and direction, find hidden toilet paper, dodge tricky traps, and race against the clock to reach the toilet at the finish! Wishing you a smooth and speedy journey.

4216750.title: Twin Balls Journey
4216750.short_description: Live together, die together—bound by a single thread. True companions dare to have their fates tied by a rope. Twin Balls Journey is a two-player cooperative action game. Work in sync, manipulate environmental contraptions, and leverage each scene's unique properties to conquer every level.

4216770.title: Unanchored Spaceshooting
4216770.short_description: Welcome to the most counter-intuitive shooter arena! In Unanchored Spaceshooting, your guns ARE your thrusters—dodge left by firing right! Every battle defies physics. Blast enemies, rack up high scores!

4216780.title: Hilarious Delivery
4216780.short_description: Take orders, fire up the stoves! Hilarious Delivery is a single-player and co-op restaurant sim where you run a frantic takeout shop against the clock. Cook dishes, then pull off the perfect handoff to your delivery rider.

4216820.title: Santa's Burnout
4216820.short_description: Santa has officially quit. The kids are too spoiled, and the magic is gone. This year, the Toy Factory has been converted into a strip mine. Click rocks, crush hope, and manage a cynical coal mining operation in this dark industrial idle game. Your goal? Ensure everyone gets coal for Christmas.

4216930.title: Wicked Ways
4216930.short_description: Wicked Ways is an adult visual novel where you navigate a complex web of relationships. Balance ambition and desire as you make choices that blur loyalty and intimacy, exploring hidden depths in a world where every interaction carries weight.

4216950.title: Hotel Espir
4216950.short_description: Trapped overnight in a grand Alabama hotel built on plantation soil, you must outsmart the echo of a century-old killer. Use sound, stealth, and your instincts to survive the night and uncover the secret beneath Hotel Espir.

4217030.title: Broken Race
4217030.short_description: Broken Race is a roguelike racing game set in an eternal night where your exhaustion distorts reality. Run, upgrade your car, and clear levels as fast as possible while facing enemies born from your own madness.

4217080.title: EvilTrap: Prologue
4217080.short_description: Enter a sinister village that wants to keep you trapped forever. Eviltrap: Prologue is a standalone psychological horror experience where the environment shifts with every step. Open the door to an evil you thought had ended, but is just the beginning.

4217210.title: Interdimensional Lili
4217210.short_description: Interdimensional Lili is a point and click adventure game with exploration and funny dialogues. It focuses on the character Lili who've accidentally got inside a portal to another dimension and needs to go home.

4217230.title: Psyhonds
4217230.short_description: A satirical mental hospital survival simulator: control four unstable characters, craft from junk, forge dubious alliances, communicate with patients and staff, and choose between a quiet life in a ward, a riot, or a risky escape to freedom.

4217250.title: Beastfall
4217250.short_description: A pure Boss Rush roguelike - no trash mobs, only epic boss battles. Find your sister's body in a journey of redemption and revenge. Encounter eight unique deities and uncover the truth buried 200 years ago.

4217270.title: Santa Holiday Puzzle
4217270.short_description: Santa Holiday Puzzle is a cozy Christmas-themed match-3 puzzle game for PC. Match colorful tiles, use fun boosters, enjoy relaxing winter music, and play dozens of festive levels at your own pace. Perfect for casual players and families.

4217290.title: Stella Incus
4217290.short_description: Firefighting, Inventory management, crisis management, planning, survival, Build infrastructure that can handle the heat, put out fires, try to survive through one shift. If you can even make it out of basic training! Now with Major Pain's Boot camp to get players up to speed.

4217330.title: Six Seals
4217330.short_description: Trapped in the endless halls of a pharaonic tomb. Watch every change, then choose to step forward or turn back. Each decision shapes six cursed seals: edge closer to freedom or lose them all in a suffocating psychological horror.

4217400.title: Time to Die
4217400.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4217400.short_description: Time To Die is a strategic roguelike dice-builder. Choose your heroes to fight relentless enemies in turn-based combat where time is your enemy.

4217430.title: Prostitute Casino
4217430.short_description: Seduce sugar daddies, earn money, spend it all at the casino, and become the richest prostitute in the city!

4217440.title: Inner Peace
4217440.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4217440.short_description: Inner Peace is a physics sandbox game where you bounce balls around a world to direct them into a target. Simple, releaxing and satisfying.

4217660.title: Small Hero
4217660.short_description: Welcome to Small Hero! This is a fast-paced, entertaining light Roguelike action survival game. You will play as a lone hero, facing off against waves of monsters. Each round is a brand-new adventure: you must shop and strengthen yourself between waves, then face more intense battle for survival!

4217690.title: Uncanny Tales: The Watcher
4217690.short_description: 2006. You become the new reserve caretaker. Patrol the territory in your rugged 4x4, check the phototraps, and monitor the area using surveillance cameras. But remember: you are not the only one watching.

4217750.title: Scapegoat & Rational
4217750.short_description: 小鎮上的學童離奇失蹤，調查員蕭恩李奇受邀前往傳說中的詛咒宅邸參與孩子們的營救行動，調查過程中營救小隊的成員卻連續被害。是死於宅邸中的詛咒、還是兇手就在他們之中……？Scapegoat & Rational是一款融合了懸疑劇情 + 收集關鍵線索推理 + 逃脫式謎題的劇情向推理解謎遊戲。跟著角色一起撥開迷霧、展開一場調查之旅吧！
publishers: 萊斯特的帽子 Lester's cap

4217800.title: Sweeper
4217800.short_description: Wager. Sweep. Spend. Repeat. The Minesweeper Grid-building Roguelike is here.

4217840.title: Sticker Catcher: Star Invasion
4217840.short_description: A quick and satisfying arcade game. Rotate the platform and collect space-themed stickers!

4217880.title: Tristar Mania
4217880.short_description: Get in on the action with this addictive 2D python space shooter.

4217930.title: Briar Flame
4217930.short_description: A stylized action-platformer set in a world consumed by eternal thorns. Explore handcrafted zones, unlock new flame-forged upgrades, and face brutal bosses as the Young Emberhost in a desperate attempt to reach the Heart of the Briar.

4217990.title: Sugoroku New Year's Party
4217990.short_description: Try your luck and test your wits in this adventure of fortune! Good luck abounds in Sugoroku New Year's Party!

4218030.title: where's my egg?
4218030.short_description: Where’s my egg? A poor chicken dad has sadly lost his eggs. Help him find 62 strange eggs and bring them back.

4218640.title: Brawl Arena Shooter
4218640.short_description: A fast-paced top-down arena shooter where cute animal heroes clash in chaotic online battles. Dash through bushes, grab power-ups, outplay rivals, and climb the global leaderboard in nonstop action.

4218660.title: Cute Away: Paws Caretaker Simulator
4218660.short_description: Run the town’s coziest cat caretaking home! Renovate and upgrade your house, manage inventory and order supplies online. Fulfill specific feline requests with specialized furniture and engaging toys. Play with cats, keep them happy, and optimize your layout to create the perfect daily workflow.

4218680.title: Bird Game 3
4218680.short_description: Bird Game 3 is an immersive Multiplayer BvB (Bird vs. Bird) game, now finally coming to Steam! Select your favorite bird and fight other birds for domination over the bird realm!

4218720.title: Bird Game
4218720.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4218720.short_description: Fly, steal eggs, and outplay other birds in chaotic challenges. Pick your bird, explore unique maps, and enjoy fun game modes. Bird Game delivers pure chaos, laughs, and competition.

4218730.title: Corridor Duel
4218730.short_description: A modern 3D strategy experience. Place walls, block your opponent, and reach the goal first.

4218740.title: Meat is Murder
4218740.short_description: A top-down survival horror game, with procedurally generated maps, where eating meat heals you... but every bite makes the vegan serial-killer faster.

4218750.title: Digital Processing
4218750.short_description: Welcome to Halcyon Dynamics! In your new role you'll be expected to process digits efficiently and build a small well-motivated team, if you have the right attitude. Don't overthink it; they're definitely just digits. A narrative-driven incremental management sim.

4218770.title: Lone Warrior
4218770.short_description: Lone Warrior is a fast-paced action roguelite about 1-on-1 reaction battles. Dodge enemy attacks, strike in short openings and spend the gold you keep after death to unlock new spells, stats and items.

4218800.title: Nothing's Ever Really Dead
4218800.short_description: A cyberpunk point-and-click murder mystery. Solve the murder of your best friend ... with the help of your best friend?!

4218850.title: Think Like a Block
4218850.short_description: Think Like a Block is a minimalist puzzle where logic becomes power. Push, connect, and manipulate blocks to activate mechanisms, open paths, and shift reactive rooms. Master abilities, find clever solutions, and face challenges where one wrong move can change everything.

4218870.title: EXTROCORE
4218870.short_description: An apocalyptic sci-fi game where you slay demons with style. Jump, dodge, dash, and parry to avoid incoming fire. Use Rewires to shape your build, level up to put points into Attributes and Perks, and progress through the world to unlock more Abilities.

4218930.title: Touhou: Blossom Blade
4218930.short_description: Konpaku Youmu sets out to prove herself to Saigyouji Yuyuko, mistress of Hakugyokurou. Make use of her three skills and challenge the veteran incident resolver and shrine maiden, Hakurei Reimu. An exhilarating 3D bullet hell action game set in Gensokyo, the world of Touhou Project!

4218950.title: Siege at Sundown
4218950.genre: Action, Massively Multiplayer, Strategy, Early Access
4218950.short_description: The match runs in cycles: during the day you develop your base and economy. At night you can no longer construct buildings; battles and the siege begin. Each subsequent night is longer, and the final night is endless. Victory goes to the one who destroys the opponent s fortress.

4219000.title: World without Time
4219000.short_description: World without Time is an atmospheric adventure about a fire alicorn exploring a ruined world, using magic, and confronting their past self. Experience exploration, flight, light combat, and choices that shape the fate of the protagonist.

4219010.title: Bird Game 3
4219010.short_description: Bird Game 3 is a multiplayer peck and slash game where you and your flock defend your eggs and raid rival nests. Choose from a diverse roster of birds, each with unique abilities and playstyles.

4219030.title: Elemental Battle: Eclipse
4219030.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4219030.short_description: An anime-style arena fighter with elemental powers, unique characters, and combo-heavy combat. Built by a solo developer, featuring striking visuals, unique abilities, responsive controls, and fast local multiplayer battles packed with style and energy for all skill levels and endless replayability.

4219060.title: Idle Ways
4219060.short_description: An incremental game about building and optimizing your own global transport network. Draw lines, place stations, and unlock new systems as your cities grow!

4219090.title: Brawlette
4219090.short_description: Assemble a deck - tweak the odds - spin the wheel. Roulette meets mini-roguelike deck battler!

4219110.title: 爱语空间
4219110.short_description: A healing adventure game driven by random topics. In an abandoned garden, you find a broken conversation robot"Ai". Talk deeply, help repair his body, uncover his past, and become lovers. Watch Ai grow from silent to gentle, and even accompany your work or study. Your choices shape his fate.

4219330.title: BOT.vinnik Chess: Legendary Queens
4219330.short_description: Do you think chess is a man's game, comrade? THINK AGAIN! The Soviet Queens are here to crush your ego and show you true elegance on the board. Enroll NOW!

4219340.title: Fruit Fusion!
4219340.short_description: Help Aira, Rinka and Yuri merge fruit and unlock new cards in this sweet and charming Suika x Deckbuilder!

4219390.title: Monster Girls Pieces
4219390.short_description: Drag and drop puzzle pieces to complete animated images of beautiful, animated monster girls! Progress through this episodic game to unlock hotter, sexier scenes! Fully animated, relaxing hentai reassemble game!

4219410.title: Tiny Egg Clicker
4219410.short_description: An idle pet-collecting clicker game that keeps you company at the bottom of your screen. Click your egg to help it hatch. Grow your collection of pets to unlock upgrades and rarer eggs. Relax to chill Lofi music while you play at your own pace. Will you hatch the shiny variant of each pet?

4219430.title: The Last Departure
4219430.short_description: The Last Departure is an atmospheric horror game set aboard the final run of a closing train line. Find your way out or loop forever.

4219470.title: Lucky Bunny Casino - Alluring Collection
4219470.short_description: Lucky Bunny Casino - Alluring Collection is an adult casino game where you can enjoy Texas Hold’em, Baccarat, and Up & Down. Use the gold you earn in the games to unlock stunning character photos and videos, and try your luck with Fortuna’s Lucky Number Draw for a chance at true fortune.

4219490.title: Hentai Pop Star
4219490.short_description: Hentai Pop Star is an erotic puzzle game where each completed level reveals new seductive artwork of a stunning anime idol. Neon vibes, satisfying gameplay, and beautifully drawn illustrations create an addictive experience you'll keep coming back to.

4219560.title: Aliencity
4219560.short_description: AlienCity is a fast-paced, wave-based FPS where you fight through a dark, stylized city overrun by alien creatures. Survive, score high, and push your limits against relentless enemy swarms.

4219640.title: Horny Jail
4219640.short_description: A comedy dating sim visual novel where you supervise conjugal visits as a new guard at Horny Jail. Navigate seduction attempts from five hot inmates, make choices that determine your fate, and resist temptation—or give in—in this meme-based romantic comedy adventure.

4219650.title: Marrowbound
4219650.short_description: First-person hack-and-slasher with a heavy emphasis on exploration and player expression. You are an instrument of divine retribution.

4219720.title: Mindcage: Override
4219720.short_description: A VR action-puzzle game with Boneworks-style physics. Grab, throw, climb — every object has weight and behaves naturally. Solve environmental challenges, fight your way through a locked-down facility. If physics allows it — it works.

4219730.title: Hentai Furry Cow
4219730.short_description: This is a gentle erotic adventure for those who love furry characters, farm aesthetics, and soft, pleasant sensuality that doesn’t push — but seduces.

4219790.title: Bird Game: What The Flock
4219790.short_description: Bird Game: What The Flock is a chaotic PVP bird brawler where teams fight to steal the enemy egg and bring it back to their nest. Use open voice chat to yell, trick, and squawk your way to victory in fast, hilarious bird mayhem.

4219880.title: Chrono Wing: Cats in Space!
4219880.short_description: Chrono Wing: Cats in Space!" is a 90s-inspired SHMUP. Master five action-packed stages and use your time-rewinding abilities to dodge the game-over screen and build huge combos.

4219930.title: Encore!
4219930.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4219930.short_description: Begin your career at the Multiversal Institute for the Rhythmic Arts (MIRA), an interdimensional school where music, magic, and friendship collide.  Encore! is a rhythm game and visual novel hybrid, where you must curate a band from wacky characters to win Battle of the Bands!

4220010.title: mystery of Y
4220010.short_description: “Mystery of Y” 是一款角色扮演类的悬疑冒险游戏，玩家将探索神秘的古代遗迹，解决谜团并参与策略性对战，揭示底层的秘密与历史，体验丰富的剧情和角色发展的无限可能。

4220020.title: 梁山传奇
4220020.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4220020.short_description: In a whimsical cartoon world, Liangshan Legend is a delightful casual match-three game — follow the mysterious shamanic elements and embark on a cute block-matching adventure!

4220030.title: Chicago 4th of July
4220030.short_description: Chicago 4th of July is an open-world, action-adventure RPG set in a near-future Chicago — a glamorous yet oppressive megacity wrapped in a mysterious Veil. Uncover the truth behind the Veil, navigate a world ruled by power and rise against a system built to keep you blind.

4220080.title: Samburger's oddballs
4220080.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4220080.short_description: A block boomin, cannon blastin, heart grabbin combo! play games such as: Anncceleration: Collect hearts while you race against the clock in multiple levels! Athena's higher wire: Dodge cannons and collect stars for a high score! Boomin blocks: Line up combos in a puzzle shooter!

4220130.title: Toilet Femdom 2: Christmas Afterparty
4220130.short_description: Experience another day with Kiyo, your sadistic bully who enjoys watching women use you as a toilet, and 6 sadistic punks with issues who can't wait to use you as their own personal toilet to relieve their stress.

4220140.title: Mummy's Escape
4220140.short_description: After centuries of slumber, Rek awakens to find his beloved Nilo missing. Travel through ancient pyramids, oasis paths, and forgotten ruins, mastering three unique forms to overcome challenges and defeat the guardians standing in your way.

4220150.title: Deep Board Go
4220150.short_description: Experience Go (围棋 / 圍棋 / 바둑 / 囲碁) in beautiful 3D with handcrafted boards, smooth camera controls, and smart AI. The physical beauty of Go is a big part of its charm, and DeepBoardGO brings that tactile elegance into the digital world for a fresh, closer experience.

4220160.title: BuddySkill
4220160.short_description: Buddy Skill is a fast-paced roguelike shooter RPG where you dodge waves of bullets and defeat enemies using powerful skill combos with your Buddy. Enjoy simple yet strategic gameplay, dynamic skill builds, and unique Buddy combinations for a fresh challenge every battle!

4220180.title: Little Smiles Daycare
4220180.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4220180.short_description: A short psychological horror experience set inside an abandoned daycare. Explore, uncover hidden notes, solve eerie mysteries, and discover what happened to Little Smiles Daycare, before something finds you first.

4220190.title: Rank the zombie triple pack
4220190.short_description: Cartoon horror madness across 3 platformer and shoot 'em up games! Run, jump, shoot and even help Santa through many levels, defeating evil. Features classic soundtracks, simple controls and 30-60 minutes of gameplay in these mini adventures. Explore this afterlife adventure again with Rank!

4220260.title: Starframe Station
4220260.short_description: A physics‑based sandbox 2D adventure of survival and exploration. Gather resources to build bases, contraptions, and outposts on land or in space, but since everything keeps its mass, hauling it around requires smart planning.

4220350.title: Lord Of Anatolia
4220350.short_description: A real-time city-building and strategy game set in 1300s Anatolia. Build your settlement, manage resources, expand your economy, train soldiers, research new technologies, and defend your beylik against enemy forces.

4220360.title: Full Course Mayhem
4220360.short_description: Food! Explosions! Victory! 'Full Course Mayhem' is a rhythm adventure game. Run a restaurant as the only human living in the Land of Monsters.

4220370.title: KUMASAMA
4220370.short_description: A large brown shadow lurks in the abandoned factory; the night hides her form.Something terrifyingly massive is concealed within this town.I think of her, and of the days I can never go back to.“KUMASAMA” is a horror adventure set in the present day.

4220430.title: Hunted Within: The Metro
4220430.short_description: Dive into a story-driven horror FPS set in an abandoned metro system: escape underground prison, pilot a survival train through dark tunnels, and venture onto a deadly, frozen surface while hunting for your last friend and confronting the mastermind from your past.

4220440.title: Space Aces

4220440.short_description: Space Aces is an indie space shooter that plunges you into an online universe full of action, strategy, and fierce competition. Step into the cockpit and evolve from a rookie pilot into the most feared Ace in the galaxy!

4220450.title: Quichotte: Desktop Knight
4220450.short_description: Zombies. Skeletons. Dragons. Sir Quichotte fights them all on from a small corner of your desktop while you go about your day. Create the most powerful build in this idle auto-battler. Lofi included. Resize him, pin him, or go fullscreen. Your knight, your rules.

4220470.title: Hentai Spacegirl
4220470.short_description: Hentai Spacegirl is an erotic puzzle game set in a glowing sci-fi universe. Solve puzzles to unlock seductive, high-quality artwork of a beautiful space explorer in cosmic, neon-lit scenes.

4220510.title: SCICRY
4220510.short_description: A first-person sci-fi action-horror. After a catastrophic event, the station’s crew has mutated, turning its corridors into a deadly labyrinth. Explore the station, scavenge resources, and fight monsters to survive.

4220520.short_description: A fast neon arcade game where you bounce through a physics-based arena to hit edges, outscore three bots, activate quick power-ups, and unlock glowing skins. Enjoy intense, competitive, and replayable 60-second rounds built for pure arcade action.

4220540.title: Hentai Archer
4220540.short_description: Hentai Archer is an erotic puzzle game where you uncover seductive artwork of a beautiful elven archer by solving relaxing puzzles in a magical forest setting.

4220600.title: Feed Me
4220600.short_description: The toothy hole is hungry again — Feed It! Where to get food? Catch fish, farm, set traps and hunt. The local villagers will help you, one way or another... Can you satisfy the monster's insatiable appetite?

4220670.title: THE DOUBLE
4220670.short_description: Your doppelgänger has stolen your identity. Win it back through twisted card games where every hand reshapes reality. Tarot meets blackjack in this psychological horror inspired by Dostoevsky. Your choices fracture your sanity. Chapter 1: 30-70 minutes.

4220720.title: Bird Game 3
4220720.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4220720.short_description: on bird game you play as birds and fight and also try to steal the eggs. its very fun to battle in bird game 3.

4220730.title: Medals Of Valor: Last Stand
4220730.short_description: A retro WW2 FPS with PSX-style graphics inspired by classic shooters. Fight online with up to 24 players or play fully solo against smart bots across several maps.

4220880.title: Starfall Deck
4220880.short_description: Construct humanity's last refuge in a vertical tower-city amidst deadly storms. In this rogue-lite city builder, manage scarcity by day and strategically play your deck to expand by night. The storm is coming—play your cards right to keep Hope alive.

4220940.title: Five Nights In Saransk
4220940.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4220940.short_description: You wake up in the middle of the night in your cozy one-room apartment and notice something wandering around your five-story panel building. Your only task is to prevent these strange creatures from getting inside.

4220960.title: LOST IN TRANSIT
4220960.short_description: a horror game about trains, girls, and hospitals

4220990.title: Tempting Trevor
4220990.short_description: He ghosted you, then kissed you. Now Trevor, your cocky situationship, is shirtless in your apartment. Tempting Trevor is a spicy gay visual novel where your choices steer the heat, heart, and horniness. Will you rebuild trust, push his buttons, or see how far he'll go?

4221070.title: The Incredible Number Puzzles
4221070.short_description: Attention Math Geniuses (and those who just think they are)! Throw away your calculators, because this is the game where your so-called "brilliant numeric skills" and "encyclopedic maths knowledge" are about to get a serious reality check. Let's whip those rusty brain gears into shape!

4221100.title: Anarchy School
4221100.short_description: Anarchy School is a story-rich first-person action adventure set in a fictional upper school in Finland, of all places. Unravel the secrets of the school, and rise up against the malicious principal Nazier.

4221140.title: Space Trench
4221140.short_description: A survival horror roguelite where you salvage scrap, upgrade your equipment, and fight against countless hordes in the tight corridors of the derelicts of space.

4221210.title: Desktop Dog Park
4221210.short_description: A chill desktop idle game where you build and decorate a dog park at the bottom of your screen. Collect coins, unlock new dog breeds, feed and play with them, hire an attendant, and watch your park grow while you work on other things.

4221220.title: Red Balloon
4221220.short_description: A first-person psychological horror experience. Explore, solve puzzles, and make decisions as you descend through 66 levels to save your little brother. How far are you willing to descend for him?

4221240.title: Underdog Futsal
4221240.short_description: Become the manager of a small neighborhood futsal club, recruit players on a tight budget, and build your tactics. Manage morale through team activities, shift the momentum with substitutions and tactical changes in tense text-based matches, and grow your team step by step.

4221250.title: Bossie Ball
4221250.short_description: In BossieBall you guide a small, cute ball through 9 handcrafted levels that test your precision, timing, and reactions. Chase the best time, refine your route, and prove your skill in this fast-paced challenge.

4221320.title: Bird Wars
4221320.short_description: Bird Wars is a fast-paced, team-based sky brawler where flocks fight to protect their nest and destroy everyone else’s.

4221430.title: WYRM Plus
4221430.short_description: WYRM is a high-speed action game where you cross a wire floating 10km above the ground using only one anchor to reach the goal!

4221450.title: FUTURE:ONE
4221450.short_description: A fully animated, expressive virtual girl who loves hanging out on your desktop. She reacts when you click her, lets you change her look anytime, and shows cute little animations while you work, game, or wander the web.

4221470.title: Animal Island: The Wolf’s Onslaught

4221530.title: Easy Money

4221560.title: Puzzle Rogue

4221570.title: 时空传说2黑暗之路

The storyline continues from generation to generation, In the depths of the quicksand lies another kingdom, a ghost wandering in the depths of the Sea of Death, hatred towards the Blood...

4221600.title: Pripyat 0
4221600.short_description: Chernobyl has broken down. As radiation rains down upon you, the world starts rapidly mutating. You've gotten stuck in a nightmarish loop. Can you correctly spot the anomalies on time and get to safety? Or will you become one with the zone?

4221710.title: One More Hand
4221710.short_description: A trick-taking roguelite card game set in the Curator's rigged room. Set the lead suit, spin the slots, use the claw machine, and win your ticket out of this digital nightmare.

4221730.short_description: You are a tiny virus, just born into the ruthless ecosystem of a single drop of water. There is no mercy here: billions of microbes are engaged in a constant struggle for existence, and their main enemy is hunger. Your life is measured in seconds on a hunger scale.

4221740.title: トー京Xtrip

4221760.title: Endless Tiles

4221770.title: BackHome : เดินกลับบ้านในทางสามแยก
4221770.short_description: Trapped in a haunted loop at a forgotten three-way junction— Can you find what’s wrong before the night consumes you?

4221820.title: Die for Pay

4221910.title: Plague Doctor: Life in Pestilence

Gather ingredients, brew remedies, expand your clinic, and perform surgeries alone or up to 4 player co-op. Will you uphold the Hippocratic Oath... or watch the world rot and darken with every death.

4221940.short_description: A game about running and managing your own convenience store. Actively work the register, master stock and inventory, make and sell coffee, hire unique staff, and fully decorate your space. Strategically expand your business and play special mini-games for prizes.

4221950.title: THE KULKA
4221950.short_description: One-button bullet-heaven where a single shot mutates into neon chaos. Imagine Flappy Bird colliding with Vampire Survivors. Full version adds online leaderboards, challenges and unlockable gear.

4222040.title: Detective INNA DUKE

But will you manage to track down the poor hamster in rainy city?

4222060.short_description: A dating simulator, but... The girl has a shotgun, and if she doesn't like how you answer her questions, you die. Your date takes place in a living, watching cave where every element of the environment actively reacts to your tension and tries to break you.

4222100.title: 1000 Princes 2: Loving You Is My Duty
4222100.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4222100.short_description: 1000 Princes 2 is a female-oriented 3D visual novel otome game.A fracture in your timeline has caused all your prince husbands—spanning past, present and future from different settings—to time-travel to your current era. Now1,000 princes coexist on your shared timeline, protecting and adoring you.

4222180.title: Mystical Herbalists
4222180.short_description: A tactical alchemy board-game. Gather herbs, master recipes, finish missions, and compete in local hot-seat multiplayer.

4222270.title: Dear Lighthouse
4222270.short_description: You are hired to restore a silent lighthouse. What starts as routine maintenance turns into unraveling a dark history. Bring the machinery back to life and discover that these malfunctions were no accident, and that the light doesn't just guide ships.

4222290.title: Putrid Snow 2: House of Yule
4222290.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4222290.short_description: Trapped alone in a mansion with relentless holiday monsters, you must scavenge for presents to find weapons and traps. Outsmart the AI, manage your inventory, and turn the holiday hunter into the hunted. Free to play!

4222320.title: GeneEvolution
4222320.short_description: Gene Evolution is a game that simulates the microscopic world. You can design unique cells, edit their attributes, functions, and intelligence. Then release them into the microscopic world and watch them forage, reproduce, compete, and continually evolve through mutations.

4222340.title: Denpa Nightmares

4222340.short_description: No matter how long you’re gone, there will always be a girl waiting for you in the same place. This is a story about forgetting, and about waiting. After countless restarts and countless memories lost… how long will you stay with her this time?

4222380.title: Capsulitas
4222380.short_description: A physics-based gacha meets inventory management roguelike. Insert a coin, organize your backpack, and sell for profit! Multiply items with hammers, upgrade your machine, and survive the inflation.

4222410.title: Sunset Crime
4222410.short_description: Sunset Crime is an open-world game where you choose your own path. Explore the city freely, unleash chaos in Free Mode (Available) or face a gritty story mode (In development) as you rise from the outskirts in search of money, power, and survival, whether through honesty or crime.

4222430.title: Package Pirates
4222430.short_description: 'Package Pirates' Is a 1vs4 Deceptive Detective Multiplayer game where one person plays as the pirate stealing packages. The others play the role of HOA Neighborhood Watch completing outrageous tasks to stay on the team in order to capture the pirate before they escape with the booty.

4222650.title: Paws Per Minute
4222650.short_description: A cozy desktop typing game where your furry friend hammers away on a keyboard as you type. Boost your WPM with colorful effects, and unlock speed achievements!

4222750.title: The Inseparables

4222750.short_description: The Inseparables is a hardcore 2D platformer with local co-op for two players.

4222860.title: Void Fighters
4222860.short_description: Void Fighters is a CO-OP/PvP game where you can fight alongside your friends or compete against other online players. You can also play the PvE mode solo or with friends. The PvE features an RPG story with dungeons, quests, skill trees, and character progression.

4222910.title: Boreal Tenebrae Act 0: Sundowning
4222910.short_description: A surreal narrative adventure set on the night Tamarack Narrows collapses into static, fire, and aurora. Follow Sarah, Bree, and the townsfolk as an unknown visitor arrives promising salvation. A lo-fi, analog-horror

4222930.title: KAON : Fragmented Core
4222930.short_description: KAON: Fragmented Core is a 2D action-platformer featuring precision combat, fluid movement, and striking hand-crafted animation. Switch between powerful Transformation Forms to break defenses, pierce armor, and unleash explosive abilities as you uncover the truth behind the Fragmented Core.

4223070.title: Football Survivors
4223070.short_description: THE FOOTBALL WAR HAS STARTED! Thousands of raging fans are storming the field. Defend against the fan invasion! 30+ unique heroes and abilities, 50+ upgrade items, position your heroes strategically, crush the waves of fans!

4223140.title: Petal by Petal
4223140.short_description: Petal by Petal is a short incremental gardening game. Water seeds, grow your flowers and sell them to unlock permanent upgrades inside the big skill tree!

4223300.title: Bird Game 3
4223300.genre: Action, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4223300.short_description: A fast, chaotic bird-based PvP game where you fly, fight, steal eggs, and trash-talk in proximity chat. Perch, ragdoll, eat worms, and yes, you can play as a shoebill.

4223350.title: Sticky Limey
4223350.short_description: “Sticky Limey” is a third-person 3D action game where you control a slime and navigate a ruined city using grappling hooks.

4223410.title: Room Service
4223410.short_description: Check into a luxury hotel where 5 stunning staff members offer very personal service. Romance the manager, maid, housekeeper, spa therapist, or bartender in this adult visual novel.

4223440.title: Ktrl Smash
4223440.short_description: Krlt Smash is a fast-paced multiplayer arena game where anything can become a weapon. Pick your fighter, grab bats, baseballs, or even chairs, collect stat boosts, and fight to get the most kills before time runs out. Stay alert, keep moving, and defeat as many players as you can.

4223490.title: Great Meme Reset 2026
4223490.short_description: The legends of memes has returned to protect meme city from brain rot. This game is Action-TPS with Racing elements in meme,city setting.

4223530.title: Endless Furry Slayer
4223530.short_description: Fight furries endlessly and survive for as long as possible.

4223540.title: Doodle Wipeout
4223540.short_description: Doodle Wipeout is line an action rougelite - survive waves of chaotic doodles by erasing them. Dodge, upgrade, and clean the canvas before it’s overrun.

4223690.title: Saylor Anime Puzzle Boys & Girls
4223690.short_description: Saylor Anime puzzle Boys & is simplictic jigsaw puzzle game with anime girls and boy images to solve

4223750.title: Glowing Hexagon
4223750.short_description: This is a high-score challenge hexagon-matching game. Vibrant hexagons, adjustable radius, random patterns—compete for the top spot on the leaderboard!

4224150.title: Seeker
4224150.short_description: You are a treasure hunter. Venture into the Skull Castle, where an ancient artifact—the Golden Skull is hidden. Overcome devious traps, dangerous enemies, and your own inner demons in your quest for fame, for there are no safe havens within these walls...

4224200.short_description: Riftaway is an NDS/N64-inspired 3D platformer in which you help a young witch recover her lost memories in an outter-space-like world known as... the Riftaway! Collect memory-refreshing crystals and meet unique personalities in a world where even gravity is broken.

4224210.title: Run, Poo, Run!
4224210.short_description: Welcome to the cold tiled toilet floor! You control a determined turd, battling another turd. Your goal in this game is speed and tactical superiority. To win a round, you must fill your storage with resources before your opponent. The winner is the first to deliver exactly 10 items to their base.

4224270.title: Hentai Color Studio
4224270.short_description: Welcome into a brand new collection paint-by-number game! Color 50 images to reveal the true naughty picture !

4224280.title: Meowrvelous Hidden Cats - The Purrate Isle
4224280.short_description: Find the hidden cats across Purrate Isle in a cozy pirate adventure filled with secrets to uncover.

4224430.title: Toey Weedz Smoke Dead Mirror
4224430.short_description: Toey Weedz is humanity's last hope... Or maybe not!? Because in Toey Weedz Smoke Dead Mirror, nothing is as it seems. Get ready for a comedic solo adventure in retro military shooter style that you won't soon forget!

4224470.title: The Shadow Architect
4224470.short_description: Forget city-building games. You're not a builder, you're a DESTROYER. Use taxes and bureaucracy to collapse a flawlessly functioning dystopian industrial system from within. A card-based ideological collapse simulation game.

4224510.title: Motarium
4224510.short_description: A set of modern and accessible word games, blending puzzles, logical challenges and a relaxing atmosphere you can enjoy at your own pace.

4224560.title: TINY CAT FISHING
4224560.short_description: Set off on a bright adventure across a magical island 🎣 Catch fish, unlock adorable animal heroes, collect unique rods, and explore rivers, lakes, and the open ocean. Search for rare species and become the ultimate angler!

4224740.title: Emerald Valley
4224740.short_description: This is a single-player puzzle game. You are a tourist visiting Emerald Valley, but a sudden landslide traps you and the other visitors. Explore the environment, collect items, talk to fellow tourists, and piece together the truth to discover why you can’t leave—and lead everyone to safety.

4224770.title: 星标4：乐园传说
4224770.short_description: Over twenty distinct towns, the abundance of main and side quests from hundreds of NPCs far exceeds that of the previous installment. With an estimated total playtime exceeding thirty hours, if you’re a fan of classic JRPGs, this game is an absolute must-have!

4224780.title: Reflex Run
4224780.short_description: A 3D troll platformer where you guide a fragile egg through traps that absolutely weren’t designed with safety in mind. Grab upgrades, lose them instantly next run, yell, laugh, repeat. Every level changes the rules, so the only thing you can trust is that you probably shouldn’t trust anything.

4224820.title: light of Y
4224820.short_description: 《Light of Y》是一款以传统回合制战斗与角色养成为核心、并在叙事中融入古老“Y之光”秘密的冒险RPG。

4224900.title: Rabbit Samurai
4224900.short_description: Rabbit Samurai is a turn-based deck-building roguelike! Battle vile foes, explore diverse locations, build a unique deck, and empower it with mighty relics! No repeated cards or runs — in this game, everything is unique!

4224920.title: Royal Dental
4224920.short_description: Rise from peasant dentist to royal healer in this quirky medieval dental simulation RPG. Treat patients, upgrade tools, improve your clinic, expand your knowledge, and restore Princess Penelope’s legendarily awful smile, all while facing sabotage from a jealous prince.

4224990.title: Before Dawn 破碎的十七歲
4224990.short_description: [Traditional Chinese Only] Lost in amnesia, Qian Sui must uncover the truth in this ADV centered on school bullying and cyber violence. 4225020.title: SILVARN
4225020.short_description: Your family’s cry for help pulls you into a nightmare where every moment counts. A relentless killer forces you to keep moving as you search for answers. Collect clues, solve disturbing puzzles, and uncover the terrifying truth hiding behind the fear.

4225070.title: That's my village!
4225070.short_description: A pixel-art builder fantasy where your little settlement must survive! Build, expand, gather! Assign tasks to your villagers, manage resources, and prove that neither monster invasions nor random disasters scare you. This is your village, and everything depends on you!

4225300.title: Wash It
4225300.short_description: Wash It is a relaxing and satisfying cleaning game where you blast away dirt, grime, and chaos. Watch the world shine again as you unwind and get lost in pure cleaning zen.

4225370.title: The lost trail
4225370.short_description: Play as a raccoon on a heartfelt and dangerous journey to find the boy who once saved you from poachers. Explore the wild, avoid traps, uncover secrets, and experience a story of friendship, survival, and hope.

4225400.title: I.T Never Ends
4225400.short_description: The printer is bleeding, the Wi-Fi is haunted, and Ticket #666 just came in. As the SysAdmin for a company run by cosmic horrors, your job is simple: Clear the queue. Make binary decisions to survive the night shift in this dark comedy desktop simulator. I.T truly never ends.

4225410.title: Asterisk
4225410.short_description: What if Asteroids but roguelike? Destroy space rocks to unlock better weapons, abilities, and equipment so you can ... destroy more space rocks. Choose upgrade paths, select sponsors to match your play style, and compete with friends for the high score in this retro-modern top-down space shooter.

4225490.title: Blasteria
4225490.short_description: A 2.5D Abstract Sci-Fi top-down shooter about decimating germs on a petri dish. Fill the screen with lasers to decimate hundreds of duplicating germs. Upgrade your cannon, manipulate the germ's characteristics, uncover the mystery of this bacteria, and fight the ultimate supergerm.

4225530.title: COLLAPSE COMPANY
4225530.short_description: “COLLAPSE COMPANY” is a round-based roguelike action FPS for 1–4 players exploring shifting underground dungeons. Your goal is to activate the deep Particle Acceleration Reactor and escape before time runs out. Gather resources, upgrade gear, and push into riskier zones.

4225680.title: OddCrops
4225680.short_description: OddCrops is a cozy farming game where you can discover new plant species, manage nutrients, survive changing weather, and protect your garden from pests and decay

4225990.title: Engagement Protocol
4225990.genre: Adventure, Casual, Strategy, Free To Play
4225990.short_description: Free game for game developers that that showcases various game development tools that support player engagement.

4226390.title: Toilet Femdom 3: Christmas Punks
4226390.short_description: Experience being used as a toilet by Kiyo, your sadistic childhood friend, and 10 sadistic punks on Christmas.

4226400.title: 冰雪传奇
4226400.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4226400.short_description: Ice and Snow Legend is a casual hexagonal-matching puzzle game with a fresh art style. Centered around fun block-matching gameplay, it blends cultivation and customization elements to create a relaxing, stress-relieving matching adventure experience.

4226410.title: Velthurin
4226410.short_description: Journey across seven diverse realms—each a fully realized, lore-rich territory ruled by one of the great races. Discover ancient secrets, fractured alliances, and forbidden magics. What Decisions Will You Make?

4226480.title: NEON HEX
4226480.short_description: NEON HEX is a minimalist cyberpunk puzzle game. Dive into a strategic matching experience on a hexagonal grid, accompanied by chill synthwave beats and stunning neon visuals. Restore the data clusters and find your flow in this addictive logic journey.

4226520.title: Look and Find - Christmas
4226520.short_description: Immerse yourself in festive spirit with Look and Find - Christmas, a hand-crafted hidden object game. Unwind, explore stunningly realistic scenes, and experience the joy of the Christmas season!

4226540.title: Hidden Paradise: Kiwi Christmas Collector's Edition
4226540.short_description: A festive Kiwi adventure filled with sunny holiday vibes, hidden object fun, and cozy puzzles as you explore Auckland’s magic with the Garcias.

4226560.title: ALATURKA
4226560.short_description: A low-poly open-world action game set in 1970s Bosforus. Master heavy vehicle physics, work dirty jobs for below minimum wage, and fight to survive. ALATURKA captures the chaotic, unforgiving spirit of the PSX era.

4226590.title: Olympic Snow Girl
4226590.short_description: "Olympic Snow Girl" is a choice-driven visual novel game, this story follows fearless female athletes chasing dreams bigger than themselves. Your choice opens different storylines, relationships, endings, and emotional arcs. There is no single champion ending — only the ending that champions you.

4226670.title: Nederfall
4226670.short_description: In Nederfall, you are the leader of a survivor camp. Your primary tasks involve managing resources, upgrading your camp, and ensuring the well-being of your community. Send soldiers on missions to scavenge for crucial supplies, and explore the ruins of civilization.

4226760.title: 回避男
4226760.short_description: 株式会社UNCHAINのインディーレーベルが贈る、シンプルで奥深いスコアアタックゲーム。 ■ストーリー キミはとある事情から薬が必要な体に……犯罪組織が落とした薬を拾いながら、ピリオドの向こうへ向かおう！ ■ゲームの特徴 ・左右移動とジャンプで障害物を回避 ・ブロックやホーミング爆弾が行く手を阻む ・警備ロボットを飛び越えながら進め ・一度でもぶつかればゲームオーバー ■挑戦要素 開発陣でもクリア困難な高難度設定。どこまで走れるか、限界に挑戦せよ！反応が良ければ、さらなる高難度モードを追加予定。 スコア競争が好きなあなたへ贈る、究極のハイパーカジュアルゲーム！

4226800.title: 醉中幻想
4226800.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4226800.short_description: A light and fast-paced roguelike deck-builder! Play as a drinker drifting between dreams and reality. With every glass you down, you slip deeper into delightful fantasies. Build your fantasies, keep your alcohol level in the optimal range each round, and chase ever-higher Fantasy Scores!

4226900.title: Captain's Crew
4226900.short_description: From castaway to sea legend. Survive on wild islands, build your base from scratch, and gather materials to construct an unstoppable fleet. Recruit a loyal crew, manage resources, and sail the ocean to settle the score with the captain who sank your ship.

4227030.title: ABISMO
4227030.short_description: Abismo is a deep-sea co-op horror game set on the abyssal floor of an alien planet. Descend alone or with up to three friends into shifting trenches, recover classified research, and survive the crushing dark while uncovering an analog-horror mystery buried in corrupted VHS tapes.

4227120.title: Mama
4227120.short_description: An emotional narrative point-and-click about a daughter caring for her mother as dementia reshapes their bond. Explore heartfelt conversations, fragmented memories, and simple story-driven puzzles on a journey of caregiving and learning to let go.

4227280.title: Bash Moto
4227280.short_description: Tear up the streets in this 90s themed beat'em up motorcycle racing game. Kick and bash your way through a slew of roughneck bikers all trying to claim victory and the cash prize. Take your hard earned cash and buy yourself a new bike to keep up with the pack or leave them in your dust.

4227310.title: Cross Quest
4227310.short_description: In this retro-styled, turn-based RPG; The young half-human-half-dragon, Steve Cross, is chosen by the Summer Island's king to slay an ancient, evil beast known as the Chandelier Serpent.

4227410.title: Just a Simple Turn-Based RPG
4227410.short_description: A short and straightforward turn-based RPG where every action matters. Explore, cast spells through quirky enchantments, help the townsfolk, and hunt for treasure, without endless grinding or overcomplicated stories.

4227430.title: Fishy Dish
4227430.short_description: Create and sell sushi in this roguelike inventory-management sushi-builder game. Collect fish, sauces, and tools, arrange them on a grid to trigger synergies, survive each round’s sales target, and build the ultimate sushi lineup.

4227450.title: Dragon Cat
4227450.short_description: A fast-paced 3D side-scrolling arcade game where you glide, dodge, and weave through tight gaps using precise tap-to-fly controls.

4227530.title: The Black Breath
4227530.short_description: Mananage a caravan of survivors, take crucial decisions on the journey, and fight multiple enemies in a turn-based grid-to-grid combat system to escape The Black Breath.

4227580.title: Field Pong: Gamesforfarm
4227580.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation, Sports
4227580.short_description: Field Pong: Gamesforfarm is an arcade pong game played on a football field

4227620.title: Eternal Collector
4227620.short_description: Discover fossils, reveal artifact cards, and build your own tiny museum. Eternal Collector is a cozy idle game where you scratch ancient stones, collect rare finds, and decorate a growing gallery of exhibits in a relaxing desktop window.

4227680.title: SEX Shop Simulator: Forbidden Service
4227680.short_description: 🔞Build and manage your own beachside adult shop in this 18+ erotic management game. Customize your store, unlock new toys, and interact with seductive customers. Expand your business to a luxurious gentleman’s club and enjoy exclusive VIP encounters.🔞

4227750.title: Robertinho Adventures
4227750.short_description: Robertinho Adventures is a 2D action platform game where you play as Robertinho, a young boy who seeks to save his dog, Caramelito, from a great villain! Travel through the cities of Braçal with your coins, face infiltrated aliens and save his great partner!

4227800.title: Runan Ritual
4227800.short_description: A momentum-heavy 2D Metroidvania where you dash, double-jump and wall-cling beneath Goen, the last city on earth, chaining whip combos and parrying to bank Maia essence for permanent rituals or short-lived upgrades you drop on death.

4227950.title: Shoyu Ramen Forever
4227950.short_description: Overworked office worker Tsutomu, his ramen blog dying, stops at a station-side stall and orders six toppings. A kids' rumor says six makes you vanish. His heart sinks into history's dark.

4228060.title: Pluffy Nightmare
4228060.short_description: Blast through surreal toybox nightmare in this fast-paced roguelike FPS with funny weapons! In Pluffy Nightmare, your mind is pulled into a doll’s body to battle stuffed animals, dolls, and mischievous toys across bizarre fantasy worlds.

4228100.title: Space Adventures 2 in 1
4228100.short_description: Space Adventures 2 in 1 is a collection of arcade-style space shooter games taking inspiration from classic arcade games. Both game modes focus on quick movement and reflexes, maintaining a retro-like feeling, featuring cartoonish sprites and sounds, and are designed for short, replayable sessions.

4228130.title: Bird Game 3 Online
4228130.short_description: You are a bird. Fly around, steal eggs, protect your nest, and fight other birds. Play in PvP or team up in Co-Op modes.

4228140.title: Barrel Madness
4228140.short_description: A fast-paced 3D action platformer where you jump across speeding barrels, dodge deadly traps, and defeat enemies in chaotic fantasy worlds. Time your moves, throw your sword from afar, and survive the madness.

4228250.title: Bitch Shop Simulator
4228250.short_description: Summer! Sea! Sand! For everyone, these words mean rest and entertainment! But not for you! You opened your own business on this paradise beach and work from morning till evening in your grocery store.

4228510.title: DoDoon
4228510.short_description: Defend your castle from approaching monsters! Upgrade your defenses and survive all 30 fast-paced waves in this addictive defense shooter.

4228520.title: Iron Colony
4228520.short_description: After crash-landing on a mysterious island, confront hostile robotic creatures in intense combat and strategic duels. Explore forgotten ruins, uncover secrets, and fight for survival in a world where corrupted technology dominates every corner.

4228550.title: Touch Grass: A Bit-Sized Christmas Adventure
4228550.short_description: Christmas is here! Play the Christmas carols in your snowy neighborhood to earn enough cash to buy the new GameStation 2 before the day ends, upgrade your gear, complete quests, play snowball fights and spend your coins in the arcades to get a high score in Boxerino, a fast-paced sokoban-style game!

4228610.title: The Clown -White Pursuer-
4228610.short_description: A short first-person horror game featuring exploration, puzzles, and a terrifying clown who hunts you inside a secluded mansion.

4228700.title: Limit Line: Last Village
4228700.short_description: Rebuild a collapsed remote village in this crafting–farming–settlement game. Gather resources, cook, manage fields, survive raids, and run a small stall to restore the community.

4228750.title: Chrono Spin
4228750.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4228750.short_description: Chrono Spin is a Roguelike RPG blending Fruit Machine with deep strategy. Manage your mana to place bets, unleash character skills, and challenge legendary guardians from the Misty Forest to the Seasons Temple. Every spin is a gamble between life and death!

4228810.title: Fourteen Years of Flames
4228810.short_description: Fourteen Years of Flames is a story-driven FPS that replays China’s struggle in the Second Sino-Japanese War (1931–1945). Players embody 7 key characters and battle through 16 real historical events, experiencing the hardships and sacrifices over 14 years of struggle. Land weeps in 14 years of war.

4228890.title: LOW VALUE JOB
4228890.short_description: LOW VALUE JOB is a dystopian job-simulation game where you sort scattered bolts, nuts, and washers by type. Pick up each part, examine it, and classify it accurately. Play solo to steadily raise your score, or compete online with players around the world to test your sorting skills.

4228900.title: BreakLoop
4228900.short_description: The first brickbreaker deckbuilder! Start off with just a puny ball and build yourself an arsenal of weapons to mow down the endless waves of bricks barreling towards you. Discover powerful items and synergies as you evolve into the ultimate brick-killing machine.

4228910.title: Idle Wuxia Heroes
4228910.short_description: A text-based idle martial arts hero-collecting game where you collect heroes, customize their skills and equipment, and engage in idle combat.

4228940.title: 混乱地牢/Chaotic Dungeon
4228940.short_description: Chaotic Dungeon is a pixel-style side-scrolling action Roguelite game. Players adventure through multiple dungeons with different styles and worldviews, using collected props and items to defeat enemies and solve puzzles. and explore and discover the unknown secrets in this space!

4229050.title: Error: Girlfriend Not Found
4229050.short_description: One-room cyberpunk VN about doubt, guilt and memory. Talk to a girl who claims to be your girlfriend, question reality, and unlock multiple endings in a short, replayable psychological story.

4229060.title: Guild Simulator
4229060.short_description: Start your own adventurers’ guild! Recruit heroes, assign quests, craft gear, manage resources, expand your hall, handle monster threats, and design your guild layout. Forge weapons and brew potions for your adventurers, and send heroes on missions across the land.

4229140.title: Le Petit Raccoon
4229140.short_description: Le Petit Raccoon is a stealth cooking game where you must steal food to cook for your hungry guests! Steal food from the grocery store, but don't get caught! Time is of the essence, and your customers are waiting.

4229150.title: Negative Time
4229150.short_description: Negative Time is a bullet hell rogue-lite shooter where each time you get hit, you are sent further and further back in time, until you are sent into the past they tried so hard to erase. Maybe in there lies the key to your escape?

4229240.title: UPBEAT
4229240.short_description: Jump, bounce, and drum your way up an infinite climb. Build a beat, spawn platforms with your drum machine, and chain physics-powered combos to outclimb the competition in this rhythmic precision platformer.

4229250.title: Kisen: Seeker of Aenjan City
4229250.short_description: Tap into the mystery as a stranger in the city — a mild mystery visual novel. Kisen runs a tracing agency in a city far from his home. There, he is asked by a local university student to look for his brother missing from twelve years ago. Investigate what happened back then to uncover the truth.

4229260.title: Paign 2
4229260.short_description: Paign is a classic style role-playing game, level up, collect and explore. Learn different professions and skills. Choose one of the two factions and talk to the people and get to know them. Make your decision wisely.

4229270.title: ZepOrb
4229270.short_description: Roll the ball to complete each stage. Explore over 30 unique levels. Play as Zeppy the Zeporal Orb.

4229300.title: My Landlord Is a Sadistic MILF
4229300.short_description: Experience a night with Mei, the mega MILF sadist who unleashes all her pent-up sexual and sadistic urges on you.

4229310.title: Red Nox
4229310.short_description: Red Nox is a horror roguelike deckbuilder with realistic graphics and a liminal space aesthetic. Gamble, explore, and create your own synergy of cards and relics to survive against the uncanny abominations within the Forbidden Lands.

4229580.title: I Am Bird
4229580.short_description: Play as a Super Bird Spread wings. Save the city. Play as a bird hero — the city is your playground. Fly through the streets, help citizens and your bird crew. Keep danger away. Fly, glide, and maneuver through the skies and streets. Protect the city using unique skills and gadgets.

4229630.title: Final Breach
4229630.short_description: Final Breach is a stylized PBR horde survival FPS. Battle endless waves of grotesque undead in vibrant, high-fidelity maps. Upgrade your arsenal, grab powerful perks, and wield devastating firepower as the chaos intensifies.

4230060.title: UD RĒA
4230060.short_description: UD RĒA is a retro FPS game that blends classic 90s fast-paced action with mythological elements inspired by Göbeklitepe. Unleash your rage and tear apart every creature that stands in your way.

4230110.title: Shadow Seeker
4230110.short_description: Shadow Seeker is a 2D survival-horror action game with a noir detective story. You are Carlos Ramirez, a detective from the Amorita Police Department. You must solve a mysterious case while braving the looming evil that awaits you at every turn.

4230120.title: Mute
4230120.short_description: "Mutes" is a live-action mystery game. From a third-person perspective, you will make critical choices, engage in deductive reasoning to communicate for the protagonist, and perform quick-time reactions to survive a murder mystery.

4230320.title: Asteroid Hopper
4230320.short_description: Asteroid Hopper is a cute space adventure puzzle game set in a colorful cosmos. Hop between asteroids, explore, optimize your path, manage resources, and survive in the hazardous depths of space.

4230350.title: Project: AFTERSHOCK
4230350.short_description: Project: AFTERSHOCK is a fast-paced arcade hacking roguelite set in a dystopian future. Command a 20-year-old legacy terminal to breach enemy systems, siphon funds, and upgrade your hardware. Use your reflexes to survive the countdown and bring down the very system you created.

4230360.title: Haramball
4230360.short_description: Haramball is a multiplayer football tactics card strategy game where you pick the players, merge their attributes, set up the best formations and then watch your tactics unfold in real-time. Will you play beautiful football or become the football terrorist you were always meant to be ? You decide.

4230400.title: Cubio
4230400.short_description: Navigate through an atmospheric space tunnel, avoid incoming cubes and collect special ones to increase your score. The pace gradually rises and the color theme shifts over time, creating an immersive and minimal reflex experience.

4230410.title: Not In My House
4230410.short_description: 4 Residents vs 1 Thief. Secure your home with furniture barricades and soap traps, or play as the Thief and steal everything not bolted down! A chaotic, physics-based party game with a stylized comic-book look.

4230420.title: Eggventure
4230420.short_description: Eggventure is a 2D Metroidvania platformer where you play as Egbert, an egg on a mission to rescue his friends from becoming breakfast.

4230440.title: Foundland City Builders
4230440.short_description: Foundland is a strategic city-building and resource management game with defense elements. Expand your lands, establish production chains, grow your population, and protect your city against rising threats.

4230550.title: MILFS 2025
4230550.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports
4230550.short_description: MILFS 2025 - is an erotic game in the genre of "Arkanoid", in which you will have to break the cubes and gradually discover really beautiful and hot images.

4230560.title: BIG TITS
4230560.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4230560.short_description: BIG TITS - is an erotic game in the genre of "Arkanoid", in which you will have to break the cubes and gradually discover really beautiful and hot images.

4230630.title: The Legacy of Shadow's Bane TCG
4230630.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Strategy
4230630.short_description: Based on the book "The Legacy of Shadow's Bane" featuring characters from the first book of the series along with many new characters yet to be introduced. This game features a single player adventure mode, single player versus mode (against AI), and online multiplayer with global rankings.

4230660.title: Protocol Nightmare
4230660.short_description: Survive three nights of absolute terror while more than 10 monsters hunt you down. Explore secret paths, complete tasks, use your flashlight and scanner, upgrade your abilities, and face an intense survival experience.

4230750.title: Alea
4230750.short_description: Indie action PvP arena brawler built around FUN. Master two sides to every hero in a climactic clash for glory and spoils. Two teams enter, one team leaves...will it be yours?

4230890.title: The Archive
4230890.short_description: Welcome to the Case Processing Unit. Classify forgotten reports, uncover hidden patterns, and discover why this backlog exists, and why you were brought in to handle it.

4230940.title: Ghlobot Galaxy
4230940.short_description: Ghlobot Galaxy is a charming cosmic adventure where glowing Ghlobots travel across 7 vibrant galaxies to reclaim their stolen stars and rescue their queen from the Demon King. Explore 35 handcrafted levels and challenge 7 epic bosses in colorful, glowing worlds filled with secrets and surprises.

4230960.title: Joint Force
4230960.short_description: Solve challenging puzzles to reunite Belcho and Nim.

4230980.title: Lo-Fi Haiku: Coffee and Chill
4230980.short_description: Take a sip of coffee and wake up your inner poet. Let the words flow with the soft waves of Lo-Fi music. Chill, ease your mind and create. Lo-Fi Haiku: Coffee and Chill is a tool which will help you on your journey of becoming the greatest Haiku Master.

4231050.title: The Long Way Home
4231050.short_description: You are alone on a drifting starship. No humans, only robots. As Miner 13-553; craft, farm, repair, upgrade skills and find your way home. Fight the machines or choose a peaceful path. Explore the mystery or just focus on the journey. The choice is yours.

4231100.title: Bird Game 4
4231100.short_description: Bird Game 4 is a fast-paced 1v1/2v2/3v3 hero brawler where you pick from unique birds, master their abilities, and battle to steal eggs from enemy nests. Choose from 6 roles, coordinate with your team, and fight for victory in action-packed 5-minute matches.

4231400.title: Stackable
4231400.short_description: Stack anything you can get your hands on in this chaotic first-person tower-building game. Go solo or build with friends as you balance wobbly objects and use tools like tape jetpacks to reach ridiculous heights. How tall can you go before it all comes crashing down?

4231600.title: みちくさワンダラー
4231600.short_description: The Demon Lord and the Hero are gone. With no mission to fulfill, no world to save, you hunt as you please, eat as you please, and travel as you please. It’s an RPG where you are free to do anything.

4231620.title: PrimeCraft
4231620.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4231620.short_description: Explore a universe of tiny planets, swing between worlds, and jump into handcrafted bubble scenes. Train simple AI companions to follow you and join your adventures. A playful physics sandbox you can enjoy solo, online, or in split-screen.

4231630.title: Beyond Zero Line
4231630.short_description: A nation is on the brink of collapse and you have been given a special order: rescue the trapped president. Run, jump, and gun your way across its interconnected districts full of enemies and secrets. Uncover the truth behind your mission.

4231650.title: SwingJump
4231650.short_description: A simple and refreshing swing-jump action game!

4231830.title: Sweet Night
4231830.short_description: Sweet Night - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around girls returning home late at night. It depicts the daily lives of five pretty and adorable girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4231930.title: Paper Shakespeare 3: Girl Werewolf Hamlet Absolutely Solves the War of the Roses
4231930.short_description: Guide a squad of ten young adults through a kingdom on the brink of war! Navigate court politics, deadly rivalries, and magical chaos between Humans, Fae, and Werewolves... where every choice can make or break your future.

4232170.title: Emberion
4232170.short_description: Survive endless waves of enemies in this action-packed roguelike. Master powerful spells, unlock heroes, and compete on Steam leaderboards. How long can you last?

4232210.title: Shattering Darkness
4232210.short_description: The world has been plunged into Eternal Darkness, and the Ancient Shadows have awakened, consuming everything in their path. According to Elder legends, only the Elixir of Light can dispel the darkness and banish evil back into the void.

4232240.title: Hentai World Tour
4232240.short_description: A simple but addictive matching game where you pair identical images under a fixed time limit. Stay focused, beat each stage before the clock runs out, and enjoy a calm yet challenging gameplay experience

4232310.title: StalSide
4232310.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation
4232310.short_description: Trapped inside a broken computer simulation of a post‑nuclear world, you must survive, explore, and uncover the secrets of the zone. Play solo or with up to 8 friends in this chilling mix of survival and digital mystery.

4232320.title: 线偶Marionette
4232320.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4232320.short_description: The game features a brand-new control scheme: instead of directing a main character, one or two players control the protagonist by manipulating ropes. Players must cleverly utilize the swing and pull of these ropes to execute movement, jumps, evasion, and attacks. Community Group: 1072648702

4232360.title: Buttons Up!
4232360.short_description: Buttons Up! is a incremental button collecting game where you hoard Buttons and keep them safe from stealing intruders. Get those Buttons Up by buying buildings, using skills and by automating your income.

4232390.title: Hierosaga Overture
4232390.short_description: Enter the tomb of the Pharaess and tactically maneuver through a plethora of challenges and monster-filled gauntlets in this homage to strategy roguelikes of the 90s.

4232640.title: Soul's Gambit
4232640.short_description: Soul's Gambit blends roguelike card mechanics with a deep RPG narrative. At this table, luck isn't enough; how you play your cards matters. Build your deck, analyze opponents, and wager your soul. Can you survive the dealer's game?

4232680.title: The Last Gift
4232680.short_description: You came for loot on Christmas night, but found someone who has no intention of letting you go.

4232720.title: ProTax 98
4232720.short_description: A short 90s bureaucratic horror game where you process impossible tax forms for the living, the dead, and the unborn.

4232750.title: Socket
4232750.short_description: Burnout. We all burn out. We sacrifice ourselves on the altar of success. And you will do the same. This will be your own first-person psychological horror. Humiliate yourself, suffer from guilt, get your hands dirty.

4232770.title: Driver Night Trip
4232770.short_description: Driver Night Trip is a 3D car game. You'll get behind the wheel and reach the finish line as quickly as possible.

4232930.title: DEEPLY
4232930.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4232930.short_description: DEEPLY is an underwater adventure about treasure hunting, gear upgrading, and exploring a mysterious ocean. Dive off your raft, gather resources, discover artifacts, upgrade your equipment, and gradually get closer to the legendary ship your father devoted his life to.

4233120.title: 12 Months: Vietnam
4233120.short_description: Experience the Vietnam War through the eyes of an S-1 officer who observes the first few missions but never sees combat again — only the paperwork of war. Lives, morale, service time, and survival depend on your choices. Everyone is replaceable... including you.

4233180.title: Seven Seas Jewels Collector's Edition
4233180.short_description: Sail into a thrilling match-3 pirate adventure of treasure and danger. Rescue the governor’s daughter, battle cursed pirates, and explore mysterious islands across 220 levels in this story-driven Collector’s Edition. Wishlist to get notified on release.

4233200.title: 七不思議に至るまで
4233200.short_description: The protagonist, a member of a university occult club, obtains a mysterious notebook about a high school’s “Seven Mysteries” The story branches based on your choices — will you uncover the truth, or meet an ending best left hidden? A suspense-driven horror visual novel exploring the Seven Mysteries.

4233230.title: Lonely Hearts
4233230.short_description: A lonely garbage collector navigates three districts, forming relationships shaped by choices, gifts, odor, reputation, and hidden dangers. Love is fragile secrets are not.

4233240.title: Whispers Of The Crypt
4233240.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4233240.short_description: Whispers of the Crypt is a dark atmospheric RPG set deep beneath a world that’s forgotten its heroes. The Starbound have vanished, yet the forge still burns. You awaken in a lost tomb with no memory, guided by whispers that seem to know your name and your destiny.

4233260.title: Cybersoul
4233260.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4233260.short_description: Deckbuilding Card Game meets Incremental Data Mining. Command 3+ dystopian factions & 100+ cards in this acid-soaked Cyberpunk Card Battler. Unleash glitch-fueled combos, gamble in a corrupted Arcade, and farm Souls & Star Power in idle clickers. Don't just play the game—break the code and ascend.

4233290.title: Adventure Master
4233290.short_description: This unique trivia game is the perfect way to be tested to see if you could actually follow in the steps of the famous adventurers, Indiana Jones and Nathan Drake with topics including outdoor survival skills, handguns, geography, world history, SCUBA, plane flight and so much more.

4233330.title: MeetMeat
4233330.short_description: MeetMeat is a raw and gritty survival-action game where you're not the hero — you're the target. Fight your way through a hostile city, fending off waves of relentless pursuers. Your only companion is the voice of Roach, narrating the carnage with deadpan (and often absurd) humor. Run. Hack

4233440.title: Car Parkour Together
4233440.short_description: A skill-based car parkour game where speed, reflexes, and chaos collide! Play solo or with a friend, use your special abilities to overcome challenging obstacles, provoke your partner, or team up for victory.

4233450.title: We Are Counting
4233450.short_description: A short psychological horror visual novel about obsessive counting and bodily intrusion. Voices whisper: we are counting you.

4233650.title: Monsters & Men
4233650.short_description: A dark-fantasy JRPG where outcasts, monsters, and fallen heroes unite against a corrupt kingdom performing forbidden experiments. Lead a diverse party through an adventure filled with ancient relics, cosmic ruins, and heartbreaking outcomes as you uncover what truly separates monsters from men.

4233920.title: Astralis : Dawnblades
4233920.short_description: Astralis: Dawnblades is a turn-based tactical RPG that combines stronghold management, dungeon exploration, loot-based equipment crafting, and optional rhythm-based combat tied to an orchestral soundtrack.

4234050.title: Trapped
4234050.short_description: Trapped is a psychological VR horror-thriller set in a fractured mind. Navigate a morphing hospital and decaying home to uncover a tragic past. Use light to hold back the darkness and confront your inner demons. Will you find redemption, or be trapped forever?

4234140.title: Wizards in the Woods
4234140.short_description: An online co-op adventure game where you and your wizard buddies cast spells using symbols and your voice to ward off the creatures lurking in the fog. Stay together as you navigate and deliver the magic orb that can cure this land of the cursed god plaguing it.

4234170.title: CPU Invaders - 3i Atlas
4234170.short_description: The sequel to the Steam Awards finalist, invaders are living inside your computer again — but now their source is the mysterious interstellar object 3i Atlas. Interact with your desktop while playing, watch Youtube videos, chat with your friends and more!

4234420.title: Banan Abanan
4234420.short_description: In Banan Abanan, you jump and slide around many little worlds, finding trinkets and helping out the many creatures you encounter!

4234500.short_description: “0.0035%” is a mystery & horror game set in modern Japan. Players piece together fragmented clues and items to uncover hidden truths. No flashy action—only a shocking finale and deep, thought‑provoking exploration with multiple endings.

4234540.title: Children's Future
4234540.short_description: Explore a deserted elementary school and escape from an alternate reality in this short adventure. Collect clues and experience changing endings.

4234600.title: Frontline Frenzy
4234600.short_description: Frontline Frenzy is a fast-paced top-down WW2 roguelite arena shooter where you fight endlessly growing hordes of enemy soldiers in wave-based arenas. Pick your class, level your character and survive the frontline as the battlefield turns into pure chaos.

4234650.title: Princess Miner
4234650.short_description: Princess Miner is a Gold Miner-style Roguelike game. You play as a Princess who loves money more than tiaras. Equip your gear, and drag up every nugget in sight. This game shatters the traditional "single hook" mechanic—why fire one hook when you can fire them all?

4234850.title: Battle, Mushroom!
4234850.short_description: 构筑你的蘑菇军团，挑战25分钟快节奏肉鸽！在这款轻松休闲的2D策略游戏中，你需要通过巧妙的“D牌”来招募并养成独特蘑菇，组合强力技能与属性，打造无敌阵容，终结一切难关。快来打造属于你的传奇蘑菇组合吧！

4234950.title: Upload Aliens
