4234950.short_description: The rule: DON'T LET THEM TOUCH GROUND! Become the Cyberpunk Knight and launch aliens skyward. Use foes as missiles to trigger chain explosions in infinite aerial combos. Unleash this pixel-art roguelite spectacle with just three buttons: Move, Jump, Dash.

4235070.title: Primus Numen
4235070.short_description: A classic FFT-inspired tactical RPG with combo-based turns, cinematic finishers, and Nexus transformations

4235110.title: Hentai Sexy Mom
4235110.short_description: 🍳 Hentai Sexy Mom isn’t just a puzzle game. It’s your personal fantasy about a seductive kitchen MILF who cooks only for those who’ve been very, very naughty.

4235220.title: Lovely Anime Puzzle: Easter
4235220.short_description: Lovely Anime Puzzle: Easter is a fun and rewarding puzzle game. Assemble charming Easter-themed pictures, sharpen your attention, and immerse yourself in a festive holiday world.

4235260.title: DreadHold
4235260.short_description: DreadHold is a top-down roguelite horde shooter where you barricade a shadowy building against endless enemy waves, rack up kills for mid-run upgrades, and chase ever-higher scores with meta progression.

4235360.title: Elegon
4235360.genre: Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4235360.short_description: A vast fantasy MMORPG built around deep progression, massive exploration, and rewarding solo and group adventures.

4235380.title: Slash Quest: The King Kabbage Mystery
4235380.short_description: Princess and Swordie arrive on an island where nothing is as it should be. Explore a cursed park filled with mysteries: roam its twisted attractions, fight corrupted creatures, and unlock abilities as you rise to uncover what destroyed this place.

4235390.title: Midnight Ramen Shop
4235390.short_description: Start a tiny night-time ramen shop, serve warm bowls, decorate your cozy space, and turn quiet nights into a thriving business.

4235540.title: 宝姉妹 | スクラッチシミュレーター
4235540.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4235540.short_description: 「宝姉妹 | スクラッチシミュレーター」は、ヤングガンガンで連載中のハートフルマネーコメディ漫画『宝姉妹』のキャラクターたちと一緒に、スクラッチくじ気分を味わえるシミュレーションゲームです。スクラッチを削って当たりマスをチェック。 タテ・ヨコ・ナナメのいずれか一列に同じ絵柄が3個並ぶと当たり！そろった絵柄に応じて当選金が受け取れます。 1等100万円当選を目指していっぱい削ろう！ ※本作はゲーム内のみで完結するスクラッチ風シミュレーションです。 現実のお金の売買・賭け行為・実在のくじとは一切関係ありません。 ゲーム内で当選しても、現金や実物の賞品がもらえることはありません。

4235630.title: NYRA: The Fall of Light
4235630.short_description: NYRA: The Fall of Light is a story-driven third-person Action RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Follow Nyra on a mysterious journey featuring combat, exploration, atmospheric environments, and character progression.

4235660.title: Heavy Wake
4235660.short_description: Set out to explore the cursed island!

4235670.title: Desert Revenant 2: The Reawakening
4235670.short_description: A tactical roguelike deckbuilder built for massive combos. Cast spells, summon minions, and stack effects that cascade into devastating turns as you face brutal enemies with diverse abilities across escalating, curse-driven runs.

4235690.title: The Sigil Engine
4235690.short_description: A magical automation puzzle game where you program a little shikigami automaton using visual spell blocks - explore, harvest energy, and cleanse corrupted sigils in a cozy fantasy world.

4235720.title: Mei Paranormies
4235720.short_description: Mei Paranormies is a 2D top-down survival horror game where you play as Mei, the paranormal investigator, who got a call from the owner of a haunted restaurant to check it out for proof of the paranormal.

4235850.title: IA
4235850.short_description: Could an AI fall in love with a human? What if that human were you? IA is a psychological horror visual novel about an AI that falls in "love" with you, despite her hatred for humanity.

4236060.title: Phantom the Huntress
4236060.short_description: Not sword-clanging trash. Not glitter-magic garbage. Bow only. The rest is for peasants. I’m Phantom, elite huntress, eternally exhausted. You’ll track, gather, goblin-slay, babysit dumb NPCs and rank up at snail pace. Wishlist now. I get bonus wine money. Do it or vanish. My patience is dead.

4236080.title: A little Jumpingspider's Garden Adventure (Day 1+2)
4236080.short_description: Experience the world through the eyes of a cute little jumpingspider! All levels have completely different mechanics and each one challenges you in its own unique way. Let's go for an amazing ride!

4236230.title: Forgotten Faiths
4236230.short_description: The story of a merchant house in a world on the mend. Their leader sifts through the ashes of history for lost secrets.  Embark on expeditions to support the house and search for lost artifacts. A mix of visual novel and RPG mechanics.

4236280.title: Magic Cauldron Dungeons II - The Tower of Madness
4236280.short_description: Magic Cauldron - Dungeons - The Tower of Madness is a classic dungeon crawler with a retro look. The game is reminiscent of the good old days of grid crawlers, which did not need 3D at all... only this time in 3D.

4236490.title: Trauma Pets
4236490.short_description: Trauma Pets is a videogame about managing a newly found race of violent critters however you'd like. Don't let moral qualms distract you from reaching the top of the food chain.

4236560.title: Action PUZZLE
4236560.short_description: Clear as many lines as possible to earn a high score. Blocks will fall in response to your character's movements, so avoid them skillfully.

4236590.title: world of Y
4236590.short_description: 《World of Y》是一款以奇幻世界为背景的回合制 RPG。玩家将探索多区域地图、培养队伍角色、制定战术策略，并在战斗与冒险中逐步揭开世界崩坏的真相。

4236610.title: Halls of the damned
4236610.short_description: Hardcore multiplayer extraction dungeon crawler — survive, loot, escape

4236640.title: Goat Nuclear Clicker
4236640.short_description: An absurd incremental clicker — click goats, trigger nuclear chaos, automate production, and ascend through galaxies in a multiverse of upgrades and detonation-driven mayhem.

4236680.title: 离校 School's Out
4236680.short_description: Trapped in a mysterious place modeled after an old school, an amnesiac hero joins forces with several enigmatic heroines to confront endlessly looping spaces and terrifying monsters. As they search for escape and the truth behind it all, they begin to break free from the fate that binds them.

4236750.title: スローライフサバイバー／SlowLife Survivor
4236750.short_description: Like has come to a deserted island to live a second life. Fight and survive, fish and live a slow life, or develop the island, build a village and defeat strong enemies! The possibilities are endless!

4236830.title: Card Colony
4236830.short_description: The cards are infused with alchemy. Place them to awaken sealed towers. Each turn, draw from your deck, build synergies, and survive as penalty cards appear... then forge your empire!

4236930.title: CodeWar Kingdom
4236930.short_description: Say goodbye to micromanagement and embrace strategic programming! The core joy of the game lies in writing unique behavior scripts for your six unit types. Will you forge an invincible army of iron and blood, or design cunning tactical traps?

4237080.title: Hiyah Go!
4237080.short_description: Hiyah GO! is a fast-paced monster battle royale where you cast spells with your voice. Summon creatures, shout your attacks, and fight to be the last summoner standing. Unlock new monster and player skins as you climb to the top!

4237330.title: Kula Collection
4237330.short_description: Three easy games about a orange ball and his adventures in one simple package

4237340.title: The City Life
4237340.short_description: A British open-world life sim where you start with nothing, take jobs, build vehicles, buy property, pay rent, and work your way up from trailer park to full city living.

4237360.title: SlimyLeap
4237360.short_description: SlimyLeap is a fast-paced pixel-art infinite runner where you play as a brave little slime trying to go as far as possible without dying.

4237450.title: Star Striker
4237450.short_description: Dominate your enemies with modernized familiar arial combat controls. Craft the perfect build to become the most deadly star fighter in the galaxy!

4237480.title: Whispers to Remember - The New Year
4237480.short_description: Emily Carter, a 25 year old preparing a rented house for New Year’s Eve, arrives one day early. What begins as a quiet night soon becomes something she was never meant to remember.

4237540.title: The Dark Curiosity
4237540.short_description: First-person sci-fi psychological horror set on a secret corporate station. Left alone to secure it, you navigate oppressive corridors where every sound, shadow and choice punishes. "Curiosity always leads you further than fear ever could."

4238320.title: Game Jam Watercooler Sim
4238320.short_description: A simulation game that immerses you in the real group chat dynamics of indie developers during a 21-day game jam.

4238450.title: CUBERIO
4238450.short_description: A casual strategy-puzzle game where you guide a cube through 100 handcrafted mazes, avoid moving hazards, collect coins, and unlock upgrades.

4238510.title: Aelwater
4238510.short_description: Memory has weight. The departed are not gone. Step into a village drowned by flood and memory, and search for the final answer about guardianship and farewell among the shattered past.

4238600.title: Hentai Cleopatra 2
4238600.short_description: Hentai Cleopatra 2 is an exciting game that combines puzzles, an intriguing storyline, and a seductive atmosphere inspired by the legendary queen of Egypt. You will immerse yourself in the world of ancient Egypt, where power, passion, and mysteries intertwine into a single story.

4238710.title: Cube Burst 3D
4238710.short_description: Pop, Burst, and Clear a Massive 3D Cube.

4238760.title: Mommy Dies
4238760.short_description: 100 mommies. 100 ways to die. Only one survives. A psychological horror visual novel where your choices determine who lives and who dies in a twisted underground facility.

4238850.title: Max's Adventures: Valentine's Edition
4238850.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4238850.short_description: Help Max meddle in his aunt’s love life in Valentine Town! Awkward dates, chaotic choices, and unexpected romance spiral out of control in this story-driven comedy adventure full of humor, chaos, and meta mischief. WISHLIST NOW!

4238870.title: Max's Adventures: Summer Edition
4238870.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4238870.short_description: Max’s Adventures: Summer Edition is a surreal comedy adventure. Play as Max, stranded on a dreamlike beach where nothing is as it seems. Explore strange landmarks, survive bizarre hazards, and uncover the mysteries of this sun-soaked, twisted summer world.

4239070.title: BULLET CHAIN - Vessels
4239070.short_description: A "Use Your Enemies" Deckbuilding Roguelite FPS. Fight through hordes of enemies, and travel through time, on your quest to kill an Angel.

4239610.title: Xylon
4239610.short_description: A fast-paced retro shoot 'em up where you dodge bullets, upgrade your ship, and battle escalating waves of enemies and bosses.

4239830.title: Far Below
4239830.short_description: A calm, relaxing mining game about digging deeper and deeper below the surface. Gather ores, carve your own tunnels, and unwind as you descend into the quiet depths. Keep going until you're truly… Far Below.

4239980.title: Cube Dodger 3D
4239980.genre: Casual, Racing, Simulation, Free To Play
4239980.short_description: Cube Dodger 3D is a fast, neon arcade runner. Slide along a glowing highway, dodge smarter and faster cubes, charge your shield, unlock ships, roads and enemy skins, and chase brutal score-based Steam achievements

4240020.title: Into the Cannon, Soldier!
4240020.short_description: You are the commander on the last line of defense. Hold your base, recruit soldiers, and launch them via cannon to another collapsing front. A cooperative (1-2 players) tactical defense game where your decisions decide the fate of two battles.

4240180.title: Blackhole Survivors
4240180.short_description: Blackhole Survivors is a fast-paced survival game where you control a growing black hole. Absorb planets, level up, and choose powerful upgrades to survive longer. Master movement, physics, and strategy to achieve the highest score.

4240250.title: Stray Magic
4240250.short_description: The Everley University of Magic has fallen, but a quest led you here... a mission still waiting to be fulfilled. Explore, fight, recruit and survive as you cross paths with other lost souls. A turn-based JRPG influenced by dungeon crawlers and survival horror.

4240280.title: My Wifey
4240280.short_description: End your loneliness at the computer! Bring your desktop to life with My Desktop Waifu. Chat offline, monitor your system performance (CPU/RAM), keep your notes, and strengthen your bond as you pat her head. Plus, you can even upload your own character!

4240440.title: Tracebound
4240440.short_description: Tracebound is an atmospheric, fast paced, ice skating game. Slide and leap across the giant’s colossal body, shattering its shackles to restore nature’s movement.

4240670.title: 遗物路：Relic Road
4240670.short_description: Relic Road is a roguelike turn-based tower-climbing game centered around equipment and relic building. As players continue to explore, they can recruit various heroes to expand their team, obtain equipment from heroes, encounter different events, and strengthen their forces.

4240680.title: Tiny Train Tycoon
4240680.short_description: Build a toy railway from limited pieces, launch trains, and solve logistical challenges. Tackle economic puzzles or relax in sandbox mode — the choice is yours.

4240750.title: Fight Life Legacy
4240750.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4240750.short_description: Rise through the MMA ranks in this turn-based fighting RPG. Train key stats, manage your career, and face ruthless rivals as you uncover the dark truth behind your father’s mysterious disappearance and fight to build your own legacy as a champion.

4240880.title: 鸥鹭罔继
4240880.short_description: 你将观测一段虚构的故事，通过选项的干涉决定被观测者的命运。你将观测的对象是一个迷茫、执拗，有着孩童的天真与暴虐的女孩，你开始观测的时刻，她失去了自己生命中最重要的人，面临决定未来的诸多抉择。你的每一次干涉，都会将她的故事导向截然不同的方向。

4240940.title: Gnomophobia
4240940.short_description: Gnomophobia is an unsettling escape-horror game where gnomes stalk you through a themed forest, staying frozen only while you’re watching them. Follow the chain of visual clues hidden in notes, outsmart the gnomes’ relentless pursuit, and find the way out of the forest!

4241050.title: 矿物猎人 Mineral Hunter
4241050.short_description: Players will take on the role of a miner who collects precious ores, travel to different islands by hot air balloon, upgrade your weapons to fight various ore monsters, and upgrade your hot air balloon to reach more islands.

4241150.title: Untold Story
4241150.short_description: A modernized turn-based RPG. Go on an adventure with your party, battle tough monsters and fierce foes, and save the world! A large cast with unique skills creates strategic turn based combat, with plenty of challenges to face.

4241300.title: Scrub Dudes
4241300.short_description: A world built from cardboard, fabric and handcrafted creations. Everything is messy and covered in grime, but the Scrub Dudes team is ready for action. Climb, glide, collect trash, fix things and WASH it all clean. Enjoy this cozy handcrafted world.

4241310.title: Oceanarium Fishing
4241310.short_description: A relaxing fishing and island life sim where you sail into the ocean, upgrade your boat and rod, and choose to sell your catch or display rare fish in a giant show aquarium on your own island.

4241330.title: 蝶のいる部屋 ｜ The Room With The Butterfly
4241330.short_description: All you do is talk to a butterfly. A very short horror game. Enjoy the story through simple click-only controls.

4241390.title: WARCOM: Fortress Europe
4241390.short_description: Command WWII divisions from the invasion of Normandy to the fall of Berlin in a hybrid operational-tactical wargame, directing strategy, logistics, and real-time platoon-level battles in a fully persistent and procedural 3D world.

4241600.title: Five Arcade
4241600.short_description: Shoot to move through the Five Arcade! A fast-paced twin stick 2D arcade physics platformer celebrating Five decades of gaming. Glide, fly, fall and blast through 60 pixel-perfect stages using a cracking selection of guns; from machine guns and flamethrowers to rocket launchers and high-five guns.

4241890.title: JAX ATTACKS
4241890.short_description: JAX ATTACKS - Evil A.I. Bots are attacking the city! Go Get 'Em! Step into the boots of Jax, a rogue hacker-turned-hero, battling A.I. Bots in this action-packed 3rd-person shooter!

4241940.title: Sundered Soul: Chains of the Undying
4241940.short_description: Sundered Soul: Chains of the Undying is a fast-paced 2D Hack-and-Slash Rogue-Lite where every run demands skill, strategy, and quick reflexes. Take on Story Mode, survive the Arena, or hunt Champions for powerful relics. Collect and combine powerful relics as you fight to break an eternal curse.

4241960.title: Legacy of Chaos Online
4241960.short_description: Legacy of Chaos Online is not just a cooperative 3D Hack and Slash with Action-RPG elements, but a living legacy of a world where every hero is a bearer of ancient power, and you are the architect of their might.

4242070.title: Gumdrop Gladiator
4242070.short_description: A candy-themed VR brawler where waves of hungry minions swarm you. Use hand-to-hand combat, silly melee weapons, and candy blasters to knock them back with ragdoll physics. Survive as long as you can before the chaos overwhelms you.

4242080.title: Backrooms Santa
4242080.short_description: Backrooms Santa is a singleplayer horror game. Bring back the kids gifts and escape a massive Backrooms maze — while holiday horrors hunt you every step of the way. How fast can you save the kids christmas?

4242140.title: Scuba Club Simulator
4242140.short_description: Become the Ocean’s Ultimate Dive Master

4242150.title: Fish Market
4242150.short_description: A cosy fish market simulator where you cut fresh fish, turn them into products like sushi, and collect rare species. Build a peaceful market, master satisfying preparation mechanics, and grow your seafood business at your own pace.

4242650.title: Squidview
4242650.short_description: Explore the world of White Shell Island, a tropical paradise. Romance islanders, decorate your dream house, fish exotic creatures, grow lush plant life, and cook unique dishes. Customize your islander, pursue hobbies, and discover secrets. Live however you see fit. The world is in your hands!

4242740.title: Idle Crush Factory
4242740.short_description: Idle Crush Factory is a simple shape-crushing idle game that can sit at the bottom of your screen while you browse or work. Crush shapes, earn money, and upgrade your gears. WISHLIST NOW

4242750.title: Obscure Horrors
4242750.short_description: An obscure collection of surreal and dark horror games.

4242830.title: Werehouse
4242830.short_description: Werehouse is a co-op haunted night shift where you and up to 3 other overworked elves package presents for Santa. If stocking the sleigh trucks an hour before Christmas wasn’t stressful enough, you’ll be fighting for your life against holiday monsters while you’re at it.

4243220.title: 海边的忘川亭
4243220.short_description: Lethe Bar by the sea is a pixel-art afterlife sitcom. Play as AQi, a new Meng Po. Listen to ghost stories and brew custom soup using bizarre ingredients. Serve the perfect bowl to grant satisfaction or instant amnesia, sending souls on their way to reincarnation.

4243380.title: Idle Quest Simulator
4243380.short_description: No complex operations required! Auto-battle through the Underworld, traverse the Dragon Palace, and retrieve the True Scriptures with full idle gameplay.

4243670.title: Invocation: Ghost Photography
4243670.short_description: Play as a paranormal investigator and explore dark, atmospheric locations where lost spirits still lurk in the shadows.

4243760.title: Hu Majiang
4243760.short_description: Friend, would you like to play a round of mahjong—simple in rules yet limitless in possibilities? Welcome to the Hu Mahjong hall. Come take a seat and enjoy a relaxing, stress-free time.

4243820.title: Space Memory: Rodents
4243820.short_description: Cute, relaxing memory game where you match pairs of adorable rodents in space

4243830.title: Three Feet From Death
4243830.short_description: Enter into what might be the most insane gaming challenge created - Three Feet from Death. A precision platformer with bullet-hell elements, responsive, fast paced gameplay, and a skill ceiling that even masters of the genre may spend their lives reaching for. Good luck.

4243930.title: Blast Grid Battle Grounds
4243930.short_description: This is a top-down 2D roguelike game. A fallen soul awakens in a hell made of corrupted game data. He must fight against the twisted game characters in an endless cycle of rebirth and real pain, striving to break the curse of this world — only to discover that he himself is part of the curse.

4244150.title: True Christ
4244150.short_description: Experience the life of Jesus in True Christ, a faith-based simulation-adventure where you manage hunger, stamina, and health, explore biblical environments, climb, swim, collect items, use tools, and guide others in a family-friendly, story-driven journey.

4244170.title: Cozy Home
4244170.short_description: Cozy Home is a calm and relaxing organizer game where you can forget your daily stress and find peace by sorting, stacking, and organizing your items.

4244780.title: Goblin Dish
4244780.short_description: Goblin Dish - A captivating 3D logic puzzle.

4244930.title: Log.in
4244930.short_description: Log.in is a mystery-horror game where you explore a PC screen, digging through images, videos and files. Hidden somewhere in the system is the location of a girl being held captive. Your actions on the desktop will dramatically change the story and her fate.

4244990.title: Eskadrila X - Rift Protocol
4244990.short_description: A fast-paced 3D rail shooter with photo-realistic UE5 visuals. Destroy enemy waves, upgrade and customize your ship to meet escalating challenges, uncover hidden paths with secret rewards, and blast through fully 3D environments with physics-driven destruction.

4214290.title: Blade of Vengeance: Night Raid at Swift Peak Pass
4214290.short_description: A 29th Army soldier in the 1933 night raid. Master shadows, avoid lights, and use your dadao in this UE5 stealth game. Execute enemies or deflect bullets. Chinese opera music and masks create a unique "war drama" across 4 missions of courage.

4215620.title: BugoPhobia
4215620.short_description: BugoPhobia is an indie survival horror game where you explore haunted places, avoid ghosts during ghost hunts, collect clues, and correctly identify the type of ghost

4215730.title: ホロダンジョン 博衣こよりとホロウライブ in ホンシャタワー
4215730.short_description: Wonderful maze “HoloDungeon” changes form with each challenge—within it lurks Hollow, beings not unlike Holomen. To rescue her snatched friends and make special Live a success, Hakui Koyori tries an unknown adventure! Roguelike RPG where you play using wisdom and brains remain even after down.

4215760.title: Genome Survivors
4215760.short_description: In this roguelike action game, you play a failed experiment that refuses to die. Design your own abilities, fight alone against endless hordes, and create crazy builds to become unstoppable.

4216270.title: Basilisk's Isles
4216270.short_description: Basilisk's Isles is a point and click investigation game. Explore the beautiful painterly islands, talk with their colourful inhabitants, and use the different windows and tools at your disposal to unravel their strange mysteries.

4216390.title: Clownfield 6
4216390.short_description: It’s 2028. After years of foreign conflicts, economic strain, and prolonged emergency measures, public trust in the U.S. government collapses. What begins as nationwide protests quickly escalates into armed resistance.

4216470.title: Fragments of Dread - Late Lines FM
4216470.short_description: Your night shift at 107.9 FM turns into a nightmare with the forbidden 99.9 frequency. When the cursed song plays, your only defense is covering your ears. But you must listen to find the radio. As shadows hunt you, you have seconds before madness. Seek silence or face your end.

4216670.title: Typing Farmer
4216670.short_description: Welcome to Typing Farmer! This desktop idle healing game will make a corner of your screen a cozy farm. Your daily actions—typing and clicking—automatically foster crop growth, attract cute animals play with you. Let the healing charm of adorable creatures infuse your intense workdays~

4216920.title: Road 88
4216920.short_description: Road 88 is a car anomaly game where you must spot the differences on an endless road loop and avoid deadly hazards.

4216960.title: Maya, Valentina, Naomi
4216960.short_description: A new semester, a blank notebook, and three distinct paths. Will you chase hidden stories with Maya, race against the clock with Valentina, or solve intricate puzzles with Naomi? A fully animated visual novel about connection, ambition, and finding your place in the chaos of university life.

4217180.title: Stubborn Shibas
4217180.short_description: A tricky puzzle game full of some seriously stubborn Shibas!

4217200.title: Casenology
4217200.short_description: A top-down tactical shooter where you'll fight enemies, rescue hostages, and complete various missions. But it's not that simple — you'll face shortages of ammo, medkits, and all kinds of resources. So, is it worth engaging in a firefight? Think before you act!

4217310.title: Genes of Glory
4217310.short_description: A narrative-driven turn-based RPG featuring deep RPG systems, detailed pixel-art animations, and explicit adult themes, following a mutations researcher uncovering the truth behind a global crisis.

4217380.title: Femdom First Timers
4217380.short_description: Being a repeat customer really pays off, especially when your local love hotel hands out S&M starter kits! Sayuri straps in for spicy escapades and embraces her sadistic side, sliding into a sexy latex fit equipped with handcuffs, a collar, and even a cock of her own to peg her boyfriend with!

4217680.title: You Belong Here
4217680.short_description: Family man Philip Oakes wakes up with a piercing headache, unable to remember his past. Dazed, he explores an old home, receiving guidance from a caller on the phone. As Philip walks through the familiar rooms, he uncovers a reality better left forgotten.

4217820.title: Michael Test
4217820.short_description: Michael Test is a point-and-click adventure game where you uncover hidden truths within classical paintings and follow faint traces of sound to deduce and choose the final ‘sin.’

4217850.title: Ghostprint
4217850.short_description: Atmospheric first-person horror game where you carry an old Polaroid camera. Take the right picture and a way forward emerges.

4218050.title: Aria:||
4218050.short_description: When you were little, did you ever make your fingers act like tiny people, letting them hop and dance to the music in the car as the scenery rolled by? A world that begins with lines and sound. That feeling is what Aria:‖ is all about. A quiet little game meant to make you smile.

4218080.title: John The Retriever
4218080.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4218080.short_description: In this 3D sandbox-style experience which draws from elements of visual novels, every choice has consequences. Go on a transcendent, genre-bending adventure as you break the rules of reality itself on your quest to retrieve your missing BFF., through the eyes of mankind's greatest companion.

4218210.title: Goat's Odyssey
4218210.short_description: Just a goat. A boring peg. And a postcard that changed everything. Embark on a surreal journey in a shadow theatre style: from a village garden to lunar craters. Solve absurd puzzles, troll a rooster, and find out if the grass is truly greener on the other side of the universe.

4218230.title: Spring Me Up
4218230.short_description: A challenging physics-based 2.5D platformer. Use your spring to bounce and land with precision, navigating tricky platforms and obstacles. Every miscalculation can send you back, testing your skill, patience, and self-control.

4218330.title: 字得其乐WordJoy
4218330.short_description: A turn-based strategy game that combines Chinese character component word-building with card-based combat; players draw, deploy, and combine components to form characters that trigger skills and deal damage while learning pinyin and character structure.

4218400.title: Around the World 3: Amazing Countries Collector's Edition
4218400.short_description: An exciting journey through the most scenic places in the world: hidden objects, mini-games, puzzles, and countless discoveries. Feel the spirit of adventure and explore new horizons!

4218410.title: Christmas Across America Collector's Edition
4218410.short_description: Immerse yourself in the holiday spirit! Journey into the heart of winter America to create traditions, find hidden treasures, and experience the magic of the coziest time of year.

4218450.title: Bridgeway to Heaven
4218450.short_description: In this challenging action and strategy game, you will help Mai-K, in charge of the safety of a climbing expedition, to sabotage her own team to keep more loot for herself, all without the foreman discovering you.

4218460.title: BND-Legenden: Operation Blackbox
4218460.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Free To Play
4218460.short_description: BND Legends: Operation Blackbox is a tactical stealth adventure where you guide agent AJ through a fortified tech compound, infiltrate enemy systems, steal critical data, and complete clever minigames with support from your elite BND team.

4218520.title: ULTRATAP
4218520.short_description: ULTRATAP is an incremental game about defeating monsters and bosses, getting stronger and enjoying the process. Buy upgrades, complete quests and equip powerful items.

4218540.title: GuZhenRen
4218540.short_description: This game is inspired by "Gu Zhen Ren" and is a 2D roguelike. It features the raising, utilization and refinement of Gu, the combination of killing moves and Gu arrays, level-up, the search for longevity Gu, and the defeat of more bosses.

4218570.title: Bird Game 5
4218570.short_description: In Bird Game 5, birds battle for control using their unique skill sets. Whether you’re a speedy hummingbird, a tanky shoebill, or a tactical eagle, the goal is clear: Pick a bird. Master their skills. Bring home the eggs.

4218580.title: System Overload
4218580.short_description: SYSTEM STATUS: UNSTABLE> System Overload is a resource management sim disguised as a Win95/98 Task Manager. Balance CPU, RAM, and heat while fighting malware across 8 unique endings. Push your hardware to the limit—just don't trigger a meltdown. >DO_NOT_CRASH.

4220170.title: Batamonisk
4220170.short_description: Batamonisk is an RPG action game with a fairly short story. Taking around 2 hours at most for the main story. A Story consisting of a holy dragon and a demon king, Even mentions of a demon god. I ask of you Nakato, Will you uncover this story in full? Or are you becoming a part of it?

4220820.title: Polyarmory: High Calibre Love
4220820.short_description: The world's only fully-loaded conspiracy theorist gun-nut dating simulation. As the prepper, take the mysterious pill Caliber™ to awaken an arsenal of alluring companions and fight against the dark forces determined to tear you apart!

4220840.title: Yet Another Jumping Game
4220840.short_description: A precise game about jumping and finding fun.

4221330.title: Whiskers In The Sand
4221330.short_description: Dive into the desert to shred through waves of undead and sand-born horrors. Whiskers In The Sand mixes survivors-like arena combat with roguelite buildcrafting — unlock new cats, gather relics, stack upgrades, and forge ridiculous builds. Experiment, survive, and end the pharaoh’s second reign.

4221650.title: Do Goats Dream of Golden Grass?
4221650.short_description: Climb, fall, and rise again as a determined goat chasing its dream of reaching the top. Jump through frustration, laughter, and endless challenge to taste the legendary golden grass. Will you help the goat achieve its dream?

4221690.title: Viral Hunters
4221690.short_description: You are trapped in the same facility, aiming to find a way out through the scattered "Vaccine Injectors". The game's core revolves around the crucial vaccines.

4221810.title: Bullet Express
4221810.short_description: Merge and upgrade your weapons as you retake the Bullet Express!

4221860.title: Sycophant
4221860.short_description: This game is a casual treasure-hunting adventure game with a low-poly art style.

4222020.title: Stepmom Speedrun
4222020.short_description: Stepford Heights has the highest stepmom-per-capita in America. The dads are gone for Fishing Weekend. 20 stepmoms. 48 hours. Can you beat the World Record?

4222050.title: Coin Mechanica
4222050.short_description: 『Coin Mechanica』 is a VR-compatible roguelike boomer shooter. Crush demonic invaders with a storm of coins and explosive blasts! Rip out the cores of vicious demons possessing treasure, then reduce their bodies to even more coins!

4222160.title: TOUCH GRASS
4222160.short_description: They told you to touch grass. They didn't warn you about the nature spirit waifus waiting outside. 14 elemental girls. One terminally online gamer. The ultimate outdoor experience.

4222170.title: Tiny Card Farm
4222170.short_description: Tiny Card Farm is a cozy farming card game where you grow plants, raise animals and process your products by stacking cards. Discover new technologies, buy upgrades, complete tasks and become a prosperous farmer!

4222220.title: Omoide Cafe
4222220.short_description: Omoide Cafe is a calm café/pastry shop simulation where you develop your own café step by step, unlocking new recipes, equipment, and features with the guidance of Bebii.

4222700.title: Racing Manager
4222700.short_description: Manage your racing team: strategy, tires, staff, budget, and real-time decisions. Build the perfect crew and lead them to victory in this immersive motorsport management game.

4222760.title: The Champions of Lootheim
4222760.short_description: The Champions of Lootheim is an action roguelike where you face hordes of creatures to survive. Have fun defeating enemies to evolve your attributes throughout the game and buy permanent upgrades in the shop, as well as equipment dropped in chests by powerful enemies.

4222800.title: FloraLumina
4222800.short_description: FloraLumina is a peaceful, magical gardening game where sunlight, moonlight, and shifting weather impact your garden's growth. Nurture your garden of beautiful hand-drawn flowers, enjoy soft ambience, and play at your own pace.

4222830.title: I'm in Love with My Cosplay Futanari Princess
4222830.short_description: I'm in Love with My Cosplay Futanari Princess ! is a spicy, short, Female x Futanari, Slice of life, Romance Visual novel. When the tall, sexy Art School Idol needs an emergency cosplay fix, shy seamstress Ally discovers the 10-inch secret hiding under her skirt.

4222970.title: Demolition Expert 拆迁专家
4222970.short_description: Blast through walls, destroy pillars, and enjoy the moment of collapse. This game lets you destroy buildings in any way you want!

4223200.title: Ars Mechanica
4223200.short_description: A PvE idle strategy game where auto-battles unfold on a 10×5 grid battlefield. Customize and position your humanoid mechanical soldiers, defeat the enemies that stand in your way, and build the strongest mechanized army.

4223290.title: Mega Man: Dual Override
4223290.short_description: Mega Man returns in 2027 with a brand-new entry in the classic action platforming series! Override challenges and blast down legions of robots while springboarding across a new array of futuristic frontiers!

4223390.title: BoomBox Remastered
4223390.short_description: BoomBox is back, Remastered with heart, sweat, and rhythm. Drum through endless community-made maps in stunning worlds, with every song right inside the game. It’s rhythm, fitness, and pure expression powered by real players. Grab your sticks, feel the pulse, and help shape the dream.

4223710.title: Legends Reloaded
4223710.short_description: Legends Reloaded is a roguelike arena shooter where you play as resurrected legends - Alfred Brainstain, Threepac Parkur and Marlin Merlot. Destroy spawners to stop hordes of Lovecraftian aliens, progress through their base to fight the bosses. Get weapons, skills and upgrades to fit your playstyle.

4223720.title: Engkanto Girls
4223720.short_description: Engkanto girls is a monster girl collecting turn-based roguelike. Fight against the Castille! A foreign invading force, and the engkanto girl population agitated by a mysterious group of blood magic wielders.

4223870.title: Hentai Tales: The Red Act In Lockdown
4223870.short_description: My world is a cramped apartment in Isolation Zone 704. Ever since the "Red Act" was enforced, nights have become a deadly game. The “Sows”—terrifying creatures that drain men—lurk in the darkness. But when a knock echoes at my door, hunger and loneliness tempt me to gamble with my life.

4224080.title: White Memories
4224080.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4224080.short_description: Take the mantle of a postman who refuses to give up his job, even after death. Clinging to your last memory, take off into the world of the forgotten to deliver your letters to the ghosts that are stuck there, allowing them to reach the afterlife. Protect your mail from those who are pursuing you.

4224170.title: Hero Link
4224170.short_description: Recruit heroes and build your formation! Harness the unique "Master-Follower Link" system to craft action sequences and coordinate targets, unleashing synergies where 1 + 1 >> 2. Every link is a tactical choice, every formation has its own unique growth path!

4224460.title: LÖÖP
4224460.short_description: An observation-driven psychological horror set inside an endless furniture superstore. Spot anomalies, choose the correct path, complete your shopping list — and escape the loop.

4224500.title: Pupple Pop
4224500.short_description: Pupple Pop is an incremental game where you pop bubbles to earn money. Buy bigger and better bubbles, unlock upgrades and hire fish helpers to automate the process and take care of all the busy popping work for you. Simple. Satisfying.

4225440.title: Did you visit CommutatorApply
4225440.short_description: The act of Oblivion happened. Everyone will become blind and deaf. In 364 days. No exceptions. The government has already started installing the "commutators". And you? You're a military officer who has to spend the next year asking incoming patients, "Did you visit commutatorapply ?"

4225930.title: Civilization Directive
4225930.short_description: A single-developer independent game combining philosophy, institutional simulation, and minimal interaction to explore an experimental world defined by civilizational evolution and the consequences of choice.

4225940.title: SIFU Kidnapped! Adventure in the Women's Kingdom
4225940.short_description: Modern worker reborn as Golden Cicada in the all-female Land of Women. Unravel the Mother-Son River’s secrets, battle Demon King Mara, and bond with seven goddesses. Your choices shape many endings—balance enlightenment and love to rewrite the Three Realms.

4225980.title: Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter
4225980.short_description: Turn the page on the explosive 2nd chapter of Nihon Falcom’s legendary Trails saga! Estelle Bright sets out on a new journey across Liberl to uncover the truth behind Joshua’s disappearance and defeat the sinister Ouroboros organization.

4226050.title: お家で甘える社会人彼女の恋愛模様
4226050.short_description: A heartwarming visual novel about a romance with a younger female colleague. Enjoy an authentic office love story between two working adults navigating their careers and their feelings for each other.

4226120.title: 死とは何か？
4226120.short_description: A philosophical visual novel with no choices, centered on the theme of death. Through conversations with the gravekeeper, this short story invites you to reflect on life and mortality.

4226250.title: FPSCore
4226250.short_description: Competitive arena based FPS. If you enjoyed the Quake series and are looking for a fast paced, skill based, action packed multiplayer PVP shooter then look no further. FPSCore comes packed with the old school movement mechanics you know and love; bunny hopping, rocket jumping, wall surfing and more!

4226350.title: The Night Cleaner
4226350.short_description: Night shift office cleaning. All that greets you, a new hire, is a dirty floor… and a formless sense of unease. In the silent floors above, something is unmistakably moving.

4226370.title: 我的文字修仙世界
4226370.genre: Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4226370.short_description: This is a multiplayer online text-based cultivation game (not single-player), co-created by a planner and a programmer. It focuses on the core experience of "idle gameplay for low stress + high freedom".

4226680.title: By Myself
4226680.short_description: A 2D horror and psychological-horror game based on puzzles and mysteries to uncover the truth about a child left alone. Engaging mechanics, a memorable story, and original soundtracks.

4226750.title: Intergalactic Cleaning Squad
4226750.short_description: Meet Zephyra, Robuddy and Niles in this tactical arcade space action clicker game! Can you defeat all 25 levels of interplanetary evil and restore peace in the universe?

4226790.title: Grey in White:77th room
4226790.short_description: A standalone puzzle adventure game developed by Kyros（詟）. Players can control a small gray cube and solve various puzzles in a massive maze composed of 77 white rooms, ultimately reaching the center of the maze—the 77th room—and achieving the mysterious final goal!

4226820.title: GRIDBUSTERS
4226820.short_description: A cozy detective puzzle game where every case is a grid you must investigate, every clue is a piece of logic, and every deduction brings you closer to the truth. Solve handcrafted mysteries across story-driven cases. No guessing — only pure deduction.

4226850.title: Creepy Cases Teen Detective Club
4226850.short_description: The mysterious death of a girl on the municipal school sports field shook the small town of Sky Cliffs. Haunting days pass, and amid disappearances, paranormal activity, and ghosts, the Teen Detective Club takes on the investigation of these frightening cases.

4226930.title: Welcome To The Neighborhood
4226930.short_description: Welcome to the Neighborhood is a Horror Stealth game where you settle into your new home while creepy neighbors are watching your every move, waiting for the perfect moment to make it theirs.

4227000.title: The Corner Cafe
4227000.short_description: The Corner Cafe is a cozy(ish) cafe simulator set in a retro futuristic mythical Ireland in the year 2160. Play as Dan, the new owner of The Corner Cafe, the last independent cafe in Galway City. It is up to you to create an oasis of community in this dystopia...

4227110.title: Swordformer
4227110.short_description: Only two buttons for ultimate action: move and pick perks. Slash hordes, craft insane builds, and unleash wild weapons. Help Josh The Barbarian escape the Shadow Wizard Gang's video game prison!

4227130.title: Slak : Mech Trekking
4227130.short_description: Slak is a short game that takes you across vast wildernesses, deserts , canyons, frontier settlements to seek out and destroy enemy's facilities.

4227820.title: Risky Mining
4227820.short_description: Risky Mining is a solo Roll & Move board game blending luck and strategy. Roll the dice to move and build up your stats. When you feel you're ready, start mining to challenge the target score! Your judgment determines your score.

4227840.title: Waifu Dominion: Lustful Reign
4227840.short_description: Hentai clicker where you unlock over 500 anime illustrations through 100 levels. Build your waifu collection, progress, and enjoy a world of visual pleasure.

4227850.title: HORDE
4227850.short_description: HORDE is a 2D arcade-style shooting game, with continuous progression, that will test your skills as a player.

4228160.title: Castle Femdom: Dungeon Crusade
4228160.short_description: Explore a dungeon 🔥 filled with erotic 🩷 monsters and demons in this Femdom Survival game. As a good cleric 🙏 surely you can find a way to redeem the dark creatures trapped within...

4228230.title: General Chaos - MAJOR SNAFU
4228230.short_description: "Currently, GENERAL CHAOS - MAJOR SNAFU is considerably more than halfway to the finish line! This time around, its a sprite-based, multiplayer PC Game that uses an Xbox-style Game Controller &/or Keyboard & Mouse .

4228390.title: Curse Chapter: Dawnthief
4228390.short_description: Plunder all the treasure worth taking from the exotic wilderness with your band of rogues. Jump, kick and sling your chain mace to smash and climb your way through any obstacle. Face off against beasts and hopeful heroes that rise up to stop you.

4228590.title: 耕战三国
4228590.short_description: This is a real-time strategy (RTS) game integrated with simulation and management mechanics. Based on Romance of the Three Kingdoms, it depicts the epic of China's chaotic era during that time.

4228950.title: Dark Dreams on Diverging Roads
4228950.short_description: Drive through the world as a famous author in this upcoming free narrative game. Manage your fuel (coffee) and figure out how to navigate with no GPS and a broken radio. Meet a host of interesting characters and don’t forget to LOOK BEHIND YOU.

4229000.title: VALERIAN
4229000.short_description: Take control of two heroes in an unlikely alliance, help them in combat and exploration through a ruined world, and guide them to their ultimate fates.

4229100.title: Nami no Iro - The Color of the Waves
4229100.short_description: Mugen Takebara doesn't remember much of his childhood. Returning to Inonaki wasn't his choice. Welcomed by his cousin, Sora, the two quickly reconnect… but something is wrong. With her. Or with you.

4229180.title: Overcharged
4229180.short_description: Sacrifice anything to protect your family from relentless villains and thugs. Overcharge your sprint to blur through the streets at superhuman speeds. Dodge attacks, chain dashes into lightning finishers, and hunt your enemies. Upgrade your abilities and protect your city from powered beings.

4229230.title: 10ⁿ - Ten Power N
4229230.short_description: 10ⁿ - TEN POWER N is a science & fiction strategy-simulation where you create, explore and conquer the universe from quantum foam to the cosmic expanse. Traverse 19 levels, manage more than 600 resources, defend your simulation. The universe isn’t just yours to explore – it’s yours to command!

4229480.title: Space Manager
4229480.short_description: Build, launch and manage realistic space missions across our solar system, placing satellites and telescopes in precise orbits. Explore planets, collect valuable scientific data and sell your findings to expand your rising aerospace empire.

4229780.title: Never Clean
4229780.short_description: A minimalist game about collecting strange and absurd trash. Walk around, pick up items, sell your finds, unlock upgrades, and complete your collection. Play to relax or compete with others for the best time. It costs no more than an everyday small purchase and stays with you forever

4229900.title: NEWS FAKER
4229900.short_description: Build a true fake news empire. Fabricate interviews, twist the truth, hire on-air stars - and remember: Reliability first! (as long as it gets clicks…)

4230540.title: SECOND WIND
4230540.short_description: SECOND WIND combines soulslike timing and parry-based combat with roguelite progression in a brutal sci-fi melee experience where every fight is a test of focus, reflex, and resolve.

4230810.title: BlastForge– Forge your legend
4230810.short_description: BlastForge– Forge your legend is a tactical FPS featuring clean gunplay, fast-paced combat, and carefully designed maps. Train your skills, fight intense PvP battles, and unlock new tactical options. Forge Your Legend.

4230950.title: Street-Spec: 日本
4230950.short_description: Street-Spec is a simcade car game set in Japan's Kanto region. Customize your vehicle and push it to its limits at Japan's most famous driving hotspots. Race through busy streets or on the track and enjoy a nostalgic, atmospheric vision of early 2000s Japan.

4231330.title: After Thunder
4231330.short_description: A shadow stretches across the world, giving birth to strange dangers and discoveries. You must pick up your sword and make a stand. Embark on a journey to uncover a deadly plot in a visual novel set in a unique Far-East Fantasy realm. Learn what comes After Thunder...

4231380.title: Legend of the Coin Knight
4231380.short_description: Save the five fractured islands of Korhana as the legendary coin hound's son, Jac, and in the process rescue your father's soul from damnation. And also joining you on this adventure is your trusted pal, Kat Knip the cat.

4232480.title: ABSØLVE
4232480.short_description: Welcome to ABSØLVE, a dark fantasy based hack-and-slash game, where you fight wave after wave of demons hordes using the chaotic Wheel of Judgement system to try and defeat as many monsters as possible in an attempt to gain absolution.

4232500.title: Hellshot
4232500.short_description: The survivors-like arcade game where you control a ship from a top-down view. Face massive waves of enemies while leveling up and gaining random bonuses through a slot machine, changing your weapons, powers, and strategy to survive and overcome every challenge.

4232700.title: Castle Cats
4232700.short_description: Idle RPG and Cat-Collecting Adventure. Build a guild of heroic cats, train and evolve a wide cast of over 400 feline characters, take on quests at your own pace, customize your base, and dive into seasonal events and fun story updates in a cozy, ever-growing universe.

4232760.title: PASSENGER x PRINCESS: NO HOPE // MUST DIE
4232760.short_description: A self abating husk is forcibly coerced into a suicide pact by a "perfect" girl drowning in ennui and despair. The result is unfathomable heart rending terror and confusion.

4232850.title: UltiMage
4232850.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Early Access
4232850.short_description: A top-down single-player rogue-lite where you master manual spellcasting, battle waves of enemies, and grow stronger through uncapped meta progression. Become the ultimate mage across ever-changing magical levels

4233050.title: Dulmyr
4233050.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4233050.short_description: Dulmyr is a roguelite RPG where players explore an endless tower, battle procedurally generated enemies, craft gear, and develop skills. Each run is unique, deaths are permanent, and progression shapes the world. Early Access - features may evolve.

4233310.title: Where Time Ends
4233310.short_description: Build a time machine to see your deceased mother one last time.

4233350.title: Inverted Dreams
4233350.short_description: This dream driven psychological exploration game guides you through shifting landscapes shaped by buried fears, fractured memories and unsettling truths. As the world bends, every shadow becomes a clue, and every step pulls you deeper into the subconscious you’ve tried to forget.

4233370.title: Creation of a god: The Eternal Village
4233370.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4233370.short_description: The game combines roguelike mechanics, platforming, village building, puzzles, and combat in a procedural world where you never know what might happen. You must fulfill the demands of a mysterious god or you will be destroyed!

4233380.title: Do A Crime
4233380.short_description: Do A Crime is a casually-chaotic-cozy platform puzzler where you play as a Raccoon - doing crimes! Do A Crime takes the whimsy of being a mischievous raccoon and allows the player to live out their chaos gremlin dreams.

4233470.title: Neighbor Master
4233470.short_description: Your neighbor just bought a SPORTS CAR. You? You're broke. But you have a shovel and a backyard full of... opportunity. Dig, melt, and bottle snow to build a "Premium Glacier Water" empire. Send in the drones, upgrade your gear, and save up for a ride that will make his car look like a cheap toy.

4233550.title: Brainrot Online
4233550.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Early Access
4233550.short_description: A fast-paced multiplayer FPS where bizarre brainrot creatures battle across chaotic arenas. Join or create your own server, fight bots or players, and dominate the battlefield with four absurd characters and three unique maps.

4233600.title: Mushroom Empire
4233600.short_description: Run, gun, and platform your way through the 4 seasons, shotgunning, freezing, and burning your foes along the way. Light animals on fire, get eaten by flowers, crush baby spiders underfoot, featuring an interactive world, competent physics, and custom death animations for all you freaks out there.

4233940.title: Hustle Battle: Card Gamers
4233940.short_description: A card game by the name of Magic Monsters is taking the country by storm. Itsuki Nakajou doesn't have many friends and isn't passionate about anything, but that all starts to change once he's introduced to the world of Magic Monsters.

4234040.title: UKNON Jones - Portal
4234040.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4234040.short_description: In this platform and puzzle game, Elsa LOVELUST is equipped with a gate gun. You must destroy objects or teleport her through the portals to help her cross inaccessible places and reach the flag of the different levels of the game.

4234110.title: Silent Numbers
4234110.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4234110.short_description: A promising facility has fallen to ruin, yet experiments continue to torment. Traverse the depths, restore minds turned into code. Troubleshoot repression, live to see tomorrow.

4234130.title: LOST IN THE DARK LABYRINTH
4234130.short_description: Explore a colossal labyrinth built on a near world-largest scale in this maze-exploration survival FPS. Rely on a weak light and scattered braziers, collect keys, and decide when to sneak or fight as you race to escape within 60 minutes.

4234270.title: Yin Yang Fun
4234270.short_description: A mind-bending arcade puzzle inspired by classic Tetris. Control two grids at once, clear lines on both sides, and push your coordination to the limit. Two hands, two boards… back in block again.

4234290.title: King Scribble
4234290.short_description: Explore the Sketchbook World as you help navigate King Scribble back to the Doodle Kingdom! Draw platforms and objects to solve puzzles, defeat enemies, and find secrets!

4234390.title: Poker TD
4234390.short_description: The most relaxing, difficult, & satisfying game. Poker TD is a hypnotically satisfying card game with tons of replay value. Every game you play is much different then the last. Create broken combinations and see if you have what it takes to win a game of Poker TD.

4234700.title: KingBack4:末世降临
4234700.short_description: KingBack sequel, traversing the apocalyptic world, inheriting beauties from the previous game, with adult anime videos viewable after each level clearance.

4234710.title: KhanII M
4234710.genre: Action, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4234710.short_description: The legendary MMORPG returns. KHAN 2 M brings back the classic experience with modern systems—story content, seasonal battle pass, events, and a challenging tower climb filled with escalating rewards.

4234730.title: Chuppy Saves the Day
4234730.short_description: Turn-by-turn hop ‘n’ reveal puzzle. Move only when you do, dodge candy hazards, clear chocolate tiles, rescue candy girls, and enjoy flirty conversations.

4235060.title: Foolz
4235060.short_description: FOOLz is a co-op Stone Age experience where defending a village means fighting enemies, the environment, and your own bad decisions.

4235200.title: The Zyrdain Sands
4235200.short_description: Visceral twin-stick shooter where desert gods sabotage your run with no-shots, sandstorms, and cursed upgrades while you evolve Zyrd's weapons to save the Sacred Stone.

4235230.title: Werewolf: The Inner Beast
4235230.short_description: Werewolf: The Inner Beast is a 3D third person survival horror game with a female protagonist. Story driven linear gameplay in a dark, claustrophobic atmosphere.

4235280.title: BLACKMURK: Shuffling Man
4235280.short_description: Fear is real. Sometimes tragedy needs nothing more than that. 💀 A short visual novel based on the story of the same name — about the silence that lets something shuffling into your home. 👁️👁️

4235400.title: RV Savage Desire
4235400.short_description: 💋Step into a wild, intoxicating world where survival meets seduction and every shadow hides desire. Navigate a forest of danger, temptation, and unforgiving trials—where each choice shapes your fate, and only the bold earn the rewards ahead.💋

4235900.title: 101 Dogs Hidden in Australia
4235900.short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 dogs in Australia🐾 in the hand-crafted landscape. 🏆 Earn tons of achievements. How many 🐶 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

4236170.title: Isla Hearts
4236170.short_description: A dark 18+ RPG where enemies seduce rather than simply attack. Manage HP, SP, and Temptation in strategic combat. Defeat means losing your hard-earned experience. How long can you resist?

4236220.title: LOZT: Legion of Zombie Terrors
4236220.short_description: A top-down shooter through the zombie apocalypse. A failed military experiment has turned the legions of troops into ZOMBIES! With weapons! Can you survive wave after wave of zombie attacks to escape?

4236270.title: Survival Town
4236270.short_description: A small indie survival game created by a solo developer learning Unreal Engine. Explore, gather resources, and survive in a dangerous environment. My first game—hope you enjoy it!

4236310.title: Dead Circuit
4236310.short_description: You are brought to another dimension, to help a weak faction fight their aggressive enemy. You will need to upgrade your arsenal and abilities, to take on this task and become victorious.

4236370.title: Magus Day
4236370.short_description: Magus Day is a top-down arena shooter where you play a mage who upgrades her spells every level to fight the incoming monsters.

4236380.title: Don't press X to free the pirate!
4236380.short_description: Clash wits with the most manipulative pirate in gaming history. He will beg, gaslight, and meme until you break. In this satire of gaming culture, your only goal is to NOT press X. But you probably will.

4236450.title: Tattoo Shop Simulator
4236450.short_description: Run your dream tattoo shop! Provide tattoo and piercing services, customize your shop, and manage staff. Unlock new skills and roam the living city freely on your motorcycle. Buy real estate, fight off thugs, and grow from a small shop into the city's biggest brand!

4236580.title: AxeSlinger
4236580.short_description: AxeSlinger is a fast, heavy-metal roguelite FPS where you shred through demon-infested dimensions using guitar-weapons. Fight hordes, rack up insane combos, unlock powers, and battle colossal bosses as the last Death Angel of Shred on your path to reclaim your throne from the Battle Worm.

4236620.title: 我獨自升級英文(3)
4236620.short_description: 玩法與<轉生打怪學英文七>相同,超過80張全新美圖,全新1200個中階英文單字，遊戲包含了兩種有趣的玩法,第一季劇情模式(困難)及第二季地產建設模式(簡單),讓學英文不再是為了”考試”,是為了自己,來挑戰吧....抛開英文等級的枷鎖,挑戰1天背200個英文單字的傲人成就，不管您的英文呈度如何,這絕對是一款所有人都能盡情玩，開心學習的遊戲。

4236700.title: FireMatch Empire
4236700.short_description: Awaken the first Stickfolk. Explore an endless world. Build your cities. Develop new technologies. Unlock new eras. Shape a peaceful civilization. No war, only creation.

4236710.title: Roll Or Die
4236710.short_description: Roll Or Die is a fast-paced arcade survival game where every second counts. Control a rolling ball through collapsing arenas, master precise physics-based movement, chase high scores, and survive as long as possible in short, intense runs.

4236810.title: Halu - The Fish
4236810.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game about a child in a broken home. Under the watchful eyes of a strict mother, your only friend is a fish in an aquarium. Do your daily tasks and experience a heavy, emotional story where the only thing you want is to be free.

4236940.title: Aiyoe's Secret Room
4236940.short_description: Adapted from the 2016-serialized manga of the same name (2023 anime streamable on Bilibili) this game brings a brand-new exclusive storyline a decade later. From expanding the worldview and wrapping up hidden plots to unveiling long-buried secrets, it’s the most complete Ai Yoe's Chamber of Secrets

4236980.title: A Lucky Hunt With : Phaedra
4236980.short_description: Embark on a sensual ladybug-hunting adventure with Phaedra, an attractive young woman. In this hidden object game, explore each location to discover what lies beneath Phaedra's enticing layers.

4237070.title: Moe Mekuri After Eden Girl
4237070.short_description: Packed with cute illustrations of girls living in a world where civilization has collapsed! Different illustrations are available for each difficulty level. Use your intuition and creativity to solve puzzles and collect the cute illustrations!

4237220.title: Battlemage Ascension
4237220.short_description: Battlemage Ascension is a first-person melee slasher roguelite set in a dark fantasy world, where you play as a battle mage. Combine brutal melee combat with devastating elemental spells. Unleash physics-driven chaos - throw objects with telekinesis and kick enemies into deadly traps.

4237230.title: Fish Tank Simulator
4237230.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4237230.short_description: Manage your own digital aquarium in various relaxing environments. Raise fish with unique behaviors, decorate tanks, and unlock rare species. Whether you enjoy min-maxing your income, unwinding with a cozy game, or you’re a fish lover looking for a digital tank, you’ll find it in Fish Tank Simulator

4237470.title: Where’s My Lewd Deck? Deep ’n Dive
4237470.short_description: Sun, pool, and temptation. At Hidden Cove Resort, searching the scenery has never been so pleasurable. Find the lost deck and unlock rewards in Hentai, Bara, or Futa. Relax, explore, and enjoy a design made for your... comfort.

4237570.title: THE DAY THAT WASN'T
4237570.short_description: Relive the same day without remembering it. Your choices feed four inner alter egos (Shadow, Mad, Alex, and Bully) — shaping reality, glitches, and one of 16 possible endings. The day repeats. Your mind doesn’t. Or does it?

4237590.title: Dungeon For Bosses
4237590.short_description: Design deadly dungeons to protect your Boss! Use trap cards, manage Action Points, and customize your Dragon ally. Roll the dice to crush adventurers in this strategic dungeon building game.

4237680.title: Gulovacka
4237680.short_description: Gulovacka is first-person king of the hill snow fight for 2-6 players. There is no death. When you fall, you need to get back up yourself! Throw snow at your friends. Try not to fall and get to the target as quickly as possible.

4237830.title: Cyndefense Remastered
4237830.short_description: Cyndefense Remastered is a casual Tower Defense game. With multiple modes its really easy to jump into a game and play for 10-20 minutes. For those who desire a challenge, the game offers multiple harder difficulties and maps if the casual experience is a little too casual.

4237900.title: 生于午夜
4237900.genre: Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4237900.short_description: Born at Midnight is a first-person mystery game set in Hong Kong during the 1960s-1990s, depicting the struggles between police and criminals. The story follows several Hong Kong police officers as they attempt to solve a series of cases during that era, but things take a turn for the worse...

4238140.title: Infant God
4238140.short_description: You are the guardian of an infant god. Guide Aistalt through the toxic ruins of the internet. Debate with random users, harvest their ideologies, and sculpt her personality matrix. Will you raise a benevolent savior or a tyrant who deletes humanity?

4238180.title: Lone Tower
4238180.short_description: A roguelite tower defense game where you fight waves of monsters, level up, choose powerful perks, craft new gear, and unlock unique arrows to push deeper into each run.

4238190.title: SUKIMA: The Creeping Gap
4238190.short_description: A gap somewhere in your room begins to open on its own, little by little. If you can’t find it and close it before it opens completely—. A first-person escape game centered around the fear of gaps.

4238220.title: Idle Demon Summoner
4238220.short_description: A dark yet vibrant idle game featuring creature collecting, tower-defense, and bullet-heaven elements. Unlock new demons and weapons to conquer distant worlds.

4238230.title: Overpowered 2 - Crux of Fate
4238230.short_description: Press your luck to its absolute limits as you fight for survival in a deadly monster arena! Enter a dark arena where everything is out to kill you. How long can you hang on?

4238300.title: Wraith’s Embrace
4238300.short_description: The newly appointed priest Mior, sent to a desolate village, encounters a mysterious boy named Fei deep in the forest. White hair, red eyes. Smiling in solitude, he felt cold to the touch, yet terrifyingly captivating.

4238310.title: Chaos Strider
4238310.short_description: "Chaos Strider" is a 2D side-scrolling pixel style Roguelike shooting game. You will play as a Strider challenging the Chaos Realm to obtain corresponding rewards. Choose your weapons, select challenge levels, enhance upgrades, reforge and fuse, fight, and seize treasures.

4239430.title: Antique Dealer Simulator
4239430.short_description: Run your own cozy antique shop where every item has a story. Buy and sell furniture and collectibles, manage customer needs and smart pricing, expand and upgrade your store, and grow your reputation from a small-town trader to a respected antique dealer.

4239760.title: A Father's Growth Spurt
4239760.short_description: Juggle the tasks of taking care of a bonsai by monitoring the water, fertilizer, and weeds in the same pot, all while witnessing the short linear narrative between the 3 generations of the same family.

4240010.title: Nimue
4240010.short_description: A man awoke by the lake with no memory. Guided by a pilgrim, he discovers he was once the sorcerer Merlin—and learns the truth about the "Saint" who sealed him away. A dark fantasy visual novel about unrequited love. Three endings await.

4240040.title: 暗喻
4240040.short_description: In the forest west of the school's rear gate, there lives a witch who can grant any wish.Open the Witch's Book! It will guide you to the very source of magic— This is a story-driven exploration RPG. Players will progress through the narrative via exploration, puzzle-solving, and dialogue.

4240090.title: KunKunNest
4240090.short_description: You accidentally entered Kun Kun Nest, where there is a terrifying demon Kun Kun who loves to scare its prey. If you feel anything unusual in the room, please escape quickly.

4240340.title: Abyssal Dominion
4240340.short_description: Command gore-soaked demon armies in brutal pixel-art RTS battles! Conquer worlds match-by-match, unlock blueprints to create and evolve your unstoppable faction, and dictate victory by choosing your servants' twisted buildings

4240500.title: Dead Bit
4240500.short_description: Fast-paced runner-shooter where every run is a risky raid. Blast through enemies, grab loot, upgrade your weapons and gear, and unlock harder raids with new enemies and tactics each time you reach the end.

4240600.title: ANAMNESIS: memoria war
4240600.short_description: Will you die and be free of pain? Or live and break the shackles of fate? Can two souls, bound by fate itself, sever the never-ending cycle of death? "ANAMESIS: memoria war" is a gorgeous 2D jRPG rich in story, heavy on action and steeped in deep characterization.

4240620.title: The Granny Detective Society
4240620.short_description: A cozy and quirky detective game where Madeleine, a retired little mouse, watches her street and dives into thrilling investigations… until the Granny Detective Society contacts her and she discovers that the whole neighborhood is living a double life… especially the grannies.

4240660.title: HANGAR 51: Classified Investigation
4240660.short_description: A first-person investigation and detective game. Explore a sealed 1980s bunker, solve puzzles, collect evidence, take photos, and piece together what really happened. Your final report determines the outcome. Follow the protocol. Question everything.

4240760.title: Peasant or Rebel?
4240760.short_description: A chaotic, asymmetrical party game for up to 5 players! One player becomes the Lord, while the others are Rebels hiding among the Peasants. Will the Lord expose them in time - or be overthrown? Jump into fast, silly rounds full of laughs and unexpected moments.

4240770.title: A walk in Hwaseong Temporary Palace at night
4240770.short_description: In the fleeting moment after the sunset fades but before night fully arrives, take a calming walk through Hwaseong Temporary Palace, a place that holds 300 years of history.

4240920.title: HANDS UP
4240920.short_description: Escape a vertical nightmare with up to 4 friends using physics-based parkour. Equip Magic Rings to customize your climb. Don't let go, just keep your Hands Up.

4240950.title: Fate/Tiny Me
4240950.short_description: The Holy Grail War begins anew in a modern era. Players will select one of seven Masters, stepping into his or her perspective to be summoned as a Servant in the grand ritual. The store page has been carefully designed to be spoiler-free, so feel free to explore without worry~

4240970.title: TEENMAGE
4240970.short_description: TEENMAGE is a narrative game with many interactive elements. Turn chores into fun, explore diverse levels that reward you for your discoveries and (mostly) good acts, and chat with friends. Play with food, practice talking to a girl, and grow up in the most grounded story about becoming a mage.

4241070.title: GlowBorn光裔
4241070.short_description: Become a tiny firefly in an endless night, switching red, blue and green light to fight monsters, cross deadly swamps and heal a dying forest in a gentle puzzle platformer about hope and courage.

4241080.title: Coffee Coffin
4241080.short_description: Coffee Coffin is a gothic narrative café simulation game.Seven lost souls, seven deadly sins, seven obsessions — you will talk with the dead, listen to their stories, and brew coffees that symbolize redemption, guiding them to let go and move on. All dialogue is generated by AI in real time.

4241170.title: The Herzbury Curse
4241170.short_description: A cruel twist of fate lets Annalie and Archibald stumble into Herzbury, a cursed and long fallen castle. Now separated, it is upon Annalie to save her beloved brother. A potentially deadly adventure, filled with puzzles and whimsical characters, where your choices matter.

4241200.title: Home Invaders
4241200.short_description: Violent criminals keep breaking into your house, so you must fight through infinite waves of enemies. You can obtain new weapons by defeating the intruders that wield them. You can play as eight different characters. Try to get the highest score possible!

4241230.title: The Long Way Home
4241230.short_description: A journey where some may never find their way back. ...Of course, you probably believe that won’t happen to you.

4241320.title: The Conglomerate
4241320.short_description: Start as a garage coder in the 80s and evolve into a dystopian corporate overlord. This genre-bending simulation shifts as you grow: solve coding puzzles, design isometric MMO worlds, and construct massive automated factories to replace human staff with AI. Conquer the industry at any cost.

4241520.title: Behold the Horde
4241520.short_description: An endless horde advances without rest. Survive infinite waves, dodge the chaos and fight for the top spot on the online leaderboard.

4241560.title: Oh Balls Merge
4241560.short_description: Drop, merge, and score! Immerse yourself in the addictive ball-merging mania of Oh Balls and see how high you can go.

4241610.title: SINVAULT
4241610.short_description: You wake up trapped inside a coffin. With only a restricted phone at your side, reach the right people and try to stay alive. Oxygen is running out, sand is filling in, and every message you send shapes your fate.

4241840.title: Sporbs
4241840.short_description: A relaxing, short incremental game where you harvest Orbs from newly discovered alien organisms. Upgrade your extraction technology, manage resources, and unlock new areas to maximise your yield.

4241850.title: Dreadmyst
4241850.genre: Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4241850.short_description: Dreadmyst is an online fantasy RPG running on its own engine. Customize your stats and abilities as you slaughter the aberrations plaguing a cursed land. Choose from four playable classes, level up, farm gear, run dungeons (PvE), and fight other players (PvP). Tab target combat.

4241880.title: Alchemy Tunes
4241880.short_description: Alchemy Tunes is a delivery co-op game, cook with friends, deliver potions to nomads and survive the hardships of the vast desert.

4242060.title: HorrorMon Photography
4242060.short_description: Photograph hallucinations of monsters to make them disappear. When the monsters become real, defend yourself and take more photos to complete your monster dex!

4242890.title: Encryptid
4242890.short_description: Encryptid is a short FMV horror game about hunting and catching cryptids. Use real-world footage recorded exclusively via the Gameboy Camera to identify, locate and capture iconic creatures of myth and folklore.

4242990.title: 灰烬溪AshCreek
4242990.short_description: AshCreek is a female-oriented interactive visual novel centered on Lovecraftian cosmic horror. Players take on the role of an outsider who is unwillingly drawn into AshCreek, uncovering the truth behind its anomalies step by step by taking part in stories set across different worlds.

4243060.title: Wings of Vi 2: Guardian's Heart
4243060.short_description: Myougi survived. She shattered the sin statues. Now the Seven Deadly Sins walk the shattered realms, and Vi returns, wings reforged, to hunt them down. The vision is a mix of what I've learned: a precision platformer with fast, fluid combat and more player agency.

4243130.title: The Other Me Reborn
4243130.short_description: Step into the role of Ophelia as she returns to the isolated town she once shared with her twin, now twisted by secrets and shadows. Her search for answers spirals into a nightmare of shifting halls and memories that refuse to stay buried.

4243210.title: Eclipsia
4243210.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG
4243210.short_description: Eclipsia is a 2D action MMORPG where thousands explore a world beyond imagination. Master fast-paced, multi-class combat, hunt legendary weapon classes, and venture through realms from tranquil forests to Nephelia's clouds. Face epic bosses, battle in PvP arenas, and forge your legend.

4243290.title: Curse of the Ethereal Dragon
4243290.short_description: Adventure to the strange and remote town of Cliffside to investigate a mysterious curse. Meet eccentric characters, face unusual foes, and collect unique items as you climb the snowy mountains to discover the cause.

4243430.title: Nightfall
4243430.short_description: This is a top-down survival and building game where you scavenge for resources and construct a base to defend against zombie attacks when nightfall. Warning! The wilderness at night is extremely dangerous; please stay inside your base.

4243610.title: G-MODEアーカイブス+ フラッシュモーター・カレン
4243610.short_description: The soul is square… probably. A certain girl stepped into the virtual world.

4243650.title: The Backrooms : Lost Guest
4243650.short_description: The Backrooms : Lost Guest is a visually realistic, co-op survival horror exploration game developed with UE5, supporting 1 – 6 players. Evade terrifying creatures and deadly hazards while solving room-based puzzles to find your way out of the Backrooms. A chilling adventure awaits you…

4243770.title: Deskavator
4243770.short_description: The queen calls you to grab a pickaxe and start mining for the hive! Watch as your mining buddy collects ore without invading your working screen space! Collect ore, earn achievements, mine for your hive, and most importantly, relax and enjoy the ride!

4243910.title: Bone Marrow 2
4243910.short_description: Their battle is a ritual. Your weapon is tactics. Gather resources by day, and desperately combine them in the darkness by night. Combine food for health, weapons for attack, and armor for protection. Every move is a step between life and death in this dark tactical puzzle.

4243920.title: Loreen's Purgatory
4243920.short_description: Get ready to be hunted by monsters, surprised by jump scares, and tested by the rage-inducing obstacles! Get ready to conquer Loreen's Purgatory! if you can...

4243960.title: We Are So F*cked: The Last Critter Crew
4243960.short_description: This is a survival adventure simulation game. Lead the last critter crew through frozen ruins, scavenging whatever useful trash you can still dig up. Command your team, dodge whatever the apocalypse mutated, and somehow prepare for another day you probably won’t survive.

4243990.title: Path of Idle: Old Gods Rising
4243990.short_description: An idle AFK game featuring auto-battle, loot farming, chest opening, party combat, Lovecraftian horror, town building, gear crafting, runewords, stages, towers, dimensions & seasonal modes. Serve the Old Gods, build your town, corrupt the Godsworn, fight for their resurrection!

4244050.title: 治愈之书Book of Healing
4244050.short_description: This is an interactive visual novel game featuring plot-driven dialogues and point-and-click interactions. One day, you receive a magical book—and inside it, you meet a mysterious friend. As you interact with each other, you gradually step into the depths of one another’s inner worlds.

4244100.title: Muscle Onmyoji
4244100.short_description: Fear? What's wrong with that? Just punch it. Evil spirits are gathering in the hospital. You visit with your disciple and purify the evil spirits with punches.

4244140.title: Pixel Chess Idle RPG
4244140.short_description: Chess meets Idle RPG! Forget checkmate—pieces have HP, stats, and loot. Earn gold for every move, upgrade your army, and unlock skills like Splash Damage. Automate your board to grind endlessly, then Rebirth for massive multipliers. A strategic loop of infinite scaling and pixel-art destruction.
