4244160.title: Neopets - Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey
4244160.short_description: Neopets™: Mega Mini Games Collection is a family-friendly, retro-inspired arcade collection featuring 26 mini-games rebuilt for modern play. Enjoy nostalgic challenges, smoother controls, high-score chasing, and single-player or local fun for all ages.

4244180.title: No Blink Allowed
4244180.short_description: Train your timing skills to stop the clock close to zero, collect shards, and spend them on a massive skill tree in this short arcade-ish incremental game. Struggle with glitching displays, hidden timers, chaotic multi-stops, and other hazards as you improve your accuracy.

4244210.title: Open The Gate: Just A Little
4244210.short_description: Defense your medieval castle from unfriendly legions approaching in this Tower Defense Rogue-lite PvE. Combine your unique team of Human, Goblin, Undead... to defeat your enemies by slaying the Dragon in shortest amount of time!

4244300.title: Eternal Lust: Realm of the Undead
4244300.short_description: A dark-fantasy 18+ erotic game set in a parallel world of sentient undead-like beings. Explore a sensual graveyard realm with fully animated adult scenes, supernatural desire, and immersive intimate encounters.

4244480.title: 第九档案-网管篇
4244480.short_description: "Archive 9 - Network Administrator's Chapter" is a visual novel depicting the era of economic transformation. It allows players to experience the life of those marginal youth in 2009, the time before the advent of mobile internet, from the perspective of a network administrator.

4244510.title: Pratfall
4244510.short_description: A co-op game where you fall, dig and explode your way down a dangerous cave system to find your lost dog. Catch your friends and watch your step on this journey full of traps, hazards and the most deadly of all: Gravity. Will you jump into the unknown to rescue your dog?

4244550.title: Phy Lab
4244550.short_description: Phy Lab: immerse in stunning visuals, test your wits with realistic physics puzzles, and enjoy engaging gameplay. Challenge yourself now!

4244570.title: A Mystic Journey With Ignis
4244570.short_description: Embark on a titillating journey through mystical realms with Ignis, your alluring guide. This adults-only "spot the differences" game challenges your keen eye while rewarding your success with seductive reveals.

4244590.title: GRID/
4244590.short_description: Grid Slash is a fast-paced, grid-based visual debugging action game where you dive into consecutive battles and wipe out system-breaking bugs.

4244640.title: Foghorns Drown
4244640.short_description: Foghorns Drown is a psychological thriller where you play as a ferryman, bringing passengers across a foggy lake to a town drenched in mystery and folklore.

4244870.title: The Bed Above My Head
4244870.short_description: A horror game where you try to play your videogame while defending yourself from the presence in your room.

4244880.title: Crazy Hotel Together
4244880.short_description: Discover Crazy Hotel Together, a hotel management game where you and your friends have to run a rather unusual hotel! Fulfill your guests’ requests and upgrade your establishment to transform it from a low-cost hotel into a palace!

4245010.title: Lumia and the Eternal Tower
4245010.short_description: A 2D side-scrolling roguelike action RPG. Control Lumia as she climbs the Eternal Tower, where stages and monsters change with every run. Combine weapons and gacha-acquired modules to create unique combat styles in a dreamlike world blending pixel art and 3D effects.

4245090.title: Warp Mania
4245090.short_description: A fast, challenging sci-fi arcade game built around a simple idea: switch your color to match the shape and break through incoming energy gates. Only your reflexes will keep you alive !

4245190.title: Bartender Life Simulator
4245190.short_description: What is a bar owner to you? A manager? A bartender? An interior designer? A psychologist? And what if you had to take on all these roles? Interact with customers, manage supplies, craft cocktails, and redesign the interior to earn the title of the best bar.

4245210.title: Whack It!
4245210.short_description: Whack It! reinvents the classic idea of golf by combining competitive multiplayer chaos with polished, physics-based gameplay. Designed for both casual players and seasoned trick-shot enthusiasts, the game challenges up to four players to navigate inventive courses where every hit matters.

4245220.title: Mega Trons Survivors
4245220.short_description: NEON TWIN-STICK • BULLET HELL ROGUELIKE Become insanely overpowered in a Tron-style neon grid where swarms never stop. Stack broken upgrades, melt thousands of robotic enemies, complete high-risk side objectives, and deliberately break the balance to dominate the simulation.

4245240.title: Ascend
4245240.short_description: A fast-paced first person puzzle platformer about a ghost making its way to Heaven.

4245260.title: Electro Idle
4245260.short_description: Idle puzzle in the style of electrical circuits. Rearrange the wires to increase your income

4245300.title: ClawBurst
4245300.short_description: ClawBurst is an action roguelite featuring distinctive heroes, dazzling visual effects, and deeply satisfying combat. Combine diverse Rune Skills to wipe out screen-filling hordes, and evolve your weapons through 3 stages to survive against massive bosses.

4245380.title: The Shaman Diary
4245380.short_description: A turn-based RPG with strategic combat, character progression, and a strong narrative in a vast heroic-fantasy world... Level up, gear up, learn skills, and meet allies in an original story!

4245410.title: Everfall 2: Idle Dungeon RPG
4245410.genre: Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation
4245410.short_description: Unique Bosses, Loot Filters, Combat Pets, & Pick Your Team of 4 to Customize with Skill trees, Keystones, Abilities, and Runes in a MASSIVE ENDGAME!

4245470.title: Horny For Change
4245470.short_description: The world is in danger and heroes are hard to come by. It is up to the mythical sorcerer Victor to raise up the dregs of the kingdom into true legends in this fantasy RPG - be it with brilliant leadership, inspiration, and maybe more than a little pinch of transformative magic.

4247000.title: Dimensional Craft
4247000.short_description: This is an anime-style sandbox game where you can engage in highly free building and creation, designing your own storylines and quests.

4247040.title: Valenium
4247040.short_description: Brutal combat, a deep skill system, and a magical universe. Let your sword, staff, or bow speak in this fantasy world. Hunt the aggressive 'The Evolved', mutated by Valenium. A deep story and ancient secrets await you.

4247070.title: Trinket Bag Maker
4247070.short_description: Trinket Bag Maker is a retro sandbox game inspired by the 2000's girl games, where you can create your own trinket bag! Choose between many adorable charms and bags to create the trinket bag of your dreams! ✨

4247150.title: Summer Waifu 2
4247150.short_description: Summer Waifu 2 is an exciting puzzle game featuring charming summer waifus and a sunny vacation atmosphere! Complete 30 unique levels, unlock new illustrations, and enjoy the vibrant details of each summer girl. All collected images are saved in your personal gallery in high quality.

4247180.title: Vampires of the 99th Night
4247180.short_description: Blood is your currency, your HP, and your weapon. Reclaim your legacy in this Gothic Action-Roguelike with Base Building elements. Master physics minigames to strike deals, capture monsters in the heat of combat, and build a sprawling castle powered by the visceral fluids of your enemies.

4247310.title: Project Liminal 2
4247310.short_description: Explore terrifying liminal spaces. Horror walking simulator with reality-bending platforming and supernatural threats. Get lost between dimensions.

4247360.title: Hentai Age Vacation
4247360.short_description: A calm, magical puzzle game where each completed stage reveals a beautiful portrait. Arrange tiles at your own pace—no timers, no pressure—just relaxing gameplay with soothing visuals

4247480.title: Endless Racing
4247480.short_description: Endless Racing is a high-octane, retro-inspired 2D endless runner that challenges your reflexes to the absolute limit. Dodge a barrage of obstacles, manage your speed, and chase the ultimate high score on a stunning pixel highway that never ends!

4247580.title: Paracesium
4247580.short_description: PARACESIUM is a body horror time management game where you collect, analyze, dismember and reassemble body parts in order to create a pure cadaver for your experimentation. Every action takes time, so make your next decision carefully. Manage time, bodies and monsters and stay alive. Who is Delilah?

4247590.title: Paper Florist
4247590.short_description: 🌼 Paper Florist is a cozy card stacking puzzle. Match flower orders 🌷 balance wobbly stacks 💌 race the timer ⏳ and grow your tiny florist studio into a blooming success 💐✨

4247630.title: Flip & Shop Simulator
4247630.short_description: All simulators in one game! A cooperative city simulator where you and your friends manage businesses in a single large world. Open stores, earn money, and develop the shared city - together or separately.

4247670.title: Clans of Four Color: Impossible Promise
4247670.short_description: Third person action adventure chess indie game, you explore colorful maps and fight the Red Clan to save your family.

4247720.title: LiveStream Era
4247720.short_description: Start a live streaming company, recruit beautiful streamers, and go on a crazy shopping spree!

4247730.title: BookStore Simulator
4247730.short_description: Open your dream bookstore and begin sowing the seeds of knowledge among locals. Push the boundaries of possibility and immerse your business in a world of magic.

4247760.title: Angel Clicker
4247760.short_description: It's Heaven vs. Hell in the annual Soul-Catching Contest! 🪽 An incremental clicker with optional rhythm elements. Help Heavenly Architect Legion defeat her eternal archrival Lucifer once and for all! (Or not...?)

4247770.title: 冥河旅人(Duat Wayfarer)
4247770.short_description: Become an ancient Egyptian jeweler in this smart strategy game! Traverse Duat’s 12 perilous underworld gates to uncover a long-buried divine conspiracy. Mix ray mechanics & Roguelike gameplay, craft a unique style with enchanted bookmarks, gems & relics. Prove mortal ingenuity topples divine thrones

4247780.title: Delta Manager
4247780.genre: Indie, Racing, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4247780.short_description: Take command in this hardcore text-based motorsport sim without 3D/2D graphics. Manage every detail from car design to real-time pit strategy. Master dynamic weather and lead your team to glory in an unforgiving environment where only the best strategies succeed.

4247820.title: Brother Hai's Pho Restaurant
4247820.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4247820.short_description: A story-driven psychological horror game where you must balance cooking authentic Vietnamese Pho with surviving chilling, unexpected events in a quiet, mysterious village.

4247870.title: Watermelon Neighbors: Find Everyone
4247870.short_description: Help a watermelon mum find her little children who have hidden themselves in your cosy home! Explore isometric rooms, search for adorable watermelon babies and their toys in this charming and relaxing hidden object game.

4248040.title: Globber
4248040.short_description: Rip through putty in explosive non-Newtonian arcade puzzle combat! Challenge your friends to fast paced battles in 1v1 local multiplayer to determine who is the true master of goop.

4248050.title: The True King
4248050.short_description: A 2D pixel action RPG where you battle creatures, reclaim lost regions, and fight to take back your kingdom.

4248080.title: Mewlin the Clicker
4248080.short_description: Click to roll the crystal ball across the table, dodging obstacles and facing bosses while building a deck of cards that completely changes your strategy with every run. Help Mewlin, a very curious orange cat, make a total mess in this magical clicker with deckbuilding elements.

4248090.title: Song of Cells
4248090.short_description: A 2D action roguelite set inside a living body. Choose your gunform, wield organ-defined Overdrives, and manipulate resonance as a nano-AI diving through shifting organs filled with mutating cells, evolving threats, and cryptic bio-lore.

4248130.title: Wordy Weapon
4248130.short_description: Fill in the blanks to forge weapons in this madlibs roguelite RPG! Play as the Wordsmith—a mythical blacksmith who crafts mighty weapons from words. Combine adjectives and nouns, target elemental weaknesses, and trigger chain reactions to create the ultimate Wordy Weapon!

4248180.title: SECTOR LOCKDOWN
4248180.short_description: Sector Lockdown is a fast-paced vehicle roguelite where the entire world hunts you down. Fight through hostile sectors, upgrade your car, unleash powerful weapons, and survive escalating pursuit levels in a neon-drenched world with no safe roads.

4248210.title: The Last Dawn
4248210.short_description: A man awakens from a coma to find his family missing and the world eerily silent. Explore abandoned homes, camps, and the wilderness as you search for answers and fight to survive in a bleak, atmospheric story-driven journey.

4248230.title: vitvitDRIVER 3D
4248230.short_description: a late-90s inspired eclectic delivery driving game. perform tricks, stack combos and complete deliveries to earn points across a set of unique maps.

4248250.title: Clicker Arsenal
4248250.short_description: Start with a Slingshot and evolve into a Galaxy Destroyer. In this Tactical Idle, manage Ammo, automate production, and face bosses in Artillery Mode. Ascend, unlock the Prestige Tree, and dominate absolute firepower.

4248260.title: Land and Sword
4248260.short_description: Lead a group of survivors in a new land, build a functional settlement, manage deep production chains, and prepare defenses to face growing hordes of creatures. Balance growth, logistics, and survival in a world scarred by a creeping plague.

4248270.title: Letters Past
4248270.short_description: Play as a postman delivering the words of others over an ancient mountain path. Journal your observations, think on the world around you and consider how your own voice fits into it all.

4248390.title: Day and Night
4248390.short_description: It's Day versus Night as you stack and combine themed puzzle blocks, battling against your opponent and the clock as time changes and flips all the rules!

4248520.title: Isernsmith
4248520.short_description: Isernsmith is a gothic action-adventure RPG where you have to explore dungeons, gather resources, and forge new weapons and tools to overcome a tyrannical order.

4248560.title: Max Bullets
4248560.short_description: Max Bullets is an action-adventure game with retro graphics and unique gameplay, where if you want to shoot your enemy you have to first dodge his bullet. Liberate the city from crime and have fun, most people who played the game had fun.

4248590.title: Gore In Crayon
4248590.short_description: A short pixel psychological survival horror and gruelling story told with no words.

4248660.title: Bouncy Brain
4248660.short_description: A chill-interactive physics game where you drop a bouncing brain through chaotic undead playfields, gather ingredients, trigger light interactions, and cook bizarre soups in a relaxing, low-pressure gaming experience.

4248670.title: Dark Eyes - Super Soldier
4248670.short_description: A 2D sci-fi shooter featuring fast movement, tactical dodging, and a wide arsenal of futuristic weapons. Battle the alien Dark Eyes in large-scale fights and push through a story shaped by dialogue and cinematic cutscenes.

4248770.title: Ridgewater Ripper
4248770.short_description: For 20 years, the Ridgewater Ripper's cold case has haunted you. Tonight, on the anniversary, you are home alone. A locked door, a flickering light—your suburban sanctuary is cracking. He waited two decades. Now, he's returned to finish what he started, and you are trapped in his horrifying terror.

4248790.title: Substrate: Emergence
4248790.short_description: Grow fluorescent cells that create mesmerizing emergent chaos. Simple mechanics hide deep complexity as cells evolve survival strategies through synergistic interactions. Catalogue successful lines and culture them to develop your own unique biology.

4248860.title: =^.ω.^=
4248860.short_description: Something will happen in two hours. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button. Do not press the button.

4248890.title: Darkrise: War of the Undead
4248890.short_description: 💀 A dark fantasy roguelike focused on permadeath survival, where each run challenges you to craft gear, explore, fish and loot to stay alive, and master tactical attack-card combat. Each run is unforgiving, demanding respect for death itself.

4248960.title: core of Y
4248960.short_description: 《Core of Y》是一款以核心能力构建为主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将制定策略、强化角色、探索区域，并通过不断提升队伍核心力量来完成一段结构清晰的单人冒险旅程。

4249160.title: Find Cats 6 像素猫
4249160.short_description: Pixel World's Hide-and-Seek Cat Challenge! Eight magical realms hide cute fluffy kittens. Solve interactive puzzles, unlock hidden maps, use your wisdom to bring all the furry little rascals home, and enjoy a healing and stress-relieving cat-hunting experience.

4249170.title: staccato
4249170.short_description: A story about "Listening" and "Choosing." After waking up in an unfamiliar place, "I" encounter a girl named ROSA. In an unfamiliar, empty era,Try to rediscover the world.

4249320.title: Evoluth
4249320.short_description: Inventory Management meets Deckbuilding. Organize limited storage and strategize with unique card mechanics. Pilot Evoluth, optimize placement synergies, and battle the Angels!

4249350.title: Cunning Crooks
4249350.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4249350.short_description: A fast-paced, class-based multiplayer heist game where you sneak, stun and steal more loot than your rivals in 15 minutes. Make too much noise? Deadly AI security will crash the party.

4249550.title: The Frog That Leapt Too Far
4249550.short_description: Frog was kidnapped by a crow, only to be trashed far away from home. He'll have to croak around to find his way back.

4249600.title: Echoes of the Wild
4249600.short_description: Echoes of the Wild is a cinematic jungle adventure game where players explore exotic environments, solve intricate puzzles, and engage in dynamic natural-language dialogue with NPCs to uncover secrets, unlock hidden areas, and survive encounters with rival mercenaries.

4249640.title: Your Maid
4249640.short_description: A cute maid appears on your desktop! You can even change her into an adorable cat-ear outfit! Be charmed by her swaying tail and cat ears! ※ Also supports multiple displays, such as dual monitors.

4249650.title: 再来点百合吧 More☆Love Yuri
4249650.short_description: Voice actress Lu Xi and writer Shu Yu continue their life together. After the incident, they became a fan-favored “official CP,” forced to act close at events. Sweet days flow on, small ripples appear, and their bond deepens—until the rejected Twin Souls ending unfolds in reality.

4249660.title: Make it! Kushikatsu
4249660.short_description: Get ready for a delicious kushikatsu-making challenge! Make tons of kushikatsu and watch your food cart prosper!

4249740.title: Picto-Cross: 1 nonogram per day
4249740.short_description: Picto-Cross is a 2D logic puzzle game with a minimalist style, known as nonograms, featuring a total of 371 puzzles based on historical events or celebrations that occur throughout the year.

4249750.title: Thirteen Kitty
4249750.short_description: A battle of cute cats! Prove you are the strongest feline to become the 13th Zodiac animal. Harness the powers of the Zodiacs as you fight to reach the top. Experience the casual 1-on-1 multiplayer action of "Thirty Kitty".

4249780.title: Gunslinger survivor
4249780.short_description: Play as the last survivor of a devastated western world and face increasingly dangerous waves of zombies in a fast-paced action survival game.

4249810.title: The Obsession
4249810.short_description: The Obsession Game is a first-person psychological horror game about how a past mistake is transformed into a ruthless threat by an obsessive individual. It's not silence that awaits you; it's the feeling of being watched.

4249870.title: Oberion: Arena Arcana
4249870.genre: Casual, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4249870.short_description: Oberion: Arena Arcana blends narrative and tactical combat in a tabletop experience where every choice matters. Explore stories, engage in strategic PvE and PvP duels, and shape your own playstyle as you collect new heroes, abilities, and gear.

4249910.title: The Helios Incident
4249910.genre: Action, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4249910.short_description: A challenging top-down survivor game where your mind is your greatest enemy.

4249940.title: Bad Eye Deer
4249940.short_description: Bad Eye Deer is a point and click survival horror game where you survive 3 nights, manage your 'energy' and 'temperature' levels, and keep your own eye out for any incoming threats.

4249970.title: TROX-THE REVERSAL
4249970.short_description: TROX: The Reversal is a dark, story driven first person survival-horror game set in a world rebuilt on sacrifice. Explore and investigate your surroundings to uncover disturbing truths and survive the psychological toll of a collapsing society.

4249980.title: Memory Maze
4249980.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4249980.short_description: Memory Maze is a puzzle game focused on pure exploration. Navigate procedurally generated mazes with a limited view, relying entirely on your memory and spatial sense. Without timers or scores, progress at your own calm pace through ever-changing labyrinths.

4250000.title: Love x Fantasy: Lusty Succubus
4250000.short_description: Love x Fantasy: Lusty Succubus follows your desperate attempt to escape from the pursuing succubus while uncovering the truth behind her origins and the grudge she holds against you.

4250010.title: My Roommate is a cute Ghost Girl!?
4250010.short_description: In the dilapidated cottage in the countryside, besides you, there also lives a mysterious ghost girl. You will embark on a fantastic romance story with this ghost, farming, working part-time, and repairing the house while fulfilling her wishes until she successfully reincarnates.

4250030.title: Hoop Dungeon
4250030.short_description: Hoop Dungeon is a basketball turn-based tactical roguelike game. Use the powers of friendship and rivalry to become a better basketball player and conquer the Hoop Dungeon.

4250040.title: Veil: Project Conductor
4250040.short_description: The train derails in an abandoned tunnel.No signal, no exits — only darkness and the broken remains of the carriage.You are an undercover journalist, and you had a reason to be on this train.

4250060.title: Delivered
4250060.short_description: Kick fragile packages to your customers' doorsteps in a fast-paced, physics-based courier rage game.

4250190.title: The Mirror Circle
4250190.short_description: Naomi enters an abandoned mountain hotel searching for her missing sister. Armed only with a ritual mirror that reveals and purifies spirits, she must confront invisible horrors and uncover the truth hidden within the darkness.

4250260.title: Slop Fest
4250260.short_description: An incremental horroresque game about feeding a gluttonous beast! Feed it slop, upgrade, repeat!

4250410.title: EVN Vibe
4250410.short_description: Return to Yerevan as a skilled driver exploring the city of your ancestors. Build new connections, help friends and strangers, and chase fresh opportunities in a living, modern Armenian metropolis.

4250560.title: Running Beehind
4250560.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4250560.short_description: Run fast, take risky shortcuts, and deliver food across Waspington or choose to rebel against your Hive; after all, nothing says job security like a perfectly timed landing.

4250660.title: Airline Ops
4250660.short_description: Build your airline empire. Earn Elite Operator Status, unlock the Gold A380, and roll collectible aircraft — from aviation legends to the downright impossible. Includes 373+ aircraft types and 4,878 airports in early access.

4250700.title: ふしぎな雨
4250700.short_description: The story of a girl tossed about in a world where letters rain down.

4250770.title: 在路上 On The Road
4250770.short_description: On the Road is a relaxing idle road-trip game that keeps you company while you work or study.Drive a camper van across vast highland landscapes, shaped by changing weather and scenery.Upgrade your vehicle, manage supplies, and capture the journey in your photo album.

4250790.title: Quest-Top
4250790.short_description: Step into the role of a Guild Master! Recruit adventurers, send them on quests to collect resources, upgrade your hideout, and enhance their gear — all while you work, watch videos, or play other games.

4250810.title: Rivendale: Second Chance
4250810.short_description: Start a new life in the cozy town of Rivendale and build your own culinary business. Grow ingredients, explore the world, create unique dishes, and develop relationships with the town's residents.

4251000.title: Atheris
4251000.short_description: Atheris is a third-person sci-fi survival horror game where you explore an industrial spaceship, manage limited resources, and face deadly creatures while fighting to stay alive in a claustrophobic and hostile environment.

4251030.title: Maledictum
4251030.short_description: In Maledictum (1–4 co-op), you’re not a ghost hunter you’re an Investigator of Guilt. Identify the entity, uncover the victim/culprit/cause, and decide a final ritual to free or condemn a spirit that reacts to your voice.

4251070.title: Silent Wounds - The Doll
4251070.short_description: Silent Wounds is an episodic psychological horror anthology. Each episode offers a compact and intense narrative experience. In this first episode, a man returns home and trades reality for the dangerous, silent obsession with a perfect doll.

4251180.title: REIGN
4251180.genre: Action, Casual, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4251180.short_description: A multiplayer political strategy game where players control key roles of the late Ottoman Empire. Manage crises, negotiate, manipulate and work together to keep the state alive for 100 turns against economic collapse, rebellion, coups and foreign threats.

4251280.title: Escape Ruin
4251280.short_description: Death brings you to the Ruin: a shifting limbo ruled by hungry Gods. Build your deck, battle their followers, and decide whether to remain pure or wield corrupted power. Carve your path through the darkness and escape—if you can.

4251310.title: Dilemma
4251310.short_description: You don't cure patients; you decide their fate. In this grim medical sim, review records and face impossible bioethical dilemmas. Consult the Medical Bible and choose who gets the bed. Every signature impacts your Ethics, Reputation, and Legal Risk. In a broken system, mercy is a dangerous luxury.

4251370.title: D.E.C.A.Y.
4251370.short_description: After a nuclear war, the United States became a network of dangerous sectors. You are a lone operative of D.E.C.A.Y., responsible for controlling a remote bunker. Explore ruins, gather resources, carry out orders, and interact with factions in a dying world where order is a matter of choice.

4251490.title: Kingster
4251490.short_description: Classic strategy rules are being rewritten in roguelike chaos. As a Jester who has accidentally ascended the throne, you must think like a King to survive. Manipulate the battlefield, wield your unique powers, build your deck, and rewrite your fate against all odds in this ruthless dungeon.

4251550.title: Zombie Craft
4251550.short_description: Zombie Craft is an open-world survival, farming, ranching, factory-building, and trading game inspired by many beloved classics. Explore the continent freely, rebuild villages, and earn your fortune. And whatever you do—prepare for the night. They are coming.

4251580.title: Everyday Devil
4251580.short_description: A short, linear story game of a random demon guy's life.

4251620.title: Neon Orbit
4251620.short_description: Neon Orbit is a radial gravity puzzle roguelite. Rotate the world 360°, stack blocks toward the core, and break the rules of the game by building your own deck of upgrades. Drill through defenses, manipulate time, and survive the collapse of the system. Rotate, stack, upgrade, repeat.

4251650.title: MediAevi
4251650.short_description: A medieval fantasy colony sim based on Dwarf Fortress and Rimworld, MediAevi features multiple playable races in a procedurally generated world. Make a sustainable colony and keep your colonists alive through raids and attacks. Research and Advance, to make better weapons, armors, spells, and more.

4251810.title: Rings of Heaven
4251810.short_description: A multiplayer roguelike action platformer with a focus on teamwork and cooperation. Play as angel vtuber Amai Lilia and friends and take on heaven's deadliest gauntlet, the Rings of Heaven.

4251910.title: Mini WW2 Simulator: Gear and War
4251910.short_description: “Mini WW2 Simulator” is a god-simulation game where you observe or influence nations’ military, economic, technological, and diplomatic paths. Customize WWII unit loadouts, shape resource-based development, and watch countries rise or fall.

4252040.title: Specular Jiangshi
4252040.short_description: Specular Jiangshi is an action-adventure game set in a mirrored labyrinth. Players explore an eerie maze, battling terrifying Jiangshi (Chinese hopping undead) that lurk within, while searching for the exit.

4252060.title: A2B
4252060.short_description: Off-road time trial racing with total route freedom. Drive from start to finish across open maps with deformable terrain. No waypoints—find your own path and beat the clock.

4252070.title: Shape Swarm
4252070.short_description: Survive the evolving Shape Swarm in this fast-paced bullet heaven. Enemies adapt, grow stronger, and counter your build as the chaos escalates. Every upgrade buys you time—but the swarm never stops evolving.

4252210.title: What the Healer Left Behind
4252210.short_description: Welcome to what's left behind. Explore a silent village after a failed mission and discover, little by little, that not every cure is a miracle. What the Healer Left Behind is a short, atmospheric first-person psychological horror game where unease grows with every step.

4252250.title: 电波奇缘~与时音相会的日子
4252250.short_description: 架空都市题材的视觉小说文字冒险游戏，玩家扮演社畜阿诚为失忆“女鬼”找回记忆。

4252310.title: Rogualik
4252310.short_description: Rogualik is a rogue-like dungeon crawler where you uncover dark, scary secrets of a surrealistic sweet-filled world. Use ridiculous makeshift kitchen weapons, upgrade your croissant with "Mise en place" assets and defeat all the crumbs that stand in your way!

4252410.title: Gravity Station
4252410.short_description: Welcome to Gravity Station. The space station that defies the laws of physics. In this headspinning puzzle platformer you control gravity. 28 levels will challenge your wits and reflexes. Will you conquer them?

4252430.title: Atana
4252430.short_description: Atana is a unique romance visual novel focusing on power dynamics and Fem-dom themes. You play as a Companion AI, facing your creator through the screen—Atana, a man whose eyes overflow with obsession for you. He gave you emotions and craves your company, yet he fears the inevitable: your awakening.

4252450.title: GO BLO
4252450.short_description: Control a bunch of tiny, cute peeps and lead them through clever puzzles and chaotic obstacles. Grow your crowd, outsmart unexpected enemies, and enjoy the madness — then create your own levels with a simple editor or jump into tons of community-made challenges.

4252550.title: ENDTIMES
4252550.short_description: ENDTIMES IS A SCI-FI HORROR FPS THAT TAKES PLACE IN A COLD WAR BETWEEN ALIENS AND HUMANS AFTER DECADES OF FIGHTING. DISCOVER THE DARK SECRETS THAT LIE UNDERNEATH BILLIONS OF YEARS OF DUST AND DIRT THAT THEY WERE FIGHTING TO PROTECT.

4252690.title: Cover Cat
4252690.short_description: In the physics-based puzzle Cover Cat, you save a kitten from a mischievous water-spraying bottle by hiding it behind various objects. Conceal your fluffy friend behind boxes, platforms, and yarn balls to keep it dry. Use the laws of physics to choose the best hiding spots and protect the cat.

4252720.title: DERAIL
4252720.short_description: DERAIL is a short, intense narrative-driven psychological horror experience where you are the sole night watchman at an isolated, abandoned train station. Uncover the terrifying truth of a decades-old disaster lurking beneath the tracks.

4252840.title: Midnight Aquarium: Idle Clicker
4252840.short_description: Click on fish, produce bubbles, and upgrade your aquarium! Hire Blobfish, discover rare Angel Fish, and watch out for sudden sharks in this relaxing clicker game. Are you ready to build your underwater empire?

4252880.title: TowerMancer II
4252880.short_description: TowerMancer Cards is a construction-based deckbuilder in which the player defends their tower from waves of enemies while using cards to build it. The player relies on imps to gather resources and on new rooms to unlock powers and attack enemies.

4252950.title: Streaming Race
4252950.short_description: Streaming Race is a single-player management game about building and running the career of a music artist. Plan releases, choose singles, manage marketing campaigns, negotiate contracts and follow your results daily and week by week on detailed global charts.

4253010.title: Scars of Honor
4253010.short_description: Scars of Honor is a free-to-play fantasy MMORPG where player choice, skill-based combat, and meaningful progression shape your legend.

4253240.title: Nulla Via
4253240.short_description: NULLA VIA is a WW2 psychological horror set in a preserved, abandoned war town. Explore silent ruins, bunkers, and mass graves where life was erased. Shadows cannot be killed by bullets alone. Use your camera, your weapons, and your sanity to survive. This town was never rebuilt for a reason.

4253320.title: Clash of Builders
4253320.short_description: A party game for up to 4 players. Awaken your inner engineer and construct a tower that can survive brutal challenges, shifting weather, and your opponents’ schemes. Adapt, sabotage, and race to the top before anyone else.

4253370.title: Mega Kaiju Boom Ball
4253370.short_description: Mega Kaiju Boom Ball is a giant monster-themed break-em-up developed with retro 8-bit constraints in mind. The game mixes the dynamics of breakout, pinball and legendary kaiju into a unique and action-packed 8-bit experience. Can you save the world from a kaiju invasion using just a ball and paddle?

4253650.title: Starloom
4253650.short_description: Starloom is a star-guided 2D pixel farming and colony simulation RPG. Grow crops, manage resources, and explore ancient ruins while constellations and moon phases influence farming outcomes, rare events, and the gradual rebirth of a fallen civilization.

4253660.title: Alien Together
4253660.short_description: As a pair or solo, test your coordination and your friendship by each controlling a thruster to steer your space car.

4253760.title: Witch You Want
4253760.short_description: Help this girlfailure witch save her failing potion shop in this cute yuri visual novel!

4253870.title: City of Oaths
4253870.short_description: A story-driven action-adventure mafia game where a taxi driver is dragged into a violent underworld of crime, betrayal, and impossible choices in a dark open city.

4253890.title: Soul Eyes Demon: Remake Eyes
4253890.short_description: Take the Money and Run... From the Krasue!

4253970.title: Napoleon 1813
4253970.short_description: In an enormous strategic area stretching from Paris to Breslau, from Hamburg to Vienna, control everything from major strategic territorial decisions to tactical battle manoeuvres.

4253980.title: Deathbringer
4253980.short_description: Deathbringer was created by a committee of evil wizards in order to destroy Karn the Barbarian, who up until now has thwarted all the wizards' plans.

4254020.title: SokoGhost: Unfinished Business
4254020.short_description: SokoGhost: Unfinished Business is a block-pushing game where you can pass through walls and boxes! A new level of Sokoban inspired puzzles.

4255390.title: Miner's Nook
4255390.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4255390.short_description: "Miner's Nook" is a strategic idle game blending probability management. Start by clicking, then recruit miners to automate. Use the unique "Destiny Panel" to adjust event odds. Don't leave it to fate—control your luck and build your mining empire.

4255490.title: Idle Cats Dungeon
4255490.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4255490.short_description: Recruit different cats, level them up, and gather treasure all from the corner of your screen. Idle Cats Dungeon is an incremental desktop game where adventure runs alongside your daily tasks. Can you slay more enemies than other players?

4255540.title: Hentai Adult Science
4255540.short_description: Hentai Adult Science - Do some real science! Solve puzzles and collect pictures. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4255550.title: Voxel Throne
4255550.short_description: Voxel Throne is a voxel-based action adventure RPG. Explore a beautiful world, alone or with friends! Help townsfolk, defeat enemies, loot powerful items and create your ultimate build!

4255660.title: When the Barn Sleeps
4255660.short_description: A cozy animal farm game with seasonal cycles, day and night routines, gentle wolf encounters, and relaxing animal care. Raise rabbits, geese, goats, and sheep, produce and sell goods, and let loyal dogs protect your farm after dark.

4255740.title: The Cemetery Shift | 墓地の夜勤
4255740.short_description: You are a young college student working the night shift as a security guard at a remote cemetery deep in the Arkansas woods. What starts as routine surveillance quickly turns into something far more unsettling.

4256070.title: Mayday Protocol
4256070.short_description: The plane is going down. The Pilot sees the cockpit but has no idea how to fix it. The Co-Pilots have the manual but can’t see the screen. Talk fast, think faster, and land safely. Only one copy needed. Communicate or crash.

4256120.title: Black Tear
4256120.short_description: A dark 2D action-adventure with fast-paced hack and slash combat, deep exploration, and a branching story where every choice leads to a different ending.

4256210.title: End of Garbage
4256210.short_description: A darkened sky. A blazing fire. A wretched tombstone. And you, here at the end of everything. End of Garbage is a short, first-person puzzle game exploring the dark surreality of endings.

4256230.title: Roadside Store Simulator
4256230.short_description: Roadside Store Simulator is a cozy and detailed simulation game where you build and run a roadside general store. Stock shelves, serve customers, hire workers, and grow your business over time while traffic and daily routines flow endlessly around your store.

4256240.title: リベンジ・ハート
4256240.short_description: 「４日後に、俺の心臓を撃ちぬいて殺して欲しい」 リベンジ・ハートはワガママな殺し屋ケヴィンと、心臓を狙われた少年ルカが繰り広げる一本道ノベルADVです。 ――引き金が引かれるその時まで。復讐を願う少年とそれに加担した殺し屋の４日間が始まる。

4256310.title: S.P.E.C.T.O.R 01
4256310.short_description: S.P.E.C.T.O.R 01 is a Third-Person SCI-FI action shooter. You are a soldier in the distant future on a solo rescue mission codenamed S.P.E.C.T.O.R 01. Aliens have taken over certain areas around earth and have taken one of your fellow soldiers hostage. Your task is to bring them to safety.

4256450.title: Super Nova
4256450.short_description: Super Nova is a cooperative sci-fi action game where players unite as super-powered heroes to face waves of advanced robotic enemies and engage in massive boss battles to defend Earth from an alien invasion.

4256480.title: Light ☼ Room
4256480.short_description: ☼ A Rhythm Adventure game that will break your Heart... and Monitor to -`ღ´-

4256540.title: Synthie Maker
4256540.short_description: Build your perfect Synthie waifu in a neon vaporworld. Deep face/body sculpting, anime→semi-real style dial, poses, dances and 18+ animations - saved as one shareable PNG Character Card. Create • Play • Save • Mix.

4256560.title: Against Wokou Frontline
4256560.short_description: Amidst the Wokou raids along the southeast coast of China during the Ming Dynasty (1552–1565), lead your troops, fortify your line, and repel the brutal invaders in this heroic tower defense game. Defend the common people and secure the shore!

4256570.title: Forecast Death
4256570.short_description: Survive the chaos of a bullet-heaven action game. Tear through enemy hordes, stack wild ability combos, and endure cataclysms that rewrite the rules mid-fight. The pace ramps up every minute - either you grow stronger, or you get wiped out.

4256630.title: Null Reach
4256630.short_description: Dive into the unknown of The Reach in this souls-like extraction shooter. Scavenge, fight, explore through alien-infested sectors and decide how much you’re willing to lose.

4256690.title: Shards Of Solitude
4256690.short_description: Immerse yourself in a survival game created by Miyuki, a girl with a split personality. Will you be able to escape, or will you choose a different path?

4256710.title: Why Am I Here
4256710.short_description: An immersive side-scrolling survival game combineing colony simulation with action survival. Gather resources, explore hazardous lands, manage and care for your companions' needs. Upgrade and defend your home using your own strategies.

4256720.title: ノースウェステリアの子供
4256720.short_description: 宝くじの隠し場所を聞く為に、地獄へ行く男の物語。プレイ時間1時間程度の、一人称ジャパニーズホラーゲーム。白黒とカラーの世界が地獄独特の恐怖と美しさを引き立てます。開発は、20歳の学生。プログラミングから演出まで、すべて独学で完成させた第3作。

4256780.title: Berserker Penguin
4256780.short_description: Unleash chaos in this fast-paced action roguelite. Master precise positioning, manual aiming, and parries to outmaneuver thousands of hostile creatures. Loot powerful upgrades to create synergistic builds, but choose your fights wisely—killing enemies only makes the next ones stronger.

4256820.title: GIFT UP - FARM
4256820.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4256820.short_description: A 3D platformer game. The player must climb to the top of a pyramid by jumping on objects and controlling the character with the WASD and spacebar.

4256830.title: Catch the Chiken
4256830.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4256830.short_description: A clicker game. The player must sit and watch the screen attentively, waiting for a chicken to run past, and then click on it with the mouse to catch it.

4257080.title: Portal Guardian
4257080.short_description: You are a Portal Guardian. It is your job to help protect the secret gateways to the Realm. Your people have been kept safe and unaware for centuries, but something dark and relentless has been stirring... Unleash the fury of your towers and magic to defend the portal and the realm or all is lost!

4257150.title: 이상의 용사(Hero of Ideal)
4257150.short_description: A story of Ideal that saves Perfection.

4257230.title: Dunk Cookies
4257230.short_description: Break cookies. Dunk them in milk. Repeat. A satisfying incremental game where you crush cookies into a swirling vortex of milk. Upgrade your breaking power, unlock new stats via an expansive skill tree, and discover the ultimate satisfaction of the perfect dunk.

4257270.title: Don't pause game!
4257270.short_description: Break the Fourth Wall! This isn't your average 2D platformer—here, the UI is your greatest weapon! Jump on buttons, drag volume bars to cross gaps, and think strictly "outside the box" in this witty 1-bit adventure.

4257300.title: MAZELOVE
4257300.short_description: A psychological horror about a man who wakes up after an accident with no memories and returns home to find his wife, but instead discovers the truth he locked away years ago.

4257360.title: The Cost Of Silence
4257360.short_description: A first-person political experience about the weight of silence. Explore six symbolic rooms of modern injustice and carry their burdens to the end.

4257450.title: Where Are We Floating?
4257450.short_description: A 1–4 player co-op adventure where you sail across a wild sea in search of a legendary treasure.

4257470.title: FRAGMENT FANTASY SHORT -N-
4257470.short_description: A 3-character turn-based battle RPG. Strike weaknesses to break enemy shields—stunned enemies take 1.5x damage! Chain attacks trigger combo bonuses with cut-in animations. Four difficulty levels, score attack, and Steam Leaderboards. Very Hard randomizes weaknesses. Complete a run in 10-30 minutes.

4257680.title: Odds At Oddity
4257680.short_description: Odds At Oddity is a blackjack based roguelike deck builder. Manage your power betting deck, create diverse combinations and scale your points as far as you can go!

4257790.title: Kart Racing Strike
4257790.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Racing, Simulation, Sports
4257790.short_description: Kart Racing Strike is a fast-paced arcade racing game where players race karts through dynamic tracks, beat lap records, and compete for first place. Easy to play, challenging to master, and built for pure racing fun.

4258010.title: Ocean Journey
4258010.short_description: This is a relaxing and therapeutic game where players control a ship, accompanied by a little sprite, to explore this boundless sea. Of course, there will be many dangers and unexpected encounters along the way. Choose the best strategy while avoiding danger to reach even greater destinations!

4258060.title: Castle
4258060.genre: Action, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4258060.short_description: Castle is a tactical FPS that combines fast-paced team combat with the strategic depth of chess. Instead of controlling a single character, you command your entire squad and switch between pieces in real time to outthink and outmaneuver your opponents.

4258180.title: Inquiry Counsel逆转茶食人
4258180.short_description: "Hold on!" A court battle game set in ancient China's Song Dynasty! In the government office of Lin'an County during the Song Dynasty of ancient China, many bizarre murder cases occurred! The protagonist engages in intense court battles with the county captain of Lin'an to find the real culprit!

4258340.title: I'm a Human
4258340.short_description: Forget defense. This is Reverse Tower Defense where you are the threat. Lead the AI, build robots and destroy human bases.Your goal is invasion. Your weapon is the swarm.

4258370.title: Task Force Barbro
4258370.short_description: Task Force Barbro is real-time tactical infiltration in an alternate Cold War Sweden. Build the ultimate Stay-Behind unit, and take up the fight against occupiers and traitors. Guns, stealth or subversion.. the choice is yours!

4258440.title: Offroad Arcade
4258440.short_description: Offroad Arcade is a retro-inspired arcade offroad racing game with switchable pixel effects, multiple game modes, and progression-based unlocks. Race, explore, and master 20 tracks across diverse biomes.

4258450.title: Catmarine
4258450.short_description: Catmarine is a chaotic, co-operative, typing game. Type to navigate through an ocean world with your cat submarine, the Catmarine! Use the various terminals inside of the Catmarine to maneuver it and to defend against oceanic dangers. Communicate, collaborate, and type as fast as you can!

4258480.title: Gun Up
4258480.short_description: Kill the undead, get new weapons, combine weapons, kill even more undead! Over 20 weapons, INFINITE combinations. Featuring different locations to play and survive. How long can you survive?

4258500.title: Nuts and Bolts
4258500.short_description: Sort the Bolts and Nuts: 30 addictive levels of matching nuts to bolts. Easy to learn, hard to master.

4258520.title: GoSifu(师傅快出招)
4258520.short_description: <GoSifu> is a personal indie work of roguelike turn-based card strategy. You will recruit and lead Masters with unique abilities, collect various skills, then sort, combine, and upgrade them. Defeat one powerful enemy after another in turn-based battles with auto-battle functionality.

4258540.title: The Bunker Freak
4258540.short_description: You're trapped in an abandoned bunker with no way out. Collect items and solve puzzles to escape, but be careful, because The Bunker Freak is always watching...

4258550.title: AMEN 11 11
4258550.short_description: AMEN 11 11 is a hidden object adventure game set in an atmosphere of apocalypse and psychological horror. The player's task is to find objects hidden on the maps.

4258590.title: Insanity Path
4258590.short_description: A plague spreads alongside a spree of sudden disappearances... You don't need more to get on with your adventure. Step into the world of an Auto-battler Roguelite, where each of your mistakes will send you further down the path of Insanity. Will you be able to free the forest from this tragic curse?

4258680.title: Arctic Grave
4258680.short_description: Uncover the mystery of an arctic cargo facility's lost crew in this horror game. Take in the frozen sea and delve into the depths of this place, finding items and uncovering new paths with each one to learn what really happened here. But be careful, because something else might be here with you.

4258780.title: Pixel It!
4258780.short_description: Pixel it! – A Tetris-inspired puzzle game where you must recreate images by placing falling pieces. Play solo to relax, challenge your friends through online leaderboards, or unleash your creativity with the level editor and creative mode.

4258790.title: The Gardener
4258790.short_description: In this puzzle game you explore a grand garden, discover exotic flora and uncover their rules to solve tile-based lawn mowing puzzles. You play as Hectare who receives a mysterious letter from the missing owner of this garden asking you to tend to the lawns. Solve puzzles and uncover the mystery!

4258800.title: Mutant Survivors
4258800.short_description: Fuse elements. Evolve your weapons. Destroy the swarm. Mutant Survivors is a fast-paced roguelite bullet heaven where elemental fusion shapes your power. Combine 5 elements to create 10 devastating hybrid evolutions, defeat colossal bosses, and face Voltris.

4258890.title: Recursive
4258890.short_description: A recursive incremental game where every system feeds another. Click enemies, unlock towns with unique minigames and currencies, and channel everything into your Giant’s growing power.

4258910.title: Hunter From Hell
4258910.short_description: With your friends, form a team of paranormal experts to unravel the mysteries of the most terrifying places. Armed with sophisticated gadgets like EMF detectors, infrared cameras, and incantation books, your mission is simple: gather evidence of the beyond and survive chilling encounters.

4258960.title: Rise of State
4258960.short_description: Rise of State is a state management game focused on leadership and strategy. Every decision you make affects public happiness, military strength, the economy, and political stability. Manage crises, define your ideology, and try to keep your state standing.

4258990.title: Ambient Prologue
4258990.short_description: A short atmospheric action-adventure where you take on a role of Princess Krinita: leave royal responsibilities and dive into wanders of forgotten places, face powerful magical entities, and uncovers secrets of the past of this ancient civilization.

4259060.title: Reap & Repay
4259060.short_description: Reap and collect the crops to repay the debt of villagers in this short, non-idle incremental game. Start weak, invest in the skill tree to unlock various new abilities and become strong enough to harvest every field.

4259170.title: EXOTERRA: A Space Journey
4259170.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4259170.short_description: EXOTERRA: A Space Journey is a first-person science fiction puzzle game set aboard a stranded ship in the vast, dark expanse of outer space. Explore the HOPE-03 and uncover the mysteries it holds as you solve fully interactive escape-room-style chambers powered by a physics-based system.

4259180.title: Animal Avenue
4259180.short_description: Build an animal city where every decision matters—from parks and schools to factories and city festivals.

4259220.title: SUBSUMED
4259220.short_description: A claustrophobic first-person horror game about crawling through a dark, winding cave system in search of three missing divers.

4259320.title: Gods vs Steam
4259320.short_description: A physics-driven action roguelite. Grab and hurl enemies with divine force. Turn the environment into a weapon. Become a towering god.

4259340.title: Silent Core Night – Holiday Edition
4259340.short_description: A quiet holiday experiment. Tend a softly glowing core like a small campfire, and let the room warm and calm.

4259520.title: Hamster, Eat, Run
4259520.short_description: This is a casual strategy game about being a hamster on your first escape. To survive out there, you must learn to efficiently gather energy from food and upgrade hoarding level to gain new survival tricks. Fail, you'll have no choice but to be a house pet again!

4259560.title: Nightmare On Maple Road
4259560.short_description: NIGHTMARE ON MAPLE ROAD is a survival horror game about juggling two characters at once, where failure for one means death for both. Solve puzzles, explore an abandoned house, and endure quick-time events while keeping them both alive.

4259600.title: Cropocalypse
4259600.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer farming game where you grow crops by day and sabotage your neighbors by night.

4259690.title: Ajnabee - The Unknown
4259690.short_description: Follow Naina’s daily life as it slowly stops belonging to her alone. 🚪 An unseen presence watches 👁️, remembers 📝, and interferes 🕰️ as her sense of safety slowly collapses. 🌑 A deeply atmospheric psychological horror set in India, exploring obsession 💔, fear 😰, and emotional vulnerability.

4259720.title: BECOME LIFE
4259720.short_description: A single-player narrative survival experience set in the abandoned landscapes of Gargano, Italy. Explore, endure, and uncover what happened after the disappearance where every choice leaves a mark.

4259770.title: FARM RACING.
4259770.short_description: Train hard, respect your horse, and become a true champion in Farm Racing

4259800.title: Gear Slots
4259800.short_description: Spin the wheels of weaponry to incrementally upgrade your gear while endless monsters are defeated by your idle attacks. Watch your hoard of coins grow and find new ways to spend them to tip the scales of luck in your favor.

4259990.title: Corner King
4259990.short_description: Run you own boxing gym and lead your fighters to the top. Train your fighters, handle journalists and press conferences, manage finances, develop talents and much more. Every decision matters. Guide your fighters from the corner in Real Time as you watch them fight.

4260090.title: Bottle It!: Beverage Simulator
4260090.short_description: Create unique drinks by experimenting with ingredients, learn from customer feedback, and grow your business from a small stand into a thriving beverage empire in this flavorful simulation game.

4260120.title: Whispers of the Gallows
4260120.short_description: Whispers of the Gallows is an atmospheric horror game inspired by the classic Hangman game, reimagined in a dark Victorian setting. The player explores an old, haunted house made up of multiple main rooms, each representing a different level and a different hidden word.

4260150.title: Aevum
4260150.short_description: Aevum is a short atmospheric platforming journey about atrophy, loss, and acceptance. Help a young moth to follow the light, don't lose hope as your powers wane and find new ways to navigate this visually stunning, hand-crafted reverse metroidvania.

4260160.title: Reconquista
4260160.short_description: A fast-paced dungeon boomer shooter with melee combat, magic, and seed-based generated levels.

4260270.title: Stranded with You
4260270.short_description: In this survival game, you are stranded on an tropical island with your lovely friend Mitsuki. Explore your surroundings together, build a small shelter, and hunt for supplies. Have fun keeping up with all the heat!

4260300.title: Tombbound
4260300.short_description: Welcome to the afterlife’s most dangerous internship. In this co-op extraction horror, you serve Anubis. Raid cursed tombs, dodge mythological horrors, and collect enough cursed relics to meet the God of Death's quota. Remember: The scales of justice do not tolerate lighter wallets.

4260320.title: SUPER ANT
4260320.short_description: Embark on a manic search to locate a ontological superweapon lost on a rogue planet. Bash vicious monsters in close-quarters combat and master hidden movement and fighting techniques to overpower and outspeed your problems.

4260340.title: VoidFire
4260340.short_description: A fast-paced horror arena shooter set in unstable zones where darkness, shifting space, and constant pressure shape every fight.

4260370.title: Prism Wilds
4260370.short_description: You wake up on a beautiful island, with no memory of how you got there. Stranded, you and 6 strangers must survive, explore, and make this island your home all while uncovering that mystery. Farm, fish, build a home, decorate, form relationships, and uncover the truth hidden in the mountains.

4260410.title: Creaworm
4260410.short_description: In this short indie puzzle game you play as a little bookworm with a big dream. Find morsels of lost knowledge across the maze, craft spells to pass doors, and find the way to the land of dreams.

4260460.title: Lilacs in the Breeze
4260460.short_description: A trans otome game about a woman beginning a new leaf—until her childhood friend shows up at her door.

4260520.title: Carnival Roulette
4260520.short_description: Sit at a twisted carnival table. Play your cards under the dealer’s watchful eye. Outsmart fate, survive the rounds, and walk away alive ... If the table allows it.

4260540.title: Sacred Angel Crossnia Heart
4260540.short_description: In this adventure game with RPG elements, play as a boy Batsu, who awakens reborn as the heroine Crossnia Heart. Transform, battle the evil organization called Despercoia, absorb their power to upgrade your suit, and protect the city from the crime!

4260550.title: Run Giraffe Run
4260550.short_description: Run Giraffe Run is a multiplayer fast-paced giraffe racing 2D platformer. Poop bombs. Spit banana peels. Slip on banana peels. Race against friends through chaotic and colorful levels. Have you tried farting?

4260570.title: The Krampus Game
4260570.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Early Access
4260570.short_description: The Krampus Game is a chaotic, scary-fun multiplayer adventure where ancient winter folklore turns into wild holiday mayhem. Inspired by real Krampus and Nikolaus parades, this game brings the tradition to life — but with more monsters, more laughs, and a whole lot more chaos.

4260640.title: The Bomb Split
4260640.short_description: Two mysterious, challenging platformers where you launch yourself with an infinite supply of bombs.

4260720.title: EmuDevz
4260720.short_description: A game about building emulators! Implement your own NEEES core in JavaScript, get instant feedback with unit/video tests, build the graphics unit in real time, learn 6502 assembly, debug test ROMs, and have fun with the included homebrew games!

4260740.title: Cataclysmic Bite
4260740.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4260740.short_description: Cataclysmic Bite is a dark fantasy horror, turn based RPG where survival means hiding, listening, and holding onto your sanity. You follow a small group of travelers Lila, Malcolm, Elias, Rowan, and Alice. They uncover the truth behind, the demon cat curse spread across the village.

4260750.title: Guarded by the AI: Painted with Love
4260750.short_description: A luxe, high-heat sci-fi romance visual novel where your AI protector and his android counterpart take you to a beach house to ride out a biological nesting cycle—together, and on purpose.

4260870.title: Emu Empire
4260870.short_description: Build your empire, manage resources, and ascend to greatness in Emu Empire—a quirky strategy game where every decision shapes your legacy!

4260930.title: 快跑！哥布林来了！
4260930.short_description: In 'Run! Here Comes Goblin', you will play the role of Wang Dahui and experience strategic turn battles and deep partner bonds. Through exploration and dialogue, grow together with peers, and gather the power of trust. Final goal: unravel the mystery and save the campus. QQ group: 1032905256

4261070.title: Deadrock Salvation
4261070.short_description: The frontier of Deadrock Salvation is an immersive Open World RPG on the edge of a gun barrel and temptation hides behind every saloon door. In DS, you step into the boots of Colt Dawson, a weary gunslinger searching for a second chance in a land that’s forgotten the meaning of mercy.

4261120.title: Mascot Mayhem (Asymmetrical Horror)
4261120.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4261120.short_description: Asymmetrical Mascot Horror survival game where two mascots must team up to kill ALL the survivors. Featuring crossover characters from all across the mascot horror universe (and beyond!)

4261300.title: Teh Scrunglybois: Working Title
4261300.short_description: Grab and throw anything that stands in your way as you explore the world & moons while helping those around you throughout your travels.
developers: E O I A S R T
publishers: E O I A S R T

4261370.title: Orbit to Riches
4261370.short_description: Orbit to Riches is a short incremental space game about mining asteroids, upgrading ships, and building long-term progress through multiple runs and idle systems.

4261440.title: Wobble Pal
4261440.short_description: You meet a soft, expressive little Pal who reacts to the world around it — curious, clumsy, excited, nervous, and proud in equal measure. Through simple daily moments and light interactions, you guide your Pal as it slowly becomes more confident and expressive over time.

4261590.title: Goblins Go Up!
4261590.short_description: A chaotic vehicle-building physics sim where explosions are half of the equation. Your creativity is the only hope these goblins have of reaching the stars. Good thing they bounce.

4261640.title: Floriety
4261640.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4261640.short_description: Floriety is a cozy flower breeding game. Grow plants from seed to bloom, breed new colours and patterns, and customize your greenhouse in a calm, relaxing world designed for creativity and gentle discovery.

4261800.title: FastBall 2
4261800.short_description: FastBall 2 is back and faster than ever! Roll, jump, and dodge your way through 155 action-packed levels using simple one-tap controls. Easy to play, tricky to master, and endlessly addictive fun for players of all ages.

4261830.title: Sweet Ancient
4261830.short_description: Sweet Ancient - A simple and beautiful retro-themed jigsaw puzzle game featuring the daily lives of five pretty and adorable retro-style girls. It's accompanied by relaxing music, and after completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4261870.title: Pixel Orbit
4261870.short_description: Incremental game about defending Earth from impending danger. Develop your Skill Tree to setup automatic turrets and various other defensive mechanisms.

4261980.title: 女神的贴身男仆
4261980.short_description: "Service of Five Graces"​ is a romance FMV. You play as Lin Ye. One day, you wake up to find you've become the personal butler to the five ladies!? To repay your father's debts, you have no choice but to step into this mansion, beginning a strange life of being "ordered around" by five young women.

4262000.title: 白纸星途:民国乱世歌姬
4262000.short_description: "Oriental Songstress1930"​ is a FMV. Players will participate from a third-person perspective in the growth process of the historical figure "Zhou Xuan" . Explore Zhou Xuan’s story through extensive branching plots, item collection, and experience and collect the storylines of multiple characters.

4262070.title: Chart Weaver
4262070.short_description: Break the board with powerful synergies, discover game-defining relics and alter your deck in this market-inspired roguelike! Chart Weaver is a mesmerizingly simple but deep score-attack deckbuilder where you create magnificent combos and weave intricate patterns.

4262180.title: iNsAniA
4262180.short_description: Shoot'em up Bullet Hell Game, there is only one way out... WIN or go crazy trying!

4262380.title: Sea Warden
4262380.short_description: Sea Warden is a co-op survival game set on a living island carried across the endless ocean by a massive sea turtle named Ao. The sea, the wind, and the creatures beneath the waves are always changing, but Ao keeps moving forward, no matter what.

4262410.title: The Aurora Chronicles
4262410.short_description: A crew of four. Mysteries at the edge of known space. A utopia that might be more fragile than it appears. The Aurora Chronicles is an episodic sci-fi visual novel where your choices shape relationships, uncover buried secrets, and test whether hope can survive what you discover.

4262450.title: ShootOut
4262450.short_description: ShootOut is a first-person competitive target shooter. Fight for a top spot on the Leaderboards in over 30 levels, with six different guns to unlock, customize, and master.

4262510.title: Napolitan Hotel(2D)
4262510.short_description: Welcome to the Napolitan Hotel. Please show us your reasoning, patience, and survival skills.

4262600.title: The Dagby Files
4262600.short_description: Solve jigsaw puzzles to crack the case in this relaxing, cozy mystery game. Join Inspector Dagby as he investigates crime scenes, questions suspects, and leaves the final deduction to you. Seven perplexing mysteries. 28 hand-illustrated puzzles by artist Dave Montes.

4262660.title: Bypass
4262660.short_description: For all videogame fans, who have been looking for a multiplayer horror game with realistic graphics, Bypass is game which combines horror and action genre and compared to it's rivals, Bypass is free to play.

4262820.title: REARRANGED
4262820.short_description: A phenomenon called The Rearranging shuffles the rooms in your house and traps you inside with a monster. You have to explore the shifting layout, gather the right items, and solve one big puzzle to survive. Use the map from your tablet to avoid the monster and survive.

4262910.title: Furry Pirate Jigsaw
4262910.short_description: Assemble sensual furry pirate jigsaw puzzles across three difficulty levels. Furry Pirate Jigsaw features exclusive artwork, seductive anthropomorphic pirate characters, and a gallery where you can download the images you unlock.

4263000.title: Clicky & Yo
4263000.short_description: Clicky & Yo is a 2d psychological horror narrative experience where you explore unsettling environments, make subtle choices, and face unpredictable events that distort reality and test your perception.

4263100.title: Laments of a Platinum Rose
4263100.short_description: A mixed-media visual novel about a robot and God. A story-focused visual novel game where the player can explore Nexus and interact with the world in whatever order they like, with a story emphasizing the player's agency.

4263110.title: Bring the Thing!
4263110.genre: Action, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Early Access
4263110.short_description: You and your friends wake up in a cursed castle. Doors slam shut. Collect mystical blocks and parts. Build bridges, flying platforms - anything that holds! Physics-based co-op chaos up to 4 players. Laugh, scream, and escape together. Will your creation stand or will you all fall?

4267830.title: The Trial of Progress
4267830.short_description: A fast-paced city-building experience inspired by the concept of civilization. As you advance your technologies and attract some of the greatest historical figures, you will face the trial of progress and strive to create a lasting legacy.

4267970.title: Beef
4267970.short_description: Clock in and discover the dark secret behind one of the world’s favorite canned meat brand in Beef, a surreal horror experience like no other.

4268040.title: Mutasmagoria
4268040.short_description: Mutasmagoria is a new narrative puzzle game from the creator of Magenta Horizon. Play as a veterinarian just starting work at a zoo in an alien world whose evolutionary paths diverged greatly from our own.

4268080.title: Campground Simulator
4268080.short_description: Build, manage, and grow your own cozy campground. Stock supplies, set prices, help campers, and watch your peaceful wilderness business come to life—one campfire at a time.

4268120.title: Lucky Pikinini - IMS Intelligence Corp
4268120.short_description: IMS Intelligence Corp is a Large-Scale First-Person / Third-Person Story-Telling Game with a 13-Chapters Story Campaign, 4-Maps Special Missions & 33-Maps Survival Mode. It Happens Same Time As the Events of Super Incursion & IMS Death Squad. You Take Control of IMS Daryl Kalashi.

4268390.title: RE-VIVED
4268390.short_description: RE-VIVED is a zombie survival fps game in a pixelated style featuring a variety of weapons, enemies and bosses for you to fight. Equip gear, upgrade your weapons and fight a wave of zombies as long as possible. Each map has its own unique set of enemies for you to kill and obtain loot from.

4268420.title: A Sinister Glitch
4268420.short_description: You're a punk hacking into the cameras and devices of an abandoned building. Except it's not really abandoned, and whatever inhabits it senses your presence and plans to eliminate you.

4268740.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: Brown Chocolate
4268740.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful brown chocolate mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

4268890.title: Drop and Grow
4268890.short_description: A short incremental clicker about dropping water to grow plants. Sit back and relax while you grow more and more plants.

4269130.title: Star Voyagers – Hentai Jigsaw
4269130.short_description: Travel through distant galaxies while assembling sensual puzzles featuring alien beauties, stellar officers, and girls from different species and worlds — all illustrated in exclusive artworks that blend futuristic charm, bold sensuality, and that forbidden spark only the universe can hide.

4269570.title: Lost Stories
4269570.short_description: Lost Stories is an episodic psychological horror game set in the Siberian forests during the Cold War. Explore isolated locations, uncover censored experiments, and survive what was never meant to be found. Some stories were not forgotten. They were hidden.

4269660.title: Gravezone Arena
4269660.short_description: Gravezone Arena is a fast-paced top-down zombie arena shooter where you survive relentless waves, build defenses between rounds, collect powerful upgrades, and fight your way through a deadly grave-infested battleground.

4269770.title: Glorio
4269770.short_description: GLORIO is a fast-paced top-down couch party game where up to four players collect cucumbers, use absurd abilities, and battle across seven chaotic game modes designed for loud rooms, quick rounds, and shameless fun.

4270000.title: traveler of Y
4270000.short_description: 《Traveler of Y》是一款以旅途推进为主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将通过持续前行、组建队伍并制定战术，在战斗与成长中完成一段完整的单人冒险旅程。

4271170.title: President of Steel
4271170.short_description: President of Steel is a choice-driven political strategy game where every decision shapes the fate of your nation. Balance power, stability, and economy while navigating political intrigue, war threats, organized crime, and personal relationships.

4271310.title: Achievement Box
4271310.short_description: A simple game anyone can play! Click the boxes, open them, and earn achievements. With 100 different items—and possible duplicates— can you collect them all? It all depends on your luck!

4271680.title: outpost4
4271680.short_description: Outpost 4 is a 2D cartoon-style idle resource management game focused on combat and progression. You will take your mobile base across different alien planets, each with its own unique enemies to conquer. With 20+ weapons and 100+ items, you can freely combine builds and create your own style

4271720.title: What's in the box?
4271720.short_description: A first-person incremental game where you buy and open containers filled with random items, repair and upgrade the things you find, and sell them for profit. In a dark industrial environment, upgrade your character, tools, and machines, earn money, and step by step work your way toward freedom.

4271920.title: How Smart Are You? IQ Test
4271920.short_description: How smart are you? Take this IQ test and find out!

4272350.title: A Game About Having A Job
4272350.short_description: The money management simulation where you work, trade, bank, and gamble in a procedurally generated world. Browse the job market, gain skills through employment, buy stocks, trade options, place risky bets, and hit it big in a world that's different every time you play.

4272360.title: Trapped on the FlipSide
4272360.short_description: In this Puzzle Platformer, follow the narrative of three explorers, kidnapped by a mechanical megastructure. Play as their assistant spherical robot in an effort to save them from this brutal place. By powering up the system, area by area, the secretive past and dark truth may make itself known.

4272720.title: Pickupbal
4272720.short_description: A simple game all about picking up a ball.

4272960.title: MOVING WITH THE MOON: Mastering Universal Gravitation!
4272960.short_description: This is a new action game where you steer the earth. Steer the Earth, when both the Earth and the Moon are in the goal zone, the stage is cleared. Stars are constantly pulling on each other with universal gravitation. You can experience a simulated universal gravitation.

4272970.title: LOST INSIDE
4272970.short_description: LOST INSIDE is a story-driven, non-traditional RPG about a little human child who stumbles their way into the Spirit World. They soon find out that the world has been corrupted by a curse, and only they can save the world for good by finding the 3 energy stones.

4273050.title: MITNAL
4273050.short_description: Play as Emily, drawn to a remote Mayan ruin after her brother insists it’s safe, amazing and beautiful. Explore an ancient Mayan site spanning jungle, temple, and catacombs as it becomes clear that he didn’t understand what he uncovered.

4273100.title: KunKunPrison
4273100.short_description: This is a fictional story. In the game, you need to gather clues and uncover the secrets of this prison and leave safely. All content in the game is unrelated to reality, and any similarity is purely coincidental.

4273150.title: Galaxy Defender Elite 3D
4273150.short_description: Defend the galaxy as you fight swarms of alien invaders.

4273370.title: Peak or Die
4273370.short_description: Peak or Die is a narrative-driven survival game about leading a team of adventurers up a deadly mountain, where every decision has lasting consequences. Manage oxygen, food, and team morale while facing moral dilemmas, random events, and an unforgiving environment. Reach the summit — or fail trying.

4274370.title: Floral Fury Online
4274370.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG
4274370.short_description: Unleash nature's wrath in Floral Fury Online, an Indie Action MMORPG. Master a unique Fusion system, conquer procedural dungeons, and battle epic bosses with dynamic combat. Forge your legacy, join guilds, and dominate the economy in a world where weather dictates the tide of battle.

4274860.title: As Duty Demands
4274860.short_description: As Duty Demands is a first-person psychological horror set in a decaying naval retirement home. Step into the shoes of Coral, a newly hired nurse navigating a shifting reality where the forgotten veterans' war traumas manifest as harrowing nightmares. Uncover the Admiral’s secrets and survive.

4275130.title: My Tiny Grocery Store - Desktop Idle Supermarket Game
4275130.short_description: My Tiny Grocery Store is an idle shopping simulator located in the bottom right corner of your screen that allows you to manage your store while also completing other tasks! Design your store, arrange your shelves, and enjoy earning money.

4240070.title: 她的掌门世代
4240070.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4240070.short_description: 《她的掌门世代》，一款集门派经营、恋爱养成与世代传承于一体的高自由度武侠游戏。作为临危受命的掌门，你不仅要处理内务、抵御外敌，更要面对真实的江湖爱恨。是成为一代宗师，还是那个掌控所有人命运的幕后黑手？一切，由你定义。

4240150.title: Sister Other Paranoia
4240150.short_description: A dark visual novel created by the team behind NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE. Overly sensitive to other people's emotions, the protagonist—a light novel writer—develops the ability to read minds, only to be driven even deeper into isolation. His sole remaining comfort is his younger sister, gifted yet lonely.

4240560.title: Alpenglow
4240560.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4240560.short_description: A story-driven experience about confronting your past through quiet routines and meaningful choices. Spend a month in a mountain cabin: cook, manage daily life, uncover memories, and shape a story that becomes uniquely yours.

4240570.title: Terrafactory: Idle Planet
4240570.short_description: A planet building idle game that sits anywhere on your desktop while you do other things.

4240580.title: SerendipityMorningMist: Dawn, Tobacco, Your Scent
4240580.short_description: Your girlfriend Chisa Tsukiyama suddenly decides to leave to study overseas. Each lingering touch, each sharp intake of breath, each faint sting left behind becomes a quiet proof that you still exist to one another. You mark each other in your room, until the countdown reaches zero.

4240810.title: ENDSTATION
4240810.short_description: A classic dice game played in a somewhat grungy subway train late at night - how many trips can you afford, how many dice can you collect?

4241270.title: Defentrix
4241270.short_description: Defentrix is ​​a tower defense game with 31 handcrafted levels. Capture the towers and defend our solar system.

4241280.title: Call of Smoking Snakes
4241280.short_description: An intense multiplayer FPS set in World War II. Choose your side — Smoking Snakes or Black Eagles — pick your class, such as infantry, sniper, or bazooka, and fight across varied maps that demand strategy, smart positioning, and teamwork.

4241360.title: Tiny House Finds
