4241360.short_description: Search inside and around cozy 3D houses, floor by floor, in a relaxing 3D hidden object game full of tiny details.

4241540.title: Scission
4241540.genre: Action, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4241540.short_description: Scission is a dark and gruesome action game where you control two characters at once. Fight grotesque representations of the subconscious, master new skills and explore the depth of the human mind in this singleplayer game.

4241580.title: Dawnrazor
4241580.short_description: Step into the decaying world of Kagenovia in Dawnrazor, a story-driven 8-bit action adventure! Take control of Zedekiah, a betrayed knight reborn through parasitic vampirism, as he fights through blood-soaked ruins and biomechanical horrors.

4242730.title: Sound System
4242730.short_description: Sound System is a next-generation rhythm game that brings guitar gaming back, while introducing an entirely new platform built around free music and community-driven gameplay. Shred guitar, sing vocals, and build your own note charts for any tune anytime, unlocking a new era of music gaming.

4242940.title: Saveggies
4242940.short_description: Fight possessed vegetables that test your dexterity, reflexes, and patience to the limit. Slash and bash the juice out of their fleshy bodies to make your grandpa proud… or simply for the chaotic vibes and questionable life choices.

4243040.title: Bob's Beaker Blobs
4243040.short_description: Bob’s Beaker Blobs is a physics-based Suika-like merge puzzle. Use reagents to manipulate the blobs in your beaker, but be careful of Bob. He's trying to sabotage your experiment with his own reagents.

4243160.title: Romeow: Home Sweet Home
4243160.short_description: Help a cute cat in this cozy incremental game! You must catch many rats, build your house, upgrade your equipment, and improve your skills to aid Romeow on his mission.

4243280.title: Vector Rider
4243280.short_description: Race at high speed in a dynamic world where you create the track as you go. Build platforms, glide, dodge hazards, and master skill-based routes in a futuristic racing playground.

4243600.title: What A World
4243600.short_description: A top-down pixel-art boss-fighter with skill-based combat, I-frame dodging, instant retries, and weird characters. Explore a compact world mocking modern society with puzzles, vehicles, and secrets lurking between absurd battles.

4243690.title: Chained Wheels
4243690.short_description: Embark on a chaotic co-op drive in Chained Wheels, where two vehicles are chained together and every move turns into a shared adventure or a DISASTER.

4243720.title: Junkyard File
4243720.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game focused on exploration & environmental interaction, where a mysterious “free” pendrive game begins to affect your surroundings. Try them all while you still can.

4244040.title: Sector 13: Haunted Woods
4244040.short_description: Sector 13: Haunted Woods is a co-op horror game for 1–4 players. Play as a field operative, explore a cursed forest filled with anomalies, recover forbidden artifacts, solve puzzles, and survive the darkness where every sound could mean death.

4244350.title: Lydia Was Here
4244350.short_description: A horror RPG about how not to handle grief, identity, and the delusions of bringing someone back.

4244430.title: Cosmo Blue - A Space Odor Mystery
4244430.short_description: Isometric retro point-and-click adventure that could have launched on the C64 in 1985: tricky puzzles, a delightfully twisted story, and authentic pixels in a modern guise. Head to Space Station E-17 and uncover the mystery of the legendary party artefact.

4244660.title: 集墨聚场™：三国（单机版）
4244660.short_description: Jimo Gathering™: Three Kingdoms (Single-Player Edition) is a story-driven historical RPG. Play as Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei in the late Eastern Han dynasty, with exploration, dialogue, choice-based storytelling, light combat, and attribute dice checks in a complete 2–4 hour experience.

4244680.title: FPV Skyline
4244680.short_description: FPV Skyline is a ground-up freestyle drone simulator packing a full flight-control stack, power electronics, and physics that bite—engineered for a high-fidelity, low-latency, fully user-tunable flight experience.

4244890.title: JuJu
4244890.short_description: JuJu The Land of Juju, The land of lost souls, culture, and healing becomes a wasteland of a beautiful realm. The Realm now feeds off of descendants and ancestral trauma and pain creating monsters and haints to help demolish such world.

4244900.title: The Rabbit's Shadow
4244900.short_description: Play Arcade Minigames to progress, Hide and most importantly Survive. Figure out the truth about this place of confusion, terror and tragedies. He is always watching.

4245120.title: Tokei
4245120.short_description: Tokei is a game that tries to mimic the style and charm of 80's arcade games Walk on panels, avoid enemies and most importantly... survive and get a good highscore!

4245320.title: Hentai Puzzler
4245320.short_description: Hentai Puzzler is a relaxing NSFW puzzle game offering the ability to create, store, and play custom puzzle sets. With 40 sexy high-quality women to start you off you'll be on to making your own puzzles in no time!

4245510.title: Elf Sabotage
4245510.short_description: An asymmetric 2D multiplayer stealth game where up to four elves sabotage gifts in plain sight while a sniper Santa watches the crowd, waits for mistakes, and makes every bullet count.

4246230.title: The Safe Space of Home
4246230.short_description: This is a little 30-40 minute experience where you explore the safest space of all: Your home. Live a day solving little problems and wandering around your house. It's just you and your mind...

4246300.title: Chainsaw
4246300.short_description: Become a GOD in this real-time turn-based combat RPG with non-stop brawling.

4246340.title: Gorotsuki Paradise
4246340.short_description: Gorotsuki Paradise is an online PvP card game where you build your deck as you battle.🃏 Recruit over 150 unique "gorotsuki" (Japanese for gangsters, thugs, and outlaws) to dominate a mad city called Saitama.🦹 It’s completely free to play, with no pay-to-win mechanics!🤑

4246500.title: Hexa Merge
4246500.short_description: Hexa Merge is a captivating puzzle game that combines strategic thinking with satisfying merge mechanics on a unique hexagonal grid. Match and merge tiles to unlock beautiful new tile designs and reach higher levels!

4246570.title: Last Dolls
4246570.short_description: Last Dolls is a roguelite horror game set in a dark fairytale world. Do you have what it takes to survive in a shattered world of dolls, scavenging supplies while evading monsters?

4246600.title: Buddy City Inc.
4246600.short_description: Raise a Buddy for a strange and mysterious company. Rise through the ranks as you learn and grow with your Buddy!

4246640.title: Dungeon Brawls
4246640.short_description: Dungeon Brawls is an action roguelike game that supports 4-player co-op. Choose from dozens of heroes and freely combine hundreds of skills and relics. Team up with friends, take on the challenge, and battle through waves of enemies in intense, action-packed combat!

4246660.title: Blood for the Queen
4246660.short_description: A card-based roguelike and auto-battler where your fighters are meant to die. Their blood is a precious resource, while their lives are worthless. Command deadly battles, collect the bloody tribute, and quench your Queen's thirst.

4246670.title: Sweet GYM2
4246670.short_description: Sweet GYM2 - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around a gym. It depicts the daily lives of five pretty and cute fitness girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4246710.title: Syntax:Overload
4246710.short_description: Compile. Execute. Overload. A strategic roguelite where Syntax is Everything. Drag & drop modules to optimize your execution queue, install .EXE software to break the rules, and face off against legendary viruses like ILOVEYOU and WannaCry. Can you crash the system and escape?

4246750.title: Cult of Five
4246750.short_description: Cult of Five is a roguelike deckbuilder for fans of Slay the Spire, blending cozy-looking map exploration, dark card-based combat, and time-pressured challenge modes. Choose the right path and save your captured friend before time runs out.

4246770.title: Battle For The Raise
4246770.short_description: Battle For The Raise, a Pokémon-style turn-based battle game with a corporate satire theme.

4246780.title: Question Roulette
4246780.short_description: Prove your wits and composure in this ultimate fast-paced trivia challenge where knowledge, speed, and strategic risk-taking determine victory.

4246810.title: A Camera Duel!
4246810.short_description: A Camera Duel! is a PvP camera game where you use your hands on camera to cast spells. With 4 classes and 12 spells you can create various combinations of builds and fight your enemies by executing your hand gestures.

4246830.title: BABULYA
4246830.short_description: BABULYA – that’s what grandchildren affectionately call their beloved grandmother. But what if your BABULYA is no longer human, but a bloodthirsty monster? You came to taste her pies… and she wants to taste you instead…

4246840.title: Kasha vs. Kritters
4246840.short_description: A retro-style arcade action game where you're a lone catgirl defending her house from a relentless onslaught of pests!

4246910.title: Femboy & Futa Cozy Cafe
4246910.short_description: Inherit a beloved but debt-ridden coffee shop and turn it into the city's hottest haven! Hire a cast of adorable femboys and stunning futanari, master the art of coffee and cuisine, and build deep, intimate connections. Can you save your grandparents' legacy while finding love?

4246990.title: We Draw
4246990.short_description: We Draw is a fun, family-friendly exquisite corpse-style drawing game! Create hilarious creatures by sketching a head, body, and legs—alone or by passing the device. Race the clock, reveal the results, and laugh at the unexpected combinations!

4247050.short_description: A relaxing game for people who find orbital mechanics relaxing. Build rockets, fly real physics, and grow your space program across a handcrafted star system.

4247100.title: Exone Rift
4247100.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4247100.short_description: Take direct control of your hero on a hostile planet. Build your base, gather resources, expand your territory your way, and survive against the planet’s deadly wildlife.

4247140.title: Everlasting Summer 2
4247140.short_description: Everlasting Summer 2 – the continuation of the legendary visual novel “Everlasting Summer” is coming soon!

4247240.title: 云隐仙踪CloudShadow
4247240.short_description: In Yunnan, China, there is a rich variety of mushrooms, and the local people have a culture of consuming mushrooms and "picking mushrooms". When a young boy mistakenly eats a hallucinogenic wild mushroom, he embarks on a series of fantastical adventures.

4247380.title: Greedling: 2D Boss Rush
4247380.short_description: A silly-but-violent 2D boss rush where a laser-shooting eyeball battles deranged cartoon monsters in bullet-hell chaos. Time your special attacks, recover mid-fight, and survive gory slapstick deaths again and again.

4247560.title: Tome transform
4247560.short_description: Solve clue-driven anagrams to uncover iconic quotes from classic books and legendary films.

4247690.title: Law of Demons
4247690.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4247690.short_description: A kidnapped daughter. A mysterious royal family. Claw your way through police knights, money-hungry mercenaries, deranged cultists and worse to uncover dark secrets of Spire. Law of Demons features fast paced combat and open world exploration, rewarding players with weapons, armor, story and more.

4247910.title: Midnight Overtime
4247910.short_description: A first-person atmospheric horror experience where hidden clues and impossible spaces draw you deeper into a place that should not exist.

4247960.title: Tailor Tales Cottina
4247960.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4247960.short_description: Sow the land, spin the thread, and weave a story of love in this cozy farming otome where a tailor’s touch can mend a fox’s heart. Grow your own materials to craft outfits and customize your character's look.

4248150.title: BLINDFOLD
4248150.short_description: Blindfold is an asymmetric co-op game: one player is a blindfolded prisoner, the other a guide with a map and bodycam. Work together to escape, avoiding guards, traps, and creatures. Each level adds new hazards and dynamic weather. Communication is key.

4248440.title: TwinZ
4248440.short_description: TwinZ is an action-platformer with RPG elements inspired by 8-bit era games. Explore a vast continent and its kingdoms, villages and dungeons while improving your character throughout the adventure.

4248810.title: FocusScape: Lofi Productivity
4248810.short_description: FocusScape: Lofi Productivity is a minimalist productivity game where you manage tasks and daily objectives, focus with a built-in Pomodoro timer, customize ambient sounds and music, and earn levels to unlock regions of Midreach and uncover quiet journal entries along the way.

4249060.title: Never Ending corridor
4249060.short_description: A First-person horror game with multiple endings. Endings and Events might change Every time you Replay it.

4249080.title: Misguided Remastered
4249080.short_description: Misguided Remastered: Third-person action-horror. Silvia, high school girl trapped in otherworld nightmare. Desperately search for missing best friend & mom's cherished letter her only memory. Survive Indonesian folklore horrors with axe/knife combat, solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets!

4249200.title: Incremental Cats
4249200.short_description: Incremental Cats is a short incremental game about befriending cute cats of all rarities, from common to legendary, while generating cosmic amounts of hearts to unlock upgrades.

4249230.title: The Academy of the Cosmic Realm
4249230.short_description: The Academy of the Cosmic Realm is a short first-person horror game where you explore an old abandoned academy to discover what terrible event led to it's closure.

4249370.title: ENCOUNTER BARⅡ
4249370.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4249370.short_description: ENCOUNTER BARⅡ is an immersive point-and-click story game that puts you in the shoes of a protagonist adrift in neon lights, embarking on a romantic and thrilling adventure amidst the hustle and bustle and the clinking of glasses.

4249890.title: ZeroOne Terminal
4249890.short_description: Predict which startups win by investing in 20 years of tech history. Interrogate founders, apply Zero to One principles, and see if you can spot the next Google or Airbnb.

4250290.title: Potion Knight
4250290.short_description: Potion Knight is an intense and up-tempo first-person shooter that combines the need for speed with tactical potion throwing. Set in the harsh snow ridden village of Cronenberg where an unorthodox alchemist has been fusing animals with weapons to fight under his command.

4250430.title: SKULD
4250430.short_description: Skuld is an action tower defense set in the Nine Realms of Norse mythology. Play as Skuld, a Norn chosen by the threads of fate to become a Valkyrie and defend the realms from Hela’s shadow, combining agile combat, tactical turrets, and divine powers against waves of corrupted mythical creatures.

4250490.title: Distance
4250490.short_description: Distance is a minimalist idle game where your keystrokes drive a lone starship forward through an endless stretch of space.

4250580.title: Shells MMCCCXXXIV
4250580.short_description: Occult push-your-luck card game where you face a five-turn demonic cube. Gamble by stabbing the pyramid, build your deck with arcane cards, and fight to reach the gate beyond.

4250680.title: AGX GP
4250680.short_description: AGX is a heart thumpingly fast, Anti-Gravity racing game. It's lightning‑fast action and Xtreme ability‑based gameplay, will push your reactions and skills to the limit! Welcome To AGX!

4250760.title: Sunset Sprinters '98
4250760.short_description: Relive the glory days of 1998 in this high-speed precision runner. You have no health bar—only a Snack Meter that drains constantly. Smash obstacles, collect aluminum cans for rental money, find CDs for your SpinDisk, and sprint from the Middle School to MegaHits Video before the sun sets.

4251090.title: Keep It Contained
4251090.short_description: You’re part of a scientific team in a sealed facility, racing against time to keep dangerous anomalies contained. One scientist handles the modules, while others guide them using manuals and procedures. This local co-op experience requires two or more players.

4251290.title: Skinator
4251290.short_description: A turn-based tactical combat game where you dismantle enemies limb by limb, steal their body parts, and use them to rebuild your character in order to become the most overpower god in history.

4251450.title: Uninvited: Security Service
4251450.short_description: Uninvited: Security Service is a really simple stealth/exploration game where you sneak around a mansion while avoiding the butler that lives in there. Learn about the foolhardy protagonist and the stupid chain of events that led to the situation that’s happening there.

4251560.title: OUTSIDE
4251560.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4251560.short_description: DARES REALITY GAME SHOW with REAL NEIGHBORS and LIVE CAMERAS! Your friends dare you. Then lie, sabotage, and bet on your failure. Fail the dare, and you’re forced OUTSIDE — to the neighbors, or to a real-world dare on camera (optional, phone camera supported). A reality-bending, social exposure game.

4251700.title: Away From Home VN
4251700.short_description: The game is an adult visual novel focusing on MILFs, cheating wives and adultery themes, packed with sneaky sex and “almost caught” moments. Play as a college student who travels to a new city for a secret investigation. Meet women and end up getting involved in their lives.

4252030.title: Geenius : Cupid Dough
4252030.short_description: A fast-paced runner game powered by GEENIUS’s new single Cupid Dough. Run, collect orbs, and switch between five characters to change vocal parts in real time. Earn gold, unlock instruments, and remix the song to create your own version.

4252640.title: VOID81: The Backrooms
4252640.short_description: VOID81: The Backrooms is a 3D platform game with survival horror elements, where you explore ever-changing levels, solve puzzles, avoid dangers, and traverse surreal worlds inspired by the retro atmosphere of the 1980s.

4252700.title: Archon Soul
4252700.short_description: Archon Soul is a 2D roguelike dice-builder where you create powerful dice using swappable faces, runes, and bodies with unique effects. ​Draft spells, craft powerful synergies, defeat challenging enemies, and conquer the Archon's palace.

4252830.title: Type or Die
4252830.short_description: In the heart of a medieval manuscript, a horse takes up arms to avenge its fallen master. Type to attack, collect cards, explore a living board, and survive in a roguelite where every word becomes a weapon.

4252910.title: Eternal Price: Whispers of Mystery
4252910.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4252910.short_description: This is an ink-style roguelike cultivation Cthulhu game. You will choose different characters to fight in a mutated world, combine various skills and magical treasures to strengthen yourself, unlock the story, survive in secret realms, and uncover the truth behind the mutations.

4253340.title: TIME CYCLE
4253340.short_description: Twist the throttle, lean into the turn, feel the speed of the track beneath you.  Squeeze the brake, thread the needle, race against the clock.  Time Cycle is a classic arcade time attack racer with modern sensibilities.

4253590.title: Ella's Nightmare
4253590.short_description: Linear single-player game with puzzles and alternate endings. Control Ella and explore the rooms of the house, solving puzzles to progress and escape before becoming a victim of the lurking creature.

4253730.title: Unsolved Case: Whispers of Elderwick Collector’s Edition
4253730.short_description: A killer hides behind familiar faces. Solve puzzles, uncover hidden clues, and expose the conspiracy tearing the village apart before fear consumes it whole.

4253750.title: Habitus: Broken Mask
4253750.short_description: Detective RPG-TTRPG-Action: Investigate the murders of 10 doctors through interrogations and decisions, save the city.

4253930.title: Rodent Rampage
4253930.short_description: Get ready for furiously fast-paced rodent warfare! Choose your champion from four uniquely powered critters and battle it out in chaotic multiplayer arenas where the smallest competitors pack the biggest punch.

4254050.title: Retroneer
4254050.short_description: Retroneer is an automation roguelike where you hand-make small electrical systems. Combine game-changing Trinkets, powerful Modules, and your own problem-solving skills to generate explosive results in this approachable and deep resource management game.

4254140.title: OVER THE TOWER
4254140.short_description: OVER THE TOWER is a hack-and-slash clicker game where you defeat enemies with simple mouse clicks. Collect coins to unlock upgrades, and equip the items you obtain to grow even stronger. What will you witness at the top of the tower…?

4254170.title: Idle Breakanoid
4254170.short_description: Idle Breakanoid combines the satisfying block-breaking action of classic Breakout/Arkanoid with the addictive progression of idle games. Watch as your balls bounce, blocks shatter, and your power grows!

4254250.title: Notebook Battlegrounds
4254250.short_description: A multiplayer game where your voice is the weapon. Play as a random letter and use proximity voice chat to hear nearby players. Say the funny words on your screen to shoot opponents, find secret words for special powers, and battle in Timed Deathmatch or Battle Royale!

4254260.title: Corner Quest
4254260.short_description: An idle auto-battler that sits in the corner of your screen while you do other things.

4254270.title: Tower War
4254270.short_description: Tower War is a fast-paced casual strategy game where you conquer enemy towers with a single swipe. Easy to learn but hard to master, it delivers smart tactical gameplay across 30 challenging levels, with quick matches and addictive replay value.

4254290.title: Occult Hand of the Blood Lily
4254290.short_description: A Gothic-Punk yuri visual novel about a magician on the run and her mysterious vampiric guardian. Journey by airship across a war-torn Europe and search for a legendary flower with the power to destroy nations.

4254300.title: Swords And Magic: Path Of Conquest
4254300.short_description: Swords And Magic: Path Of Conquest is a Real-Time Auto Combat game with Team RPG elements set in a fantasy world! Gather your adventurers, build your team, challenge Dungeons, clain your rightful reward and reveal the mystery of the world!

4254310.title: Lopers
4254310.short_description: A game which brings trivia to the sword and sorcery world. No XP bar, no grind, just real world brain power growing. Cultivate Excellence. Reach Mastery. Attain Immortality.

4254320.title: Synephoria
4254320.short_description: Ambient VR art studio where your voice shapes a living grotto and you paint with light, color, and geometric forms. Export your creations to use in other 3D apps for fine-tuning or animation.

4254330.title: real
4254330.short_description: Smash the endless tide of enemies and become incredibly powerful! Collect loot, upgrade characters, unlock new characters and upgrade weapons, create unique and crazy builds, and resist monster armies at the same time

4254390.title: Zodiax
4254390.short_description: ZODIAX redefines the shooter: Your shot is your only way to move. Shoot the orbs to teleport and leap from target to target at breakneck speed! Blast through your enemies and conquer the 12 stations of the Zodiac. Do you have the precision and reflexes required for ZODIAX?

4254400.title: Spibee
4254400.short_description: A cooperative puzzle-platformer! Join a cute spider and bee on a thrilling adventure! Solve puzzles together, enjoy fun PvP minigames, and face epic boss battles!

4254440.title: explorer of Y
4254440.short_description: 《Explorer of Y》是一款以探索推进为主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将在不断发现新区域的过程中组建队伍、制定战术并提升角色能力，完成一段节奏明确的单人冒险。

4254560.title: 3876 AD: Corruption
4254560.short_description: A hardcore military sci-fi survival roguelike set in the post-apocalyptic world of 3876 AD. Engage in tense tactical combat, scavenge for resources, complete dangerous quests, and explore an immersive lore full of dark themes and meaningful decisions.

4254570.title: Corewave Defenders
4254570.short_description: Mining & Tower Defense! Build miners to gather ores, buy diverse cores, and freely assemble your own defense towers from modules! Your strategy and creativity forge the ultimate frontier against endless enemies!

4254650.title: Ember in the Frost
4254650.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4254650.short_description: This is a one-or three-person online survival game for the end of the world. The contents of the game include but are not limited to: pets, horseback riding, fishing, hunting, building, making, searching, killing zombies, bonfires, cooking, planting, mining, vehicles, furniture and firearms.

4254680.title: NOSTALGIA
4254680.short_description: Nostalgia is a tile-based strategy card game. To reclaim the once-existing "Notia," you must explore the diverse regions of Rodia, encountering loved ones and confronting looming threats. Where will your quest for lost memories lead you?

4254760.title: Proceed to ICU
4254760.short_description: Proceed to ICU is a Ruin-esque psychological horror game. As the new triage officer in a sinister hospital, your choices in handling daily incidents over seven workdays will unravel its dark truths and lead to diverse endings.

4254840.title: Weather Dragger
4254840.short_description: A chill strategy game about dragging weather across a dynamic, ever-shifting world to keep everything in balance. Shape clouds, sunshine, and storms as your map grows, challenges rise, and new possibilities open up each run.

4254860.title: Desktop Aquarium
4254860.short_description: A relaxing mini aquarium that stays on your desktop corner while you do other stuff — collect fish, upgrade tanks, and enjoy a cozy idle experience.

4254880.title: Dunjinn
4254880.short_description: Turn-based dungeon crawl, every step advances foes; stealth, noise, and light matter. Procedural rooms mix traps, mimics, locks, loot; combat is gear-driven with augments, consumables, and breakable durability. Between runs use town to shop, craft/repair, vault gear; death drops your pack.

4254900.title: The Cursed Ward
4254900.short_description: A system-driven psychological horror game where every threat has a pattern and every death has a reason.

4254920.title: Possessed Kingdom
4254920.short_description: Defend, Expand, and Loot their Deck. In this RTS/Deckbuilder hybrid, build towers to survive, then set a path for your troops to siege the enemy. Destroy their base to steal their cards and turn their own economy against them.

4254930.title: AutoSquad
4254930.short_description: AutoSquad is a turn-based roguelike autobattler where you build and refine a squad of units, choose their formation and strategy, then watch the battle unfold. Recruit new units, combine them into higher tiers, collect relics, and defeat the final boss.

4254950.title: Hollow Faces
4254950.short_description: Hollow Faces is an atmospheric narrative horror where you step into the role of creators documenting paranormal phenomena. The game blends an intense walking simulator with environmental observation, careful listening, and reacting to threats.

4254960.title: Let's BUG Dumplings
4254960.short_description: Like forced happy endings in Spring Festival Gala skits, “Let’s all make dumplings” reveals a subtle horror — the family’s discipline over the individual. Explore love and suffocation through Chinese New Year’s reunion dumplings. In this formulaic collective narrative, what’s your choice?

4255000.title: DECODE
4255000.short_description: DECODE is a minimalist logic puzzle game inspired by classic deduction systems. Analyse clues, break digital locks, and uncover hidden rules through text-based challenges. Every move matters. Think carefully.

4255010.title: THE PROJECT
4255010.short_description: The Project is a dark survival horror experience set in a hostile, unknown place. Trapped with no way out, survival depends on stealth, awareness, and restraint. Every sound matters. Every mistake is deadly. Survive. Adapt. Escape.

4255030.title: 纤维
4255030.short_description: Connections are like fiber threads—tugged and tangled. Some tighten; others fray. Grades, the future, and family expectations steal her breath. Between closeness and distance, hope and avoidance, she tries to understand—and be understood.

4255070.title: UNFATED
4255070.short_description: A realistic first-person action shooter set in an open-world post-apocalyptic setting. Survive, resist, and conquer a world devastated by invaders. Team up, explore the terrain, and reclaim the fate of humanity.

4255080.title: Pawns Survival
4255080.short_description: Pawn Survival is a turn-based survival strategy game where you command a small community of pawns struggling to survive, send them to gather resources, explore unknown lands, grow your village, and forge powerful equipment to withstand whatever this brutal world throws at you.

4255100.title: Veylora
4255100.short_description: You play as Mike Harvey, a local investigator searching for answers behind multiple missing persons cases. The trail leads into a forest — but it doesn’t end there. Taken by unknown creatures, you awaken inside a strange house. The shadows are watching. Escape is not guaranteed.

4255120.title: Fee Payment & Cigarettes
4255120.short_description: Fee Payment & Cigarettes is a first-person psychological horror anomaly-spotting game. Enter a hospital in first-person, finish all payment checklists. Spot anomalies, then head to the payment counter or retreat to the smoking area to calm down.

4255150.title: Corner Streamer
4255150.short_description: Corner Streamer is a chill idle game where your avatar streams from the corner, earning views, donations, and sponsors. Customize your look, upgrade your setup, and climb to the top of the streaming world.

4255160.title: Drunk Mages
4255160.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Early Access
4255160.short_description: Drunk Mages is a co-op game. Players are drunk wizards trying to brew potions. Being drunk makes things a bit harder. Each level has its own unique design and different challenges that must be completed.

4255190.title: Cats Around Us: Yarn Ball
4255190.short_description: We've hidden 200 cats inside a silent comic about a calico cat chasing a yarn ball all around the house. Can you find them all?🔎🙀

4255340.title: Wind Tunnel Flight Lab
4255340.short_description: Wind Tunnel Flight Lab is an interactive physics sandbox where you experiment with real aerodynamics in a vertical wind tunnel. Adjust air, gravity, mass, and size to make objects—and a fully controllable human—rise, fall, and fly. Learn, experiment, and play.

4255350.title: Ramming Turtleship - 1592: The Imjin War
4255350.short_description: Command the legendary Turtle Ship in this action roguelite set during the Imjin War of 1592. Ram through waves of Japanese warships, upgrade your ironclad vessel, and defend the ocean. Experience the thrill of naval impact and survival.

4255480.title: Souls Arena 100 Trials
4255480.short_description: A mini Souls-like arena game. Survive waves of enemies, defeat mini-bosses, loot weapons and potions, and unlock 100 achievements in an intense and compact experience.

4255520.title: Presentfall: Santa Defense
4255520.short_description: Presentfall: Santa Defense is a short, action, tower defense game where you help Santa defend his last presents from endless waves of naughty invaders. Aim, react, and throw snowballs to save Christmas. Collect rewards, improve Santa's skills and unlock bonuses!

4255530.title: A Certain Incremental Exoplanet
4255530.short_description: Build. Blast. Prestige. Repeat. An incremental game where you build the most productive exoplanet while protecting your enterprise from space pirates. Automate production, shoot rockets, employ an alien and keep on producing.

4255620.title: Stain
4255620.short_description: Stain is a cooperative horror game for 1–4 players. ou enter a place you were never meant to find.It looks empty, but something is already aware of you. It listens. It waits. It doesn’t rush — time is on its side.

4255670.title: Lumber in Space
4255670.short_description: A relaxing game about cutting weird types of trees in space. Whack space trees, collect drops, send them to space HUB and upgrade your gear.

4255690.title: Mazemerizzz2
4255690.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4255690.short_description: Moe is napping again and this time, it's a NIGHTMARE! The Watcher has Moe trapped in a massive endless maze filled with danger! Zombies, minotaurs and bone crushing, spikey, gaseous, flame filled traps. Equipped with just a torch, Moe must find a way to wake up.

4255720.title: Demons Killers
4255720.short_description: Escape Liztheuz in a first-person chase game: two relentless anime hunters, no fair fights—run, hide, use key items, and survive a one-life escape.

4256090.title: 悪人悪華 - AKUNIN-AKKA -
4256090.short_description: An interrogation game where you play as the detective in charge of a case and interrogate suspects to uncover the truth behind the bombing. Uncover the weaknesses of the unique suspects and get to the bottom of the case!

4256130.title: Late Night Duty
4256130.short_description: You’re a desperate, untrained night security guard called in at 10 PM after the previous guard vanished without notice. With no bag and only two hands, patrol a severely underfunded school. A first-person atmospheric horror about the terrifying mundane... and what hides in the dark.

4256440.title: Dead Zombie
4256440.short_description: Dead Zombie is a top-down survival shooter set in a dark city at night. Fight zombies and mutated monsters using a pistol, SMG, and flamethrower, explore the environment with a flashlight, rescue survivors, collect ammo, destroy obstacles with bombs, and escape by reaching the evacuation helicopter.

4256520.title: Isle of Titans
4256520.short_description: Isle of Titans is an idle tower defense game where you defend a small kingdom against giant invaders. Shape your build with long-term progression between runs, and adapt on the fly during each run to hold back endless waves of Titans.

4256880.title: Hexagon Soup
4256880.short_description: A keyboard-first traditional roguelike on an isometric hex grid—turn-based, permadeath, and ruthless decision-making. Your class emerges from the skills you pick, not a menu. Manage scarce resources, out-position enemies, claim Hex Runes, then survive the climb back out.

4256970.title: Neurosis
4256970.short_description: A psychological horror anomaly horror puzzle game where the player explores looping corridors, observes environmental details, and solves puzzles to escape the endless repetition.

4257210.title: DEMIURGE
4257210.short_description: DEMIURGE - A police chase game like you've never seen. Employ real life tactics to stop other cars and keep your gas-fueled mascot well fed to avoid death, all on a dystopian recreation of Brazil's 80s military era with a mix of realistic lightning and retro style 3D, with a dark story on top.

4257320.title: MetaChess
4257320.short_description: MetaChess is chess that lets you build your own army and rewrite the board. With alternate roles for every piece, it creates billions of new possible games possibilities. No more memorized openings, no more solved meta. Every decision matters. Outdraft, outthink, and outplay your opponent.

4257730.title: Red Christmas
4257730.short_description: Red Christmas is a short atmospheric thriller set in a small toy shop during the christmas eve.

4257830.title: 失踪トンネル
4257830.short_description: There is a tunnel rumored to be a place where people mysteriously disappear. You are asked to investigate a missing persons case and step into the tunnel. Will you be able to escape safely?

4257870.title: Loads of Roads
4257870.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4257870.short_description: Loads of Roads is a top-down traffic management game where you must guide the vehicles in a chaotic city from morning to midnight. Face rush hour challenges, unique vehicles, and special level layouts - can you master everything?

4258050.title: Just Kill It
4258050.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4258050.short_description: Just Kill It is a fast-paced top-down survival shooter.Shoot, survive, level up, and build your own playstyle as endless waves of enemies close in — then push your limits on the global leaderboards.

4258100.title: Inner Demons Calamity
4258100.short_description: Explore a colorful continent as you run, jump, and fight with your Angel in this 2D platforming adventure.

4258110.title: Down Hell
4258110.short_description: In this terrifying first-person action game, control an elite soldier sent on a suicide mission: infiltrate a prison laboratory where humanity has lost its way. Inhumane experiments on convicts have unleashed unspeakable horrors, now you face a desperate fight against deadly mutants and monsters

4258120.title: Runtalis
4258120.short_description: Runtalis is a 1–5 player turn-based tactical RPG. Coordinate your party, socket powerful Runes, and push your Magic Key against enemies with dangerous affixes. Higher risks unlock greater power in this grid-based, tabletop-inspired challenge. Master your skills or lose your Runes.

4258200.title: I Wanna Touch
4258200.short_description: I Wanna Touch is a pixel-art platformer where you play as a gliding bunny carried by a strange wind. Master the airflow, collect carrots, dodge deadly traps, and fly toward your beloved. Danger is everywhere—can you survive the journey?

4258210.title: 蟲
4258210.short_description: “你醒啦？快起来，一起迎接新世纪！” 显示屏上闪烁的异常痕迹，突然出现在桌面又突然变异死亡的“小虫子”，主动弹出的错误日志，梦回千禧年的网站，探求千年虫的真相……

4258220.title: Rabbit Detective
4258220.short_description: 《兔子侦探》是一款手绘风格的悬疑解谜互动游戏。玩家将扮演兔子侦探，在前往拜访好友时，竟发现对方已意外身亡！案发现场疑点重重，线索错综复杂。玩家将使用时间回溯机制，从现场抽丝剥茧，在正确的时机放置正确的证据，找出杀害受害兔的真凶，洗清自己被迫背负的嫌疑。最终将罪犯绳之以法，并在审讯中揭露其罪行！

4258240.title: Tales of Medieval Duelists
4258240.short_description: Ditch the animations. In Tales of Medieval Duelists, every swordfight is a unique physics-based clash. Master precise, skill-driven combat where timing a perfect parry is your key to victory. Build your legend with deep progression, gear, and a high-risk win streak multiplier.

4258280.title: Tiandao
4258280.short_description: Ready to rule the Three Realms? Tianao blends Roguelite & Grand Strategy. As a powerless Celestial Emperor, will you rule in name or defy fate? Master court intrigue, find soulmates, and wield supreme authority to judge all life. Become the ultimate Heavenly Dao and master the fate of all!

4258290.title: We Are So Cooked
4258290.short_description: You and your friends are in trouble. Big trouble. You’ve accidentally killed someone, and now you have to get rid of the evidence. "We Are So Cooked" is a 1-4 player co-op physics-stealth game where the objective is simple: Get the body to the exit. The execution? That’s the hard part.

4258330.title: CALLUS
4258330.short_description: Callus is a short psychological horror walking simulator about cruelty and overprotection.

4258400.title: Bakken - Ski Jumping: Next Season
4258400.short_description: Bakken - Ski Jumping: Next Season is a winter sports simulation game. Compete with more than 200 male and female ski jumpers on more than 10 hills and master the jumping, the flying and the landing! The next season starts here ...

4258430.title: Beyond Your Threshold
4258430.short_description: These almost endless halls are only an unstable creation of the mind. Find within yourself the will to push forward, and you might just prevail. You are your own limit.

4258530.title: Limes 235
4258530.short_description: A historically grounded single-player point-and-click adventure that blends narrative-driven exploration, role-based perspective shifts, and puzzle solving into an emotional rollercoaster of contrasting storylines and moral choice.

4258760.title: Chainsaw Woods
4258760.short_description: A survival horror game where you must escape from a forest you've gotten lost in. The forest is randomly generated each time you play. Supports online co-op for up to 2 players. Work together to escape from the forest!

4258770.title: Dread Fields
4258770.short_description: Feed the animals, tend the fields, and keep the house clean while living dead girls wander nearby. A slow-burn rural horror.

4258880.title: Basement To The Sky
4258880.short_description: A bright afternoon, perfect weather. With your parents away, you’re left with a rocket toy you received as a birthday gift. Build your own rocket and launch it high into the sky! Enjoy delicious homemade meals and work part-time jobs to upgrade your rocket. Can your rocket reach outer space?

4259140.title: 2 Hours to Refund
4259140.short_description: Demo Available · A 5×5 card strategy game where poker hands become combat skills. A single card affects multiple lines—maximize combos through strategic placement.

4259250.title: Silent Snow
4259250.short_description: Seth and May have moved out of the city and into a big old house that uncle John decided he didnt want anymore. Although the holiday spirit brings color and joy to an otherwise barren house, something lurks outside hidden in the snow. Watching. Waiting.

4259630.title: La Cosa Nostra
4259630.short_description: La Cosa Nostra is a story-driven 2.5D side-scrolling action game set in 1920s America. Play as an immigrant navigating the world of organized crime, combining melee combat and shooter gameplay within a gritty mafia-themed narrative.

4259670.title: Ironseed 3 : Vigil
4259670.short_description: Sequel to a sci-fi exploration game Ironseed written in 1994, continued in Ironseed 2: Consensus, and now in Ironseed 3 : Vigil!

4259740.title: Cozy Against Humanity
4259740.short_description: Cozy Against Humanity is a roguelike tower defense game where the coziest things imaginable turn against you. Adapt, resist, and survive the soft apocalypse.

4259890.title: I am Coin
4259890.short_description: Life is tough when you're small change. Reach the piggy bank in this physics-based challenge and become savings!

4259900.title: Green Tea Field Mayhem
4259900.genre: Action, Casual, Strategy, Free To Play
4259900.short_description: Set against the beautiful Boseong Green Tea Fields of South Korea, this is a thrilling multiplayer psychological hide-and-seek game. Choose your role: become an adorable Tea Fairy protecting the tea leaves from mischievous Dokkaebi, or be a Dokkaebi tasked with stealing them.

4259910.title: GravityOptional
4259910.short_description: A physics-based co-op roguelite about flightless owls, crippling debt, and industrial glue. Pilot a rickety airship through acid storms, harpoon floating garbage, and build makeshift shelters out of stolen bathtubs to protect your cargo. If the package gets wet, you don't get paid.

4259970.title: Watch Grass Grow Simulator
4259970.short_description: A real-time experience built entirely around watching grass grow, where patience turns into payoff and leaving too early means missing it.

4260380.title: DishDash
4260380.short_description: DishDash is a single-player time management restaurant game where you prepare meals, serve customers, and manage limited resources under constant time pressure, turning kitchen chaos into smooth rhythm through speed, focus, and smart decision-making.

4260530.title: Rina's Undercover Train Operation
4260530.short_description: A rouge-lite simulation game where you play as Rina, a special investigator with psychic powers that aims to cut down crime rate on trains. Upgrade your skills, combine them, and take down your enemies before they get you! Oh, and have fun changing Rina's outfits too!

4260600.title: CORALINA - illacrimo
4260600.short_description: Lost in nostalgia, surrounded by ghosts, Coralina goes through the Elysian Fields to find a long lost alchemy artifact, all before the world ends. The girl that can enter memories travels through these Posthumous Lands once again, in her own Psychedelic Odissey.

4260690.title: Hardcourt Balls
4260690.short_description: Hardcourt Balls is a fast-paced, turn-based adaptation of the real-world game of tennis. With just a few simple rules, the roll of dice, and tactical use of skill "cards", it manages to capture some of the nuances and excitement that make tennis such a great sport.

4260730.title: Heroes of Arcania
4260730.short_description: Experience the tabletop action of Heroes of Arcania! Inspired by classic fantasy card and board games, this demo provides a bite-sized look at the combat, mechanics, and flow of the full game — perfect for learning the ropes before diving into the complete tabletop adventure!

4260790.title: Ascent of the Last Colossus
4260790.short_description: A once-great civilisation is crumbling, teetering on the edge of collapse. The last living colossus, slowly dying, its life force siphoned away. You are sent to end its suffering and perhaps the world it still holds together.

4260820.title: Blood Court
4260820.short_description: Blood Court is a Souls-like action RPG within a dark fantasy, horrifying world. Explore PSX styled Environments, battle blood hungry monsters, and piece together a story told through environments, and voiceless cinamatics.

4260940.title: Hatchling Scramble
4260940.short_description: A vibrant top-down game about helping baby sea turtles reach the ocean by clearing a safe path forward. Turn off bright lights, scare away aggressive crabs, and clear obstacles to guide hatchlings to safety!

4260960.title: Caveworks
4260960.short_description: Caveworks is a 1-4 player co-op action-adventure game. Explore procedurally generated lunar caves and pioneer unknown regions to fulfill your assigned missions.

4261180.title: Ascension: The Hehuan Sect & 66 Waifus
4261180.short_description: Ascension: The Hehuan Sect & 66 Waifus is a comedic Harem Strategy game. Fusing Roguelike deck-building, humorous storytelling, and Sanctuary management, it lets you practice Dual Cultivation with diverse waifus. Recruit them to your party and battle together in this wild adventure!

4261290.title: MELLDESTROY
4261290.short_description: Slay demons in a fast-paced roguelike action game with survival elements. Play as Mellstroy, destroy hordes of dangerous blogger-demons, spin weapon slots to gain buffs and create insane builds, and survive as long as possible. Climb the MELLDESTROY leaderboards!

4261390.title: Yulong Snow Mountain in Yunnan
4261390.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4261520.title: Coconut Party
4261520.short_description: Play as the king of Hawaii in this thrilling stylized FPT (First Person Thrower) game! Fend off the colonist invasion and get stronger with each day. Do you have what it takes to defeat them? Or will Hawaii fall to their wrath? Only you can stop them in order to get your Coconut Party!

4261580.title: Board of the Kings: A Chess RPG
4261580.short_description: A tactical roguelike role-playing game based in the original thousand-year classic, Chess

4261790.title: TuringDefence
4261790.short_description: A cyberpunk tower defense with roguelike card mechanics. Deploy unique towers on hexagonal grids, strengthen your defense with tactical chips, and battle malicious codes. Build your defense through random card draws, use high-tech weapons to repel 20 waves and beat the boss.

4261820.title: Coination
4261820.short_description: A 3D incremental idle game where you flip coins, earn money, unlock new coin types, and grow through a branching upgrade tree.

4261850.title: 掌舵人 BIZ Helmsman
4261850.short_description: 《BIZ Helmsman》is a branching, multiple-ending corporate sim. By day, accept orders, assign tasks, and weigh moral boundaries during emergencies. By night, choose between family duties, underground deals, and conscience. Every decision shapes your fate and everyone around you.

4262030.title: Last Fisherman
4262030.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4262030.short_description: In abandoned biomes, forgotten cities, and lifeless waters, you cast your line — often without knowing whether it is still worth it. Rare fish, fragile systems, and a world without explanation create an atmosphere that observes rather than entertains.

4262080.title: MYCO
4262080.short_description: Embark on a quest to the corrupted hill to save your long-lost brother.

4262150.title: Black Mountain of Tlaltecuhtli’s
4262150.short_description: Cinematic Third‑Person Action horror game Climb sheer rock faces, leap across collapsing ruins, and engage in tight, cover‑based firefights against hostile factions who are just as desperate and just as trapped as you. While trying to escape something so evil and primal, civilization ending.

4262310.title: All Hail the Orb
4262310.short_description: All Hail The Orb is a quirky and short active incremental game in which you devote yourself to The Orb! Explore the once lost dungeon as you build your gathering of cultists and bring the dungeon back to its former glory! Explore and enjoy the light-hearted progression and story!

4262360.title: Rise of the Cones: Planetary Defense
4262360.short_description: Rise of the Cones is a 3D sci-fi tower defense game set on alien worlds. Build and upgrade towers to stop relentless cone-shaped machines before they reach your base.

4262420.title: Mutation Village
4262420.short_description: A post-apocalyptic farming game where you grow crops, mutate creatures, and use science to stop a spreading biological catastrophe. Farm carefully. Mutate responsibly. The world depends on it.

4262590.title: Loafing Dungeon
4262590.short_description: Loafing Dungeon is a fully automatic desktop idle game. Build your hero team on the desktop, equip them with gear and skills, and then launch the adventure on auto-pilot. The game runs continuously in the background, ensuring your progression and rewards are always fight, whether you're busy or free

4262610.title: Wannabe Galgame God!!!
4262610.short_description: "Those who skip Galgames are mere corporate drones; those who play are the true masters of wealth and power. That's just the way of the world! As an ordinary boy, wager your wildest fetishes and your dignity to reach the summit: Become the 'GALGAME GOD'!

4262790.title: OUR LUST SHELTER
4262790.short_description: OUR LUST SHELTER is a visual novel for adults with point-and-click elements set in a post-apocalyptic world. Protect your base from zombies, explore new territories, and build relationships with sexy girls who wouldn't mind having sex with you.

4262870.title: Pack and Ship: Warehouse Simulator
4262870.short_description: Build your logistics empire from the ground up. Choose the most profitable contracts, optimize your warehouse layout for maximum efficiency, and upgrade your equipment. Balance risk and reward as you adapt your strategy to a shifting market. Every lift, every pallet, and every decision counts.

4263130.title: Banana Chaos Clicker
4263130.short_description: Banana Chaos Clicker — An epic idle sim with resource management, crafting, and creature evolution. Build your empire from monkey to dragon!

4263180.title: Billion Bounces
4263180.short_description: Billion Bounces is a short incremental game with bouncing balls, targets, and one goal: earn coins, buy upgrades, and watch the economy slowly fall apart.

4263250.title: Endless Greed
4263250.short_description: Endless greed is a game where you can send your characters to explore the nearby portal for endless levels of progress while farming gems and gold to feed up your character. This game plays automatically all you do is purchase upgrades while drinking a coffee.

4263260.title: Red moon
4263260.short_description: A first- and third-person shooter. It combines several genres, including shooter, horror, sci-fi, and time travel.

4263370.title: BOT.vinnik Chess: USSR vs the World
4263370.short_description: The World has united their strongest Grandmasters to challenge us! But they forget one thing: the Soviet School of Chess has no equal. Take your seat, comrade. It is time to show the globe who truly rules the 64 squares!

4263390.title: SUSubus
4263390.short_description: The year is 840. Use your detective skills to weed out and banish the succubi terrorizing the citizens of Damaros and uncover the truth behind the recent spike in succubus victims, or become a corrupt tyrant who abuses his power, or even side with the succubi to terrorize the city.

4263440.title: Dream Savior
4263440.short_description: Purge the onslaught of Nightmares and defeat the Dream Bosses! Dream Savior is a cute casual game with rogue-lite elements, where your choices can help build towards your victory against hundreds of monsters that get thrown at you!

4263470.title: A Little Physics Roguelike
4263470.short_description: In A Little Physics Roguelike aim to grab the best equipment, then build your unique board with a variety of item to defeat cute enemies.

4263560.title: ZenWash
4263560.short_description: Wash away the dirt in a calm and relaxing way, surrounded by soothing nature sounds and the gentle flow of a nearby river. Unlock new upgrades and take on larger houses to clean.

4263880.title: Kepler 186F
4263880.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4263880.short_description: In Kepler 186F, survival is just the beginning—you must investigate. Your choices shape the story, unfolding a thrilling adventure from the planet's dark side to its space station.

4263890.title: Whisker Wars
4263890.short_description: Whisker Wars is a fast-paced single-player arena survival game where growth is power and every decision matters. Start small, move smart, and fight to survive in a constantly evolving battlefield filled with aggressive AI enemies.

4263920.title: Plucked Up
4263920.short_description: A fast paced multiplayer physics arena where one player grabs the egg and must dodge, sprint, and outplay three opponents while the rest fight to steal it. Ragdoll chaos, power ups, and unpredictable momentum make every match wild and unpredictable.

4264150.title: A Philosophical Discussion of Worms
4264150.short_description: A Philosophical Discussion of worms is a Kinetic Visual Novel that explores two characters, Vynder and Ophiel, as they navigate cohabitation in a strange, unfamiliar house when they don't speak the same language.

4264170.title: Welcome To My Domain
4264170.short_description: Ever wondered what it’s like to be chased by a dominant yandere demon? Well, this is the game! Welcome To My Domain is a psychological horror game with a unique retro-anime visual style, where you solve puzzles to escape the demon’s clutches.

4264210.title: Orbital Fighter
4264210.short_description: Take control of a fighter ship in this space-themed flight action game. Master the game’s signature mechanics—Just Dodge and Just Parry—to suppress the planetary fortress that serves as the rebel army’s stronghold.

4264340.title: 我自成道 I Am The Dao
4264340.short_description: <I Am The Dao> is a cultivation idle game that blends xianxia web novel lore with real-time auto-combat. Starting from the Mortal Realm, you will ascend through the Spirit Realm and Immortal Realm, eventually dominating the boundless cosmos. Each new world you enter unlocks unique gameplay!

4264350.title: Fixora
4264350.short_description: The system encountered a chaotic and unwanted code bug, BUG_D, and even more critically, it was spreading. To prevent this disaster, the system generated "ZERO." Its mission is to penetrate the core node of the "BUG" and completely fix [BUG_D].

4264380.title: 星のなっちゃんE (星のなっちゃん Hoshi_no_Natchan_E)
4264380.short_description: This is a 2D platform action game where you dash, jump, and attack your way through the stages.

4264440.title: Dragon Guardians
4264440.short_description: Evolve your dragons, build your cave, collect rare power cards, and defeat powerful bosses across dangerous lands. Grow stronger with every battle!

4264600.title: The Seventh Variable 第七变量
4264600.short_description: Infiltrate Shuangqing City, a cyberpunk metropolis. As a mercenary, plan your base by day and execute high-stakes contracts by night. Use your hacking skills to tip the balance of power among three factions and shape the city's future.

4264620.title: Tiny Transit
4264620.short_description: Relive the feeling of playing in your toybox in Tiny Transit. An Isometric Delivery game where you; Drive around, Deliver Packages, Navigate Obstacles, Complete Quests and Destroy Everything to earn as much money as you can. Try out the many game modes to set and beat the highest scores possible!

4264640.title: 4Born
4264640.short_description: 4Born is a roguelite tactical RPG. Lead four heroes through unforgiving dungeons. Forge unique builds by learning spells, gaining items, and evolving classes to confront powerful bosses.

4264700.title: Avian Delivery
4264700.short_description: Play as Meiva, a young and cheerful harpy working as the best delivery girl in Avian Delivery inc in this precision-platformer set in a magical world. Fly around, explore and race through obstacles to deliver your customers!

4264720.title: The Last Wizard - A Goblin Detective Mystery
4264720.short_description: An investigative adventure in a crazy world populated by ogre barbers and golems for hire, two unlikely detectives must solve enigmas and mysteries to find the culprit!

4264810.title: Sky Reach
4264810.short_description: Sky Reach is a neon cyberpunk infinite climber where every jump counts. Shoot energy waves, collide with the world to create platforms, and carve your own route upward. Play solo or in local co-op and push for ever-higher scores.

4264860.title: Rushline
4264860.short_description: Rushline is a high-speed combat racer currently in active development. Combine arcade drifting with explosive power-ups in a fight for the finish line. Wishlist today to support the project, join the community, and help shape the future of the game!

4264950.title: Farewells clicker
4264950.short_description: Farewells Clicker is an addictive blend of clicker and city builder! Expand your island, develop your city, and produce resources endlessly. Upgrade your buildings and skills through a vast skill tree to progress further and further!

4265030.title: Asteroid Rodeo
4265030.short_description: Tame spinning asteroids with harpoons and thrusters. Mine them for profit. Upgrade your ship. A physics sandbox where every rock fights back.

4265070.title: Victor Lawson
4265070.short_description: Julian Darnell returns to the eerie orphanage he once escaped, only to find it consumed by supernatural phenomena. Guide Julian as he evades a terrifying dark entity and uncovers the grim secrets hidden within these walls in this atmospheric survival horror experience.

4265120.title: PlatyGuard: Swarm Slayer
4265120.short_description: PlatyGuard: Swarm Slayer is a 2D action roguelike platformer RPG set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, infused with biopunk and dark sci-fi flair. Survive the chaos, clash with mutant foes, and explore mysterious sites in this indie adventure!

4265130.title: MY SLIEM gets stronger after it dies
4265130.short_description: 《MY SLIEM gets stronger after it dies》is a fantasy RPG where you play as a weak slime. Through repeated rebirths, you grow stronger to defeat foes and uncover a conspiracy. In its top-down pixel world, you move, dodge, and cast spells—turning each death into power.

4265160.title: SteelBlade Shop Simulator
4265160.short_description: SteelBlade Shop Simulator lets you run your own SteelBlade shop in the streets of Japan. Open SteelBlade boxes, collect parts with different tiers, build powerful SteelBlades, sell them for profit, or take them into the arena and compete to prove your skill.

4265220.title: 绘色星落(Brush The Starfall）
4265220.short_description: Brush the Starfall uniquely blends strategic color filling with fragmented storytelling. Paint the board to specified colors within limited moves to solve elegant logic puzzles. Through journal entries, experience a poignant story of warmth and farewell.

4265310.title: YURA
4265310.short_description: YURA — 1-4 players trying not to kill each other on the way up. Cliffs. Deserts. House-sized mechs. Gliders over chasms. Absolute physics, total freedom, and zero safety nets. Climb. Fall. Drag your friends with you. To the top — or down with the whole crew.

4265320.title: Bird Brigade
4265320.genre: Action, Adventure, Racing, Sports, Early Access
4265320.short_description: Become birds together with your friends — each one has different perks and stats, and some have unique abilities. Try various game modes and have fun in Bird Brigade. The game is inspired by AI-generated TikTok videos about Bird Game 3.

4265330.title: Star and Serpent Solitaire
4265330.short_description: Experience Klondike solitaire through classical Tarot cards. Earn gold, claim treasure, unlock Major Arcana cards and if you win... get your fortune told.

4266770.title: Rogue Ricochet
4266770.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4266770.short_description: Master the Ricochet in this physics-based roguelite fusing arcade pong-like action with fantasy RPG depth. Create your character, stack your balls with weapons, and shatter your enemies as you explore a procedurally generated medieval world to discover powerful synergies and defeat massive bosses.

4266780.title: Slimestoppers
4266780.short_description: Slimestoppers is a top down horde shooter that pits the technology of man against a relentless army of sentient slimes from space. Choose from an ever-expanding arsenal of weapons, abilities, perks, and equipment to forge the perfect Slimestopper. Supports multiplayer up to 4 players!

4266820.title: Steam & Glory
4266820.short_description: Steam & Glory is a hybrid arcade/simulation train game where you take control of a 20-ton steam train as you steam, brake, ring your bell and blow your whistle to power through to the goal! Take in the scenic old west views as you race to get to the station on time!

4266970.title: Function SUE
4266970.short_description: Welcome to the world of “maSUEmatics”! Draw equations, shape the world, and roll Sue to the goal in this free-form physics puzzle.

4267160.title: A Game About a King Saving a Dragon
4267160.short_description: Help a mighty dragon break a terrible curse in this incremental game. Hire workers, collect resources, construct buildings, unlock upgrades, and become a powerful king.

4267180.title: 卡包修仙
4267180.short_description: "Cardpack Cultivation" is a roguelite cultivation sim where you play as a cultivator, and every run tells a new story.

4267330.title: nurny battles HD
4267330.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4267330.short_description: nurny battles HD is a little indie auto battler with pre-rendered 3d visuals and gimmicky, synergistic characters that can be played ONLINE or locally

4267340.title: Phinger Physics
4267340.short_description: Draw lines and boulders to guide a golden ring into the bullseye using real-world physics across 50 handcrafted puzzles spanning five tiers of difficulty.

4267630.title: POOLSIDE VIGIL
4267630.short_description: Immerse yourself in a Backrooms-inspired Poolrooms horror based on a true story. Navigate ever-changing liminal spaces, solve physics-based puzzles, and survive the entity on your trail. Experience the grim consequences of phone addiction. Can you solve the mystery of that fateful day?

4267650.title: ALIGNMENT : An Engineering Odyssey
4267650.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4267650.short_description: A professional-grade road design sim built on real-world maps. Recreate complex interchanges and iconic highways 1:1, engineer custom solutions with real workflows, and drive what you design. Collaborate with friends on massive infrastructure projects.

4267710.title: Seeing Double
4267710.short_description: In this puzzle platformer, your screen is split down the middle. Control Pitter and Patter simultaneously as you jump, dash, and climb through two parallel realities in this atmospheric adventure on your quest to reunite them.

4267800.title: Bandit Simulator TD
4267800.short_description: This is a "Tower Defense + Base Building" game where you establish a bandit stronghold from scratch. With "Tower defense" at its core, you can ambush travelers, develop characters through profession and equipment systems, and expand your stronghold by researching, forging, and constructing!

4268100.title: Every Step Has a Sound
4268100.short_description: A psychological horror game set inside a mysterious house where every choice matters. Explore a confined environment, solve environmental puzzles, and uncover the truth behind your confinement. There is no combat—only tension, atmosphere, and consequences shaped by your decisions

4268200.title: Excremental Game
4268200.short_description: A chaotic incremental Poop-Shooter where bouncing poop earns points! Level up your poop, and unleash explosive, multi-poop madness!

4268240.title: Gravity Strikers
4268240.genre: Action, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4268240.short_description: Gravity Strikers is a team-based PvP sports game! Build your squad of champions, master aerial movement, combine shots and passes to control the ball, eliminate your rivals, and score together the goals that lead your team to victory!

4268320.title: Quixotic
4268320.short_description: This is a fun casual running game where you control a golden capsule rolling forward on a cobblestone track.

4268380.title: Dwarf Saga
4268380.short_description: Embark on a premium match-3 adventure! Help the luckiest dwarf build history's first surface village by solving puzzles, finding runestones, and defeating a treacherous villain's plot. Enjoy stunning visuals, a charming story, and the quest to earn legendary status!

4268430.title: Midnight Kebab
4268430.short_description: We start working as a chef in a kebab shop where employees constantly quit or mysteriously disappear. As we work, we begin to understand the disturbing reason why people become obsessively dependent only inside the restaurant.

4268510.title: PlaneShift
4268510.genre: Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4268510.short_description: PlaneShift is a Role Playing Game immersed into a 3D virtual fantasy world! A medieval world, with many cities to explore, monsters to fight, weapons and equipment to find and craft. A skill based progression system, magic and many quests.

4268520.title: Galaxy Pirates
4268520.short_description: An idle auto-battler that fights epic battles in the corner of your screen while you conquer your day.

4268590.title: Func Key
4268590.short_description: Deck out your keyboard with powerful upgrades in this roguelike word-builder. Snap on keycaps to buff entire rows or columns, install "broken" function keys, and pick your projects as you rise from a lowly intern to a corporate legend.

4268610.title: Isekai Sex Kingdom 👑
4268610.short_description: Isekai Sex Kingdom 👑 is an adult fantasy visual novel where a modern man is summoned to a realm where love is forbidden. Secrets, power games, and temptation shape every bond — until one final choice decides your fate.

4268840.title: Wonderlanders
4268840.short_description: Young protagonist Scout gets transported to the magical world of Atlas and has to return home. A turn-based party-combat RPG with skill-based quicktime elements.

4268860.title: Chase St
4268860.short_description: The shadows are following you. Navigate an oppressive, familiar darkness in this 3rd-person psychological horror. Make use of your environment to escape the looming presence, and make your way safely home.

4268920.title: ぶらんち☆でんせつ
4268920.short_description: This is a 2D action game starring independent Vtuber Brunch Toujiin!

4269020.title: Meow Mages
4269020.short_description: Become a Meow Mage and brave the dungeons for the Chalice of the Sacred Fish. Play solo or in 4-player co-op!

4269140.title: Cubicle Cats
4269140.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4269140.short_description: Survive the 9-to-5 as a corporate cat! Sort emails, master rhythm-based meetings, fix printer jams, and make strategic decisions in this humorous 8-bit office simulator. Complete mini-games to earn promotions!

4269170.title: Dragon's Egg: A Gourmet Fantasy
4269170.short_description: Hire adventurers to collect ingredients from dangerous dungeons, rustle up some mythic cuisine and power up your party! Can you cook and fight your way to greatness, solve the mystery of the tower and snatch the legendary DRAGON’S EGG?

4269330.title: Shmandala
4269330.short_description: Shmandala is a delirious arcade-style shoot'em up choreographed to a banging soundtrack!

4269390.title: Gears of Dissent
4269390.short_description: Explore a world of secrets and opposition at every turn, and smash through it in fast-paced top-down combat! This game is a short 2–3 hour experience that aims for high quality of life, worldbuilding, and gameplay without demanding weeks of your time!

4269600.title: Tiny Hoops: Idle Shooter
4269600.short_description: Tiny Hoops is a relaxing idle basketball game you can play at the bottom of your screen while focusing on other tasks. Upgrade your character, watch the game unfold, or make a few shots whenever you want to speed up your progress.

4269670.title: Cyberdelia: Micro
4269670.short_description: Cyberdelia: Micro is a psychedelic, retro-inspired JRPG where drugs are your best friend. You play as Xaxis, a cyberdelic robot sent to a spiritual land to prevent the end of the world.

4269980.title: 迷你种田
4269980.short_description: Farming, raising animals, automatic harvesting—complete with just a light swipe of the mouse. Continuously unlock new plants, and in the later stages, raise advanced animals. A mini-game that runs in a small window for effortless idle play.

4270010.title: Tunnelers
4270010.short_description: An online co-op horror game where you mine for gold with up to 5 players. Venture into dark tunnels, recover lost equipment, set off explosives, and uncover secrets as you descend into increasingly dangerous caverns in pursuit of the eerie unknown at the bottom.

4270020.title: Survival Quest Dungeons and the Beasts
4270020.short_description: In a realm where you craft your way forward, hunt to survive, and cook your food to keep you from starving to death. You will go on many adventures. But along the way you will meet up with beasts that are constantly trying to take you out. Survive quests in Survival Quest Dungeons and the Beasts...

4270080.title: The Lucky Stray Cat - 招财猫 - Mèo Chiêu Tài
4270080.short_description: “The Lucky Stray Cat” is a hybrid Dungeon Crawler and Visual Novel, told through an urban horror narrative reminiscent of Junji Ito’s storytelling style.

4270090.title: Memory King
4270090.short_description: Memory King is a brain training puzzle game designed to sharpen your memory skills. Challenge yourself through diverse stages including card matching, number recall, route memory, and face-name association. Difficulty increases gradually. Train daily and claim your throne as the Memory King.

4270230.title: Idle Bookstore
4270230.short_description: A relaxing bookstore that sits at the corner of your screen, writing books and running a bookstore while you do other things.

4270360.title: Stack Haven
4270360.short_description: Stack Haven is a cozy card-stacking cultivation game. Manage spirit animals to farm, mine, and alchemize, restoring a lost paradise. Master automation with Magnetic Channels, breed mythical beasts like the Nine-Tailed Fox, and bond with wandering spirits in this heartwarming roguelike sim.

4270450.title: 我喜欢的白毛美少女不可能是凶手
4270450.short_description: “为什么我什么都做不到!这样的现实，由我亲手撕烂!这一次我不会再让任何人伤害你!” —— 本游戏为单女主剧情作 属于悬疑恋爱类文字冒险游戏，主角将通过一个个选项来了解一场凶杀案背后的真相，其中有很多线索和不一样的结局来提供游戏趣味性。 『没有人能拒绝白毛异瞳的杀伤力!』 这是如梦幻般的故事。 无法忘怀，也不能忘怀的爱与回忆!!!

4270910.title: Dice and Daydream
4270910.short_description: Build your combat strategy through dice combinations. This is a roguelike deckbuilder focused on rolling and combining dice. Each turn, you use dice results to enhance or alter skill effects.

4270930.title: The Last Lighthouse
4270930.short_description: A cozy yet tense management game where you maintain a magical Lighthouse. Become a lighthouse spirit, balance daily duties, and aid incoming ships, all while the world around you slowly dims and is consumed by ever-creeping darkness.

4270940.title: Payroll
4270940.short_description: The dice roguelike. Payroll is a compulsively replayable deckbuilder where you rotate dice to control luck, discover devastating combos, and trigger outrageous chain reactions to escape the loan shark.

4271110.title: Slient Ward:Forever Lost
4271110.short_description: The game is built using Unreal Engine 5 with an interactive 3D UI. Players must explore the ward and repair damaged circuits while evading the harassment of the Listener. Along the way, they must locate notes left by other survivors. With the help of the item information, they can leave.

4271150.title: PipeFlow
4271150.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4271150.short_description: In the distant but surprisingly "leaky" city of Kranovsk, where every house is a maze of old pipes, unpredictable turns and sudden floods, an era of change is coming. A novice plumber decided to learn pipes and become the greatest plumber.

4271360.title: Serendipalette
4271360.short_description: Serendipalette is a relaxing tile placing game with the mood of watercolor painting. Build up your color palette to earn balloons using combinations of colors.

4271500.title: Teacher Waifu
4271500.short_description: Teacher Waifu is an exciting puzzle game featuring charming waifu teachers and a unique academic atmosphere! Complete 30 unique levels, unlock new illustrations, and enjoy the stylish details of each look.

4271510.title: Dual Force
4271510.short_description: Dual Force is a fast-paced 2D fantasy action game where two heroes fight to save a world falling into darkness. Join them, grow stronger, and help push back the evil threatening all life. Every new player adds to the force that can restore light and save the world.

4271530.title: Skyrest
4271530.short_description: Skyrest is a first-person action roguelike where you summon procedural generated islands, gather resources, upgrade your boat, craft items and weapons and fight ghostly enemies using an arsenal of spiritual weapons and runic attacks.

4271540.title: Tile Tactics
4271540.short_description: Build, gamble, and most of all survive in this roguelike tower defense where everything is a tile. Use the slot shop to draft towers and physical upgrade tiles to buff your grid. With hundreds of unique synergies, will you hit the jackpot or let the enemies break your base? Play the odds today!

4271690.title: GUN.DOG.REVENGE
4271690.short_description: GUN·DOG·REVENGE is a high-speed arcade platform shooter, drawing inspiration from NES classics "Rolling Thunder" and "Code Name: Viper", the indie hit "RollingBird" on Steam, and the film "John Wick". Reload! Shoot! Kill the boss! Revenge for your dog.

4271740.title: A Seagull Game
4271740.short_description: This is a short casual 2.5D platform puzzle game with a unique hand-drawn art style. A wee seagull who wants to get some chips at the pier, but accidentally falls into a vent system of an office building…

4271790.title: 耶耶耶一周
4271790.short_description: A dog-raising simulation game where you can make dog food, play with dogs, go out and meet friendly dogs, experiencing the joys and troubles of lively puppies.

4272030.title: Obscure Figures
4272030.short_description: It is a psychological horror game and walking simulator. Only half of the rooms are safe. When you enter an unsafe room, you must leave immediately. Ghosts can be dispelled with a flute or a guitar.

4272080.title: Retired
4272080.short_description: RETRO HYPER TIRE RACING! Cruise down hills through 5 different developer created worlds competing for the best track time, or race through a nearly infinite supply of User created levels through the steam workshop!

4272180.title: GunSlaw VR
4272180.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4272180.short_description: A flexible free-to-play online multiplayer VR shooter featuring a wide variety of voxel-based gamemodes. Build, destroy, shoot, repeat!

4272190.title: Together forever ❤︎
4272190.short_description: Maybe you have real laundry to do, but in the meantime you should pair these virtual socks

4272200.title: Liminal:Escape Route
4272200.short_description: A game where your goal is to find a door to get to the next level! What could be wrong ?

4272250.title: Reroll Routine
4272250.short_description: Reroll Routine is a rolling clicker inspired by autobattler-style shop systems. Buy ROUTINES, earn R€COINS, win the ROLLYMPICS and REROLL your life. One of the past champions, Relder, is here to help you achieve it.

4272330.title: SynthEscape
4272330.short_description: A Synthwave-soaked bullet hell shoot 'em up where grazing enemy fire charges your bullet-slowing time bubble and builds your score. Play through 5 levels in solo or co-op with leaderboard support. '80s vibes meet precision shmup gameplay. Graze Bullets. Bend Time. Break the Future.

4272380.title: Fruit Auto Fighters
4272380.short_description: Build a team of powerful fruits and battle asynchronously against other players!

4272460.title: Scarf Tale
4272460.short_description: Scarf Tale is an RPG with light roguelike elements and a focus on exploration. You awaken into a new life, reborn in the world of Scarf Tale. Armed with a scarf, a weapon, and the drive to push further out and uncover what’s waiting beyond the town.

4272560.title: BREAKOUT BABY
4272560.short_description: BREAKOUT BABY is a blood-pumping, Pac-Man–infused, first-person horror roguelike where you must help a poor baby escape to the surface. Run from creatures, scoop up pellets, and shake your baby to survive.

4272700.title: Yellow
