4272700.short_description: YELLOW is a liminal survival horror game. As a M.E.G. inspector in hazmat gear, explore unstable Backrooms zones to document "Undocumented" entities. With zero data available, you must study these lethal threats, uncover their origins, and solve the mystery of why new levels are appearing.

4272710.title: Up to the top!
4272710.short_description: A fast, addictive vertical-climbing game. Jump higher, chain combos, build insane speed, and don’t fall. Easy to learn—endless to master.

4272790.title: Approach Control: Remastered
4272790.short_description: A professional air traffic control simulation, now with voice recognition! Approach Control: Remastered is a realistic air traffic control simulation where you manage arrivals using real procedures, authentic radar behavior, and professional controller workflows in fast-paced, high-stakes scenarios.

4272820.title: Battle of the Alamo
4272820.short_description: Rewrite history and defend the Alamo as a shield who can only parry, in this short bullet hell action roguelike! Collect items as you fight through waves of enemies, but careful... a mighty foe waits for you at the end.

4272830.title: Haven Restored
4272830.short_description: A cozy restoration simulator focused purely on cleaning and tidying — no money, no timers, just calm, satisfying transformation.

4272860.title: Woodswalker
4272860.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4272860.short_description: Woodswalker is a strategy-based survival horror game in which quick thinking is key. Listen closely to your surroundings, defend yourself with your searchlight, budget your limited power, and solve environmental puzzles to discover the truth of the forest.

4273270.title: Tactris
4273270.short_description: A tactical game of slotting soldiers. Arrange formations of different units and attempt to break through the enemy's ranks whilst collecting buffs, modifiers and more to alter the power and performance of your units.

4273380.title: Chesscent
4273380.short_description: Chesscent is a pixel art turn-based strategy roguelite that blends classic chess with rule-breaking cards. Face impossible rivals, embrace defeat, and unlock new permanent abilities to change the outcome of the match.

4273420.title: Zom Mat Taeng
4273420.short_description: A bright and cozy casual tycoon! Grill skewers for hungry zombies, fulfill orders, and upgrade your shop to become the best spot in town. Don't miss special orders! Unlock recipes to boost your reputation. Enjoy cute customer reactions with simple controls anyone can play.

4273610.title: A Game About Shooting Bullets At Bullets (AGASBAB)
4273610.short_description: A 3D incremental FPS game where you don’t move, only your bullets do. You’re stuck in space with nothing to do but shoot bullets...at bullets. Watch bullets bounce out of control, numbers explode, and a quiet room turn into pure chaos.

4273620.title: Whispers of Appalachia
4273620.short_description: A story-driven atmospheric horror set in a forest inspired by Appalachian legends. Avoid patrolling creatures, listen to the whispers, and survive the night.

4273700.title: ShotSun Man & His Beauties
4273700.short_description: Ling Yun, bearing the Chaos Origin Mark, travels across China, encountering diverse ethnic beauties—shamans, Gu witches, snow spirits. Bound by love and fate, he battles demons, upholds balance, and carries the weight of guarding the world in this epic tale of romance and adventure.

4273760.title: Text Dungeon: The Ring of Life
4273760.short_description: No graphics, No tiles. Just text-RPG adventure! Explore a shifting labyrinth, regain the Ring of Life from the wizard Shingor. Classic roguelike-style messages guide your journey, with narrative scenes evoking the spirit of MUDs and gamebooks. Death is permanent. Every run brings new discoveries.

4273820.title: Maritime Simulator
4273820.short_description: A realistic vessel traffic simulation where you manage and control maritime traffic in busy waterways. Monitor ships, assign routes, prevent incidents, and keep ports and rivers moving safely as a VTS (Vessel Traffic Service) operator.

4273870.title: River Runners
4273870.short_description: River Runners is a cooperative multiplayer adventure where you and your friends navigate a dangerous, unpredictable river. Clear communication and teamwork are essential to steer the raft, overcome hidden challenges, and survive the journey to the end.

4273950.title: Dance Dance Detective
4273950.short_description: Grab your dance shoes, and Dance, Dance, Detective! Go undercover as a dance teacher on a cruise ship full of wacky murder suspects. Create choreographies to uncover their dark secrets, follow leads, and connect clues to find who killed the chief science officer of the Bolero Chocolate Company.

4274110.title: Hardware Simulator
4274110.short_description: Build your hardware empire from scratch! Experience real business with product sourcing, dynamic pricing, online orders, and delivery management. Boost your popularity, expand your store, and become the country's most successful hardware merchant!

4274120.title: Sushi Simulator
4274120.short_description: Manage your own sushi restaurant. Take orders, prepare fresh sushi, purchase ingredients, manage stock, and keep your customers happy. No distractions, just a focused single-player sushi simulation.

4274170.title: The Honest Little Fisher
4274170.short_description: A cozy fishing game made with care, full of discovery, gentle progression, and hundreds of things to catch. Set out to explore the sea, upgrade your boat, and uncover stories, fun facts, and legendary finds along the way.

4274180.title: Dawn Vantor
4274180.short_description: Dawn Vantor is a single-player stealth-action story game where you play a lone elite operative sent on a final covert mission. Infiltrate hostile forests and caves, eliminate enemy forces, uncover a hidden base, and destroy it before dawn.

4274210.title: Medieval Decklords
4274210.short_description: Medieval Decklords is a medieval-themed roguelike card game with a three card poker system. Outsmart opponents in duels, and upgrade your deck. Rise through the ranks to become the ultimate Decklord.

4274270.title: Missy's Bugtastic Little Planet
4274270.short_description: Missy the kitty will hang out with you anywhere on your desktop and catch bugs! She will earn money based on the rarity of what she catches, and you can use that money to buy cosmetics and upgrades, or just see how much money she can make!

4274480.title: DonDonKitchen
4274480.short_description: No more boring cooking—chop, season, and flip the pan to the beat, and turn cooking into your very own show!

4274680.title: The VORIK Cycle
4274680.short_description: "Trapped in a decaying industrial loop, your greatest enemy is your own past. Survive harrowing deaths, battle a deteriorating mind, and face the truth: in The VORIK Cycle, you are your own architect of ruin."

4274690.title: Automation Farm
4274690.short_description: This is a game that simulates farm management using programming methods. The game simplifies the complexity of programming and extracts its automation elements. It allows players to experience the fully automated process of controlling robots to harvest and manage farms using code and thought.

4274700.title: Tonight resist drinking milk!!
4274700.short_description: To satisfy her pent-up desires, we spend another hot night together. Smoothly animated CG events , with voice acting.

4274740.title: ShanHaiYiXian
4274740.short_description: "Shanhai Yixian" is an action-adventure game set in a cultivation world.Begin as a mortal,explore a mysterious and brutal realm,search for rare spiritual treasures,refine elixirs and magical artifacts.Strengthen your cultivation,break through realms,and ultimately defy fate to dominate the world.

4274950.title: Outworld Defence
4274950.short_description: Outworld Defense is a 2D tower defense game where you recruit defenders, fortify your mansion, purchase upgrades, and use bonuses to protect it from hordes of demonic creatures.

4275020.title: Brewmatics
4275020.short_description: An Incremental Deck builder where you build decks, collect artifacts and upgrade your skills to brew the best potions Possible and discover crazy combos and live the fantasy of Number Go Up.

4275030.title: Lumina: Resenting Shadow
4275030.short_description: Journey through a kingdom drained of its life. An innocent being locked away from its own kind, longing to be loved and seen. Though it seems to have forgotten one flicker of hope. You, a glimmer of life not yet fallen.

4275060.title: Sparrow Shop
4275060.short_description: Run a shop and a factory in a narrative management sim with Mahjong battles. Craft "Gene Tiles," exploit intel for profit, and annex rivals in duels. "Become the 'First,' and we leave together." — Carve a bloody path through Dark Heron City.

4276220.title: Cursed Ghost
4276220.short_description: Once a ghost, now trapped in flesh—avoid every obstacle, evade human eyes, and use brief moments of spectral freedom to find your way out.

4276240.title: My Girlfriend is a VAMP
4276240.short_description: Guide a Vampire Autistic Magic Princess through a 2D narrative adventure where everyday situations are the real dangers. Avoid sensory overload, offer emotional support, and make meaningful choices as you help your VAMP girlfriend return to her castle and strengthen your relationship.

4276260.title: Gem Tales 2: Crystal Dragon
4276260.short_description: Gem Tales 2: Crystal Dragon is a story-rich match-3 adventure with 100 handcrafted levels. Match crystals, solve clever puzzles, and help Luna guide a lonely crystal dragon through a changing world filled with charm and magic.

4276300.title: 镜之境
4276300.genre: Adventure, Casual, RPG, Free To Play
4276300.short_description: 某天，林铭和娜比意外掉入了一个由神秘古镜创造的世界。他们无法看到彼此，但可以听到对方的声音。现在，需要您和伙伴一起，通过交流沟通来交换彼此视角的线索，共同帮助他们离开这里。

4276390.title: Kaiju Inc.
4276390.short_description: Kaiju Inc. is a Real-Time Tactics + Roguelike Monster Raising game! Mutate, Modify, and Evolve your monsters! Build your strongest monster squad through Roguelike stages!

4276520.title: PCUBES
4276520.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4276520.short_description: This is a 3D puzzle action game where players create and manipulate blocks using special abilities to clear stages. By stacking and rotating blocks, players overcome obstacles and gimmicks. Each stage has keys and an exit, and there is no single solution, allowing creative and flexible gameplay.

4276530.title: C
4276530.short_description: A game where number goes up

4276550.title: Godling Harem
4276550.short_description: You've fallen from godhood to a godling that has lost much of your powers, but you're given a second chance. Save the world and gain back your powers, grow your harem of royals and nobles, and ascend back into godhood in this 2D RPG featuring animated adult content.

4276660.title: Yomifuda: Kanji Survivors
4276660.short_description: Your path to survival is written in ink! Survive the endless Yokai onslaught with the power of language. Yomifuda combines rogue-lite action with a Japanese learning system featuring over 1,000 essential Kanji. Build your vocabulary, and unlock powers to devastate the evils of the underworld.

4276730.title: 境界突破:放置修仙
4276730.short_description: 在这片浩瀚的修仙世界中，天地灵气充盈，仙缘无限等待有缘者。你将从炼气期的初入修行开始，踏上从筑基、金丹、元婴到化神的巅峰之路。游戏以轻松挂机为特色，让你在修炼、历练、闯荡仙境的同时，轻松积累经验与资源。无论是培养独具特色的剑修、法修或医修，还是收集稀有装备、强化自身实力，每一次修炼与突破都让角色更接近至高仙境。华丽的技能特效、回合制战斗以及多倍速挂机系统，让你在感受修仙世界壮阔宏大的同时，也能享受轻松流畅的游戏体验。加入这场修仙盛宴，开启属于你的修仙传奇吧！

4276740.title: Stuff It!
4276740.short_description: Colorful dolls with voluptuous bodies can come to life, don't you know? All they need to do is meet their Maker. Are you ready?

4276800.title: Spin, Baby, Spin!
4276800.short_description: Spin, Baby, Spin! is a short incremental game about slot machines. Spin the reels, upgrade your income and drop chances, craft new slot machines, and collect powerful artifacts. Choose your talent cards and earn enough chips to buy back your soul from a demonic clown!

4276890.title: Glyph Chess
4276890.short_description: Glyph Chess is a strategic board game infused with magical fantasy elements, derived from the Tales of Tarsylia. You will command mages with distinct abilities to escort your Scepter to the central "Source of Magic", or to destroy the enemy's Scepter.

4277130.title: Town Tower
4277130.short_description: A strategic tower defense game where management is key. Build houses to generate villagers, gather resources, and erect an impenetrable defense. Withstand increasingly powerful waves of enemies and prevent them from destroying your tower.

4277210.title: ClickRush
4277210.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4277210.short_description: ClickRush: Produce infinite clicks! Deploy drones and AI matrices to automate your empire. Take down Real-Time World Bosses with the community, level up your Battle Pass, and unlock celestial bonuses. Dominate the global leaderboard. Get your mouse ready!

4277250.title: Little Toys
4277250.short_description: What if toys came to life and escaped from our drawers for crazy, over-the-top races? Up to 4 players in local multiplayer, 16 maps, traps, powers, podiums, and LittleFlouz to unlock. Challenge your friends and your family! An explosive, hilariously frustrating couch-party game.

4277290.title: One More Spin
4277290.short_description: An incremental slot machine clicker. Every click is a chance to win big, so don't stop! Go for one more spin.

4277440.title: Apathema
4277440.short_description: Cursed to repair the inner organs of the Chasm, you fight to undercover the secrets of your existence and end a self-devouring cycle of Apathy. Apathema is a grunge fantasy turn-based RPG, inspired by God Husk, Baroque, and King's Field.

4277550.title: Break Protocol
4277550.short_description: The protocol has called… and it’s time to destroy everything! BREAK PROTOCOL reinvents the brick-breaker roguelike: build powerful combos, exploit card synergies, and face unique enemies and bosses across increasingly dangerous sectors.

4277590.title: Soul Hunter
4277590.short_description: A team of young paranormal researchers ventures into the cursed corners of Japan to prove the existence of the spirit world. Ghosts feed on fear and the sanity of the living, luring you into traps of illusion. Your only defense is a special camera, capable of banishing spirits and unveiling secrets.

4277630.title: KharkivVision 2035
4277630.short_description: An atmospheric story-driven game about life, choices, and the open world of Kharkiv. 1:30–2 hours of story, created by a single developer.

4277690.title: Jumpy Tiger
4277690.short_description: Jumpy Tiger is a family-friendly collect-a-thon 2D platformer inspired by the classics of the 90s. Journey through seven unique levels and complete 35 missions, defeating enemies and avoiding hazards along the way.

4277700.title: Princess Khalifa: Legacy of Wrath
4277700.short_description: Princess Khalifa: Legacy of Wrath is a fast-paced top-down action shooter where you dash, slow time, and fight through escalating enemy waves in a surreal sci-fi world, relying on precise movement, quick reactions, and controlled chaos to survive.

4277760.title: Boom Buddies
4277760.short_description: Boom Buddies is a fixed-position bullet hell survival game where animal heroes face endless enemy waves, upgrade weapons through card choices, unlock new characters, and compete on global leaderboards.

4277790.title: Blackjack Descent
4277790.short_description: You're locked in a room where your only chance of survival is to play blackjack against a sinister dealer. Every hand isn't just a gamble, it's a deal with fate. Fail to repay your debt on time, and you'll fall into darkness... or something far worse.

4277880.title: GLOAM: Search Company
4277880.short_description: GLOAM is a co-op horror game for up to 4 players. Rescue survivors, collect and manage resources, and extract what you find to invest in upgrades and keep your agency running.

4277930.title: Fast Food King
4277930.short_description: Serve hot dogs, hamburgers, and drinks in a fast-paced street food game. Manage orders, beat the clock, and keep hungry customers happy!

4277940.title: Hentai Furry Raccoon
4277940.short_description: Hentai Furry Raccoon is an exciting game that combines puzzles, light humor, and a seductive furry atmosphere. You will dive into a colorful and playful universe where temptation, cunning, and flirtation intertwine into a single story.

4277950.title: Hentai Furry Cat
4277950.short_description: Hentai Furry Cat is a playful puzzle game set in a seductive furry world. Solve puzzles, unlock flirty scenes, and enjoy light humor, charm, and a cozy feline atmosphere with an alluring cat girl.

4278010.title: 五年B班事件簿 - The Grade 5B Case Files
4278010.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4278010.short_description: A narrative AVG focused on everyday mysteries from the lives of elementary school students. The two protagonists encounter ordinary yet unusual incidents at school, and through investigation and deduction, players uncover the truth together with them.

4278030.title: Soundscapes
4278030.short_description: Soundscapes is an interactive music sandbox where your songs shape the world around you.

4278220.title: Runic Curse Remastered
4278220.short_description: Runic Curse Remastered is a thrilling action RPG Metroidvania that transports you to a cursed island. Explore dark and diverse locations, battle hordes of enemies and mighty bosses. Forge your own playstyle by combining various weapons with magical runes to overcome all challenges.

4278310.title: Oloo
4278310.short_description: Oloo is a 2D physics-based platformer where you play as a little creature that is too squishy to be dangerous and too cute to be scary. Find out why you are in this falling-apart world and where you are going.

4278330.title: Wasteland Outpost
4278330.short_description: Wasteland Outpost is an explosive online cocktail of tactical shooter, base building, and survival. Scavenge for resources, build an impregnable fortress, and fight off hordes of mutants and the enemy team. Fortify your base or watch it burn in the flames of the apocalypse!

4278400.title: Papers And Olé
4278400.short_description: Welcome to Valdehondo, where getting government aid is harder than winning the lottery. Manage real files, deal with the mayor, and choose your path: Will you be a sanctuary for the citizens or the most corrupt gear in the system? A simulator so real it hurts... And you, what would you do?

4278550.title: Niji Protocol
4278550.short_description: Hunt the Demon Aristocracy in this neon-noir detective puzzle game. As an agent of the Njij Protocol, travel the globe, interview witnesses, and cross-reference clues in the Grimoire to profile the suspect before time runs out and history is lost forever.

4278580.title: Matchmaking for Ghosts
4278580.short_description: Matchmaking for Ghosts is an atmospheric visual novel with horror elements and themes of love and loss, built around a unique multi-protagonist system that lets players experience the afterlife through the eyes of every ghost. Match ghosts together for love, or for chaos. The choice is yours.

4278590.title: Civica: Italian Renaissance
4278590.short_description: Build your Italian empire in this realistic medieval RTS that combines truly organic city building and immersive roleplaying. City-states compete for influence, families such as the Medici try to divide power among themselves and artists create masterpieces that define an entire era.

4278640.title: Send In The Vampires
4278640.short_description: The situation? Not good. The solution? Vampires. Discover the brutalist joy of solving problems with your fists in the ultimate gothic arcade beat em up. Supports 4 player local coop.

4278680.title: AMIGO: The Broken Loop
4278680.short_description: AMIGO: The Broken Loop is a first-person action-adventure set in a surreal world where dreams and reality bleed into each other.

4278710.title: Medieval Life Simulator
4278710.short_description: Rise from nothing to wealth! Mine ore, harvest crops, cut trees, gather livestock products, sell resources, hire workers, buy rentable houses, gamble with card games, bet on fights, and expand into an empire.

4278840.title: Call The Exterminator
4278840.short_description: When the world’s most dangerous terrorists crawl out of the shadows, there’s only one number the government dials: yours. CTE is classic 90's 2.5D action. Suit up, Light up, its time to Call The Exterminator.

4278850.title: Rugby Career Manager
4278850.short_description: Manage a rugby career from school competitions to the professional game in a living simulation world. Scout and develop players over multiple seasons, manage squads and tactics, and watch careers unfold as players grow, peak, and retire within a global rugby ecosystem.

4278890.title: Planetary Inc.
4278890.short_description: A short incremental game about building a career by destroying planets, meeting corporate goals, and investing in profitable — and maybe not so ethical — ventures.

4279010.title: Mazino
4279010.short_description: A neon-soaked casino twist on classic maze-chase action. Navigate glowing mazes as "Chip," dodge cunning Dealers, ride hot streaks, hit jackpots, and let the music-reactive visuals pull you into one more run. The house always wins... unless you're on a Blazing Streak.

4279020.title: Terry Tales
4279020.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D action-adventure where exploration, combat, and classic pixel art come together in a mysterious interconnected world.

4279050.title: Stinky Cat
4279050.short_description: Kidnapped in Cyber Space with a High-tech toilet plunger on his head, Stinky Cat needs your help! In this cozy puzzle game combining Sokoban with Bomberman, you must plan your moves to push crates, set off explosives to clear paths. Outsmart the evil Fox, and blast your way back to reality!

4279140.title: Paradise Corner
4279140.short_description: After years of wandering, you finally return to your native land. Your garden, once lush and blooming, is now overgrown with weeds, the beds are bare, and pests roam every corner.

4279190.title: Dusk Park
4279190.short_description: An exploration adventure game where you explore a building trapped in dusk, and attempt to escape while avoiding a pursuer.

4279200.title: Super Rhythm Fitness Simulator
4279200.short_description: A full-body rhythm fitness game. Follow your virtual coach and move in place to the music beat. No VR needed — just stand in front of your computer. 200+ moves, 150+ songs, 80+ coaches. Import your own music, create custom workout combos. Make exercise fun and build a fitness habit.

4279210.title: Ever Flip
4279210.short_description: Ever Flip is an incremental coin-flipping game where consecutive 50% chance wins create powerful streaks, bigger rewards, and increasing automation.

4279320.title: Far Out
4279320.short_description: Explore procedurally generated worlds, discover resources drawn from a vast randomly generated pool, create tools and machines in a free-form crafting system and progress from sticks and stones to space rockets in a sandbox loop of discovering and inventing

4279530.title: Coin Collector
4279530.short_description: This is a single-player coin collection game that features platforming and collection gameplay. You can use your double-jump ability to collect all the coins at your own pace, leading to victory.

4279540.title: Capper
4279540.short_description: Lower your expectations. Now lower them further. This is a game about flipping bottle caps. The goal is simple: pay off your bar tab by flipping bottle caps face up.

4279570.title: Project Noch
4279570.short_description: Project Noch is a winter-themed driving and taxi game set in a post-war city. Drive through quiet nights, deliver passengers, and experience a calm, atmospheric world focused on immersion and slow-paced driving rather than speed or competition.

4279600.title: Wind and Pasture
4279600.short_description: In a shattered star cluster pulled toward the abyss, gravity points to the deep. Build a home on floating fragments. Glide with dandelions, climb ruins, herd strange bugs, and plant sunflower fields. Even facing the inevitable fall, live freely. A pastoral ballad on the edge of the void.

4279610.title: Deep Space Exodus
4279610.short_description: Deep Space Exodus is a sci-fi narrative simulation with multiple endings. You manage The Noah, an immigrant starship searching for a new home. Face unprecedented cosmic events, allocate energy, supplies, and population, and decide the fate of an entire civilization.

4279690.title: Sweets Magica Survivors
4279690.short_description: Sweets Magica Survivors is a relaxing roguelite game where you follow Macaron, a novice magical girl, fighting rampaging sweets. Build bonds with magical girls of different personalities, grow through battle after battle, and protect Sweetsland.

4279700.title: Medieval Lord Tycoon
4279700.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4279700.short_description: A pixel art medieval lord simulator! Farm, chop wood, hunt yourself—or delegate to townsfolk. No meddling in daily lives; govern via taxes & laws. When enemies attack, higher prestige means more peasants rally to fight. Balance survival & strategic rule—build your medieval realm, forge your legacy!

4279770.title: Camellia's Desktop Garden
4279770.short_description: This is a desktop idle game. Camellia toils in any screen corner. Her land holds magic, with vibrant crops sprouting endlessly. Collect 100+ varieties—the rarer the crop, the more gold you earn. Save coins for tools or outfits. Working or relaxing, she brings you a soothing experience.

4279880.title: Misty Land
4279880.short_description: Develop and expand the town while fending off creatures from the mist. Players will choose from various buildings and strategies, make decisions, and personally participate in defensive battles to protect the town and achieve "your" goals.

4279990.title: Hentai Age Servant
4279990.short_description: Relax in a gentle puzzle adventure where completing each level reveals a beautiful girl’s portrait. Arrange tiles at your own pace, with no pressure, enjoying soothing visuals, calming music, and endlessly comforting gameplay anytime, relaxation

4280040.title: Pocket Chef: Asia
4280040.short_description: 🍜 Pocket Chef: Asia is a fast-paced kitchen management game. ⏱️ Cook Asian dishes, manage orders, upgrade your restaurant, and keep customers happy.

4280090.title: Castle of The Untold
4280090.short_description: Lyra questions reality within this castle entered to find her lost mother. In this ruthless 2D Roguelike where reality bend; confront the lies, adapt to the living castle, and break the cycle.

4280130.title: SEX, SIN & ROCK'N'ROLL 🤘🎸
4280130.short_description: SEX, SIN & ROCK’N’ROLL is a 3D visual novel with side-scroller exploration where a cursed guitar offers fame for a price. Write songs, play rhythm concerts, face adult temptations, and choose between becoming a rock god or saving your soul. 🤘

4280230.title: Super Wash Simulator
4280230.short_description: A relaxing open world pressure washing simulator where you explore the city, accept cleaning jobs, upgrade your equipment, and turn dirt-covered places into spotless environments at your own pace.

4280290.title: Signal Lost: The Ping
4280290.short_description: Signal Lost: The Ping is a first-person atmospheric horror adventure set in a pitch-black underground facility. Use sonar-like PING pulses to reveal paths for a heartbeat, but each ping raises the Threat and draws the Sentinel closer.

4280320.title: Abandoned car
4280320.short_description: Trapped in an endless dream, it seems there's no way to wake up. You find an car that's been abandoned for a long time. Will you solve all the puzzles to figure out what happened here before?

4280330.title: Sergius vs Evil Uninvited guests
4280330.short_description: An adventure RPG in the urban fantasy genre inspired by folk tales from across Russia. Step into a world where ancient myths and legends break through into modern reality. Use True Sight, a gift that lets you perceive what others cannot: enemy tracks, special objects, and hidden locations.

4280600.title: Grief
4280600.short_description: Grief is a competitive, turn-based digital board game for 2–5 players, focused on card play and hand management.Plan your cards and actions carefully, outmaneuver your opponents, and be the first to complete all five stages of grief represented by unique Grief Tokens.

4280630.title: KUNKUN Basketball
4280630.short_description: A chaotic roguelite roulette game. Pick exploding basketballs, trigger insane support skills, build wild combos, and survive a ridiculous duel against Lao Da.

4280750.title: Ava's Variations
4280750.short_description: A choice-driven story about a rising pro tennis player. Shape Ava’s career, relationships, and future in the moments that change everything.

4280760.title: SILENT REALM
4280760.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4280760.short_description: Free To Play Game, An atmospheric action horror experience set in a non-human realm governed by rules unlike our own. A world of skeletal entities and shifting remains, where forms assemble and decay endlessly, and death exists as an active, hostile force rather than an outcome.

4280780.title: 洪荒进化 Hong Huang Evolution
4280780.short_description: A top-down lightweight Rogue-like survivor game where players take on the role of a beast capable of evolving multiple times to fend off hordes of enemies. Choose from various evolution paths, talents, and skills build, survive against all odds, and ultimately evolve into the ultimate life form.

4280820.title: Water Boiling Simulator
4280820.short_description: It's 2016. Explore through your house in the middle of the night and complete your chores before the water you put on the stove starts boiling. Sounds easy, right? If only you hadn't seen things you were not supposed to see.

4281060.title: Police Officer
4281060.short_description: Police Officer is a first-person police station simulator where you manage a police station: process suspects, hear citizens’ pleas, and manage the daily chaos of law enforcement—one decision at a time.

4281080.title: Serpent Squad
4281080.short_description: Serpent Squad is a bullet‑hell roguelike game where you control a snake‑shaped squad of heroes that automatically attacks nearby enemies. Combine different heroes to unlock class bonuses and create unique builds, guiding your unstoppable squad as it sweeps through endless waves of enemies.

4281140.title: Hamster’s Sticker Book
4281140.short_description: Decorate your desktop with cute stickers! A desktop overlay sticker book where you can freely attach and remove stickers on your screen while working.

4281150.title: Flat Galaxy: An Idlemare
4281150.short_description: Flat Galaxy: An Idlemare is a one-button arcade experience set in a surreal sci-fi training simulation. Precision and strategy are key as you guide a robot through six challenging levels, backed by an original soundtrack with live guitars.

4281210.title: SUBJECT 404
4281210.short_description: You wake up as a test subject. A panel gives orders. Obey them — or be executed. Subject 404 is a fast-paced psychological horror experience.

4281270.title: Geobeast
4281270.short_description: Test your geography skills with Geobeast! Find as many countries as you can in 12 minutes, master two unique game modes, and climb the global Steam leaderboard.

4281320.title: Alien Colony
4281320.short_description: Alien Colony is a 2.5D action-horror game where you take command of a squad of four marines. Each death restarts the mission with a new cloned squad, in a mining colony where horror comes as much from the creatures as from dehumanization itself.

4281360.title: Auto-Arcana
4281360.short_description: Devise the ultimate spell rotation and watch it obliterate your foes. In this dark fantasy roguelike auto-battler, engineer synergies between rare spells and game-changing relics. Draft spells, sequence your skillbar, and architect your Broken Build.

4281370.title: A Thousand Bees
4281370.short_description: Spot the bees in this lovingly hand-illustrated hidden objects game. A literal thousand bees are spread out over a dozen beautiful levels. Can you find all secret levels, too? Enjoy a perfect summer day, deeply inspired by the cozy honeycore aesthetic.

4281400.title: This Game Costs 10 Dollars
4281400.short_description: This Game Costs 10 Dollars. Will you dare give me those 10 dollars? I put so much work into making this vivid game of imagination that I deserve those ten dollars. This game is a psychological thriller unlike anything you've ever experienced and yet you won't give me your money? Go ahead, spend.

4281410.title: Strange Horizons
4281410.short_description: Strange Horizons is a survival-adventure game where a portal to another dimension unleashes chaos. Build your base, craft essential tools, explore the quarantined zone, face hybrid creatures, and uncover secrets to close the rift before it's too late.

4281500.title: Neon Fantasy: Owls
4281500.short_description: Neon Fantasy: Owls is the perfect puzzle game for a fun and rewarding pastime. Collect pictures, develop your attention, and feel like a part of the beautiful neon world.

4281530.title: The Village Rises
4281530.short_description: The Village Rises is a medieval survival and defense game about rebuilding a broken village and protecting it against relentless threats.

4281640.title: PinballGarden
4281640.short_description: Set in the charming world of “Garden,” where tiny creatures and playful spirits gather, this pinball game features two modes: CLASSIC, a single-player challenge for high scores, and VERSUS, a multiplayer race to fill the honey gauge first.

4281710.title: Lethal: Last Turn
4281710.short_description: A card battler built around one-turn combat puzzles! Each puzzle gives you one unique hand of cards, one turn, and endless enemies to reap. Play cards in the correct order to defeat each enemy in one turn. Keep the balance as Death's work is never done.

4281720.title: Gaia
4281720.short_description: An incremental game with non-standard counting about creating life. Because there's nothing special about base 10.

4281770.title: Take Care Of It.
4281770.genre: Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4281770.short_description: Horror/thriller visual novel with RPG elements about two friends that explores guilt, co-dependency, and personal limits being pushed.

4281790.title: GALAXYZ neo
4281790.short_description: Simple controls! Deploy your alien allies in response to enemy advances. Issue commands in real time and protect the protagonist from waves of incoming enemies! Defeat all enemies to clear the stage!

4281930.title: Legacy of Y
4281930.short_description: 《Legacy of Y》是一款以成长传承为主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将在持续推进的战斗与冒险中培养角色、积累实力，并完成一段结构清晰的单人旅程。

4281960.title: Chronicle of Y
4281960.short_description: 《Chronicle of Y》是一款以冒险进程记录为主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将在持续推进的战斗与探索中培养角色、调整策略，并完成一段结构清晰的单人冒险旅程。

4282120.title: Infernal Descent
4282120.short_description: Descend through the Nine Circles of Hell in a fast-paced action gauntlet inspired by Dante’s Inferno. Bullet Hell and Heaven, survive sin-twisted realms, and fight your way to Satan himself. Hell does not forgive.

4282200.title: Smart Lab
4282200.short_description: Smart Lab: Build your lab from the ground up, research new recipes, optimize production chains, and craft valuable products. Produce in batches, improve quality, and sell your results to keep expanding.

4282360.title: Kill Spewy
4282360.short_description: Collect components. Build the flow. Kill Spewy. A cozy idle game where your only goal is to kill Spewy as many times as possible, earn Bread Slices, and unlock endlessly growing component builds.

4282380.title: Detective Necro
4282380.short_description: A dark fantasy detective game set in a technologically advanced world where magic is nearly extinct. Solve eerie murders using investigation, moral choices, and forbidden powers you never wanted.

4282420.title: Anomaly 404
4282420.short_description: As a journalist, explore the unstable reality of a secret bunker in Anomaly 404 — a first-person psychological horror where your own eyes deceive you. Find and photograph the anomalies to uncover the horrifying truth behind "Project 404".

4282590.title: NightReaper2
4282590.short_description: NightReaper2 is a dark fantasy action game where you become the Reaper, harvesting souls and fighting cursed enemies in a haunted world. Explore eerie environments, face relentless threats, and survive intense combat in a grim, atmospheric experience.

4282640.title: Inferno Loot: Bullet Hell Bound
4282640.short_description: Face the relentless legions of hell in this fast-paced top-down roguelike. Loot powerful weapons, level up your stats, and survive the bullet hell chaos. How long can you stay alive in the inferno?

4282680.title: Over The Blackboard
4282680.short_description: Over the Blackboard is a fun open-world adventure game filled with quests and missions kids love to play, where exploring, solving puzzles, and completing challenges naturally helps them practice math, logic, reading, and more without noticing.

4282780.title: Duelist Guild
4282780.short_description: 'Duelist Guild' is a pixel idle real-time auto battle game on the bottom of you computer. Over 90 characters with unique animations for you to collect! Be the best guild on the continent! (Your perfect companion for sneaky breaks!)

4282810.title: From Devil's Womb
4282810.short_description: You are a broken ex–police officer haunted by your partner’s disappearance. A mysterious clue drags you into decaying places infected by a devilish presence, breathing, waiting, watching from the dark. Solve cryptic puzzles, face buried guilt, and uncover a truth that was never meant to surface.

4282840.title: Gargantua
4282840.short_description: Build your spaceship-city Gargantua. Forge industries, bend the free market, trade between planets, and defend your growing wealth. Every bullet is bought or produced in a simulated economy where a single mistake can shatter supply chains and trigger interstellar crises. In Gargantua, war is money.

4282880.title: Your Price, Your Honor.
4282880.short_description: “Your Price, Your Honor.” is a game where you control the choices of a judge who is getting close to retirement. You must manage the public’s tolerance for injustice… and your own wallet.

4282960.title: Tomboy: Race for Love
4282960.short_description: An adult visual novel set in the high-stakes world of racing. Play as Mark, a mechanic caught between a driven star racer and her seductive rival. Tune cars, make choices, chase victory, and navigate desire as passion and competition collide.

4283100.title: Pickle Simulator
4283100.short_description: Pickle Simulator is a Parody game where you can play as a pickle. Navigate between various Pickle Loving Scenes as you get to experience a Simulator Game like never before.

4283130.title: The Northern Lighthouse
4283130.short_description: You have been appointed to take care of a lighthouse in the Arctic Circle. Clean out the snow, take out the trash, and do your happy job on this happy and lovely island. Everything is so peaceful and delightful... except there is someone in the basement :D

4283160.title: Void's Rage
4283160.short_description: Void’s Rage is a fast-paced, ultra-responsive hack n' slash game inspired by arcade games. With each match, improve your combat reflexes, achieve the highest scores on the leaderboard, and defeat the evil creatures of the void once and for all.

4283170.title: Multi Class Quest
4283170.short_description: Traverse a forgotten fantasy world in this classic Beat Em Up hack and slash! Fight through hordes of unique monsters as one of five different classes...then, mix the skills you learned into another class to create your unique fighter!

4283320.title: Five Nights At Monkeys: Flat Mode
4283320.short_description: Five Nights At Monkeys: Flat Mode is a flat screen horror experience where every night is different. Survive roaming monsters, manage tricky power systems, and face sudden jumpscares across forests, canyons, cities, and dark mines.

4283340.title: HIDDEN CATS 9: Aliens
4283340.short_description: Explore a mysterious alien world, find cute cats, and paint black-and-white locations with bright cosmic colors.

4283380.title: ICE Melts On The Riviera
4283380.short_description: A sunlit luxury resort. Three women who could ruin you. You’re Jack Mercer—here on assignment, armed with lies. Choose who to pursue first: Elena’s fire, Isabella’s dangerous allure, or Sofia’s sweetness.

4283390.title: EYEVIRUS: Compression
4283390.short_description: An AI neurochip developed for the human brain goes rogue. Your sense of time fractures, visual reality collapses, and the system traps you inside your own mind by cloning you.

4283400.title: Little Otter's Fishing Life
4283400.short_description: Dive into a cozy island life as a lovable Little Otter! Cast your line across unique spherical worlds to collect over 300 fish species. Test your skills to reel in the biggest catch, adapt to changing weather and seasons, and decorate your home in this charming and wholesome fishing simulation.

4283740.title: Space Direct
4283740.short_description: Space Direct is a space-adventure game where you play as the pilot who survived a battle and has joined a new force to save the universe. Explore various worlds, uncover mysteries, and unravel the grand secrets of the universe.

4283810.title: Blood Permafrost
4283810.short_description: Suddenly alone in a snowstorm, a camper is haunted by strange visions. A short, mind-bending psychological horror nightmare. Beware the rifleman.

4283820.title: Married Woman Countdown ASMR Sex VR
4283820.short_description: A VR adult game where you can have harem sex with two married women. The highlight this time is the immersive experience achieved through ASMR-recorded audio and spatial sound.

4284620.title: The Mist: Episode Ⅰ
4284620.short_description: Mike's life is intertwined with pain and difficulties, and mysterious events become a personal drama. He is confronted with the disappearance of his beloved Merlin and, despite asthma attacks, tries to solve the mystery and bring back what is most important to him.

4284660.title: Miracle Brave
4284660.short_description: Miracle Brave blends inventory management, deck-building, tower defense, and shooter combat! Strategize your gear, forge your unique build from countless progression paths, take control of your hero, and hold back endless waves of beasts. Carve out your path to victory and forge your own legend!

4284780.title: Ultimate Dream
4284780.short_description: Ultimate Dream is a realistic tactical FPS with adventure elements in a psychologic and psychedelic world. Intense gunfights meet a heavenly realm the player protects while bound to a bleak social security supported reality he is seeking freedom from.

4284890.title: SEX THERAPY
4284890.short_description: Sex Therapy is a candid visual novel for adults. A routine consultation with a sex therapist turns into a story of forbidden passion and awakened desires, where professional boundaries collapse under the pressure of long-suppressed hunger.

4284950.title: Flask & Fury
4284950.short_description: Survive the Anomaly. Craft your own bullet hell. In this alchemical action roguelite, you don't just find weapons—you brew them. Scavenge ingredients, synthesize powerful potions in real-time, and hurl liquid chaos at the endless horde. How long can you survive the Cursed Forest?

4285030.title: Perfect Loop - Soleris
4285030.short_description: Perfect Loop – Soleris is a turn-based time-loop RPG: The Entity sends you to Soleris to prevent the world’s downfall. Progress through questlines across multiple runs, level up, and improve your gear to overcome ever greater challenges.

4285080.title: Heart Decay
4285080.short_description: Heart Decay is a story-driven turn-based strategy game featuring 32-bit pixel art visuals. Execute lethal counter-attacks with precise timing during reaction windows that open during enemy moves. Shape your destiny in a dark world defined by a rich narrative.

4285180.title: DREADMARCH
4285180.short_description: From the Celestial Bastion, send heroes across a Might & Magic–style world map and survive endless waves of infernal enemies in brutal combat grounds. Grow stronger between runs and hold the line against the Dreadmarch.

4285190.title: VHSMan
4285190.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4285190.short_description: "Alice decides to watch a VHS she found in the dumpster 6 months ago and crazy stuff happens!" A Visual Novel about a magical VHS tape

4286230.title: News Roll
4286230.short_description: An educational dice-rolling board game where you answer real news quiz questions while traveling through the calendar. Roll, learn, and test your knowledge across 9 categories in 4 languages.

4286270.title: The Train Arrives at 10 PM
4286270.short_description: A psychological visual novel about grief, memory, and time loops shaped by player choice. Experience a story driven by atmosphere and emotion, where each decision reveals hidden truths and leads toward one of several possible endings.

4286310.title: Neon Sigil
4286310.genre: Action, Casual, Massively Multiplayer, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4286310.short_description: Neon Sigil is a lightning-fast, skill-based 1v1 arena duel with precise movement, tough mind games, and fair readability—no pay-to-win, just skill.

4286320.title: Rocket Adventures
4286320.short_description: Easy to lift off, hard to land. Test your piloting skills in a physics-based 3D platformer where gravity is your worst enemy. Thrust through stylized worlds, conserve fuel, and avoid explosive impacts. Only for true rocket scientists.

4286330.title: Don't Blink
4286330.short_description: Don’t Blink is a first-person psychological horror game. Navigate an abandoned asylum where blinking reshapes your surroundings - sometimes helping you, sometimes unleashing terror. The game blends slow-burn tension, stealth and psychological horror.

4286440.title: Cheeseland Mistery
4286440.short_description: Cheeseland Mystery is a retro-style puzzle adventure where a sneaky rat steals cheese under cover of night. Solve clever, room-based challenges across 30 levels, inspired by classic Lolo gameplay, with pixel art visuals, dynamic sound, and Xbox controller support.

4286470.title: The Rebellion
4286470.short_description: Fuel a people’s uprising through fast turn-based tactical battles and hard choices; lead your heroes, stretch scarce resources, heed the crowd’s needs, plan each move with care, break the tyrant’s grip, and let hope rise again!

4286540.title: Fun World
4286540.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4286540.short_description: Explore the Nightmares of Fun World — a once-cheerful children’s park that has fallen into ruin, now twisted and corrupted by dark forces beyond understanding. What was once filled with laughter and bright colors is now drenched in shadows, echoing with distant sounds you can’t quite explain.

4286610.title: Miami Paradise 2
4286610.short_description: Miami Paradise 2 is the bold next chapter in the mature open-world RPG series, expanding every system, sexy character, and intimate experience into a deeper, darker, and more immersive neon-soaked world of luxury, crime, and desire. Collect clues and build relationships with various characters.

4286910.title: EON Survivor
4286910.short_description: Space survivors-like action where every second counts. Face relentless alien waves, upgrade your ship, and collect critical minerals before time runs out. Survival is only the beginning.

4287030.title: TOYCAMP
4287030.short_description: One weekend, the little girl Brickey and her cousin Hockie are left to look after the house while the grown-ups are away doing casual works. Suddenly, a bunch of socks burst in and whisk them away to "Dadom Island," where the girls are about to have a crazy adventure with their new pals.

4287040.title: Vampy's Big Day
4287040.short_description: Sneak through the shadows as a clumsy vampire learning to avoid deadly sunlight with help from a sun fairy. Master stealth mechanics, manipulate shadows to stay hidden, and make moral choices that determine your fate across multiple story paths. Will you find redemption or embrace darkness?

4287050.title: MetalMuters
4287050.short_description: Half puzzle, half roguelike, mini-factory game where you turn lead into gold!

4287260.title: 新生：若能好好长大 Rebirth: If Only I Had Grown Up Right
4287260.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4287260.short_description: This is a simulation game that emphasizes the long-term impact of choices. Players take on the role of a Chinese woman born in the 2000s who has experienced trauma from her family of origin and must raise her newborn child until adulthood, ensuring the child's mental and physical well-being.

4287290.title: Double Cross Dungeon
4287290.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4287290.short_description: The couch co-op roguelike dungeon crawler with a twist! Compete to perform the best in each room to see who gets first pick on the Ancient cards to prepare for the final fight. Will you escape with your friends, or die trying?

4287310.title: Magical Girl: Final Simulation
4287310.short_description: A strategic RPG of card summoning and tactical node control. As the "Battle Simulation System"，you train magical girls through simulated fights against Witches. Deepen your bonds via combat and daily life to unlock their true potential.

4287380.title: Murmur of the void
4287380.short_description: A 2D side-scrolling shooting adventure game where a curse has descended upon the world, causing everyone to lose the ability to walk on their legs. Players must use the recoil of their weapons to move. Play solo or with a friend, explore ruins, defeat monsters, and search for the rumored sanctuary.

4287480.title: Backrooms Protocol
4287480.short_description: Backrooms Protocol is a 1–4 player co-op horror game focused on exploration, research, and survival across the levels of the Backrooms.

4287500.title: Hentai World Coffee
4287500.short_description: A soothing puzzle game with beautiful girl artwork, calming music, no time limits, and smooth difficulty progression for relaxing, stress-free gameplay.

4287530.title: The subject: Protocol zero
4287530.short_description: Turn on your camera. The Kessler Foundation is paying for your pain. The game uses your webcam and microphone, turning the room into a lab. Complete four stages: from the blink ban to the "Green Light, Red Light" game. Money or sanity? Be the first to complete Protocol Zero. If you dare.

4287600.title: Viscera Alien
4287600.short_description: A Suika Game-style physics puzzle! Merge cute alien creatures called Viscera to create bigger ones. Combine two Level 11 Viscera to create an Alien and collect it in your encyclopedia! Simple yet addictive casual puzzle game.

4287720.title: Tiny Farm, Big Money
4287720.short_description: Tiny Farm, Big Money is a calm and relaxing game where you plant and grow vegetables and fruits, aiming to sell them in the most profitable way and save up money.

4287770.title: The Other Order
4287770.short_description: A surreal tile-based roguelike where you build and reshape tile combinations to attack your enemies.

4287900.title: Alchemist Watch
4287900.short_description: You’re trapped in an Alchemist’s Study, reliving the same day over and over. Use telekinesis to fix or destroy physics-based anomalies, break the loop, and escape.

4288050.title: House Tidy
4288050.short_description: House Tidy is a meditative and calming game that will help you relax and unwind from the hustle and bustle of everyday life.

4288080.title: Intergalactic Juice Bar
4288080.short_description: Slice fruits with a physics-based knife on a rope. Upgrade your factory to slice fruit into smaller pieces. Buy advanced slicing technology. Maximize profits and quench thirst across the universe!

4288090.title: Daydream Mosaics 6: Empire - Collector's Edition
4288090.short_description: Raven and Juliette are getting married—and while they build six magical cities to unite their peoples, Lucas and Reya set out to find the perfect wedding gift. Enjoy 204 colorful nonogram levels plus jigsaw, clutter, hidden object, match 3, and more in this charming Collector’s Edition!

4288270.title: Crooked Cooks
4288270.short_description: Crooked Cooks is a chaotic co-op game where you and your crew run a restaurant as a front for the Boss’ criminal jobs, mixing fast-paced cooking with shady business.

4288350.title: Left 4 Bread
4288350.short_description: Left 4 Bread is single-player, parody, run and gun shooter set in a zombie apocalypse! Search desperately for ammo, pipebombs, and molotov cocktails to fight the infected! Change up your tactics as you run from 8 different types of special infected!!! Search for ammo and health packs to survive!

4288450.title: Power Punch
4288450.short_description: Power Punch is a local multiplayer (max 4 players) party fighting game where the longer you charge you punch the strong and faster it becomes when you release.

4288700.title: Rise of Chi
4288700.short_description: When Chi finds her eggs are stolen by sneaky snakes, she is forced to leave everything behind. A brave journey that begins with a personal mission and escalates into something far bigger. Guided by unlikely allies and haunted by self-doubt, Chi must face enemies far greater than she imagined.

4288760.title: 소원 : 두 개의 그림자
4288760.short_description: Something strange is going on at our school.

4288920.title: You Stay
4288920.short_description: A short psychological visual novel about a town you can’t leave. Observe. Wait. Repeat. The longer you stay, the more the town notices.

4288930.title: RETRO SCI-FI ADVENTURE
4288930.short_description: RETRO SCI-FI ADVENTURE is a short 3D action game with simple controls.

4288990.title: Fumpers: Dual Realms
4288990.short_description: Fumpers 2 delivers a chaotic platforming experience that tests your reflexes and patience. Stay alert through physics-based gameplay, surprising obstacles, and challenging levels. Don’t fall. Don’t quit.

4289100.title: Voltgrit: Combat Zone
4289100.short_description: Top-down roguelite shooter where you control a combat robot through relentless waves. Upgrade your weapons and survive in Survival or protect the objectives in Defense across places and arenas.

4289170.title: Mossbound
4289170.short_description: Mossbound is a small, atmospheric exploration game set in an overgrown miniature world. You follow Milo on a quiet journey through moss, roots, and forgotten spaces, searching for a way to save his sick brother.

4289180.title: The Long Drift
4289180.short_description: A desktop idle space exploration game that runs in the corner of your screen while you gather resources, build ships, and journey beyond the stars.

4289280.title: Wizard 64
4289280.short_description: Destroy incoming enemies as a flying wizard. Collect points to grow stronger. Unlock new weapons and abilities, and use different builds to defeat endless monster hordes.

4289470.title: DREAMTONE
4289470.short_description: There are secrets everywhere... Enter a strange and whimsical pastiche of 1980s Americana, where a conspiracy beyond your wildest dreams rocks the country. Join a thrilling cast of characters as they fight for the future in this turn-based RPG!

4289490.title: NoWay
4289490.short_description: You wake up in a dark underground labyrinth. Zombies roam, hunters wait. Stay silent, run, fight, or survive by acting like one of them. You’re not even sure there’s a way out.

4289570.title: kowareta
4289570.short_description: Have you ever faced the choice of living the life others expect, or the life you truly want, even if it’s difficult? If so, this is your game. Kowareta is an RPG with an unusual combat system and a silent world that says a lot.

4289680.title: Gold and Wars
4289680.short_description: A medieval strategy board game where economics, territory, and tactical card battles decide the fate of a kingdom. Each game is a struggle for influence, resources, and map control, just like in a real board game. Immerse yourself in the harsh and opulent world of the Middle Ages, where every dec...

4289830.title: Watch Eye
4289830.short_description: Victoria just wanted to take a shortcut through the usual parking garage in order to get home... she just didn’t expect to find an untold danger there.

4289870.title: Contract Cleaner
4289870.short_description: Contract Cleaner is a 2D, pixel art, top-down cleaning simulator. Play as Hank Bucket, owner of a small cleaning company, and take nightly contracts to tidy up apartments, offices, parks and more. Sweep the trash, vacuum the dust, and mop the stains.

4290070.title: Abyssal Merge
4290070.short_description: Abyssal Merge is a fast-paced roguelite shooter where your survival depends on your ability to multitask. As a lone captain in the heart of a monster-infested ocean, you must defend against waves of creatures while simultaneously catching and merging the fish in your net.

4290100.title: The Debt Collector
4290100.short_description: The Debt Collector is a horror roguelike game where you gamble your life to try and pay off your debts. Roll the dice and score points similar to Yahtzee so you don't have to face the debt collector!

4290170.title: Mudventure
4290170.short_description: Mudventure is a casual sandbox adventure set in a living tidal-flat world of mud. Dig terrain, gather resources, upgrade equipment, and control the environment by building dams. Fight monsters and bosses, enjoy fishing at night, and escape the island by repairing a ship—solo or online co-op.

4290220.title: Doomstacker
4290220.short_description: A compact power-fantasy strategy experience wrapped in an auto-battler. Choose a castle, build it up, collect artifacts, and craft wild synergies between artifacts and (massive) armies.

4290460.title: Heroines Paradox - 英雌悖论 - Nữ Anh Hùng
4290460.short_description: “Heroines Paradox” is a hybrid Dungeon Crawler and Visual Novel, told through an urban horror narrative reminiscent of Junji Ito’s storytelling style.

4290480.title: LetDeco Desktop
4290480.short_description: A cute idle-crafting game nestled in the corner of your screen. Visit various regions to gather diverse materials and decorate your home with furniture you've crafted yourself!

4290530.title: Reel Talk
4290530.short_description: Cast your line, catch some fish, and make real connections. REEL TALK is a cozy multiplayer fishing game where you hang out, customize your character with pride, and chat with friends old and new. No pressure, no competition-just good vibes by the water.

4290750.title: Wacky Coursers
4290750.short_description: Wacky Coursers is a chaotic parkour racing game where you run, jump, shrink, smash, flip gravity 🙃, fly with wings 🪽, and get launched through surprise tubes 🌀. Race solo or online—and laugh your way to the finish! 🏁😄

4290760.title: BYE BYE! POLICE!
4290760.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4290760.short_description: Steal, Escape, and Power Up! "BYE BYE! POLICE!" is a high-octane, first-person heist action game set in a stylized world. Evade the police blockade, cash in your loot, and upgrade your abilities. Master various skills to pull off the ultimate, "smooth" robbery!

4290890.title: Boba Buba
4290890.short_description: BobaBuba Is the Boba Bubble-Pop Puzzle Adventure with story mode featuring cute beverages and an endless mode for huge replay value. With global leaderboards from launch!

4290900.title: Mushroom Doom
4290900.short_description: A dark survival game where foraging is deadly. You're dropped into a fight for survival in a forest where mushrooms mutate into monsters and the whole wilderness becomes a controlled killing zone. Explore, harvest, fight, or hide and uncover the truth behind the corporation that owns the Area.

4291040.title: How Did My Dad Go To School
4291040.short_description: A low-poly comedic precision platformer where your dad’s “back in my day” school stories become a playable nightmare. Every death makes the tale more ridiculous—blizzards, reverse winds, “uphill both ways,” and more. One goal: reach school.

4291080.title: The Simen Rumors
4291080.short_description: 本游戏以视觉小说的形式，收录了十四个奇幻恐怖的短篇故事。从网站专栏的投稿、社团的恐怖故事分享会、到某座设施中的秘密实验……你将以不同的视角，探索发生在鸶门市周边的种种奇妙传闻。

4291310.title: VeinLight
4291310.short_description: Dig, trade, and survive in this pixel-art roguelite. The darkness drains your life, but your voice is your shield: Speak into your microphone to ward off the shadows! Fill your daily quota to upgrade your gear, or face the wrath of the Cave Troll. Remember: Silence brings death.

4291330.title: 異洋館・異和館-The Disturbed Mansion
4291330.short_description: An Exit 8–style game. Escape from the ghost, find anomalies, and aim for the goal.

4291350.title: The Dreadthorn Therapist
4291350.short_description: A mysterious black fog covers the skies, plunging Dreadthorn into endless night, corrupting some residents. In this horror therapist-sim, run your business, decide your clients’ fate, and survive what seems like end times.

4291400.title: Capsule
4291400.short_description: Capsule is a co-op survival and building game set in space. Build your modular spaceship, land on planets, gather resources, and try to survive together with your friends against the dangers of space while uncovering the truth behind the destruction of your world.

4291440.title: Tiny Jar Farm
4291440.short_description: A cozy idle farming game where you grow tiny crops, merge them into stronger plants, and turn your harvest into delicious recipes. Relax, and build your perfect little farm - one jar at a time.

4291520.title: Sea Sweeper
4291520.short_description: Sea Sweeper is a relaxing incremental game where you clean the ocean with your ship. Collect garbage, manage fuel, earn money, and upgrade your ship to clean faster and sweep larger sea areas each run.

4291620.title: PAPERSODA
4291620.short_description: you've clicked on the link to download this this evil visual novel... and now you're stuck in it. what's gonna happen now?

4291910.title: DataFall
4291910.short_description: DataFall is a cyberpunk idle clicker where automated systems grind endlessly and boss encounters force you to take control when efficiency alone isn’t enough.

4291950.title: Isla Paradiso
4291950.short_description: Build and manage a tropical island economy, optimize production chains, research new technologies, and defend your growing settlement against pirate threats in this relaxing yet strategic city-building game.

4292110.title: Stumblepath
4292110.short_description: Stumblepath is a turn-based roguelike RPG about an endless journey through a dark, hostile forest. Fight dangerous creatures, customize your gear, and make decisions that determine how far you can go.

4292150.title: Songtail: Whiskers of Destiny
4292150.short_description: A cozy pixel art rhythm game blending light investigation and performance. Explore charming fantasy locations, uncover hidden details, and prepare your song before taking the stage, where every note you play influences how the moment is remembered.

4292190.title: Haunting of Mageburrow
4292190.short_description: A cozy lovecraftian horror retro RPG. Become a paranormal investigator & explore an open world. Solve a criminal conspiracy of the occult. Investigate & battle monsters.

4292290.title: False Testimony
4292290.short_description: Explore different locations, talk to characters, collect evidence, and draw your own conclusions about who, how, and why is behind what happened.

4292440.title: The Minesweeper
4292440.short_description: The classic game of minesweeper from a fresh new perspective. Play alone or with a friend in this third person puzzle game, where you toss grenades, plant flags, and math a path to victory. Enjoy calm escapes into nature, chill tunes and satisfying reveals.

4292460.title: The Dismissed Case: Black Hollow
4292460.short_description: An old case closed due to lack of evidence resurfaces in 1993. Play as a dismissed detective, investigate the case, gather evidence, solve the mystery, and uncover the truth. Bringing justice to the town of Ridgemour and ending the uncertainty is in your hands.

4292470.title: Hidden Raccoons
4292470.short_description: Hidden Raccoons is a relaxing hidden object game where you search for raccoons hidden in colorful pixel art worlds. With no timer, you can play at your own pace and enjoy every area.

4292790.title: Qelochia
4292790.short_description: On a secret arctic research base, a scientist, soldier, AI, and eldritch beast struggle for happiness. A short visual novel about love and pain set in an alternate history where humanity is ruled by eldritch gods.

4293110.title: Silan 隐匿深渊的魔物娘之岛
4293110.short_description: 本游戏为魔物娘收集魂系RPG，主打战斗与魔物娘收集，借鉴了兰斯X的战斗系统基础上加入了个人喜欢的元素：韧性处决、卡牌充能、物品使用、魔物娘捕捉、以及新的攻击BUFF系统。地图采用了塔式探索的结构，当然其中还会有大量的隐藏和墓地以供探索来确保内容量。当然，除了可爱的魔物娘以外还有来自深渊的恐怖敌人(笑)，养成属于你的魔物娘并战胜恐怖的敌人吧。本游戏预计2026年内做完，敬请期待吧！当然，也感谢看到这里的你。。。

4293130.title: The Kendama Challenge: 100 Players
4293130.short_description: Help the challengers who appear one after another succeed at kendama. Simply land the ball on the large cup for 100 people in a row. However, if even one person fails, it's game over. Can you overcome various pressures and guide all 100 people to success!?

4293180.title: 天魔传奇
4293180.genre: Adventure, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4293180.short_description: Demon Legend is a cute cartoon-style tower defense strategy game. Centered around the "Monster Onslaught" core gameplay, it blends character collection, team composition, and wave defense elements to create a relaxed yet strategic tower defense adventure experience.

4293220.title: SIONIC LOVE
4293220.short_description: sionic Love is a visual novel game in which you search for goals and love by moving between the viewpoints of two main characters in the world of cyberpunk. Explore the world, talk to different characters, and reach different endings.

4293310.title: Arai-san Mansion Exploration Game: Incarnation
4293310.short_description: "Arai-san Mansion Exploration Game: Incarnation" is a command-based text adventure based on the "Kemono Friends". As an investigator, explore an eerie mansion with astronomical floors. Use your skills and Ally cards to survive anomalies, and find a way to contain the mystery.

4293340.title: Sweet Prison
4293340.short_description: Sweet Prison - A simple and beautiful puzzle game themed around prison, depicting the daily lives of five pretty and adorable prison girls. It features relaxing background music, and after completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4293410.title: Critical Interrogator: Messiah Hunt
4293410.short_description: Seven murders in motion by a killer calling himself the Messiah. Interrogate witnesses, spot contradictions in their testimonies, and build a criminal profile piece by piece in this detective thriller where every word is evidence.

4293590.title: The Wrong Floor
4293590.short_description: Trapped in a mysterious hotel, you must observe, decide, and take risks. Use your points and abilities to descend faster… if you dare.

4293780.title: Rotting Valentine
4293780.short_description: Rotting Valentine is a gothic action slasher set in a cursed Victorian England. Wield a cursed scythe and firearm, hunt the undead, grow in power, and uncover forbidden desires in a godforsaken land.

4293860.title: Busted - Deal or Die
4293860.short_description: Busted is a 2d roguelike dungeon crawler based on blackjack mechanics. Explore different chambers, equip special abilities and use unique cards to your advantage as you descend further into the unknown.

4293970.title: Alstan
4293970.short_description: Alstan is a 3rd-person action-adventure game set in the merciless deserts of Idnan, inspired by Amazigh and Tuareg cultures. You play as Alstan, a warrior cursed by the Mark of the Desert, a power that allows him to control sand but slowly turns him into one of the very Djinns he hunts.

4294030.title: Tavernia
4294030.short_description: Tavernia is a 2-4 player strategy board game set in a medieval tavern. You play on a hexagonal board where you answer trivia questions to claim neutral territory. To take territory from opponents, you challenge them in 1v1 minigame duels like typing races, word puzzles, and reaction tests.

4294040.short_description: Start as a small-time filler and work your way up to kingpin. Buy CC info, print blanks, card online and launder your money through crypto. But watch out: the more you scam, the more heat you get. Play solo or co-op with up to 8 players.

4294140.title: Cybro
4294140.short_description: Government gig becomes personal. Return to a corrupt city on a contract to recover stolen software, only to uncover a conspiracy. Fight back with guns, stealth, hacking, and raw action as betrayal hits close and escape becomes the only way out.

4294260.title: Ashentia Hauntings
4294260.short_description: Ashentia Hauntings is a 2D top-down survival horror game based on the story of a paranormal enthusiast called Noah, who decided to investigate the various haunted locations of Ashentia, a place that is surrounded by hills and forests.

4294320.title: FINIS ACTUS
4294320.short_description: Unveil the doors of a mansion haunted by a tragic past in the gloomy shadows of 1891 London. Finis Actus is a Victorian-era psychological thriller focused on environmental storytelling and deep atmosphere. Do you have the courage to find the truth before the final curtain falls?

4294340.title: Chesto: A chess-like adventure
4294340.short_description: Explore a cozy town and challenge its residents in a chess-inspired game with custom pieces.

4294370.title: Shroud of the Woods
4294370.short_description: A psychological horror about searching for your missing dog in a forest where the silence itself listens to your every breath from between the trees.

4294420.title: Ignition Point
4294420.short_description: Start as a rookie and rise to racing stardom in this skill‑driven arcade‑sim hybrid. Master diverse disciplines, conquer a deep career mode, and compete solo or online to carve your path to motorsport glory.

4294880.title: LevelFighters
4294880.short_description: LevelFighters is a competitive two-player platform game in which each player designs a level and then challenges the other to complete it faster. The mechanics combine creativity and pure skill, making each game unique and fun.

4294930.title: Unbelievers
4294930.short_description: A psychological horror FPS where time fractures between 1986 and an alternate 1919. Fight nightmarish creatures, uncover a dark conspiracy, and struggle to reclaim your place in time.

4294980.title: Binary Breach
4294980.short_description: One player navigates high-speed 3D parkour while the other overrides physics and hacks the environment to clear the path. Team up to breach an ultra-secure crypto wallet. Speedrun the infiltration to maximize your time in the extraction phase and secure the ultimate payout.

4295100.title: Pegture
4295100.short_description: Pegture is a peg solitaire-themed roguelike, deck-building game. You will get the best peg solitaire experience by building your deck, enhancing your pegs, performing frenetic combos, and reaching the highest score.

4295320.title: Crown Of Silence
4295320.short_description: Crown Of Silence is a 2D Metroidvania adventure with Souls-like mechanics set in a gothic world. Forge your own combat style with diverse equipment, challenge ruthless bosses, and uncover the dark secrets of a silenced kingdom through environmental storytelling.

4295490.title: Blue Hawaii Aniki's Small Celebration vol.1
4295490.short_description: Experience a fictional Japanese radio show as a visual novel. Two mismatched hosts — a self-proclaimed film director and an energetic DJ — celebrate life's small victories. Features original music, sound effects, and witty social commentary wrapped in comedy.

4295520.title: 美少女不想让你死
4295520.short_description: "Pretty Girls Don't Want You to Die" is a game that combines strategy tower defense, survivor-like elements, and auto-battler mechanics. you, an lone hero who, in a desperate situation, unexpectedly receives a blessing from pretty girls, narrowly escaping death.

4295540.title: Critter Bonk
4295540.short_description: A cute incremental clicker where you bonk bugs for profit. Earn money, unlock upgrades, acquire powerful skills, and recruit helpers to automate the bonking until you’re truly unstoppable. Satisfying and Relaxing!

4295630.title: lewd control
4295630.short_description: Moderate a fictional social media app. Approve or reject posts based on platform policies, avoid mistakes, and navigate workplace Relationships.

4295690.title: Zombies & Battery
4295690.short_description: A sound-driven co-op survival game for up to 4 players. Sneak past zombies that hunt by sound, manage hunger and injuries, scavenge supplies, and repair a vehicle to escape. Every action makes noise, and every run takes place in a procedurally generated map.

4295710.title: 双龙传奇
4295710.genre: Action, Adventure, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4295710.short_description: Twin Dragon Legend is a light-strategy idle adventure game. Centered around the core gameplay of "auto-battle + progression & enhancement," it blends dungeon challenges, character development, and reward collection elements to create a relaxed, low-grind adventure experience.

4295750.title: Chainbound
4295750.short_description: Chainbound is a brutal co-op climbing game where one mistake can pull everyone down.

4295920.title: Impossible Cave
4295920.short_description: Explore down 100 floors of a mysterious, ancient cave, fighting enemies turn based RPG style, but resetting all levels and items and starting all over if you fail roguelike style. Can you beat the cave's challenge?

4269630.title: Dilemory
4269630.short_description: Dilemory is an RPG where the main character explores the environment, solves puzzles, and tries to understand what is happening in order to survive.

4269830.title: Quantum Brain
4269830.short_description: A turn-based hex-grid strategy game where tactical combat meets knowledge challenges. Battle an advanced AI on a dynamic 2D/3D board, trigger special hexes, and answer real questions to gain the advantage—or pay the price. Strategy, learning, and pressure collide in Quantum Brain Strategy.

4270070.title: Apocalypse Cult Leader
4270070.short_description: The end of the world is here, but you're still alive and able to survive. You're the chosen one. Or at least, so you believe. Craft, do quests, make love, and convert the people within your reach to your cult. You are the savior in this post-apocalypse world.

4270390.title: D1AL-ogue
4270390.short_description: Become a mechanic in a flashy cyberpunk city, repairing the broken bodies and minds of androids. Rotate the circular puzzle 'D1AL' to craft and tighten parts, and face the city's secrets before 'Polar Night Day,' the longest night of the year. Every dial you turn becomes a dialogue with them.

4270610.title: idle:Doodle Realm
4270610.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4270610.short_description: Idle: Doodle Realm is an idle Boss Rush game with equipment-driven RPG elements. You build, your units fight and push forward automatically. All you need to focus on is building & unit combos, relic & equipment collecting, talents & upgrades.

4270630.title: In My Bubble •°
4270630.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4270630.short_description: In My Bubble is a 3D action-adventure platformer featuring a child in a cute earflap hat on a quest to save the sheep of the dream world. Explore a world overtaken by darkness, rescue corrupted sheep, and restore the lost morning using the power of bubbles!

4270640.title: Super Rocket Monkey
4270640.short_description: Ooo aa AAA ooo AAA! Control a rocket-powered monkey through a brutal top-down Foddian platformer in search of the ancient Golden Banana.

4270680.title: Icebound Secrets 2: Soul Hunter
4270680.short_description: Step into the role of a detective in a gripping mystery, save stolen souls, and uncover dark secrets!

4270740.title: Island Of Ash
4270740.short_description: A 3rd-person action-adventure inspired by cult classics. Explore a unique, solo-developed world and vanquish foes in intense battles. Level up your hero and reveal the secrets of a civilization that crumbled into dust five centuries ago.

4270800.title: No Mana, Just Dice
4270800.short_description: Zero Mana. Massive Debt. No Mana, Just Dice is a tactical turn-based roguelike. Play as a dropout witch who needs dice just to take a single step! Use your limited dice to maneuver and attack, outsmart your bad luck, and seize the wish-granting scroll to rewrite your fate.

4270980.title: Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming
4270980.short_description: 👑 Enter a royal fantasy in Hentai Clicker: Celestia is streaming ✨ Click to collect ❤️, unlock elegant royal outfits, and enjoy a playful, addictive clicker experience with a mischievous princess who loves to be admired.

4271350.title: Buy Happiness
4271350.short_description: The deckbuilding life-sim. Buy and upgrade cards to build combos capable of churning through your entire deck in a single turn! Sculpt your deck into an absurd money-making machine to climb the economic ladder and become the richest person in the galaxy!

4271910.title: The Shift
4271910.short_description: In the dead of night while everyone sleeps, your shift begins. Your job is to sit before the monitors in the surveillance room and check the CCTV screens. Now that everyone has gone home, nothing in this factory should be moving.

4271950.title: NIGHTHAWK
4271950.short_description: Relentless fights, constant momentum, and nonstop action. Jump in, pull the trigger, and stay alive long enough to dominate the match. Welcome to NIGHTHAWK.

4272100.title: Grass
4272100.short_description: Grab your tools and team up in a co-op lawn care simulator focused on fast, satisfying teamwork. Mow, trim, water, burn, and clean up sprawling properties together while pushing for the top of the mower app rankings.

4272290.title: Sanctum Ruins
4272290.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4272290.short_description: A strategic roguelike deck-builder. Build your deck, master 8 unique classes, and conquer the Sanctum in quick 30-60 minute sessions. Free to play, includes premium classes.

4272370.title: Coal Duty
4272370.short_description: YOU HAVE BEEN ASSIGNED TO COAL DUTY. DESCEND INTO THE DEPTHS, CARRY OUT MINING OPERATIONS WITH UP TO 4 WORKERS, AND FULFILL THE STATE’S DEMANDS TO SETTLE YOUR DEBT.

4272480.title: Stickers, please
4272480.short_description: Decorate a fantasy location with sticker packs. Place or rearrange anything however you want, there are no rules.

4272730.title: Block Shot
