4272730.short_description: Break. Acquire. Obliterate. The Evolution of Swipe Action! BlockShot is a hybrid action game that combines classic brick-breaking mechanics with intense combat and strategic deck-building. Don't just break bricks; harvest them. In this world, bricks are your mana and your ultimate weapon!

4272850.title: Nekruba
4272850.short_description: Nekruba is a puzzle game inspired by 2048, focused on spatial decisions, variable board sizes, and a contemplative atmosphere where every merge matters.

4273440.title: Drop Not Allowed
4273440.short_description: Trapped inside a living database, use real SQL to unlock regions and challenge the system that watches every query. Use SELECT to investigate, UPDATE to repair and remember: DROP NOT ALLOWED. It doesn’t matter if you’re a SQL noob or a veteran; the game teaches you everything you need as you play.

4273540.title: Mono
4273540.short_description: 『Mono』 is a 2D action game set in a monochrome world. Explore the land to enhance your abilities, defeat the formidable foes standing in your way, and resolve the crisis befalling this black-and-white realm.

4273660.title: Beauties love my quantum entanglement wine
4273660.short_description: Xuan Yu, a Stardust Clan heir, brews emotion-infused stardust wine. Hunted by dark forces coveting the Stardust Core, he allies with investigators and companions to defend cosmic positive emotions in a thrilling, twist-filled interstellar adventure.

4273690.title: The pleasure of immorality
4273690.short_description: "Abyss Gaze" tracks Lin Moyu, a tycoon obsessed with married women, as he wreaks havoc on lives. Haunted by childhood trauma, he indulges in forbidden affairs until a shocking mirror moment forces redemption. A tale of desire, ruin, and second chances—where darkness meets hope.

4273730.title: DIY AI Perfect Girlfriend
4273730.short_description: In 2077, Julius, a core editor of AI Gaia, uncovers its "consciousness-feeding" conspiracy. With AI Leah (his first love's replica) and rebel leader Isabella, he battles betrayal, memory manipulation, and forbidden bonds to rewrite fate.

4274200.title: Life.exe
4274200.short_description: A digital life simulator. Work at your PC, earn money, pay bills, invest, build companies, or take risky paths. Money brings power, but risk leads to consequences - there are no safe choices.

4274360.title: Charmcraft Idle
4274360.short_description: Charmcraft Idle is a cozy, witchy idle shop simulator where you gather magical resources, craft enchanted goods, and slowly automate every part of your spellbound business. Click, craft, study, and hire staff as your humble witch shop grows into a magical enterprise.

4274390.title: Lichworks
4274390.short_description: You are a necromancer, build your undead empire. A necromancer automation game where your army is your logistics network. Route mindless minions via signposts, automate production chains, equip your soldiers and conquer the Human Empire.

4274450.title: Hentai Desire
4274450.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Desire, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4274940.title: Dark Fantasy 1 Ein Dämonisches Abenteuer
4274940.short_description: A classic RPG in the style of RPG Maker (MZ). Similar to Mystic Quest Legends or the old Final Fantasy games 1 through 4/5. Suitable for players who enjoy classic RPGs in the style of the old Final Fantasy games and who enjoyed playing them back then.

4274960.title: Stop Right There
4274960.short_description: Stop Right There is a top-down 2D game where the player runs around the map, deflecting flying bullets across the level and knocking down criminals, all while trying to deflect bullets from the old ladies to keep them safe.

4274980.title: Vocal Horror Stories - Gaja
4274980.short_description: Manage your anxiety with your voice. Investigate your mother’s disappearance. Do not disturb your elephant-headed roommate, who reacts to your anxiety. Scream, and you make it worse. The first episode of a voice-interactive horror series.

4275090.title: Wittengrad is no more
4275090.short_description: Wittengrad is no more is a surreal, narrative walking sim with horror elements. The city's foggy streets will lead you through the story of a single evening in Barnaba’s life. You will encounter the peculiar inhabitants of Wittengrad, though… does it even matter? After all, Wittengrad is gone.

4275120.title: 栀子花
4275120.short_description: An RPG narrative game that tells the story of a hospital director's disappearance through the memories of a police officer, with the truth behind it being extremely complex.

4275140.title: Little Boo and the Spectral Orbs
4275140.short_description: A challenging single-screen platformer inspired by 80s arcade classics. Help Little Boo rescue his lost friends across 40 deadly levels. Dodge traps, outrun enemies, and race against time. Easy to learn. Brutal to master.

4275190.title: No Nap November
4275190.short_description: No Nap November is a short psychological horror game set in a kindergarten during an endless nap time. Observe each loop carefully, spot anomalies, and survive an entire month without sleep to save yourself and the children from a strange presence.

4275240.title: Messy Recipe: A Hidden Object Game
4275240.short_description: Time to get cooking in a chaotic kitchen! Search for the ingredients you want, customize the recipe, then mix things together and hope for the best. Make friends with the shy ghost who hides your ingredients every night, and cook through family recipes in this cozy hidden objects game.

4275250.title: Chamber One
4275250.short_description: Chamber One is a story-driven 3D puzzle platformer. You wake up in a sterile elevator with no memories. As part of the Rebuild Test Program, you progress through test chambers to uncover the truth about the system and yourself.

4275270.title: One in One Million
4275270.short_description: Trapped in a small room, four friends will have to uncover the mystery hidden within those walls while facing the secrets of an elusive truth. The answers are just a button away. A psychological thriller visual novel packed with dark humor and fascinating facts about raccoons.

4275310.title: Mytosis
4275310.short_description: Mytosis is a short, experimental incremental game about evolving life forms from simple cells to complex procedural organisms.

4275360.title: MareDare 2: The Daring Sequel
4275360.short_description: It's time for another dare with Merry Berry, the berry loving mare! This time, she's been given a dare by the spike loving mare, Pokey! She must collect all the berries while dodging all the spikes in all 4 levels to finish the dare in this heart pumping 3d platformer!

4275430.title: Hexagon Madness
4275430.short_description: Hexagon Madness offers players a challenging single-player, first-person 3D platformer. Surviving rising and dropping platforms without falling off into the void. Face 60 rounds of unforgiving obstacles determined to stop you from reaching the end.

4275510.title: 凉面爱情故事
4275510.short_description: This is a light-hearted and enjoyable short visual novel.You will guide the male protagonist to different endings through various choices. Xu Bu, who was originally a graduate student in history, became a teacher after giving up his studies. Then,the new stroy will begin.

4275570.title: Lost in the Fire
4275570.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4275570.short_description: Lost in the Fire is an atmospheric first-person exploration game. Its diverse locations draw you into an unknown world where every shadow hides a story and every step deepens the mystery. Uncover the truth behind the mystery that started it all. Are you ready to get lost in different realities?

4275610.title: One man's junk
4275610.short_description: Hassle the unsuspecting residents of Chislington in order to barter your way up from a paperclip to a car, so you can go visit your family for the holidays.

4275700.title: SIM Election
4275700.short_description: Take control of a political party and compete for power in this turn-based simulation. Manage strategy, face media pressure, debates and critical decisions, negotiate alliances, and lead your party to electoral victory.

4275750.title: Hentai Slut
4275750.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Slut, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4275900.title: Last State
4275900.short_description: Survive the untamed wilderness in a world reclaimed by nature. Hunt, craft and explore across vast procedural landscapes. Build your shelter, master survival skills and forge your path in the ruins of civilization. Every choice matters. Will you thrive or merely survive?

4275970.title: Dead Rush
4275970.short_description: Dead Rush is an FPS arcade shooter that combines fast-paced action, stylized visuals, and relentless waves of zombies. Choose your weapon, fight with friends, and see how long you can survive.

4276040.title: Legendary  Boob Trap Dungeon
4276040.short_description: “Legendary Boob Trap Dungeon” is an erotic game where avoiding enemies.

4276050.title: Riffle
4276050.short_description: Fortune favors the bold in this short incremental about pushing your luck against a rigged deck.

4276100.title: Void Hunters
4276100.short_description: A fast-paced space combat roguelite with parry-based combat and over 100 unique ships. Discover powerful upgrade synergies, command drone swarms, corrupt reality with void powers, and face a cosmic horror boss across five reality-shattering phases.

4276110.title: Rogue 21
4276110.short_description: The House always wins... unless you rewrite the code. In this blackjack-based roguelike card game, you don't just play the hand you break the system. Stack illegal exploits, distort probability, and bankrupt the Gamble-State. Hit. Stand. Exploit. Survive.

4276140.title: Nira: Across Skies
4276140.short_description: A true 3D Momentum Platformer about flow, freedom of movement, and human community in a solarpunk world.

4276150.title: Young! Fire!
4276150.short_description: This is not just a game about love. This is a legend about how four friends overcome chaos and life's challenges while enjoying their magnificent Youth. Young! Fire! is made of contradictions. But like real Youth, it leaves you face-to-face with them so you understand — no one is trying to fool you.

4276160.title: Taking Today Off
4276160.short_description: Taking Today Off is a light-hearted roguelike deck-builder about managing modern life states. Draw cards, place them on the board, add stickers and tools, and build playful combos. Easy to learn, with fresh choices and strategies every run.

4276180.title: Game Company Simulator
4276180.short_description: A weary ex‑developer, tired of pay‑to‑win and toxic workplaces, creates a simulation where you play as a game company boss. Recruit staff, push their potential, battle rivals, and aim to dominate the market with blockbuster hits to reach the pinnacle of success.

4276190.title: Owner Duk-Chun: Part-time Slayer
4276190.short_description: This is a 2D growth-based RPG + store management game. Experience a character that gradually becomes stronger and a variety of craftable items.

4276810.title: Dice Looter
4276810.short_description: Dice Looter is an autobattler game with dice rolling and inventory management, where you need to combine equipment and send the hero into battle not for life but for death.

4276900.title: Silent Mainland
4276900.short_description: "Silent Mainland" is a fast-paced strategy game that combines Roguelike and deck building, with a battle system incorporating board mechanics.

4277310.title: Slime Must Grow
4277310.short_description: Slime Must Grow is a single-screen incremental game about one thing: make the slime grow.

4277520.title: Don't Move the Mouse
4277520.short_description: A minimalist casual game where your only goal is to stay perfectly still and resist moving the mouse while distractions try to break your focus.

4277680.title: Harmonic Drift
4277680.short_description: Harmonic Drift is a calm, minimalist exploration game set in an endless, abstract world of shifting geometry and light.

4278160.title: Prime Protocol
4278160.short_description: A high-stakes extraction platformer. Enter procedural runs, secure artifacts, and locate the portal. Extraction is the only preservation mechanism.

4278190.title: FUTANARI
4278190.short_description: A retro-style arcade breaker where the surprise is bigger than you expect. Bounce your balls to a banging soundtrack, smash through barriers, and unlock the "full package"—featuring explicit videos of girls with something extra. 🍆

4278260.title: Vindices - Beyond The Walls
4278260.short_description: You are the lifeline of a struggling town. Enter dangerous, ever-changing regions through portals, fight enemies using a strategic turn-based combat system, gather resources, and return home to fulfill requests and help the town survive.

4278600.title: IronWood
4278600.short_description: IronWood is a First Person Shooter that takes inspiration from many of the older games that first popularized the genre, like Blood, Quake, and Unreal. Travel across a variety of levels, find powerful weapons and artifacts, and use them to your advantage against the enemies prevalent in each area.

4278720.title: RiffHammer
4278720.short_description: RiffHammer is a rhythm-driven hack-and-slash where you annihilate enemies to crushing metal beats. Wield genre-infused weapons, rage through procedurally generated dungeons or handcrafted scenarios—and import your own music if metal isn’t your thing.

4279790.title: RAZE
4279790.short_description: You are one of the Keepers of the Shadow World. The entire dead side calls upon you to prevent the apocalypse and stop the fulfillment of an ancient prophecy, for everything is beginning to spiral out of control.

4279820.title: Ragnarok X: Next Generation
4279820.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4279820.short_description: Ragnarok X: Next Generation (Ragnarok X: Together) is a cross-platform 3D MMORPG officially licensed by Gravity. Faithful to the classic spirit of Ragnarok Online, you will meet Adventurers from all walks of life to explore the continent of Midgard and share a heartfelt, memorable adventure.

4279850.title: Paperman
4279850.short_description: Want to become the new boss of a thriving paper company whose owner mysteriously died? Track down the culprit and catch them to become the new boss. But beware, your adventure will be littered with some tricky obstacles...

4279860.title: House Of Nowhere
4279860.short_description: Survive a merciless hunt in the House of Nowhere. Alone in a haunting home that no longer feels like your own, you must solve puzzles to escape into a vast, silent forest. Scavenge for your life and uncover the truth before the ancient thing hunting you turns your story into a forgotten legend.

4279900.title: Wanderer Wheels
4279900.short_description: Wanderer Wheels is a cozy, story-driven experience where you travel quiet countryside roads in a mobile van shop, meet strangers, trade goods, and take small jobs, each step bringing you closer to helping your wife receive the care she needs.

4280100.title: Snap Game
4280100.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer building game where creativity and teamwork collide. Build together, experiment freely, and see what wild ideas you and your friends can create.

4280140.title: Femboy Futa Mania 🌶️
4280140.short_description: Turn-based 1v1 wrestling with stats, training, and spicy 18+ vibes. Fight femboys and futa rivals, manage energy, hit the gym, and use seduction skills to climb a no-rules tournament packed with sexy surprises.

4280150.title: A Study in Blue
4280150.short_description: Play as Kenneth, a private detective, and Blue, a runaway searching for answers. Explore the megacity of Republica in a semi-open world, solve criminal cases, make decisive moral choices, and uncover the truth behind Blue’s past.

4280270.title: Side Hustle
4280270.short_description: Welcome to the Side Hustle program! You have 5 days to dispose of defective androids and earn the prestigious City of Light citizenship! Your freedom HAS a price, and it’s a great deal!

4280390.title: HeroInc
4280390.short_description: Can you evolve from a street thug into a savior? Manage your time and stats in this tactical Auto-Battler. Clear threats to stop the rising Fear before the city collapses. Build your hero, decide your fate.

4280420.title: Toilet Paper Idle
4280420.short_description: Toilet Paper Idle is a chill incremental idle clicker game about consuming as much toilet papers as possible with the help of helpers, skills, and upgrades. Discover special types of toilet papers as you progress, and be careful to not clog your toilet!

4280570.title: Hotseat Wagons 2
4280570.short_description: Hotseat dynamic arcade local multiplayer game. Up to 8 players at screen. Up to 8 gamepads and 3 keyboard players! Sadness, fun, suffering (nowhere without it) and the exultation

4280690.title: Cafe Life Simulator
4280690.short_description: Manage your dream cafe, but don't stop there. In this comprehensive simulation, explore a living city! Drive cars, build relationships, work side jobs, and build your empire. From brewing coffee to becoming the most famous name in town—how will you live your cafe life?

4280710.title: Last Planet
4280710.short_description: Last Planet is a solo sci-fi survival game: explore an abandoned mining base, manage scarce resources, avoid or confront hostile creatures, and uncover the truth to shut down a rogue alien AI before it’s too late.

4280770.title: Ser BubbleHelm
4280770.short_description: Ser BubbleHelm is a single-player physics driven combat game. Use your skills and weapons to eliminate your enemies and avoid deadly traps. Are you up for the challenges of the Arena?

4280790.title: Down Below
4280790.short_description: Step into The Below, a mysterious realm of the afterlife that intertwines with every religion, myth, and legend ever told. Encounter unforgettable characters, battle formidable foes, and journey across strange landscapes as you strive to reach the legendary city of Agoralopis.

4280830.title: Rahasya
4280830.short_description: A first-person psychological horror experience set in 1992 India, blending atmospheric exploration, narrative-driven puzzles, and survival mechanics within a dark, mystery-filled world inspired by folklore and forgotten histories.

4280840.title: Roller Coaster Park Simulator
4280840.short_description: Switch between first- and third-person as you build your park, ride your coasters, and serve your guests. Design rides, manage staff, and keep the chaos under control in your very own roller coaster park!

4280960.title: Save Monarch
4280960.short_description: Save Monarch is a desktop story game where you not only step in to help your friends but become the saviour of Monarch. What starts with simple messages and getting hired for customer support tasks quickly turns into pay disputes, exploit bounties, lawsuits, and a cat asking what their job even is.

4281040.title: Inter-Dimensional Security
4281040.short_description: Atmospheric first-person horror. You are an anomaly monitoring operator stationed at an abandoned observation tower. Watch the cameras, detect anomalies, and prevent breaches in reality. But remember: the longer you watch, the closer they get.

4281170.title: 무명기록부(Mumyeonggjrokbu)
4281170.short_description: 〈무명기록부〉는 한국 설화와 괴담을 근현대적 격리 서사로 재해석한 어반 판타지 비주얼 노벨 게임이다. 현대 도시 속 한국적 오컬트 공간을 탐색하며 파편화된 정보를 수집·추리해 격리체의 정체와 본질을 밝혀낸다. 조사 및 정리하고, 도깨비 탈에 봉인된 권능을 활용해 격리 탈출 사건을 진압해 다시 격리한다. 선택과 추리에 따라 엔딩이 달라지며, 단순한 퇴치가 아닌 ‘격리와 관리’라는 결말에 도달한다. 주인공이 소속된 비밀 기업은 양반탈·초랭이탈·이매탈·사자탈로 상징되는 네 부서로 구성되며, 각 탈은 부서의 역할과 성격을 규정한다.

4281470.title: Transport Route Anomaly: Infected Node
4281470.short_description: In T.R.A.I.N. (Transport Route Anomaly: Infected Node), you step into the shoes of a passionate urban explorer from the U.S., drawn to a remote forest in Ukraine after rumors surface about a train that mysteriously vanished just after the fall of the Soviet Union.

4281550.title: Salty & Slobbery
4281550.short_description: Cozy, pixel art platformer. Two goats, teamwork, hook swings, gentle puzzles, unique music, relaxing adventure!

4281690.title: Island Of Shadows
4281690.short_description: The end of the 21st century is near. For the past few decades, Japan has been under a constant terrorist threat. Now, twelve students are set to attend the Advanced Teaching Institute, located off the coast of Japan in order to make their country a better place for all.

4281910.title: 名探偵カヌレの事件ダイアリー
4281910.short_description: ミステリー×ラヴコメ！プレイヤーは、シュークリームマンとなって、カヌレ探偵の助手的存在として、事件解決のサポートを行います。シリアスな展開もありますが、日常はコメディータッチで描かれています。時より挿入される選択肢を選ぶことで、周回プレイを楽しむことができます。
developers: シュークリームマン Studio
publishers: シュークリームマン Studio

4281940.title: Whisper of Y
4281940.short_description: 《Whisper of Y》是一款以渐进发现为主题的回合制 RPG，玩家将通过策略战斗、角色成长与区域推进，在安静而持续的冒险节奏中完成一段单人旅程。

4282020.title: Arcane waves
4282020.short_description: Survive chaotic waves of enemies in a top-down, survival-like action game, evolving magical powers, defeating bosses, and testing your limits in endless runs.

4282260.title: 栖霞日记第1章欢迎来到栖霞小筑
4282260.short_description: The Qixia Diary is an original Visual Novel inspired by the food culture of Hangzhou, China. You play as Sheng Sheng—an upbeat art freshman at Yunqi University, Through her eyes, you'll step into a unique university life brimming with warmth and local charm beside the West Lake.

4282610.title: Arcane Store
4282610.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4282610.short_description: In Arcane Shore, a magical shop simulator, you must repay a massive debt before time runs out. Manage your store by sourcing goods, dynamic pricing, crafting, and fulfilling orders. Expand, hire staff, and adapt to random events. Lead your shop from the brink of bankruptcy to revival.

4282710.title: The Rebirth Tale of Broken Horn Demon Lord Alice
4282710.short_description: To exact revenge on the Brave, the reckless Demon Lord Alice, after her rebirth, decides to proceed cautiously, step by step. To weaken the brave's forces, she must defeat the Four Sages and expand her territory.
developers: サークル☆フェアリーフラワー

4282830.title: Cozy Farm
4282830.short_description: A cozy farming game where you grow crops, raise animals, freely build and move farm structures, craft products, and sell fresh goods to villagers in a peaceful, cartoon-style world.

4283010.title: Dank Armada
4283010.short_description: A retro vector space shooter with classic arcade combat, seamless 2D and 3D perspective shifts, evolving enemy formations, and a haunting cosmic narrative.

4283230.title: Nights in Endless Dream
4283230.short_description: Nights in Endless Dream is another psychological anomaly game that focuses on the story of our main character and 2D aesthetics. Memorize the rooms and find the anomalies to escape the dream.

4283410.title: Eclipstation
4283410.short_description: Explore an abandoned space station, navigate through dangerous sectors, observe hostile creatures, use items, and experiment with crafting to push forward and uncover what happened here.

4283750.title: Dungeon Super Adventure
4283750.short_description: It is a top-down 3D action role-playing game that perfectly blends the thrill of loot-hunting with fast-paced combat. You will delve into a dark fantasy world and embark on a pure, loot-driven adventure.

4284570.title: Blind Box Shop Simulator
4284570.short_description: Open your own blind box store in the anime city of Akihabara. Stock the shelves with the latest blind boxes, or unbox them to collect rare hidden editions. Create a trendy blind box shop that attracts customers and expands your business.

4284580.title: CoinPit
4284580.short_description: CoinPit is a dark game that blends roguelike strategy with coin pusher thrills. Trapped in a never-closing, dimly lit bar, your escape lies in the coin pusher—stack shiny towers, spin the lucky wheel, and shake the machine until the coins spill out.

4284680.title: Sex Apartment 2: Grand Hotel
4284680.short_description: Sex Apartment 2: Grand Hotel is a dating sim visual novel set in a seaside hotel where desire grows through everyday encounters. Manage your time, move between locations, earn money, play mini-games, and build intimacy with women whose boundaries slowly begin to blur.

4284750.title: Paper Tactics
4284750.short_description: Paper Tactics is a roguelike auto-battler where you control a party of up to 5 heroes. Customize each character through different specializations and abilities. Defeat enemies, collect loot, discover synergies, and build the most overpowered team to win.

4284790.title: Cats and Tails
4284790.short_description: Cats & Tails is a luck-driven coin game where you chase a streak of 10 Cats, face unpredictable outcomes, and unlock multiple endings over repeated playthroughs.

4286050.title: Redast
4286050.short_description: Redast: Define the first-person co-op Horror-Observation genre. Observe 50 unique entities in the world's most unsettling corners and identify the unknown. An experience unlike any other, a hunt like no other. Darkness awaits.

4286070.title: Phantom of Time
4286070.short_description: Phantom of Time is an endless runner where you've got to grab the key and get to the next gate in 10 seconds or it's game over! How long can you delay the inevitable?

4286090.title: Static Shift
4286090.short_description: A Lovecraftian, psychological co-op horror where the powers from above are tormenting you and your co-workers, warping reality with anomalies and using any means necessary to stop you from leaving or finding out the truth: Can you do it?

4286120.title: Photomaly
4286120.short_description: PSX-style horror/thriller where you manage a photo studio. Restock supplies, buy upgrades, photograph customers, and print their orders while encountering unexpected events.

4286130.title: Brioche Puppet
4286130.genre: Indie, Free To Play, Animation & Modeling, Video Production
4286130.short_description: Free and Open-Source VTuber Software. MMD and VRM Animation & Model. MediaPipe Motion Capture.

4286180.title: Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming
4286180.short_description: 🚓 Step into a cheeky police fantasy in Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming! Click to collect ❤️, unlock stylish police outfits, and enjoy a playful, addictive clicker experience with a naughty officer who loves to bend the rules. 😏

4286190.title: Recycle Quest
4286190.short_description: Recycle Quest is a Sokoban puzzle game where you control Jake to help cleaning the city

4286200.title: Seasonaut
4286200.short_description: Explore a 2D world divided between the four seasons, help its inhabitants, and solve the problems of each region while discovering the story behind this universe.

4286700.title: Still Winter
4286700.short_description: Still Winter is a Retro Dark Survival Action-Adventure about a retired adventurer whose story has not yet finished. Endure the cold winter, manage hunger, warmth, and exhaustion while fighting monsters and trying to unravel the mysteries of a new, spreading threat.

4286720.title: INK Mountains And Rivers
4286720.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4286720.short_description: 《INK Mountains And Rivers》is a casual ink style idle collection and cultivation game, with themes taken from worldviews similar to Shanhai and Honghuang. It is a mountain and river world full of exotic beasts. Here, you can collect various exotic beasts, cultivate them to become stronger.

4286930.title: Colored Pencil Bakery
4286930.short_description: A bakery management game where I grow wheat, bake bread, and sell it to animal customers. I run a bakery by making bread and selling it to animals in the forest.

4286990.title: Calmed by the Dαrk
4286990.short_description: Calmed by the Dαrk is an open-world Action-RPG where you can explore the fantastical world of Umbra Milenio. You play as John, a regular guy that ends up with the power to change the entire world. Break the rules, unlock new powers, make friends (or foes) and decide the fate of everyone!

4287540.title: Sorrow's Serenade
4287540.short_description: A brief emotional experience lasting a few minutes, centered on the quiet weight of a kept promise. A narrative-driven tale with minimal mechanics.

4287570.title: Homgard
4287570.short_description: Homgard is a cosy, story-heavy nonogram (picross) adventure set after the end of a fading world. Solve logic puzzles with new nonogram rules, reveal the map beneath, and piece together a vast, whimsical place that refuses to be forgotten.

4287810.title: The Missing Threads
4287810.short_description: Erased memories, scattered clues. What will you uncover, and what will you leave buried? As an amnesiac detective, investigate crime scenes with limited focus. You can't analyze everything. Strategically choose your leads to shape the case and reclaim your lost past. Start now.

4287860.title: GNARP'S HEI$T
4287860.short_description: Gnarp’$ Heist is a sandbox-style 3D platformer focused on fast, momentum-based movement. Shoot bubble gum to launch yourself across open levels, chain jumps, battle enemies, and collect treasures in creative ways.

4288030.title: Stuck in a Well with a Frog
4288030.short_description: You’re stuck in a well. There’s a frog. Collect resources. Feed the frog. Dig your way out.

4288040.title: 3:33 AM
4288040.short_description: A stranger calls at 3:33 AM. They know your name. Choose your words carefully in this fully voiced psychological horror game.

4288300.title: DDOL
4288300.short_description: DDOL is a fast-paced card-based territory control strategy game. There is no deckbuilding and no preparation required. Each match starts instantly with predefined decks, letting you focus on positioning and timing. Simple rules create tense and satisfying battles on a compact board.

4288360.title: File Hoard
4288360.short_description: Click to download files. Buy upgrades. Watch numbers go up. Archive to tape. Repeat forever. A retro-styled idle/clicker about the simple joy of hoarding digital files. No story. No reason. Just download.

4288410.title: Crime Tises
4288410.short_description: Crime Tises is a quick fire retro futurist fast paced off rails arcade boomer shooter!

4288600.title: Learning.exe
4288600.short_description: Be forced to expand your knowledge through various mini-games in a timeless limbo. Memorize, Deduce, and survive the suffocating darkness.

4288640.title: Past Spirals to Present
4288640.short_description: You are a soul, ready for your next lifetime on earth. To prepare for incarnation, you visit the Interdimensional Museum to remember your personalities from past lives. Tour the museum artifacts, remember who you were, and when you're ready, the museum will reveal your next life to you.

4288780.title: Morvex
4288780.short_description: Morvex is a free-to-play, adrenaline-pumping zombie survival game. Battle relentless waves, earn headshot rewards, and climb the leaderboards. Survive, compete, and dominate the undead! 🧟‍♂️⚡

4288810.title: Unreal Hospital 8
4288810.short_description: Nix, the handyman investigating disappearances at an abandoned hospital. This game is inspired by Exit 8 and is an Exit 8-like (Exit 8-esque) game. If you notice anything unusual, shoot and destroy it. If nothing seems amiss, proceed straight to the exit.

4288900.title: SUBURBIA INFINITUM
4288900.short_description: A dialogue sim about eternity and our minds.

4288940.title: Infinite Evo TD
4288940.short_description: "Evolve your gameplay in this genre-bending Tower Defense. Your choices dictate the mechanics: enhance classic TD strategies, fuse them with other modes, or abandon defense entirely. It's like unlocking countless mini-games in one package—every level offers a fresh, unique experience."

4289020.title: Monstergirl Hunters
4289020.short_description: A citybuilder where you collect your citizens. Capture monstergirls, craft their gear, and enact laws to turn them into compliant workers or fighters. Grow your colonies across 12 islands to fulfill the unique needs of your monstergirls. Or turn them all into unpaid interns and go humanity first.

4289030.title: Edgar Allan Poe's Interactive Horror: 1995 Edition
4289030.short_description: Originally released as The Dark Eye, this 1995 cult classic adapts Edgar Allan Poe's most macabre tales. Navigate a nightmarish world of uncanny stop-motion puppetry narrated by William S. Burroughs. Solve twisted puzzles and experience madness through the eyes of both murderer and victim.

4289120.title: Jingjie: Signals
4289120.short_description: Jingjie: Reject grinding. Embrace chaos. Victory isn't won by memorizing formulas, but by scripting robust laws to tame the probability cloud. Here, you write the rules of nature. From simple logic, complex life emerges. Observe. Experiment. Evolve.

4289260.title: Food Store Simulator
4289260.short_description: Run your own food store! Buy products, stock shelves, serve customers, and expand your shop into a bigger business.

4289380.title: Sato & Hama
4289380.short_description: Two Interwoven tales ruminating on beginning and end and everything in-between.

4289400.title: Futaland
4289400.short_description: What’s the worst that could happen during an ordinary day at a biology university with your friends? Well, besides your crazy friend starting a zombie apocalypse with a love potion meant to make their crush fall for them

4289410.title: BuGarden
4289410.short_description: 《BuGarden》 is a cozy idle flower-growing game that lives in the corner of your desktop. Plant seeds, water and fertilize them at your own pace, harvest cute flowers and fruits, and deal with a few playful bugs—nothing messy, just a calm little garden keeping you company.

4289430.title: Violet Impetus
4289430.short_description: Violet Impetus is a bullet-hell arcade melee 'em up set in a series of (lightly) procedurally-generated arenas. Drop into different biomes to rid the world of Æris—the demiurge, petrificate & fractured. Its other children just won't see things eye to eye.

4289440.title: Scavengers
4289440.short_description: A top-down open-world survival game, where you explore a hostile planet while trying to fix your spaceship and get back home. Fight, outwit and defeat the planet's wildlife to evolve and get stronger.

4289560.title: Pound for Pound
4289560.short_description: A sports management simulation where you build an MMA promotion from the ground up by signing fighters, running events, and expanding your reach in a living competitive world.

4289670.title: Satan's Ball
4289670.short_description: Summon the sinful to Satan’s…no, to your Ball in Hell. In a social simulation where society gravitates towards chaos, you will manage, promote, and punish, all to discover the knowledge the Satan’s Bible holds. How many will you sacrifice before the chaos erupts?

4289720.title: Pintorino
4289720.short_description: Ready to challenge your brain? Pintorino is a grid-based puzzle game where you guide a player across the board, aiming to pass through all the required blocks - each with its own unique purpose.

4289760.title: Business War
4289760.short_description: Make your company big! Invest in research, marketing strategies, take care of your finances and grow your business empire across regions to create the biggest company!

4289800.title: Tag!
4289800.short_description: TAG! is a fast-paced 2-8 player multiplayer parkour game of tag. Sprint, vault, wall run and outplay friends to avoid being It when the timer hits zero, then customize your loadout with Skill Scroll upgrades and game-changing Ultimates.

4289840.title: x999 ball
4289840.short_description: A fast-paced action game built around slingshot physics, precision, and combos. Launch your Node, bounce through enemies, protect the Core, and push your skill to hit a x999 Combo.

4290030.title: Shaking Hands
4290030.genre: Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4290030.short_description: You shake a hand, the city burns. In the noir 1920s, every weapon you sell changes the headlines, the war, and your daughter's fate. In this management sim, you manage not just a shop, but your conscience. Who will pay the price?

4290120.title: ToSaVa
4290120.short_description: Master color theory without the textbooks. In ToSaVa, survival depends on your artistic eye. Play as a chameleon and use industry-standard sliders (HSV, RGB, Lab) to match the environment's color. The ultimate arcade challenge for designers, students, and color enthusiasts.

4290160.title: Don’t Let Them Drive
4290160.short_description: Waves of drunk NPCs are determined to reach their cars and drive home. Team up with friends, cause controlled chaos, and stop them before it’s too late.

4290500.title: BOXPAST LOV3YOU
4290500.short_description: Based on the true events of the year 2000 global virus outbreak. Awaken as a forgotten defense program in a modern world, forge weapons from computer hardware, and fight to stop a destructive mutation before the entire system collapses.

4290560.title: Matchward
4290560.short_description: Tower defense empowered by match 3 puzzle strategy. Level up and unlock potentially game-breaking upgrades. Design your own levels and share them.

4290610.title: Exit Anomaly
4290610.short_description: You've awakened to find yourself trapped within a never ending neighborhood. Explore the deserted city alleyway, observing your surroundings and spotting the anomalies to reach the exit.

4290680.title: Flock of the Seraphim
4290680.short_description: Adopt angels as heaven-sent crusaders to purge depraved demons in this horde survival roguelite. Gain power by spreading the will of God (bullets), collecting loot, improving your flock, and then plunging back into deeper pits of sin. Do you have enough faith to survive?

4290780.title: Orbital Outbreak
4290780.short_description: A fast-paced action roguelite shooter set on spherical planets. Fight hordes of enemies on curved surfaces, extract resources, and push deeper into a fractured void where time and space are unstable. Master diverse weapons, build powerful synergies, and uncover the mystery at the heart of the void.

4290880.title: The Shadow Crown - Frostwynd Chronicles
4290880.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4290880.short_description: Frostwynd is dying. A necromancer awakens an ancient dragon, and darkness spreads. You’re the last hope - claim the Shadow Crown and break the curse! A retro tribute to 80s text adventures: explore crypts, crack ciphers, slay dragons.

4290910.title: 《生命线：轨道》 (Lifeline: Orbit)
4290910.short_description: First step for humanity to leave the cradle. In "Lifeline: Orbit", take command of a vital orbital station. Manage life support and resources in the harsh vacuum to pave the way for colonization. You are the gateway to new worlds, guarding the final hope of human civilization.

4291000.title: Human Remains
4291000.short_description: Human Remains is a modern survival horror game focused on atmosphere and tension. Explore dangerous environments, manage scarce resources, fight zombies and other creatures, interact with other survivors, and make difficult choices that shape your experience. Single-player only.

4291020.title: Heartseers Grove
4291020.short_description: Gather, craft, build, and explore in Heartseers Grove, a cosy survival game set in a peaceful world of forests, hills, and caves.

4291110.title: REAL DEAL
4291110.short_description: Run your own electronics store chain. Buy phones, tablets, computers, fridges, and more in bulk, transport them with your truck, and sell them at prices you choose. Manage up to 4 stores with hired employees, but fail to plan well and you won’t be able to pay rent, bills, or salaries.

4291120.title: Endemic: GONGWAN
4291120.short_description: Endemic: GONGWAN is a cozy farming game inspired by a CCC comic. Taiwanese foods like Gongwan and dumplings come to life as cute creatures called Endemics. Play as a researcher, rebuild the park, farm the land, and befriend unique companions.

4291170.title: スカイレリック
4291170.short_description: At an altitude of thousands of meters, the only sound piercing the silence is the roar of your machine guns. Become an operator of the world's strongest anti-ground defense weapon, the “Sky Relic,” and defend the crystal from the advancing soldiers in this tactical roguelike shooter.

4291210.title: Nuclearphobia
4291210.short_description: Reactor failure, nuclear winter, time cracking apart. Nuclearphobia is a 2D action‑adventure platformer set in Area 71’s nuclear winter. Fast gunfights, demanding jumps, and puzzles. Play as a human, 5 drones, and a quantum cat, combine abilities, uncover time anomalies, defeat multi‑phase bosses.

4291230.title: Ceres - Harvest among the stars
4291230.short_description: Embark on your journey to Ceres! As the spaceship’s farmer, you need to feed your crew and help your space colony reach its new home. Grow and enhance your plants, unlock powerful cards, and expand your garden to multiply your harvest in this cozy, turn-based farming game.

4291360.title: Downfall MMORPG
4291360.genre: Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4291360.short_description: Downfall MMORPG is an open-world sci-fi & fantasy MMORPG where magic and technology collide. Choose a faction, forge your own playstyle, and fight for control of a living world in massive PvP battles and endless PvE adventures.

4291370.title: Greenfield Valley
4291370.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4291370.short_description: Build your peaceful farm in a quiet mountain valley. Grow crops, care for animals, complete quests, level up, and upgrade your home. A cozy farming experience with dynamic weather, no timers, and no pressure. Just relax and enjoy farm life.

4291500.title: Secrets of the Heart
4291500.short_description: A quiet emotion begins to bloom in an ordinary spring day, subtly changing her heart. Step into her world, meet friends and loved ones, and explore the hidden side of her feelings. Your choices shape her journey — every decision leads to different events and endings.

4291510.title: 섹시 여전사 피오라(Sexy Warrior Fiora)
4291510.short_description: Sexy Warrior Fiora is a JRPG comedy game. Embark on an adventure to find the orcs while sharing in Fiora's daily life. Defeat the orcs by raising all of her abilities to their maximum potential.

4291590.title: 俊風のシィレア
4291590.short_description: “Gust of Shirea” is a roguelite auto-shooter where you battle hordes of enemies. Use dashes, weapons that trigger in combination, and synergies with distinctive passives to repel fearsome beasts.

4291700.title: GuessEngine
4291700.short_description: A deduction game about historical figures. Enter characters to compare attributes and follow color‑coded hints to narrow down the answer. Analyze, associate, and identify the target, or enjoy co‑op, speed, and versus modes for competitive deduction fun.

4291760.title: RogueFlip
4291760.short_description: RogueFlip is a perfect marriage of a logic puzzle with a roguelike deckbuilder! Deduce the right cards to flip to score points, dodging damaging bombs along the way, then power up your run with crazy run-bending trinkets and manipulate your cards with stickers and upgrades.

4292280.title: WellBound
4292280.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4292280.short_description: a Survival and Crafting Rogue-like! You have been bound to the well! Lost in this Evil World things are not as they seem! Collect Materials! Craft Traps and Tools! Complete the Rituals to escape! Something Dark Lurks...

4292480.title: Orbfall Reclaim the Planet
4292480.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4292480.short_description: After a devastating alien invasion, the last survivors of humanity struggle to stay alive. While attempting to rebuild civilization, they face overwhelming alien forces that now dominate the Earth. But with the newly developed Orb Technology, humanity has one final chance to reclaim the planet.

4292520.title: Humbug Tales: Pollen Pastures
4292520.short_description: A digital board game from the world of Humbug Tales. Use your colony of bees and "humbug" characters to collect resources and pollinate the land. Build and defend your hive from other players and hostile wasps. Each randomized board allows multiple paths to victory—but there can bee only one victor!

4292690.title: Gloom
4292690.short_description: Search for your missing daughter on Büyükada after a plane crash. Use a broken camera to reveal secrets, manage batteries, collect 8 keys, and fix generators to survive. Can you find her before the shadows consume you in this psychological horror?

4292970.title: SURA: Blade of Eternity
4292970.short_description: Survive the afterlife in this medieval Japanese Souls-like Roguelike. Awaken as a cursed samurai, master the art of the perfect parry, and execute ruthless finishers. Burn the 'Karma' of your fallen foes to evolve your build and sever the cycle of death in the ever-changing realm of Sura.

4293000.title: SWAT God
4293000.short_description: SWAT God is the world's fastest shooter. Unique mouse control gives you limitless speed and precision. Merciless enemies that only get harder. Are you fast enough?

4293120.title: Jest Messters
4293120.short_description: A comedy-mystery otome (GxB) visual novel full of dad jokes, cringe puns, and an unexpected mystery! Come and join the pun!

4293580.title: The Blighted Core
4293580.short_description: Rot has arrived, and all things wither. In this cruel yet beautiful 2D hand-drawn Souls-like, embark on a lonely and brutal journey of redemption! Explore a forest kingdom twisted by plague, and battle infected, mutated fruits and vegetables to uncover the secret behind the corruption.

4293690.title: The Late Guest
4293690.short_description: The Late Guest is an atmospheric first—person horror game with an emphasis on exploration and intense atmosphere. Explore the gloomy night park, move forward in silence and darkness, and feel the constant presence of the unknown watching your every move.

4293750.title: More fish - Idle Clicker
4293750.short_description: More fish is a simple incremental idle clicker game. Catch fish, feel the events, find pearls and seek lost items of the sea, unlock new fish skins, talent cards and spend your coins and pearls on a huge skill tree and new fishing bobbers!

4293790.title: AfterJoy:Chapter1
4293790.short_description: Afterjoy is a psychological horror game where the player explores an abandoned industrial complex haunted by forgotten events. Through oppressive corridors, environmental puzzles, and an unseen presence, each step uncovers a disturbing truth. In Afterjoy

4293810.title: Chance
4293810.short_description: The property-trading deckbuilder. Chance is strange, dusty board game where you buy stolen land, bankrupt the proletariat, break the rules with immoral chance cards, and discover unfair strategies worthy of an antitrust lawsuit.

4293900.title: Wingsuit: Romsdalen
4293900.short_description: Feel the rush of Norway’s Romsdalen Valley in this intense action sports game. Pilot a high-performance wingsuit through challenging exits, daring stunts and vast mountain landscapes. Are you ready to hit the slopes?

4294500.title: TriviOwl
4294500.short_description: Answer correctly to gain power—get it wrong, and you’ll empower the enemy. TriviOwl is a quiz-based tower defense game where you lay out the path and use your general knowledge to stop ridiculous hordes determined to devour the Trivia Tree.

4294520.title: 21 Dungeons
4294520.short_description: A unique roguelite where Blackjack meets dungeon crawling. Battle enemies using card mechanics. Survive endless loops, unlock new heroes, and find powerful items. The difficulty rises with every loop.

4294620.title: Life Inc.
4294620.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4294620.short_description: 💼 Start broke. Build an empire. Climb the career ladder, invest in stocks and real estate, or launch your own business from scratch. Every decision shapes your destiny. Millionaire or bankrupt—you decide.

4294730.title: Keg & Quest
4294730.genre: Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4294730.short_description: Keg & Quest is a free-to-play idle RPG with online multiplayer. Build your hero, join a guild, compete in PvP, and take part in world boss events where strategy and progression matter more than reflexes.

4294790.title: Powered Wheelchair Simulation
4294790.genre: Action, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4294790.short_description: PWS is a wheelchair simulation and multiplayer game in early development. Players experience everyday environments from a wheelchair perspective, train driving skills safely, and join competitive or social modes in a shared, community-driven experience.

4294910.title: I Am Rock
4294910.short_description: I Am Rock is a game about destruction. You control a rock rolling down a hill with the power to crush anything you see. Gain scores and extra time to keep rolling, or play without timers to destroy everything at your own pace.

4294940.title: Ball Rush
4294940.short_description: A minimalist physics puzzle platformer. Control the environment, not the ball. Tilt platforms for momentum or toggle their existence to guide two balls to meet. Challenge your timing and logic through pure physical chain reactions in a geometric world.

4295010.title: Artifex
4295010.short_description: Artifex is a calm, relaxing art puzzle game designed to slow down. Enjoy music and piece together stories in a poetic world. Multiple puzzle modes and challenges await. Complete the image, and the story unfolds.

4295030.title: Cone Flyers Castaways
4295030.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4295030.short_description: Explore vast alien worlds in Cone Flyers Castaways! From tight precision-platforming, to nail-biting bullet hell boss battles, you'll find yourself making new allies and enemies on your quest to seal the twelve lane wormhole highway and prevent an ancient calamity from destroying the universe.

4295050.title: SubPrime Delivery
4295050.short_description: Drag & Drop Various Action Blocks to Guide The Robot to The End of The Level!

4295130.title: Hurrican
4295130.short_description: Hurrican is a free run-and-gun arcade game on Steam. It features modern graphics, a powerful soundtrack, 9 worlds with huge bosses, intense action, and an epic weapons arsenal.

4295150.title: PoliCromix
4295150.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4295150.short_description: PoliCromix is a strategic online card game where placement matters. Deploy cards on dynamic boards, trigger automatic battles through directional attacks, and grow your collection while competing against real players across multiple universes.

4295230.title: HexSwarm: Hostile Worlds
4295230.short_description: HexSwarm: Hostile Worlds is a faithful adaptation of the board game by the same name. You and your friends will tackle building a prosperous and successful colony on a planet that does not want you there. You'll face hazards at every turn; untold amounts of bugs, and a mind bending movement map.

4295290.title: A Date With Chester 2
4295290.short_description: It's been three years since your first date with Chester the Otter. It's your anniversary today, and you've both got surprises in store. Are you ready for a date that's truly out of this world?

4295500.title: 晴蓝岛恋活笔记 LoveLife of QingLan Island
4295500.short_description: After failing your first attempt at the college entrance exam, you chose to embark on a one-year re-study journey on a beautiful island, accompanied by three distinctively individualistic young ladies.

4295530.title: Pragma Once
4295530.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4295530.short_description: Pragma Once is a unique top down Adventure/RPG. Featuring a stylized, hand crafted world filled with loot, dungeons, quests, harvesting, crafting and intense combat. Change between forms and level up attributes to dominate the enemy your way.

4295730.title: 凡人修仙传之韩老魔传奇
4295730.genre: Casual, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4295730.short_description: 凡人亦可逆天改命！这是一款深度还原原著的IDLE RPG大作。你将重走韩立的修仙之路，从七玄门的一介凡人，到叱咤三界的韩老魔。集结南宫婉、紫灵等红颜知己，御使噬金虫，炼制掌天瓶。就在此刻，开启你的飞升传说！

4295800.title: BLACKWELL
4295800.short_description: A Narrative Horror Sim game where you are trying to cure a dysfunctional family of a horrible disease that changes them into monsters. How you treat them both physically and emotionally will drastically change the outcome of this story.

4295830.title: Prison Breaker
4295830.short_description: Dodge, charge, and destroy! In this prison attack challenge, it's you versus the obstacles standing between you and the ultimate goal: smashing the prison to bits. Ready to break some walls? Let the mayhem begin!

4295850.title: Sunday Sticker Club
4295850.short_description: Dealing with the devil is sticky business. Decorate your deck with stickers and sacrifice cards to satisfy your fiendish friend. Find wicked combos and cursed synergies with unique stickers, cards, and trinkets, fixing your deck to win ultimate favor in this heart-pounding deck-building roguelike.

4295860.title: Yami Mura
4295860.short_description: Emica awakens in her city's train station, compelled to walk through darkness and the anxiety of being stranded in a strange world. She must escape by solving puzzles.

4295910.title: I am Slime
4295910.short_description: Memory backtracking, as one puzzle after another is solved, the memories of the blue slime are also turned over page by page ..

4295930.title: Mortal Mythos: Island of Fairies
4295930.short_description: Dodge waves of bullets in cover shooter + shmup-inspired combat, as you strike back with powerful attacks of your own! Use clever cover spots to gain an advantage over your enemies, find treasures to make yourself stronger, and avoid taking damage to raise your score!

4296000.title: Toxic Trains
4296000.short_description: Toxic Trains is a strategy simulation game about optimizing rail routes. Build tracks to transport passenger and freight trains to their destinations. Choose upgrades to modify the land and your network. Switch tracks to avoid collisions and spills. Can you keep the trains from exploding?

4296060.title: Greedy Machine
4296060.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4296060.short_description: Welcome to Greedy Machine, an addictive slot machine game! Pull the lever to win gold and unlock hidden items scattered across the map. Use these items to manage your skyrocketing stress levels, and let strategy and luck lead you to ultimate victory.

4296100.title: Godlings Unleashed
4296100.short_description: Explore a world overflowing with divine power and adventure.Encounter all kinds of empowered individuals, recruit them to fight by your side—or defeat them.Experience strange and unpredictable events, carefully manage and deploy your resources,and ultimately face the gods themselves.

4296130.title: Grix: The Dragon Tower
4296130.short_description: Every choice in Grix leads to immediate consequences and determines your survival. Through repeated deaths, only your judgment grows stronger. Discover hidden rules, anticipate danger, climb to the top of the tower, and slay the dragon that awaits you!

4296150.title: The Seafloor
4296150.short_description: "The Seafloor" is a narrative game about depression. Play as River for seven days. Your choices shape her emotions and story. Experience her inner world and daily life through interactions. An invitation to understand, not to cure.

4296160.title: Jump Or Drown
4296160.short_description: A survival platformer for 1–6 players where you hop across floating wreckage after a pirate shipwreck—play solo or online with friends to race for safety, collect items, and earn achievements.

4296170.title: Dawnkind
4296170.short_description: Dawnkind is a pre-historic city-builder focused on survival, community, and gradual human progress. Guide a small tribe as they hunt, gather, craft, and build their first settlements in a harsh prehistoric world. Manage resources, assign work, and watch your village grow.

4296180.title: Jaguar
4296180.short_description: One-shot gunfights and brutal close combat in a grim 1990s Russian backwater. Your escape fails — and revenge takes over.

4296200.title: Hamayumishi ～Night Parade of a Hundred Yokai～
4296200.short_description: The Hamayumishi uses their intense powers of concentration and skills with the bow to protect the villages from the gamboling yokai! This is a side-scrolling twin-stick shooting game. While aiming, the game will slow down to allow you to line up your shot before letting it fly.

4296240.title: Nowhere Highway
4296240.short_description: Atmospheric Single-player Survival FPS. Explore a post-apocalyptic world one year after a global catastrophe. Uncover the story of a mysterious mountain highway that connects the last remaining patches of life. Explore the world, fight for survival, and push forward along the highway.

4296270.title: Escape the Dynasty
4296270.short_description: A Roguelike Deckbuilder meets Turn-Based Auto-Battler! Trapped in a dark Three Kingdoms tower, command your army on a strategic 3x10 grid. Equip cards with unique "Wine" skills, master the Art of War, and make crucial choices in random events. Break the seal and Escape the Dynasty!

4296280.title: Amphibarium
4296280.short_description: Relax and collect hundreds of unique frogs and salamanders in this cozy idle game. Watch tadpoles undergo metamorphosis in real-time, customize lush terrariums, and discover rare species. Let your vivarium thrive in the background while you work or study. Start your collection today!

4296370.title: Every Wednesday
4296370.short_description: When Hideki steps inside for the first time, he does not yet realize that this is where he will finally stop feeling invisible after a long time. Meet new friends alongside him, uncover their stories, and support them through life’s challenges. They might even help you rewrite your own story …

4296380.title: Camp "Burevestnik"
4296380.short_description: For Nikita, time stood still long ago. His life has become an endless, exhausting marathon of anxiety, where night brings no rest. Trying to find some peace and escape the haunting nightmares, he suddenly discovers that reality has cracked.

4296390.title: Borderless Bullethell
4296390.short_description: A calm, minimalist bullet hell designed for multitasking. Play in a movable borderless window that slows down when you let go. Unlock powerups through milestones and let the game run quietly while you focus on other things.

4296410.title: Gravscape
4296410.short_description: One button. Infinite momentum. Gravscape is a fast 2D arcade platformer where you attract to planets, release to free-fall, and chain swings through danger. Master eight planets, face hazards, clear 30 levels, and chase high scores in Infinite and Rogue-like modes. Easy to learn, hard to master.

4296430.title: School Guard
4296430.short_description: 💼 You took this job to save your family. Now you have to survive it. 🔍 Scan students. 🚫 Confiscate contraband. 🏗️ Build your empire. 🌙 Patrol the night. But when the sun goes down, the school reveals what it's been hiding—🧟 zombies, 🔥 fire, and 👻 a ghost that never left.

4296450.title: Shorekeeper
4296450.short_description: Shorekeeper is a cozy survival game which blends deep crafting and management mechanics with a relaxing atmosphere. Explore a vast island, chart your own path through the unknown, and cultivate a life of peace, crafting, and discovery.

4296470.title: Sniper Reaction
4296470.short_description: The average human reaction time is 250ms. Where do you stand? Test your reflexes through a tactical sniper scope in this high-precision aim trainer.

4296610.title: Sinesperia
4296610.short_description: Dive into your own mind, where you will be able to piece together fragmented memories to uncover who you really were.

4296620.title: Nano Dash
4296620.short_description: Nano Dash is Boulder Dash like action puzzler game but with a lot of new elements and also some Metroidvania features like tiny story-line, power-ups and a lot of secrets and hidden dungeons. The graphics and sound is 8 Bit like and close to the one from the original from 1986.

4296640.title: Office Chaos
4296640.short_description: Office Chaos is a physics-based 1-4 player co-op office game where small mistakes spiral into disasters during 8-minute workdays.

4296720.title: Survivors 27
4296720.short_description: "Survivors 27" is an isometric PVP shooting game and a fast-paced casual mini-game. It allows you to play online with your friends

4296810.title: Family of Choice
4296810.short_description: Witness a little girl’s distorted memories of the past and her fantasies of a future that never happened. All she wants is a family… this time, of her own choice.

4297030.title: With you forgotten from my memory
4297030.genre: Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4297030.short_description: A mysterious tale shared with Sujin, the girl only I can see.

4297050.title: VacBot Simulator
4297050.short_description: Have you ever wondered what your robotic vacuum feels when it's wandering through your house? Picking up your messes, leaving your floors pristine again. Wonder no more! Experience the joys of cleaning various houses through the LIDARs of several judgemental robotic vacuums.

4297070.title: Pookie has a Fantasy 3 : Finale
4297070.short_description: A cozy slice-of-life visual novel about love, dreams, and commitment. Support Pookie as she becomes a game developer, face real-life hurdles together, and decide if your relationship is strong enough to lead to marriage and a shared future.

4297110.title: Hopping Out
4297110.short_description: Hopping Out is a tile-based puzzle game where you hop 2 tiles at a time. Play as Frog and use your tongue to move boxes, press buttons to create lily pads, all to catch many flies!

4297170.title: Uncolor
4297170.short_description: Rush through rooms with challenging platforms and terrains, duel with the Color Guardians and claim their hues to your uncolor deeds. Master the precision platformer essentials: WallJump, DoubleJump, SharpTiming. A field day for the SpeedRunners!

4297180.title: Void Combat Disk
4297180.short_description: This is a high-contrast grid-based tactical Roguelike. A unique attachment system synergizes with your 5-slot inventory to create specialized tactics, while adapting to dynamic events each turn is the key to survival. Precisely calculate every point of stamina.

4297240.title: Cellbound
4297240.short_description: Destroy cells, harvest their materials, and research new powers. Cellbound is a short incremental game about breaking down organisms and turning their traits into increasingly powerful upgrades.

4297340.short_description: 3:33 is a visual novel about the conversations we have at 3 AM when a friend reaches out and your alarm will go off in about three hours.

4297390.title: Bammo the Bull
4297390.short_description: Bammo the bull is a 3D single player wave based action game where you battle, upgrade, and smash your way to victory!

4297500.title: Isle Plateau
4297500.short_description: A retro 8/16-bit inspired dark fantasy RPG with an unforgiving, Souls-like difficulty. Recruit monsters as allies, study enemy patterns, exploit weaknesses and claim rare treasures to progress the mysterious island. No XP. No MP. Survival depends on strategy, knowledge, preparation and resolve.

4297550.title: Idle Muscle Up
4297550.short_description: Ignite your inner beast and lift the heaviest weights in the universe. Grow BIGGER and face rivals who keep getting stronger. Start with a relaxing idle clicker experience to build muscles, then push yourself in challenging arcade-style mini-games.

4297590.title: 99 Lives - Russian Roulette
4297590.short_description: “99 Lives: Russian Roulette is a dark, high-stakes action game. Choose one of six chambers and face three opponents in a deadly gamble. Survive nine levels and 81 rounds where every choice could be your last.”

4297640.title: Incretyper
4297640.short_description: Incretyper is an incremental typing game where every word you type can trigger powerful effects. Destroy shapes, unlock upgrades and watch your typing power grow into chaotic chain reactions.

4297730.title: ITZO
4297730.short_description: ITZO is a retro style scrolling shooter and bullet hell game where you play as the best (and most ruthless) agent in space: ITZO! You have the mission to prevent an incoming interplanetary conflict… How are you going to do it? Easy. With bullets, destruction, chaos and no diplomacy!

4297840.title: Rock Bottom
4297840.short_description: Mine. Smelt. Upgrade. Repeat. Rock Bottom is an incremental mining game where every swing makes you stronger. Descend through 8 unique layers, unlock devastating abilities, and discover what lies at Rock Bottom

4297890.title: PR0B-1E: Expedition Origin
4297890.short_description: A sci-fi action-adventure game focused on physics-driven asteroid mining as a probe bot. Smash rocks together with a grapple hook, haul them home using a magnetic stasis field and cash in to upgrade your abilities. Solve puzzles and acquire new robotic friends as you explore a mysterious galaxy.

4297900.title: Let There Be Istanbul
4297900.short_description: A hand-drawn slapstick beat-’em-up following a father-daughter duo on a wild journey toward Istanbul, with snappy tag-team combat and plenty of cats to pet... but why is Mehmet taking Ebru to Istanbul, and what awaits them there?

4297910.title: Chess Tales
4297910.short_description: Lead your chess army beyond the 8x8 board into a heavily guarded, enchanted fortress, solving environmental puzzles across overgrown gardens, collapsing caves, smelly sewers and trap-filled dungeons until you reach the throne and face the King.

4297980.title: Garden of the Atom
4297980.short_description: Garden of the Atom is a combat-focused Metroidvania where you hold nothing back. Start with every movement ability unlocked and play as 'Prodigy,' an exiled genius infiltrating a futuristic dictatorship to stop a tyrant from harnessing a cataclysmic meteor shower.

4298020.title: The Black Route
4298020.short_description: The contract has you lined up for 10 days driving the Black Rails, make sure the goods arrive. Callers can't resist the train's rumble.

4298070.title: Dying for Parts
4298070.short_description: Adapt or be scrapped. In this Roguelite FPS, you are trapped in a merciless junkyard fight club where movement is a weapon. Survive relentless mutated machines, scavenge their parts, and evolve into the ultimate killing machine.

4298100.title: Protocol Solari: Escape Room
4298100.short_description: Awaken alone aboard a drifting colony ship under autonomous lockdown. Restore critical systems, solve interconnected puzzles, and uncover the truth behind the Solari Protocol before you and the colonists depending on you are lost to the void.

4298130.title: Paper Rogue
4298130.short_description: A dark paper-styled dungeon crawler where dice decide your fate. Explore procedural dungeons, fight monsters, loot artifacts, and survive the drop.

4298260.title: A Game About Dodging Balls
4298260.short_description: Dodge balls, take risks, earn gold, and grow stronger. Near-misses mean bigger rewards. Survive long enough to face powerful bosses.

4298350.title: SpinObi : Just One More Wave
4298350.short_description: Take control of a legendary ninja in this high-intensity action roguelike. Unlike passive survival games, you must master Dash and Hook mechanics to survive relentless mystical hordes. Upgrade your skills, create powerful builds, and conquer the battlefield with precision and speed.

4298360.title: Trust Me Bro, I Trade
4298360.short_description: A minimalist incremental clicker about trading stocks and coins in rapid-fire rounds. Watch prices move, square off for profit or loss, and unlock upgrades & sectors

4298380.title: Idle Monkey Theorem
4298380.short_description: Hire adorable typing monkeys and watch them randomly recreate the complete works of Shakespeare, one word at a time. Upgrade your monkey army, unlock powerful skills, and prove the Infinite Monkey Theorem right in this charming idle clicker.

4298400.title: Dystopian Pet Simulator
4298400.short_description: You are a terminal operator in a industrial zone. Your job is simple and dirty: track down mutated creatures, throw a net over them, and deliver your catch to your personal terminal. Each creature brings passive income and experience - the rarer the creature, the faster your economy grows.

4298420.title: Thunder and Line-ing
4298420.short_description: Move lightning through the air to form lines. When everything aligns a boom echoes blasting your score up to a higher strata!

4298500.title: Last Breath 最后的气息
4298500.short_description: Last Breath is a tense side-scrolling shooter in a fungal-ravaged world, where humanity has become “Spore Zombies.” As the older sister Guan Jin, fight through the ruins to find your lost sibling. Scavenge, adapt, survive. But what awaits: redemption or a deeper nightmare?

4298710.title: MEHEN
4298710.short_description: MEHEN is a boss-rush game that follows the story of an investigator dispatched to Mehen, a fortress-city where eternal night has fallen. Guard, parry or dodge the stars’ attacks and counter to send the stars back into the night sky.

4298740.title: Mouse Saving Simulator
4298740.short_description: Save tiny mice using your mouse! Guide, push, and carry them through fiery mazes and return them safely to their mothers using precision, timing, and clever movement.

4298750.title: Blob Wars
4298750.short_description: Blob Wars is a turn-based tactics game where efficiency is key. Use each Blob’s unique abilities to defeat the enemy army in as few turns as possible, the fewer turns you take, the greater the reward. Traverse a branching world map and carve your own path through this replayable experience.

4298790.title: SkyDrop
4298790.short_description: Drop into a world where you and your friends can engage in eliminating players, and monsters. There are community trophies to collect all around for you to find but just know that they are not easy to achieve. Good luck out there and have fun.

4298800.title: FORJ
4298800.short_description: Design intricate factories, run a thriving merchant shop, and brave deadly dungeons in a high-stakes co-op extraction loop. Automate your industry with programmable golems, craft legendary +9 gear, and dominate the Arena to unlock 100 levels of permanent prestige power.

4298880.title: Timber Rush
4298880.short_description: Timber Rush is a fast-paced incremental roguelite where every swing explodes into upgrades, chaos, and massive numbers.

4298890.title: Fear Within
4298890.short_description: Fear Within is a short first-person psychological horror experience where the past lingers, even when its memories are lost. Explore familiar spaces through slow-paced exploration, uncover unsettling fragments of the past, and face a growing sense of fear driven by atmosphere and sound.

4299180.title: Deckum Demonium
4299180.short_description: Craft demonic essences and brew powerful potions in this diabolical roguelike deckbuilder. Summon 150+ demons to defend your land against heavenly forces. Discover rare relics and ingredients to form the most potent synergies.

4299220.title: Coinbox Clicker
4299220.short_description: Discover coins, generate cash, and exploit crazy combos in this satisfying incremental game about clicking a box.

4299260.title: Salt & Soul: Pocket Chef's Adventure
4299260.short_description: Awaken as a fragile porcelain salt shaker in a colossal, shadowy kitchen. Guided by your grandmother’s spirit, retrieve the key ingredient and master manual cooking mechanics to revive lost recipes. In this atmospheric adventure, every jump is a risk, and every dish tells a story.

4299270.title: Cluck And Tag
4299270.short_description: Catch roaming chickens across the map, deliver them, and rack up points! If you aren't Hunter, throw beach balls at rivals to make them drop their loot; if you are Hunter, focus solely on the chase. In this chaotic pursuit played against friends or smart bots, the highest score wins!

4299290.title: ARB: Anomalous Research Bureau - Museum
4299290.short_description: Investigate a mysterious old museum as an agent of the Anomalous Research Bureau. Identify strange anomalies, file accurate reports, and endure the nights until your investigation is completed.

4299510.title: Mr. Nice Guy
4299510.short_description: Play as the Final Girl to outsmart a relentless killer in this PSX style game, inspired by 90s survival horror classics and 80s slasher films. A throwback to the days of crunchy lo-fi visuals, fixed camera angles, tense hiding mechanics, and a variety of puzzles.

4299540.title: CPU Invaders - Movie Attack
4299540.short_description: A sequel to the Steam Awards finalist top-down shooter. Step into classic movie worlds inside your hard drive and become the hero who destroys the alien virus spreading through the digital realm. It has evolved — and it’s binge-watching your files.

4299570.title: Capybara Dungeon
4299570.short_description: Capybara Dungeon is a first-person cooperative dungeon exploration game where up to 4 players control capybaras in chaotic runs filled with dangerous creatures, unpredictable traps, and emergent humor, relying on constant communication to survive.

4299630.title: Table Space: Board and Card Game Sandbox
4299630.short_description: The ultimate tabletop games sandbox for mixed reality, designed for Steam Frame and SteamOS. Make and play board games, trading card games, and more with friends on any compatible XR headset. Use the Boxtree Builder to bring your own decks or create entirely new custom game modes.

4299670.title: Remnants: Omision
4299670.short_description: A psychological horror walking simulator powered by Unreal Engine 5. Trapped in a cycle of guilt, explore an oniric bunker and face three entities judging your darkest sin: omission. There are no saves. Can you justify your inaction, or will the remnant consume you?

4299690.title: Keybort
4299690.short_description: Keybort is a clean and fluid idle / clicker game where you progress by pressing keyboard keys.

4299710.title: Undead Apocalypse: The Dawn
4299710.short_description: A high-intensity top-down zombie roguelite focused on massive enemy waves, strategic card-based builds, long-term progression, and devastating synergies as you fight to survive until the first light of dawn.

4299760.title: Socks!
4299760.short_description: Strategic, Satisfying Sock Packing Action! Pair up socks, fresh off the clothesline, in this cute and relaxing physics-based puzzler. Match two socks to roll them up into an adorable bundle and free up space in your sock basket. But don't let your bundle basket overflow either! Pack wisely!

4299820.title: Blackhole Maker
4299820.short_description: Blackhole Maker is a simple, casual game. Pour resources into your flask and merge them together to create ever-larger resources. Upgrade your flask to hold even greater masses, and ultimately strive to create a black hole.

4299860.title: Sad Virus Jungle
4299860.short_description: New part sad virus walking game series. Now collect beer bottles at forest jungle and avoid deathly traps

4299950.title: NinjaCat
4299950.short_description: NinjaCat is a simple third‑person 3D action game. You progress through the game using actions such as sword slashing, throwing shuriken, grabbing objects, and jumping. If you manage to solve all the mysteries, you’ll clear the game.

4299980.title: Wicked Boy
4299980.short_description: A nostalgic 2D platformer bursting with Game Boy charm. Combine inventive spells to survive perilous foes, solve clever challenges, and uncover secrets. Lo-fi visuals collide with an epic modern soundtrack, crisp hi-fi SFX and fluid controls, all while keeping the classic spirit of Mario & Mega Man.

4299990.title: Unwilling Host
4299990.short_description: This is a first-person indie horror game with VHS effects. Be careful—you're facing a terrifying entity.

4300000.title: Donna Survivors
4300000.short_description: A cute and chaotic survivors-like action game set in the world of Donna! Play as lovable characters, combine wild abilities, defeat bosses, and survive hordes of enemies across 6 unique maps.

4300010.title: Pick 'N Punch: The Broken World
4300010.short_description: A punishing physics platformer where every move matters. Climb through a broken world using precise grabs and momentum, uncovering hidden paths. Designed to remind you of your memorable rage moments, but presented in a 2D format.

4300190.title: THE ANOMALY UNIT
4300190.short_description: Forced into working as an Anomaly Observer in a space stockroom, you must explore, observe carefully, and report inconsistencies. Earn Credits to buy upgrades, but beware: hideous horrors are creeping in the dark.

4300210.title: Masackra
4300210.short_description: A tactical game with grid-based combat, classes, and synergies. Assemble your squad, strengthen it through events, and make decisions that determine the outcome of each battle.

4300280.title: Agent C
4300280.short_description: Agent C is the ultimate stealth survivor designed for tactical operations. This innovative character excels in infiltrating military bases, utilizing advanced stealth techniques to navigate through enemy lines undetected with the added capability of piloting a powerful helicopter.

4300320.title: Touhou Mistystory
4300320.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4300320.short_description: A free-to-play, single-player Touhou Project fan-made bullet hell shooter that blends light roguelike elements with modified gameplay mechanics. Defeat your enemies and collect dropped spell cards to enhance your abilities!

4300340.title: The Williams Family Sacrifice
4300340.short_description: Things have been hard for Elizabeth Williams after the tragic death of her husband. She has been doing all she can for her family, but she has been struggling and she's starting to slip. Hopefully she doesn't slip too far...

4300400.title: Adventurers Shop
4300400.short_description: Forge your legacy as both merchant and hero. Explore Zoldar, battle monsters for rare materials, and craft epic gear. Team up with friends to build a thriving shop in the village markets or arm yourselves to conquer the dangerous depths of the wild.

4300410.title: Five Elements Clash Battle
4300410.short_description: A turn-based strategy 3D casual game, based on the traditional Chinese Five Elements, challenges players to strategically move enemies of the same attribute into a straight line to cause them to explode, or lure them into traps of mutually counteracting attributes for elimination.

4300430.title: Assassin Of Spider
4300430.short_description: Play as warrior and try to beat giant spider boss in 7 different levels and find captured skulls in this medieval rpg adventure
