Featuring 50 built-in stories and custom creation support, s[TOR-Y]telling is an infinite narrative experiment. How far are you going to test it?

4295190.title: The Velan Reach - Book One: An Unbroken Line
4295190.short_description: An adult steampunk Visual Novel where you take on the role of a scientist joining a mission of discovery and wonder. Travel to strange new worlds and get to know your traveling companions (quite intimately so in some cases).

4295240.title: Neon Vice Club Simulator
4295240.short_description: Manage, design, upgrade, and expand your own nightclub in a neon-lit open world. Shape your club with staff management, income systems, and reputation mechanics; make the right moves to create the city’s hottest venue.

4295400.title: Furry and the Beast
4295400.short_description: A dark gothic fantasy visual novel where a wolf hunter tracks a seductive shapeshifter through moonlit forests, only to discover that both hunter and prey are capable of becoming something far more dangerous.

4295570.title: Poker Hands Bullshit
4295570.short_description: Turn-based card game. Raise the bar on the best poker hands you think are present out of all players' cards. Since you can only see your cards, you'll have to take a chance on the cards other players have or lie about your own cards. Bullshit or be bullshit-ed.

4295810.title: A Whisper of Fall: Jinyiwei
4295810.short_description: "A Whisper of Fall: Jinyiwei" is an ARPG set in the Ming Dynasty. Play as a Jinyiwei (Imperial Guard) with martial art, lightness skill and the unique deduction ability, across shifting timelines and sandbox levels to weave the destiny of yourself and the dynasty.
developers: 成都苍墨信息科技有限公司
publishers: 成都苍墨信息科技有限公司

4295940.title: Dungeon Pit
4295940.short_description: Fight. Die. Upgrade. Repeat. A dark fantasy incremental bullet hell idle arena about blood, gold, and heroes. Numbers go brrr.

4296220.title: Trailer Game
4296220.short_description: Reversing a trailer is tough in real life, this game takes the challenge to the extreme. Traverse tight corners, uneven terrain and narrow bridges in this ultimate test of skill and determination.

4296250.title: I WAS A KING
4296250.short_description: A court-driven, text-based strategy game where your words become decrees. Two petitions per turn—type carefully, face the backlash, and remember: you WERE a King.

4296290.title: Records of Searching for Gods in Mountains and Seas
4296290.short_description: 在这个充满危机的修仙世界，你将体验真正的"搜·打·撤"生存循环：深入秘境探索古宝奇遇，面对强敌时做出战或逃的艰难抉择，在洞府中炼丹布阵积蓄实力。捕获妖兽幼崽，喂食丹药培养资质，见证它们从一阶小兽蜕变为化形妖王，与你一同组成最强战队。

4296310.title: Green Button
4296310.short_description: The story of a man trapped in circumstances with no obvious way out. A psychological horror in which danger is always near, and the only chance for salvation is to make an extraordinary decision. Will you be able to get out without losing yourself — or will the price of salvation be too high?..

4296400.title: Lumen survive the dark
4296400.short_description: Lumen: Survive the Dark is a dark, atmospheric action roguelike where you fight relentless enemies, survive deadly encounters, and push deeper into the unknown. Master combat, adapt to chaos, and endure a world that grows more hostile every run.

4296520.title: STEEL HEAVEN
4296520.short_description: STEEL HEAVEN is a high-octane FPS horde survival roguelite. Combine ultra-fluid mobility with devastating melee combat and rogue-lite progression. Master wall-running and dashing while tearing through thousands of enemies. Survive for 30 minutes in a world that evolves with every kill.

4296570.title: Never Secure
4296570.short_description: A dark survival management game where you guide a small group of people through daily life in a collapsing world, making difficult choices to keep them alive one more day.

4296790.title: 第一次当妈妈
4296790.short_description: First Time Mom is a female-oriented simulation game that includes career development, raising a daughter, and managing a family. Players will progress from being an online writer to a director, accompany their daughter until she turns 18, and enjoy sweet interactions with her husband.

4296930.title: European Logistics Tycoon
4296930.short_description: Build your own logistics company, plan deliveries across European cities, and manage vehicles, drivers, and costs. Accept contracts, optimize routes, and make smart business decisions to grow your company step by step.

4297040.title: Aeternum Infecti
4297040.short_description: Aethernum Infecti is a third-person, open-world survival game set in a haunting post-apocalyptic world. Scavenge cities and wilderness for food, medicine, and weapons while evading relentless infected. Explore a vast, desolate land where silence is deadly and survival is everything.

4297130.title: Worst Wifey (ワル嫁)
4297130.short_description: Feeling like your desktop is a little too lonely? A cute desktop companion baddie to keep you company and brighten your screen. with EXTRA PHYSICS!

4297160.title: The Saplum Cradle
4297160.short_description: A choose-your-own-adventure horror game about using the memories of the dead to scavenge lost civilisations.

4297380.title: type:def
4297380.short_description: Welcome, user. This [type:def] tower defense training module simulates a network defense scenario. Hostile data is attempting to escape the system. Deploy defensive nodes, type commands to control them, and secure the network - your only weapon is your keyboard!

4297410.title: Dot Art Logic
4297410.short_description: This game is for players who simply want to enjoy nonograms. There are no flashy effects at all, and it feels like solving paper puzzles from magazines using a mouse on your computer. It includes 1600 B&W puzzles sized 20x20 and 300 color puzzles up to 15x15, for a total of 1900 puzzles.

4297560.title: Kingdom Heroes
4297560.short_description: Kingdom Heroes is a fantasy medieval survivor-like blending action, exploration, kingdom management, and local co-op for up to 4 players. Battle massive hordes, vote on the group's fate, build your kingdom, and dominate other players through asynchronous multiplayer.

4297620.title: Foot Simulator
4297620.short_description: A physics-based football simulation where you directly control a character’s leg articulation to move, balance, and kick, emphasizing skill, precision, and mastery over unconventional controls.

4297710.title: Interstitial
4297710.short_description: Interstitial is a first-person psychological horror game that dives into the unease of liminal spaces, blending environmental storytelling, exploration-driven gameplay, and slow-burning dread to create an experience where the world itself becomes the threat.

4297760.title: Take a Hint
4297760.genre: Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4297760.short_description: Take a Hint! is a comic-style visual novel where you control Delfina and must convince your best friend Ailén that her boyfriend is not good for her. It won't be easy, and no one will leave until the truth comes out.

4297830.title: Nifty Smashers Origins
4297830.short_description: Round up your friends and get smashing in Nifty Smashers, a silly, fast-paced party brawler full of laughs, wild matches, and just the right amount of mayhem, whether you're playing together on the couch or online.

4297870.title: The Glorious Cause
4297870.short_description: A historically grounded, hex-based strategy and tactics game where you command armies of the American Revolution. From tense battlefield engagements to the growing war for independence.

4297920.title: Defend Against Cats
4297920.short_description: Defend Against Cats is a cute, casual tower defense game. Waves of mischievous fuzzy balls are invading your home! With your deadline creeping closer, defend your workstation before it’s too late.

4297940.title: Bingo Roulette
4297940.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4297940.short_description: Bingo Roulette is a casual strategy puzzle game where you select slots on a bingo board to earn points and complete bingos to collect bonus scores.

4298170.title: Carry the Pack Rack
4298170.short_description: One car, two drivers! Team up where one steers and the other pedals. Navigate obstacles without dropping the package. Play solo or join friends via local and online multiplayer co-op. Can you coordinate your moves to deliver safely or will you crash in chaos?

4298200.title: The Caretakers
4298200.short_description: Infiltrate contaminated residences and deal with their mutant pests using the most advanced tech of the 1960s. Set up a base and observe, probe, and most importantly, survive the grotesque creatures in this online co-op horror game.

4298430.title: Meow with Pipeline
4298430.short_description: Meow with Pipeline: a precision pixel platformer with rogue-like challenges. Guide a cat through dangerous pipe networks—run, jump, dodge traps and master tough platforming. Tight controls and skill-based progression make every victory satisfyingly earned.

4298490.title: Ripper
4298490.short_description: Ripper is a top-down shooter with fully destructible environments, fog of war, and Steam multiplayer. Break through walls, survive enemy waves, and battle your friends.

4298560.title: Back alley chronicle-Episode saeki-
4298560.short_description: A prequel to Rojiura Hyōryūki. Set in the home of middle schooler Sumire Saeki, this is a life simulation game where players repeat daily routines and explore dreams. Choices made at different times of day influence the story and its endings.

4299830.title: Dungeon Companion
4299830.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4299830.short_description: An RPG that plays along with you while you work. Turn your productivity into progress with auto-combat and passive rewards.

4299850.title: Lawnmower game 2026
4299850.short_description: New low poly version for legendary lawnmower game saga. Drive and cut grass in big open world and try to find all hidden items in this driving simulation

4299910.title: Truck Manager Australia
4299910.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4299910.short_description: Build a car-transport company across Australia. Take freight jobs, plan tours, manage trucks, drivers and running costs, track profit and loss, and expand your fleet step by step with a clean desktop UI. Play offline.

4299940.title: The Purple Forest Ritual
4299940.short_description: Requested to seal and restrain the monsters, Freya heads to the forest to fulfill the demand. How will she- be able to perform the ritual to seal the strong, violent purple monsters?

4300160.title: Goblin "Gnight" Garuru
4300160.short_description: Garuru is a girl who once found herself in front of an old battlefield where she was fascinated by the sight of a fallen hero and decided to aim for much more than raiding and pillaging as every goblin tribe did.

4300200.title: UFOre: Space Idle
4300200.short_description: Jump into the cockpit and become the hardest-working UFO in the galaxy! Vacuum up valuable minerals from the planet's surface, manage your resources, and upgrade your ship. Automate your production lines and watch your wealth grow exponentially in this isometric idle simulation.

4300470.title: Look at our: Cyber-butts
4300470.short_description: An image discovery arcade game where you will test the abilities of voluptuous cyborgs. Complete the tests and unlock hot images and videos for your gallery.

4300520.title: Second Monitor Gladiators
4300520.short_description: A lightweight gladiator auto-battler designed to be played or watched on a second monitor.

4300820.title: Rural
4300820.short_description: Rural is a 3D voxel farming and life simulation game where you build a self-sufficient country life through farming, crafting, survival, and exploration. Grow crops, raise animals, craft equipment, food, structures, ride, fish, hunt, mine, complete quests, and help a living village at your own pace.

4300880.title: MG
4300880.short_description: MG is a first person shooter set in WW2. In MG you will control a machine gun turret, fighting off unrelenting waves of enemies that are determined to reach their objective. This game takes the player through some of the most infamous battles of the second world war, how long will you last?

4300960.title: Critterbyte Royale
4300960.short_description: It's an all out Critterbyte Royale! In this idle/hack n slash hybrid, mow down countless enemies to collect elemental energy for upgrading your Critterbytes, buying usable items and gathering bonuses. The ultimate goal? To complete your Critterbyte Catalog, of course!

4301110.title: The Headlands
4301110.short_description: A cozy top-down farming management game focused on planning and steady growth. Manage fields, machinery, and resources, upgrade your farm, and develop efficient processes at your own pace in a calm, strategic experience.

4301130.title: Riftborne
4301130.short_description: Riftborne is a classic terminal based, real time, grand strategy game. Data rich, spreadsheet like management. Construct space ships. Take part in factional warfare. Hire galactic hit-men on your rivals. Raid neighbors for rare resources. Become a spy and infiltrate enemy bases for key intel.

4301150.title: Absolved
4301150.short_description: Would you go through Hell if it meant freedom?  Faced with the choice of serving the rest of a life sentence or playing nightguard for a week. You thought the choice was an easy one to make. You couldn't be more wrong.

4301440.title: Prostitute-Pimp 2
4301440.short_description: The pimp simulator that challenges you to run a prostitution club is back with its new release, Prostitute Pimp 2. You'll have to get new clients by hiring new girls on the street, buying new nightclubs, and upgrading your clubs.

4301570.title: Sokocat: Castaway
4301570.short_description: Sokocat: Castaway is a 3D Sokoban-style puzzle game with an isometric view, where you control a shipwrecked kitty exploring a mysterious island full of secrets, varied environments, and relaxing brain teasers. No danger, no rush — just clever puzzles and peaceful exploration.

4301580.title: Greedy
4301580.short_description: A raccoon co-op horror extraction game. Infiltrate procedural ruins, loot everything and extract the relic. Mammon, the Greed Demon, is watching… Stay away from his curse!

4301790.title: Soluna Explorers: Tether Curse of Slimus
4301790.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4301790.short_description: Soluna Explorers: Tether – Curse of Slimus is a relaxed action RPG where you play as the monster, hunting roaming adventurers in a living world.

4302100.title: Screamer Streamers
4302100.short_description: Screamer Streamers is a livestream simulator with rogue-like elements, where the player can explore many themed levels. Pick from different characters, weapons and tools and advance through the levels to uncover the truth about what has taken a grip on the town of Murcielago.

4302270.title: HIDDEN CATS 10: Valentine's Day 😻🐾💖
4302270.short_description: Explore a mysterious paradise for lovers, find cute cats, and paint black-and-white locations with bright colors.

4302300.title: Empire Water Works
4302300.short_description: Empire Water Works is a steam engine water works simulator. Operate and maintain your pumping station day and night, maintain city water pressure and fulfill contracts. All whilst taking in the various sights and sounds, with realistic steam, firing, and audio simulation.

4302400.title: Cube Commando
4302400.short_description: Cube Commando is a 2.5D sci-fi action platformer set in a dystopian future, where precision combat, environmental hazards, and an emotional story collide. Fight through deadly facilities to uncover the truth behind a missing person.

4302430.title: Reverse Parking Simulator
4302430.short_description: This reverse parking simulation game has various levels and scenarios to hone reversing skills, master parking basics for real-world use. You can try unconventional operations risk-free with no car damage worries, challenge harder levels and aim to finish in less time with fewer collisions.

4302450.title: Capybara Pizza Cafe
4302450.short_description: Manage a cozy cafe run by Capybaras, for Capybaras. Bake pizzas, serve pizzas, clean tables and ring that cash register!

4302480.title: Calon Arang Nightmare of Revenge
4302480.short_description: A narrative-driven horror game inspired by the Indonesian legend of Calon Arang. Explore cursed locations, uncover dark rituals, and survive psychological terror filled with jump scares, traps, and relentless enemies.

4302490.title: My Idle Witch
4302490.short_description: A little witch companion who brews potions anywhere on your desktop. Watch her work and sell her potions, dress her in new outfits, and decorate her tiny workshop. Stay focused by using productivity tools like checklists and Pomodoro timers.

4302570.title: TicTacFootball
4302570.genre: Casual, Indie, Sports, Free To Play
4302570.short_description: Tic Tac Football is an arcade-style football game focused on simple controls and thoughtful play. Choose from over 220 teams in cup and league competitions, or enjoy a local 1-on-1 match against a friend or the AI. Matches are easy to pick up, but reward positioning, timing, and smart decisions.

4302610.title: Come Out Guys
4302610.short_description: Experience fast-paced first-person multiplayer hide-and-seek! Climb, hide, and outsmart others through your own eyes in colorful environments where parkour and first-person stealth decide who gets caught.

4302680.title: Hentai Tales: The Gyaru's Secret Hobby
4302680.short_description: My life as a loner takes an unexpected turn when I discover the gorgeous gyaru girl from my class has a secret hobby—she's a passionate AV connoisseur just like me. What starts as awkward encounters after school soon evolves into a relationship that goes far beyond just watching adult films together

4302700.title: Helyana
4302700.short_description: A neo-gothic manga action RPG where your choices shape your enemies. Powerful bosses aren’t always foes. Get on their wrong side and they’ll hunt you, understand them and they may stand beside you. Fight through a ruined world with skill-driven combat where every decision has weight.

4302730.title: Fog
4302730.short_description: Survive in a city shrouded in dense fog. A fog that steals your vision. Scarce supplies. Unknown entities lurking beyond sight. This is not a game about fighting — it is a game about survival.

4302920.title: War Drone
4302920.short_description: Tactical drone combat against infantry, armor, and air defenses. Control advanced drones, strike high-value targets, and dominate the battlefield from anywhere, your call. War is no longer fought on the ground. Operate combat drones, destroy high-value targets, and survive hostile airspace.

4303120.title: Disappearance Simulator
4303120.short_description: A crime simulation where you run shady shops, create fake identities, manage risk, and expand an empire while trying not to get caught.

4304700.title: 小小魔法师
4304700.short_description: "Little Mage" is a fast-paced survival game packed with loot. Battle bosses, wield unique weapons with stunning effects, and equip powerful wings and skills. With hundreds of items and legendary traits, build your own playstyle. Jump in and start your epic loot journey now!

4304790.title: Reunions with you billions of times
4304790.short_description: This is a short, romance-focused visual novel where you play as a student. As you fall in love with your classmate Qiu, you become trapped in a time loop and die again and again. Together with Qiu, you must search for a way to break the loop, with your choices leading to different endings.

4304900.title: Big Dig
4304900.short_description: Big Dig is a short incremental game about digging up relics so Mayor Dog can build his highway. Build up your museum to earn money for new tools that help you dig deeper, dig faster, dig bigger! Mayor Dog's reelection depends on your work, and he won't let anything get in his way...

4304950.title: Machine Gun Knight
4304950.short_description: Machine Gun Knight is a fast-paced vertical roguelike shooter where reflexes, positioning, and a bit luck decide your run.

4305160.title: ZHITEN
4305160.short_description: Some villages aren't just abandoned, they are cursed. Zhiten, a victim of clashing cults, awakens from its slumber with Nikolay's return. While Nikolay searches for traces of the past, he will be forced to meet the village's new owners.

4305230.title: WarDeck
4305230.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4305230.short_description: WarDeck is a turn-based strategy game combining board game tactics with deckbuilding mechanics. Build your unique elemental deck and position your cards wisely on the board. Defeat Bosses in the challenging Adventure mode or challenge rivals in the PvP arena.

4305250.title: Salmon City
4305250.short_description: Shady deals, intense shootouts and trying to make an honest living. Welcome to Salmon City - a chaotic multiplayer roleplaying experience where every round is a fresh start, every stranger has private agendas and every decision has consequences. Play your role in the twisted theatre of it all.

4305280.title: Factory Simulator
4305280.short_description: Factory Simulator is a realistic production and management simulation game where you build automated factories, manage supply chains, operate machines, and sell products. Play solo or cooperatively and grow your industrial empire from scratch.

4305360.title: 6RAVITY CUBE
4305360.short_description: “Novel 6-direction gravity puzzle‑action game!” Packed with diverse gimmicks — experience intuitive yet strategically deep puzzle‑solving!

4305490.title: Humanity's Fall
4305490.short_description: Explore the world of Humanity's Fall, a fantasy farming sim. Interact and build a community with the world's next apex lifeform. Build your farm and rediscover lost flora as you discover the world's lore.

4305550.title: Rockwell's Zen Tiles
4305550.short_description: After a lifetime of chasing squirrels, Rockwell is ready to relax. Help him unwind in this cozy, tile-clearing puzzle game. Travel the world, clear lines to advance time, earn bonuses, and relax. No timers, no rush — just peaceful puzzles, soothing music, and a very good dog learning to relax.

4305820.title: Scattered
4305820.short_description: Scattered is a short adventure where you explore a tropical island as a cat in search of a litter of lost kittens. Discover paths to remote locations, dig up pirate treasure, and seek out perfect sleeping spots. Upgrade your skills and show them the way back home.

4305910.title: Babushka – Old Lady’s Payback
4305910.short_description: Step into the orthopedic shoes of Babushka. Armed with an M4 and 'special' herbs, navigate a corrupt 32-bit city. From mob hits to bribing cops, embark on a surreal PS1-style rampage where retirement is just a reload away. Grandma’s not just knitting anymore—she’s taking over the underworld.

4306130.title: Subway Story
4306130.short_description: A narrative-driven exploration game set in the New York City subway, where you ride trains, interact with strangers, and make choices that shape how the city's underbelly responds.

4306210.title: White Silence
4306210.short_description: After crashing in the winter wilderness, you wake up in the middle of a blizzard. The forest is dead, the roads are gone, communication is lost. The only chance of salvation is a village hidden in the snow.

4306300.title: Saint George's Tavern
4306300.short_description: Saint George's Tavern is a hilarious tavern simulator set in the early 1800's during the ending of the reign of King George III (the Mad King).  This game is about more than just pouring ales and cooking food, It's full of fun, laughs and mini games!

4306590.title: RogueHwatu
4306590.short_description: A roguelike deckbuilding game meets Hwatu cards. Never played Hwatu before? No problem. Jump right in and discover an addictive roguelike card game that's easy to learn but impossible to put down.

4306610.title: Project Big Sphere
4306610.short_description: An early-stage FPS/TPS prototype exploring custom gravity on a spherical planet. Move freely across the planet surface, switch between first-person and third-person perspectives, and observe how movement, orientation, and the rotating sky respond to non-traditional gravity.

4306650.title: Cicadia
4306650.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4306650.short_description: Cicadia is a free rogue-like first person shooter indie game. Kill bugs and collect Bile as you uncover the hidden truth of a self-forsaken empire. Challenge bosses, cull swarms, and build an unstoppable loadout in Cicadia!

4306670.title: Penguin IdleCanvas
4306670.short_description: A chill idle pixel-art drawing desktop toy that sits on your screen. Watch mini penguins stack pixel blocks into tiny pixel arts that you design.

4306740.title: Protectors of Prucia
4306740.short_description: Turn‑based tactical dungeon crawler with grid combat, 10 unique classes (each with 12 skills), and randomly generated loot to equip your party with. Lead your hero and mercenary through dangerous dungeons to push back the Scourge.

4306780.title: Integrity
4306780.short_description: A vision-based turn-based tactics game where one unseen move decides life or death. Both sides share the same sight rules, and walls/terrain block attacks and reshape routes. Unlock new skills by meeting conditions, or upgrade existing ones to push your build further. Every choice is permanent.

4306920.title: Lost on Cow Island
4306920.short_description: Lost on Cow Island is a linear story-driven comedy adventure game, in the style of Monkey Island, Sam & Max, or Day of the Tentacle. Look, Interact, and Talk to a host of kooky af characters and navigate out of impossible situations to fix your time-travelling car and get back home!

4307060.title: 重生之我在桌面修仙
4307060.short_description: 《Immortal Rebirth: Desktop Cultivation》 is a relaxing idle desktop pet game. Watch your character automatically meditate, concoct pills, and fly on a sword right on your desktop. Build your own miniature realm, unlock multiple lives through reincarnation, and accumulate power even while offline.

4307100.title: Steel Swarm: SURVIVOR
4307100.short_description: Steel Swarm: SURVIVOR is a fast-paced roguelite survivors game where you obliterate swarms with your drones. Set up formations, upgrade your drones, and overwhelm hordes of metal in each run. Take on enemy waves solo or in multiplayer co-op!

4307200.title: Joshua: Door to Dreams
4307200.short_description: Welcome to Joshua's world. Open your curious eyes and find your path. Trek through humid jungles, scale snow-capped peaks, explore ancient caves, and witness lunar dawns. After these adventures, discover the self waiting within your soul.

4307420.title: FORENSIC - M.E. Protocol
4307420.short_description: Put on your gloves and enter the crime scene. In this investigation simulator, you will have to solve 9 unique and independent cases full of plot twists. Use drones, robots, and chemical analysis to discover what really happened. Here, you don't shoot the bad guys; you catch them with science.

4307440.title: Grab & Run | Alpaca Party
4307440.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4307440.short_description: This is Grab & Run, the physics-powered extraction multiplayer VR adventure where maps reshape every time, every stuff has real weight, monsters keep you alert, and an upgrade system makes each run hit even better, while you and your friends stay just the right amount of chaotic...

4307500.title: Soko Pirates
4307500.short_description: Classic Sokoban in a pirate style with hand‑drawn pixel art — push crates, solve carefully designed puzzles, and relax in short sessions.

4307570.title: PERFECT SNAP: Ultimate Jigsaw Puzzles
4307570.short_description: Turn any image into a playable puzzle! Progress through a 100-level campaign or import your own photos for infinite replayability. Showcase your victories in your fully customizable 3D Museum that you can freely walk through. The puzzle game, tailored for both quick breaks and hardcore challenges.

4307630.title: Survivor: Unknown Village
4307630.short_description: "Survivor: Unknown Village" is a shooting game where you blast through oncoming hordes of zombies. Collect power-up panels to increase your soldier count and lead your squad to victory!

4307700.title: One More Wipe!
4307700.short_description: A tension-driven comedy game where you gamble for toilet paper and try to last as long as possible telling yourself “everything is under control” until it very much isn’t.

4307750.title: Sonata of Y
4307750.short_description: 《Sonata of Y》是一款以回合制战斗为核心的角色扮演游戏，玩家通过规划行动顺序、运用技能组合并推动角色成长，在连贯的单人流程中体验以策略选择为导向的冒险过程。

4307780.title: Echo of Y
4307780.short_description: 《Echo of Y》是一款强调回合节奏与战术抉择的 RPG 游戏，玩家通过回合制战斗、技能配置与角色成长，在循序推进的单人流程中完成一段策略导向的冒险体验。

4307830.title: Booost!! CleanSweep
4307830.short_description: Take control of the 'Cleaning Cart' and clean up a filthy city! But beware of the Litterbugs who scatter trash everywhere! Faster, cleaner, better. This is a score-attack car action game.

4307920.title: Loot Goblin: An Idle Adventure
4307920.short_description: Use a selection of unique classes to train your Goblins. Order your Goblin Army to Loot increasingly difficult dungeons and bounties. Challenge other Goblin Bosses to improve your Notoriety and become the strongest!

4307990.title: Disqualified
4307990.short_description: Take the passenger seat as a Driving Examiner and survive the most chaotic road tests in history! Evaluate crazy student drivers, mark their scores, and slam your emergency brake at the perfect moment to avoid a total disaster. Will you give them a license, or will you just try to stay alive?

4308330.title: Chippu
4308330.short_description: Adopt a Chippu! A cozy little companion that lives on your desktop and keeps you company while you work, study, or relax. Care for your friend by feeding, petting, playing, and customizing it as you stay focused and productive.

4308960.title: Heaven's Glaive
4308960.short_description: Lead the members of Squad 56 across the Island of Principium as they uncover the secrets of their forebearers. Explore a vast island filled with fantastical foes, ruins, quests, and experience the story you choose. Each Protagonist brings a different viewpoint and story in this turn based RPG.

4309020.title: Neo Lobby Arcade™
4309020.genre: Casual, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Free To Play
4309020.short_description: Step into Neo Lobby Arcade, the ultimate 3D social hub for retro gaming. Drag and drop your own ROMs into virtual cabinets, sync multiplayer matches instantly with a single click, and hang out with friends using proximity voice chat in a fully immersive open-world arcade.

4309030.title: 错过的暑假可以放第二次吗？
4309030.short_description: 游戏内容： 这是一款以绘画为主题、描述了成年人对于过往错过的人与事的灵魂之旅，兽人向的纯视觉小说游戏。 故事讲述了25岁的狸花猫兽人“启诚”，在被公司辞退后回到老家的城市。作为曾没能通过联考的美术生，在青梅竹马“未乾”，以及好朋友【熙和】、【望舒】、画室的“学弟”【烈烈】的帮助下，慢慢寻回了自己曾失去的那个暑假，那个他命中注定的人……

4309180.title: Holding Pattern
4309180.short_description: Holding Pattern is a minimal incremental game about protecting your galaxy from invaders.

4309280.title: Caravan Village: Farming Life
4309280.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4309280.short_description: "Scammed into buying a wasteland instead of a paradise? Don't panic! Rebuild a ruined caravan park, manage your own hotel, farm crops, and uncover secrets. Turn a dusty dump into a 5-star resort in this cozy life-sim!"

4309630.title: Penguin Ascension
4309630.short_description: A cozy pixel-art idle clicker where you click for Fish, buy upgrades, trigger random events, and Rebirth for Golden Krill to unlock permanent prestige boosts and absurd arctic progression.

4309820.title: SCAMMER '99
4309820.short_description: Experience the wild internet of 1999: buy darknet databases, validate stolen cards, manage risk, gamble dirty money, and upgrade your hardware. Earn enough to vanish forever. A Windows 98‑style scammer sim.

4309840.title: Love-Love Street Racer
4309840.short_description: In this fast‑paced micro‑racer, take on three underground racing champions across their high‑intensity runs. Win the races to enjoy spoiling the loser.

4309870.title: Dice of Fate
4309870.short_description: Dice of Fate - A 3D logic puzzle. You're locked in an ancient sanctuary and don't remember how you got there. Your key to salvation lies in dice that hold ancient magic.

4309930.title: Bomb Survival
4309930.short_description: Can you make it to the bunker? Bombs fall from the sky and destroy the terrain, carving a path to the bunker buried underneath the ground. Get there solo or with your friends!

4309970.title: Soulbound Odyssey
4309970.short_description: retro JRPG with a soulslike twist. Journey through a broken world, vanquish demonlords, and grow stronger by consuming the souls of your enemies while party members fight and think for themselves.

4309990.title: Grinnel
4309990.short_description: If you stop, your light will go out, if you turn around, your path will be erased. GRINNEL is a living maze that tracks your movements and glances. Don't look back because the darkness is waiting for you there.

4310030.title: My Goth Girlfriend NTR
4310030.short_description: Work to earn money and manage your time wisely. Train to increase your energy, study to improve your intellect, buy gifts and tapes, and unlock new opportunities. Your progress is rewarded with steamy moments shared with beautiful women as you shape your daily life.

4310100.title: 3 Lines of A Delta
4310100.short_description: It’s time for him to face a long-avoided past. See the story from different point of views and gradually discover what caused everything to fall apart. The truth is hidden between the lines.

4310870.title: LANE-4
4310870.short_description: An open-ended programming game in which you optimise 4-core assembly code to maintain a 1990s alt-history dystopian megacity's infrastructure. Take jobs from middlemen with hidden agendas and uncover the chilling consequences of your "routine" fixes in this assembly language puzzle thriller.

4310900.title: GLADIMAKER : Auto Battle RPG
4310900.short_description: Optimal stat allocation, creative equipment combos, and tactics that exploit your enemy's weaknesses—your choices define the battlefield! GladiMaker is a whimsical Auto-battler RPG that packs a punch with deep strategy and the thrill of infinite growth.

4310920.title: Turscar Isle
4310920.short_description: Infiltrate the base of a cult of spammers! Stick to the shadows, dodge the spambot cultists, and rob them of everything they haven't nailed down!

4310930.title: Hentai Girlfriend
4310930.short_description: Hentai Girlfriend - Celebrate the holidays with your girlfriend. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4310970.title: Hentai Mentor
4310970.short_description: Hentai Mentor - An adult woman is keeping an eye on you. Behave yourself! A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4311000.title: Trust Me, I Nailed It
4311000.genre: Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4311000.short_description: <Trust Me, I Nailed It> is a turn-based strategy game where you edit video clips to make a screwed up warrior into a monster-slaying legend. Edit, stitch, and fake your way to epic battle videos. Make every fight look like a glorious win.

4311010.title: EXE.CUTOR
4311010.short_description: EXE.CUTOR is a game where you place data blocks to complete lines. Acquire various equipment and enhance your data blocks to build stronger lines and defeat virus hosts infesting cyberspace!

4311050.title: Legend of Idle
4311050.short_description: Legend of Idle ist ein Incremental Idle Spiel, wo du dein Königreich wiederaufbaust durch upgraden von deinem Schloss und deinen Gebäuden! Bring Frieden indem du das gegnerische Schloss besiegst und eroberst. Inspiriert von der klassischen SNES Ästhetik.

4311170.title: FLUFF SWING
4311170.short_description: Stretch the thread. Swing through the air. FLUFF SWING is a 2D wire action game inspired by sewing tools. Stick needles into walls and the ground, build momentum, and swing through each stage. Set in a cute, slightly nostalgic pixel-art world, find your own rhythm and reach the goal.

4311180.title: Around the World 4: Family Tour - Collector's Edition
4311180.short_description: Dive into an exciting family journey around the world! Sandy beaches, green forests, exotic islands, and mysterious deserts await you. Find hidden objects, complete mini-games, and collect memorable souvenirs.

4311190.title: Game Saloon Simulator: Prologue
4311190.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4311190.short_description: Step into the world of fun and become the boss of your own game saloon! In this free version of the game, you’ll serve customers, enjoy interactive games, and get a taste of the relaxing and enjoyable experience that awaits you.

4311230.title: The Witch and The Lost Babies
4311230.short_description: As a journalist, you travel to an abandoned village to investigate a dark event that occurred years ago. As you progress through missing babies, hidden diaries, and forbidden rituals, you will be forced to perform a dangerous ritual yourself to uncover the truth.

4311240.title: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 10 - Collector's Edition
4311240.short_description: Explore famous sights and picturesque landscapes of Europe! Hidden objects, mini-games, and unique souvenirs make every journey unforgettable.

4311310.title: 苍灰残响
4311310.short_description: This classic-style RPG features beautiful girls in a post-apocalyptic world . You will experience Tina’s story, a girl with amnesia, as she meets diverse companions, collects resources, crafts magical tools, and faces powerful enemies, all while struggling against disasters and seeking the truth.

4311470.title: 建てろ大神殿 どらどらんど
4311470.short_description: "Build the Great Temple: DoraDoland" is a short rogue-lite simulator that combines deck building, resource management, and personnel management.

4311590.title: Hellgame: Prologue
4311590.short_description: HELLGAME: PROLOGUE Experience the prologue to the upcoming HELLGAME: ORIGINS. Take control of the fearless Timara and protect the Hell Map from the forces of pure evil. But beware—Hell plays by its own rules, and its game is filled with deadly surprises. This is a Full Game with his own Story.

4311740.title: Letter to Neml
4311740.short_description: A story about the Noctarian, a race whose nightmares become reality. Small choices made by Neml, a girl staying home alone, shape the fate of the world. The player does only one thing: rewrite the letter sent to Neml. An AI interprets the letter, changing Neml’s actions and the story’s outcome.

4311810.title: Wasteland Orchard
4311810.short_description: A Survival-Farming-Roguelite Game with Idle elements

4311860.title: Ana's Auto Fellatio
4311860.short_description: Ana’s Auto Fellatio is a hand-drawn 2D adult mechanic simulator and visual novel starring the futanari protagonist Ana. Manage a car repair shop, take on repair jobs, level up with perks, unlock random benefits, enjoy erotic CGs, and balance business, time, and self-pleasure in a sandbox experience.

4312050.title: A Lucky Hunt With : Thalia
4312050.short_description: Embark on a sensual ladybug-hunting adventure with Thalia, an attractive young woman. In this hidden object game, explore each location to discover what lies beneath Thalia's enticing layers.

4312080.title: Without Sanctuary
4312080.short_description: Without Sanctuary is an underground fighting game set inside the El-Malo nightclub. No rules, no mercy—only raw combat. Choose powerful or fast fighters, battle for glory, and claim the prize in brutal fight nights where only one survives.

4312090.title: Marzu
4312090.short_description: Marzu is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore shifting ancient ruins, solve environmental puzzles, and survive an unseen presence in an atmosphere of constant dread.

4312150.title: Lost Dude
4312150.short_description: Lost Dude is an atmospheric 2D platform-adventure game that follows a character who sets out on a journey to find their lost friend, experiences various events along the way, and embarks on new adventures together after reuniting.

4312360.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
4312360.short_description: Bram Stoker’s Dracula is a gothic horror visual novel faithfully adapted from Bram Stoker’s 1897 novel. Two POVs: Jonathan Harker and Count Dracula. Epistolary storytelling. Immersive classical music. Mature themes.

4312440.title: Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming
4312440.short_description: ✈️ Step aboard Hentai Clicker: Airi is streaming 😏 Click to collect ❤️, unlock stylish flight attendant outfits, and enjoy an addictive clicker game with a classy, playful hostess who knows how to tease at 30,000 feet.

4312580.title: Geopogo Cities: Windsor–Detroit
4312580.short_description: A real-world city-building simulation where you shape the future of downtown Windsor–Detroit. Zone, redevelop, and experiment with growth using real map data in a living urban sandbox.

4312750.title: Type The Rhythm
4312750.short_description: A rhythm typing trainer where you type real words to the beat. Augmented proprioception helps you improve your speed and accuracy while flowing through a variety of musical genres and neon-soaked visuals. Whether you hunt-and-peck or blast 150 wpm blindfolded, Type The Rhythm moves you forward.

4313160.title: Castle of the Winds
4313160.short_description: Castle of the Winds is a classic early Windows roguelike. Set in a world inspired by Norse mythology, players explore procedurally generated dungeons beneath a quiet village, battling monsters, discovering magical items, and unraveling the mystery of an ancient evil.

4313300.title: BLOCKUELITE
4313300.short_description: A roguelite game where you play as a block shooting blocks at other shapes.

4313460.title: Publish! A Game About Making Games
4313460.short_description: In this game, you can actually make real games.. literally! As the sole Game Designer you are the last hope for a failing company. Your mission: develop the ultimate game titles by stitching together absurd genres under your boss’s crazy demands. Get your game onto STIM before your Sanity hits zero!

4313640.title: Neverveil Gate
4313640.short_description: NeverVeil Gate is an online multiplayer social deduction game where words are weapons and trust is fragile. Players complete tasks while an Imposter hides among them, unable to kill directly but able to summon the Gate’s entity with a secret keyword. Trust the wrong voice and the gate will answer.

4313690.title: Son of Man
4313690.short_description: Experience the last 3 years of Jesus through his eyes and the eyes of witnesses, walking through beautiful scenarios and solving puzzles in the historically accurated world of 1st century.

4313700.title: GravBoost
4313700.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4313700.short_description: In GravBoost, gravity is your greatest ally and your deadliest foe. Master the art of the gravitational slingshot to intercept orbital targets. Manage your fuel and time wisely in this physics-driven space sim where precision is the only way to survive the cosmic pull.

4314020.title: Aonaran Nevaeh
4314020.short_description: AONARAN: NEVAEH is a first-person psychological horror puzzle experience focused on exploration, observation, and environmental problem-solving. Investigate a quiet suburban block, interpret cryptic signals, and complete a session-based run where mistakes trigger escalating manifestations.

4314230.title: God Of Bath VR
4314230.short_description: A VR action game based on the hit Korean webtoon God of Bath. Experience comedic yet intense scrubbing-based combat and hilarious bathhouse battles driven by real hand movements.

4314240.title: OnlyVans
4314240.short_description: OnlyVans is an open-world adult adventure where you live on the road as a vanlifer creator. Explore a vast stylized world, meet tempting characters, build intimacy, push boundaries, shoot spicy content, customize your van, and chase desire wherever the road takes you.

4314300.title: Sinful Testament
4314300.short_description: Houston, Texas, 1925. A heroine from 2025 is reborn in the body of a recently murdered gangster’s daughter and becomes “compensation” for the local gang called the Devil’s Six. Six dangerous men, seven deadly sins, and a choice between Redemption and Fall.

4314340.title: The Reflection
4314340.short_description: The Reflection is a ritual-based co-op horror game where players attempt to exorcise a demonic entity while being relentlessly hunted. Investigate cursed locations, perform the correct rituals, stay silent, and work together under pressure — one mistake can mean certain death.

4314470.title: Despair Beneath the Sunless Sky
4314470.short_description: A psychological horror RPG blending dark fantasy and mystery, where sanity is a precious commodity. Explore a relentless open world, confront grotesque horrors in turn-based combat, and make irreversible choices. Uncover deep lore and mysteries visible only to those with discerning eyes.

4314490.title: Undo My Seal, Senpai!
4314490.short_description: The Guardian Witches who watch over the elemental spell stones have been trapped by darkness. Free them from their enchanted paintings, earn their trust, and unlock adorable new outfits for each witch.

4314740.title: Malignant
4314740.short_description: The Town of Daybreak has a dark secret. The local population has mutated into ungodly horrors, a cult has taken charge and the military is closing in. Sometimes to beat them...You have to join them. Fight off endless hordes of ungodly horrors as you harness the power of mutation to even the odds.

4314750.title: Carly's World
4314750.short_description: Reality may be often disappointing but granted a second chance to relive your life is promising start. You get to become a 16 year old girl named Carly who finally gets the chance to prove herself but at the cost that her nightmares might be real. A Visual Novel with sparse Rougelike gameplay.

4314770.title: SnekromancY
4314770.short_description: Snake, but you summon the undead in a roguelite horde-survivor dungeon.

4314780.title: Echowood
4314780.short_description: Relax and enjoy the tranquility of Echowood, an adventure farming simulator. The game takes place in a world where humanity has been displaced by nature. Humans have harmed nature too much, and for that, nature has destroyed them. Since then, the world has become calm and peaceful.

4314860.title: Dino Age: The First Fracture
4314860.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4314860.short_description: Awake in a prehistoric swamp and discover the primal world of Owen. In this standalone survival-RPG, you craft weapons, master skills like Hatching & Cooking, and battle ‘Corrupted’ dinosaurs. Defeat the Time Fracture Boss to save the Triassic Era.

4314930.title: You are the light – An Audiovisual VR Journey
4314930.short_description: “You Are the Light” is a procedural VR audio-visual experience that takes you through four scenes — Morning, Midday, Rain, and Night — on an emotional journey of light and music, where glowing particles form an immersive, musically choreographed light show in sync with the sound.

4314970.title: VANADEN
4314970.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4314970.short_description: Vanaden is a first-person survival horror game set in a cursed, fortress-like labyrinth. Hide from monsters, solve puzzles, and navigate shifting corridors where stealth and every decision determine your survival.

4315040.title: Hearth and Hamlet
4315040.short_description: Gather resources and grow your settlement from a humble camp into a vibrant, magic-filled kingdom! Hearth and Hamlet is an incremental citybuilder game in a cozy pixelart style. Assign workers, unlock new buildings, policies, and magic, trade with faraway lands, and construct your ideal settlement!

4315120.title: Rescue Over 100 Town Cats
4315120.short_description: This is a 3D casual game in which you control the main character and explore the town to find and rescue over 100 lost cats. The cats are lurking around the town, lost, worried, troubled, and behaving in all sorts of ways.

4315510.title: Ashbane
4315510.short_description: Ashbane is a turn-based tactical RPG where you lead a mercenary guild in a world that rewards power and punishes mistakes. Recruit and customize your warband, take on dangerous jobs or strike at rival guilds, and lead expeditions where every encounter has lasting consequences.

4315610.title: Guns & Thorns
4315610.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4315610.short_description: Fight through hordes of bandits and a powerfull boss in this fast-paced, combat-heavy 2D-Pixel-Platformer. Explore the wild west-inspired world and discover many secrets lying within. Can you do it and regain what was stolen from you?

4315620.title: Case Closed
4315620.short_description: Case Closed is an 3D isometric point & click adventure with puzzle elements, you play as the ambitious police detective Gonzales who's investigating a strange murder of a famous hollywood actor.

4315640.title: Just A Man And His Ladder
4315640.short_description: Descend into a vast network of forgotten caves, twisting corridors, ancient ruins, and undiscovered terrain. As the last hope of humanity, you’ll carve your own path by building and demolishing blocks, battling hostile creatures, and scavenging vital resources.

4315650.title: TET~CRAFT: The Fourth Temple
4315650.short_description: Be a young god learning, as you already are - always at least one better, if not me then at least Jesus - and as he advised, re-become childlike with a new digital space Lego(tm)! And no! You *don't* have to clean up after - nor will it hurt your (parents?) feet!

4316080.title: High Risk
4316080.short_description: An incremental investment game where you’re never safe. You bet your money, sign high-risk contracts, and buy upgrades knowing one bad decision can wipe you out.

4316220.title: The Long Way Down
4316220.short_description: THE LONG WAY DOWN is a first-person digging action game where you carve your own tunnels in real time, mine valuable minerals, find unique items, and sell your finds to fund upgrades. Drill for oil, refine it into fuel, and keep pushing deeper. The deeper you go, the more demons you have to fight.

4318100.title: Tambo : The Last Night
4318100.short_description: On his first night guarding the vocational building, Jeri thought it would be a quiet shift. He had no idea that it would be his last night. As strange events began to unfold, forgotten pieces of tragedy slowly led him to a heartbreaking truth.

4318190.title: The No Arms Knight
4318190.short_description: TNAK is a 2D adventure packed with action and typing, where you'll need to type accurately, use your skills strategically, and type-type-type. You'll control Wailo, a knight who has lost his armor, and will defeat all his enemies to get it back.

4318250.title: Genesis: Voces de la Niebla (Voices of the Mist)
4318250.short_description: Investigate a murder at a lake marked by unexplained events. Play as a journalist trapped in his worst nightmare, explore unsettling locations, and survive a classic horror experience divided into three chapters.

4318400.title: I WILL DO IT SOON MAYBE LATER TOMORROW
4318400.short_description: A short narrative visual novel about procrastination, family, and the inner dialogue of a creative person. A story about how delaying decisions slowly erodes a life.

4318950.title: City of Hunger
4318950.short_description: A VR survival horror game inspired by 90s classics. Explore a city consumed by a parasitic outbreak, fight infected creatures with heavy weapons, and survive tense encounters where every sound matters.

4318970.title: Crime Union
4318970.short_description: Build your criminal empire from the shadows. Manage global networks, launder black money, hire specialists, and crush rival gangs in tactical card battles. In Crime Union, staying alive while the law watches your every move is just as hard as reaching the top. Don't get busted.

4319010.title: Idle Income
4319010.short_description: 400+ upgrades, prestige system, passive mining, unlockable currencies, perks, auto buyers, difficulty tiers and many more features - it's IDLE INCOME!

4319030.title: Kwartikum
4319030.short_description: An atmospheric puzzle adventure about guiding a lone figure through a strange land, discovering new ways to solve box based challenges.

4319100.title: Cleaning House
4319100.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4319100.short_description: Battle through a living hotel that feeds on fear. Blast monsters, collect buffs, and push deeper through procedurally generated rooms in this first-person horror roguelite where escape means facing what haunts you.

4319700.title: Mirage Of Tower
4319700.short_description: A pure platformer game containing nothing but platforming and the occasional wordless story. Dreamlike and surreal, yet full of multi-layered symbolism.

4319900.title: Medieval Survivors: Village Defense
4319900.short_description: A 3D first-person action-strategy game with a fresh take on tower defense. Build and manage your village by day, then fight alongside it to survive intense night waves.

4319930.title: Video Poker 95
4319930.short_description: A retro-style, rogue-like deck-builder where you play Video Poker. Collect unique cards, download powerful software and merge your cards to unlock new synergies and craft the deck you need to conquer the many challenges of Video Poker 95!

4320140.title: Awakewood
4320140.short_description: After your mother’s strange funeral, a black rain blocks the roads and leaves you stranded. The air smells like rotting fruit and nature begins to mutate. Can you get out of here before the forest finds you?

4320230.title: The Peak of Life
4320230.short_description: By freely planning your studies and career, combining travel, business, investment, or even fishing to make money, purchase the property you like, catch the one you love, and reach the peak of your life. There will be many unexpected events in this process. Are you ready to deal with them?

4320360.title: CO2 Catcher
4320360.short_description: Save the world from Global Warming by exploring green energy technologies in the CO2 Catcher! Use mouse controls to catch CO2! Every level has a new technology to explore from solar panels, tidal power to gravity batteries! Gain energy and use it to power power ups such as carbon capturing trees!

4320510.title: Boob Simulator
4320510.short_description: Boob Simulator is a lighthearted adult sandbox focused on visual fantasy, customization, and natural motion. Choose different looks, poses, lighting, and vibes while enjoying a relaxed, non-explicit viewing experience designed purely for casual enjoyment.

4320550.title: Critternauts
4320550.short_description: A modern JRPG adventure across the globe. Battle rogue critters with ancient tech, explore real-world cities with your party, uncover hidden secrets and solve the mystery of the Critternauts.

4320560.title: 永生镇/Everliving Town
4320560.short_description: In a town of exactly 245 residents, every breath is a subtraction. A narrative experience blending Gothic hand-drawn art and natural history puzzles. Waking into a world of "domestic bliss" as thick as a fungal bloom, will you submit to the morbid order, or shatter the balance?

4320600.title: Magic Fairy Fun Blast
4320600.short_description: Magic Fairy Fun Blast is a challenging and fast paced arcade style bullet hell arena wave based shooter. You are a fairy that just wants to have fun but your version of fun is different than the rest of the world.

4320620.title: Delegatory
4320620.short_description: A "round-based" incremental game about climbing the ranks within a dystopian retro-future corporation. Delegate tasks to your increasingly underpaid team of interns. Leverage a large branching skill tree to upgrade your team's efficiencies, and unlock unique powers.

4320660.title: Dhairyam - The Patient One
4320660.short_description: Dhairyam - The Patient One is a narrative-driven action-adventure game rooted in Indian folklore. Step into the role of Dhairyavaan, a fearless hero who wields the divine weapon Pralay. Face ancient demons born of curses as you explore haunting locations and reclaim powers lost to time.

4320710.title: Ball's Journey
4320710.short_description: Ball’s Journey is a snappy 3D action-platformer that puts your jump sense to the test. Climb towering stages with tight movement and daring routes, grab every Star, and use instant retries to push further each run. How far can you go?

4320730.title: Super Onslaught
4320730.short_description: A real time strategy, tower defense game where you can evolve your turrets and give them special abilities.

4320860.title: Cuckold my brother's wife
4320860.short_description: Enjoy your new life living with your brother's wife, who suddenly appeared.

4320950.title: Static
4320950.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game built around attention, perception, and fear.

4320970.title: STIGMA: Unnamed
4320970.short_description: Introduce tactical rhythm combat in STIGMA, a semi-auto action roguelike. Command 100+ stunning agents and craft game-breaking builds with 40 unique Black Box items. Synchronize your frequency to decimate the Noise in this high-octane, dark futurism experience.

4321030.title: MalO On Camera Deluxxx
4321030.short_description: After being followed by SCP-1471-A for a few days, she finally decides to show herself, and now she really wants to get to know you better. Catch the lewd anomaly before she enters your room, and discover why shes been following you around~

4321050.title: Cardora
4321050.short_description: A multiplayer card game that fuses Poker and Okey mechanics with powerful active and passive cards. Build clever combinations, disrupt your opponents with interaction cards, and outplay everyone at the table.

4321120.title: The Curator
4321120.short_description: The Curator is a roguelite gallery-management simulation about managing your own traveling art gallery. Upgrade your van, re-organize artworks to unleash synergies while satisfying picky visitors. Prepare for daily events and curate a collection that pleases everyone, including the Baron Family.

4321130.title: Coinsweeper
4321130.short_description: Coinsweeper is a roguelite that combines classic Minesweeper with risk management, deck-building and gambling mechanics.

4321180.title: ノヴァチェイサーズ
4321180.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4321180.short_description: Open World × Tag Game × 3D TPS Run freely through a fantasy world in a high-speed 3D chase game! Spin upgrade slots, build your character, and race toward the mysterious sword embedded in the world!

4321250.title: Holy Waifu
4321250.short_description: Holy Waifu is an exciting puzzle game featuring seductive waifu nuns and a tempting atmosphere! Complete 30 unique levels, unlock new illustrations, and admire the details of provocative images. All images are saved in your personal gallery in high quality.

4321260.title: Waifu Casino
4321260.short_description: Waifu Casino is an exciting puzzle game featuring sexy waifus and an atmosphere of luxury and excitement! Complete 30 unique levels, unlock new illustrations, and enjoy the vibrant details of each casino girl. All collected images are saved in your personal gallery in high quality.

4321290.title: Mall Ryders
4321290.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4321290.short_description: Mall Ryders is a high-energy arcade adventure where you blaze through a chaotic mall as unforgettable characters, mastering movement, smashing obstacles, and embracing playful destruction. Race, drift, and explore in fast-paced mayhem with quirky style and unmatched momentum.

4321330.title: RAM Clicker
4321330.short_description: RAM Clicker is an idle clicker game where you goal is to harness all the Memory you can to stop the RAM Crisis of 2026, before the evil AI overlords hog every last piece of RAM on earth. Fight Back!

4321370.title: Fake It Till You Make It. Online Guru Simulator
4321370.short_description: Third-person satirical simulator about becoming rich and famous by pretending you already are. Post fake success, sell scams, manage outrage, and try not to get exposed - or at least get exposed profitably.

4321400.title: Gold Up
4321400.short_description: Gold Up is a physics-driven online co-op climbing adventure where two players must carry a treasure to the surface by switching roles, throwing it upward, and coordinating every move. Success depends entirely on trust, timing, and teamwork.

4321660.title: Need For Steal
4321660.short_description: Steal fast, stay hidden, and trust no one. In this free-for-all multiplayer heist game, players race to complete their loot lists while sabotaging rivals and escaping security.

4321680.title: Healer
4321680.short_description: Heal your party as you defeat the leaders of the demon lord army. Find your unique playstyle by combining upgrades. As you die, you will learn the patterns and mechanics. Maybe one day you won't have to come back to life to save the world!

4321730.title: Cosmo Strike: Complete Edition
4321730.short_description: In the distant year of 2359, previously unknown alien forces have attacked Earth and its colonies. You are an agent on a special mission sent by the global senate to repel the attack and stop the alien forces.

4321750.title: Drift For Life
4321750.short_description: High speed, nonstop drifting, and one goal: the highest score. Drift For Life delivers a pure arcade drift experience.

4321890.title: Coral Social Club
4321890.short_description: Join the multiplayer mermaid club! Hang out with your friends and meet new ones as you sing to rescue lost fish. Swim around, design your unique look, and collect all kinds of sea creatures.

4321940.title: Isekai Mage Girl Gacha Pull Simulator: Elemental Card Collection
4321940.short_description: Earn → Pull → Duplicate → Sell → Pull again. Your bankroll is roguelike until you complete the collection. A brand-new sequel is here from the creator of “Schoolgirl Card Pull Simulator,” which sold 1,000 copies in just two days!

4322000.title: DesktopDancer
4322000.short_description: DesktopDancer automatically dances to any music on your computer, bringing rhythm and life to your desktop.

4322050.title: CPU Invaders - Aim Hero
4322050.short_description: A sequel to the Steam Awards finalist, this time, the invasion isn’t here to destroy your PC, it’s here to train you! Your desktop becomes a live reflex arena with targets, traps and challenges. Interact with your desktop while playing, watch Youtube videos, chat with your friends and more!

4322150.title: サシ飲み萃香ちゃん
4322150.short_description: 萃香ちゃんに言葉を教えていろんな会話をし、メニューを作ったり奢ったりしながらまったりと飲んで過ごそう！

4322160.title: Space Missions
4322160.short_description: Design rockets , manage your budget , and complete missions on unique planets. Each level challenges you to plan differently. Compete on leaderboards to see who can complete missions with the least cost.

4322180.title: Coffin Hunter
4322180.short_description: The galaxy remembers your notoriety in this fast-paced bullet hell roguelite. Scavenge everything as factions escalate with alerts, patrols and retaliation waves. Sell loot for upgrades or hoard it to craft soul-bought unlocks and take down 100 named bounty hunters coming for your head.

4322400.title: Breadwinner Simulator
4322400.short_description: Imagine being a middle-aged corporate slave, working hard to earn a living and pay off life's bills. Don't let the stress crush you!

4322630.title: Dragon Ridge Valley
4322630.short_description: Leave the modern world behind and start over in a cozy fantasy shopkeeping RPG. Own a shop, craft and trade, explore the valley, and fight back against growing threats. Build relationships and carve out a magical new home in Valeheart Village. Welcome to Dragon Ridge Valley.

4322960.title: Trail & Error
4322960.short_description: A chaotic co-op survival game for 1–4 players where you travel the trail, manage supplies, survive disasters, and argue with friends. Work together to keep the wagon moving, adapt to random events, and try to make it to the end in one piece.

4323050.title: ChoreoCraft
4323050.short_description: A relaxing, creative editor for building dance choreographies. Mix songs from a growing catalog with dance animations, characters, and environments. Create in any style (anime, fantasy, cartoon, realistic & more) then share and remix with the community. Your imagination is the limit!

4323130.title: Sniper Camouflage Orange Spy Warrior I Buried Two Bodies in the Garden and the Police Haven't Figured Out Yet That They're Missing Because They Were a Lonely Old Couple Who Had No Relatives Simulator 2026
4323130.short_description: Sniper simulator game with sponge bob graphics

4323200.title: Where We Used to Play
4323200.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game focused on observation, anomaly detection, and meaningful choices that lead to multiple endings inside a house filled with forgotten memories.

4323230.title: Dark Watching Chapter 2
4323230.short_description: After crossing the bunker, you reach the shopping mall, but you quickly realize that there is even more of the virus there…

4323330.title: Extinction Zone
4323330.short_description: EXTINCTION ZONE is a zombie themed combat action survival game with 2D pixel art environments, puzzles to solve and a conspiracy to unravel.

4323380.title: This Game Costs 200 Dollars
4323380.short_description: This psychological "comedic" experience is worth your 200 dollars. Every single cent. This game is unlike anything you've ever seen or ever will see. It's 200 dollars worth of pure joy, amazement, and awkward conversations.

4323500.title: Whispering Ledger
4323500.short_description: Embrace your role as a new merchant in a city caught between warring powers, where every deal shapes your reputation and your humanity. Build relationships with unforgettable characters, navigate moral gray zones, and discover how far you'll go to protect your business, and the people around it.

4323550.title: Kagaribi
4323550.short_description: "The Unknown is the Path of Life." I create worlds where AI meets the Human Soul. Based in Japan, NewForever STUDIO specializes in atmospheric Japanese Gothic Horror & emotional soundscapes. Debut Title: "KAGARIBI" (2026) CEO / Composer / Storyteller : MASAKO(Gambo AI Ambassador)

4323560.title: Desideratum
4323560.short_description: Desideratum is essentially a canonical Anaxverse pulp fiction Visual Novel in Story Mode with RPG elements if playing in Game Mode. It tells the story from the perspectives of a beginner monster hunter and forlorn nosferatu and features dark fantasy, horror, and science fiction.

4323690.title: CTRL+ESC
4323690.short_description: CTRL+ESC is a hacker-themed idle clicker where you exploit systems, crack encryptions, and build an unstoppable network of automated exploits. Click to hack, solve captchas and minigames to boost production, and unlock powerful upgrades as you progress through increasingly complex systems.

4323800.title: Guardian of the Sacred Seal
4323800.short_description: In another world, the protagonist works alongside a mysterious young man, handling requests that appear ordinary but conceal subtle changes beneath the surface. Through repeated choices, relationships between the characters gradually evolve, and the hidden truths of this world slowly come to light.

4323880.title: Loophole: The Prison Break
4323880.short_description: Loophole is a 3D puzzle platformer with a top-down perspective, built around a unique time-loop cloning mechanic. Think steps ahead to choreograph a symphony of your past actions to solve puzzles that are impossible for just one person to overcome.

4323920.title: Only Clone
4323920.short_description: You wake up alone in a decaying underground bunker, you don't know how you got here or who you are, but you know the world before you are not what it seems. Explore the world, solve puzzles, and uncover the secrets that the AI overseer keeps hidden from you.

4323970.title: Your Fitness Wife
4323970.short_description: A cute desktop simulation featuring a fitness wife companion who casually strikes adorable poses, adding a soft, playful charm to your screen.

4324040.title: Echoes of Vision
4324040.genre: RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4324040.short_description: This is a turn-based strategy game. You'll assume the role of the Special Investigations Division Chief at the Bureau of Crisis Response (BCR), leading agents deep into Bleak Mountains City, a metropolis steeped in retro 1980s charm, to investigate and contain various supernatural “Visions”.

4324270.title: RLRacer
4324270.short_description: Master the season in this 2D roguelike racer! Meet escalating targets against tough AI up to the finale. Invest tactically in upgrades & crew. Win to unlock new cars with unique abilities that completely change your strategy for the next run.

4324310.title: 食屎啦你 Eat Shit
4324310.short_description: Eat shit is a difficult game with multiple scripts. In the game, players need to find the toilet and release the sphincter under the influence of sphincter magic, and use the excrement to unlock your skills. But the road to find the toilet is dangerous, whether you can survive.

4324380.title: Cat Minesweeper
4324380.short_description: A casual Minesweeper game with a cat quietly accompanying you.

4324430.title: jankenpon
4324430.short_description: A roguelike Rock–Paper–Scissors tournament where cheating is allowed, builds stack, and the rules slowly fall apart.

4324540.title: 怪異対策特異機関ー幻視天研所ー
4324540.short_description: As commander, you direct teams to eliminate Anomalies. These entities defy human understanding, and one wrong order can doom a squad. Study each Anomaly’s nature and keep your people alive—stay calm, decide fast, and adapt as the battle shifts.

4324590.title: 100 School Cats
4324590.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4324600.title: 100 Pet Cats
4324600.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4324610.title: 100 Madagascar Cats
4324610.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4324620.title: 100 Factory Cats
4324620.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4324630.title: 100 Nature Cats
4324630.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4324650.title: The Wreck That Should Not Be
4324650.short_description: When the mysterious Doctor Hoffmann hires your submarine to explore the east Caribbean sea, you accept, unware of the dangers that lie ahead...

4324670.title: Sky Mates
4324670.short_description: Sky Mates is a turn-based, multiplayer-only 1v1 tactics game in which you assemble a team of deadly steampunk pirates to gain control over a crumbling airship.

4324740.title: Deep Sea Bubble Shooter: Reflex Challenge
4324740.short_description: Deep Sea Bubble Shooter is a fast-paced reflex aim trainer! Pop the bubbles with precision and speed, master 150 levels, earn stars, unlock upgrades, and find the fastest ways to clear each stage for maximum points and thrilling bubble-blasting action.

4324770.title: BattleSpinners
4324770.short_description: BATTLESPINNERS is a fast-paced, pixel-art action game where you build and battle customizable spinning tops. Master physics-based combat, knock your opponents out of the arena, and rise to become the ultimate champion!

4324780.title: Monday Meow
4324780.short_description: Cats, a deserted island, and office equipment! A corporate retreat to a deserted island goes horribly wrong, and it's up to little ol' you to find everyone and bring them back to camp.

4324860.title: RootKit
4324860.short_description: RootKit is a tactical hacking game set inside a corporate honeypot network. Track hostile hackers, infiltrate their systems, steal crypto and data, and eliminate them before they trace your connection.

4324900.title: A Game About Bouncing DVD
4324900.short_description: A minimalist incremental game where you watch DVD logos bounce endlessly, earn points, upgrade your screen, and unlock increasingly powerful upgrades.

4324970.title: HIJACKED
4324970.short_description: Play as a rogue digital parasite, surviving by hijacking the minds of cybernetic soldiers in this turn-based tactics roguelike. Leap from mind to mind, weaponizing their bodies and abilities to wipe out the machine forces hunting you 🪱🧠

4324990.title: Down With Hell: Crystal
4324990.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4324990.short_description: Play as M in this retro styled platform-shooter and blast your way up to heaven!

4325070.title: Spray Days
4325070.short_description: Transform your life from a lazy outcast into a spray master! Restore items in your workshop, complete on-site jobs for colorful clients, and build your painting empire. Master the painting system and match perfect colors in this satisfying simulator. It's time to start creating!

4327060.title: Elzypon
4327060.short_description: Elyzpon is metaphysical pedagogy disguised as a turn-based JRPG.

4327140.title: Cells
4327140.short_description: ells is a small and minimalist mouse game built for calm, focused play. Click, interact, and enjoy clean visuals and satisfying feedback. No story, no pressure — just a relaxing flow and a soundtrack that shines with headphones.

4327260.title: LoCoMo
4327260.short_description: LoCoMo is a cozy, creative world-building game where you shape living landscapes with tracks, paths, and ports. Build and connect evolving villages in real time, freely experiment and decorate, and watch townsfolk adapt to every change you make on an ever-growing canvas.

4327290.title: Gotogra
4327290.short_description: Gotogra is a tactical roguelike deckbuilder where positioning shapes the battlefield. Choose a weapon for each run and master its unique deck, playstyle, and mechanics. Ascend the dungeons of a cursed castle and uncover the dark veil that overshadows the realm.

4327300.title: Silicon Gate
4327300.short_description: Explore a deadly prehistoric jungle concealed inside an arcade machine in this co-op survival horror game. Evade horrific creatures, complete dangerous quests, and extract with resources to expand your desert laboratory, solo or with friends, all while uncovering the secrets of Project Silicon Gate.

4327330.title: Shanwen
4327330.short_description: 1990s: Windswept mining town Linshan, dependent on fading coal mines, worshipped a mountain god’s stele. After it cracked and oozed brown liquid, a strange illness spread. Lin Tianqing returned for his sick father, uneasy as the eerie town neared, having overheard whispers.

4327480.title: Click to Live
4327480.short_description: Click to Live is a minimalist clicker where every click is a currency. Earn clicks, buy upgrades, develop your character, and watch your virtual life change step by step.

4327490.title: Alarial's Blessing
4327490.short_description: Experience the tragic tale of three wandering mercenaries and the lonely goddess who wouldn't let them die. Fight challenging, turn-based battles and explore a continent of forgotten mysteries in this fresh twist on the JRPG genre.

4327500.title: Futa Hero
4327500.short_description: Futa Hero is an RPG adventure combining classic turn-based combat with erotic futanari girls. In this adventure you should be ready to both outcomes. . . to please and to be pleased by your opponents.

4327630.title: Glamour Photographer
4327630.short_description: Fulfill your dream of becoming a glamour photographer, meet beautiful women from different cultures and backgrounds, and maybe even marry one of them!

4327730.title: 洛希极限 Roche Limit
4327730.short_description: ​Roche Limit​ is a 2D pixel sci-fi action roguelite, blending high-speed aerial combat with ARPG builds. Choose a mecha-girl, build her skills on the battle, and face the cosmic legion. Between runs, bond with the girls for more skill possibles and stories. Prevent cataclysm before the moon falls.

4327890.title: Bloom
4327890.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4327890.short_description: New responsibilities, budding romance! Astra Vale has been asked to take charge in making improvements to Café Bloom. Problem is, she can't quite decide who to ask for help. Her ice-cold coworker, the charming local artist, her best friend, or the mysterious new regular~

4327920.title: City of Promotion
4327920.short_description: City of Promotion est un jeu qui combine les échecs et la construction de colonies, où les joueurs utilisent les règles de déplacement des pièces d'échecs pour collecter des ressources, développer des colonies et résister aux attaques de monstres en essaim.

4328050.title: Besitupia: Mediator
4328050.short_description: After the parabiosis, everything went off track. You lost most of your memories. You will have to learn how to use your new abilities and understand how they can help you make sense of everything happening around you. Whether you can adapt depends solely on you.

4328070.title: WORDGUN
4328070.short_description: Arcade typing shooter WITH minimalist stick figure visuals. TYPE words to FIRE YOUR gun and blast approaching enemies. FAST-paced action where YOUR keyboard skills determine survival. How FAST can you TYPE WHEN the horde closes in?

4328130.title: A Game About Ramen
4328130.short_description: A Game About Ramen is cozy little game puts you behind the counter of a humble ramen shop. You’ll serve steaming bowls to hungry customers, experiment with ingredients, and keep the shop running late into the night.

4328150.title: Shmoblins
4328150.short_description: A co-op survival game about a tribe of mischievous creatures. Hunt for food, gather resources, upgrade your camp together with your friends... and kick everything and everyone, a lot!

4328270.title: Ravelle - Last Draw
4328270.genre: Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
