4338750.short_description: Face unique bosses and uncover an intricate story in this narrative-driven roguelite deckbuilder. Upgrade and stack your cards strategically to unleash powerful synergies, counter boss actions, and progress through a handcrafted, mysterious world.

4339410.title: Operation: Manor
4339410.short_description: Operation Manor is a provocative, satirical multiplayer game about maintaining appearances at all costs. Work to keep up the illusion of a harmless agricultural facility or sabotage it from within as a Traitor. There are no heroes here. Only roles, reports, and consequences.

4339530.title: Runeomicon: Training Room
4339530.genre: Action, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4339530.short_description: Practice rune drawing outside the ritual. Runeomicon: Training Room lets you train across multiple difficulty levels and sharpen your skills without the threat of failure. Learn the patterns, build muscle memory, and prepare yourself for the relentless pressure of the full ritual in Runeomicon.

4339850.title: Dust
4339850.short_description: Dust is a first-person survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world filled with zombies. Explore an open environment, gather resources, manage hunger and health, craft weapons, and build shelters to survive in a hostile world.

4339970.title: First Class Rescue
4339970.short_description: Climb the mountain by building your path in this cute & cosy roguelite puzzle platformer. Make your way to the top of the mountain to rescue the residents of Pine Peaks!

4340250.title: Myriad Realms
4340250.short_description: Thousand Professions Realm is a single-player game inspired by classic 2D side-scrollers, with diverse classes, tons of equipment, and gear-tied visuals. Explore the fantasy realm solo, grind levels, boost power, and customize looks via gear. Enjoy pure hack-and-slash fun.

4340310.title: 政通人和
4340310.genre: Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4340310.short_description: "Peace and Prosperity" is a independently developed ink-wash style historical strategy game set in an alternate pre-Qin period of China. Starting from a small village of just a few hundred people, and conquer all sides to gradually build their own vassal state with millions of people.

4340370.title: 八長調といにしえの楽譜
4340370.short_description: Shirabe Hatcho and Ancient Music Score is a puzzle-solving ADV game where you solve the puzzles by ear. Listen to audio, read music, and play an instrument. Use your sense of pitch to solve the mystery and prevent the phantom thief from committing his crimes as a member of the detective agency.

4340380.title: Launch President
4340380.short_description: President Launcher is a simple physics-based sandbox game created purely for fun. Tap the launch button to send the president flying into the air, and use sliders to adjust gravity and launch power. There are no goals or rules—just experiment the unpredictable, over-the-top physics simulation.

4340640.title: Zeri Factory
4340640.short_description: ZeliFactory is a falling-block puzzle × 2D action game where you control both the blocks dropping from above and a freely moving character called Zeli at the same time, clearing lines to earn high scores.

4342170.title: Deadly Dimensions
4342170.short_description: A solo roguelite horror. Traverse multiple procedurally generated Dimensions of Earth and scavenge all of the Data you can possibly find from them to sell it to a faceless Corporate entity.

4342560.title: Cyber Traps & The Detective Squad
4342560.short_description: Set in a Brazilian school, it is a Point-and-Click game focused on solving puzzles and mysteries concerning the dangers of the digital environment. The plot features anthropomorphic characters inspired by Brazilian fauna, known as the 'Bando Detetive'.

4342720.title: VILE
4342720.short_description: A grotesque plague is mutating and reanimating London’s deceased. Parliament has ordered you specifically to eradicate the hordes of undead and discover the source of the infection before the capital collapses in this retro FPS.

4343220.title: SCP Studies
4343220.short_description: In this game you explore a SCP Facility, while trying to stay sane and finish objectives by completing everything the SCP's have to offer. Interact with anomalous objects; experience, avoid, destroy, and use them. Learn how the facility operates and try to to keep it running as long as you can.

4343350.title: Punk Plush Panic
4343350.short_description: Punk Plush Panic is a chaotic 2.5 platformer in which players swap between 3 characters, using their explosive elemental combinations to fight off waves of gluttonous aliens.

4343400.title: 挂机修仙
4343400.short_description: 轻松挂机，修仙无忧！一键[~]隐藏界面 + 任务栏!  装备强化重铸神品灵纹、采矿炼器打造天级装备、炼丹提速突破境界、属性丹堆叠跨阶优势， 绘制专属符箓，如技能般释放攻击、防御、辅助等特效，符箓师等级越高解锁越强符箓！自动修炼、灵田种植、矿洞采集、功法搭配等丰富玩法全覆盖，一步步突破境界，最终挑战轮回塔。可加群1080655844沟通

4343490.title: Rogue Bytes
4343490.short_description: Rogue Bytes is an in-depth, incremental roguelite game about going rogue in the byte-verse! Defeat enemies, collect Bytes and other loot, research and unlock upgrades, level up your weapons, and become a byte legend!

4343500.title: Radical Crepe Smuggling Game
4343500.short_description: Crepes are scarce in the city. Our Rad friends bring in regular supplies at random drop points on the roofs. The greedy garks will steal them all, so we have to outsmart them and move the crates each day. Unique gameplay swapping roles in single player or multiplayer coop. Hurry for your best score!

4343510.title: Cyberknight: Awakening
4343510.short_description: Awaken in a kingdom where magic has been long forgotten. Build your deck, engage in real-time strategy combat, and stop the corrupt technological uprising in this cyber-fantasy roguelike.

4343540.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: Violet Plum
4343540.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful violet plum mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

4343560.title: Lost in Reefs 2
4343560.short_description: Play the sequel of the underwater Match3 game "Lost in Reefs" from Rumbic Studio. While other Match-3 games support only one gameplay mode (Swap or Chain), Lost in Reefs 2 goes a step further by now including 4 game modes.

4343600.title: Mo Wu Tian Gong
4343600.short_description: Mo Wu Tian Gong is an open-world survival-action game set in mythic ancient China. As both builder and warrior, you will "plan with ink, fight with steel" in a fractured yet beautiful world. Survive by gathering resources, constructing shelters, and farming.

4343610.title: Beachcomber
4343610.short_description: Take a quiet walk along the shore, collecting unique shells with each new wave. Find ones that speak to you, or seek out ones with hidden surprises. How you play is up to you. Discover the world inside every shell.

4343620.title: Pantheon
4343620.short_description: Manage a mysterious machine as it summons and consumes eldritch entities in this incremental game. Every entity consumed makes the machine more powerful, and unlocks new mechanics.

4343660.title: Stabilize
4343660.short_description: Stabilize is a grid-based puzzle game where you block the flow of energy by placing and rotating tiles. Tiles can only be placed where paths connect, and every placement is permanent. Clear puzzles quickly to climb the global leaderboard and compete for the best time.

4343690.title: Saylor Animals Puzzle
4343690.short_description: Saylor Animals puzzle is simplictic jigsaw puzzle game with different animals puzzles

4343800.title: HaCo
4343800.short_description: "Deliver or Destroy? The choice is yours!" High-speed jet action meets heist mechanics in this up to 4-player online co-op. Pilot rusty robots, master the inertia, and dodge missiles to steal packages. Can you meet the quota before time runs out?

4343840.title: Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming
4343840.short_description: 🏖️🔥 Step into a hot beach fantasy with Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming! Click to collect ❤️, unlock sexy lifeguard outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Flirty voice lines, steamy progression, and nonstop summer teasing 😈🌴

4343860.title: Sandwich Shop Simulator
4343860.short_description: Run your own sandwich shop! Stock your ingredients, prepare delicious sandwiches, take payments, customize and expand your store, and become the best sandwich shop in town!

4343890.title: FUTANARI SEX
4343890.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4343890.short_description: FUTANARI SEX - is an erotic game in the genre of "Arkanoid", in which you will have to break the cubes and gradually discover really beautiful and hot images.

4343900.title: NARROW HOLES
4343900.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports
4343900.short_description: NARROW HOLES - is an erotic game in the genre of "Arkanoid", in which you will have to break the cubes and gradually discover really beautiful and hot images.

4343910.title: Compound Interest
4343910.short_description: Old Globe's center has collapsed: Now it's diesel fumes, flickering lights, and dirty work. Start with three thugs and five bucks. Take jobs, build your crew, manage loyalty and heat, and carve out your piece of New Sterling... or watch it all fall apart.

4344000.title: Complete Horror
4344000.short_description: This is a horror survival game.Join the female protagonist to explore an abandoned subway station full of mysteries, seeking escape in oppressive darkness. Balance exploration, puzzles, and combat—one mistake may plunge you into endless abyss. Arm yourself constantly to face terrors from the depths.

4344210.title: Keyboard Warrior
4344210.short_description: The keyboard IS the level! Slash your way through hordes of enemies to save your forest from destruction.

4344230.title: Shurigatto
4344230.short_description: A fast, precise spin-and-dash action game. You play a ninja cat tethered to a magic shuriken, clearing short, tight levels by rotating, switching colors, and chasing perfect runs.

4344260.title: Warped Point
4344260.short_description: Explore the unknown, master your weapons, and face the corruption and dangers that lurk while you embrace the chaos. Welcome to Warped Point, a mysterious world on the brink of collapse.

4344270.title: Tiny Misery
4344270.short_description: A sick mother and her young son move into the home of a lonely old woman. A tragic story inspired by the dark puppet animations of the 80s and 90s.

4344320.title: Scandere
4344320.short_description: An action platformer mixed with rouglike elements, gather items and other usefull trinkets and make your dream build. Scale up a tower to heaven, every run is different, and learn something that will benefit you in future runs!

4344380.title: P.A.W.A
4344380.short_description: P.A.W.A is an auto-chess roguelike inspired by TFT and Slay the Spire. Build a team of cool and cute creatures, combine and position your units wisely, create powerful synergies, and defeat challenging bosses.

4344480.title: A House Inside Me
4344480.short_description: A psychological horror experience told through environmental storytelling. Explore a house inhabited by trauma, denial, and fractured memories. Three endings. Multiple interpretations. This is the house that lives inside me.

4344620.title: Void Eaters
4344620.short_description: Void Eaters is a semi-idle incremental game where you play as a powerful mage shaping an army of mythical creatures. Destroy enemies and gather resources by casting spells or simply watch your army at work. Explore, upgrade, craft, and customize your forces to fit your strategy.

4344700.title: Nexus The Exception
4344700.short_description: Wake up in a dark and abandoned facility and uncover its secrets in this sci‑fi horror game focused on stealth and environmental puzzles. Explore, avoid deadly systems, and question the intentions of the entity watching you as you move closer to the truth.

4344760.title: Zero-G Combat
4344760.short_description: Enter the chaos of zero-gravity warfare. Zero-G Combat is a fast-paced online multiplayer shooter built with Unreal Engine 5. Master 360-degree movement, utilize tactical sci-fi weaponry, and dominate the arena where up is down and nowhere is safe.

4344770.title: Kuroba: Oghuz
4344770.short_description: Kuroba is a historical RTS set in the brutal frontier of 13th-century Anatolia. Build settlements, manage logistics, and command armies in grounded, realistic combat. No magic, no heroes—only economy, strategy, and leadership determine who endures.

4344780.title: MINIMAL PAIN
4344780.short_description: A minimalist 2D precision platformer where every jump matters. Simple mechanics, unforgiving level design, and constant failure. Learn from your mistakes, stay focused, and push forward through pure, intentional pain.

4344790.title: Difficult Drivers
4344790.short_description: Share control of a car with a friend! Coordinate the split of accelerating and steering. Dodge obstacles, swap roles, and thread narrow paths with precise teamwork (or go solo) as you climb toward the summit. Keep your cool and try to reach the top!

4344840.title: Crepuscule Alley
4344840.short_description: "Crepuscule Alley " is a 2D action game that combines '90s neighborhood management with real-time combat. Players take on the role of a landlord in a decaying district, fighting to defeat gangs and monsters, gathering resources, and recruiting and managing tenants to earn rent.

4344920.title: Coffee Critters
4344920.short_description: Serve lattes with tiny paws! Coffee Critters is a co-op simulation game where you play as adorable "trash animals" running a bustling café. from managing stock to drawing on cups, you control every aspect of the shop. Keep the fridge cold, the coffee hot, and your customers happy!

4345240.title: Breaking Point
4345240.short_description: A monotonous daily routine. The mannequin you brought home was more than just a thing. Escape your home while evading the mannequin that stalks you only when you look away. Your choices will define your destiny.

4345550.title: Pixelbound
4345550.short_description: A cozy idle game where every click creates art. Mine pixels, unlock powerful automation, and evolve your canvas from simple 4x4 blocks to stunning 256x256 masterpieces. No stress, no timers—just satisfying progress.

4345580.title: Afterclass: A High School Adventure
4345580.short_description: Afterclass is an adventure-simulation RPG where the final bell is just the beginning. Roam the campus, meet delightfully weird students, spark ridiculous quests, flirt irresponsibly, and watch perfectly normal school days spiral into glorious after-school chaos.

4345710.title: Neuroforge
4345710.short_description: Build an unlikely army in this medieval-fantasy roguelike auto-battler. Choose from 80+ heroes with unique powers, join one of 10 factions, and conquer the galaxy’s 10 planets to impose your supremacy. Every victory, every defeat… comes down to your choices.

4345720.title: Gravelix
4345720.short_description: Drop blocks that shatter into gravel particles! Connect same-colored areas across the full board width to clear them and score big. Chain reactions and combos reward strategic thinking in this retro arcade puzzler. Include also two players mode.

4345750.title: The Trials - Chapter Two
4345750.short_description: A classic 90s choose your own adventure style horror visual novel. Escape the horrors hunting you, make decisions, forge your own path. An original complete story with multiple endings. Choose your own play style with a Text Adventure Mode, sound effects, and an ambient soundtrack.

4345980.title: Breeze of Hope
4345980.short_description: Breeze of Hope is not just a game, but a quiet experience of freedom, hope, and calm. Through simplicity and atmosphere, it invites players to slow down, breathe, and reflect. As a first project, it shows that true hope can be felt through a gentle and emotional impact meaningful journey. have fun

4346000.title: Prophecy of Vul
4346000.short_description: Enter the queer forest of Inner Taiga! Wander through a whimsical pixel art world in a simple and engaging 2D platforming adventure. Join a cast of colourful animals on a journey of self-discovery and fellowship!

4346020.title: Typeoids
4346020.short_description: Wield your keyboard and destroy incoming asteroids by typing their words before they crush you. Typeoids is a fast arcade-style typing game inspired by Asteroids to sharpen your typing skill and mental focus with different game modes.

4346080.title: Dr.Ragnam Show
4346080.short_description: The live broadcast begins. Four monkeys, four limitations. One can’t speak, one can’t hear, one can’t see, one can’t walk. You are released into a hospital. You must escape. Dr. Ragnam watches. The audience watches. Ratings rise. You fall apart.

4346090.title: Paul
4346090.short_description: Experience turn-based, casual combat that blends chess-like enemy prediction with dungeon crawling and exploration. Anticipate enemy patterns, plan your moves, and choose the optimal items to prevail. Descend from the depths of the Nautilus submarine into the petrified insides of an ancient giant.

4346110.title: Blood Arena Path of Steel
4346110.short_description: Fight your way through brutal medieval arenas with physics-driven melee combat, effective armor systems, and violent consequences. Master swords, maces, and shields as you rise from fighter to champion.

4346140.title: Project: Idol / Empire
4346140.short_description: Behind the cheerful "Internet's Darling" persona is a ruthless hacker mastermind! In Project: Idol / Empire, balance a double life: be an adored idol while waging cyberwar for world domination. Defend your streams, plan network takeovers, and build an empire under a mask that fools the whole server!

4346210.title: Dwarf Guild Mania
4346210.short_description: A turn-based economic strategy game where rival dwarf guilds mine, trade, spy, and sabotage their way to dominance in a living, procedural world. Lead your capitalist dwarves across new lands in search of gems and gold. For the Guild!

4346380.title: WildCraft
4346380.short_description: Gather unique resources, craft custom gear, and master skill-based combat in an infinite open world. In Wildcraft, no two items or adventures are ever the same.

4346490.title: Hentai Senpai: Pink Fairy Wonderland
4346490.short_description: Enter a mystical realm of pink fairies desperate for mortal cock! Solve erotic puzzles, unlock enchanted beauties, and fulfill fantasies in this whimsical XXX wonderland. Multiple puzzle modes, detailed profiles, and endless pleasure await! ✨🧚‍♀️💦

4346530.title: Goobers
4346530.short_description: An idle creature collector game. From common garden-dwellers to elusive, legendary spirits, every Goober is unique. Can you find them all?

4346550.title: Something Awful: Static
4346550.short_description: Ahmed, an unemployed man in his mid-20s, finally receives the call he’s been waiting for. A job. A place to stay. A fresh start. But as the rain grows heavier and the silence deepens, small details begin to feel wrong. And whatever happened in that place… didn’t start with him.

4346680.title: QUIZ GAME MUSEUM
4346680.short_description: How much do you know about the history of games?

4346690.title: Genigods: Nezha
4346690.short_description: Genigods: Nezha is an ARPG rooted in the chaos of ancient Chinese creation mythology. Play as Spirit Pearl, the first being forged by the Goddess of Creation Nüwa. Dive into iconic Chinese genesis tales, battle Colossal Gods, and experience the unique combat of Chinese-style celestial showdowns.

4346710.title: Bullet Head
4346710.short_description: Bullet Head is a fast-paced arcade shooter built around relentless action, tight combat spaces, and constant pressure on the player. Our goal is to create a pure gameplay-driven experience that rewards reflexes, positioning, and aggression — without unnecessary complexity or downtime.

4346720.title: SHUFF IT
4346720.short_description: REAL TRACKBALL. VIRTUAL SHUFFLEBOARD. No gimmicks. No fluff. Just pure cabinet-ready action, remastered for the modern gamer.

4346730.title: Kumu Village in Wuming City
4346730.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4346750.title: 掼蛋纯净版
4346750.short_description: 体验经典中式扑克“掼蛋”的纯粹乐趣。这是一款4人策略卡牌游戏，您将与AI队友合作，通过“进贡”、“回贡”与“升级”的独特机制，利用炸弹、同花顺等牌型阻击对手。专为单机玩家打造：一次性买断，无广告、无内购，享受零干扰的指尖博弈。

4346760.title: Dark México
4346760.short_description: Everything is in your hands now… Defeat the Supreme Commander and free your people from oppression.

4346780.title: Supernatural Haven
4346780.short_description: 1 or 4-player online co-op horror survival game featuring supernatural entity capture and search-fight-retreat gameplay loops.

4346810.title: Only One Night
4346810.short_description: Only One Night is a Fnaf Inspired Roguelike that takes the usual gameplay and turns it into hours. Every hour you are able to claim powerups as you try to fend of the creatures of your own nightmares. Can you survive Only One Night?

4346850.title: Compromised Investigator
4346850.short_description: An investigative RPG where every choice changes the town, and you. Explore dangers across Day, Night, and Twilight, uncover what’s really happening, and survive the things that notice you noticing them.

4346860.title: Alice Flower Room: Lo-Fi
4346860.short_description: Run a cozy flower shop alongside Alice, right on your desktop. Grow plants, watch them bloom, and slowly turn an empty corner into a warm, living space. A gentle companion game designed to keep you company while you work or relax.

4346910.title: The Sewer
4346910.short_description: The Sewer is a single-player FPS where you must survive relentless waves of enemy sieges and ultimately escape it all.

4346950.title: John's Quest
4346950.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4346950.short_description: You are John Appleby, game historian. Your shadow twin "Evil John" has been doing some evil business and is causing genres to collide! Only you have the power to restore peace and save gaming...

4346980.title: Idle Brick Breaker
4346980.short_description: Idle Brick Breaker is a game about growing stronger by breaking bricks. Break bricks to earn resources and upgrade items to improve your mining efficiency.

4346990.title: Echo
4346990.short_description: Marit returns to her father’s research facility expecting answers, only to uncover files he meant to share when she was “ready.” They reveal the truth: she wasn’t just his daughter — she was his project.

4347140.title: Reaper's Ledger
4347140.genre: Casual, Free To Play, Early Access
4347140.short_description: Manage souls, expand purgatory, and assist the Grim Reaper in this darkly humorous idle game. Tap to collect, automate the afterlife, unlock eerie upgrades, where progress never rests...and neither do the dead.

4347160.title: Pixel Pal: Desktop Pet
4347160.short_description: A small desktop pet that lives on your screen and keeps you company. Play fetch, customize it, feed it, give it a bath, pet it, and watch it react. Experience its different moods: sad, happy, angry, and more.

4347170.title: Damn Love
4347170.short_description: You flirt with absolute confidence, trying to decode her completely illogical reactions. You say one thing, she hears another. Love doesn’t run on logic: the same sentence can make her laugh, get mad… or unlock the “happily single” ending in the most painful way.

4347390.title: HexaFootball
4347390.short_description: HexaFootball is a turn-based football strategy game where chess-like decisions replace reflexes. Build your team, manage action points, and outthink your opponent on a hex grid. Every pass, every move, and every match is a battle of pure tactics.

4347410.title: Sweep Bump
4347410.short_description: Play as a cleaning robot, dodge incoming vehicles on a bustling street, and collect trash to earn higher scores.

4347440.title: One More Box
4347440.short_description: A short, unsettling anomaly-spotting game where you work the shift at a supermarket—stock 6 boxes, inspect the aisles, and don’t let anything strange slip past you.

4347480.title: Restoration: Chronicles of Survival
4347480.short_description: Rebuild a fallen medieval kingdom one click at a time. Manage resources, construct 30+ buildings, master skills, and balance Faith against Chaos in this relaxing idle clicker with deep progression and offline rewards.

4347540.title: Hidden Cats and Van Gogh
4347540.short_description: Welcome to the world of Van Gogh! Find hidden cats among his starry nights and sunflower fields. Follow the clues of his mysterious journey: collect tasty snacks, light up celebratory fireworks, and complete the final puzzle to unveil the truth.

4347550.title: 3D race game
4347550.short_description: 3D race game is a technical and creative experiment that combines web, 3D and desktop game development.

4347620.title: Risen Blade
4347620.short_description: Slash. Adapt. Ascend. Risen Blade is a fast-paced hack and slash roguelike where blade mastery is everything. Fight relentless enemies and forge your playstyle with powerful builds and classes!!

4347690.title: Mine Climbers
4347690.short_description: Mine Climbers is a vertical platformer where you'll be dashing and jumping your way out of a collapsing mineshaft while avoiding the falling rubble. An unlikely mix of falling block puzzle gameplay and traditional platforming. Currently in development.

4347710.title: Project: Story about
4347710.short_description: An RPG where you live life after life in a constantly evolving world, and your choices and relationships influence future cycles.

4347750.title: HangTogether
4347750.short_description: This game challenges you to control a machine and climb upward to escape. Your goal is to ascend across the remnants of a destroyed planet and reach the spaceship waiting at the top.

4347780.title: Code Tycoon
4347780.short_description: Start in 1980 in your garage and build your software empire. Unlock languages from BASIC to Python, develop projects, hire programmers and upgrade your office. Survive deadlines, bugs and demanding clients in this tycoon simulation.

4347800.title: 勇者传承
4347800.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, RPG, Free To Play
4347800.short_description: 这是一个被魔物侵蚀的黑暗时代，七大陆濒临崩溃。而你——一位来自偏远村落的普通人——意外接到了英雄召集令。自此，你踏上了一场穿越七块大陆的壮阔冒险，寻找散落各地的七大神器：窥视之眼、逆流护腕、生命之种、誓约圣剑、虚化之盾、远古法典、折越魔镜。只有集齐它们，才能驱散黑暗，拯救苍生。

4347810.title: Hunt And Peck
4347810.short_description: Turn your index fingers into the brave Eagle Brothers! 'Hunt & Peck' is a typing defense game where you don't type words—you strike keys. Smash the specific keys where enemies appear with speed and precision to defend the cyber world.

4348010.title: Husk of Axiom
4348010.short_description: Husk of Axiom is a 2.5D turn-based psychological RPG, where human belief gives life to magic and monsters. As a secretive organization tries to erase pain from the world, a small party of unlikely heroes has to save reality by preserving not perfection, but the imperfect humanity that gives it life.

4348060.title: Drive Bros
4348060.short_description: Drive Bros is a chaotic co‑op driving game where one car is shared by multiple players. Drift, crash, and laugh as teamwork and rivalry collide on a mysterious island. Can your crew reach the PEAK of madness and escape together? Only the best bros survive the ride!

4348190.title: In Vino Veritas
4348190.short_description: A police officer vanishes inside an abandoned cathedral. No one dares to search. Explore forbidden halls, solve environmental puzzles, and uncover a truth meant to stay buried. In Vino Veritas is a first-person narrative horror where faith hides monsters.

4348240.title: Ashen Knight
4348240.short_description: Ashen Knight is a dark fantasy survivor roguelite where you fight relentless enemies as a fallen knight, unlocking unique starting builds and abilities with each run, playable in both single-player and co-op modes.

4348360.title: Bakkorila
4348360.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4348360.short_description: Bakorila is an action roguelike focused on dash-based combos. Climb destructible towers, defeat enemies with lethal dashes while performing wall jumps, and use your weapon to survive increasingly dangerous threats. Build your loadout, defeat bosses, and help Bakko return to his homeland.

4348370.title: Hemlon the Grey
4348370.short_description: Hemlon the Grey is a 2D Souls-like game focused on deflection-based action, where life and death are decided at the edge of the blade. Follow the story of Hemlon, half-demon warrior, slay disrupters and uncover the secrets behind The Broken Wings and the Republic of Reinz.

4348400.title: 立课学东京 LIKEXUE TOKYO
4348400.short_description: Explore 'Virtual Tokyo': a 3D language adventure. As Meton, recover the Golden Apple by interacting with the city. Learn Japanese through signs, conversations & puzzles. Core journey: 1-3 hours + advanced challenges.

4348470.title: TAE RPG
4348470.short_description: Explore, discover and live your fantasy on this ASCII RPG adventure! Create your character, choose your race, class and go on an epic adventure, leveling up, collecting loot, building reputation and fighting enemies on a combo system turn based combat. All that while enjoying an awesome soundtrack.

4348560.title: Slotlander
4348560.short_description: A short incremental game about a gambling addict whose trip to rehab goes wrong. After a plane crash, you wake up alone on a tropical island with a broken slot machine on the beach. One wish brings it to life. Spins are free. No penalties. No one telling you to stop.

4348570.title: Idle Dyson Swarm
4348570.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4348570.short_description: Ever wanted a Dyson swarm of your own? Now you can have one with just a few clicks! Manage a solar empire, produce bots which will make solar panels for you. Send your panels to the sun to generate energy and sell that energy to make money which you can spend on even more bots!

4348610.title: Codex Arcana: Grimoire of Monsters
4348610.short_description: Summon an army of Monster Girls to face your enemies in strategic battles! Defeat the Dark Lord's minions and expand your collection with cool, fierce and cute Monster Girls of all variety in this "Capsule Monsters" inspired game!

4348630.title: Bus Station Simulator
4348630.short_description: In Bus Station Simulator, take over a forgotten bus station and bring it back to life - solo or in co-op! Take care of passengers, your fleet, and the infrastructure as you transform a rundown terminal into the beating heart of Winston Springs.

4348640.title: HALF BLOOD
4348640.genre: Action, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4348640.short_description: You, known as The Player. The only TRUE SAINT, a HALF BLOOD is tasked with killing & liberating heaven from the Demonic Invasion by slashing your way through the final gate, where you have to defeat the All-Father who is possessed by Satan.

4348690.title: Veil of Ash
4348690.short_description: Veil of Ash is a 2D Action RPG set in the lands of Seravellis. A realm once full of life, now twisted by corruption and death. Become the hero, choose a path of holy alignment or fall to the corruption, and fight to cleanse the land to bring it back to its former glory.

4348740.title: Stardust Sandbox
4348740.short_description: A creative sandbox simulation where you experiment with physical interactions, build structures, and observe emergent behaviors in a world fully under your control.

4348760.title: Totally Secure Airport
4348760.short_description: Totally Secure Airport is a chaotic co-op sim where you play as an airport security guard. Search through weird luggage and decide who flies and who cries. Documents? Check. Suitcases? Shuffle. Find troublemakers with your friends, but be quick - the airplane is taking off soon!

4348770.title: Canvas of Thoughts
4348770.short_description: Canvas of Thoughts is an emotional point-and-click puzzle adventure which invites you into Evi's vibrant but loud inner world. Experience everyday situations through shifting colours, sounds and emotions. Solve reflective puzzles and navigate the world not through words, but through feelings.

4350110.title: Bullet Time Agent
4350110.short_description: Bullet Time Agent is a sci-fi action-adventure bullet hell. Slow time and dodge storms of bullets as you punch your way through robot-filled arenas. Thread laser gauntlets with super-powered jumps. Take down increasingly intense bosses as you rewind your own death again, and again...

4350130.title: Umpteenth Photo
4350130.short_description: Villagers are everywhere, and they need their photos taken. In Umpteenth Photo, you step into the worn shoes of a roaming retro photographer, snapping portraits for curious townsfolk and getting paid for every shot.

4350330.title: Cleaning Angel Wired
4350330.short_description: A top-down action game where you defeat massive waves of enemies with automatic attacks while collecting experience and upgrading your character. Simple controls, fast-paced battles, and satisfying progression create a fun and addictive gameplay loop.

4350480.title: Flywheel
4350480.short_description: Flywheel is a 2D action game where you dash through the skies using jumps and flight. Each run challenges you with ever-changing terrain. With retro pixel art, nostalgic sound, and simple controls, the game is easy to pick up and enjoy.

4350620.title: Voxel Playground
4350620.short_description: Voxel Playground is a physics-driven voxel sandbox VR game built for VR. In this fully destructible voxel physics world, you can build, craft and shoot against enemies with limitless possibilities.

4350780.title: musi Utale
4350780.short_description: A top-down fighting game in a Toki-Pona-speaking world with directional-based mechanics. Challenge your friends to epic fights of unique mixups like no other fighting game has seen before in local or online play!

4350820.title: Even with Stubby Legs: Unrivaled in Isekai
4350820.short_description: Even with Stubby Legs: Unrivaled in Another World is a 2D side-scrolling platformer that combines fast-paced action with RPG progression.

4350880.title: Versus One
4350880.short_description: Chaotic Party Action with Dark Witch Characters! Jump into a party game for up to 4 players, starring characters from The Legend of Dark Witch Episode 4! Play locally or online and compete in 6 fast-paced mini-games, where magic isn’t just for winning — it’s for messing with your friends.

4350900.title: Just a Cat
4350900.short_description: Just a Cat is a cute casual idle game about a cat that stays on your screen while you work or relax. Dress him with hats and glasses, watch his reactions, and track mouse clicks and keyboard presses as part of your personal statistics.

4350940.title: Dev_Null’s Tower
4350940.short_description: 文句を言えば、ゲームは「悪化」する。 縦スクロール×AI交渉アクション『Dev_Null's Tower』。バグだらけの塔を登り、皮肉屋の開発者AIに"バグ報告"を送りつけろ。ただし、あなたの要望は必ず「悪意を持って」叶えられる。

4350970.title: Sweet Hawaii
4350970.short_description: Sweet Hawaii - A simple and beautiful puzzle game themed around Hawaii, depicting the vacation days of five pretty and adorable girls. It features relaxing music, and after completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4351100.title: Too many people, so I all in speed attack
4351100.short_description: Oh buddy, bring your mouse and keyboard and come to a tower defense barrage shooting party. There may be a lot of monster inside, so hand speed is important, and don't forget to bring your smart brain.

4351160.title: Another Red Riding Hood Story - 另一个小红帽的故事 - Cô Bé Quàng Khăn Đỏ
4351160.short_description: “Another Red Riding Hood Story” is a hybrid Dungeon Crawler and Visual Novel, told through an urban horror narrative reminiscent of Junji Ito’s storytelling style.

4351330.title: The Larcenist
4351330.short_description: An action-adventure crime and driving indie game set in a fictional version of Perth, Western Australia.

4351380.title: Hair Removal Salon Simulator
4351380.short_description: Experience the oddly satisfying world of laser hair removal! Zap through thick beards, manage your customers' pain levels, and build your hairy empire. Will you run a 5-star luxury salon or a house of screams?

4351400.title: Re:Echo
4351400.short_description: A young girl awakens in a silent hospital with no memory of how she got there. Re:Echo is an exploration-focused psychological horror game where players evade an unknown pursuer, search the environment, and uncover fragmented memories. Your choices shape the truth—and the ending that awaits.

4351420.title: Pétanque 2026
4351420.short_description: PÉTANQUE 2026 is a modern and immersive pétanque experience. Play solo or with friends locally or via Steam Remote Play Together, and rediscover all the precision, strategy, and conviviality of this iconic sport.

4351460.title: BigWall：WildKnight
4351460.short_description: The knight comes to the wasteland and sets forth on a so-called adventure. Will he bungle everything? Or will he gather himself and continue the journey?

4351590.title: Anbar
4351590.short_description: Anbar is a fast-paced multiplayer arena game where two teams clash with opposing goals. Explorers race to build an artifact while Mercenaries use a growing ball combo to disrupt them. Victory depends on speed, timing, and teamwork.

4351680.title: Dorm Till Dawn
4351680.short_description: Welcome to St Fiacre’s College for Women of Unreliable Size. Your new home. If you can survive your first night… Featuring 40,000 words of text and over 500 images, this heart-pumping visual novel journey will thrill fans of shrinking and giants alike!

4351820.title: Farming with lasers
4351820.short_description: Incinerate various pests with your giant laser, as you grow your farm. Purchase incremental upgrades to expedite the process.

4351850.title: Project Emerald
4351850.short_description: A fantasy turn-based JRPG style game with a weakness and shield system for complex strategies and synergies. An open world with multiple hidden dungeons and secrets to discover and overcome.

4351870.title: Human Resources
4351870.short_description: You work in Human Resources. In this sci-fi puzzle thriller, use your terminal to scrutinize records and expose human-like AI. Spot contradictions to detect the crafty impostors. Efficiency is mandatory. Failure is termination.

4351990.title: Pond Keeper
4351990.short_description: Take over a neglected aquatic world and transform it into a thriving paradise. Collect unique fish species and experiment with breeding to uncover rare genetic mutations. Unlock new biomes, decorate your ponds, and watch your natural sanctuary flourish.

4352030.title: Don't Push the Button!
4352030.short_description: Hours of Button non-pushing excitement, all on your PC computer!

4352100.title: ピムズランド-Pim’sLand-
4352100.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4352100.short_description: Pim’s Land is an action RPG where players adventure across a vast continent by transforming into various creatures. Use unique abilities gained through transformation, defeat enemies, collect souls, and unlock stronger forms as you explore the world and progress through your journey.

4352160.title: Horde Overrun
4352160.short_description: You are the zombie horde. Infect, evolve, and overrun humanity in fast-paced top-down roguelike arena runs.

4352360.title: Cave Diver
4352360.short_description: Try not to crash your helicopter! How long can you survive in this fast paced, reaction based, arcade game! Add your score to the leaderboard and earn cool skins!

4352400.title: MageQuit Dungeons
4352400.short_description: Battle across islands of ever-changing creatures as you shape your own growth and attempt to prevent theirs in this co-op roguelike. Counter deadly enemy synergies, alter your abilities, and raise pets to survive while the procedural terrain collapses around you.

4352560.title: TEMSHCHIK
4352560.short_description: TEMSHCHIK is a cutthroat board game for 2–4 players where classic property-control gameplay collides with a brutal criminal underworld. No heroes. No fairness. Just money, power, and who breaks first.

4352590.title: Trace Root
4352590.short_description: Alice and Tracey are a pair of Console Cowgirls on a mission! Their goal is to hack in to the network of a global med-tech conglomerate in search of information related to a deadly defect in the hottest new tech worldwide: neural machine interfaces.

4352600.title: Urban Pulse: Nightwatch
4352600.short_description: Monitor the city from your window. Identify anomalies, capture proof, and file reports before Exposure spikes. Miss too much, and what you’re watching starts watching back.

4352890.title: Virtual Risk Prevention
4352890.short_description: Virtual Risk Prevention is the ultimate Occupational Risk Prevention (ORP) platform in Virtual Reality (VR). Designed to transform theoretical training into practical experience, this application centralizes access to high-risk situations in a controlled, safe, and realistic environment.

4353190.title: FJN Roulette Cup
4353190.short_description: FJN Roulette Cup features an exciting knockout roulette tournament. Make betting decisions as you try to earn as many chips as possible before the end of the tournament. Climb the tournament leaderboards and compete for the championship against your tournament rivals.

4353210.title: Gravity's Edge
4353210.short_description: Begin an epic space journey filled with strange worlds, engaging puzzles, and a dense Afro-punk theme. Another challenge also awaits you in 'Survival'. Alone or with a friend, prepare to face off against oncoming hordes while searching for the Ability Anvils. Are you ready to become a Kassler?

4353310.title: Don't PANIC!
4353310.short_description: A fast‑paced symphony of destruction where you are always outnumbered. Survival demands constant motion, sharp evasion, and smart arsenal management.

4353340.title: Super Meme Clicker
4353340.short_description: This is a clicker game where you click the meme to gain click currency! The more clicks you have, the crazier your clicks will become! Every click you make has a chance to change the meme - how many clicks will it take you to get the rarest one?

4353460.title: Unknown Entity
4353460.short_description: Step into the shoes of Unknown Entity, a strange being with no form or memories, who will fight trapped bosses in the hope of discovering where it is, who it is, and why it seems to be watched at all times, in this Free To Play game.

4353490.title: FOURVIVE
4353490.short_description: FOURVIVE is an online cooperative survival action game where up to four players work together, utilize a variety of weapons, defeat endlessly spawning enemies, and strive to survive for as long as possible.

4353530.title: Thunderhawk: Danger Close
4353530.short_description: Fire the ferocious guns of an AC-130 as you escort friendlies in this chaotic 90s arcade-inspired on-rails shooter! Decimate waves of enemy soldiers and turn vehicles into scrap with high explosive rounds. Avoid a Game Over with accurate gunfire, carefully timed reloads, and quick bursts of flares!

4353570.title: Ember Glimmer
4353570.short_description: This is an anime-styled 3D third-person shooter that seamlessly blends real-time combat with loot mechanics. It features a diverse weapon system including a wide range of distinctive firearms and melee weapons, with combat enhanced by characters' elemental specialty skills.

4353590.title: Ascension Act
4353590.short_description: This is a game where you encounter some puzzles of various types, focusing mainly on split attention, and follow the very linear path laid out before you and definitely don't do anything immoral. Just follow the sequence and everything will be fine. I promise. I promise. I promise.

4353700.title: Cover The Background
4353700.short_description: Solve over 100 shape puzzles by piecing together different shapes to fully cover the background! Including Pressure plates, deletion squares and locked pieces!

4353750.title: Super Astro Space Blast
4353750.short_description: Dodge asteroids attracted to your gravitational pull and use the profits generated from their collisions to unlock a variety of different spaceships with different abilities. Reach for High Scores to unlock unique skins for each ship.

4353860.title: MomentumBall
4353860.short_description: A physics-based action puzzle game focused on adjusting jump height and movement speed to solve challenges.

4353990.title: The Lyra Signal
4353990.short_description: The Lyra Signal is a story-driven visual novel focused on narrative and atmosphere. Experience a linear, choice-light journey as you uncover fragments of a personal mystery through dialogue, visuals, and music.

4354040.title: Reflect Laser - Light Reflection Puzzle -
4354040.short_description: Reflect, Direct, and Connect. ReflectLaser is a minimalist logic puzzle game where you strategically place and rotate mirrors to guide a laser beam to its target.

4354050.title: Corporate Lust : Under My Desk, Under My Spell
4354050.short_description: A story-driven visual novel about a new employee and a cold, untouchable supervisor. Summoned to her private office, an unexpected request begins to blur the line between work and desire. Your choices shape a dangerous, secretive office romance.

4354160.title: The Polygon Game
4354160.short_description: Let’s combine regular polygons to create a circle! For example, you can form a square by combining equilateral triangles. By repeating this process, you can eventually create a circle. Making a circle is your ultimate goal! Keep dropping those polygons into the box one after another.

4354300.title: The Azure One
4354300.short_description: Step into the shoes of Lyle, gifted with fragmented foresight. Encounter a spirited girl who lives torun, and befriend three others, each with her ownstory. Through three pivotalchoices, guide their intertwined destinies toward redemption, deep companionship, or a future no one could have predicted.

4354320.title: Crime Empire Idle
4354320.short_description: Build your criminal dynasty in a deep idle/incremental game. Run crimes, launder dirty cash, upgrade your empire, use the black market, craft weapons & gear to fight criminal opponents while you balance heat and notoriety.

4354330.title: Quantum Break
4354330.short_description: A casual, incremental game about quantum physics. Break stuff, collect resources and deposit them for more than 300 upgrades! Build a quantum computer, achieve quantum tunneling and potentially save the cats in a box, just don't look inside of it!

4354380.title: Hentai Skirt
4354380.short_description: Hentai Skirt - Comfortable clothes, a breeze and a pleasant view. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4354460.title: Survivor's Notes
4354460.short_description: "Survivor's Notes" is an FMV . Players control two protagonists, using choices and QTEs to unlock diverse story branches and endings. When a doomsday-dreaming civilian meets an apocalypse survivor, time, memory and fate intertwine. They seek truth in a crumbling city, closing in on a buried answer.

4354520.title: The Magicians Journey
4354520.short_description: Follow the story of three colored magiciens who felt in a colorless land, and bring back colors with them! A platformer with puzzle and heavy naration!

4354550.title: GwenBlade Witcheresque
4354550.short_description: Hack and slash your way through depression in lightning-paced Soulslike to find a way to finally move on from loss in real life

4354600.title: Trust Me, I Work Here
4354600.short_description: Trust Me, I Work Here is a heist game where you wear disguises and rob unique locations

4354650.title: 请神
4354650.short_description: 《请神》是一款中式民俗RPG。选择你的职业，自由分配技能，在多个独立模组中扮演不同身份的调查员。通过对话与检定直面中式恐怖和超自然恐怖。

4354710.title: Ghost Buster:Village
4354710.short_description: An extreme blogger travels to an abandoned village that, according to legend, was deserted in a single day. While exploring, he encounters rituals and entities rooted in Slavic mythology. But the truth waiting there is far more terrifying than any legend.

4354780.title: Brainrot Survivors
4354780.short_description: Fight your way through the endless waves of newer-gen memes by using older memes as your weapons. How long can you keep defeating them until your own brain turns to mush?

4354830.title: Dark Alley
4354830.short_description: A narrative noir thriller set in Kyoto. Detective Thomas Bennett investigates the disappearance of a British agent, only to collide with the Yakuza, a shadowy conspiracy, and a truth that should never surface.

4354850.title: ECUMENE AZTEC: PROLOGUE
4354850.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4354850.short_description: Escape ritual sacrifice and survive the fall of Tenochtitlán. Stealth, brutal combat, and moral choices in a historically grounded Aztec world on the edge of collapse.

4354890.title: Pale Cure
4354890.short_description: A first-person survival horror game where you explore a mutating house, evade a delusional family, and live through the nightmare.

4354980.title: Galactic Mecha GunSuit
4354980.short_description: A linear danmaku shoot-em-up with some visual novel elements. Clear 6 stages across 4 difficult settings, each with unique enemy spawns, bullet patterns and boss phases. The game is structured to have each difficulty cleared in sequence, with the full plot unfolding across each one.

4355010.title: Hovertron
4355010.short_description: Hoverboard your way through a physics-based platformer. Easy to learn but hard to master; Flow and flip through a series of levels to chase perfect runs. Compete on a global scoreboard, or hunt down the secrets hidden throughout the game.

4355070.title: A.I.ttorney
4355070.short_description: A.I.ttorney ( Artificial Intelligence Attorney ) - A fun and challenging interactive multipath video visual novel mystery!

4355080.title: Kaboomania
4355080.short_description: A fast‑paced retro maze bomber packed with explosive action, colorful pixel art, and a fresh twist on a timeless gameplay formula. For all retro and pixel art lovers!

4355120.title: Nekobyte
4355120.short_description: Nekobyte is a retro-styled sidescrolling beat-em-up influenced by soulslike gameplay. Beyond the game’s normal mode of play, a randomizer mode is also available to play for players who want an extra challenge or varied subsequent playthroughs.

4355220.title: Heritage Flipper
4355220.short_description: Flip ancient ruins into luxury estates in this cozy house renovation simulator. Enjoy satisfying pressure-washing, master interior design by blending historic stone with modern design, and uncover hidden artifacts. A relaxing cleaning game where every renovation breathes new life into history

4355330.title: Vegas Keno by Pokerist
4355330.genre: Casual, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4355330.short_description: Discover the world of Vegas Keno by Pokerist with the most popular modes: Classic Vegas Keno, Cleopatra Keno, and Valley Keno. Master your casino skills!

4355340.title: Durak Online by Pokerist
4355340.genre: Casual, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4355340.short_description: Play the best Durak Online game with real players for free! Invite friends, choose your game mode, and enjoy fantastic graphics on any device.

4355420.title: Last 12 ～勇者の育児日記～
4355420.short_description: A nostalgic, story-driven classic RPG where love and fate decide the world’s future.

4355500.title: SATO Love Story
4355500.short_description: A lighthearted and enjoyable short romantic visual novel! In an alternate world, four young people, lost about their futures, come together by a twist of fate. An exciting adventure to save a failing business is about to begin!

4355520.title: Rooster Saga: I Believe I Can Fly
4355520.short_description: A fast-paced arcade action game where you play as a chubby rooster escaping a dangerous construction-zone turf, dodging bullets, and urban chaos in an endless, bullet-hell inspired run.

4355810.title: Shatterlight
4355810.short_description: Shatterlight — survival horror platformer. Play as Agnes as you enter a Victorian mansion swallowed by the Dark World, where fears take physical form. Use light and a mirror shard to survive living darkness, uncover a family’s nightmare, and find your missing brother.

4355820.title: 卧槽，我只是捡了个钥匙，竟......
4355820.short_description: The game allows you to reach different storylines by making choices. This is a comic game, mainly allowing you to experience different storylines through choices. Players can achieve different endings by selecting different buttons.

4355860.title: IRON CHOIR: Starless Pilgrimage
4355860.short_description: Awaken in cursed armor forged from sacrificed souls and fight through the dying realm of Varrengard. Master brutal combat, uncover hidden doors and ancient relics, and follow a priest’s final pilgrimage to face the truth behind the Starless Doors.

4355870.title: CPU Invaders - Micro Spheres
4355870.short_description: A sequel to the Steam Awards finalist. Tiny, glossy micro-orbs slipped through space, firewalls and pixels landing straight into your CPU. Your desktop is no longer a workspace: it’s a bouncing arena of orbital chaos. Interact with your desktop while playing as you purge the Micro Spheres!

4355950.title: Clicker Kids
4355950.genre: Adventure, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4355950.short_description: A clicker / idle incremental game with simple gameplay, deep progression, and endless strategy. Level heroes, unlock powerful upgrades, and watch the numbers go up. Easy to start, hard to stop.

4356020.title: Joker Madness 🃏
4356020.short_description: Poker + Chaos = This! Face off against Joker in a card duel where 47 jokers destroy, boost, or flip everything. Build killer combos, sabotage your rival, adapt fast. It's poker, but unhinged.

4356040.title: Check-In, Never Out
4356040.short_description: You checked into a hotel to get some rest—but it wasn’t an ordinary place. Gather clues, unlock sealed doors, evade the pursuit, and escape.

4356090.title: MonsterGuest
4356090.short_description: Survive against endless waves of monsters while selling food to reach your target amount. Identify monsters using the camera and dolls, and survive by serving them blood-stained food. Monsters are impatient, so you must serve the blood-stained food quickly.

4356100.title: Null Hørizøn
4356100.short_description: Survive the void in Null Hørizøn. Trade, fight, and explore a retro-futuristic 3D galaxy with 2D sprites. Upgrade your ship, smuggle goods, and travel across the universe. Tactical Real-Time combat meets Grid-based exploration in this atmospheric space sim. The Null Hørizøn calls, Captain.

4356270.title: Kartika
4356270.short_description: Kartika, parçalanan bir krallığı yeniden birleştirmek için savaştığın sıra tabanlı strateji kart oyunudur. Evrimleşen 16 benzersiz yaratık kartı ve büyü kartlarıyla desteni oluştur, rakibini alt et ve tahtı ele geçir!

4356400.title: Eldor'idle
4356400.short_description: An incremental idle RPG about earning a billion gold coins. Break a pot. Get a coin. How hard can it be?

4356420.title: Wheel Balance
4356420.short_description: Wheel Balance is a hard and fun physics-based game about balancing on two wheels. Master controls and beat all locations, compete with your friends. Try not to fall far away down!

4356500.title: My Little Someone
4356500.short_description: An unusual gift has arrived for you. Upon opening it, you discover an adorable pet that is now yours to care for. Keep your new companion happy and healthy by feeding, petting, and nurturing them in My Little Someone.

4356560.title: Before the Walls Break
4356560.short_description: 2D tower defense with resource management. Defend against 120 waves of enemies while building your settlement. Manage 5 resources, construct towers, recruit units, and upgrade buildings to survive.

4356630.title: Marble Blade
4356630.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4356630.short_description: Solo indie developer. What started as a simple game for a 3-year-old is now a hardcore physics-combat RPG. Customize your marble, equip massive weapons like the Graviton Lance, and survive an accidental bullet-hell masterpiece.

4356710.title: Reverse Horizons
4356710.short_description: Navigate a monochromatic world of forgotten ruins as Pluma, a wanderer with the power to bend gravity. Reclaim lost colors and mend the fabric of reality in this contemplative puzzle-platformer where up is down, and the only path forward is through the impossible.

4356750.title: Murder Is Game Over: Treasure & Terror
4356750.short_description: Solve a murder mystery set in the White Mountains of New Hampshire in this stand-alone detective game. Can you find Lord Russell Gallant’s treasure before it’s too late? The 6th game in the Murder Is Game Over franchise, Murder Is Game Over games can be played in any order.

4356770.title: Lost In Dimensions
4356770.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4356770.short_description: This is a survival game where you must unveil the story and find your truth. Decide your fate and avoid trouble in the form of military bandits and keep an eye out for those pesky sharks! Explore dimensions, islands and discover civilisations. Good luck!

4356890.title: Feed THE DEMON Incremental
4356890.short_description: Unleash carnage in this dark incremental clicker. Sacrifice humans to fuel your demonic evolution and explode your wealth.

4356930.title: EMBARK : Tiles & Territory
4356930.short_description: Wrapped within a board game, you will uncover unique mechanics as you add cards, dice, and figurines to your advantage in EMBARK : Tiles & Territory! Allocate villagers, claim tiles, and defeat invaders in this incremental kingdom management game full of discovery!

4357020.title: 一魂双体 他与她的奇妙之旅
4357020.short_description: Looking for a fresh gaming experience? Come join us. A man and a woman are writing their own story in the world of Hengmeng Continent......

4357030.title: Hentai Senpai: Doo Wop Pussy Pop
4357030.short_description: Step back to the golden age of chrome, curves, and classic charm. Solve puzzles to reveal pinup dolls, diner sweethearts, showgirls, and navy babes in this nostalgic 1950s-themed adult puzzle game with a retro soundtrack. 🎶🍒

4357150.title: AstroMatch
4357150.short_description: AstroMatch! A unique match-3 style game with multiple game modes and levels to choose from.

4357210.title: Immersive Art Experience: Edward Hopper in VR
4357210.short_description: Step inside the world of Edward Hopper in VR and experience his iconic paintings like never before. Explore quiet streets, cafés, and interiors of 1920s–1950s America, interact with objects and characters, and uncover the subtle stories and hidden emotions that bring the artwork to life.

4357270.title: ACCRETION
4357270.short_description: ACCRETION is a fast-paced 2D space combat arena where up to 4 players battle in intense round-based dogfights.

4357350.title: Priceless Return
4357350.short_description: Only $0.99 · Relaxing Idle · Casual Mining · Bring Everyone Home! ﻿ "Insufficient energy to return... but there's ore ahead!" ﻿ As the captain of a starship, you've crash-landed on a resource-rich yet perilous planet. ﻿ The only way home is to gather 25,000 diamonds to develop a super weapon.

4357410.title: Otaku VR: Sit-ups and Kisses
4357410.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Early Access
4357410.short_description: Get your dream 8-pack abs by clearing the game! With a professional female coach by your side, her gentle encouragement provides endless motivation for your training. Designed exclusively for VR abdominal workouts, it realistically simulates the thrill of every muscle tear.

4357470.title: Pubes
4357470.short_description: A 3D action game where you control a strand of body hair and move around a 3D room! Use the unique fluffy floating and sticking abilities of body hair to safely reach your destination!

4357480.title: When its dyed in the color of the sunset
4357480.short_description: "Whe its dyed in the color of the sunset" is a novel game set on Earth in 2034, where humans and other races coexist, depicting the love story of the beastman protagonist, Herbert. While living his school life, he will take actions to interact with the nine romanceable characters.

4357490.title: Rambler NTE
4357490.short_description: Rambler NTE (NTE = Noto Emoji) Emoji-based, turn-based roguelike dungeon crawler inspired by Rogue and Mystery Dungeon. Explore changing tile maps, read enemies/items as NotoEmoji, manage limited resources, and push toward the lowest floor.

4357790.title: The Most Boring Game
4357790.short_description: A knowledge-based quiz journey wrapped in a storybook UI. Clear subject exams, earn medals and hint tokens, unlock achievements, and review missed questions with explanations supported by classical BGM and a gentle sense of progress.

4358020.title: 魔女的数学牌
4358020.short_description: "The Witch's Math Cards" is a card-based roguelike game with a math theme. Mathematics is essential for a witch to chant spells and draw magic circles, making it a required subject for all magic badge exams. Help the witch construct answers to math problems using cards and pass various badge exams.

4358030.title: Scream - Steam Edition -
4358030.short_description: Enjoy watching how team members react to the various mishaps that occur during the intensive training camp.

4358080.short_description: A cozy, expressive take on 2048. Squish smiling tiles, merge thoughtfully, and relax into a calm puzzle experience.

4358130.title: Director of Solar Affairs
4358130.short_description: Director of Solar Affairs is a turn-based strategy and simulation game centered on orbital combat, combining space warship design, construction, and solar system exploration.

4358180.title: Shadow Rush
4358180.short_description: Slay hordes of Shadow Demons in this Action RPG with roguelike elements. Fast-paced combat, quick runs, build experimentation, and re-rolling characters. Spells are collectable, equip-able 'Shards' that trigger when you attack. CAN YOU BEAT THE SPEED OF DARKNESS?

4358200.title: Huangguoshu Waterfall in Guizhou
4358200.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4358210.title: 心动回忆~Remaster
4358210.short_description: 一款校园恋爱养成游戏。作为一款校园恋爱游戏，你将扮演一位高中生，开启为期一整年的校园生活，在相伴中编织专属回忆。

4358240.title: Fortress of the Fallen
4358240.short_description: Build by day. Survive by night. A focused medieval tower defense where every decision is permanent.

4358310.title: Coin Tavern
4358310.short_description: Coin Tavern is not your average tavern! In this roguelike game, you’ll wield a wild array of quirky coins to build your one-of-a-kind coin deck. Hoard coins, refine strategies, streamline your deck, unlock hidden treasures, and land outrageous combos in randomized runs!

4358340.title: 拓荒纪元 Age of Frontier
4358340.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4358340.short_description: A text-driven, click-based game focused on automated production and idle management. Start from a small settlement and expand your world through resource management, technological research, and squad planning in automated turn-based battles.

4358350.title: Card roguelike of musou farming
4358350.short_description: A roguelike game of musou battle.

4358580.title: The Things We Lost
4358580.short_description: A slow-paced psychological horror centered on atmosphere and vulnerability. Bound to a wheelchair, you explore an old house under constant mental pressure. There is no combat - only observation, tension, and a decision that can change the story’s direction.

4358670.title: Mnemosyne
4358670.short_description: Mnemosyne is an atmospheric psychological horror and anomaly hunting game that pushes your observation skills to their limits. Trapped in a dark, shifting dungeon, use your camera to document subtle changes and trust your memory to break the endless loop.

4358700.title: Project Blue Files: Classified
4358700.short_description: Explore declassified UFO cases inspired by real Project Blue Book investigations. A first-person horror experience where some sightings were explained — and others were not...

4358720.title: Tower of Ascension
4358720.short_description: Tower of Ascension is a single-player deck-building game that combines card game and roguelike elements. You build your deck as you climb the tower. It also supports multiplayer, so once you've built your deck, you can test it against other players in real-time battles.

4358750.title: Laur's Small Game
4358750.short_description: One day, dangerous slimes showed up from nowhere. Defeat them, get stronger with every each one defeated. All of that... in a small game?

4358970.title: LOOP 13
4358970.short_description: LOOP 13 is a psychological horror game where you work as a quality control clerk in a dystopian biotech company, inspecting anomalous products and making moral decisions. Every choice changes both your job — and your body.

4360330.title: うさぎ石
4360330.short_description: 石を拾ったことから始まる、ホラーアドベンチャーゲーム。招かれた屋敷を舞台に、何を思い、どの行動を取るかで結末が変わります。

4360430.title: Hentai Obsession
4360430.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Obsession, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4360440.title: Blockus Party
4360440.short_description: Geometry gets chaotic in BLOCKUS PARTY, a 10-player board game where 12 unique characters battle across 17 minigames. Use your phone as a controller, navigate the Cosmic Realm, and secure victory with the Prime Polyhedron's Endgame stars. High-speed, geometric fun for the whole squad!

4360620.title: Hollow Meridian
4360620.short_description: Hollow Meridian is a short atmospheric experience about repetition, control, and quiet collapse. Interact with a mechanical system that keeps running long after its purpose has faded.

4360690.title: 银色记忆
4360690.short_description: 扮演失忆的主角在一个充满秘密的小镇生活，探索和恋爱

4360740.title: The Lost Light
4360740.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4360740.short_description: Restoration is more than a duty, it's an act of kindness. Explore the wilting world of Skygrove as Sol, a human chosen by the last fading starlight. Rescue corrupted creatures, recover scattered lanterns, and raise a new generation of hope in this cozy 2D pixel-art fantasy adventure.

4360770.title: Magma Karta
4360770.short_description: Magma Karta is a satisfying strategy card game with roguelite and gambling elements. The rules can switch at any turn, challenging you to adapt your builds and your playstyle.

4360820.title: Quasicrystals
4360820.short_description: Quasicrystals is a tile clearing puzzle game that offers four distinct levels of varying difficulty.

4360880.title: Duel Abyss Latia
4360880.short_description: Play as adventurer Nia in this 2D retro pixel RPG. Challenge city guardians, combine skills freely, and strengthen gear with Abyss materials. Recruit 11 companions and uncover Latia's secrets.

4360920.title: Towership Defender
4360920.short_description: A single-tower defense game. Engine failure has made our ship stationary. Shoot down the bugger fleet and collect their fragments to upgrade your weapons, then use rare drops for permanent upgrades between runs. Unlock special weapons and deploy defenders to face down endless waves of alien ships.

4361000.title: Windy Day
4361000.short_description: Ride the wind in Windy Day! On a windy day, you begin your journey to meet a dear friend, carrying a gift in hand. With only your own two legs to move and jump, push forward through the wind. Your friend is waiting for you at the end of the road.

4361020.title: GalactiWar - Empire Simulator
4361020.short_description: Watch empires rise and fall, or intervene with godly powers, in GalactiWar, a space empire simulation sandbox game.

4361100.title: Mandir: Gods Untouched
4361100.short_description: A third-person horror shooter game set in a remote mountain temple, where you play as an Inspector investigating a lost excavation team, uncovering a hidden conspiracy, brutal rituals, and a supernatural force buried beneath ancient structures.

4361210.title: Metal Goose
4361210.short_description: Play as the MG-1 super soldier in this gritty and wacky first-person retro shooter, and mow down hordes of robotic birds in an endless global war between the Chickens and Geese.

4361240.title: Radiance of Souls
4361240.short_description: At an isolated station, Ilya avoids his sister Elena, leaving strange notes that draw her deeper. She discovers the horrifying truth: the station's inhabitants, including her brother, are no longer human. He fears her gaze will reveal his monstrous transformation.

4361280.title: Let it ride!
4361280.short_description: SkiFree meets Survivors! Shred down a procedural mountain, blasting monsters to hard-rock Christmas tunes. Dodge trees, jump enemies, and yes—you can run over squirrels. Fast-paced winter chaos for any season!

4361300.title: Harrow
4361300.short_description: Harrow is a dark horror RPG where you awaken as a living scarecrow and explore cursed farmlands where everything is alive. Scavenge, survive, fight twisted creatures, and uncover what turned the harvest against you.

4361380.title: Don't Go Up There
4361380.short_description: Don’t Go Up There is a short game about exploring a cave system within an intimidating mountain, Schubert has to avoid shattering into a million pieces, make his way through twisting paths, and talk to various strangers who stand around in caves.

4361410.title: Lawnmower Runner
4361410.short_description: new part for lawnmower game series. Endless runner game. drive lawnmower collect grass and avoid rocks

4361600.title: Doki Doki Sharky Days
4361600.short_description: Doki Doki Sharky Days is a casual top-down action game featuring charming Shark Girls. As a baby Kraken, challenge four Shark Girl heroines and unlock heart-pounding moments through victory.

4361610.title: F.L.E.E.C.E.
4361610.short_description: F.L.E.E.C.E. is an indie game that skillfully blends platforming with puzzle-solving. Everything you see here is a challenge, and the world itself is the ultimate puzzle. you need to combine your own abilities with those of a companion into the key that will move you forward to uncover the truth.

4361640.title: OutSpin
4361640.short_description: Ram, bump, and launch your enemies out of the arena! OUTSPIN is a fast-paced arena brawler roguelite where physics and momentum decide victory. Choose your class, collect upgrades, and master the art of the ring-out!

4361750.title: Planet of Lava – Save the Planet
4361750.short_description: Alien creatures are melting the planet. Stop the catastrophe! A casual 3D platformer in a world of lava. Save the overheated planet!

4361820.title: Hotel Cleaner Simulator
4361820.short_description: Clean, restore, and manage hotel rooms under pressure. Remove messes, satisfy guests, and keep ratings high in Hotel Cleaner Simulator.

4361830.title: The Sprout
4361830.short_description: It was meant to be nothing more than an ordinary act of skipping class. You headed to the main building’s rooftop, but one misstep left you unconscious. When you wake up, you find yourself in a campus that is familiar yet strangely transformed. You must uncover the truth and find a way out.

4361870.title: Arctic Farmer Life Simulator
4361870.short_description: On a remote Arctic island, fresh produce arrives only by air until you decide to grow your own. Farm in harsh conditions, raise poultry for eggs, and supply local schools, shops, and restaurants. Expand with sleds, snowmobiles, hangars, and new air routes to nearby islands and the mainland.

4362140.title: ESCAPE FROM MAZE
4362140.short_description: David, a space traveler trapped on a dark satellite called Maze777. You must run through the twisting metal halls, find hidden coins, and unlock the exit. But be careful! A scary robot is hunting you. Can you solve the puzzle and escape?

4362160.title: Winter Hut
4362160.short_description: Immerse yourself in a mesmerizing world where silence and solitude become your faithful companions on the path to survival. This atmospheric single-player open-world game invites you to explore snow-covered landscapes brimming with mystery and beauty.

4362180.title: Porn Pinball
4362180.short_description: Master the perfect fusion of professional pinball physics and adult content. Reveal the most intimate side of six stunning girls as you conquer their 3D tables and achieve massive scores to unlock explicit, uncensored scenes with high-quality animations.

4362230.title: Can I Get a Job?
4362230.short_description: Operator, you have been appointed to the position of labor resource allocator. The System observes and analyzes every decision you make. Compliance with instructions is recommended. Begin work.

4362250.title: DERACE
4362250.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Racing, Early Access
4362250.short_description: A chaotic racing game for 2-6 players. Hit your ability at the right time, cause mayhem, and hold your line. Create a lobby and let the race begin.

4362460.title: ROCK - PAPER - DEATH
4362460.short_description: Rock, Paper, DEATH is a short-form horror game about pressure, greed, and knowing when to walk away. Play a deadly game of Rock Paper Scissors, lose fingers when you fail, and decide how far you’re willing to go before the House takes everything.

4362510.title: Random Dragons
4362510.short_description: Chance-based roguelike deckbuilder with silly and goofy dragons. Spin the roulette wheel to get insane crit damage on enemies, manipulate the odds, and use effect multipliers. Build your synergic deck and kill Random Dragons.

4362640.title: МЕМАСИКИ ПО КЛАССИКЕ
4362640.short_description: Remember the days when we'd go to computer clubs, download music for hours, and the coolness of a phone was measured by its polyphonic ringtone?

4362790.title: Fit Happens: A Clothing Shop Simulator
4362790.short_description: Run a clothing shop in a small town, stock outfits and accessories, decorate your space, and grow your reputation as you turn an empty storefront into a thriving boutique.

4362840.title: The Shattered Mind of Lucas Hayes
4362840.short_description: A first-person walking simulator focused on atmosphere and introspection, where players explore surreal spaces, discover memories, and move at their own pace through a calm, dreamlike experience.

4362880.title: TOP STEED
4362880.short_description: Enter the world of high-speed horse racing! Saddle up and blaze through the exciting race tracks in this throwback racing game with realistic riding controls. Claim victory with your TOP STEED!

4362990.title: Mineheart Abyss
4362990.short_description: Mineheart Abyss is an idle/clicker game designed with characters and gameplay in mind.

4363010.title: CHWÆST: A Creeping Parasite Horror
4363010.short_description: A late-90s retro 3D horror where you feed the Biomass Core to escape. No keys. No doors.

4363030.title: The Spooky Island
4363030.short_description: A dark horror game in which the protagonist, Liam, embarks on an expedition to an island to find treasure and earn money. But the island holds secrets and horrors. Over time, the expedition turns into a nightmare from which he must escape...

4363140.title: Raisin's Wordsearch
4363140.short_description: Turn your stream chat into a game! Viewers play directly by typing coordinates (e.g., "A1") to find hidden words. Features real-time leaderboards and TikTok integration. The ultimate engagement tool for streamers.

4363170.title: BOOM: Excelente
4363170.short_description: BOOM is a frantic shooting game inspired by old arcade games, featuring a variety of enemies and bosses that will test your reflexes and controller skills. The game boasts an incredible variety of weapons and allows you to acquire the abilities of the bosses you defeat.

4363220.title: MADURO RUN
4363220.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4363220.short_description: All you need to do in this game is simply run forward as fast as you can. Choose a suitable track and run forward, knocking down all obstacles in your path.

4363260.title: BumSlayer
4363260.short_description: BumSlayer is a fast-paced hack’n’slash - action arena brawler where only the toughest survive. Fight through stages, facing waves of dirty street bums and powerful bosses that stand in your way.

4363440.title: SECRET WORK AFTER HOURS
4363440.short_description: Hentai visual novel where content is unlocked by winning minigames. There are 4 girls, 4 challenges, and two endings for each one. A man reincarnates in a world of semi-human girls, works in the village, and develops relationships. 18+ content.

4363460.title: Neural Throttle
4363460.short_description: Type fast. Kill malware. Defend your core. A cyberpunk typing game where your keyboard is your weapon.

4363480.title: VESSOUL
4363480.short_description: In this chimeric fusion of the soulslike and maze game genres, players control an animate vessel powered by motes of light. Explore the labyrinths of the shadowy Abyss, the lush God's Wood, the ruined Church Town, and more. Meet unique characters, challenge bosses, collect items, and seal your fate.

4363570.title: Wrath of the Arcane Realms
4363570.short_description: Wrath of the Arcane Realms is a hexagon-based, turn-based roguelike strategy game. Assemble a party of 3 from 6 heroes, chart your path across the realms, and craft your own synergies by drafting unique skills. There is no "correct" way to save the Arcane Realms. Don't seek the solution—define it!

4363600.title: Rapplar
4363600.short_description: Choose your destiny in Rapplar. Three ancient races, powerful classes, and a mystical world await. Battle enemies, complete quests, craft legendary gear, and uncover the secrets of this fantasy realm. Fully localized in English and Arabic.

4363690.title: SPOOKY JOB: The wrong house
4363690.short_description: A simple break-in turns into a nightmarish fight for survival in a dark, trap-filled house. Psychological horror awaits.

4363740.title: 怪奇工作介绍所
4363740.short_description: This is a visual novel game that focuses on the daily lives of the background NPCs living in a 【supernatural fiction】 world. You will play as the owner of a mini job agency, assigning work to the 'supporting characters' of K City.

4363910.title: Ghouls
4363910.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Early Access
