4363910.short_description: Ghouls is an open-world third-person battle royale built around fantasy-based classes and tactical combat. Fight solo or in teams, master powerful abilities, and eliminate your enemies before they rise again. Only one ghoul survives.

4363980.title: Hentai World Cave
4363980.short_description: Short : Relax in a magical puzzle game where each completed level reveals beautiful girl artwork. Enjoy soothing music, no time pressure, and gradually challenging puzzles at your own pace.

4364030.title: Yakshini Lokam
4364030.short_description: A light-hearted fantasy adventure developed for Game Boy Color, inspired by ancient Indian tabletop games. Lead an ordinary family through grid-based battles against mythical South Asian creatures, throwing magic dice to blast through obstacles and escape an enchanted kingdom!

4364080.title: Psionic Machinist
4364080.short_description: A survivor-like auto-shooter focused on weapon synthesis. Command dozens of weapons with psionic power, apply mechanical expertise to forge super weapons, and mow down massive hordes in unique ways every run. Upgrade your Inspiration Circuits to unlock brand-new combat mechanics.

4364130.title: Differences Master
4364130.short_description: 【Differences Master】is a relaxing 3D miniature spot-the-difference game. Compare two seemingly identical little worlds, rotate and zoom to uncover hidden differences. No timer or penalties—take your time and enjoy the pure satisfaction of every discovery.

4364140.title: Forgotten Flower
4364140.short_description: A mysterious adventure focused on exploration, puzzle-solving, and choice-driven progression as two young nobles navigate a mansion that warps into a mysterious and dangerous world after a sudden disaster. Will you uncover the truth hidden within its shifting halls before the darkness consumes you?

4364210.title: The Hero of Destiny was killed by the final boss
4364210.short_description: How many NPCs equal 1 Hero? In the land of Alta, The Hero of Destiny was fated to defeat a terrible Dark Wizard... but the Hero of Destiny was killed by the final boss. What now? Next to the final dungeon, in a sleepy village, 50 NPCs decide to take matters into their own hands.

4364230.title: Idiom Royale
4364230.short_description: React fast, spell precisely — when idiom chaining meets Battle Royale. Join a 40-player ultimate word battle royale, solve idiom puzzles or face brutal punishment. Only one will survive to the end.

4364250.title: Wake up, Az.
4364250.short_description: A climbing game where you never move yourself. Press keys to activate gravity and let the stars carry you upward.

4364270.title: CardForge
4364270.short_description: CardForge is a single-player turn-based card strategy game where players explore diverse tactical possibilities by editing character cards and constructing decks.

4364330.title: Corridors
4364330.short_description: Explore an abandoned hospital, solve puzzles, and uncover a nonlinear story where your choices have consequences. A hardcore psychological horror game in pixel art.

4364360.title: FewTileEffort
4364360.short_description: A minimalist, brutal-but-fair precision platformer built around mechanics, movement, and flow. FewTileEffort is made for speedrunners and difficulty-focused players who want challenge without cheap tricks.

4364500.title: Artificial Humanity
4364500.short_description: Get ready to save the world together with your space ship crew of 12 colorful anime style characters in this inclusive sci-fi visual novel dating sim! YOU choose the order of the missions and who you want to date. Your choices matter in this game! Will those choices save the world, Captain?

4364520.title: Robo
4364520.genre: Action, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Racing, Early Access
4364520.short_description: Robo is a local multiplayer party action game where up to 8 players build robots on the fly and assign controls by simply pressing buttons, competing in fast-paced modes like races, combat, and robot football.

4364560.title: One Way Mirror: AI
4364560.short_description: Neon lights. Cold coffee. One case at a time. In One Way Mirror: AI, each investigation is AI generated and every suspect can talk back. Interrogate, connect the clues, break alibis, and expose the killer before the truth slips away into the night. Every question matters. Every lie has a tell.
developers: Pigi the Wizard and the Feral Yellow Sheep
publishers: Pigi the Wizard and the Feral Yellow Sheep

4364570.title: Another Day As President
4364570.short_description: You are the president. Stay awake, work, survive... Complete your term one day at a time whilst fending off disobedient staff. Juggle tasks, stay alert, and don't miss a shot.

4364600.title: Paper Trails
4364600.short_description: Paper Trails is an AI-assisted detective investigation game set on a believable desktop. Analyze files, emails, logs and clues, interrogate a sharp persona, connect evidence, and solve procedural cases that adapt to your decisions.

4364610.title: Magical Girl Accountant's Revenge
4364610.short_description: A visual novel encompassing financial accounting knowledge and interactive tasks: You will play as Ye Wanqing, a young girl who grows from an entry-level accountant to a CFO, and uncovers the truth behind the illegal occupation of her father's company to seek revenge.

4364630.title: Invocus
4364630.short_description: A 2D open-world action RPG focused on intense combat, powerful magic, deep progression, and player freedom.

4364640.title: Craig's Cave
4364640.short_description: Ha! You're no better than the last one. The same fate awaits you... Сome to Craig's Cave!

4364660.title: Tacticell Arena
4364660.short_description: Dominate the arena in this 2D Top-Down local PvP Shooter! Control your squad, complete objectives, collect power-ups, and outplay your friends in short, intense matches.

4364690.title: Kat Kat: The Food Truck
4364690.short_description: Grow your kitchen step by step in a cozy and warm atmosphere! Prepare a variety of dishes for your adorable cat customers, open mini kitchens to try out new recipes, and keep up with the increasing pace easily with the help of your robots.😺🚚

4364740.title: These Eyes
4364740.short_description: These Eyes is a no-text adventure game with elements of action, platforming, quests, and horror. Explore locations, solve puzzles, and interact with other characters.

4364780.title: FRACTURA
4364780.short_description: FRACTURA is a physics sandbox powered by Unreal Engine 5. Master unique levels, build complex structures, and destroy them to the ground. Use sticky C4 explosives and slow motion to create the perfect chaos. Build. Destroy. Repeat.

4364800.title: CrystalLinker:Infinity
4364800.short_description: Based on the acclaimed iOS hit. Match 72+ themes like crystals and fruits. Fully customize puzzles with the map editor or personal photos. 10,000+ level variations. PC-optimized with a freely resizable window, keyboard/mouse controls, and 40+ relaxing tracks for the ultimate flexible experience.

4364820.title: Go Home 1986
4364820.short_description: Go Home 1986 is a retro first-person maze game focused on navigation, time pressure, and atmosphere. Navigate abstract labyrinths, manage limited tools, and reach the exit before time runs out.

4364870.title: Duck the Miner
4364870.short_description: Duck the Miner is a 2D mining game, where you control a little duck, that unfortunately has a huge debt. To pay it off, you were contracted by a greedy company to embark on missions across space, collecting resources to help restore Earth from its devastating past.

4364910.title: Ruins of Dawn
4364910.short_description: A loot-driven action role-playing game (ARPG) crafted by a solo loot enthusiast. Switch classes anytime, with hundreds of random affix combinations for gear stats, a unique forging system, and tough bosses, rifts, ruins, and trials awaiting your challenge.

4364930.title: Birb
4364930.short_description: Start as a humble birb, eat popcorn, and evolve into a cosmic force of nature! Birb blends addictive idle mechanics with active roguelite expeditions. Build your nest, catch rare fish, challenge bosses, and compete on the global leaderboard. How many pecks will it take to rule the world?

4364970.title: Prime Prism
4364970.short_description: Numbers are light; logic is the lens. "Prime Prism" is a pure logic puzzle game themed around prime numbers and factorization. Construct circuits of light using optical tools like "Prisms" and "Lenses" to decompose and synthesize numbers. Over 140 stages across 11 worlds await your challenge.

4365090.title: 五行策(WuXing Card)
4365090.short_description: WuXing is a strategic card game inspired by the Five Elements of Chinese philosophy. Build powerful combos by mixing hero abilities and items, chase high scores, and adapt to ever-changing battles to forge your own winning strategy

4365120.title: Pushy Plushy
4365120.short_description: Pushy Plushy is a cute, chaotic and fast-paced 2-4 player party game where no two games play the same. Sabotage your friends and collect tons of plushies!

4365180.title: DEATH A LIVE
4365180.short_description: Pack the house in 15 days—before your "Yandere Fan" stabs you. Survive a live stage swirling with love and madness in this rhythm-action RPG. Manipulate "Sound" and "Emotion" through rhythm inputs, where your performance and your choices dictate the "Girl Voltage"…!

4365200.title: 玄灵尘缘录
4365200.short_description: 《玄灵尘缘录》是一款玄幻题材开放世界RPG游戏。你将扮演一名小村少年，踏入名为“灵洲”的浩瀚大陆，展开一段自由无拘的冒险之旅。你可以随心探索广阔天地，体验快节奏的自动战斗，清关刷宝；也能结识好友，组建队伍。在非线性无限制开放式剧情中，亲手书写属于你的命运篇章。

4365210.title: Probability Contemplation
4365210.short_description: Modern minimalistic puzzle game based on contemplative probabilities, pattern recognition, and critical thinking.

4365230.title: Gee, Tea, Eh, Seven?
4365230.short_description: In a single night, your father's boba tea empire AND family were taken out by rivals. Take revenge as Seven, the tragic sole survivor. Build up your power base by brewing the best drinks and retaking the town... or, you know, by kneecapping the competition through sabotage, subterfuge and violence.

4365280.title: Auto Tuktuk Mafia
4365280.short_description: Tired of waiting for high-budget crime games? Play as Raju, a rickshaw driver with a dream. Drift TukTuks, fight dancing cops, and deliver 'Spicy Flour' in an open-world chaos simulator where physics is optional. Warning: Contains glitches, flying cows, and 100% pure Emotional Damage

4365310.title: Just One More Spell
4365310.short_description: A rogue-lite gambler spellcrafter's obsession. Defend yourself from waves of enemies by crafting powerful spells with scratch lotto-cards.

4365370.title: Marceline Richenwinnier +16 - Old Story
4365370.short_description: Lost in the post-war haze of the 1920s, Detective Marceline Richenwinnier must survive a distorted open world. Battle creatures, solve the puzzle of Merrieland, and witness the romance of lost souls. Reach the heart of Merrienight in this story-driven action-adventure.

4365380.title: Rule1A Incremental: Idle Forum
4365380.short_description: An idle game about growing a forum while desperately trying to keep it under control.

4365480.title: Expiare
4365480.short_description: Expiare is a fantasy-mystical action movie with puzzles and exciting boss battles. The main character breaks out of his small world, which has become his prison. And he's trying to find out what's going on here and how he got here.

4365490.title: Construct Together
4365490.short_description: Construct Together is a chaotic co-op construction game where you and up to 3 friends fight against wobbly physics. Carry heavy pipes, mix cement, and try to get the job done without ruining your friendships.

4365500.title: Dan The Dango Likes Factory Games
4365500.short_description: Help Dan The Dango be the best "Assistant to the Manager" he can be and build the best dango factory IN THE WORLD!!!

4365510.title: Little Bit Island
4365510.short_description: In Little Bit Island, you edit and shape a small island to form hills, shores, and waterways, then bring it to life with vegetation and gentle animals. Weather and time of day softly influence the island, creating a calm world that feels alive and ever-changing.

4365520.title: Dead Wave
4365520.short_description: Dead Wave is a first-person zombie survival horror game where a mysterious radio signal is the only thing standing between you and the end of the world — or the thing that caused it.

4365620.title: cosmo cozy defense
4365620.short_description: A cozy tactical space defense game where you command the Star Sparrow to protect planetary cores. Link with planets to recharge energy, navigate intense bullet-hell swarms, and choose powerful roguelike upgrades. Experience a minimalist sci-fi journey built for calm yet decisive captains.

4365940.title: SCP
4365940.genre: Action, Adventure, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4365940.short_description: Experience the thrill of covert operations in this tactical co-op shooter set in the mysterious SCP universe. Team up with friends to execute high-stakes infiltration missions against anomalous threats and rogue factions, blending stealth and strategy with intense firefights. Think. Shoot. Survive.

4366080.title: The Last Hand
4366080.short_description: What if blackjack could break its own rules? Draft powerful modifiers that twist classic blackjack into strategic chaos while you build synergistic combos. Face 16 tables of twisted dealers and bosses. Every run is different. Can you beat The House?

4366150.title: CATS BLOCKS: HOT SPRINGS
4366150.short_description: Welcome to Cat Blocks: Hot Springs ! Your task is to snugly tuck fluffy feline guests into warm rooms and pools. With 90 levels and simple clicks, harvest a full sense of healing.

4366240.title: Silent Still 3
4366240.short_description: Silent Still 3 is a first-person psychological horror experience focused on sleep paralysis, limited movement, and environmental tension. Fear builds slowly through silence, observation, subtle audio cues, and realistic spaces, creating a lasting sense of unease as control gradually slips away.

4366250.title: SELF MADE: Investment Life Sim
4366250.short_description: Build your empire from a basement. Trade stocks, run companies, date, raise kids, dodge the SEC, and retire a legend — or go broke trying.

4366260.title: Federal Reserve Simulator
4366260.short_description: A Turn based Economic Simulation Game where the player assumes the role as head of the United States Federal Reserve.

4366370.title: Word Gladiator: Infinite Evolution
4366370.short_description: A sci-fi AI-powered vocabulary trainer for passive learning. Master English through associative sentencing and neural voices. Utilize your knowledge to unlock elite teachers, skins, and infinite AI-generated packs. In this digital arena, knowledge is the ultimate power for evolution.

4366450.title: Glass Cannon Defense
4366450.short_description: A short incremental game where you defeat incoming enemies and make a glass cannon increasingly powerful.

4366530.title: Roguefire Defense
4366530.short_description: A single-player, first-person rogue-lite defense game. Feel the tension in every level as you defend your base against diverse enemies. Shape your build with random cards and defeat challenging bosses to unlock new environments and experience unique atmospheres.

4366550.title: Tenrei
4366550.short_description: Forge your legacy in a sprawling fantasy world where every choice shapes your fate. Explore an open‑ended sandbox blending freedom with tactical turn‑based combat. Rise as ruler, raider, or trader—the path is yours to carve.

4366650.title: Incursion Protocol
4366650.short_description: Incursion Protocol is a first-person puzzle-platformer where you play as a human pet taken by aliens. Shift between colliding realities, solve mind-bending puzzles, and manipulate unstable technology inside a glitching alien facility run by a fractured caretaker.

4366670.title: Hand Almighty
4366670.short_description: Hand Almighty is a whimsical medieval roguelike where you play as a giant divine hand, slapping enemies away from your castle. Build ridiculous upgrade synergies between waves, unleash absurd powers, and chase leaderboard glory.

4366790.title: Empty the ocean with a bucket
4366790.short_description: Drain an entire ocean one bucket at a time. Made by a kitchen chef in their free time. Relaxing, satisfying, and weirdly addictive. Bucket upgrades, collect the trash, achievements. Perfect for casual play or stream challenges.

4366880.title: Hygrim
4366880.short_description: RPG meets minigames! Defeat monsters by playing minigames and level up to get stronger!

4366900.title: I Opened an Idle Bar So I Can GOON to HOT GIRLS
4366900.short_description: Open your own idle bar and serve crazy drinks to attract the most attractive and horny girls in your area. Upgrade your business, unlock steamy interactions, and pray you get lucky tonight!

4366910.title: Clan & Flood
4366910.short_description: Flood. Famine. Betrayal. In ancient times, you lead a small clan to survive in the mud. Build shelters, cultivate fields, construct dams — but the real challenge isn't just nature: your followers have their own ambitions, and your heir may not be who you hoped. The next flood is coming.

4366940.title: Bo Le Judging Horses
4366940.short_description: There is Bo Le in the world, and then there is a thousand mile horse. Thousand mile horses are often present, but Bo Le is not. You will become the role of Bole visiting China's major historical sites, selecting the thousand-mile horse of your heart from among the multitude of horses.

4367030.title: PARTICLE: Into the Void
4367030.short_description: A single-player base-building RPG where you explore a hostile world, gather resources, command customizable bots, and defend your base from waves of monsters while unlocking new factions.

4367180.title: Agrocracy
4367180.short_description: A farming management game focused on planning and numbers. This is not a farming sim - no driving, animals, or role-playing. Manage weather, labor, capital, and time on a large isometric map.

4367200.title: Starhound: War On The Frontier
4367200.short_description: As a young graduate from the space fleet, embark on a epic story of conflict, heroism and survival.

4367280.title: Boing!
4367280.short_description: A deceivingly challenging platformer. Master physics-tight jumps across randomly generated worlds—each level unique and with its own twist. Beat the game and unlock sandbox mode where you can challenge yourself through unlimited levels of your own creation.

4367310.title: Sugar Orbit
4367310.short_description: A platformer where you play a gummibear jumping between planets to rescue lost gummies, playable at your own pace but built for speedrunners and perfect runs.

4367480.title: Nothing Is Impossible
4367480.short_description: Nothing Is Impossible is a physics-based game where you climb challenging platform courses in a wheelchair. Master tricky jumps, overcome obstacles, and prove that no course is impossible.

4367700.title: The Postman Cometh
4367700.short_description: Deliver mail in a strange little town in the middle of nowhere. Meet a colorful cast of villagers as you try to figure out what happened to the previous postman.

4369200.title: Hot and Lovely : May Holiday
4369200.short_description: A perfect fusion of classic match-3 gameplay and intensely seductive married-woman romance! Gently drag with your mouse to connect three or more matching blocks in a line, making them vanish instantly... Every match unlocks a brand-new, explicit CG of a gorgeous married woman,🥵

4369330.title: Light Flux
4369330.short_description: Light Flux is a retrowave-style racing game.

4369430.title: Mörker
4369430.short_description: An old-school, dark fantasy action FPS. Fight cultists, undead, and other horrors in challenging, unforgiving combat.

4369440.title: Dungeon Chess
4369440.short_description: Dungeon Chess is a turn-based strategy game with roguelike elements where the setting simulates a chessboard.

4369560.title: Zelene Lux: Spirit Notes
4369560.short_description: Free the trapped souls of your friends from a haunted manor. Solve cryptic riddles, find hidden objects, and restore a sanctuary to banish the cult of Magister Vane!

4369580.title: Home Teacher Sister's
4369580.short_description: The protagonist, given the chance to revisit the past. Their goal is to manipulate the sisters who tormented them since childhood at will and settle old scores.

4369660.title: Backrooms Not Escape
4369660.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, Strategy, Early Access
4369660.short_description: Backrooms: Not Escape is a multiplayer horror game for 4 players with interesting mechanics that will allow you to have fun with your friends. Never enter the backrooms alone. Explore them and find a way out, but there is no guarantee that it exists.

4369800.title: Null Zone: No Way Back
4369800.short_description: Oldschool A-RPG with some interesting new mechanics.

4369890.title: Cup Or Die
4369890.short_description: Survival beer pong. Throw the ball into the cup. Use items. Break the rules. Miss — drink. Drink them all — escape or die?

4370020.title: 被黑手浸染的玫瑰与百合
4370020.short_description: A story-driven adventure about emotional conflict, changing relationships, and the choices that shape one’s fate.

4370070.title: GBWEngine
4370070.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4370070.short_description: Welcome to the world of GBWEngine, where you can enjoy enjoyable exploration in semi open or sandbox levels, using different weapons and equipment to engage in thrilling battles with various monsters.

4370270.title: Spooky Dwellers 4
4370270.short_description: Banish the Spooky Dwellers! Claim your Goldenthirst legacy in a new installment of this unique Match 3 series!

4370290.title: Forest Loop
4370290.short_description: Forest Loop is a cozy incremental adventure game where you collect flowers, avoid hunters, and upgrade your way through the forest.

4370410.title: Drop Jump
4370410.short_description: Test your reflexes in Drop Jump! Conquer extreme rhythm-based levels or build your own using the powerful Level Editor. Share your creations with the world and play endless community-made challenges in this neon-lit minimalist platformer.

4370810.title: Wilderness with Tomboy
4370810.short_description: Lost in the wilderness with a tomboy!? A freak flood leaves you stranded in the middle of the wilderness with Lucy, a beautiful and energetic tomboy woman. Survive the harsh wilderness together, complete minigames, and learn about Lucy as you slowly become close, and you learn to love each other.

4370820.title: Getting Dates IRL
4370820.short_description: A dating-themed extraction game. Talk to strangers, risk rejection, loot phone numbers — and extract before you pass out. Finish the night… and unlock what comes after.

4370840.title: Purrfect Ascent
4370840.short_description: A brutal ascent to the top to rescue your frightened kitty. Missed jumps might be punished severely. Do you have what it takes to overcome the challenge? Meow.

4370950.title: Wildlife Ballistics
4370950.short_description: Wildlife Ballistics is a fast-paced, tactical top-down shooter where you kick down doors, clear rooms and neutralize threats. Fight tooth and claw to maintain order in the ever-decaying civilization of the forest.

4371150.title: Runeline
4371150.short_description: Design, build, and code a factory within the magical world of Runeline! Work on producing increasingly complex products, which will require you to write not just functional but optimized code, all within the simple instructions of the machine core.

4371210.title: Hentai Sin
4371210.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Sin, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4371390.title: Love You To Pieces
4371390.short_description: "Love You To Pieces" is a Horror/Slasher Visual Novel thematically centered around Valentine's Day. Featuring elements of grind-house, choose-your-own-adventure and mystery. Can you or any of your friends survive this bloody love fest?

4371450.title: Arctic Shift: Fuel Station
4371450.short_description: First-person gas-station simulator set in a brutal Arctic winter — run and upgrade your remote pump: fuel cars, serve customers, stock goods, chop firewood, shovel snow and survive blizzards. Discover a restrained, environmental story unfolding over each shift.

4371580.title: VOIDBLADE
4371580.short_description: An immersive 2D stealth platformer in which a Shadow Ninja must hide in and manipulate shadows using the power of the Void to sneak past deadly robots in space.

4371620.title: EXODUS
4371620.short_description: Defend Earth from the waves of alien invaders in this action-packed top-down shooter!

4371780.title: Hyperplane
4371780.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4371780.short_description: Hyperplane is a fast-paced 2D isometric action RPG set in a shattered eldritch world. Master arcane skills, battle through dark and foreboding environments, and uncover the secrets of a reality teetering on the edge of oblivion.

4371880.title: CYAN PROJECT: Today, I Decided to Kidnap a Mermaid
4371880.short_description: An exploration adventure set in a near-future research facility. Progress through the story by solving puzzles with no combat.

4371890.title: Wukong Survivors
4371890.short_description: A pixel-art roguelite survivors game inspired by Eastern mythology. Play as Sun Wukong and other legendary heroes, battle endless waves of enemies, craft powerful builds from weapons, relics, and skill trees, and survive the chaos.

4371910.title: Midnight At Camp Ashwood
4371910.short_description: Midnight At Camp Ashwood is a slow-burn psychological horror mystery set deep in a cursed forest. Explore abandoned cabins, uncover disturbing audio diaries, and piece together what happened at a remote summer camp where something ancient still watches from the woods.

4371920.title: 喵喵上上签Lucky MeowMeow Temple
4371920.short_description: 《LuckyMeowTemple》is a cozy desktop pet game combining a Pomodoro timer with cyber-prayers.Focus to let your"Wooden Fish Cat" draw fortune sticks predicting career or love.Collect unique skins based on the Five Elements.A digital sanctuary for your soul—start your journey where luck meets efficiency!

4371940.title: Dragon Arena
4371940.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4371940.short_description: Dragon Arena is a 5v5 third-person MOBA where victory is claimed by slaying the enemy dragon. Choose your class, hunt monsters, build your power through roguelite-style random skills, and win through smart team composition and strategy.

4372060.title: Mahtris 108
4372060.short_description: Mahtris 108 is a casual Roguelike blending Mahjong with falling-block puzzles. Stack blocks, build high-value hands, and unlock items and protocols to empower your run. Aim for the high score and claim victory!

4372100.title: 魔法桌宠 - MagicPet
4372100.short_description: Magic Desktop Pet is a free, open-source, and lightweight desktop companion that blends productivity with charm. More than just a mascot, she serves as a versatile terminal to streamline your workflow—helping you launch webpages, save snippets, and perform instant searches or translations.
developers: 你为啥直接commit到我的main分支啊

4372130.title: DriveCraft
4372130.short_description: Take on a challenging obstacle course in DriveCraft. Do you have what it takes to reach the finish line?

4372220.title: Before It Strikes Twelve
4372220.short_description: An immersive thriller about a man escaping from a mysterious kidnapper. Find your way out, and uncover the truth. Maybe escape isn't the only thing you want...

4372280.title: Beneath the Floor
4372280.short_description: A first-person exploration and automation game set underground, where players dig, unlock systems, manage resources, and uncover a mysterious story through environmental discovery and atmospheric gameplay.

4372330.title: Leapsecond
4372330.short_description: Eliminate the ruler lurking deep within the tower! This is a roguelike game where you select cards in time with the rhythm, command your character's actions in advance, and move through the grid. Split-second decisions mean the difference between life and death!

4372340.title: Sticky Sticky: Surplus Protocol
4372340.short_description: A co-op PvE game about experiments and bad decisions. Place nodes, grow strange mushrooms, and get unpredictable effects. Some help, some hurt, and some should never have been eaten. Experiment with your team. Deal with the consequences.

4372390.title: Hidden Horizons: Christmas Tour Collector's Edition
4372390.short_description: Festive island adventure with vibrant puzzles, cozy mini-games, and joyful hidden object searches. Your warm Christmas escape awaits!

4372400.title: Candy Girl!! Dreams Forever
4372400.short_description: Help a 9-year-old girl reunite with her grandmother in a delicate world where comfort and unease walk side by side.

4372420.title: Interstellar Typewriter
4372420.short_description: A fully simulated mechanical typewriter that functions as both a game and a writing tool. Type, explore, and uncover a story hidden beneath the keys.

4372550.title: Duende
4372550.short_description: Befriend +100 Duendes, spirits based on Spanish Folklore! Battle in Turn based combat, Meet new Friends and Rivals and Explore Ibelis discovering the diverse people and Duendes that live in it!

4372610.title: Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming
4372610.short_description: 🏁💖 Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming Click to collect hearts, unlock sexy race grid girl outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Fast cars, teasing reactions, and hot progression await live on stream! 🔥🏎️

4372750.title: Last Decree
4372750.short_description: Rule a dying medieval kingdom. Draw event cards, issue royal decrees, and decide how your realm meets its end.

4372860.title: Glenwich Idle MMO
4372860.genre: Adventure, Casual, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4372860.short_description: Welcome to the land of Glenwich, where adventurers gather resources, forge weapons, and battle through dungeons while AFK. Train 16 skills, discover hundreds of recipes, and trade on the player-driven exchange. Form parties with up to 5 players to conquer brutal dungeons and claim legendary loot.

4372880.title: Yurei: Ink of the Damned
4372880.short_description: A third-person graphic adventure in which our protagonist enters a world of Japanese legends, where his objective will be to collect a series of cards to advance through the stories and escape from that world full of nightmares.

4372900.title: Diamond Island
4372900.short_description: Dive into the thrilling world of our First Person Shooter Game, where survival is your only mission. Navigate through intense environments as you hunt for hidden diamonds, each one a step closer to victory

4372920.title: Attachment Error
4372920.short_description: Attachment Error is a psychological horror experience where emotional attachment becomes a system failure. Test a VR build inside your own apartment while memories, messages, and a presence you can’t ignore push back. The closer you feel, the harder it is to survive.

4372990.title: EVO Card
4372990.short_description: A biopunk roguelike deckbuilder where you evolve by stealing enemy organs. Devour rivals to mutate your limbs, hybridize distinct cards, and build the ultimate chimera. Kill or be eaten—become the apex predator.

4373040.title: But Why?
4373040.short_description: A penguin walks toward a mountain it was never meant to climb. The wind grows stronger, the ground slips, the path resists. Why doesn’t it stop? Why doesn’t it turn back? But Why? is a short, atmospheric journey that leaves the meaning to you.

4373100.title: Amitabha Buddha
4373100.short_description: 《Amitabha Buddha》is an action role-playing game set against the backdrop of Buddhist teachings. Players embody a Bodhisattva on a journey to redeem the fierce souls trapped in the borderlands, embarking on a path through the joys and sorrows of the Saha world.

4373120.title: Balls vs. Tombs
4373120.short_description: Balls vs. Tombs is a dark fantasy action-survival game built around a single, haunting purpose: to reclaim stolen souls and restore peace to a desecrated graveyard.
developers: Kanuni Games OYUN YAZILIM VE PAZARLAMA Ticaret Limited Sirketi
publishers: Kanuni Games OYUN YAZILIM VE PAZARLAMA Ticaret Limited Sirketi

4373130.title: ORDER // ONE
4373130.short_description: ORDER // ONE is a VR exclusive cyberpunk horror stealth-action roguelite that aims to be a bold step for VR: cinematic storytelling, addictive gameplay, and no hand-holding, powered by PCVR.

4373230.title: Woo Woo
4373230.short_description: Woo Woo is a puzzle-exploratory horror roguelike. Clean up the haunted house by midnight, exploring eerie rooms and their inhabitants, or your dad will eat you!

4373320.title: Forgefolk
4373320.short_description: Forgefolk is a blacksmithing simulator set in the workshop of a master dwarf. Gather resources, smelt, forge, and complete orders. Upgrade your workshop, craft better tools, and earn gold. If you’re looking for a calm yet satisfying gameplay loop, step up to the anvil.

4373490.title: Sevenfall
4373490.short_description: A turn-based strategy RPG with deck-building, fortress construction, and intense battles against legendary factions. Explore dangerous domains, conquer ancient keys, and face Ulthar, the Dark Trinity, in a journey where every choice shapes your destiny.

4373500.title: Sub Rosa Tournament
4373500.short_description: A 3D capture-the-flag party game where teams compete to steal the rival team’s ball, score points, and win fast-paced matches. Choose from a wide roster of characters with unique abilities, create powerful team combinations, and outplay the other team in chaotic local co-op action.

4373510.title: The Dreaded Forest
4373510.short_description: Do you like spotting anomalies? in this game you can! BUT with a twist, here you spot them via a drone that you fly around the map, and navigate around trees and obstacles!

4373560.title: But Why Penguin?
4373560.short_description: Nothing matters. You left your monotonous colony behind. Complete tasks, chase your dreams, walk across the ice while humans watch you, and uncover the secret that will be revealed in 2027. But why?

4373650.title: A Game My Mom Came Up With
4373650.short_description: This is a casual falling-block puzzle game conceived by my mom. The final stages are surprisingly fun and more engaging than you might expect. Achieve a score of 120,000 to unlock an achievement.

4373670.title: IMProper
4373670.short_description: A tiny imp with uncontrollable OCD must face his obsession with order. Using magical spells, he must clean up the chaos while trying to keep his compulsion in check. Explore an overworld filled with diverse biomes, solve absurd situations, and uncover the source of the mess.

4373720.title: OOTY : Silence Remains
4373720.short_description: Four friends travel to a remote, abandoned palace hidden deep in the misty hills, searching for thrills. What starts as an adventure turns into a nightmare when darkness falls. Play as one of them, alone and hunted, and uncover the hill’s secrets to survive the night.

4373750.title: Battle Magi
4373750.genre: Action, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Free To Play, Early Access
4373750.short_description: Summoned from across time and space, the greatest mages battle for respect and dominance. Use a voice-driven magic system, combine spells and power-ups, and fight in chaotic PvP arenas designed for FFA and team combat.

4373870.title: Unpossess 2: Exorcism Simulator
4373870.short_description: A 1-4 co-op exorcism simulator game set in the late 1900s. Play as exorcists responsible for addressing cases of demonic possession.

4373910.title: Unending Watch - Dead Man's Fingers
4373910.short_description: A steampunk extraction survival game built on brutal melee combat and constant tension. No guns—only heavy strikes, smart counters, and raw survival. Enemies hunt, adapt, and ambush. The world shifts mid-run. Extract with loot… or be claimed by the dark.

4373940.title: Vamps Lust
4373940.short_description: Daigo arrives in a city where men vanish at night. Guided by a strange woman, he finds vampiresses who seduce men and consume more than blood. Can he survive their deadly sexual game?

4374170.title: Electric Sheep
4374170.short_description: Dredge the memories of an old Butler Robot to piece the past together and solve a Murder at a family home.

4374280.title: Brotherhood of Pain
4374280.short_description: Bound to the will of the necromancer Zndan, your party is dragged back from death. Conquer cursed dungeons, loot the rarest artifacts, endure resurrections, and fight to reclaim your souls. Welcome to Brotherhood of Pain.

4374320.title: The Buddy Signal
4374320.short_description: Combine smol's expressive movement and BG's creative construction mechanics to solve clever 3D puzzles. Use objects of various types and connected machinery across a planet with varied biomes in this non-linear 3D puzzle platforming adventure.

4374570.title: ERLIK: The Ninth Branch
4374570.short_description: A narrative-driven psychological horror game inspired by Turkish mythology, where you explore a desolate Anatolian village, uncover forbidden truths, and confront an ancient entity rising from beneath the earth.

4374870.title: Fun World
4374870.short_description: Explore the Nightmares of Fun World — a once-cheerful children’s park that has fallen into ruin, now twisted and corrupted by dark forces beyond understanding. What was once filled with laughter and bright colors is now drenched in shadows, echoing with distant sounds you can’t quite explain.

4375030.title: Strawberry Cafe
4375030.short_description: Build your own strawberry cafe and farm in this cozy, casual management sim. Grow strawberries for customers to pick, or harvest your homegrown strawberries to cook delicious strawberry-themed food and drinks. Complete missions and keep customers happy to unlock new furniture and recipes.

4375090.title: Key Krusher
4375090.short_description: Krush the keys coming at you in this arcade-style typing game.

4375110.title: Tropical Lust
4375110.short_description: Fate brings you to a paradise island filled with mysteries and temptations. Explore the open world, interact with characters, and immerse yourself in an erotic first-person adventure with active gameplay and a treasure-hunting storyline.

4375200.title: Yoshiko, Go to Your Relatives' House!
4375200.short_description: Visiting a relative's house—it is a grand adventure. Presented by Satoru Gobunme, a creator with over 500,000 YouTube subscribers! Control the tragic heroine "Yoshiko Obune," overcome attacking strangers, traps, and exploding pandas to safely reach your relative's house!

4375220.title: Teddy Collector
4375220.short_description: Not just luck, a skill-based claw machine with real physics, arcade minigames, and dozens of teddies to collect.

4375330.title: Camp Slaughter
4375330.short_description: There is some slaughter in this camp, work to figure out the true secret that ties this camp together.

4375390.short_description: A soldier trapped in a mysterious space. Explore independent maps and overcome zombies, demons, and puzzles. A single mistake means instant death. A survival action-adventure with a roguelike structure that maximizes tension.

4375740.title: Island
4375740.short_description: Island is a post-apocalyptic visual novel. You appear on the beach of the island, not remembering your past, and your goal is to survive. The wildlife, the other inhabitants of the island all around want you dead. Make the right choice, because it may be the last one!

4375780.title: Mine Mine
4375780.short_description: Mine Mine is an incremental game about mining ores, upgrading your equipment, and unlocking better and better quarries!

4375790.title: Spell Circle Mage
4375790.short_description: Spell Circle Mage is a 2D adventure game that combines action, chess-like strategy, and Roguelite elements. Players control the mage Elana, placing spell circles to unleash magic and defeat enemies!

4375850.title: 摸鱼争霸
4375850.genre: Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4375850.short_description: Saluting classics, forging legends! 《Fish Lord》 masterfully blends the epic heroes of 《Three Kingdoms Heroes》 with 《Travian》's grand sandbox, creating a revolutionary SLG kingdom-war universe free from pay-to-win tyranny! Victory hinges solely on tactics – thrones are claimed by wits alone!

4375870.title: The Resonant
4375870.short_description: In a world without sight, you are a warrior who perceives the world through vibrations. Plan and execute turn-based combat sequences, deduce enemy positions and intentions, manipulate the battlefield through deception, and strike with precision to defeat your rivals.

4375890.title: YOBI
4375890.short_description: Return to that summer of dreams and regrets. Explore between your childhood neighborhood and a dreamlike world, encountering diverse souls while unraveling the mysteries and emotions buried by time. Find your way to the heart of the story and recover forgotten memories... and much more.

4375910.title: Angels' Uprising
4375910.short_description: Angels’ Uprising is a stylish platformer action game set in a modern reinterpretation of Hell, where players use a spear as both a weapon and a traversal tool.

4375930.title: Undead Apocalypse: Hellbreak
4375930.short_description: A fast-paced third-person shooter where survival depends on movement, aim, and split-second decisions. No meta progression—skill is everything.

4375960.title: Olivia's World: Crystal Keep
4375960.short_description: Olivia’s World: Crystal Keep is a story-driven tower defense RPG where elemental Guardians defend a peaceful world pushed to the brink of war. Build strategic defenses, step into real-time combat, and unleash powerful abilities as the truth behind the conflict begins to unfold.

4376010.title: Blind Nature
4376010.short_description: Explore a rich audio-only world through the ears of a blind girl called Liora. Perform quests, do archery and solve puzzles while relying exclusively on 3D spatial audio.

4376040.title: MechaCap Arena
4376040.short_description: Become the MechaCap Champion! Build MechaCap bots, pilot them and fight in the arena in this whimsical sporepunk fantasy robot fighting game! Experiment with different attachments that alter your playstyle, meet a cast of quirky characters and experience arenas across four different towns.

4376060.title: Tavern Defense
4376060.short_description: Tavern Defense is a Roguelike Tower Defense game where you build your deck of cards, carve your own paths for monsters, and create magnificent synergies to win the game.

4376090.title: 被击垮而堕落的强气人妻
4376090.short_description: A strong-willed newlywed begins to see cracks in her once-stable life after an unexpected encounter. As subtle changes emerge and relationships shift, she must face inner uncertainty.Her path—and ending—are shaped by your choices.

4376100.title: IRON SIGHT
4376100.short_description: A top-down tactical tank game focused on vision, positioning and battlefield awareness. See first — or be destroyed.

4376320.title: Emoji Squad
4376320.short_description: Emoji Squad is an auto-battler game that combines Roguelike elements, where you collect and train Emoji characters to form a team, exploring routes, defeating enemies, and ultimately the Boss in five distinctly styled chapters.

4376360.title: slackball
4376360.short_description: Slackball is a minimalist Pachinko-style pinball game specifically designed for those "slacking off" moments in the office. Built around the core concepts of being lightweight, transparent, and stress-relieving, it fits perfectly into your desktop environment.

4376430.title: Arena of Trials
4376430.short_description: Arena of Trials is a dynamic 3D game with action/RPG and survival arena elements. You'll find yourself in a variety of biomes, from the scorching desert to the icy wilderness, where every move can be decisive.

4376460.title: Tache Noire
4376460.short_description: An exploration based approach to Survival Horror games set in the idyllic town of Lucenille. Explore every single crevice and find what happened to your friends. BRING THEM BACK. MAKE THEM UNDERSTAND

4376480.title: Clockworks
4376480.short_description: Navigate intricate clockwork environments, experiment with creative mechanics, and overcome thoughtfully designed challenges. Trapped in a twisted dimension warped by mysterious forces, you’ll uncover the cause behind its strange workings while racing against time to escape.

4376760.title: Slimepatch
4376760.short_description: A cozy top-down arena survivor where you clear waves of slimes, upgrade your skills between rounds, and climb a rank ladder at your own pace. Relaxed, replayable combat with steady progression and an endless mode.

4376780.title: Haggle simulator
4376780.short_description: A Monopoly-style board game focused on negotiation, trading, and bidding between players. Can take out loans from the bank. be careful—late payments may result in asset repossession! Trade via group chat or private messages. Cross-play with mobile players. Come and sharpen your haggling skills!

4376800.title: Idle Toss: That Water Game
4376800.short_description: The retro Water Ring Toss idle game that lives on your desktop. Toss Actively or set in Auto. Earn Coins, and Spin the GACHA! Collect New Models, Skins, and more to upgrade your endlessly bubbling tank

4376830.title: V.E.C.T. Arcade
4376830.short_description: V.E.C.T. Arcade features 4 distinct neo-arcade games. Blast through bullet hell in Impact, outrun the void in Deadline, perform chain combos in Slash, and defend the core in Orbit. Push your skills to the limit and leave your name on the leaderboards.

4376870.title: Turn It Off
4376870.short_description: A first-person psychological horror set in a decaying hotel that does not want to let you leave. Explore a dark, interconnected environment where sound, lighting, and subtle details drive a slow, relentless sense of dread. You are moving forward, whether you want to or not.

4376910.title: Shiftomino
4376910.short_description: "Shift" to move, Shiftomino! Shiftomino is a puzzle platformer where you advance through stages by moving from block to block.

4377050.title: Secrets of Solari
4377050.short_description: Wake from cryo-sleep in the year 3333. Guided by an alien consciousness, uncover a quantum fracture where Earth becomes Solari.

4377360.title: Abyss Chamber
4377360.short_description: Fulfill the requests of the abyss entity. Survive 5 days. Overcome your fears to escape. Abyss Chamber is a lore-rich, anxiety Horror game that takes place in an underground research facility.

4377370.title: Gargadusa's Tower
4377370.short_description: D&D meets Franchise Manager, Gargadusa’s Tower is a supremely deep guild management simulation that spans generations. Build your adventurer guild from nothing. Recruit heroes, complete quests, and descend the mysterious tower to confront the power that lies within.

4377610.title: Far Beach: Desire Remains
4377610.short_description: Experienced in first person, Far Beach pulls players into the mind of a castaway who uses strange mushrooms to escape pain and loneliness. Through them, a seductive woman appears, becoming his only sexual partner, lover, and companion. What begins as comfort soon turns into addiction.

4377760.title: Guard Number 99
4377760.short_description: A first-person horror puzzle game where you play as a night guard trapped in an abandoned robot factory, solving puzzles while being hunted.

4377860.title: Bumpers & Dragons
4377860.short_description: Drop balls. Slay dragons. Peggle meets Balatro in a pachinko roguelite where physics meets strategy. Engineer your luck and push deep into procedurally generated dungeons.

4377950.title: Void Salvage
4377950.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4377950.short_description: An incremental space game with roguelite and auto-battler elements, designed to be played with one hand on the mouse and the other holding your favorite beverage.

4377960.title: GNOSiS
4377960.short_description: Lost, alone, & vulnerable, a voluntary candidate of a twisted treasure hunt attempts to survive inside someones sadistic nightmare . . Explore this Open-World Survival Horror carefully & let the guiding signals orientate your escape from this hellish reality!

4378010.title: Echo
4378010.short_description: Enter an infinite‑loop laboratory and retrieve uncontaminated extraterrestrial samples, and ultimately achieve your mission objectives.

4378110.title: Lonely Penguin
4378110.short_description: A lonely penguin waits for death at the summit, and you only have 60 minutes to reach him. Conquer Antarctic trails, drive vehicles, and race to be the first to rescue him. If you fall, your friends can save you; but time is running out in this icy desert. Don't leave him behind!

4378120.title: TriviaSpire
4378120.short_description: Test your trivia knowledge against other people on a global scale! Don't let the water rise above your spire as you do not know how to swim

4378160.title: Three Doors
4378160.short_description: Three Doors is a simple yet addictive game of chance! Choose one of three doors: if you're lucky, you'll advance; if you're unlucky, the game will start over. Make your choice and discover what awaits you!

4378250.title: Organizer Pro
4378250.short_description: Organizer Pro is a casual decluttering and organizational game with over 15,000 objects to organize. No rules or time limits, just pure arranging and satisfying before-and-after transformations. Approximately 30 total hours of playtime.

4378260.title: Dice Goblins Clicker
4378260.short_description: Upgrade, automate, and embrace chaos as numbers grow, luck bends, and dice never stop rolling. An idle clicker where goblins roll dice nonstop.

4378350.title: Hentai Senpai: Fuck Hotel
4378350.short_description: Check in to the Fuck Hotel where everyone's welcome and pleasure is guaranteed. Multiple puzzle modes, sultry jazz & R&B beats, and a diverse cast ready to fulfill every fantasy. Quick flings, paid encounters, and pure passion await. 🎷💋

4378360.title: Hoofprints
4378360.short_description: A fairytale-like atmospheric game about a little foal lost in a dark forest. Find food, hide from the night, meet strange creatures, and slowly grow up - leaving hoofprints along your journey.

4380120.title: Horn of the Warlord
4380120.short_description: A turn-based grand strategy game focused on ruthless conquest and clever planning. Command armies, conquer procedurally generated regions, manage resources, and outthink rival warlords through smart timing, army composition, and siege tactics.

4380240.title: Ye Old Seadog
4380240.short_description: Ye Old Seadog is a frantic tavern manager where you run a bar for thirsty pirates. Manage resources, serve drinks, and survive the chaos of a busy night. Will you become the legendary tavern of the Evenkeel Harbor, or walk the plank? Arrrgh!

4349360.title: Project Conquest
4349360.short_description: In this sci-fi turn-based RPG, you play as Blade, who is homeless because Earth was destroyed in a nuclear war. Now he travels trough pace to find a new home. The combat system is based on grid movement with bullet-hell mehcanics.

4349430.title: Goojeegoop
4349430.short_description: Click ClIcK CLICK your way through endless rounds of enemies in an exciting new point and click roguelike and become insanely strong! Click on enemies to unlock new slots, increase your level and create crazy and spectacular builds!

4349520.title: RING RING POCKET MAGICK EGGS
4349520.short_description: Hentai visual novel with 5 girls and 5 minigames. Win matches to unlock two endings per girl. A veterinarian arrives in a world with semi-human girls and pets, helps raise them, and can romance them. 18+ content.

4349560.title: Find, Eat, Hide: Till Dawn
4349560.short_description: This game is a horror survival single-player game. Avoid ghosts, find food, eat and survive. In each round, buildings, furnishings, and food are placed with some degree of randomness. Survival times stack. The longest survival time is saved.

4349580.title: The Gauntlet
4349580.short_description: Fight a diverse cast of characters each harder than the last! A boss rush game where you face many bosses back to back until you beat them all. Will you survive The Gauntlet?

4349610.title: YOU LOSE YOU SCREAM
4349610.short_description: YOUR FRIEND CONTROLS WHEN YOU SCREAM. Lock your friends in the basement and unleash terrifying jumpscares on them with optional real camera reactions. Dare each other, lie about success, sabotage, negotiate, and argue. A 2–4 players horror game where your friends control your fear.

4349650.title: WREKD
4349650.genre: Action, Casual, Racing, Free To Play
4349650.short_description: WREKD is a chaotic multiplayer bumper car party game where you smash, boost, and launch your friends across wild modes like Deathmatch, Racing, and Car Football. Easy to play, hard to survive.

4349700.title: Alone After Dark: A Short Drive
4349700.short_description: Experience the chilling solitude of a nighttime drive through the woods. You are not the only person—or thing—on the road tonight. Drive carefully and try to stay calm behind the wheel. Can you make it to the sunrise?

4349750.title: Prophecy Lost
4349750.short_description: Prophecy Lost is a PvPvE extraction RPG where every run is a race against time into escalating danger and greater rewards. Each match reshapes the world with procedural map modules—revealing rare bosses, mythic weapons, and unexpected encounters around every corner.

4349950.title: Alchemist
4349950.short_description: A magic-focused action battle* RPG where research and alchemy shape your path through combat encounters, puzzles, and challenges across diverse locations.

4350010.title: SPACEMAN
4350010.short_description: SPACEMAN is a short, nostalgic, retro Shoot-Em-Up

4350100.title: Orbrix
4350100.short_description: Orbrix is an incremental idle breakout game. Break endless layers of bricks, purchase powerful upgrades, and unlock visual themes. Play actively or as idle as you want. Create a swarm of upgraded bullets to defeat your enemies. Can you grind your way to level 1000 to escape the Orbrix prison?

4352670.title: Summer Coming (夏天来了)
4352670.short_description: Summer Coming is a heartwarming pixel-story game that transports you back to university days, where you’ll experience a summer filled with friendship, budding romance, and personal growth. Through free exploration, interactive choices, and playful mini-games, you can write your own chapter of youth.

4352680.title: Aurora Reach: Frontline
4352680.short_description: A sci-fi low-poly tower defense game. Design your defense against waves of aliens using a wide arsenal of different towers.

4352920.title: Upstairs
4352920.short_description: A short classic point-and-click adventure with a verb-based interface and dialogue choices, where you explore a strange building, meet unsettling characters, and slowly uncover a dark, ancient secret.

4353580.title: Legend of the Master Baiter Origins: Gills Gone Wild
4353580.short_description: Discover and catch various species of fish as you travel up the Megami River in intense fishing battles, where timing and perseverance are key.

4353680.title: Terra Taker
4353680.short_description: Terra Taker is an open-world survival crafting game where you terraform a fantasy world. Gather resources and build automated bases to transform floating islands, raging tornadoes, frozen tundras, molten lava fields, and lightning-scarred unknown lands into a thriving paradise for humanity.

4354190.title: Zed Hunters
4354190.short_description: Survive endless waves of Zeds and grow stronger with each level! Upgrade your gear, unlock new Hunters and create powerful builds as you progress through this top-down roguelite Zombie Shooter!

4355090.title: A Game About Breaking Pots
4355090.short_description: A short, relaxing game about the joy of breaking pots with your sword. Explore a tranquil abandoned medieval castle, buy upgrades and smash every pot you can find.

4355160.title: What the House Remembers
4355160.short_description: A short psychological horror experience about guilt, memory, and a house that remembers more than it should. Explore a quiet home where reality fractures, sanity fades, and the truth reveals itself only if you’re willing to face it.

4355310.title: Video Poker by Pokerist
4355310.genre: Casual, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4355310.short_description: Discover the world of classic video poker with the most popular variations: Deuces Wild, Jacks or Better and Bonus Video Poker. Master your casino skills!

4355490.title: Sex-Pop Demon Hunters
4355490.short_description: 😈 Sex-Pop Demon Hunters is a hybrid rhythm game and dating sim. Take on the role of a half-demon who ventures into the human world to deceive, seduce, and defeat the fearless Hunters and break the seals sealing the Demon Realm. 🔥🔥🔥

4355750.title: Frog & Roll
4355750.short_description: Surf, Bhop, Climb, and blast your way to victory in Frog & Roll. A truly hardcore 3D platformer focused on speed and fast reactions. Chase the records of your friends and the world's best players.

4356170.title: 异乡情缘
4356170.genre: Casual, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4356170.short_description: This game tells a love story about the protagonist who leaves his homeland to study abroad and encounters beautiful girls in other countries. Through his own efforts, he ultimately forms a happy marriage with these beautiful girls.

4356240.title: Pure Balance: Equilibrium
4356240.short_description: A minimalist physics-based puzzle game focused on balance and precision. Carefully place and align objects to maintain stability and complete short, challenging levels designed for relaxing yet skill-based gameplay.

4356310.title: BuzzKill
4356310.short_description: Squash waves of nasty bugs! Swat them, kill them with fire, or pull out the Orbital Death Laser. Your mouse is your weapon in this EPIC Bullet Heaven Roguelike loaded with crazy weapons, items and upgrades! Now go spank some bugs 🎾 🐝

4356640.title: POTUS vs. The World!
4356640.short_description: POTUS VS THE WORLD! A brutal political brawler about power, ego, and punching your problems until they turn into oil! Because fists don’t have term limits!

4356810.title: That's My President!
4356810.short_description: F*CK YEAH AMERICA. Dead Presidents are rising to steal the election. Rig the system and ruin friendships in chaotic multiplayer OR save the country in an insane solo campaign. Features Western duels, unique abilities and a Brainrot Corner for doomscrolling.

4358330.title: Desert Apocclpse PROTOCOL 77
4358330.short_description: Survive the onset of a global anomaly in Desert Apocalypse: Protocol 77. Escape a haunted farm, navigate parched cornfields, and manage your light to evade a silent threat. The desert is expanding, and Chapter 1 is just the beginning.

4358930.title: Vampirio
4358930.short_description: Build your fortress by day, survive monster raids by night in roguelike action.

4359000.title: Fear Night Tales - Do You Like Coffee?
4359000.short_description: A young woman begins a night shift at a roadside coffee shop. What starts as ordinary days filled with coffee and cleaning slowly turns into a nightmare when she finds a strange message written on a napkin. A shocking story awaits you in Episode 2 of FEAR NIGHT TALES.

4359060.title: 蛇女村:祭品
4359060.short_description: "Snake Village：Sacrifice" is a suspense FMV. Players must explore and collect various items and lead to a multitude of distinct endings.You act Lin Xi, the daughter of the village chief. Complete a life-or-death sacrificial to break the curse of transforming your human form forever.

4359150.title: TradingLife
4359150.short_description: Immerse yourself in real historical market data, relive it in an endless loop to refine your strategy through constant review—and once you achieve mastery, step seamlessly into live trading.

4359180.title: Shotgun Joe
4359180.short_description: Aliens kidnapped your fiancée. Grab your shotgun and fight monsters, zombies, and dinosaurs in this platform shooter. Love, monsters and shotguns - what could possibly go wrong?

4359190.title: 50p Tits
4359190.short_description: Everyone loves a gatcha game, so what can be better? A gatcha game about collecting marvelous mammaries! Beautiful breasts and jiggly jubblies. Turn the crank and uncover the secrets. Can you collect them all and uncover the truth? Thats it. Turn the crank, get the tits, and collect them all.

4359300.title: Time Cube
4359300.short_description: Execute color combos to control the game timer. Maintain combo effects to speed up, slow down or freeze time while balancing the stability of the cube. How long can you control the Time Cube?

4359400.title: You, in every Room.
4359400.short_description: Give in to toxic affection or lose everything to fight for true love. Psychological horror adventure about love, obsession, and blurred boundaries. Navigate a toxic love triangle, make difficult choices, and face multiple endings.

4359530.title: Fool`s Road
4359530.short_description: Turn-based strategy where chess-like battles evolve into full army command. Build your class fantasy, recruit troops, and enjoy thoughtful tactical runs.

4359560.title: Midnight Oil: Prologue
4359560.short_description: A horror action experience with brutal melee combat, tactical gunplay, and environmental puzzles. Players must survive hostile, atmospheric locations where every encounter demands quick reflexes, smart resource management, and careful exploration.

4359600.title: That Cat Game
4359600.short_description: A brave little cat. Big jumps. Endless curiosity. That Cat Game is a cozy 2D platformer from a passionate solo developer. Choose from twelve unique cats and explore hand-crafted levels filled with curious critters, tricky obstacles, and whimsical surprises.

4359620.title: Ragnarök Protocol
4359620.short_description: A curse has befallen Midgard, transforming the Realm into a video game. It is up to Grin and his friend Sunny to find Allfather Odin and reverse the curse before it spreads to the other realms.

4359630.title: Small Beans
4359630.short_description: A co-op adventure game where you need to find coins and deliver them to the Sugar King.

4359800.title: Don't Panic
4359800.short_description: Don’t Panic is an online co-op psychological horror game with a microphone detection system; players must control their real voices, protect their sanity, and work together to survive the night in a dark environment.

4359840.title: Dig Inc.
4359840.short_description: Fill the quota, pay the workers. Keep the profits, progress your company. Deploy miners to the richest veins, carriers to haul the goods, and merchants to turn ore into cash.

4359960.title: Rayborne
4359960.short_description: Rayborne is a puzzle game built around lasers, physics, and real-time light simulation. Solve handcrafted challenges by shaping light itself while uncovering the mystery behind a questionable AI research facility.

4359970.title: WordMaxed
4359970.short_description: A strategic, board-filling word puzzle on a large free-form grid. Place letters to build multiple words per turn, stack multipliers, chain combos, and tackle a globally-seeded Daily Challenge with online leaderboards.

4359980.title: Out West
4359980.short_description: A multiplayer survival game where trust and cooperation are everything. Travel west with up to 6 players, scavenge for food and supplies, and decide who gets power. Every alliance is fragile. Every choice changes who survives. Everyone wants to reach the gold, do you have what it takes to get there?

4360050.title: Hey Tom!
4360050.short_description: Explore a vast abandoned island in this FPS survival horror. Scavenge resources, battle creatures, manipulate surroundings for multiple endings, and survive Tom—the relentless predator constantly on your trail

4360060.title: Project V
4360060.short_description: An incremental space survival game where you manage a Von Neumann probe across 7 distinct phases. Master actions to reduce time, automate tasks, and build a fleet. Each death makes you stronger. Deterministic gameplay, offline progress, no manipulative mechanics.

4360070.title: Void Light
4360070.short_description: Survive. Endure. Repeat. Avoid creatures and survive as long as possible across various star systems.

4360160.title: Horse Race Tests: Life is Pain
4360160.genre: Action, Indie, Racing, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4360160.short_description: In Horse Race Tests: Life is Pain, feed into your worst impulses in this action packed high score gambling game. Gain abilities to rig races in your favor! Collect virtual figurines of your favorite horses, like Jovial Merryment...

4360180.title: Push The Cart Together
4360180.short_description: Cargo loaded, cart ready, the customer is waiting. Alone or with a friend, push the load to the finish line. Physics and the world around you won’t be friendly. The cargo will explode many times — so will you. It’ll be very hard, but don’t worry… eventually you’ll make it. Right?

4360200.title: Only Faces Remain
4360200.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4360200.short_description: ONLY FACES REMAIN is a short psychological horror game focused on exploration and atmosphere. You play as Marlene, a backpacker traveling alone who rents a cheap room to spend the night. What starts as a cheap place to sleep soon turns into a dangerous situation.

4360340.title: Nicator
4360340.short_description: This is a simple 2D platformer game go from left to right. Fight against gruesome undead that tries to hit you and bite you. face undead ghosts, skeletons even crawling undead. If your lucky you'll met the undead king.

4361120.title: The Mire of Miss Audacity
4361120.short_description: After waking up in a world without her sister, Miss Alexandra Audacity believes she's been left out of a conspiracy between her flaky friends and secretive husband. Guide her through five timelines mired by false memories while trying to keep her sanity, and yours.

4361260.title: 리액트 워즈
4361260.short_description: A stage-based turn-based strategy game where you read enemy moves and counter them under time pressure, then grow through item-driven builds with 89+ item synergies. Think fast, react faster!

4361580.title: Nadaca
4361580.short_description: Discover the world of Nadaca, meet emotionally rich characters and help them express their feelings through conversations, mini-games and a plant-growing system.

4361710.title: FrogStray
4361710.short_description: A tough, precise platformer. Guide a lost frog home using charged jumps and wall-kicks through hand-crafted, obstacle-filled levels. A pure challenge of skill.

4362090.title: PEW PEW PIRATES - Tower Defense
4362090.short_description: React to events and enemy attacks by moving cannons and using abilities in this short, minimalist Tower Defense game. Pirates are after your treasure, defend it!

4362170.title: Feed The Forest
4362170.short_description: A short, innocent incremental forest-builder. Be a snail! Feed The Forest! Hire other snails! The Forest needs juice! Enjoy the sun! Buy lots of upgrades! Blood is a type of juice!

4362270.title: Land of the Dead Trees
4362270.short_description: "Lands of the Dead Tree A Rogue-Like / Extraction RPG" Walk the thin line between life and death as you struggle to restore a shattered world. Lands of the Dead Trees draws you into a breathtaking realm beyond your wildest dreams - where danger lurks at every step, and survival demands courage.

4362470.title: Battle Beants
4362470.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4362470.short_description: Act as the steward for the Battle Beants in this retro-synthwave colony sim. Fight the Void using a physics-based soccer combat system, spread music and light to empower your squad, and traverse rugged alien rim worlds with rocket boot, your beant companions, and by surfing on your drones.

4362610.title: Blood Bounty
4362610.short_description: Survive relentless waves of assassins in this top-down action game - dodge, fight, and level up your vampire powers.

4362830.title: Back To Stables
4362830.short_description: George is not in the stables! Can you lure him back? Guide George back home through spooky forests and charming meadows. A cozy journey where every path is a puzzle.

4363410.title: No Luck In Dice
4363410.short_description: The Dice-Inspired Roguelike. No Luck In Dice is the out-of-this-world deckbuilder where you use Dice to score against cosmic entities. Weigh the dice in your favor and use Cosmic Cards to break the game!

4363780.title: Dog's Walts
4363780.short_description: This dog is a little goofy, but the hammer is dead serious. Play as a cute and clueless dog and smash soldiers off the stage to score points. Featuring 3D visuals with 2D-style controls, it’s easy to play, chaotic, and hard to stop. Just one more run!

4364090.title: Ommetaphobia
4364090.short_description: Ommetaphobia is a shoot-em-up horror atmospheric arcade game that takes you into your mind to face the fears that have been embedded within you. Use your lighter to burn the watchers, collect energy and sparks from them to further enhance your lighter, and last until the medicine kicks.

4364100.title: The Chosen Jinx
4364100.short_description: Lance, an extremely unlucky office worker, is pushed to his limits—until a truck hits him while crossing the street. He should have died or woken in a hospital, but instead awakens aboard a cruise ship. Explore, survive tense chases, collect clues, and uncover the truth of why he is here.

4365430.title: Striders
4365430.short_description: Plunge into the sea trenches and command an army of summoned allies. Upgrade you and your team, stack devastating synergies, as you overwhelm the relentless HORDE. Transform from a lone diver into an unstoppable force backed by an ocean of allies in this Vampire Survivors–inspired action roguelike.

4365470.title: Terminal Breaker
4365470.short_description: After infiltrating the famous testing site known as Light City, you are tasked with destroying it once and for all.

4365790.title: Fated Flatline DX
4365790.short_description: Fated Flatline DX is a bullet hell RPG about taking your pills!

4365910.title: Peep&Play VR
4365910.short_description: A dystopian sci-fi experience where you explore a laboratory, uncover hidden codes, and repair a malfunctioning robot before chaos takes over. Blending horror, erotic themes, and suspense.

4366980.title: Best Puppy Certificate
4366980.short_description: 女孩Puppy决定“治疗”她破碎的女友，为此她需要一些修补材料。

4367070.title: Antim Yatra
4367070.short_description: A journalist driven by family legacy set to explore the Belgharh station. While the whole world ages, the station remains trapped in 1940s, following a tragic derailment. Explore a perfectly preserved snapshot of the past, face the heavy atmosphere of a terminal stuck in time, and uncover the truth.

4367320.title: Dead Intelligence: First Encounter
4367320.short_description: A psychological horror narrative game disguised as an AI assistant. Launch what appears to be a helpful terminal, but discover the "intelligence" responding isn't only artificial - something or someone else is tagging along.

4367580.title: UR CHIMERIC SAI
4367580.short_description: A young man with shattered dreams becomes a tutor to a non-human girl. Lured by high pay, he arrives at a mysterious research center and meets Hamal. Upon uncovering a shocking truth, he must make a life-altering choice. A Taboo Romance with a Non-Human Student.

4367730.title: Riches In the Deep
4367730.short_description: Mine for gold and build businesses to earn money. An incredibly rewarding 2D clicker game awaits where you’ll become insanely rich. Complete missions and expand your empire throughout your journey!

4367760.title: But Why?
4367760.short_description: You are that penguin in the middle of nowhere. Turning your back on the colony, walking toward the mountains... No fish, no purpose, no turning back. A minimalist, atmospheric journey into the endless white void, centered around one heavy question. But Why?

4367840.title: My Swimsuit Bully
4367840.short_description: Experience a day of submission with Amari, the sadistic, sexy, big-breasted, and narcissistic swim team ace who loves bullying, controlling, and tormenting you as her personal servant. But secretly, you enjoy her bullying, and she brings out your masochistic urges.

4367940.title: PC Building Nightmare
4367940.short_description: PC Building Nightmare is a co-op horror survival game for 1-4 players. Before the RAM crisis hits, carry the computer parts you found cheaply for your internet cafe and build the PCs. Get the job done and just don't get caught by the obsessive governess!

4368020.title: wozitdev's 3D Sniper
4368020.short_description: Explore procedurally generated cities in wozitdev's take on Warren Spector's adage of the perfect capsule sized imm sim. In this fully 3-Dimensional immersive simulation you star as the titular Sniper. Drop in, roam the blocks, do as you will and take on the mantle of the Sniper's namesake.

4368140.title: Boing Boing Bros
4368140.short_description: Boing Boing Bros is a chaotic pinball-like action roguelike where you blast and boing your way through increasingly larger amounts of enemies. Use powerups, stat upgrades, and your boing skills to fight bosses, clear waves of enemies, and boing with your friends.

4368150.title: Egg Hunter
4368150.short_description: A magic glen full of magic creatures and bunnies. But the magic has been stolen and needs to be restored. Choices you make have dramatic effects. You help shape the story. The destiny of the Glen is in your hands!

4368240.title: Kana Snap: Learn Japanese Hiragana & Katakana
4368240.short_description: Master the Japanese alphabet in days, not months. Kana Snap is an arcade-style SRS tool designed to burn Hiragana and Katakana characters into your memory. Optimized for PC, Mac & Steam Deck, it replaces your flashcards with twitch-reflex gameplay. No ads. No subscriptions. Just snap and learn.

4368350.title: Silly Linguine Cat Simulator Deluxe Online
4368350.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4368350.short_description: Silly Linguine Cat Simulator Deluxe Online is a clicker game where progression is replaced with gambling, where the goal is simply to collect the rarest silly linguine cats.

4368360.title: Novorsk
4368360.short_description: Novorsk is a hardcore top-down extraction shooter set in a locked down city. Enter raids, scavenge what you can, and extract or lose everything.

4368400.title: Fish Scale Dam in Chongzuo
4368400.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4368550.title: Knot: Serpent Arena
4368550.short_description: A 3D snake survival game set in outer space! Eat pickup items to grow your tail and compete for survival with up to 4 players.

4368580.title: REKINDLE
4368580.short_description: Deflect. Illuminate. Eradicate. REKINDLE is a 2D pixel action-platformer featuring deflection focused combat. Explore Zion, a fallen city corrupted in darkness. Master the art of parrying, customize your gear, and solve light-based puzzles to complete your mission. May The Light Be With You.

4368600.title: MineSweeper.R
4368600.short_description: MineSweeper.R is an ultra-casual roguelike Minesweeper game with spell-programming mechanics. Build your own sweeping skills freely and experience Minesweeper in a whole new way.

4368650.title: Impulse Vector: Fighter Ops
4368650.short_description: As an independent contractor aboard a corporate carrier, pilot your Space Superiority Fighter on missions for rival organisations. Protect miners, strike enemy stations, and patrol the void to earn your keep and build your company’s name across the frontier!

4368740.title: 冒険は買い物の後で！
4368740.short_description: このゲームは半自動２DRPGです。パーティの仲間たちは自分で考えて行動します。 街ではそれぞれ買い物に出かけて、気に入った道具や装備を買ったり、装備を強化したり、道具をクラフトしたりします。 冒険に行くと、自分で考えて道具で回復したりバフをかけたり、倒れた仲間がいたら蘇生したり、様々な武器で敵を攻撃します。 操作も簡単、行きたい場所をクリックするだけです。 まるで誰かと冒険に行くような、そんなゲームです。

4368810.title: 8:00 AM : Still Morning
4368810.short_description: 8:00 AM – Still Morning is a short narrative exploration game about an ordinary morning and the emotions hidden beneath routine — an atmospheric experience where a familiar day slowly begins to feel different, repeating again and again even when not everyone is ready to wake up.

4368840.title: Sweet Agent
4368840.short_description: Sweet Agent - A simple and beautiful puzzle game themed around spies. It depicts the daily work lives of five pretty and cute female spies, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4368890.title: But Why?
4368890.short_description: Penguhill is a 2-6 player co-op parkour game where penguins and their bound spirits climb together. Physics-based movement, ragdoll chaos, and mistakes that can send your team falling. Reach the peak and find out why.

4368950.title: Lovelace Case
4368950.short_description: Lovelace Case is a Retro Lovecraftian Survival Horror set in the 1900s. Explore the nightmarish Mansion, manage scarce resources and face eldritch terrors where survival means choosing what parts of reality you are willing to lose.

4369050.title: WitchOver
4369050.short_description: Monitor the witch. Even if they ceases to be a witch... A horror game where you care for the witch while reporting anomalies. You tend to her by talking to her or baking cakes.But,magic leaks out, causing anomalies. If you fail to report, the witch grows unstable. And ultimately, they will...

4369080.title: SYSADMIN Hell
4369080.short_description: You're the sole sysadmin for a company scaling from 10 to 100,000 employees. Everything breaks. Everything. Automate your way out of ticket hell or watch it all burn.

4369110.title: DEMØNS GATE & Paintball Ops
4369110.short_description: Enjoy character development. Over 100 character slots. Auto-progression dispatch system. Over 50 stages. Auto-progression is also possible. `tactical role‑playing game (tactical RPG)` `strategy RPG (SRPG)` `grid‑based turn‑based tactics game` `Japanese turn‑based tactical RPG series`

4369130.title: Chop Chop Inc.
4369130.short_description: Cut, craft, and hammer your way from flimsy desk jockey to an unstoppable, sawdust-spewing wood-working powerhouse!
