Explore a handcrafted world packed with weirdos, secrets and trees begging for violence. Craft legendary furniture and stomp your competition into splinters. 🪓

4369140.title: Book Inside
4369140.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4369140.short_description: Noah, the boy who lives in the library of the underworld, and Eva, the girl who lives in the book. You enter the world of books by playing from the perspective of boy Noah. Join us for a mysterious adventure in the book!

4369170.title: The Maze
4369170.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, Strategy, Early Access
4369170.short_description: Escape an ever-shifting procedural labyrinth. Loot legendary armor, overcome challenges in crafting zones, and survive deadly traps in this fantasy Roguelite. With progressive difficulty and unique enemies, can you find the exit before the Ghost finds you?

4369260.title: Act! Autonomy: Cell-Tones
4369260.short_description: Break the pattern, awaken the self. Tune the cells, reshape the soul. 《Act! Autonomy: Cell-Tones》 is a free-input rhythm game. Use your unique playstyle to defend the humanity's art. Amidst the "AI Somatization" plague, your performance will become the spark that reignites the hope of mankind.

4369570.title: Lacustris - The War over Water
4369570.short_description: An innovative, realistic point-and-click game where you step into the shoes of a mysterious character in search of his identity and a shocking truth. Puzzles to solve, complex dialogue, and realistic graphics are the focus of this engaging game.

4370320.title: BLEND
4370320.short_description: An online and LAN party game of blending in and deception for 2-9 players

4370480.title: Burnstation
4370480.short_description: Deck-burning. Score-chasing. Plinko-style roguelike. Buy retro cartridges in a cyberpunk world, score massive points and push the Burnstation beyond its limits!

4370490.title: Smerk: Wacky Autobattles
4370490.short_description: A chaotic, unhinged roguelike autobattler: hire, fire, upgrade and modify your friends, discover relics that multiply effects, then sit back and watch they as they spiral into mayhem

4370650.title: Mini UP
4370650.short_description: Mini UP is a free parkour game where every second counts. Optimize your movements, perfect your precision, and achieve faster and faster times.

4371000.title: Whispers of the Valley
4371000.short_description: Whispers of the Valley is a peaceful first-person exploration experience set in a quiet valley. Wander freely, set up camp as night falls, capture moments through photography, and slow down in a calm world focused on atmosphere, reflection, and presence.

4371140.title: False Earth
4371140.short_description: Descend deep into the Earth beneath the Kola Superdeep Borehole, exploring underground layers as a geologist sent to investigate strange signals — and uncover that Earth is not what science believes it to be.

4371370.title: DARKNESS WILL FALL
4371370.short_description: DARKNESS WILL FALL is a queer romance visual novel set in the modern world of vampires. After a fateful encounter you are tasked with revealing the identity of a reaver - a monsterous vampire eating vampire - in the city or your human life is forfeit. It should be easy enough, right?

4373380.title: GOT3D
4373380.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4373380.short_description: A 3D action-adventure where you traverse the land of Midgard fighting enemies using your trusty hammer 'Mjolnir'. Solve puzzles and speak to the townspeople to uncover and solve the mysteries of the land. Can you defeat the evil serpent Jormangund and free the people from his tyranny?

4373550.title: SoulStream Saga: Chapter 1
4373550.short_description: Fight through a century long war between two rival factions in this old-school Action Turn Based JRPG. Interrupt casts, master elemental skills and magic, and shape the future of the world itself.

4373880.title: Tank General
4373880.genre: Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Strategy, Free To Play
4373880.short_description: Tank General, a World War II-themed card game with unique gameplay mechanics, deep tactical combat, and an easy entry level. Build your deck, battle against humans and AI, complete campaigns and raids, and explore new maps and headquarters!

4374330.title: Hawkins & Sons Detective Agency
4374330.short_description: A detective visual novel set in Victorian London. Play as a veteran detective and his young daughter, investigate scenes through point-and-click gameplay, question suspects, and make tough choices that shape the story.

4374470.title: Speedland
4374470.short_description: Explore a vast open world, complete quests, collect items, participate in races to earn cash, build your town, manage finances, upgrade technology, and power-up your vehicles. Challenge other players and compete in events to climb the global leaderboard.

4375420.title: The Ashen OZ
4375420.short_description: A fast-paced dark fantasy action roguelite where you chain attacks and parries into fluid, combo-driven combat through a twisted fairytale world.

4375480.title: 14 Days With You
4375480.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play, Early Access
4375480.short_description: Don't worry, he's always going to be with you... Spend time getting to know Ren, a mysterious individual who seems more than obsessed with you — and is willing to do anything he can to have you.

4375530.title: Hansel And Gretel
4375530.short_description: Hansel & Gretel is a medieval horror adventure where players explore cursed forests, survive relentless enemies, and uncover dark secrets through tense exploration, stealth, and survival-focused combat in a grim, atmospheric world.

4375560.title: Chop Signal
4375560.short_description: There's a little guy on your desktop with an axe. He chops wood whenever your AI assistant is busy. He's got upgrades, crafting recipes, customers to haggle with, and rare loot to find. You don't have to do anything. Just code. While your AI agent is having all the fun and playing the game for you.

4375800.title: Anna - Chapter 2
4375800.short_description: Anna's Chapter 2 is a continuation to visual novel following an ordinary young woman starting a new phase of her life in a bustling city, where she lives with her boyfriend, Andrew. What begins as a fresh start quickly becomes a journey filled with temptation, ambition, and difficult choices.

4375880.title: 声韵之恋
4375880.short_description: 《声韵之恋》是一款以配音行业为背景的 GALGAME。作品以配音导演张文轩为主角，他受友人委托承接一部番剧的配音执导工作，借此与三位风格各异的配音演员相遇结缘并了解配音行业的真实生态与圈内文化。

4376110.title: Resident's Battle: A Stranger's Tale
4376110.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4376110.short_description: Resident's Battle: A Stranger's Tale tells the story of a superpowered group of friends indulging in personal conflicts, while a mysterious agent (you, the player) infiltrates their chaos for personal, unknown reasons. An action RPG Comedy full of twists, romance and spicy fan service scenarios

4376310.title: 聲姿迴響
4376310.short_description: Play as a Magical Girl in a 7-day doomsday loop! Experience dual Roguelite modes: survive the trap-filled "Undead Chase" or strategize in turn-based combat using unique builds. Navigate black market gambles, inherit gorgeous outfits across runs, and shine brighter in your next cycle.

4376370.title: Yoga with Sensei
4376370.short_description: Open a yoga studio in the city and guide four very different women through stretching, laughter, and growing romantic tension. A wholesome comedy visual novel with optional yoga mini-games, light ecchi charm, and multiple endings.

4376630.title: 龙扬传1：白与黑
4376630.short_description: 一位名为“龙扬”的少年之故事。一封写给单机RPG的情书。在游戏中探索并触发事件，在剧情中做出具有影响的选择，通过修炼武功、战斗升级、装备道具让自己变得更强，在江湖中结识不同的伙伴！发布首周定价≤10元人民币，感兴趣的话，就加入愿望单吧！

4376660.title: The Black Whale
4376660.short_description: The factory chip began to malfunction. The horrible headaches of the main character don’t bother anyone in this dystopian world. “The Black Whale”, the attractive white powder, is the only thing that can stop the pain. And show you the life without the horrors of harsh reality.

4376940.title: Nun and Vampire
4376940.short_description: In 1889 London’s fog, nun Alia, a "holy blood sacrifice", enters a Gothic castle to kill vampire lord Cain. Yet love, curses, old ghosts and dark witches twist fate—her blood is his redemption. A deadly, passionate tale unfolds.

4376950.title: Stickerino
4376950.short_description: Go wild with stickers on your cards to break all the limits and hit totally sky-high scores! Collect snacks and Monstraks, flex your style, and crush the Sticker Wizard’s challenges!

4377260.title: Homeless farmer
4377260.short_description: "Homeless Farmer" is a survival strategy where you start from scratch, even a little bit in the red. Your goal is not just to survive, but to save up for an apartment in a world where prices are rising every day.

4377330.title: Streamer vs. Chat
4377330.short_description: An interactive game with Twitch integration where every message matters. You vs. your Chat. Are you ready to fight against your viewers?

4377410.title: Polygon War
4377410.short_description: A 2D comic-style squad survival game. Command triangle, square, and pentagon characters through waves of increasing difficulty. Mount weapons on every edge — blades, guns, flamethrowers, and more. Stack same weapons for gear combo bonuses. Burn, freeze, or shatter foes using material weaknesses.

4377700.title: Beneath the Ghost Kingdom
4377700.short_description: Venture beneath the Ghost Kingdom where you will encounter strange creatures, solve puzzles and uncover hidden secrets!

4378100.title: Be My Star
4378100.short_description: “Be My Star” is a simulation game where you experience life as a K-pop fan during a new album release. Support your favorite group while balancing the protagonist’s everyday life, all wrapped in a cozy aesthetic — while racing against the clock.

4378140.title: Femboy vs Nazis
4378140.short_description: Stop the Nazi invasion of Washington! Fight solo or with up to 8 friends in this fast-paced satirical shooter. Use style and heavy firepower to save the capital and rewrite history.

4378280.title: modavuj FOREST CAMP
4378280.short_description: While exploring the remnants of a forgotten civilization, you realize the forest is far from alone. You must confront the guardians of this dark past and survive.

4378340.title: Byrd Ronin
4378340.short_description: Byrd Ronin blends fast-paced 2D action with precise controls. As a Ronin bird, carve through chaos to reach the legendary cherry tree that holds your vow. Get stronger each run, unlock new items and skills, master combat flow, and survive - this is the Ronin path.

4378370.title: Anomalous Cleaning Detail
4378370.short_description: A first-person cleaning simulator where you scrub, vacuum, and restore a troubled town plagued by supernatural disturbances. Complete contracts and use environmental clues to prepare for the exorcism, because when the mess is paranormal, a standard clean won't be enough.

4378490.title: Ghostpunk
4378490.short_description: A cyberpunk paranormal detective sim played entirely through a CRT terminal. Analyze evidence, expose hoaxes, and survive faction politics before rent is due.

4378500.title: Defend Your Land
4378500.short_description: Defend Your Land is a minimalist tower defense game. Place units, upgrade them, and stop enemy waves from reaching your base.

4378600.title: Seema's Pogo 3 Hop Together
4378600.short_description: The long-awaited third game from the legendary game series, now with multiplayer! This game is a 3d-platformer, but instead of jumping by yourself you're using pogo, which was inspired by 3D Hopper tech demo for Nintendo 3DS.

4378720.title: Dude in the Dark
4378720.short_description: 2D animated game where you are guided by smileys to complete each timed level.

4378740.title: Wordforge: Silent Letters
4378740.short_description: A word-building dungeon game where every decision matters. Forge words to survive, explore dangerous halls, and awaken silent letters to gain powerful score and health bonuses.

4378750.title: Marble Idle Collectionist
4378750.short_description: A relaxing incremental game focused on sensorial joy of marbles, soothing sound design, and visually calming simulation. Upgrade systems, earn more marbles, and enjoy collecting all kinds of shiny trinkets.

4378770.title: Eternal Angler
4378770.short_description: A surreal multiplayer fishing game where you encounter strange beings hidden across fragmented dimensions.

4378840.title: Virtuoso Skins Game
4378840.short_description: What the #$@& is a Skins Game?! High stakes, big bet golf gamblin' with your friends...IN SPACE! Fly out with 3 of your friends online to a futuristic world of high-rolling hi-jinx and compete in off-wall golf tournaments for bragging rights and cold hard cash in Virtuoso Skins Game!

4378920.title: Fishing Cat's Slack-off Diary
4378920.short_description: This is a story- casual roguelite game. Live, vacation, work, and slack off in the magical Cat Realm. Experience multiple professions through yearly cycles. Unlock the memories of 24 feline BOSSes, confront the Ox-Horse Deity, and embark on a healing journey that blends workplace life with fantasy!

4379130.title: 東方エンブレム3 ～Genie～
4379130.short_description: This time, the protagonist is Kamiki! The strongest character in the game is available to use from the start! Kamiki has been getting beaten pretty badly recently, and is burning with a desire for revenge. Reisen and the others start nitpicking when Kamiki and the others arrive in Gensokyo.

4379140.title: Way of Horny: First Touch
4379140.short_description: Pop the right colors. Keep winning. Unlock the heat. Way of Horny: First Touch is a quick, addictive bubble-matching puzzle game where every cleared stage gets you closer to 15 steamy Full HD H-scenes

4379190.title: Argonauts Agency: Secret of the Labyrinth
4379190.short_description: Something unexplainable has happened in the Labyrinth of Crete: paths vanish and routes collapse. Jason and Medea move forward, clearing the way toward a hidden mystery.

4379250.title: Valentine's Day Bikini Femdom
4379250.short_description: Spend Valentine’s Day with Hinako, your big-breasted childhood friend turned girlfriend, as she showers you with her sadistic love.

4379270.title: Assassin of Dragon
4379270.short_description: Play as warrior woman in this small medieval themed rpg game. Mission to find big flying dragon and beat it and collect skull. Beware also zombie enemies

4379360.title: Wyvern
4379360.genre: Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4379360.short_description: A slow-burn multiplayer RTS where you expand your kingdom, build settlements, create guilds and conquer! Recruit citizens, train them into specialized warriors and craftsmen. Strategically claim territory and contest land held by rivals.

4379400.title: Roll n' Bounce
4379400.short_description: Roll n' Bounce is a 2d, pixel art, side scrolling precision platformer game. You will need to master the movement and timing to make your way through these progressively challenging levels!

4379420.title: Warm Inside
4379420.short_description: His head was buzzing, his thoughts clanking like a rusty chainsaw, and Dima, cursing his latest dream, understood that his life would never be the same if he didn’t find the sock…

4379450.title: Mech My Day
4379450.short_description: Build a quad-leg mech from scrap, cards, and bad decisions. Craft parts, build a deck, and survive endless swarms in a sarcastic, survivor-like chaos sandbox where your worst ideas sometimes work.

4379550.title: VOLT & VOID
4379550.short_description: Think together, act together, escape together. VOLT & VOID is a premium Online Co-op experience where cooperation is key. Utilize unique abilities to solve complex mechanisms and uncover the secrets deep within the reactor.

4379570.title: Hentai Body
4379570.short_description: Hentai Body - Beautiful shapes, you can't take your eyes off them. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4379590.title: Who Wants To Be A Billionaire
4379590.short_description: High-stakes trivia with animated hosts who actually react to how you play. Two modes: 15-question classic or 35-question nightmare. 9,000+ questions across 9 categories. Climb the money ladder, use your lifelines wisely, and try not to choke.

4379640.title: Once Upon a Page
4379640.short_description: Once Upon a Page is a fun educational game made for a younger audience and casual gamers. Drag & Drop cards, complete puzzles, and explore the character's world of imagination!

4379670.title: Desk Rage
4379670.short_description: Want to experience what it's like to have a little brother? This game can satisfy you. When you open this game, your "little brother" will pop out and stand on your desktop, keeping you company while you work. When you're in a bad mood, you can beat him up, or even summon a monster to eat him.

4379740.title: AFK leveling fight monsters
4379740.short_description: This is a game where you defeat monsters and collect equipment. There's no complicated plot. Defeat monsters, collect their dropped equipment, and then challenge even stronger monsters!

4379760.title: MILK ME DARLING: THE ANALIZED BREAST FRIEND
4379760.short_description: MILK ME DARLING: THE ANALIZED BREAST FRIEND (all characters are 18+ and no character get hurt in this video game), a double penetration sex simulation game

4381190.title: Wrong Treatment
4381190.short_description: Wrong Treatment is a psychological horror survival game where the protagonist's mind becomes the main setting.

4381230.title: UNCHI
4381230.short_description: A casual roguelite runner where a kid hero fights to save his hamster who pooped itself to death. Play as Ram in a 2d side-scroller, unlocking suits, powers, and cards in a fast, absurd journey to rescue Unchi.

4381240.title: Only Mining - Cozy Digging Game
4381240.short_description: Only Mining is a mining and crafting game. In this world, you can mine endlessly and craft armor of various levels. Relax and enjoy the journey as you progress from a very slow miner to a super-fast miner.

4381260.title: Chernov Incident
4381260.short_description: A time-driven psychological thriller puzzle game where players monitor systems, analyze data, and solve logic-based challenges under extreme pressure. Every action costs time as you prioritize failures, make critical decisions, and race against a relentless countdown.

4381340.title: Colony 28
4381340.short_description: Colony 28 is a raw piece of Czech gaming history. Step into the circuits of a malfunctioning android, defy your alien masters, and fight for humanity's remnants across 8 sprawling levels. Experience an authentic 90s sci-fi classic in its original Czech version.

4381360.title: Sim Tanks
4381360.short_description: Sim Tanks - The Most Fun 2D Tank Game

4381370.title: FEMBOY SLEEPOVER - Episode 1
4381370.short_description: You're invited to the Femboy Sleepover! In Episode 1 get to know your new femboy roommates, but watch out— your succubus might have other ideas...

4381460.title: The Hollow
4381460.short_description: The Hollow is a first-person shooter with a semi-open world set in the Tunguska anomaly and Ukrainian adventure novel.

4381640.title: POPULARITY CONTEST
4381640.short_description: Elena and 7 familiar faces are trapped in a room, and the only way out is to choose one person to die. Navigate social relationships and gain trust to steer the spotlight away from you, or else they just might decide you should be the one on the chopping block.

4381740.title: Panic Point
4381740.short_description: Panic Point is a cooperative first-person psychological horror game where players explore hostile environments, manage limited resources, and work together under constant pressure. Survival depends on communication, teamwork, and staying calm when everything starts to go wrong.

4381810.title: Adaptive Wilds
4381810.short_description: A living survival game where every action reshapes the world. Terraform freely, craft modular tools, and build complex structures in ecosystems that adapt, remember, and push back. Progress through skill, legacy, and hard choices in a wilderness that never stagnates.

4381820.title: Rapid Ascent
4381820.short_description: Rapid Ascent is a thrilling futuristic arcade game where you take control of a spaceship and race through an endless tunnel full of dangers and deadly traps.

4381840.title: Tense Parking
4381840.short_description: Tense Parking is an exciting parking and driving simulator that transports you to a vibrant and vibrant metropolis. Get behind the wheel of a car and reach the finish line as quickly as possible before the timer runs out.

4381890.title: Sky Pirates
4381890.short_description: Sky Pirates is a cooperative steampunk pirate adventure game. Sail aboard a flying ship, explore islands, and transport treasures for a pirate organization… all while avoiding celestial dangers!

4382100.title: Farmer Defense
4382100.short_description: Grow crops and defend your farm from wild animals trying to get their taste buds on your hard grown crops. Survive entire day for bonus harvest and unlock new Farms. Upgrade your Farm and your Equipment to take on Harder and Bigger Farms.

4382130.title: Hnefatafl Org
4382130.short_description: The game of Copenhagen Hnefatafl is a turn based strategy game with roots going back hundreds of years. It is a bit like chess and played on 11 by 11 and 13 by 13 size board. The client supports playing games, playing in tournaments, reviewing games and going through different move choices.

4382160.title: Air Cadets
4382160.short_description: Air Cadets is a co-op arcade flying game about coordination and problem-solving. Plan routes, collect points, maintain formations, and avoid deadly crashes, with three distinct pilots offering different abilities.

4382250.title: Goose Evolution
4382250.short_description: A relaxed and casual tower defense battle between geese. 16 parallel spaces, 108 civilizations, and confrontations between different troops.

4382270.title: 鱼干集团那些事：征途
4382270.short_description: 《鱼干集团那些事》ip兽剧动画 2D角色扮演动作游戏力作,玩家将会扮演鱼干集团新来的主管（抛去一些动画中的设定）完成各个任务以及研发各种武器，开通更多部门等等。

4382290.title: The Cinder Pact
4382290.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4382290.short_description: Strap on your headset and grab your squad! This VR shooter blends intense cooperative raids with social hubs. Battle through ever-changing maps—from cyberpunk cities to fantasy dungeons. Unlock wild skins, switch classes, and make every run legendary. Your mission? Shoot, laugh, repeat!

4382340.title: Egg
4382340.short_description: Egg is a minimalist desktop companion for your busy digital life. Hatch a mysterious egg and let a tiny, soulful creature live in a corner of your screen. It plays, naps, and acts cute all on its own—requiring zero management or complex clicks.

4382370.title: Exit, Seriously?
4382370.short_description: An observation horror game by a student dev and a tired AI. As a solo dev, I built this tribute to The Exit 8 using 30% logic and 50% blind faith in AI. Observe the hallway carefully: if you find an anomaly, turn back; if not, keep going. No saves, just pure student-made "artistic" chaos.

4382450.title: Liupanshui City in Guizhou Province
4382450.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4382480.title: 灵劫变
4382480.short_description: 《灵劫变》是一款开放世界玄幻修仙角色扮演游戏。你可以使用自己的专属形象在数万格的手工地图中不断探索全新机缘，体验蝴蝶效应般的非线性剧情与红尘情缘。除却驾驭灵兽与法宝进行策略战斗，你还能开辟洞府、经营宗门，甚至与道侣建立家族，亲自培养下一代天骄，开启有温度的修真之路。

4382520.title: Peaceful Fishing Story
4382520.short_description: A relaxing fishing game set in a village surrounded by nature. Cast your line in rivers, lakes, and the ocean, fill your fishing encyclopedia, and enjoy peaceful days at your own pace. Catch legendary fish in every location—and eventually take on the rarest and most extraordinary among them.

4382690.title: Isolated Island: After the flood
4382690.short_description: Survive in a world drowned by disaster. Explore by day, hide by night, fight zombies, scavenge resources, build your shelter, and trade with other factions. Your survival, your strategy.

4382860.title: Loot Goblin
4382860.short_description: Loot Goblin is a fast paced incremental game about stealing treasure and outsmarting heroes! Recruit slimes to automate your hoarding, invest in powerful upgrades, and build your wealth until you can finally earn your Retirement™!

4382920.title: Jungbung's Life
4382920.genre: Indie, Simulation, Free To Play, Early Access
4382920.short_description: 디시인사이드 중붕이의 삶은 평범한 백수인 주인공 "김중붕"의 삶을 체험하는 게임입니다. 중붕이가 되어 중갤타운에서 반가운 인물들을 만나고, "강력한" 적들을 상대하며, 황당한 사건들을 겪어보세요.

4383030.title: Rolls and Dungeons
4383030.short_description: An incremental game about casinos and dungeons! Assemble a team of debtor-heroes, clear dungeons, hoard chips, and spin the slot machine in combat to defeat monsters and bosses. Level up your luck, hunt for loot and artifacts, unlock new dungeon levels – the ultimate jackpot awaits at the very end!

4383110.title: 2080 - Operation Sunshield
4383110.short_description: Can a giant umbrella save Earth? Be part of the most important mission in human history and join the crew onto a daring trip into space! Will you save mankind from global warming? Be the engineer of our future in this humorous hand-drawn point-and-click-adventure (alpaca inside).

4383130.title: MALAM: School
4383130.short_description: A psychological loop horror rooted in Malaysian school legends. No chases, less UI, just a slow, atmospheric dread. Estimated 1- 2 hours game time. As an independent artist, I used AI to turn a lifelong dream into reality. Explore shifting corridors, manage character's sanity, and face the cycle.

4383180.title: Multiverse Survivors
4383180.short_description: Mow down endless waves of enemies in survivors-like action across the multiverse, alone or with friends. Loot, upgrade, and snowball into absurd builds that melt entire waves.

4383260.title: Rival Commanders
4383260.short_description: A fast-paced casual real-time strategy game where you command stylized armies, deploy powerful units, and outsmart rivals in explosive top-down battles.

4383270.title: Trip to the Core
4383270.short_description: Trip to the Core is a team-based roguelike deckbuilder. Form your party, forge killer decks, fuse powers & enhancers into insane, run-obliterating combos!

4383370.title: Swaddle
4383370.short_description: You are a young intern in the maternity ward, and your job is to watch over the newborns on the second floor every night. But something very hungry wants to reach these children and devour them. Stop it immediately. Save the babies.

4383410.title: A Game About Being A Parrot
4383410.short_description: Annoy people, Steal their stuff, break their things,ruin everyone's day & Be a real Parrot

4383460.title: Q.U.B.E: Incremental TD
4383460.short_description: Incremental tower defense with chaos on the screen! Destroy enemies or gather resources, upgrade your skills, and expand your range. Choose your strategy: grow your economy, strengthen your defenses, or boost your click efficiency!

4383470.title: Everyday life with Evil sisters
4383470.short_description: The protagonist secured security of life until his wounds heal. Immediately, he presses his sisters to arrange their living environment by asking them to do so, In addition, let's confront the sisters with various naughty requests under the guise of caring for their wounds.

4383480.title: PowerCorp
4383480.short_description: A hard sci-fi survival sim where each decision costs power. Every system drains your dying reactor. Pilot a crippled spacecraft across a real-scale solar system using true orbital mechanics, manage critical systems, and fight to reach Earth — where space itself is the only enemy you need.

4383570.title: Libertine: King of Hearts
4383570.short_description: Libertine: King of Hearts is an immersive sim/dating sim following a man as he gets pulled into the seedy underworld of Libertine. Sneak, shoot, and combine physics with gadgets to defeat enemies in your own unique way. Made by a solo dev with a dream to create the best adult game ever made.

4383620.title: ア異-Love
4383620.short_description: This is an Exit 8–style game presented as a short story, with love as its central theme.

4383630.title: Tales of Bloomrise
4383630.short_description: Balance two lives in Tales of Bloomrise. By day, help your village flourish and build bonds; by night, explore dangerous dungeons and uncover ancient secrets in this pixel-art action RPG.

4383640.title: Last Chance
4383640.short_description: Last Chance - is an atmospheric retro shooter with pixel graphics, where you are Alexei who has a disease in his head and must do everything to survive. The atmosphere of the dark winter adds to the epic and enhances the gameplay experience.

4383800.title: TheTwelfthDeceivers
4383800.short_description: This is a turn-based card game of psychological warfare. Every card played is a gamble with death itself; win, and you survive another round; lose, and you're reduced to dust. Trust is a fatal luxury; suspicion is the only survival skill.

4383810.title: Apococlicks
4383810.short_description: Dark horror post-apocalyptic incremental clicker game

4383950.title: CRASHLAND
4383950.short_description: CRASHLAND is a VR action-horror game set on a hostile alien planet. You’re an intergalactic gladiator fighting to survive until rescue. Combat is fast, vicious, and brutal - there is nowhere to hide. Master pistol, boomstick, scanner, and teleporter to survive.

4383990.title: The Shadow Between Words
4383990.short_description: Words have power — at Verbum Academy you'll feel it yourself. What you write about others comes true. Your texts change reality. Choose who to write about and how far to go. Visual novel: mystery, choices with consequences, romance.

4384010.title: On Fighting Shadows
4384010.short_description: A narrative JRPG about fighting shadows outside and within.

4384030.title: Dead Set Warriors
4384030.short_description: Unleash the fighters of time once more for a showdown unlike no-other! Fight your way through different time periods, use your environment to your advantage and become the ultimate warrior!

4384110.title: False Exit
4384110.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game set in a looping hospital, where each cycle changes reality, escalates tension, and brings you closer to something that should not be there.

4384120.title: Worthy or Not
4384120.short_description: “Worthy or Not” is an FMV about Dating Agency. Players make choices across diverse in-game topics, which modify target characters’ latent attributes. The final matchmaking phase, based on accumulated latent value changes, unlocks multiple endings. You play as a matchmaking agency owner faced girls

4384150.title: KUBIKA
4384150.short_description: Guide charming cubes through a dreamlike world in Kubika, a Sokoban-inspired 3D puzzle adventure. Manipulate gravity to your will to solve thoughtful, elegant three-dimensional puzzles. Bring your vision to life with the built-in Level Editor, and share your creations with the Community.

4384230.title: Elyndorh
4384230.short_description: Command armies of wizards, gather resources, and build magical structures to dominate the battlefield. Use powerful spells, customize your hero, and outsmart opponents in intense solo or multiplayer battles.

4384260.title: My Waifu's Stream is Going Viral ‼️😳
4384260.short_description: My Waifu's Stream is Going Viral ‼️😳 is a narrative-driven webcam simulator with dating sim elements and a light NTR vibe. Manage your girlfriend’s streams, react to donations, grow the channel, and see how fame affects your relationship. 🔞

4384290.title: Rocket Cars
4384290.short_description: Rocket-powered cars meet competitive soccer in intense 3v3 matches. Master aerial tricks, teamwork, and split-second saves in this fast-paced, physics-driven sports game.

4384380.title: A Dreamer's White Night
4384380.short_description: 《幻想家的白夜》是一款LIN诗语工作室制作的文字游戏，改编自著名作家陀斯托耶夫斯基的名著《白夜》，来自于大平市的“幻想家”在偶然之间见到一位名为山奈晞的少女，“从来没有接触过任何女人”的他与少女度过四个夜晚，这夜晚是幻想家每一刻都会想起的幸福，又或者只是幻想家的白日幻想？答案将交给玩家

4384410.title: With You: Our Heartfelt Journey
4384410.short_description: 本作是一款细腻温暖的轻百合向AVG视觉小说。故事围绕着长期遭受校园霸凌、在自卑与孤独中蜷缩的女高中生——夏目萤展开。当她的人生几乎被灰色笼罩时，一次偶然的相遇，让她结识了白铃学园里如光芒般存在的学生会长，早坂葵。这位与她性格截然不同的学姐，不仅以温柔与坚定将她从绝望中打捞，更亲手为她推开了一扇望向新世界的窗。游戏通过精美的CG、动人的音乐与沉浸式的叙事，邀请您一同见证这段关于欺凌、救赎与自我成长的青春物语。您的选择将引导夏目萤走向不同的结局——是延续仰望，还是最终并肩？这段破茧之旅，静候您的开启。

4384610.title: Getaway Golf
4384610.short_description: Get your heart-rate up! Trapped inside a shiny corporate office, a smart AI golf ball breaks free from its programming and decides to play by its own rules. Cheat the system, rig impossible shots, and sneak past security guards in fast, top-down levels packed with puzzles and stealth.

4384710.title: Run
4384710.short_description: Just run. Just watch out for cars. There is only one thing to do: run. No destination. No story. Just an endless wasteland, a long road, and cars that won’t slow down. One mistake means instant restart. Your running distance is shared with players worldwide. There are no winners. Only distance.

4384810.title: Retro Otrop
4384810.short_description: A writer inherits a property in Otrop and faces supernatural challenges. Pay bills, gather inspiration, and confront ghosts in a town filled with puzzles, minigames, and life sim elements. Relive 8-bit nostalgia in a game that blends mundane daily life with secrets defying life and death.

4384820.title: Global Football
4384820.genre: Massively Multiplayer, Sports, Free To Play, Early Access
4384820.short_description: Global Football is a multiplayer football game focused on real skill, teamwork, and identity. Here, each player controls a single athlete on the field — not an entire team. No pay-to-win. No scripts. Victory depends solely on your game awareness, technique, and team chemistry.

4384850.title: Realindustry
4384850.short_description: 231 real materials. 352 accurate recipes. Build a Hyperdrive Engine using actual chemistry. Your factory grows. Your efficiency improves. Someone notices. Every decision is logged. Welcome, Director.

4384880.title: Horse Riding Classic
4384880.short_description: Experience the classic majesty of soaring through the skies on Horseback. Collect over 99 Apples hidden throughout a Handcrafted 3-Dimensional World, push technology to its limit and Breed the Ultimate Horse, and destroy The Glue Factory and Save Horse Kind.

4384970.title: The Raid of Brunswick
4384970.short_description: A first-person simulation where players take on the roles of a Lancaster bomber crew during a single World War II bombing raid over Brunswick.

4385090.title: She Lives on Your Screen
4385090.short_description: She Lives on Your Screen is a desktop game where a daring and uninhibited girl brightens up your screen with her stunning and sultry poses. Your workday will never be so boring again.

4385220.title: life: Start To Return
4385220.short_description: Live an 'ordinary life' as a game programmer. Go to work, pay your rent, and make time for yourself in your free time. What could go wrong?

4385240.title: Go Dash Go!
4385240.short_description: An action-platformer where you will dash and punch your way upward to survive a decades-long alien-versus-robot war—as a very unlucky bystander.

4385290.title: ExoFlora: First Seeds
4385290.short_description: ExoFlora: First Seeds is a farming simulation and management game set on an alien planet. Grow exotic species, control a greenhouse, research new technologies, and defend your crops in a living, unpredictable ecosystem.

4385300.title: Summoner Reborn
4385300.short_description: Summon spirits and survive a deadly test in Summoner Reborn, a roguelike horror action game. As a summoner, enhance spirits with various traits. Defeat monsters within the time limit and find rooms leading deeper to reach the Red Summoning Circle on B3.

4385310.title: Specter Hideout
4385310.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4385310.short_description: Specter Hideout is a top-down, asymmetrical multiplayer experience for 2 to 5 players. It pits a team of Hunters against one invisible Specter. Whether you are hunting the specter or "haunting the living", every match is a game of cat-and-mouse where one wrong move means the end.

4385370.title: Last Courier
4385370.short_description: Every package is a mile closer to home. As the world’s last courier, navigate a silent, zombie-infested city to earn credits for a final evacuation ticket. In this atmospheric journey, your only connection to your family is a flickering screen and a promise that must be kept.

4385490.title: Steal Shift
4385490.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4385490.short_description: You work night shifts in an abandoned industrial facility where everything that arrives is not exactly yours. Your job is simple, steal items, process them, break machines, fix machines, print money, extract, repeat.

4385520.title: Rain Debt
4385520.short_description: A game about a kid who's forced to pay back his debt.

4385550.title: Tunnels
4385550.short_description: Tunnels is a single-player mining metroidvania adventure. Delve the alien depths, upgrade your tank, master deep itemization, and uncover the mysteries below.

4385560.title: Project CyberSky
4385560.short_description: CyberSky is a circular twin-stick shooter set in 1989, where a secret government agency uses a simulation grid to train top pilots for a possible alien invasion leading to the birth of A.I.

4385570.title: Riverwood
4385570.short_description: Riverwood is an adult-only visual-novel style rpg deck building game where you play as different adventurers, do numerous quests, and battle various enemies!

4385590.title: 大荒消劫录
4385590.short_description: 在国风画卷中展开智斗！《大荒消劫录》是一款将三消与策略对战深度融合的游戏，通过精巧消除来组合技能、搭配英雄阵容，在实时对战中决胜千里。玩家通过精妙的消除进行战斗，每一局都是对策略的直接考验。收集拥有独特技能和属性的英雄，自由搭配您的战斗小队。理解每位英雄的特性，组合出能产生奇妙协同效应的阵容，是克敌制胜的关键。融合“六十四卦”系统，为战局带来无穷变数。将卦象之力与英雄技能相结合，催化出独一无二的战斗风格与战术。

4385600.title: 决战沙城
4385600.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4385600.short_description: 《决战沙城》是一款自由打装备免氪金的传奇对战游戏，以其独特的游戏玩法和丰富多样的内容，吸引了众多玩家的关注。在游戏中，你将进入一个充满挑战和竞争的世界，与其他玩家展开激烈的对战，争夺珍贵的装备和资源，成为传奇战士的最终王者。快来加入这个充满挑战和竞争的游戏，展现你的实力，成为传奇战士的最终王者吧!

4385620.title: Story of Love & Food
4385620.short_description: "Huh?! Diabetes? Me?!"Fresh out of college and new to the workforce, Mi Lirong is shocked when her doctor warns her of diabetes and serious health risks. While night jogging to get back in shape, she bumps into He Siqiu, a mysterious and stunning fitness coach... who suddenly invites her to a hotel?

4385660.title: Knock Knock!
4385660.short_description: "Knock Knock!" is a horror experiment played with your ears, not your eyes. Navigate a pitch-black mansion using 3D binaural soundmarks to find the door. Designed for zero-visibility, featuring native menu narration for a fully accessible, high-tension experience for all players.

4385670.title: Mallow
4385670.short_description: mallow is a fast paced topdown action roguelike game heavily inspired by nuclear throne. you can pick your own enemies as well as lots of different upgrades.

4385690.title: Hamster Ball
4385690.short_description: Pilot a hamster ball to victory. Your objective is to unlock and progress through the levels by knocking enemy hamster balls off of the platform.

4385710.title: 新星下行
4385710.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4385710.short_description: Stellar Descending is a turn-based factory builder spanning multiple layers. As a scout, design vertical production lines using conveyors, assemblers, and inserters. Use strategy and automation to conquer the planet and uncover its secrets.

4385720.title: 猫咪牌 Meow Cards
4385720.short_description: Meow Cards is a cat-themed strategic card game. Collect feline cards with unique abilities, build your very own Meow Cards deck, and climb to the top—together with your cats! Meow～

4385800.title: Misfit: The ReBirth of Death
4385800.short_description: You wake up in a dark place... There's a green girl awaiting you... Enter The Gambling Game to help her to break out the simulation, but watch out... Something doesn't want you to stay.

4385810.title: Vitriol & Valor
4385810.short_description: Wield gesture-based magic to navigate a gothic nightmare that rearranges itself, survive the depths, and destroy the evil that has taken root in your reality.

4385850.title: 骤雪 The Heavy Snowfall
4385850.short_description: This is an RPG adventure puzzle game developed by a solo developer. Players control an unknown life form to explore the world, converse with characters of diverse personalities, experience thrilling adventures, and uncover long-buried secrets.

4385880.title: Chaos Cat Pool
4385880.short_description: Chaos Cat Pool is a casual physics billiards game where playful, unpredictable cats roam the table. Use items like laser pointers to guide them, avoid their chaos, and clear each stage. Cute, chaotic, and lightly strategic with fresh situations every time.

4385930.title: Satarichi: Heroes De Caelum
4385930.short_description: Join the fight for Caelum in this cooperative action RPG for up to 4 players. Control legendary heroes in real-time combat as you explore an epic world based on Satarichi's original novel. Enjoy the adventure with friends locally or through Remote Play Together.

4385950.title: Darkened Halls
4385950.short_description: Darkened Halls is a game about roaming an empty, decrepit dining establishment that seems incredibly alien in the dark... only this time, YOU'RE the thing lurking in the shadows!

4385970.title: Nowhere
4385970.short_description: Nowhere is a mystery noir adventure where seemingly trivial cases lead to shocking truths. Play as Kim Yuhan, a temporary police officer gifted with 'Absolute Memory,' and navigate between official investigations and unofficial inquiries to uncover the massive conspiracy hidden behind the crimes.

4386030.title: 烧烤列车
4386030.short_description: Barbecue Train: Wild Flavors on the Go Embark on a thrilling, fate-changing adventure—and enjoy a skewer of barbecue along the way! Take customers’ orders, handle ingredients in different ways, and finally master the heat to serve sizzling, aromatic grilled delicacies.

4386080.title: Employee Survivor
4386080.short_description: *Employee Survivor* is a survivor-style game. You must defeat these enemies and use the banknotes they drop to upgrade yourself. As you level up and try to survive in the dream world, your score increases with survival time, but the number of enemies also increases over time.

4386100.title: AREA WARS™
4386100.short_description: AREA WARS™ is a fast-paced 2D omnidirectional shooter where you battle enemies from every direction in a constantly changing enclosed area. Defeated enemies trigger chain explosions that engulf nearby foes and boost your score multiplier. Built for short, repeatable runs with score-focused gameplay.

4386110.title: Paw & Cards
4386110.short_description: Match-3 Puzzle × Poker × Roguelite Action. Focus on the puzzle and enemies close in; dodge and your combos fall apart. Slam down chains and poker hands — a fresh action puzzle experience.

4386170.title: Project: Zenith Expanse
4386170.short_description: Build colonies across the stars. Trade legally or run the underground. Keep your people alive - or don't

4386180.title: Elven Horse Ranch
4386180.short_description: Elven Horse Ranch is a Magical Horses Collecting + Racing game, where you play as a Elven Horse Ranch Owner to train and breed the best Elven Horse!

4386230.title: Void Sanction
4386230.short_description: A sci-fi action RPG. Battle alien hordes with fast-paced combat, evolving weapons, and a combat drone companion. Upgrade your arsenal, defeat challenging bosses, and explore a hostile alien world.

4386240.title: Lost Children of the Mansion
4386240.short_description: Explore a dark mansion that constantly shifts like a maze. Rescue the trapped children hidden behind locked doors. Avoid the roaming enemies and find your way out.

4386250.title: Protocol: Umbra
4386250.short_description: You are the AI of a spaceship orbiting a mysterious celestial body at the edge of our solar system. While the crew sleeps, you stay awake watching through cameras, monitoring the vessel, and searching for anomalies.

4386260.title: REDSTREAM DISPATCH
4386260.short_description: REDSTREAM: DISPATCH casts you as a police officer responding to an interrupted emergency call. A routine patrol spirals into a violent nightmare tied to a sinister streaming group. Randomized encounters and reactive gore make every run brutal. Rescue the girl. Get out alive.

4386270.title: Worm in horror place
4386270.short_description: Walking simulation and survival game as player worm and mission to find stars and avoid traps in this third person gothic themed walking game

4386340.title: Quarantine Market Simulator
4386340.short_description: Run a market inside a quarantine zone. Check temperatures, manage customers and inventory, and defend the walls during zombie raids. A first-person market management simulator set in a post-apocalyptic world.

4386380.title: 3 Sheep Puzzle
4386380.short_description: 3 Sheep Puzzle is a 2D Sokoban-style logic game with remote movement. Guide the sheepdog through the barn to complete each level. A minimalist, relaxing challenge, perfect for quick minds looking to test their ingenuity.

4386400.title: Cuboy Adventure
4386400.short_description: An exciting and incredibly cute platformer full of parkour, puzzles, action-packed moments, and boss battles awaits you! Collect stars, unlock new abilities, discover secrets, defeat your enemies, and overcome every challenge!

4386410.title: 금태양 시뮬레이터
4386410.short_description: 세 명을 동시에 사랑하면서 완벽하게 숨길 수 있을까요? 사랑에 필요한 돈과 매력을 모두 갖춰, 치밀한 계획으로 그녀들의 마음을 모두 사로잡는 하렘 연애 시뮬레이션 <금태양 시뮬레이터>

4386440.title: Airline Glider
4386440.short_description: Take to the skies in a classic 2D side-scrolling shoot ’em up. Fight through multiple levels, upgrade your plane and race against time to defeat the final boss.

4386470.title: GlyphBound
4386470.short_description: "Think Fast. Shoot Faster." A high-speed puzzle-action roguelike set in ruins where magic and machinery coexist. Hack the rusty security with logic (Nonograms), charge your energy, and blast through the depths with your trusty Glyph Buddy.

4386480.title: 零点夜巡
4386480.short_description: I’m a night guard in these old alleys. Every day is the same: patrolling, punching the clock, and waiting for 6 AM. But tonight, the clock stands still at midnight. Can I make it home on time?

4386510.title: WarSlice
4386510.short_description: WarSlice is a turn-based strategy game where you lead armies as a Commander in tactical grid-based battles. Play the Campaign, create your own maps, or challenge other players online.

4386530.title: VVINTERCORE
4386530.short_description: A visual psychological horror novel set in a winter setting. You have a unique opportunity to explore your relationships with your friends, and then with yourself. But be careful, a blizzard seems to be approaching.

4386540.title: Traces
4386540.short_description: A child is missing in the woods. You and three others enter the forest to find them. Track the clues. Stay together. Don’t lose the light. Because you’re not the only ones searching.

4386570.title: Click to Medieval Roguelite
4386570.short_description: A fast strategic clicker medieval roguelite game. Click to grow and expand your medieval hamlet to a village or kingdom, then sell it for gold! Start another medieval hamlet with upgrades! Click to wear the crown today

4386620.title: Hentai Panties
4386620.short_description: Hentai Panties - Silky, pleasant, dare you touch them? A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4386910.title: NEUROBROOD
4386910.short_description: «NEUROBROOD» is a visual novel in the cyberpunk‑horror genre. Those touched by the abyss of neurodream never wake up the same.

4386950.title: くろねこ・ぷれい・ろーる！
4386950.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4386950.short_description: 「くろねこ・ぷれい・ろーる！」は、3D空間で主人公のねこを操作し、会話でストーリーが進行するRPGです。VR・PC（Windows）の両方でプレイ可能です。プレイヤーであるあなたは、不思議な本に閉じ込められてしまった主人公の「ゆかいなくろもふねこちゃん」になり、問題を解決しながら本から脱出しましょう。

4387000.title: Antarctic Grave
4387000.short_description: A first-person survival horror set in an Antarctic research station. Explore the frozen complex, search for tools and weapons, keep the generator fueled, and outsmart mutants to survive the harsh conditions.

4387010.title: The Wapple Hous
4387010.short_description: Wander around a nonsensical world just beyond the LAND OF THE LIVING! A world of waffles, death, and choices that just might bring everyone HOME...

4387060.title: Hauntbound
4387060.short_description: Welcome to Hauntbound, a couch multiplayer party game set inside a living, shifting haunted house. Explore expanding rooms, manage your Action Points, survive deadly minigames, and uncover what the house wants before it traps you for good.

4387160.title: BRAVERY
4387160.short_description: BRAVERY. Play as a small matchstick character. Explore a world consumed by vice. Your flame is limited, fragile, precious—your only weapon and your last hope. Repair ancient mirrors, capture the orbs, and rekindle humanity’s light!

4387230.title: Space Soccer Showdown
4387230.short_description: Tase, teleport, and ride your way to victory in a chaotic space soccer arena where the goal moves, the rules bend, and anything can be kicked in. Chase combos solo or clash with your friends in split-screen mayhem.

4387240.title: Animal Gaze on-XR
4387240.short_description: Animal Gaze is a digital and VR-friendly speculative archive exhibition based on the original story of the non-virtual exhibition of the same name held in Istanbul, Türkiye, in 2023.

4387280.title: Chronos Trap in Time
4387280.short_description: Harness the power of Greek Gods in this intense vertical rogue-like shooter. Command divine Mechas, brew sacred potions, and unlock permanent upgrades at Hephaestos’ Forge. Battle mythical hordes and challenge the Titans in a fast-paced quest for eternal glory!

4387440.title: Late Night Fears
4387440.short_description: Late Night Fears is a collection of standalone horror experiences set during creepy night shifts. Explore abandoned places, spot anomalies, and survive strange encounters. Each map tells its own dark story.

4387490.title: Purge Of Evil: Age of the Fallen Spirits
4387490.short_description: A dark action RPG inspired by Vietnamese mythology, where ancient legends, restless spirits, and forgotten sins shape a land on the brink of collapse.

4387560.title: The Last Athari
4387560.short_description: A story-driven open-world fantasy RPG where exploration, choice, and relationships shape the world. Travel between villages, kingdoms, and distant lands, uncover secrets, influence factions, and face challenging combat, all while your decisions define your path and impact the world.

4388730.title: Dark Fantasia
4388730.short_description: Crush the armies of darkness and rise to divine power. Your goal is the fortress where the Great Demon awaits. But remember — you are not immortal. Dodge enemy attacks, find new weapons and perks — only then will you survive.

4388810.title: Reptilarium
4388810.short_description: Relax and collect hundreds of unique reptiles in this cozy idle game. Watch eggs hatch and babies grow in real-time, customize stunning terrariums, and discover rare species from geckos to chameleons.

4388920.title: University 33
4388920.short_description: University 33 is a 1-4 player co-op anomaly detection simulator. Observe your surroundings with unwavering focus: follow the protocol, identify the irregularities, and choose the correct path to reach Floor 33. One lapse in judgment restarts the cycle.

4388940.title: GLOAM
4388940.short_description: Gloam is an episodic first-person stealth RPG set in a uchronian dystopian world. Uncover the secrets of a theotechnocratic regime as you explore the countless possibilities of this immersive sim with its innovative mechanics. Will you succumb or embrace the gloaming?

4389050.title: SWEET ORGASM
4389050.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4389050.short_description: SWEET ORGASM - is an erotic game in the genre of "Arkanoid", in which you will have to break the cubes and gradually discover really beautiful and hot images.

4389060.title: HAIRY LADIES
4389060.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4389060.short_description: HAIRY LADIES - is an erotic game in the genre of "Arkanoid", in which you will have to break the cubes and gradually discover really beautiful and hot images.

4389150.title: Doner Madness
4389150.short_description: Cooking is routine. Chaos is constant. Keep the shop alive through stress, disasters, and debts.

4389170.title: Fugaz
4389170.short_description: With only a flute at your disposal, play songs to solve puzzles. Explore a dark place looking for an exit before the darkness grows too dense. In this immersive psychological horror game, knowledge is the key to put the pieces together.

4389250.title: VHS Freaks
4389250.short_description: Enter a VHS horror nightmare. Survive three standalone B-movie horror scenarios with limited ammo, relentless freaks, and extreme gore. Fast, first-person arcade survival horror with authentic VHS style.

4389400.title: Bouncy Weapons
4389400.short_description: An incremental game where weapons bounce around killing enemies for you. Collect loot, master a massive skill tree, and uncover tons of content.

4389560.title: Bound Crystal Saga
4389560.short_description: Bound Crystal Saga is an action RPG where you control one of four unique heroes, each with distinct abilities and personalities. The day and night cycle, as well as the weather, influences events and even the heroes' powers. Bind the crystal, choose your hero, and save the kingdom!

4389600.title: ZERO_FILL
4389600.short_description: ZERO_FILL is a minimalist logic puzzle game. Bring all numbers to zero: click on a square to reduce or increase its value, but be careful - it also affects its neighbors. Includes a campaign with 75 boards, a boards creator and infinite random boards generation.

4389660.title: Big Breasted Milky Mommies 6
4389660.short_description: Relax, lay back, and pick a puzzle. Solve over 100 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. Have thousands of hours of sexual fun with these EXTREMELY NSFW Mommy Puzzles.

4389840.title: The Company
4389840.short_description: The Company wants you productive. The Company wants you calm. The Company wants you compliant.

4389870.title: Galleries
4389870.short_description: The art you choose is a confession. Enter a gallery that feels slightly off, where every painting you admire, and every prompt you answer, shapes the world around you. A short psychological experience where the system learns your patterns and delivers a final judgement.

4389950.title: Fractured Universe
4389950.genre: Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4389950.short_description: A Turn based RPG with a focus on team building and character development. Explore the Fractured Universe, and what life would be like if the multiverse was destroyed. Featured various art styles and aesthetics.

4390000.title: AI Slop: The Race to AGI
4390000.short_description: A casual arcade-like game where you run through a museum swapping out art for AI Slop while attempting to avoid the guards.

4390260.title: Puju's RecTen
4390260.short_description: Surround and make multiples of 10! "Puju's RecTen" is an exhilarating puzzle game where you clear numbered panels by framing them in rectangles. The rules are simple: just make the total 10 or a multiple of 10. However, by utilizing "Chains" and powerful "Skills," your score can skyrocket!

4390360.title: Aftermath 1944
4390360.short_description: Fifty years of silence shattered in a single night. As an aging German soldier, navigate a shifting reality where your quiet home bleeds into the horrific research labs of your past. Stalked by a crimson malice and buried memories, you must face the abyss you helped create. The war isn't over.

4390370.title: Drifter at World's End
4390370.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4390370.short_description: A dice-driven doomsday survival sandbox game. Drive your RV across the wasteland, build your mobile fortress, and shape your survival story with every choice and dice roll.

4390420.title: Atlanta TD
4390420.short_description: Atlanta TD is a roguelite tower defense game where the armies of the underworld descend onto the Four Spectacular Realms in waves as it falls unto the remaining Gods to protect the city of Atlanta!

4390580.title: 口袋训练师
4390580.genre: Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4390580.short_description: 欢迎来到《口袋训练师》的奇幻世界！这是一款半即时回合制的策略精灵对决游戏，您可以扮演一名训练师，在游戏中捕捉到几百种不同的精灵，合理利用属性相克策略，和全世界的训练师进行巅峰对决。现在，拿起你的捕捉器，开启精彩的捕捉之旅吧！

4390670.title: Mad Bus Simulator
4390670.short_description: Zero delays. Zero conscience. A bus simulator where anything goes for the sake of the schedule. Earn money, arm your buses, and crush everything in your path—annoying passengers, traffic jams, and that obnoxious boss—with sheer force.

4390680.title: Horror Pipes
4390680.short_description: You are a disposable employee of PIPECORE. Descend into infinite, procedurally generated sewers to clear blockages and survive. Manage your flashlight, wield your shotgun, and navigate claustrophobic tunnels where industrial filth meets horror. Clean the pipes or die trying.

4390700.title: NeNeKoNeKo
4390700.short_description: Master three boxes and fit the sleeping cats perfectly! Cute cats meet a satisfyingly challenging difficulty. An addictive box-cat puzzle, NeNeKoNeKo.

4390710.title: RUIN'S HOUSE
4390710.short_description: A horror set inside a lady’s “house”. Heroine or enemy—what is she, really? Conquer a randomly generated mansion to uncover the answer.

4390940.title: Wish
4390940.short_description: Wish blends Zen with wish-fulfilling in a clicker game. Tap to gain Spirit Energy, honor eight guardians, upgrade ten Resonators, and listen to twenty Harmonies. Grow and relax in a Zen atmosphere. Every tap soothes; every step brings your wish closer.

4390950.title: Sweet Reporter
4390950.short_description: Sweet Reporter - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around journalists. It depicts the daily work lives of five pretty and adorable female reporters, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4390960.title: 谐音梗猜图
4390960.short_description: 谐音梗猜图，主打一个脑洞大开~ 要不一起来猜猜看，这到底会是什么鬼？

4391060.title: Bit.World
4391060.short_description: Venture inside a small factory as an even smaller robot to save it from a virus. Drop in, find your anti-virus drive, and figure out how to deliver it to the socket at the end of each level. Solve physics-based puzzles to repair the factory bit by bit until the job is done.

4391110.title: Dead Man Waiting
4391110.short_description: Await your verdict in a luxury apartment that can execute you. Your behavior is judged. Survive long enough and you might be pardoned.

4391160.title: Choom
4391160.short_description: Choom is a fast-paced cyberpunk roguelike shooter blending side-scrolling action with bullet-hell chaos. Upgrade weapons, choose powerful buffs, and fight through shifting levels where death means starting over and adapting fast.

4391180.title: Eel On Mask
4391180.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4391180.short_description: Eel On Mask is a 2D puzzle-platformer game where you play as the main character, Eel, who possesses the mysterious power of the “Clipping Mask.” Use this ability to freely alter the materials of stickers, solve puzzles across different worlds, and uncover the ultimate truth!

4391210.title: Orbital Trajectory
4391210.short_description: Plan, launch, and observe in a minimalist physics puzzle game about discovering trajectories through gravity fields and orbital currents.

4391280.title: RoguePool
4391280.short_description: RoguePool is a billiards game infused with roguelike elements. Over 30 types of power-up cards to assist you in tackling higher levels of difficulty.

4391360.title: IROONI - Color Tag -
4391360.short_description: Awaken in an abandoned school at night. Use the colors around you to evade the approaching menace. A unique survival horror experience that turns the classic childhood game of "Color Tag" into a terrifying reality.

4391370.title: Hentai Misaki
4391370.short_description: Hentai Misaki is an adult game where you solve puzzles and match tiles to gradually reveal the seductive bride Misaki. The more levels you complete — the hotter the scenes become!

4391540.title: Console Cafe Simulator
4391540.short_description: Set up gaming consoles, manage games, set prices, serve customers, hire staff, and grow your café to become the city's most popular gaming hub.

4391550.title: 어서오세요 신성재판에
4391550.short_description: Waking up after a car accident to find yourself in another world? Welcome to "Sacred Trial." In a magical world, you face the threat of being summoned to the sacred trial. A fantasy detective adventure where you must prove your innocence in a fantasy world.

4391560.title: Jesus Simulator
4391560.short_description: Jesus Simulator is a narrative driven game that retells the earthly life of Jesus Christ through the events of the Gospel. Become a witness to sermons, miracles, and encounters that explore love, mercy, faith, forgiveness, and sacrifice.

4391650.title: Hidden Legacy: Whispering Walls Collector's Edition
4391650.short_description: Investigate a cursed mansion and a city built on lies. Solve hidden-object puzzles and uncover the truth behind a vanished architect.

4391760.title: Babelum
4391760.short_description: A snake-inspired action learning game where you collect words, grab power-ups, and outplay enemies while climbing the Tower of Babel through colorful 3D dioramas, unlocking your favourite language. To live is to learn!

4391890.title: Aerosurfer
4391890.short_description: Your hands turn into wings in this speedrunning VR game. The closer to the ground you fly, the faster you'll go – but don't crash! Take to the skies and see how fast you can fly through 30 handcrafted tracks.

4392040.title: Hag's Hand
4392040.short_description: A tower defense game that blends Brazilian folklore myths with card management. Protect the forest by summoning the creatures that dwell within the wilds. As invaders push deeper into the untamed woods, the witch Cuca merely watches their movement, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

4392060.title: Paranormal Eclipse
4392060.short_description: Paranormal Eclipse is a single-player psychological horror FPS set in a remote Pacific island laboratory. After a failed time experiment, reality fractures, memories turn hostile, and nothing remains as it once was.

4392210.title: Bodycam: Deadsplit
4392210.short_description: Bodycam: Deadsplit is a gritty online co-op multiplayer shooter for 1–4 players, where you face relentless zombie waves, hold your ground, and beat the clock.

4392230.title: Dragon's Might
4392230.short_description: A hardcore ARPG where a descendant of a famous Three Kingdoms general, driven by livelihood, becomes a digital kung fu stunt double, shuttling between major film sets and engaging in fierce battles with on-screen characters. A survival documentary of the working drudges.

4392310.title: Gods of Angling
4392310.short_description: Gods of Angling is a "Tamagotchi-like" Idle Fishing RPG! Create your hero from one of 180 unique options and see if they can ascend from a reel rookie to a God.

4392380.title: Sunrise
4392380.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4392380.short_description: Sunrise is a 2D platformer hack and slash, featuring the ability to create and share levels you make to the world!

4392490.title: Beastie Fields
4392490.short_description: Work on a farm alongside helpful creatures in this incremental farming game ! Explore new areas, grow diverse crops and let the game run idle on the side of your screen.

4392530.title: Hostile Paths
4392530.short_description: A gritty top-down survival roguelike where every run is a desperate fight for resources. Explore hostile paths, scavenge what remains, upgrade your tank, and survive a brutal post-apocalyptic world where no two runs are the same.

4392560.title: Line of Contact
4392560.short_description: A linear, story-driven first-person shooter focused on intense combat and a dark military narrative.

4392620.title: DJINN SCROLLS
4392620.short_description: Djinn Scrolls is an action roguelike set in a dark world inspired by ancient Jinn folklore. Wield elemental magic and Prime Scrolls that unleash spells through conditional triggers. Craft deadly synergies, adapt your build mid-run, and survive relentless enemies and cursed bosses.

4392630.title: Beast Mask
4392630.short_description: A classic 2D side-scrolling action game where you play as a 'civilized' caveman. Put on a beast mask to gain the power of the beast, defeat monsters and bosses, and unleash the beast within.

4392930.title: Waifu Chef
4392930.short_description: Waifu Chef is a puzzle game about charming waifu chefs and the cozy atmosphere of the kitchen. Complete 30 levels, unlock mouth-watering illustrations of the girls cooking, and save all the images to your personal gallery in high quality.

4392980.title: Scrapcrawl
4392980.short_description: Scientific Post-Apocalyptic Survival. Survive at the epicenter of a nuclear blast by developing your bunker. Fight the cold, zombies, and daily rising radiation. Explore underground utilities, scavenge and process resources, and craft devices and gear.

4392990.title: Mind Match
4392990.short_description: Not your usual Match-3. Trapped in your own imagination, match ideas to fuel abilities that upgrade every fight. Beware, Dark Ideas cloud your board and force you to rethink. Place relics that twist the rules. Face Monsters that fight back, and climb a tower built from your own creative blocks.

4393200.title: Poop Deck
4393200.short_description: Step onto the Poop Deck™ in this chaotic online co-op game! Collaborate with your crew to keep the dysfunctional ship moving. Repair engines, patch leaks, and manage crises as you race to the destination. Can your team survive before the vessel falls apart?

4393260.title: Usagi's Dreamy Day Off
4393260.short_description: After a hard day of adventuring, Usagi falls asleep and slips into a world that feels familiar, but wrong in some sense. Guide Usagi through this strange dreamscape: eat carrots to sustain the light, rank up to gain dreamy powers, dodge enemies, and snack on vegetables… and candies?

4393310.title: Scrap Isle
4393310.short_description: Scrap-Isle is a short, incremental game where you sell trash while trying to make loads of money, you earn levels and increase your trash production while fighting off enemies that want to take your trash from you, you can even hatch a variety of helpers to automate your money production!

4393440.title: Castle On The Hill
4393440.short_description: Tower defence city builder with sieges, custom buildings, policies, happiness and random world events

4393490.title: Dead Return
4393490.short_description: Dead Return is a first-person psychological horror game about returning to a place you can never leave.

4393540.title: Creature Tamer
4393540.short_description: Creature Tamer is a point-and-click deck-builder with roguelite elements. In it, you acquire allies as you travel through the most hostile regions of this world. Use your creatures and resources wisely to keep moving forward, and if you are defeated, spend your spoils to come back stronger.

4393820.title: False Positive
4393820.short_description: Your voice is the enemy. In this co-op psychological horror, an entity records what you say then uses your own words against your teammates. When you hear a friend call for help... is it really them?

4393940.title: The Green Earth
4393940.short_description: Survive the madness of an ancient jungle in this open-world, traditional roguelike. Do whatever it takes to escape alive.

4393970.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: White Chocolate
4393970.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful white chocolate mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

4394020.title: Morels: Out of this World
4394020.short_description: Explore vibrant alien worlds, discover strange mushrooms, and photograph mysterious creatures in this relaxing sci-fi exploration game.

4394030.title: Space Memory: Flowers
4394030.short_description: Cute, relaxing memory game where you match pairs of beautiful flowers in space

4394050.title: Big Breasted Milky Mommies 7
4394050.short_description: Relax, lay back, and pick a puzzle. Solve over 100 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. Have thousands of hours of sexual fun with these EXTREMELY NSFW Mommy Puzzles.

4394130.title: Unbox the Room 2
4394130.short_description: The cozy unboxing and interior design experience returns — bigger, warmer, and more reactive. From homes to small businesses, each space responds to your choices and reflects its owner’s personality.

4394140.title: One Late Night: Remake
4394140.short_description: One Late Night: Remake is a reimagined office horror experience where working late turns into a nightmare. Explore a haunted workplace, solve environmental puzzles, uncover a co-worker’s disappearance, and survive the presence of a dark entity bound to the building’s past.

4394200.title: Trial Zones
4394200.short_description: Join Reddy as he enters the deadly Trial Zones, a twisted gauntlet created by the Xorn Empire. Survive traps, outrun danger, and escape the grip of Commander Xelop. Play the full story solo or with up to four players locally and challenge your friends in the Trap Master vs Survivors mode.

4394220.title: Coin McGee
4394220.short_description: A bullet hell roguelike where you dodge by flipping a coin. Each side—Heads or Tails—has its own abilities. Build dual loadouts, flip to dodge and trigger powers, then survive waves of relentless enemies. Every flip matters.

4394370.title: MARCH
4394370.short_description: MARCH to the beat! A rhythm-narrative game about marching band, high school shenanigans, and finding your place in the world.

4394410.title: Inner Rooms
4394410.short_description: Wander through vast, unsettling liminal spaces as a quiet presence grows alongside you. Inner Rooms is a psychological atmospheric exploration game set in a world that appears calm and peaceful, yet constantly radiates unease.

4394420.title: Dinosaur Tree
4394420.short_description: Explore the ocean in your sailboat as a curious little dinosaur. Discover charming islands and meet friendly pals along the way. But beware! There may be something trying to tempt you off your path.

4394500.title: Stepmom Who Fell on a Hike
4394500.short_description: A shy protagonist, living with his stepmother, Sandra, is torn between his feelings for classmate Emily and his stepmother's sudden attraction to a muscular hiker, Jake. Sandra falls, followed by Emily. The protagonist, watching in shock, must navigate their complex dynamics as they get lost.

4394520.title: DoJo Legacy of Zhen
4394520.short_description: Dojo Legacy of Zhen, you don't just fight you change history. A emergent martial arts world where every broken bone and bruised ego creates a ripple effect. Defeat a rival, and his disciples will hunt you. Rebuild your school, master the Grudge Engine and forge a legacy in a world that never forgets

4394820.title: Storm Reavers
4394820.short_description: Is a co-op fantasy heist game where every player has a role, every job goes wrong, and gravity itself is a tool. Leap between floating islands, infiltrate guarded strongholds, and extract with your target before the world turns against you. Plans are optional. Adaptation is mandatory.

4394890.title: Ice Age
4394890.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4394890.short_description: As primitive human, in the wild Ice Age prehistoric world, Hunt and tame wild beasts such as mammoths and sabretooth, build homes, and survive.

4394980.title: Brak
4394980.short_description: A modern arcade score-attack roguelite focused on skill, mastery, and flow. Break blocks, chain points, and push for higher scores across fast, replayable runs.

4395180.title: Birthday Boy
4395180.short_description: Experience the birthday party from hell. Face your demons - both psychological and mechanical. Kill plush toys, evade demonic animatronics and possessed puppets… Aaaannnnnd…discover the truth about your evil clown father. Yes, your own father…

4395190.title: The Legend of the 4 Elements
4395190.short_description: The Legend of the 4 Elements is a platformer with elemental combat. Control heroes of Fire, Water, Earth, and Air, use unique abilities, overcome challenges, battle dangerous enemies, and restore balance to the world of the elements.

4395240.title: Blade of the Soulway
4395240.short_description: “Blade of the Soulway” is a card-based RPG with a gripping storyline, featuring card collection, character building, equipment crafting, and dungeon exploration. Its unique material gathering and crafting system makes character builds even more diverse.

4395270.title: The Last Days of Baltaseth
4395270.short_description: In the far future, on a dead planet, there is a cabin where the last survivor left his secrets. Will discovering the truth doom you as well? Solve puzzles to unlock a cosmic mystery in this short, narrative-focused horror game.

4395310.title: 游戏降临：我的系统异常（海外测试版）
4395310.genre: Casual, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4395310.short_description: 一款回合制策略消除游戏，女性向卡牌游戏。
developers: 青岛绛临网络科技有限公司

4395480.title: 1889 Trade
4395480.short_description: 1889 Trade is a resource-market trading & management game. Start with Wood and Cereals, expand into new commodities, upgrade production, and survive SHOCKS/CRASHES, fees, and taxes as prices evolve.

4395550.title: WHO?
4395550.short_description: A fast paced 4 player stealth and strategy multiplayer game where you explore compact arenas collect hidden objectives sabotage rivals and outsmart your friends to escape first.

4395570.title: Qianhu Miao Village in Guizhou Province
4395570.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4395640.title: Enthaur : Lost in Slumber
4395640.short_description: Enthaur is a poetic and visceral solo first person journey where players are launched in a decaying world made of flesh, where they need to play with body-like mechanics to survive.

4395690.title: Crown of the Empire: Temple of Resurrection
4395690.short_description: Crown of the Empire - exciting adventures await you! Elena is hoping for your help!

4395790.title: Eyes of the Forest
4395790.short_description: A third-person stealth adventure set in a quiet, post-human woodland where survival depends on patience, observation, and restraint. Towering ruins, tangled roots, and dimly lit paths create an environment where every movement matters and safety is never guaranteed.

4395830.title: Fated All-In: Casino 5 Queens
4395830.short_description: Read the true hearts hidden behind strategic bets. A deadly yet sweet psychological game with the five queens begins. Your choices will determine both the outcome of the game and their hearts.

4395880.title: Blanco
4395880.short_description: Restore order to the crystal labyrinth! Play as the curious cube-shaped character named Blanco and restore the sparkling crystals to their altars and escape the crystal labyrinth!

4395900.title: Subliminal Echoes
4395900.short_description: Atmospheric | Click-to-Explore | Environmental Puzzle. What you find—and what you miss—will define your experience of its story.

4395910.title: Beer Clicker
4395910.short_description: Beer Clicker is a casual idle clicker game where you brew beer, earn bottles, and expand your brewery. Click to produce, unlock upgrades, automate systems, and enjoy satisfying progression at your own pace.

4395950.title: Island Restoration
4395950.short_description: Bring procedurally generated islands back to life. Explore different biomes and damage scenarios. Relax as you clean, upgrade your tools, rescue wildlife, and watch each island return to its natural beauty. Customize your ship and decorate your own private island.

4395960.title: Halloween Filled With Cats
4395960.short_description: Purrfectly Spooky Halloween awaits you! 🎃🐾 Dive into hand-drawn Halloween scene filled with cute, sneaky cats hiding in every corner. Relax, explore whimsical illustration, enjoy subtle animations, and see how many feline friends you can find in this cozy hidden object adventure.

4395970.title: Dormant Seed
4395970.short_description: A survival horror puzzle game where you navigate a perilous environment, outwit eerie AI robots and mutated zombies with your wits, solve mind-bending puzzles layer by layer, and fight for a glimmer of hope in a desperate situation.

4396110.title: NOSBALL
4396110.short_description: Nosball is a fast-paced car drifting soccer game with demolition derby chaos. Smash rivals, master physics-based control, and score goals on dangerous pinball-style arenas set in global locations with dynamic weather.

4396250.title: 8-Bit Bistro
4396250.short_description: 8-Bit Bistro is a fast-paced cafe sim in which the player must juggle multiple orders to survive an onslaught of customers and keep the business afloat. Frantically cook up sandwiches and pour coffee before patrons get impatient and storm out! Endure for 10 days and an esteemed guest may arrive...

4396300.title: SEVENS
4396300.short_description: SEVENS is a competitive multiplayer card experience set in a dark underground club atmosphere. Sit at the table, read your opponents, disrupt their strategy, and fight to control the flow of the game — whether you're playing with friends, strangers, or bots.

4396320.title: SUPER SKILL ISSUE
4396320.short_description: A brutal precision platformer where your own superpowers are the biggest threat.

4396370.title: Galaxy Grinder Incremental
4396370.short_description: Galaxy Grinder is a fast-paced incremental game where you destroy planets and asteroids with your cursor and weapons. Earn resources, unlock new worlds, and grow stronger through upgrades, skills, and power-ups between runs.

4398860.title: Ze Gunner
