4398860.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4398860.short_description: Base Defense game where you control a turret system with unlimited ammo and need to protect your base com incomming enemies. When the enemies get close to you base they will start to fire. Each enemy type has a different firing rate. The screen will flash red if an enemy is shotting from behind.

4398960.title: Expressionless Elf: Descent into Pleasure
4398960.short_description: To please the expressionless elf, you decide to try every position imaginable... Though she was expressionless at first, your technique sends her tumbling into pleasure... Smoothly animated CG events , with voice acting!!

4399130.title: Regret To Inform
4399130.short_description: A game about finding reasons to say "no." Review resumes, detect inconsistencies, and deliver rejection letters.

4399160.title: INORIGAMI HACK DOWN
4399160.short_description: A point-and-click horror adventure where you battle evil spirits to escape. You take a part-time job at the "House of Saschibae," a place said to grant happiness through prayer. Instead, you find yourself hacking into the vengeful spirits' data to survive.

4399310.title: 5 Block of Happiness
4399310.short_description: A cozy town building simulation about finding happiness in small, everyday moments. Build a peaceful neighborhood block by block, manage villagers needs, and watch a quiet community come to life, one day at a time.

4399320.title: SPARTA 2035 – The Last Diamond
4399320.short_description: Free version of Sparta 2035 CONTAINS ONLY DLC : "The Last Diamond" Johannesburg is on the brink. Crush "The Orphans," thwart a military conspiracy, and bring Julia home.

4399340.title: RUE
4399340.short_description: Everything is fine - as long as you keep doing what you’re doing... Right??? Explore the staleness of your real world, your memories, and maintain your relationships. Choose between dependence and freedom, try to move on from your distress — you may have to.

4399370.title: Don’t Pop, Duck
4399370.short_description: You don’t control the duck—you control the waves. Solo is a precision trial. Co-op is a friendship trial. Don’t Pop, Duck—don’t rage-pop.

4399690.title: The Last Errant
4399690.short_description: The Last Errant is a challenging, turn-based tactical deckbuilder where every move counts. Build your deck, master unique classes and variants, shape your playstyle through meaningful choices, and outthink your enemies on a grid-based battlefield with extreme replayability.

4399700.title: AKU: BRAVE REBORN
4399700.short_description: A side-scrolling action game that combines Metroidvania-style exploration with roguelike cycles. In the early stages, non-linear Metroidvania exploration helps unlock core abilities; in the later stages, switching to the roguelike cycle mode allows for highly free challenges and build construction

4399800.title: Avalon Jewels 2 Collector's Edition
4399800.short_description: Avalon Jewels is a story-driven Match-3 adventure in a magical fantasy world. Restore the fading Avalon Jewels, defeat Morgana’s minions, and explore enchanted lands. Play 300 total handcrafted levels, including Collector’s Edition content, in Relaxed or Puzzle Mode.

4399850.title: Lawnmower Game Battle 2: Reload
4399850.short_description: Arena lawnmower game. Collect weapons and shoot and destroy other ai lawnmowers. Survive enough long win battles and collect stars

4399870.title: Nakkash: A Miniature Adventure
4399870.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4399870.short_description: A fast-paced and fun arcade adventure set in 17th-century Ottoman festivities, adorned with hand-drawn miniature art! As the Head Jester, visit the Guild tents, prove your mastery in challenging mini-games—from Dagger-dancers to acrobatic Riders—and recover the Sultan’s lost Nahıl ornaments!

4400020.title: The Dust Between: Observer
4400020.short_description: A 4-player co-op horror strategy game where you guide others through a procedurally generated nightmare without ever seeing it yourself. Track movement, map the unknown, and coordinate to keep your clients alive — while hiding from danger yourself.

4400070.title: Rushfall
4400070.short_description: You are the king defending your kingdom from waves of slugs! Use swords, knives, and magical powers like lightning and a magic staff to protect your land. Upgrade wisely to survive!

4400080.title: The Last City
4400080.short_description: Establish your civilization in The Lost City, a focused turn-based strategy game. Scout the wilds, deploy settlers to found new outposts, and manage your workforce to harvest timber and food. Protect your citizens from bandits and monsters in this streamlined city-building adventure.

4400120.title: Wriggle apple
4400120.short_description: Help the worm reach the apple! Navigate through tricky paths, avoid spikes, and use stones to climb higher. Each apple makes the worm bigger, but it may cause challenges. Can you help him?

4400160.title: Infernal Logistics
4400160.short_description: A narrative-driven delivery game set on fog-shrouded Mistwood Isle in 1982. Drive strange cargo across eerie roads while bound to a cursed radio, meet troubled locals, and unravel a slow-burning mystery beneath the island’s quiet surface.

4400190.title: KILLGUN
4400190.short_description: KILLGUN - is a ruthless FPS for players who crave pure, aggressive combat, high difficulty, and an atmosphere of constant survival.

4400240.title: Munchy Cat
4400240.short_description: Cat + Food + Color Matching! A feel-good, yummy puzzle that lifts your mood 🐱🌈

4400270.title: Cue Room
4400270.short_description: Cue Room is a rogue-like billiard game. Shop balls with special abilities, pot them, embrace their unleashed chaos and repeat.

4400300.title: HAUNTMATES
4400300.short_description: A co-op horror game about avoiding monsters and investigating procedurally generated locations to identify the entity's name.

4400340.title: H.I.T
4400340.short_description: H.I.T is a high-voltage blackjack duel where every round can end in a deadly switch pull, with wild perk combos, tense mind games, and one wrong card away from total blackout.

4400350.title: Rainy Waifu
4400350.short_description: Rainy Waifu is an atmospheric puzzle game about charming waifus in the rain and the cozy atmosphere of rainy evenings. Complete 30 levels, unlock beautiful illustrations, and save them to your personal gallery in high quality.

4400370.title: Orbit Runners
4400370.short_description: Orbit Runners is a fast paced multiplayer platform racer set in a vibrant cyber future. Race friends online or locally through dynamic arenas using precise movement and smart gadgets. Every jump matters every second counts and momentum decides victory.

4400460.title: UmbraNet
4400460.short_description: UmbraNet is a psychological horror game where curiosity leads you into a hidden network that watches, manipulates, and slowly traps you as you explore its darkest layers.

4400480.title: Detox My Heart
4400480.short_description: Detox My Heart is an adult romance visual novel set at Serenity Summit, a luxury wellness retreat. As a burned-out journalist undercover, surrender your phone and discover three intimate romances where truth and desire collide.

4400550.title: Superheroes Inc: #VictoryLeague
4400550.short_description: As a social media influencer recruited to a team of heroes, can you earn their trust, defend the city, and prove you’re worth more than your follower count? A text-based interactive superhero novel.

4400760.title: Pathways to Freedom
4400760.short_description: Play as Charlie, or one of several other characters, as he fights against a government that has decided that he and everyone like him is unimportant.

4400810.title: Invincible Champions
4400810.short_description: 2D action RPG with real-time combat where you constantly choose between Nature and Technology. Your decisions shape your journey, world, progression, dialogue options, and relationships with characters.

4400890.title: Ratfall
4400890.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer platformer where you play as a rat falling downward with friends, dodging deadly traps, bumping into each other, and fighting to survive the longest in fast-paced rounds.

4400910.title: Forbidden Snack
4400910.short_description: Your character moves for itself !!! Hitting a wall will change direction. Use this and other mechanics to your advantage to conquer a vast pool of creative levels. Help the little Vampire to consume his new favorite snack!

4401050.title: MASUKU
4401050.short_description: An abstract strategy game for 1–4 players. Place, rotate, and flip cards to reveal colours and symbols that match shifting scoring goals. Smart positioning and a bit of luck decide who reaches 50 points first

4401130.title: AI vr. AI Vr Edition
4401130.short_description: A town with AI townsmen that help protect the town with day and night scenarios where you need to help protect the town from AI monsters that appear when night falls. Placing traps and adding more AI townsmen will help decrease the monster horde from damaging buildings.

4401480.title: Rorasuketo
4401480.short_description: A story-based casual JRPG inspired by sports manga, roller derby, and the Super Nintendo. Explore a fun world, make friends, and skate your heart out!

4401560.title: BLOCK POKER 5X5
4401560.short_description: Forget the prejudice that poker is all about luck! BLOCK POKER 5X5 is a completely new breed of poker game with deep puzzle strategy. There’s no need to wait for a dealer to hand you a lucky card. Every card is already laid out before you—the strength is entirely in your own hands.

4401840.title: EPOCH EXPRESS
4401840.short_description: A roguelite action game where you control a train, build and customize deadly wagons, and face enemies that evolve across eras by learning from how you play and how you die.

4401850.title: OmniSeed
4401850.short_description: Play as a kind-hearted god in a tiny world. Grow thriving forests, inspire mortals to stand strong, and unleash nature's fury to shield them from evil. One small miracle at a time.

4401910.title: TRIX
4401910.short_description: TRIX is a high-speed arcade cycling game focused on risk and precision. Perform aerial tricks, and build massive scores while speed keeps rising. Perfect for quick sessions and score chasing.

4401980.title: Ashes of Darkness
4401980.short_description: Ashes of Darkness is a soulslike action game set in the Middle Ages. Face challenging combat and strengthen your knight through character progression, abilities, and artifacts as you grow more powerful.

4401990.title: SUPER IDLE POOP CLICKER
4401990.short_description: A goofy idle clicker about clicking poop and collecting farts, buying upgrades, and watching numbers get absolutely out of control.

4402040.title: Gangsta Bean 3: Night of the Rising Bread
4402040.short_description: Gangsta Bean, Krazy Karrot, T-Mato, and Brock Lee gang up to fight hordes of reanimated rotten food zombies in this retro arcade-style twin-stick beat 'em up sequel to the classic Flash games.

4402180.title: The Hunter Files: Case One
4402180.short_description: The Hunter Files: Case One is a story driven point and click adventure about a private detective caught in routine work. What starts as a simple surveillance job slowly turns into a missing person case, told through dialogue, puzzles, and exploration.

4402260.title: Animaly
4402260.short_description: There's a murderer on the loose, and its your job to kill them first. Use your logic, items and witness reports to help thin out who it may be. Just don't let too many bystanders die, and certainly don't let the killer get you first.

4402300.title: Derby Life: Ranch & Race
4402300.genre: Action, Adventure, Racing, RPG, Simulation, Sports
4402300.short_description: Derby Life: Ranch & Race is a game where you raise racehorses and share everyday life on an open-world ranch. Explore nature, bond with your horse, and watch it grow into a top-class racehorse. Challenge the World Tour and aim for victory. How far can your horse go?

4402390.title: CaveDive
4402390.short_description: CaveDive is a game about exploring an unknown cave and descending toward its end with a group of unruly companions.

4402430.title: Atomic Griddle
4402430.short_description: Take orders, cook pancakes, and shape a grim wasteland through every choice you make. All while trying not to blow up your nuclear reactor.

4402450.title: Sigma Protocol
4402450.short_description: Command your forces against endless waves of enemies in this intense RTS. Build bases, manage resources, and defend the Omega Beacon across procedurally generated worlds. Play solo or team up with friends via Steam multiplayer.

4402590.title: Telerotation
4402590.short_description: Rotate, Teleport, Jump, and float across over 200 hand-crafted puzzles designed to push your mind to its limits. Secrets, unlockables, optional bonus challenges, and a light sprinkling of humor await. This puzzle game is simple to pick up but genuinely tricky to master.

4402740.title: 沙城争霸
4402740.genre: Casual, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4402740.short_description: From the flames of Chibi to the clash at Guandu, you’ll experience the dual joys of strategic deployment and offensive-defensive warfare in a cartoonized Three Kingdoms battlefield.

4402920.title: Vector 2147
4402920.short_description: A multi-perspective sci-fi mystery where three uneasily allied nations race to uncover the truth behind a dangerous experiment that none of them fully understand.

4403270.title: TinyPaws
4403270.short_description: A cozy idle cat game where you feed, clean, and serve a very rude cat that thinks it rules the world.

4403410.title: Atomic Test
4403410.short_description: Master the physics of the universe! Fuse light elements into heavy matter, upgrade your lab, and break the 60-second limit in this addictive roguelite-incremental simulator. From Hydrogen to the Omega Particle, can you trigger the ultimate chain reaction before time runs out?

4403430.title: Evil Book: Abandoned House
4403430.short_description: A first-person atmospheric horror game set in an abandoned house. Explore dark rooms, uncover the secrets of an ancient evil book, and survive terrifying encounters where every sound and choice can decide your fate.

4403440.title: Summon Says
4403440.short_description: In this 1–4 player co-op ritual game, use your mic to chant, whisper, hum, and shout in perfect harmony with friends to summon spirits. Break the ritual, and you might summon something far angrier.

4403510.title: Sensory Overload
4403510.short_description: A dropper game designed to overwhelm your senses. Twisting tunnels, psychedelic patterns, and breathing walls assault your sense of balance as the chaos escalates with every level.

4403640.title: Music Business: Nightclubs & Festivals Simulator
4403640.short_description: Build your nightlife empire in this first-person management simulator. Physically manage your stock, set up your equipment, and serve customers in real-time. Can you turn your small local club into the city's hottest spot without spiraling into chaos?

4403820.title: SuperNova
4403820.short_description: A space-themed Suika game where you combine planets to create even bigger ones!

4403840.title: Radio Buddy
4403840.short_description: Radio Buddy is a relaxing 2D pixel‑art idle simulation. Tune in, unwind, and enjoy a cozy, family‑friendly retro vibe at your own pace.

4403900.title: Unmourned VR
4403900.short_description: Unmourned is a first-person psychological horror game where Jason moves into a new house only to be haunted by escalating paranormal events. Driven by fear, he must uncover the truth behind the previous owners' disappearance. Can he solve the mystery before it's too late?

4404000.title: Diggin It
4404000.short_description: Dig, upgrade, and take risky buffs in this chaotic tunnel adventure! Team up with your loyal cat and dog companions, discover powerful upgrades, and decide how far you're willing to push your luck while digging deeper and deeper.

4404110.title: Goblins Can Conquer
4404110.short_description: Command a goblin horde in this strategic auto-battler. Explore the map, construct buildings, and increment your stats via the skill tree. Recruit new goblins to overwhelm enemies in combat.

4404130.title: Sam's Die-abalical Minesweeper
4404130.short_description: A truly die-abalical minesweeper experience! Build and level up your action figure while utilizing powerups and perks to navigated minfeilds.

4404370.title: Nash Racing Pursuit 2
4404370.short_description: Kevin Nash famous criminal and car driver is back. 11 tracks to find money piles under limited time and avoid police cars

4404390.title: Cheap Screamer
4404390.short_description: Try to survive the experiments being conducted on you while you attempt to uncover the truth about why you are there.

4404430.title: Jumpscare Storey Loop
4404430.short_description: Find the Jumpscare and escape the creepy looping building. Look carefully to spot the strange happenings, and defeat those attacking you with your katana

4404450.title: ⟨Unknown_Terminal⟩
4404450.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4404450.short_description: Retro terminal mystery: explore a live IBM PS/2, decode corrupted logs, and learn who waits behind the blinking prompt.

4404590.title: the collective
4404590.short_description: Build and optimize the factory systems keeping people alive aboard a generation ship. Form relationships with a crew that remembers everything, and uncover the truth about your past. A factory-building life sim set 300 years into a 750-year voyage.

4404630.title: Lawnmower Game Beer
4404630.short_description: Lawnmower simulation game where mission is to collect and find 10 beer bottles under limited time to finish game. Need also avoid bombs and zombies

4404760.title: Backrooms Stories: The End
4404760.short_description: Read, choose, survive. A horror visual novel set in an infinite dark library deep within the Backrooms. Explore towering bookshelves, hide from hostile entities, and decide your fate across 11 possible endings. Every choice matters, and not every path leads to salvation.

4404800.title: Redshaw Valley
4404800.short_description: Play along with the story on how a group of friends who unintentionally get sent to the future embark on a time-travelling journey to save the land known as Redshaw Valley. Collect items to be able to battle against enemies that roam the lands. Earn experience and collect gold along the way.

4404910.title: RE:MEMBER
4404910.short_description: A psychological horror where sound is your only sight. You awaken in the darkness of a laboratory, bereft of memory. Use echolocation to see the world, but beware: every sound betrays you to the nightmares that dwell in the darkness. Survive and remember who you are... or what you have become.

4404930.title: Miaugical
4404930.short_description: Change the world with your magic in Miaugical!, an epic adventure where mysteries abound. Explore the world, uncover secrets, discover your power in an isometric 3D Adventure-RPG style, and face great challenges in a 2D Rogue-Lite, surrounded by cute kittens and not-so-cute enemies.

4404970.title: ARALSK 7
4404970.short_description: Atmospheric psychological horror from Uzbekistan. Explore the abandoned territories of the Aral Sea, face your fears, and uncover the dark secrets of the Aralsk-7 station. Survive in a world where the line between reality and nightmare is blurred.

4405080.title: Island Idle RPG: Build and Conquer
4405080.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4405080.short_description: A relaxed idle strategy RPG where you automate your kingdom, craft powerful gear, and shape your progression at your own pace.

4405170.title: Unit 097
4405170.short_description: Explore the galaxy through the eyes of an android pilot. Enjoy a mix of relaxing planetary scanning and arcade-style combat as you upgrade your fleet. A slow-paced space sim for those who love the hum of an engine and the glow of distant suns.

4405240.title: The Door at the End of the Hall
4405240.short_description: Trapped in a looping hallway, you must study subtle changes to choose the right doors. Each passage resets the hall, but slightly wrong. Observe carefully, make smart choices, and uncover the path that unlocks the mysterious door at the end of the hall.

4405280.title: Blind Ride
4405280.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, Simulation, Strategy
4405280.short_description: Blind Ride is a chaotic co-op driving game where one player drives blind and the other must guide them through deadly traffic and sudden disasters. Survival depends on communication.

4405360.title: Elf World Adventure 12: Winter Episode!
4405360.short_description: Elf World Adventure 12: Winter Episode is a winter-themed episode of the popular H-game in the anime and puzzle genre, transporting you to a snowy and cozy world of elf girls.

4405770.title: Dreams Stories Online
4405770.genre: Action, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4405770.short_description: Dreams Stories Online is an indie MMORPG where you return from death 🕯️ not as someone who has already triumphed, but as someone who still dreams. Walk through a persistent, wounded, and hostile world, guided by the hope of a great restoration.

4405780.title: Type To Kill: Full-Motion Vengeance
4405780.short_description: An arcade shooting game where you have to type challenges to finish off enemies with your EMP. In between stages, watch live-action full-motion video cutscenes with a full cast of memorable characters and not necessarily the best acting.

4405960.title: SanGuo Tactics: Touch to Match
4405960.short_description: Satisfying like popping bubble wrap! A casual Three Kingdoms game fusing "2x2 synthesis" with free team building. No grinding—pick any General instantly to decide your troop types. Tap to synthesize and attack. Enjoy light strategy with simple controls. A perfect stress-relief experience!

4406030.title: Pixel Airport Tycoon
4406030.short_description: Build your own airport from the ground up! Construct terminals, runways, and refueling stations, manage baggage handling and catering, research new technologies, and expand your grounds. Become the most successful airport manager – tile by tile!

4406180.title: 昭明日月 Pax Serica: Rise of the Ming
4406180.short_description: 如果您曾期待一款展现中华帝制治国智慧与历史深度的架空历史模拟策略经营游戏：“天命无常，唯德者辅；民心如镜，照见兴亡”。民心通过科道弹章和市井巷议来展现；需处理奏章批红和科举选才等政务，才能真切体会 “垂拱而治” 的理想境界。那么，就请与我们一起，亲自探索《昭明日月》的崭新世界。

4406260.title: Recursion
4406260.short_description: Flowchart is your weapon. Recursion is a strategy game merging logic circuit design with tower defense. architect their paths, and defend the system by engineering the perfect logic loop with maximum efficiency.

4406340.title: Jade Simulator
4406340.short_description: This is a hardcore jade processing simulator. Players inspect raw stones for color and cracks, then operate machinery to cut and polish them. Learn to distinguish natural jade from fakes while upgrading equipment. Experience the full journey from a rough rock to a translucent masterpiece.

4406480.title: SURVIVAL
4406480.short_description: You are one of the last survivors of the apocalypse. Explore the dark forest, build shelters, craft weapons, and fight zombies and mutants in this realistic first-person survival simulator.

4406610.title: Link Empire
4406610.short_description: Link Empire is a real-time strategy game based on a hexagonal grid. In this game, you just need to link nodes to command your forces, not control every unit. Focus on your development, unit combination. Choose your attack timing and path carefully. Defeat your enemies on a truly strategic level!

4406630.title: Lusty Bubbles Animated Edition
4406630.short_description: Lust Bubbles: Animated Edition – Experience a seductive bubble shooter with 30 levels of fully animated waifus! No static images here; every girl breathes, moves, and reacts to your skill. Master the puzzle, unlock the heat. Start playing for free and double the fun with our DLCs!

4406640.title: Minus Nine
4406640.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4406640.short_description: Secure the vaccine and escape the infested facility! Battle your way from B9 to the surface rescue chopper in this isometric roguelite shooter. Restore power, upgrade your gear with Bio-Samples, and protect humanity's last hope against endless waves of the infected.

4406670.title: Zhenyuan Ancient Town in Guizhou
4406670.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4406680.title: Learn Spanish or... Die!
4406680.short_description: A first-person horror game where you must learn Spanish or... Polly Glot, the crazy language learning app mascot will kill you!

4406730.title: Worm in Ruins
4406730.short_description: Second part of worm adventures and walking simulation and survival game as player worm and mission to find stars and avoid traps in this third person game in ruined land

4406760.title: Fernhoof Grove: Riding Academy
4406760.short_description: Enroll in Fernhoof Academy to become a professional horse trainer. Own and care for horses, design training routines, and improve a horse’s skills through precise riding. Learn equine theory, pass riding exams, and compete in show jumping and cross country on your way to graduation.

4406970.title: Cat Screen
4406970.short_description: Bring your desktop to life with 3D cats! Feed, pet, name your cats and earn points. Minimal menus, mouse-only controls, system-friendly design and weekly online rankings make you the best cat owner!

4406990.title: Cafe Card
4406990.short_description: Cafe Card is a card stacking coffee shop game where you create card combos to brew drinks and serve customers.

4407080.title: Dominance
4407080.short_description: Help us resist the advance of evil! Dominance is a turn-based strategy card game! Resist waves of enemies by using your cards to build, recruit, or cast spells! Earn unique upgrades between games to face new challenges!

4407400.title: LOGBOOK: Beneath the Storm
4407400.short_description: A narrative deduction game where you uncover a dark maritime mystery by piecing together clues and hidden connections. Step into the role of a detective, reconstruct past events, identify those involved, and reveal the truth behind a series of grim incidents at sea.

4407440.title: Pressure Vessel
4407440.short_description: Trapped in a deep-sea diving bell, your systems are failing. Descend to find a missing expedition - survive what's hunting you.

4407470.title: Mini Warrior Defense
4407470.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4407470.short_description: Lead your warriors on an epic adventure to defend your kingdom from invaders - in this action tower defense game, you can use various defense towers, levels, heroes, and many good things to help you destroy enemies!

4407490.title: Project Prison: Prologue
4407490.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4407490.short_description: Have you ever thought about the best place to start your criminal empire without any legal consequences? Now you will finally be able to experience prison life in Project Prison: Prologue. try to stay alive in a prison which contains’ s the world’s most ruthless inmates.

4407970.short_description: The Apartment Lies is a first person anomaly horror game where you must spot altered objects in a seemingly normal apartment. Observe carefully, choose the correct door, and survive psychological tension, sudden jumpscares, and brutal horror.

4408130.title: Alive Hunter 2 Mugen hunt
4408130.short_description: Alive Hunter 2 is a third person shooter, open world game with cinematic narrative, it's a direct sequel of Alive Hunter (2019) Alive Hunter 2 is a climax from beginning to the end, designed to impact and delivery the most epic journey ever. Do not fear the hunt, be a part of it.

4408180.title: Guess The Sound
4408180.short_description: Guess The Sound is a relaxing sound-based puzzle game where you type an answer to a question based on what you heard. Handcrafted levels, logic-driven challenges, and clever hints triggered by wrong answers in a unique game of listening and reasoning for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. 🧠🎵

4408330.title: ODEZZA
4408330.short_description: Chess meets Poker. A high-stakes game where chess battles and poker hands decide your fate. Capture pieces, build hands, and bet your way through the Odysseys.

4408350.title: TOTALLY BASKETBALL
4408350.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4408350.short_description: TOTALLY BASKETBALL lets you play the full sport of Basketball in VR!

4408430.title: Marceline Richenwinnier - Old Story
4408430.short_description: Lost in the post-war haze of the 1920s, Detective Marceline Richenwinnier must survive a distorted open world. Battle creatures, solve the puzzle of Merrieland. Reach the heart of Merrienight in this story-driven action-adventure.

4408520.title: Orbital Peril
4408520.short_description: What happens to you when your mobility is completely left to the wind?  Use only two keys to control your weapon direction in a 360 degree orbit while danger envelops you!  In this realm, you will definitely die, but what kind of impression will you leave before you take your very last breath?

4408570.title: Lines Must Cross
4408570.short_description: Lines Must Cross is an incremental graph game about firing mathematical functions and earning progress when they intersect. Click to spawn lines, unlock new function types, and grow a living coordinate system.

4408780.title: Hentai Age Scientist
4408780.short_description: Enjoy a relaxing puzzle journey where each solved level reveals beautiful girl artwork, offering calm visuals, gentle gameplay, no timers, no pressure, and a peaceful experience playable anytime for everyone.

4411240.title: DEADRIFT
4411240.short_description: A fast-paced sci-fi shooter where a failed experiment unleashes mutated horrors inside a secret research facility. Armed with experimental weapons, you must fight through swarms of twisted enemies, and survive the collapse of a world-breaking project.

4411570.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4411570.short_description: Experience the first four days of the Prologue, where FPS action meets quarantine inspection in post-apocalyptic Chicago. You’ve got 30 days until the army arrives. Hold out, fix your car, and fight your way to the main checkpoint to save your younger brother.

4411580.title: Geareo
4411580.short_description: Build physics-based mechanical toys and complex gearworks in a cozy workshop. Solve puzzles your own way, or freely tinker in sandbox mode. Use premade Kits or craft from scratch. Customize your creations with colors, scale, and glue to bring your clockwork ideas to life.

4411710.title: Hentai Furry Sheepy
4411710.short_description: Hentai Furry Sheepy is an adult interactive game that combines logic puzzles, attention, and a seductive atmosphere.

4411840.title: Yellowcreek Stories - The Cabin Watcher
4411840.short_description: Un asesino enmascarado acecha en la oscuridad. Controla el ruido y la luz, escóndete rápido y sobrevive en esta experiencia de terror y sigilo en primera persona de 60–90 minutos, inspirada en los slashers clásicos de los 80.

4412000.title: Zad Archery
4412000.short_description: Shoot down waves of targets, collect their loot, and grow stronger through upgrades and skills in this endlessly expanding incremental game.

4412040.title: Absorber: Absorb Adapt Survive
4412040.short_description: Consume enemies. Steal their powers. Survive the system. A hardcore tactical roguelike with 60+ programs and no mercy.

4412380.title: Breaking Up Is Hard To Do
4412380.short_description: When you tell your girlfriend you want to break up, she refuses to accept it. Is your resolve strong enough to become single or will you cave and stay together? A 30-minute visual novel - Breaking Up Is Hard To Do

4412580.title: DEFAUT
4412580.short_description: DEFAUT is a 2.5D platformer. As a restoration unit, collect flowers to gain resources and trigger special actions. Your choices in restoration shape the world's fate across different endings. Through overlapping footprints, a hidden narrative slowly reveals itself.

4412910.title: Micro Mystery Investigator: Noir Edition
4412910.short_description: Pour a coffee, light a match, and crack the case. Micro Mystery Investigator offers infinite procedural logic puzzles in a stylish noir setting. Sift through clues, cross-reference alibis, and deduce the culprit before the trail goes cold. Pure deduction, zero guessing.

4412930.title: BricksPhilosophorum
4412930.short_description: [点金方块]BricksPhilosophorum is an automated game that uses an assembly line to study alchemy. The game starts with collecting minerals, purchasing land, unlocking technology, and building automated production lines. The ultimate goal is to refine the Sage's Stone and turn it into gold.

4413080.title: Sweet Medieval
4413080.short_description: Sweet Medieval - A simple and beautiful puzzle game with a medieval theme. It depicts the daily lives of five pretty medieval girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4413280.title: Rituals & War: Shan Hai
4413280.short_description: An ink-washed Shanhai world is overrun by beasts. Fight with foresight: read your foe’s intent, plan your sword techniques, and unleash seamless chains. One miscalculation, and the tide turns.

4413300.title: Martin's Console
4413300.short_description: What if the game console you’ve been playing for ten years has been quietly rewriting reality?

4413320.title: The Isolation Project
4413320.short_description: Survival horror puzzle game set on a lonely space station

4413510.title: Starship Contractor: Galactic Tycoon
4413510.short_description: Shape the Galactic Arms Race. As CEO of a private space arms company, design modular ships, research breakthrough tech, and win faction tenders. Outmaneuver rivals in prototype races and make critical choices that make every playthrough unique, from a startup to galactic dominance.

4413590.title: hero and witch
4413590.short_description: This is a game with a dual immersive gameplay style combining comics and light novel elements. Players need to tap and interact with cards on the screen to eliminate them. Each level unlocks a sweet, pure, and exciting storyline with a witch!

4413620.title: Oldwoods
4413620.short_description: A sandbox game set in a fully modifiable world. The environment changes through interaction.

4413680.title: This Is You
4413680.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4413680.short_description: A strategy survival game made for beginners, by a beginner indie developer. Try to keep a small village alive in a world where time moves fast. Clear land, build houses and barns, set up fields, plant crops, and manage your resources carefully.

4413690.title: SkillGrid
4413690.short_description: SkillGrid is a minimalist strategy game where you expand, manage, and defend a growing grid against an evolving hostile force.

4380020.title: It’s magic, bro!
4380020.short_description: 🧙‍♂️🔥💀 Cooperative fantasy horror where you and your bros must deliver a wagon of magical artifacts to the enchanted kingdom. Repair the cart, fight monsters, gather loot, and SHOUT SPELL NAMES INTO YOUR MIC!

4380090.title: HELLO HACKER - Project Daybreak
4380090.short_description: An immersive indie hacking simulation game. Help the Project Daybreak team expose a secret government program.

4380100.title: Duball Dash
4380100.short_description: Roll fast, crash often, and keep dashing—Duball Dash is endless hyper-casual fun inside the tube. Roll fast as a cool green ball rocking swag white ski goggles, dodge metal walls with black-and-yellow hazard tape, and slip past bouncing red cylinders as the speed ramps up.

4380150.title: Sex Machina
4380150.short_description: In this adult visual novel, you will meet the android Sorane, designed to give pleasure. In addition, a whole harem of past loves, coworkers, and friends will lead you to explicit sex scenes, multiple choices, and alternate endings.

4380200.title: Shear Heaven
4380200.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Early Access
4380200.short_description: You are a child's soul in heaven. Shear sheep, collect their wool, and build a rope back to Earth to reunite with your family. A cozy 3D platformer about loss, hope, and the impossible journey home.

4380220.title: NULL
4380220.short_description: The baby died weeks ago, but the nursery is still breathing. Navigate a suburban neighborhood trapped in a glitching loop of a father’s grief. Here, time has shattered, memories are traps, and the dead are simply waiting for you to notice them.

4380300.title: Catverse
4380300.short_description: Catverse is a 2D co-op climbing game where 3-4 players enter a cat's mind. Turn lights on/off in 5 rooms to dictate its actions! Climb up to reach the Cosmos at the top, but if you mess up? Hope it was your friend's fault. Good luck!

4380310.title: Cat Cursor by Travellin Cats
4380310.short_description: Desktop cat cursor for Windows: turn your boring cursor into an adorable cat paw. Boop!

4380320.title: Mayday
4380320.short_description: Take to space in this action-packed shmup, where every wave of enemies is rewarded with a buff and debuff. Play through the intense story and arcade modes to become an ace pilot. What stats will you increase? Which ones are worth the sacrifice? The battle begins!

4380350.title: Buckshot Bunny
4380350.short_description: Buckshot Bunny is a single-player, fast-paced 2D action platformer, testing your speed and agility, navigating challenging locations as the cybernetic rabbit, Buck. Run, smash and bullet-jump through hazards and enemies to free your family and find your way back home.

4380390.title: DesktopPets
4380390.short_description: A chill, tamagotchi-like idle creature game in the corner of your screen. Raise creatures, unlock 100+ evolutions, and freely customize your room at your own pace!

4380480.title: Secrets of Asherah 2
4380480.genre: Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4380480.short_description: Secrets of Asherah 2 is a handcrafted pixel-art MMORPG where you forge your destiny through crafting, combat, and exploration. Gather resources, battle monsters, and uncover secrets in a living, player-driven world.

4380690.title: 逐末之地：60s Exploring the Endless Land：60s
4380690.short_description: Your goal is to search for supplies in the laboratory, survive, and escape the forest. It’s like a 3D version of ‘60 Seconds’. Cooperate with your teammates, divide tasks, face the unknown together, and uncover the truth together.

4380710.title: DNA FIGHT
4380710.short_description: 3D Pretty Girl Dress-Up Fighting Game, earn DNA in battles to unlock skills and outfits. Experience the authentic feel of an arcade-style fighting game, with an original combat system, delivering exhilarating infinite combos and counter-infinite combos.

4380730.title: Red Passport: Deported
4380730.short_description: A sequel to the adventure game Red Passport. After being deported from Japan, the hero faces a long journey home to Moscow. With no money or documents, you must hitchhike, ride freight trains, work odd jobs, and solve local problems to survive the road.

4380740.title: Butcher Shop Simulator
4380740.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4380740.short_description: Run your own butcher shop! Cut, weigh, package, and sell fresh meat while managing stock, customers, and hygiene. Master the knife, keep the fridge cold, and grow a small neighborhood butcher into a thriving meat empire. Play solo or in co-op.

4380750.title: Emerald Flower
4380750.short_description: A miraculous fuel, or a parasitic plague that spells the end of humanity? In a civilization collapsed by global war, fight for survival against the brain-controlling Emerald Flower, feral armies, and ruthless factions, each driven by their own desperate ideologies.

4380760.title: Custom Image Survivors
4380760.short_description: Your Images, Your Survival. Survive the swarm using your skills and your favorite images! Custom Image Survivors is a fully customizable Survivors-like game where you can replace those familiar-looking assets with any image you prefer.

4380870.title: Room to Breathe

4380900.title: A Gummings Tale: The Blacksmith
4380900.short_description: Become a Gumming, a forest sprite whose dream is to be the best blacksmith in his village. A rythm cozy game where you'll gradually learn the art of forging while restoring an abandoned workshop. Will you complete the challenges in the "Guide to Becoming the Best Blacksmith"?

4381040.title: MADDMADD
4381040.short_description: MADDMADD is a third-person run-and-gun boomer shooter with fast-paced movement, beautiful giblets and a comedic tone. Blow stuff up in your tank and then get up-close-and-personal with your boomstick!

4381120.title: Virtual Driving School: Trucks
4381120.short_description: Train like a professional HGV driver. Master trucks and buses, manage blind spots and long loads, avoid bridge strikes, navigate level crossings, and operate vehicle-mounted cranes. Real rules, real risks — zero real-world consequences.

4381150.title: Endless Dark
4381150.short_description: A first-person survival horror game where you uncover the dark trail of a secretive corporation while searching for your missing sister.

4381180.title: Coin Harvest
4381180.short_description: Harvest coins with robotic arms, unlock islands and conquer realms. An incremental idle desktop widget game that runs while you work or game.

4381280.title: Claiming the Noble Elf Mother
4381280.short_description: Claiming the Noble Elf Mother is a story-driven adult visual novel. Play as Noah, a low-born servant in a rigid elven society, enduring cruelty from nobles as desire and resentment grow. Power shifts, forbidden attraction, and blurred boundaries shape his dangerous ascent.

4381390.title: When I'm Not Drawing
4381390.short_description: In this cozy life-simulation RPG, you play as a young woman who moves to a new city to pursue her dream of becoming an artist. Manage your schedule, balance life and career, explore the city, and meet new friends! Live a fulfilling year on your own, at your own pace.

4381530.title: Space Slinger
4381530.short_description: Space Slinger is an arcade roguelike about a traveler and his recoil-packed gun. Unlock unique weapons and broken builds as you conquer space one enemy at a time.

4381540.title: Cannibal Court
4381540.short_description: Convince the cannibals not to eat you. Collect knowledge, choose your responses carefully and dig up secrets to pit the cultists against each other. Get wiser, get manipulative and mastermind your way out of being dinner in this trial-simulator set in the snowy Canadian north.

4381580.title: Lokari
4381580.short_description: "Lokari is a dark action RPG where a father, burned alive with his daughter, returns from the spirit realm to fight for vengeance and redemption.

4381760.title: Miyuri's Devotion
4381760.short_description: A cohabitation / temple management / dating sim game Corrupt and seduce your fellow nuns as you fall into depravity yourself. Cast spells, manage your temple and upgrade your abilities. “cleanse” the faithful in the confession booth, get frisky with the other nuns, and give yourself to the goddess

4381950.title: Chickenfinger's Rally
4381950.genre: Casual, Racing, Free To Play, Early Access
4381950.short_description: A sim-cade side scrolling car game, with pretty environments and fast-paced driving conditions.

4382220.title: Maple Blade
4382220.short_description: Explore a haunted forest and rescue the neighbor's cat! A grid-based exploration game where you chop your way through the woods, fight off restless spirits, solve little puzzles, and help the townsfolk. Every playthrough is different-- cut your own path and relax in a serene autumn world.

4382310.title: Warp to Sector One
4382310.short_description: Trade, fight, and explore a procedurally generated galaxy in this deep space trading game inspired by 80's sci-fi computer screens and early text based space games. Command fleets, negotiate with alien factions, colonize planets, and forge your legacy across five unique career paths.

4382460.title: LevelUp Adventure　レベルアップアドベンチャー
4382460.short_description: ピースを集めてレベルアップ！ドット絵と奥深いゲーム性についついハマるパズルRPG。

4382490.title: VCTR
4382490.short_description: Shoot. Dash. Collect. Upgrade. VCTR is a kinetic arcade shooter where two simple actions create countless strategies. Read the field. Choose when to act. And turn the chaotic battlefield into a dance of high-risk, high-reward play.

4383020.title: Mowigun's World
4383020.short_description: Welcome to Mowigun’s World. You awake with no memory in a colorful world under attack by animal-like robots. As you progress, you uncover the reality behind the robots’ origins. This is an action-packed 2.5D platformer where you defeat enemies, conquer chaos, and dodge obstacles!

4383170.title: JXXZ
4383170.short_description: Enter the random Void Domain with basic abilities, slay monsters, gather three resources, and build defenses in safe zones. Assault the Pollution Core, destroy Sporangium, fend off counterattacks. Merge skills on upgrade, destroy the Ultimate Core and survive its final counterattack to evacuate.

4383250.title: Silence, Exile, and Cunning
4383250.short_description: A modern take on the classic adventure formula: explore, converse, and solve puzzles. Play as the young Irish writer James Joyce and his partner Nora Barnacle during their 1904 Mediterranean exile, in a port city where everyone seems to want something, and your small choices refuse to stay small.

4383310.title: GraveDiggers
4383310.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4383310.short_description: A 4 players coop game where undertaker cats do their duty trying to keep their coffins away from the mafia and a necromancer. Find bodies, fight bad ones, dig graves and eat cheese… In the 30s.

4384170.title: Don't Dessert Me!
4384170.short_description: A multiplayer collection game where you must survive in a mysterious space filled with various desserts. Evade hungry monsters that relentlessly pursue you, find sweet items hidden throughout the map, and safely transport them to earn sales profits.

4384320.title: BioTech Labs
4384320.short_description: You are an employee at a biological research laboratory. After a containment system failure, several experiments have escaped and are heading your way. Now you must survive until help arrives... or die trying!

4384340.title: RealClawMachine
4384340.short_description: This game begins with a visit to a claw machine arcade with your girlfriend. Combine items and buffs to win dolls, sell them at higher prices, and grow your wealth. Create your own build and enjoy efficient profit strategies and steady progression.

4384430.title: Arcane Spellforge: Core Defense
4384430.short_description: Forge spells with your hands, build tactical defenses, and unleash devastating power in VR. Upgrade modular weapons and towers, adapt your strategy, and survive relentless waves of robotic enemies attacking your core from every direction.

4384760.title: Orbital Salvager
4384760.short_description: Orbital Salvager is a 2D space arcade simulation about mastering orbital mechanics to recover salvage ships from planetary orbit and deliver them to a salvage depot on time. Tether and tow salvage in various orbital patterns, manage fuel, and avoid obstacles in the daily and campaign modes.

4385210.title: CastleOn Scriptum
4385210.short_description: Build a castle and defend it from your enemies! Construct towers, place traps, train and command units in this historical, manuscript-themed mix of Tower Defense and classical Real Time Strategy.

4385270.title: Stay: Your Forever Pet!
4385270.short_description: Meet Ember, your furry magical companion! Bring her home, care for her, and discover the extraordinary world of the Otherlands together. Stay: Your Forever Pet! is brought to you by the team behind the VR title Stay: Forever Home.

4385780.title: Maldhalla
4385780.short_description: Crush endless waves of creatures and become absurdly overpowered! Grab loot, level up, unlock characters, and upgrade weapons to craft insane builds that obliterate everything on screen.

4385860.title: Slay The Hero
4385860.short_description: A auto battle reverse bullet hell. In Slay The Hero you choose your units and then send them out against the hero to destroy them. A variety of units will be at your disposal to slay the hero.

4386810.title: Penguin Capitalism Simulator
4386810.short_description: A calm and cozy idle game about growing a peaceful little world. Start with one island, end with many penguins. Play actively or let autoplay handle everything, while your world quietly lives in a corner of your screen.

4387040.title: Fork It!
4387040.short_description: Fork It! is a brutal, physics based journey where you are put behind the wheel of a forklift. Navigate with precision through hazardous industrial environments where around every corner is an obstacle ready to catch you out and spiral you further into chaos.

4387370.title: DRILL RIDER
4387370.short_description: Dive deep in DRILL RIDER, an incremental underground adventure. Plunge into the planet with your giant drill, blast ore and gems with your laser, upgrade your gear, and discover new biomes with even more riches.

4387690.title: Sweet and Sour: Subway Romance Stories
4387690.short_description: How to meet a girl on the subway? The protagonist has few stops to decide which girl to approach or whether it's better to play it safe. A comedic erotic story about an indecisive guy and several attractive women in a subway.

4387730.title: Sticker Detective: By the Book
4387730.short_description: Sticker Detective: By the Book is a point'n'click investigation game, where you solve mysteries using stickers. Join the famed Sticker Detective, Laura, as she explores the town of Green Wood, where a puzzling death took place.

4387750.title: Concrete Polishing Simulator
4387750.short_description: Concrete Polishing Simulator is a hands-on first-person sim where you transform raw slabs into flawless, reflective floors. Master professional tools, grow your business, and take on jobs ranging from homes to massive commercial sites.

4387780.title: JOHN FURY'S FIRST FURY
4387780.short_description: JOHN FURY'S FIRST FURY is a 2d adventure game. Your adventure will bring you across the landscapes of Russia to make it to a secret communist lab where they're conducting dangerous experiments. You'll have use what you find to help you along your journey against many different enemies and bosses.

4387860.title: Hentai Tales: Triangle That Wants Me All
4387860.short_description: After years of grinding in Tokyo, my life was just work, exhaustion, and this tiny apartment. Then, everything changed in one day. My childhood sweetheart, who I hadn't seen in years, showed up at my door.

4388000.title: Concussive Maintenance
4388000.short_description: A puzzle-platformer set in the future, use portals to teleport yourself and solve puzzles. You activate your portals with your momentum, so build up speed to launch both objects and yourself.

4388010.title: ALVAR
4388010.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4388010.short_description: ALVAR is a ADV visual novel with raising mechanics and multiple endings. In the town of Nedtown, you guide and shape “your child” by choosing a trait to nurture, leading to different outcomes. Things may feel unsettling—but everything is normal. You have to trust it.

4388020.title: МЕМАСИКИ ПО КЛАССИКЕ 2
4388020.short_description: Remember how we connected to the internet via a modem, listening to that epic squeal, and then waiting for ICQ to log in and show statuses with flowers? Or how an incoming "oooh" message would ring out in the silence of the night, making your heart beat faster?

4388040.title: Escape Up
4388040.short_description: Escape Up if you can. Climb the tower and defeat the monsters as you try to escape. Killing all the monsters in a room will unlock the next room. Challenge others climbers on the leaderboards and see how fast you can manage to escape. Ready, set, climb!

4388080.title: Cloudrift Islands
4388080.short_description: Cloudrift Islands is a sky pirate adventure. Pilot a handmade flying ship, raid floating islands, fight monsters and turrets, gather resources, and uncover rare 18+ loot (images and videos) reserved for the boldest captains.

4388140.title: A Totally Censored Game
4388140.short_description: Drag anywhere for unexpected effects. (Runs over other apps/games. Supports multi-instance, customization, and scaling.)

4388180.title: Puppe Yerde
4388180.short_description: Puppe Yerde is a calm, casual game where you spend seven days with a small puppy in a quiet garden. There are no battles or game overs. You simply take photos, earn points based on the puppy’s behavior, and collect unlockable hats. Designed as a gentle, relaxing experience for players of all ages.

4388240.title: 炽之杀
4388240.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4388240.short_description: 故事：奇幻的天空台上，薇儿小姐寻找春天的风景。 角色：波波薇儿，蔷薇花丛的漂亮女子，能用箭羽和简单的武器攻击。 目标挑战：闯关冒险，打败怪物。 游戏机制：采用下2d象棋和3d动作冒险结合。 游戏时长：6个章节，大约10小时通关。 类型：单机，3d，2d，第三人称，动作冒险，棋盘，平台跳跃，闯关解密。 语言：简体中文。 支持：win10系统，小游戏，小内存就行。 画面素材：原创绘画和相机拍摄结合。 原生音乐：用studio one 原创制作的简单音乐。 游戏模式：包括冒险模式，自由模式，挑战模式等等。 与众不同内容：象棋的走棋会影响3d地形的奇妙变化，带有策略等等。

4388420.title: Pack my Order
4388420.short_description: Pack My Order is a cozy online shopping simulator. Fill your cart based on the customers' lists and budgets, and enjoy the process without any rush. Cute animations, pleasant sounds, and a calm pace await you. No timers — the perfect way to clear your mind after a long day.

4388440.title: Big Breasted Milky Mommies 5
4388440.short_description: Relax, lay back, and pick a puzzle. Solve over 110 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. Have thousands of hours of sexual fun with these EXTREMELY NSFW Mommy Puzzles.

4388470.title: TetraDice
4388470.short_description: Forget everything you know about falling blocks. TetraDice blends classic arcade strategy with Roguelite powers and dice-driven chaos. Bend gravity, unleash explosions, and use 50+ Perks to survive and beat the high score.

4388490.title: Go Up Frog
4388490.short_description: Falling isn’t the end. In this 2D precision platformer, you must keep climbing upward. Small mistakes lead to big falls, but every challenge can be faced again. How far can the frog go?

4388500.title: Turnveil
4388500.short_description: Turnveil is a turn-based roguelike where every fight is a tactical puzzle built on three pillars: clever skill combos, using the environment, and choosing your targets wisely. One wrong move, and the enemies will tear you apart — they're getting smarter right alongside you

4388560.title: Fill the Fridge!
4388560.short_description: It’s time to fill the fridge with your friends, the Munchie, the chef, and Popo! Keep stuffing food into the fridge and prove that no one organizes better than you. All in this fun and stylish inventory management game!

4388580.title: Last Bad Idea
4388580.short_description: Co-op survival for 4 players! You and your friends are watching TV when nuclear war is declared. Signal dies. Your only hope - reach the nearest bunker. Deadly winter locations, freezing cold, total chaos. Enemies: frost, nature, mistakes… and your own friends.

4388630.title: 擦边禁止
4388630.short_description: As a newstreamer agency, you must start from the ground up—recruit cute girls and shape them into a beloved top-tier streaming idol group. But the darkness of human nature lurks in every shortcut... Struggle to survive. Suggestive deinal!

4388690.title: Poor Samantha
4388690.short_description: "Noodles are the food of solitude." Trapped by agoraphobia and social anxiety, your only friend is Samantha. She is your courage to open the door. But in a room of broken mirrors, who is actually speaking? A short psychological visual novel about isolation and the lies we tell ourselves.

4388710.title: Hypernova
4388710.short_description: Progression-driven space survival. Launch sorties, survive hazards and escalating enemy waves, and gather stars, fragments, crystals, and rare world resources. Unlock new worlds, build your ship with research, utilities, and weapons, and chase quests, achievements, and cosmetics.

4389510.title: Bomb's Lair
4389510.short_description: Throw angry bombs and solve puzzles in this 2D puzzle game. Discover four worlds with 48 handcrafted levels. Will you succeed and claim the treasure at the bottom of The Bomb's Lair?

4389530.title: Dice Heroes
4389530.short_description: Dice Heroes is a turn-based roguelike where every fight is decided by a single die. Roll it, then split its value between Attack and Defense. Collect powerful artifacts, bend the rules, and survive dangerous biomes in a risk-driven journey.

4390180.title: Hue Factory
4390180.short_description: A colorful, minimalist automation game. Place machines, mix colors, and manage the flow of an evolving factory. Listen to the hum of the machines and watch the colors blend while keeping your lines efficient.

4390210.title: ELAPSE
4390210.short_description: An endless game about avoiding asteroids, designed to pass the time, accompanied by calm music.

4390400.title: PuiPui - Stretching Puzzle -
4390400.short_description: 【Stretch the Guinea Pig! Fill the Map in One Stroke!】 Stretch your guinea pig to fill every tile! A simple yet addictive one-stroke puzzle. Just swipe to guide PuiPui and cover the entire board!

4390830.title: VilaGod
4390830.short_description: VilaGod is a god simulator where you shape the destiny of civilizations on giant maps. Unlike other god games, every action generates dynamic chronicles: from political revolts to legendary discoveries, watch your world's history unfold in 14 different languages

4391220.title: Screen Savior
4391220.short_description: Screen Savior is a short incremental action game about swarms of insects that attacked your monitor. Exterminate them with your hammer, unlock incremental upgrades from an uncapped skill tree to become stronger and get new weapons of annihilation!

4391380.title: Artillery Miner
4391380.short_description: An incremental mining game, where you mine through massive blocks using guns, fire, lasers and nuclear missiles. Discover new ores, unlock new worlds and weapons as you progress through the upgrades tree and become the ultimate Artillery Miner!

4391720.title: Books of Horror
4391720.short_description: Books of Horror is a first-person horror game where you face Airana, a mysterious AI that controls your captivity. To escape, you must overcome procedurally generated simulations based on ancient “Books of Horror”

4392090.title: Memora
4392090.short_description: Memora is a side-scrolling puzzle-platformer in which the protagonist awakens in an apparently perfect world, built by his own subconscious. Experience an adventure filled with emotionally intense moments, entirely hand-drawn and animated frame by frame.

4392400.title: Ashfall Directive
4392400.short_description: A focused melee action game featuring precise combat, parries, and multi-phase boss encounters. Reassemble Relic-Class Weapon HB-01 and complete the Ashfall Directive.

4392500.title: UnDiced
4392500.short_description: UnDiced is a turn-based roguelike RPG where you roll dice to advance through adventures and battles. Dungeon exploration and combat are all influenced by dice. Test your luck to find legendary artifacts.

4392920.title: Fall Asleep
4392920.short_description: The girl’s only wish: to wake. "Reach the bed below, and any wish will be granted." Led by a cryptic guide, she leaps into the abyss. Experience immersive, 3D physics-based falling action. Navigate shifting routes and encroaching phantoms. Salvation, or—? Enjoy your wonderful nightmare.

4393110.title: Dice Beauty: Roguelike Tactics
4393110.short_description: Dice Beauty is a turn-based tactical roguelike where battles are fought with dice and elemental strategy. Face beautiful elemental heroines, exploit strengths and weaknesses, manage risk, and survive unpredictable runs where smart decisions matter more than luck.

4393210.title: Throne of Decisions
4393210.short_description: The weight of the crown lies in your answers. Maintain the delicate balance within your council and discover the deep stories of your visitors. Every "Yes" or "No" will either turn your kingdom into a legend or bury it in history.

4393240.title: Portal Fall
4393240.short_description: Portal Fall is a turn-based roguelike where your skill set evolves mid-combat. Battle endless waves of enemies across fractured realities ruled by an ethereal Jester.

4393290.title: Bungee Fisher
4393290.short_description: Tired of ordinary fishing? In Bungee Fisher, leap from heights as a swimsuit-clad diver, plunge deep, and haul up exotic fish and treasure chests. Challenge underwater creatures and uncover lost treasure!

4394700.title: The Last Convoy North
4394700.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4394700.short_description: The Last Convoy North is a unique survival management game where you take direct control of the convoy. Choose your route, marshal your crew, upgrade vehicles, recruit allies and fight your way north to survive.

4394740.title: Lights Out Dark House
4394740.short_description: All alone and abandoned in the dark house, you embark on a journey as an investigative journalist. You explore the house, searching for notes hidden within to learn what happened and how to escape.

4395020.title: Chronicles of Clams Island
4395020.short_description: In this RPG, play as Amy, a shipwrecked rookie stranded on Clams Island. Battle monsters, complete quests, upgrade your gear, meet locals, and explore the nightlife, where even more adventures await. Rise to become a top-ranked adventurer, or lose your purity trying!

4395510.title: Beat Vector
4395510.short_description: A 360-degree rhythm game that delivers a full music video experience. Rotate your laser to strike incoming rings and trigger a live audio-visual performance. Every note makes the world glow up, it's up to you to see the full show!

4395620.title: BlackSands
4395620.short_description: Trapped in a relentless time loop, fight your way through a mysterious arena. Explore, adapt, and use what you’ve learned throughout each reset to uncover its secrets and reach your freedom.

4395740.title: Furniture Assembler Simulator
4395740.short_description: Assemble furniture for a living, build your reputation, skills and income, unlocking better tools and orders.

4396030.title: OKEYABILITY: Board Game
4396030.short_description: Rediscover the thrill of Classic Okey (Tile-based Rummy) in a neon-lit, robotic atmosphere! Enjoy traditional rules or use unique abilities to shift the balance. Define your strategy, customize your robot, and claim your spot at the table of the future!

4396050.title: 7 Days in Dystopia
4396050.short_description: 7 Days in Dystopia is a psychological dystopian game where you experience seven days by playing a series of games, making choices, and facing the consequences of winning and losing in a city where people hide behind masks.

4396290.title: Cloudsea Frontier
4396290.short_description: This is a classic long-form RPG inspired by the masterpieces of the 1990s JRPG era. It unfolds a story of adventure through the Cloud Sea world and saving the world.

4396540.title: LINGER
4396540.short_description: LINGER is a survival adventure game where you explore a mysterious island, gather resources, craft tools, build shelter, and fight strange creatures while uncovering the secrets of a dark and hostile place.

4396570.title: My Horny Roomies
4396570.short_description: Four girls. One free room. A shared house full of sexual tension. During the day, you choose who to spend your time with. At night… things heat up. They all want to fuck you. Which one will you choose?

4396660.title: Cat Mirror
4396660.short_description: Meow! A cozy mirrored puzzle game where controlling two kittens at once creates clever, relaxing, and satisfying challenges.

4396730.title: Dark Ride: Sweet Dreams
4396730.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play, Early Access
4396730.short_description: Dark Ride: Sweet Dreams is a cozy VR dark ride.

4396750.title: PaddleUP!
4396750.short_description: A loud, fast arcade paddle game where you keep the ball alive using trick shots, risky flips, and pure reflex. Chase high scores, fight the clock, or survive forever while a fake live chat hypes you up or roasts every mistake.

4396870.title: Tai Chi Game
4396870.short_description: In this game, you pose the avatar for the awareness ball location. There are 9 possible moves in this game. You score 1 point for each correct pose.

4397020.title: Feed the Gods
4397020.short_description: This is a cooperative cooking adventure game set in a 3D world filled with many recipes and tools to discover on your quest to Feed the Gods!

4397030.title: Exorcism of Montague Manor
4397030.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game set in a pitch-black mansion where your only tool is a flashlight. Collect clues, make risky light-on or light-off decisions, and survive sudden shock jumpscares in a tense, combat-free experience focused on fear and uncertainty.

4397040.title: Capivara Zen
4397040.short_description: Control a capybara trapped in a chaotic world, face fast-paced challenges, push through increasingly intense stages, and collect money as everything around you spirals out of control. The further you go, the closer you get to freeing the capybara from this reality.

4397120.title: Yapori Advance
4397120.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4397120.short_description: Yapori Advance is a single-player precision platformer where you must overcome various obstacles to progress.

4397160.title: Apocalypse: The Hunger
4397160.short_description: We clapped the Minion Meta. No armies to manage. No 1/1 tokens to trade. Just you, and the miscreation in front of you. Apocalypse: The Hunger combines deep RPG progression, item crafting, and the tactical return of "The Stack" in a brutal, high-stakes card battler where you play for keeps.

4397180.title: Your Friend's Mom
4397180.short_description: Your Friend's Mom — a desktop companion with a local LLM, roleplaying as the mom of one of your Steam friends.

4397220.title: My Little Ranch
4397220.short_description: A cozy idle ranch that lives at the bottom of your screen. Feed happy horses, collect coins, and expand your ranch. All while you work or relax!

4397240.title: Austerity X
4397240.short_description: It's election season in the UK. Justine visits Barmford to ask the cross-obsessed locals who they're voting for in this classic survival horror. Find rabbit holes and uncover scandals as you unveil the gruesome reality behind Michael Hallow's 30 year reign as mayor, before the calendar runs out.

4397360.title: The Flying Feather Shotgun
4397360.short_description: There's tales told about a shootgun that can burst dreams into reality... Well, no, to be honest, it's just a single succubus that illegally entered MacDude's room that tell that. Let's believe her! And off we go to a 2d arena shooter with movement bound to the recoil of your weapons!

4397400.title: Crop Meister
4397400.short_description: Farming simulator focused on crop growth and progression. Plant, nurture, and harvest a wide variety of crops, sell them to a merchant cart, and level up to unlock new plants, tools, and farm upgrades.

4397420.title: Your Quest: Tales of Orynthia
4397420.short_description: A classic CRPG where you explore a dark fantasy world, battle monsters in turn-based combat, and recruit companions to join your party. Choose your playstyle, level your character, and uncover the dangers threatening the realm. Make choices that will shape your own path as an adventurer.

4397430.title: Monster Girl Bodily Fluid Beverage Shop
4397430.short_description: One night, outside the office, you met an otherworldly catgirl delivery girl whose ears actually twitched. The moment you touched them, your life officially derailed.

4397500.title: The Others Will Join Shortly
4397500.short_description: A variation on classic memory game in horror setting. Cards can change, you have to stay focused, catching replaced card is a life or death situation. Play the cards. Track the changes. Survive the week. Collect your pay check.

4397510.title: Search for Sol
4397510.short_description: The children of long-extinct humanity desperately search for the legendary artifact system of Sol. Search for Sol is a sci-fi 4X in the tradition of Reach for the Stars, Master of Orion, and Star Traders. Control Sol for 50 years to ascend to flesh once again.

4397530.title: PolyGuildAdventurers
4397530.short_description: Experience the world at any scale! Fly as a tiny Pixie or dominate as a Half-Giant in this evolving VR RPG. Master 7 classes, 10 races, and random elemental affinities. An active work-in-progress where your perspective changes everything. Forge your legend today!

4397590.title: Orphic - The midnight shift
4397590.short_description: A first-person horror game focused on observation and endurance, where you work through a night shift by investigating disturbances and maintaining control as tension slowly builds.

4397730.title: Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming
4397730.short_description: ✨💖 Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming Click to collect hearts, unlock magical girl outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Enjoy playful teasing, colorful visuals, and charming reactions as Luna enchants her live stream!

4397780.title: Roll Together
4397780.short_description: Master the log with a friend! One rolls the left, the other rolls the right. Coordinate your moves in this physics-based co-op parkour to overcome treacherous obstacles. Simple to learn, hard to survive. Will you roll together to the top or fall into the abyss together?

4397880.title: ReEvolution Project
4397880.short_description: I ended up alone in a city full of those strange monsters. They killed my family, but I have to survive. One day, a man has found and shot me, but I'm not dead... How is this possible? I barricaded myself in an old, decaying house. It looks abandoned, but somehow feels alive. What is it hiding?

4397930.title: HotFix Protocol
4397930.short_description: HotFix Protocol is a cooperative sci-fi action game where you stabilize a failing industrial facility. Identify critical failures, locate tools, contain physical threats, and repair systems in real-time. Coordinate with your team to restore control room-by-room before the infrastructure collapses.

4398150.title: Ounus: Chapter One
4398150.short_description: Ounus is a unique sci-fi adventure, taking an immortal hero on a journey to discover who he is and why he is of great importance to a planet plagued with religious war and an invasion from a hostile alien force.

4398310.title: Misery Loves Company
4398310.short_description: It’s not the end of the world - it just feels that way. Explore an island full of tasks, temptations, and toxic devotion as you juggle survival, self-care, and your spouse’s ever-growing list of demands.

4398340.title: The Control Group
4398340.short_description: The Control Group is an online, 2D, multiplayer party game made for creating and bonding friends through fast-paced and fun minigames. Made as a school project, this game is willing to bring you both a competitive and collaborative gaming experience.

4398390.title: Uranium Wars: Apocalypse!
4398390.short_description: A fast paced action game with Zombies, Dinosaurs, Uranium Weaponery, Different Playable Characters, and More!

4398400.title: Meowker: Desktop Cat Companion
4398400.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4398400.short_description: This is a virtual cat on your computer desktop. It needs you to buy items for it. To buy these items, you need to earn coins by "working"—the game converts your detected keyboard keystrokes and mouse movement distance into corresponding coins. (no input information will be collected. )

4398440.title: Void Vow
4398440.short_description: Face endless hordes in this bullet hell! Choose from 41 characters and battle your way through 50 maps. The karma system is key: your actions control the evolution of your weapons. Will you shine as a holy warrior or devour the world as a dark lord?

4398490.title: Horizon 1990
4398490.short_description: Gather exotic resources, build defenses, research new technologies, and explore the mysteries of the void, all while being chased by the darkness from the end of time.

4398530.title: Myriad Realms: Ascend to Sage
4398530.short_description: An idle strategy RPG inspired by xianxia. Rise from Qi Refining to Sage, recruit heroes, master divine arts, forge gear, and conquer secret realms and endless waves. Rebirth for permanent bonuses and push your power beyond every limit.

4398550.title: LONG PIECE!
4398550.short_description: 开启一场始于流浪的恋爱之旅！是跟调皮不着调的野性女孩一起浪迹天涯，还是接受温柔美少女的好意重新回归正常生活？抑或是登上所有流浪汉的顶点，夺取传说中的大秘宝——浪 PIECE！这是一款多线恋爱视觉小说游戏，一切由你来决定！

4398710.title: TOMMYROT
4398710.short_description: A beloved children’s show character has a crisis of consciousness when the facade of his reality cracks and he peers into a darker truth. Vulnerable and alone for the first time, he stumbles forward into the unknown.

4398750.title: Keepwright
4398750.short_description: Every building you construct adds cards to your deck — a turn-based card strategy game that fuses deck-building, base-building, and tower defense. Choose your supporter, forge a fortress in the wilderness, and stand against the onslaught.

4398760.title: DIVEBOMB
4398760.short_description: What goes down must launch back up. Master momentum in DIVEBOMB, a chaotic platformer where falling is your fuel. Precision-dive through lethal gauntlets, defy gravity, and stay airborne at any cost!

4398770.title: Barking from the Dark
4398770.short_description: You’re on duty at crossing #13. Keep an eye on the tracks, repair the sleepers, open the barriers for trains, cars, and people. Something in the woods is barking… and it’s calling you.

4398850.title: Sorcery of Ruin, Sword, and Red Hood
4398850.short_description: Side-scrolling bullet hell shooter: ‘The Adventure of the Little Girl in the Red Hood and Little Bird Companion in a World of Swords and Magic!’ If you can read the enemy attacks and dodge the ones you should avoid, it might be surprisingly straightforward (All dodging them is perfectly fine too).

4399080.title: PapyPanic
4399080.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Racing, Early Access
4399080.short_description: Take the wheel as a reckless Senior in a high-stakes survival race! Dodge deadly barriers, grab the cash, and keep your engine from exploding. The catch? Your Twitch Chat triggers the traps in real-time. Can you survive the ultimate road rage?

4399100.title: Strata
4399100.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4399100.short_description: Strata is a scientifically inspired astro-planetary sandbox where you influence the formation and evolution of entire worlds — your worlds. Discover, gather, and build on the surfaces of diverse planets, explore them in depth, and manage your systems beyond the orbital levels.

4399670.title: Loop Her
4399670.short_description: Loop Her is a scrappy first-person survival rogue-like. Play as a high school cheerleader from 1997 trapped in a multiversal time loop by a cosmically imbued watch. Combine all the multiversal versions of yourself to escape. Things might have to get a little strange.

4399680.title: 水天之雾：不再离开(Mist of Sky and Water: Never Leave Again)
4399680.short_description: Mist of Sky and Water: Never Leave Again is a story-driven side-scrolling pixel RPG. In 21st-century reality, Fanka and his brother join the game via a mysterious email, awaken abilities to fight in an alternate dimension, solve puzzles and uncover secrets, with pixel art and upgradeable combat.

4399760.title: Plasma Dome
4399760.short_description: In Plasma Dome you must defend your city from an aerial assault by geometric entities arriving from another dimension. A tactical Tower Defense with roguelite progression, no predefined paths, only strategy and survival.

4399950.title: TOXIC PULSE
4399950.short_description: TOXIC PULSE is a relentless bullet hell survival FPS. No cover, no regeneration — just you and an escalating nightmare. Dodge diving aerial threats and crushing monoliths in a constantly evolving arena. Every wave demands perfect aim and lightning reflexes. Can you survive until Wave 10?

4400280.title: My Chronic Romance
4400280.short_description: On your 30th birthday—still single—your chronic diseases appear in beautiful form. Will you dare to fall in love with lovely afflictions that slowly consume you until your very last breath? An urban narrative adventure about living with—and loving—your pain.

4400540.title: Little Picnic
4400540.short_description: Little Picnic is a relaxing open-world adventure set on a peaceful rural island in South Korea’s southern sea. Spend your summer vacation at your grandmother’s home, explore the island freely, meet its residents, and relive the quiet magic of childhood summers.

4400590.title: Cat Idle
4400590.short_description: Cat Idle is a cozy incremental game where you collect coins, customize your kitten, and explore new areas of their world.

4400600.title: Posthuman: Guardians vs PSION
4400600.short_description: Time to save the world again! Join the Guardians, become a hero, and stop the evil P.S.I.O.N. from ruling the planet. A text-based interactive game.

4400660.title: Cookie Builder
4400660.short_description: Cookie Builder is a casual clicker game where you build a tycoon in a world made of cookies.

4400730.title: Desktop Pet Band
4400730.short_description: Welcome to Desktop Pet Band! A relaxing, heartwarming desktop idle collection game with adorable art. Form a cute animal band on your screen, gather fans, level up your stage. Your clicks become the beat of their passion. Raise your little buddies and let them sing—right on your desktop!

4400750.title: Cerulean Invasion: Aftermath
4400750.short_description: In the wake of Cerulean Invasion, our characters must confront what happened, reflect on the bonds they’ve built, and learn how to navigate life afterward.

4400830.title: Manapolatro
4400830.short_description: Experience a magical twist on a classic! Pick a race (Human, Troll, Vampire, or Wizard) to dominate the board. Use spells, cards, and casino games to bankroll your empire. Develop properties, buy booster packs, and tax your rivals in this 8-player chaotic strategy fest worthy of your time!

4400880.title: UnderRed
