4400880.short_description: UnderRed is a fast-paced first-person shooter featuring free-for-all combat for up to 8 players online. Switch between pistols, rifles, and snipers, use melee strikes, and fight to land the first kill. Play solo against AI or battle friends through Steam P2P networking.

4400900.title: Cursed Cargo
4400900.short_description: Cursed Cargo is an online co-op comedy-horror where the environment is as dangerous as the monsters. Team up with up to 4 players to transport unpredictable cargo using physics-based tools. Use proximity voice chat to coordinate, but be careful—the entities are always listening.

4401010.title: Tiger Commander
4401010.short_description: Command a platoon of Tiger tanks over the most famous theaters of WWII. Take the commander’s seat and give specific orders to your crew, or open the tactical map to coordinate your actions with accompanying units.

4401140.title: 荒古遗迹
4401140.short_description: A Warcraft-style roguelike loot-grinding game developed with the Spark Editor, featuring Campaign Mode, Trial Mode, and Tower Climbing Mode.

4401350.title: The Sound of the Conch in the Age of Declining Dharma: War of the Last Buddha's Relic
4401350.short_description: War erupted over the last Buddha Relic. In the land where Maitreya Bodhisattva is destined to descend and attain Buddhahood, Gesang lost all memory in an air raid. Doubting salvation itself, Gesang met Udum—same fate, rare disease, yet utter faith. They became inseparable as cruel reality closed in—

4401370.title: Skills & Raids
4401370.short_description: A party-based RPG with real-time, ability driven combat. Manage cooldowns and react to enemy mechanics. Loot and extract resources to complete quests and craft powerful gear. The world has fallen into the grasp of a corruption spreading creature. Combine skills to create unique builds.

4401660.title: Gorilla Simulator
4401660.short_description: Gorilla Simulator - Play with other gorillas, explore the map, participate in random events, collect bananas, hats and climb the mountain to collect Pineapple!

4401940.title: Slots and Stocks
4401940.short_description: Wall Street is a casino. Literally. In this trading sim, the stock market is controlled by a 5x3 slot machine. Spin to manipulate prices, fulfill high-stakes contracts, and pay back your investors before the repo man comes for your CRT monitor.

4402150.title: Lose My Mind
4402150.short_description: Lose My Mind is a precision pixel-art rage platformer where your victories come back to haunt you. Conquer 20 punishing levels across Forest and Winter biomes. Beware: every trap you survive is recorded. Can you survive your own success? (Early Access)

4402200.title: Project Tomorrow
4402200.short_description: A base-building survival game with terraforming and crafting. Earth lies poisoned and abandoned ten thousand years after invasion. Awaken from stasis, defend your fragile foothold, and restore a dead world so humanity can live here again.

4402820.title: WuLin Showdown
4402820.short_description: A turn-based combat game with deck-building elements. Enter the world of martial arts, a realm of flashing blades and fierce contests, and duel against all manner of warriors. Every step in battle, from your own moves to the enemy's actions, is dictated by your grand strategy.

4402950.title: HEXSTORM: Tears of Arcadia
4402950.short_description: HEXSTORM: Tears of Arcadia is a tactical tower defense with roguelike structure. Build your flying fortress, upgrade your ship, and combine powerful boosts. Every battle is unique. Uncover the mystery of the fallen captain.

4403000.title: 规则怪谈之必须逃脱
4403000.short_description: Players must collect rule slips in each scene, abide by their contents, and explore the game setting. The protagonist relives each story until breaking free from the vast cage of the "World of Rule Strangeness", resolving the inner demons and dilemmas of many.

4403030.title: Girl, Don’t Distract My Zombie Survival
4403030.short_description: This is a short visual novel game that combines zombie apocalypse survival with elements involving beautiful women. The story follows a male protagonist as he struggles to survive in a zombie-infested world while becoming romantically involved with beautiful women.

4403060.title: Ogaiva
4403060.short_description: Ogaiva is a 2.5D puzzle adventure. Steer your boat, explore islands, and solve logical puzzles of the ancients. Go fishing and look for clues to find a way out and escape the mysterious maritime zone.

4403160.title: The Guild Manager
4403160.short_description: “Recruit your team, forge a legendary guild!”In this unique management simulation, you won't play as a lone hero—you'll become a Guild Master, leading a group of flesh-and-blood, distinct personalities from rookies to conquerors of epic raids.

4403220.title: Neverpaw
4403220.short_description: Fight monsters, explore dungeons, and dive into a fun adventure in a 2D top-down world. Play solo or bring your best friend along in co-op — because every adventure is better together!

4403350.title: Nestify: Cozy Design
4403350.short_description: Nestify is a cozy sandbox room design and decorating game where you draw layouts, furnish interiors, and customize objects by adjusting colors, lighting, scale, and rotation. Create a relaxing atmosphere with music, weather, and scenic views. Chill and build your own nest.

4403450.title: Rontgard
4403450.short_description: A tense top-down post-apocalyptic survival shooter where every bullet, bandage, and inventory slot matters.

4403470.title: 日本史因果クロニクル
4403470.short_description: A deckbuilding card roguelike where you learn Japanese history by playing. Build powerful “Causal Combos” based on real historical relationships, and experience Japan’s historical flow from the Asuka period to the Bakumatsu era.

4403480.title: Kraken Cleaning
4403480.short_description: A short incremental game where you play as a Kraken who calls upon abyssal powers to clean the ocean.

4403560.title: Forefeathers
4403560.short_description: Forefeathers is an atmospheric story-adventure with puzzle elements! Experience a heartfelt story as the little penguin Bokki and his ghostly Grandma work together to solve light puzzles and rekindle the memories of her past.

4403670.title: A World To Come
4403670.short_description: A multivariate box-pushing puzzle game with a focus on managing parallel timelines. Splinter into many fragments, center yourself, and collapse outcomes to overcome obstacles.

4403710.title: Dorm Till Dawn 2
4403710.short_description: Can you survive a night in St Fiacre's at tiny size? This feature-length interactive visual novel returns to the world of Sensus Supra, with better visuals, dozens of animations, more complex puzzles and even more dangerous giantesses hunting for your blood. Every action has consequences...

4404060.title: Lead Coffin
4404060.short_description: A short horror game inside a claustrophobic WW1 tank. A monster out in the mustard gas fog stalks you. To survive you need to learn to pilot the tank and manage its systems as you race to safety…

4404080.title: Solitaire Holiday : Card Games
4404080.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4404080.short_description: Relax and unwind with Solitaire Holiday, a beautifully designed 2D card game featuring classic solitaire gameplay, smooth controls, and satisfying animations. Complete levels, sharpen your strategy, and enjoy a cozy, casual card experience anytime.

4404220.title: Pocket Aquarium
4404220.short_description: Pocket Aquarium is a cozy virtual pet simulator straight out of the 90s! Play minigames, earn money, and expand your collection of fish, tanks, and more!

4404350.title: Final Stand: Zombie Roguelite
4404350.short_description: Survive undead swarms in this action roguelite! Master fire skills, upgrade your Luck stat to draw Legendary cards, and find epic loot in chests. Battle evolving waves and defeat the final boss in the ultimate stand. Your destiny is in the cards. Can you survive the Final Stand?

4404420.title: Particle Storm
4404420.short_description: Particle Storm is challenging 2D run n gun blending bullet hell and shmup mechanics with striking pixel art, nonstop action, and an energetic soundtrack.

4404530.title: The Dungeon Dweller
4404530.short_description: Reverse the roles and claim your dungeon. Bait heroes into your lair with treasure, construct lethal defenses, and loot the remains of adventurers who never make it back out.

4404580.title: MOBU
4404580.short_description: Play as a monk wielding superpowers in this fast-paced arena shooter with roguelite elements. Survive waves of bouncy enemies raining from the skies as the challenge escalates. Buy upgrades and special abilities to create game-breaking builds and push back the chaos.

4404860.title: Val's Adventures at Scure Manor
4404860.short_description: Val’s Adventures at Scure Mansion is a witty point-and-click adventure. Players guide Val, stranded outside his home at 3 a.m., to explore the mansion, solve clever puzzles, interact with quirky characters, and use items in inventive ways to sneak inside and reach bed before the alarm rings.

4404880.title: Narball
4404880.short_description: Be a Narwhal. Hit a ball. Narball is a physics-based online e-sport designed for twin-stick controllers.

4405060.title: SpaceR
4405060.short_description: Players control a rocket, flying through aerial courses while avoiding rotating mechanisms and obstacles, aiming to reach ultimately make their way into space in this flight action game.

4405300.title: BATOUTTAHELL!
4405300.short_description: A minimal two-key action game where you weave through a torrent of fiery brimstone and even deadlier hazards to escape the infernal grasp of the underworld.

4405420.title: Slice Art Engine
4405420.genre: Indie, Simulation, Free To Play, Early Access
4405420.short_description: A cutting-edge physics engine delivering 100% accurate mesh slicing and voxel destruction. Implement MGR-style Blade Mode, realistic lightsaber carving, and precise damage calculation into any game. Built from scratch in C++ and optimized to run on mobile devices. Early Access available now.

4405550.title: They Came for Blood
4405550.short_description: They Came for Blood is a desk simulation game. Your goal is to make it through the month and make enough income to afford rent in your apartment. Greet donors at the blood bank, look at their ID to determine if they're good to donate blood, or secretly a vampire trying to bleed you dry

4405950.title: AVaOut
4405950.short_description: Scavenge for scarce fuel and gather clues left by the advance team to investigate the planet's potential for terraforming. Always stay alert for hostile lifeforms.

4406380.title: Oddslinger
4406380.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4406380.short_description: Craft packs. Tune card weights. Automate your deck engine. Build bigger hands, unlock new mechanics each Era, chase new records across Fantasy, 60–90s, and Neon—then Rewind to push beyond your limits.

4406500.title: Ferryman of Wangchuan: River of Delusion
4406500.short_description: First-person boat through the River of Wangchuan, lantern in hand—cut through the fog and chase scattered memory shards. You ferry a General toward the far shore, only to witness the massacre he committed to resurrect the Princess. In the end, who are you—the ferryman, or the General himself?

4406720.title: Alpha Genesis
4406720.short_description: Guide an evolving cosmic virus through a chaotic universe in this action roguelite. Infect cells, unlock 125 abilities, collect 255 cards and ascend infinitely unlocking new powers. Explore planets, trade cards with other players and build shared structures. WASD + mouse.

4406740.title: Clayton & Cayo
4406740.short_description: Journey up to the summit of Starfall Peak with your best friend Cayo, reminiscing on the past—and bonding along the way—in this emotional adventure game about friendship. And only friendship.

4407070.title: Your Own Constella
4407070.short_description: 「Your Own Constella」 is a relaxing game where you create your very own constellations in a real night sky. Using a star map based on real-world time and location, you can freely edit and place your favorite images—or choose from roughly 270 illustrations—as constellations.

4407510.title: Melting into Aoi’s World
4407510.short_description: A mild BL horror adventure where you explore a strange, beautiful mansion and follow Aoi’s emotional journey through mystery, soft horror, and quiet drama.

4407630.title: Swipe Swish
4407630.short_description: Master the art of the perfect shot in this physics-based arcade game. Use your mouse to control the angle and power of your arm, ensuring a "swish" from the free-throw line or all the way from the logo.

4407670.title: Vistrace
4407670.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4407670.short_description: Architect your ultimate build in VistRace, a vivid indie ARPG featuring a massive 500+ node passive tree and 21 Mastery classes. Experience survivor-style combat and deep crafting in a world that respects your time. No pay-to-win, no cash shops—just deep, complex fun.

4407770.title: Silent Click
4407770.short_description: A first-person psychological puzzle horror where you escape control using a TV remote. Explore surreal rooms filled with CRT televisions, switch channels to solve logic-based puzzles, and uncover a haunted smart home system that constantly observes you.

4408210.title: Crossline
4408210.short_description: You are an ecologist forced onto a sudden rescue mission inside a secret complex. Face parallel worlds and creatures unknown to science. Piece together the events that led to the tragic disaster and uncover the facility's dark secrets before the cold and madness consume you.

4408320.title: BATTLE BEARS GOLD
4408320.short_description: The ORIGINAL Mobile Multiplayer Shooting Game comes to PC! Compete with your friends across vibrant sci-fi maps across multiple game modes. Choose from 11 unique classes, with thousands of loadout combinations to master. We’ll see you on the battlefield in 2026!

4408630.title: Starshot Idle
4408630.short_description: Destroy Aliens, earn Stars, upgrade EVERYTHING. Blast enemies, power up your ship, unlock stronger aliens, and watch your Stars soar.

4408790.title: SKYBLITZ
4408790.short_description: Skyblitz is a fast-paced helicopter action game inspired by classic arcade shooters, set in a fragile post-collapse world. Engage in explosive missions, outmaneuver missile fire, and unravel a conspiracy that threatens to reignite global war.

4408830.title: Shellpress
4408830.short_description: Shellpress - A Rouge-like Top-down Shooter that lets you experience the events of the First world-war though the eyes of the allied nations. Experience ultra-violence fast paced combat similar to Hotline-Miami, combined with the Brutal hazards of the First world War.

4408870.title: Snowy Heaven
4408870.short_description: Angels greet you with smiles! Welcome to Heaven, where happiness awaits!

4408920.title: Spellblade: Vengeance of the Witch Sisters
4408920.short_description: A retro-classic fantasy RPG inspired by Ultima, Might & Magic, Wasteland, and other classic CRPGs of the 80s and 90s. Featuring a branching narrative, non-combat skills and puzzles, turn-based combat, character customization, and dynamic NPC interactions.

4408940.title: Pocket Pilot
4408940.short_description: Pocket Pilot is a love letter to those 90s arcade flight games. Pilot planes, helicopters, and drones to complete cleaning and exploration missions across a wonderful island. Master three unique flight styles and discover secrets at your own pace in this relaxing aerial adventure.

4408970.title: Tetrarchon
4408970.short_description: Tetrarchon is a turn-based strategy card battler blending custom deck construction with tactical area control. Construct your deck and command units across a diamond-shaped battlefield in deterministic combat against the AI or in 1v1 multiplayer. Win by securing the key locations.

4408990.title: Major Mutt
4408990.short_description: A 3D, action roguelike, bullet heaven game where you play as a dog with weapons attached to your harness to defeat hordes of giant spiders and save sheep

4409030.title: Midnight Food Truck
4409030.short_description: You run an old food truck in the "Gray Zone," where rumored "Pseudo-Humans" mimic or replace humans. Judge customers through dialogue—not appearance—to decide whether to serve them. Your choices uncover truths and shape multiple endings in this narrative-driven game.

4409050.title: Escape from Junglekov
4409050.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4409050.short_description: Use limited resources to try to acquire more equipment, and then continuously explore the scene to survive.

4409310.title: Runes & Rivets
4409310.short_description: Runes & Rivets is a steampunk magitech deckbuilder where you run a workshop for 20 turns. Generate gears, metal, mana, and gold to build a crafting engine, forge products, boost them with rune engravings, then sell for big profit.

4409320.title: Money Under the Bed
4409320.short_description: You complained to a strange roadside statue about being broke—and the next day, a jar of money appeared under your bed. How do you plan to spend this windfall? Of course, you’re free to squander every cent... as long as you can survive until tomorrow.

4409350.title: Number 21 - Death Deal
4409350.short_description: Number 21, nicknamed the "Death Deal," draw cards to reach number 21. Going beyond number 21 has dire consequences, so be extremely careful in your decisions. There are also cards that can help you; be sure to use them appropriately.

4409360.title: A Lucky Hunt With : Sora
4409360.short_description: Embark on a sensual ladybug-hunting adventure with Sora, an attractive young woman. In this hidden object game, explore each location to discover what lies beneath Sora's enticing layers.

4409430.title: Velocide Overdrive
4409430.short_description: Velocide Overdrive is a brutal, fast-paced game with 70+ power-ups. Invite your friends to play for free: one copy is all it takes to ruin friendships and dominate the chaos. Only one rule matters: don't finish last!

4409610.title: Toybox Havoc: Arcade Combat Racing
4409610.short_description: This isn't a race; it’s a showdown. Speed isn't enough—wipe rivals off the table! Turn toy cars into weapons, drift on kitchen counters, and whether against AI or friends online, be the champion who crosses the finish line in one piece.

4409650.title: Hillside: Part One - Fractured Lives
4409650.short_description: A character-driven adult visual novel centred on deep relationships and emotional storytelling. Experience a grounded, dramatic narrative that builds attachment through character development, intimacy, and evolving personal bonds.

4409780.title: HUA-Z
4409780.genre: Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4409780.short_description: You need to survive wave after wave of zombie hordes with your teammates. There are characters with various abilities to choose from. Cooperate with each other and upgrade equipment to try to survive longer.

4409790.title: 4Spicchi
4409790.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4409790.short_description: The 4Spicchi pizzeria is under attack by terrifying food-monsters, and only Margherita can stop them. How? Using their ingredients... and a little bit of science!

4409860.title: Clock Shooter
4409860.short_description: Rotate time to control the battlefield. Turn time clockwise or counterclockwise, manage enemy positions, and defeat monsters using limited attacks at 12 and 6 o’clock in this 3D roguelike turn-based defense game.

4409870.title: Slots & Diapers
4409870.short_description: Absurd incremental game where you turn liquid assets into financial glory! Spin for jackpots, buy better machines, and hire seniors who ignore every 'accident' to keep the reels turning. Get perma-upgrades and spent diapers for infinite riches. Simple. Messy. Addictive.

4409890.title: Weather Roll
4409890.short_description: Weather Dice is a turn-based roguelike deckbuilder. Wield rare Mana to awaken unique, charming plant girls, fend off monster hordes across four seasons. Use Weather Dice to rewind time, change weather, turn the tide in despair, and defend your last home!

4410020.title: Witherspring Wilds
4410020.short_description: Witherspring Wilds is an open world life sim that goes beyond any you have seen before. With boundless options - farming, mining, crafting, building, combat, exploration, alchemy, creature taming and more - how will you shape the world?

4410220.title: Kicking Upwards
4410220.short_description: Kicking Upwards is an experimental, skill-based physics game where you kick a red ball up a mountain. Hit every gong and unlock every animal along the route. How high can you get Kicking Upwards?

4410400.title: Coffee Shop: Daily Shift
4410400.short_description: In Coffee Shop: Daily Shift, meet new customers each day, brew orders fast, and grow your café. Keep quality high during rush hour, upgrade equipment, manage baristas, and build the best coffee shop in town.

4410540.title: The Orgasm Officer
4410540.short_description: The Orgasm Officer is a candid visual novel for adults. A routine noise complaint turns into a story where a police officer becomes not just a guardian of law and order, but a man who knows how to bring a woman to orgasm with a single touch, glance, or voice.

4410610.title: Pixel Forge
4410610.short_description: Pixel Forge is a puzzle game where you connect nodes to input pixel art to recreate the target pixel art.

4410640.title: Crimson Broadcast
4410640.short_description: Survive relentless enemy waves by broadcasting on risky frequencies. Upgrade, adapt, and defend your radio station in this post-apocalyptic top-down survival game.

4410680.title: Rites & Receipts
4410680.short_description: Clock in at the Dark Magic Federation. As a ritual clerk, you must verify public requests, consult the manual, and process the paperwork for a world of petty hexes. Stamp requests, catch counterfeits, and avoid costly compliance fines. The quota is rising. Work starts now.

4410790.title: The Fibrous - Operation Reclaim
4410790.short_description: The Fibrous - Sci-Fi Online or Single-Player TPS (Over-The-Shoulder) covering the story of an ex-marine recruited by what's left of the military to help take back Earth after a meteor crash-lands into Earth and aliens with fiber-like skin emerge, thinking they can take this planet for their own.

4410870.title: Mech EVO
4410870.short_description: Engage, vanquish, obliterate. Mech EVO is a fast-paced tactical card game where every Mech has an evolution path — and knowing when to trigger it wins the duel. 160 cards, zero microtransactions.

4410890.title: Oh Ship!
4410890.short_description: OH SHIP! is a 1–4 player co-op space survival game where you and your crew coordinate to keep your ship running while space actively tries to destroy it. Salvage wrecks, fix systems, upgrade your ship, and survive the chaos.

4410900.title: Bad Actor
4410900.short_description: Bad actor is a casual puzzle game where you play as a casting director creating unique performances!

4410920.title: Defective Detectives
4410920.short_description: This city fears me. I saw its true face... And it smelled like sawdust. Welcome to the world of pretentious film noir, where it rains even indoors, and cool guys don't look at explosions (because they forgot to wear sunglasses).

4410950.title: ExoLife Terrarium Simulator
4410950.short_description: They hunt, they grow, they change. Care for multiple aliens in a single terrarium, fill it with plants and gear, and keep light and environment in balance. Every reproduction yields Exobiotin, a valuable protein. Keep control, or they may break out.

4410980.title: Backburner
4410980.short_description: Cook, serve, and manage your food truck while exploring a handcrafted open world. Upgrade your equipment, unlock new recipes, and turn your small food truck into a thriving business.

4411000.title: Amer: The Chase Hit and Run
4411000.short_description: Run, drive & race! Find wild surprises with Amer , jump into a huge open world where the whole city is yours. In Amer Hit N Run, you’re free to explore different neighborhoods, from busy streets to wide open desert. Drive cars, run on foot, or just roam around.

4411060.title: Push Pray Devote
4411060.short_description: A simple short horror game that requires no gaming skills.It takes around one hour to unlock all achievements. No jump scares.No chase sequences.No screen shaking effects. Controls are limited to WASD and left click only. Discover multiple hidden endings and unlock all achievements.

4411080.title: KPOP SCOUT
4411080.short_description: You are a K-Pop manager dominating the charts! Duel a rival to win 8 stunning idols' hearts with lavish gifts and sponsorships. Draw shared cards, unleash 5 sly actions to outsmart them, secure deals, and forge hits. Majority per idol claims her—first to 5 or 15+ hype points triumphs!

4411090.title: SCP: Pale Weaver
4411090.short_description: SCP: Pale Weaver is a 2D pixel-art action-adventure. Play as a runaway anomaly: grapple with tentacles, fire silk tethers, and slow time to outrun lockdowns. Death resets the loop—your memory remains, driving you to the Endgame.

4411110.title: To The Deep
4411110.short_description: Dive into a surreal deep sea dream. Survive by devouring and evolving, and encounter a cast of strange, mysterious companions. Explore, upgrade, and uncover the "truth" hidden beneath the beautiful waves. This is more than an adventure—it is a dimension-breaking dive to the deep.

4411140.title: The Area 51 Job
4411140.short_description: An online co-op adventure game about aliens making off with gadgets created using extraterrestrial technology. The anti-alien alarm can't stop all of us! Use physics-based objects to create havoc and extract with these powerful gadgets.

4411160.title: Babysitter
4411160.short_description: Take the role of child who has to escape the house by outsmarting the babysitter. You have to solve puzzles without getting caught in order to escape

4411190.title: Flower Planet
4411190.short_description: A game about farming flowers on an empty planet.

4411200.title: 无极之境:放置
4411200.short_description: The Infinite Realm: Idle is a cultivation-themed idle RPG. auto-battle, and grow through endless reincarnations with permanent % stat boosts. Collect hundreds of gear pieces, forge your build, and raise spirit pets. Challenge core realms for Dao Source. Idle cultivation, freely attain the Tao.

4411230.title: Oasis RTS
4411230.short_description: Regain control of planet oasis and defeat your opponent! Build your base, monitor the economy, manage your resources, explore the Map, and plan attack and defense. Build 9 different buildings and 19 different units with various abilities and win the chaotic Robot Battles.

4411310.title: Climb to the Moon
4411310.short_description: Build a tower from everything on earth and climb to the MOON, solo or 4 player co-op!

4411380.title: Hon Cars
4411380.short_description: Hon Cars is an open world game with a TPS character that contains many cars, planes, you can build your own house, and many other interesting things. The game has detailed graphics and a very large map.

4411400.title: Luna Drift
4411400.short_description: Welcome to Luna Drift, get in your car and let's drift, let's do legendary drifts on a very large and detailed map. We have a lot of tuned cars for drifting. The cars are very detailed with many functions

4411610.title: COALCOM: Power Station
4411610.short_description: Operate a 300 MW coal power station from a retro CRT terminal. Manage boiler pressure, drum water level, coal feed, and cooling while responding to grid demands and equipment failures. Systems cascade—change one thing, three others respond. Keep the lights on. Keep your job.

4411690.title: Velanit: The Forgotten Cottage
4411690.short_description: Restore an abandoned Mediterranean cottage and uncover the story of its previous owner. Gather resources, craft supplies, befriend villagers, and piece together a mystery that might be more real than anyone believes.

4411800.title: GUTZ
4411800.short_description: GUTZ is a hyper-violent, high-speed FPS. Kill faster, score higher.

4412220.title: Humans vs Aliens BattleWorlds
4412220.short_description: A turn-based tactical strategy game set in a sci-fi war between Humans and Aliens. Command units on a hex grid battlefield, control strategic zones, and outmaneuver your opponent in PvE or PvP combat.

4412280.title: Run of the Lost
4412280.short_description: Descend into a cursed dungeon, overcome deadly obstacles, and uncover its secrets in a precision-focused first-person parkour challenge.

4412590.title: Neofold
4412590.short_description: The idle creature-collector where each pet is uniquely yours, generated live by your GPU. Discover endless weirdos, adopt the ones you love, and grow a living sanctuary of species that exist only on your desktop.

4412920.title: Pompadour Panic: Bunny Bravo vs Slick McStoat
4412920.short_description: Help the pompadour donning Bunny Bravo in his quest to make pomade for his date. In this light hearted cute and casual Action RPG. Partake in a variety of minigames in order to complete the goal of making pomade while keeping an eye out for the sneaky Slick McStoat from taking your pomades.

4412960.title: 光与影之恋 Chiaroscuro Lovers
4412960.short_description: A story-driven visual novel about psychological trauma and memory.In a world where reality, dreams, and recollections intertwine, face what you once lost—but never truly said goodbye to.

4412970.title: DroPlaying!
4412970.short_description: 迫りくる機関車のプレッシャーに耐えながら、線路をつなげるブロックパズルゲーム。降ってくる線路を動かしたり、回転させたりしながら組み合わせ、とにかく長い距離を走らせ続けよう！機関車のスピードは徐々に早くなっていき、線路を組み合わせる難易度も上がっていくぞ！

4413050.title: DeadEndGram
4413050.short_description: Trade your time for the ultimate loot grind. Equip powerful gear, stabilize a collapsing timeline, and reset your existence for permanent buffs. From Worn Artifacts to game-breaking Exotics, DeadEndGram is a 1-man passion project for the 3,000-hour Guardian. Cheat codes included.

4413120.title: LEXITRIS
4413120.short_description: Lexitris is the ultimate word puzzle! Experience an addictive blend of Tetris and typing tutor. Type falling words, clear rows with strategic bombs, and master modes like Math or Speed Typing. Available in 12 languages!

4413210.title: Tachyon Flow
4413210.short_description: Run around, traverse obstacle courses, and weave through environments creatively in this third person parkour runner!

4413370.title: Drug Farmer Simulator
4413370.short_description: Build your underground business from scratch 🌱 Start with a few seedlings and turn a small hidden grow room into a thriving empire. Grow, produce, manage your shop and economy, and make every decision count in this atmospheric management simulator 🌙

4413440.title: PANICOOK
4413440.short_description: A chaotic co-op cooking game set in a space restaurant! Work together with up to 4 players to serve cosmic cuisine as fast as possible…Wait— is there a traitor among you?!

4413500.title: Cut Corner Renovations USSR
4413500.short_description: 🛠️ Cut Corner Renovations USSR is about repairing old Soviet apartments and houses with limited resources. Patch walls, fix wiring, replace floors, and improvise on a tight budget. Every task tests your ingenuity 🏚️⚡

4413580.title: Echoes of Midnight
4413580.short_description: Bound. Dressed. Displayed. A serial killer's ritual has begun — and you're the centerpiece. Use silence as your weapon, solve the killer's twisted puzzle, and escape before midnight. Play solo, survive together in co-op, or become the hunter in versus mode.

4413860.title: Seeker Shrine
4413860.short_description: Relaxing, cozy and slow paced farm simulator where you collect creatures and build your own ranch. Seekers keep you company while you work, study or just chill on your PC. Collect Orbs to get eggs which hatch new creatures. Decorate the shrine with trees & plants, which offer food for your Seekers.

4413920.title: Dungeon Breaker
4413920.short_description: Slash your way through endless dungeons full of enemies and grow incredibly powerful! Grab loot, equip it, level up, unlock abilities and upgrade to create your unique build as you crawl your way through those dungeons!

4414010.title: Where are the Fish?
4414010.short_description: A short exploration game about driving around in a truck to find fish in the desert.

4414050.title: Teach Kids Math
4414050.short_description: Learning feels like play as children work through small math challenges at their own speed. They practice numbers, comparisons, and basic equations, then watch easy step-by-step answers that explain the idea in a way kids can follow.

4414080.title: Small Town Filled With Cats
4414080.short_description: Small Town Filled With Cats is a cozy hidden object game where every corner of a charming, hand-drawn town is hiding cats. Explore five whimsical illustrated scenes, spot playful animations, and uncover all the sneaky felines tucked away in this delightful small town. 🐾

4414250.title: Sisters in Sin 🔞
4414250.short_description: Sisters in Sin is an adult visual novel where you play as the Demon of Lust disguised as a preacher. Manipulate schedules, uncover hidden desires, corrupt sacred vows, and turn a holy monastery into a place of temptation. 18+

4414420.title: Echoes of a Thread
4414420.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4414420.short_description: Echoes of a Thread is a free indie RPG inspired by classic 2D fantasy… with a quiet meta layer that slowly reveals itself. You’ll explore a broken world, face difficult boss fights, and collect journal pages that piece together the truth.

4414430.title: Spell Alchemist
4414430.short_description: Dig to collect resources and process them to craft spells in this cozy resource-gathering and building game with incremental progression. Craft the most powerful healing spell to cure your dog of a mysterious disease.

4414450.title: The Dark Path to the Black Tower
4414450.short_description: Anomaly horror with a dark fantasy theme. Traverse a cursed forest on a stormy night. If you see signs of witchcraft, turn back... Else you remain trapped on the path for eternity...

4414460.title: Greedy Little Kingdoms
4414460.short_description: A bureaucratic short run roguelike city builder where you try and survive king’s moods and misbehaving constituents. Negotiate with them because the list of demands will never end. Everything wants something from you. Always. Failure is expected, the world resets, nobody seems to mind.

4414480.title: Logissey
4414480.short_description: A top-down puzzle game where you explore a dense interconnected island trying to find your way home. Solve puzzles in your path by guiding boulders, luring bulls, raising and lowering walls and much more! Enjoy the cozy hand-drawn graphics and wildlife but beware -not everything here means you well!

4414650.title: Ashes of the Belt
4414650.short_description: Blast through alien-infested space in a modern top-down shooter built for quick runs and big upgrades. Mine planets for resources, unlock talents, and team up with voiced companions—no inventory management, just pure action between the shop and the fight.

4414660.title: Astro Runner
4414660.short_description: A fast-paced 2D space shooter with random enemy waves, unique bosses, power-ups, and global high scores. Every run is different—how far will you get on your hunt through the galaxy? Can you make it to the top of the high score list?

4414820.title: Peppermint Academy
4414820.short_description: A cozy western bara visual novel with RPG combat, where you can mix-and match a party of diverse relatable characters, and customize them. Peppermint Academy is a strange school that brings together humans, demons, and angels from many different worlds.

4414900.title: Zero To Hero Idle
4414900.short_description: A pixel art idle RPG built for pure progression. Defeat monsters, find Mythic gear, and automate your ascent from Squire to King. Build your village, prestige for massive multipliers, and watch numbers soar. No fluff, just deep incremental strategy.

4414910.title: BLACK ART
4414910.short_description: BLACK ART is an art-driven action-adventure game set in a dystopian world. Blending Cyberpunk, Steampunk, and Ruinpunk, you play as a rebel artist defying authority by hanging posters and spraying graffiti. Leave your artistic mark amidst rusty ruins and neon lights!

4414980.title: The Soul of Romit
4414980.short_description: The Soul of Romit is a first-person shooter inspired by classics like Doom and Hexen, featuring endless levels of action and ever-changing environments.

4415010.title: Navtorio
4415010.short_description: A competitive orienteering game featuring Sprint and Indoor disciplines. Race against friends in multiplayer, analyze your route choices with post-race analytics, and design your own courses by placing barriers and checkpoints on photorealistic maps.

4415030.title: Star Splitters
4415030.short_description: Design and command a fleet of space warships in a 3D Real-time Strategy game. Customise each of your ships with a wide range of weapons and upgrades. Complete contracts for each of the five factions to gain access to their ships and arsenal. Take control of your ships in 3 dimensional naval combat.

4415040.title: CatCha
4415040.short_description: Discover CatCha! Decorate rooms in the cat castle and play to earn more furniture and animals. Enter the contest, be strategic, and luck will be on your side!

4415290.title: Five Feet
4415290.short_description: Early Access — A solo-developed 5v5 futsal game with retro style, power-ups, and chaotic FFA modes. No rules. No refs. Just goals.

4415380.title: Market is Fine
4415380.short_description: Market is Fine is a management sim where you pretend “everything’s okay” while the world burns outside. Stock shelves, follow economic news, profit from crises—or heed your conscience. The register may be full; lost humanity won’t return. Market’s fine… but your conscience?

4415460.title: Royal Flush Defense
4415460.short_description: Royal flush defense is a unique blend of Poker and Tower Defense, combining the luck component of Poker with strategic gameplay of Tower Defense, with a splash of roguelike. Play Poker to spawn towers, merge them to create your defense, and stop waves of enemies.

4415810.title: Dreamscape
4415810.genre: Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4415810.short_description: An absurd, dreamy puzzle game about navigating anxieties for the future.

4415820.title: Sghetti Fighter
4415820.short_description: A traditional 1v1 indie fighter that takes place in the Sghetti Universe. Play as characters from The Sauce Monsters, and Freddy Sghetti, with more characters coming soon! Combos, air fighting, and special moves make this a fun, strategic game. Play online with friends too!

4415850.title: Grimorium
4415850.short_description: Grimorium is a spell-crafting roguelike built in a custom micro-voxel engine where every voxel is simulated and destructible. Craft spells, manipulate materials, and explore procedurally generated dungeons in a world that reacts to every action.

4415880.title: The Family Trip
4415880.short_description: An 13-year-old boy travels with his parents to a cabin in a remote area for a short trip. During their stay, they explore the surroundings, visit a nearby abandoned house, and spend their evenings at the cabin. The trip does not continue as planned.

4415920.title: Lovely Anime Puzzle: Spring
4415920.short_description: Lovely Anime Puzzle: Spring is a fun and rewarding puzzle game. Assemble charming Spring-themed pictures, sharpen your attention, and immerse yourself in a beautiful world.

4416020.title: Food Factory Coop: Build, Cook, Craft
4416020.short_description: Food Factory Coop is a chaotic food coop game where players build, cook, and craft together in a shared food factory. Work together in co-op to produce food, manage machines, and survive the madness of cooking food together in multiplayer coop.
developers: Food Factory Coop: Build, Cook, Craft
publishers: Food Factory Coop: Build, Cook, Craft

4416040.title: 功夫Online
4416040.short_description: 「功夫Online」是一款角色扮演冒险游戏，免费开玩。 游戏特色： 1，万法皆修·功夫自由； 2，自动战斗·操作自由； 3，自动挂机·托管自由； 4，自动寻路·跨地图畅行； 5，穿越金手指·逆天改命。

4416090.title: Darkness Up North
4416090.short_description: A psychological horror game set in the remote Canadian wilderness. Explore a lonely cabin, uncover disturbing secrets, and question your sanity as the forest twists reality. You came for peace—but something in the mountains won’t let you leave.

4416100.title: The Twilight Hour Protocol
4416100.short_description: Race back home before time runs out in this retro-style sci-fi 3D rail-shooter. Manage your speed, deploy your defenses, and fight off waves of enemies as you utilize the scrap from their ships to power your own.

4416130.title: ジャリネスハートPro
4416130.short_description: ジャリネスハートPro カード種類300以上のカードバトルアドベンチャー

4416140.title: COLD HUSK
4416140.short_description: A research station spans the Moon's surface, humanity's last monument to forbidden DNA experimentation. Read the final thoughts of deceased crew members, uncover a species-ending catastrophe, and navigate cold metallic corridors using only terminal commands. In COLD HUSK, knowledge is power.

4416160.title: JIN
4416160.short_description: JIN is a modern traditional strategy board game where every move matters. Combine pieces to grow stronger, outplay your opponent, and capture your way to victory.

4416180.title: Furry Tales: A Roguelike RPG
4416180.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4416180.short_description: Gather your party of warriors and embark on a journey to defeat the sorcerer and his followers in a medieval Roguelike RPG world.

4416220.title: Chickenman
4416220.short_description: An animated interactive movie —a romance thriller strategy FMV game— featuring over 400 plot branches and more than 40 unique endings. Supports voice and subtitles in Korean, English, and Chinese. Depending on your choices, you may become wealthy, a true romantic, end up in prison or even face death

4416230.title: AKASHA
4416230.short_description: Welcome to AKASHA. This zen-puzzle platformer will have you questioning you every move. Discover the abilities of the Soul Sphere, solve abstract puzzles, and reunite the Lost Eidolons to reconstruct the pieces of your inner self.

4416290.title: Clawmarks Purrsuit - Early Access
4416290.short_description: Unleash your inner hero in Clawmarks Purrsuit! As knight-errant Leo Clawmarks, battle through a trap-filled castle to topple an evil rat army and reclaim Mouse Town. The purr-suit of justice begins!

4416330.title: Misfit Company
4416330.short_description: Lead a squad of specialists deep behind enemy lines in a gritty, boots-on-the-ground struggle to dismantle the enemy's war machine from the inside out. Face down engines of war, all in an effort to stop the launch of a mechanical abomination that threatens to reshape the continent.

4416360.title: Bunker Rats
4416360.short_description: A close third-person co-op PvPvE extraction game set entirely underground. No guns. Just you, your team, and a concrete labyrinth full of loot, hazards, and other players who want your stuff. Gear up, deploy into shared complexes with up to 12 players, and try to extract before you die.

4416460.title: Too Many Flies
4416460.short_description: Too Many Flies is an incremental game about exterminating many many flies, exploring a mysterious house and getting that sweet sweet cash.

4416700.title: Chop Chop Grove
4416700.short_description: Welcome to Chop Chop Grove! Chop trees. Hire lumberjacks. Spend your lumber on powerful upgrades. Discover the world across 5 unique islands. A cozy incremental game where tiny workers chop, slash, and shoot their way through forests, while you sit back and watch your pile of lumber grow.

4416710.title: 国王棋 KING'S CHESS
4416710.short_description: Awaken your army! King's Chess blends RTS strategy with board game depth. In fast 15-minute matches, focus on deck building and physics, not tedious clicking. Smash defenses and manipulate the environment. No numbers game here—just pure physical warfare.

4416730.title: The Curse in the Village - Remastered
4416730.short_description: The 2015 mobile horror classic with 2 million downloads is back, reimagined for PC! Witness your own dark ritual, solve the mysteries of a cursed village, and outrun a colossal celestial demon. Experience a surreal journey where reality shatters and every shadow hides a curse.

4416770.title: Yaoguai  Compendium
4416770.short_description: Yaoguai Compendium is a strategic roguelike idle game featuring equipment synthesis, build crafting, and tower climbing. It delivers a light-paced, casual experience while offering solid strategic.A strange Yaoguai aura suddenly sweeps across Shenzhou. Cultivation sects march out to roam the world.

4416850.title: LampMan!
4416850.short_description: LampMan! is a fast-paced 2D platformer featuring three playable characters you can switch between at any time. Master their abilities, conquer vibrant levels, and restore light to LampWorld!

4416860.title: Apartment203:HongKong
4416860.short_description: "Apartment 203:HongKong" is a first-person horror adventure game set in the urban landscape of Hong Kong. The story follows a young man who arrives at his sister's residence to uncover the truth behind her mysterious disappearance. His journey takes a bizarre due to a series of unexpected events....

4416900.title: 舔狗三年
4416900.short_description: Cringer's Rise is a visual novel game.Players advance the story through exploration and choices, unlock achievements, and team up with the secret Pavilion Master of the Zhou Clan Army.Together you crush the imperial power of the Yan Kingdom, and experience the ultimate thrill of combat.

4416960.title: Night Clerk
4416960.short_description: Night Clerk is a first-person psychological horror experience set in a quiet roadside motel. Monitor CCTV cameras, answer late-night calls, and uncover subtle anomalies as long stretches of silence slowly give way to unsettling patterns.

4417080.title: They Left in a Hurry: A Hidden Object Home
4417080.short_description: Explore a home left in a hurry and uncover cleverly hidden items scattered among forgotten belongings. Restore each room to order in this calm, classic hidden object experience with no timers and no pressure.

4417110.title: 英雄荣光医院
4417110.short_description: “Hero Hospital” is a classic hospital management game: send in undercover agents and fake patient brokers, unleash dogs to cause crashes and chaos, dump trash and throw bombs, and even head into outbreak zones to fight viruses. The gameplay can be expanded endlessly.

4417340.title: Bunny Factory
4417340.short_description: This is an action and puzzle-solving game. Players take control of a zookeeper to assign adorable bunnies to storks, who will send them all over the world. This job is far from easy—especially when you have to make sure the bunnies don’t start fighting with each other…

4417350.title: Another Dead World
4417350.short_description: Another Dead World is a simulation-driven game where the world lives on its own. NPCs trade resources, shape the economy, and react to events. The player enters a living system that can grow, collapse, or be left to die.

4417370.title: Blind Crest Rally
4417370.short_description: A physics-driven rally game with realistic handling and procedurally generated stages that keep every run fresh.

4417400.title: Bloomvale: Bouquets & Scents
4417400.short_description: Bloomvale: Bouquets & Scents is a cozy 2D game where you grow flowers, craft beautiful bouquets, and blend fragrant perfumes for your customers. A relaxing experience focused on gentle progression, creativity, and cozy daily routines. 🌸🌿

4417410.title: Rush B: Esports Manager
4417410.short_description: Take control of a fps esports team and lead them from underdogs to world champions. Scout talent, develop players, manage personalities, and adapt your strategy in a deep, realism-driven management sim. Are you ready to break records and leave your mark on the esports world?

4417490.title: 几何防线 Geo Defense
4417490.short_description: Geometric Defense is a top-down tower defense survival game that seamlessly blends minimalist aesthetics with deep strategic gameplay. In this unforgiving world of lines and polygons, you are no longer just a remote commander—you are the final guardian at the heart of the battlefield.

4417620.title: Good Catch!
4417620.short_description: Good Catch! is a relaxing fishing game about cozy fishing spots, rare catches, small quests and friendly characters you unlock along the way.

4417720.title: AI Desk Pet
4417720.short_description: More than a cute pet, this is your versatile AI desktop agent. Supports long-term memory, voice, and multimodal vision. It searches the web, safely executes Python code, and manages files. Features continuous agent logic, music management,and custom Live2D/voice support

4417800.title: Airline CEO
4417800.short_description: Build your airline empire! A comprehensive management simulation featuring 40,000+ real airports and 250+ aircraft models. Manage flights in real-time in a 3D interactive world, train staff, and grow your reputation. From the runway to the boardroom, you are in control

4417840.title: The Book of Prosperity
4417840.short_description: Experience a story-rich Hong Kong-inspired urban fantasy where every frame-perfect parry counts. Master kinetic flow combat and parkour across twin worlds. Join Cyrus in uncovering the secrets of The Circle.

4417890.title: Mercury Elopement Syndrome
4417890.short_description: Short visual novel. A 24-hour romance at its worst; a 24-hour escape at its sweetest.

4418020.title: Deck paper scissors
4418020.short_description: It's rock paper scissors, but as an incremental roguelike deck builder.

4418050.title: Lang Ops: Lost in Woods
4418050.short_description: You've got lost in the forest in the original series? This time you might get even more lost! In this spin-off, you encounter one of thirty three European languages. You need to pick appropriate words to find the correct path. The woods won't let you get out this easily.

4418180.title: Valkyrie Wave
4418180.short_description: Intense first-person shooter where five legendary Valkyries battle endless waves of enemies using unique supernatural abilities and glowing auras.

4418240.title: Forsaken Kingdom
4418240.short_description: A dark fantasy roguelite-strategy RPG where you lead a medieval expedition through a world consumed by darkness. Command your squad and manage your field camp, choose your path through perilous lands, face terrifying monsters and powerful bosses in your struggle to return alive.

4418400.title: Elegy of the Vast Land
4418400.genre: Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4418400.short_description: Rewrite history with LLMs and natural language. Command any figure through dynamic AI events: type custom orders or choose your path. Deploy characters for AI-calculated outcomes and expand across a lat-long grid. With RAG tech, the world remembers your legacy. From 1644 and beyond.

4418470.title: CHEATED
4418470.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4418470.short_description: Cheat your friends to make them fall. ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ You are tiny. Reach the attic. It's easy.ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ 2-8 players.ㅤㅤㅤㅤ

4418640.title: Super Dungeon Scoundrel
4418640.short_description: SUPER DUNGEON SCOUNDREL is a casual card battler based on the single-player card game, Scoundrel. Fight monsters. Equip weapons. Run away. Can you reach the end of the dungeon and collect your reward.

4418770.title: Snack Smasher
4418770.short_description: An incremental game all about smashing fruits and snacks! Upgrade your smasher, unlock new power-ups, and enjoy the pleasure of smashing everything in your path!

4418860.title: patiOS
4418860.short_description: Step into the 2000s with the support of Stellar's patiOS, and explore a hand-crafted internet! Featuring a new, slick, user interface, exploring the internet and managing your personal workspace has never been easier with Stellar!

4418900.title: SHAWA
4418900.short_description: A typical shawarma stand. But the game notices where you're looking... and what you're ignoring. Endless shifts, a physics simulator, and a horror that only happens when you're not prepared.

4418940.title: Roten
4418940.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4418940.short_description: ROTEN is an open-world survival experience set in a world slowly reclaimed by decay. Explore abandoned places, where silent points of interest hide fragments of forgotten stories, face the infected, and survive in a quiet, hostile environment.

4418990.title: Damnation84
4418990.short_description: Damnation84 is a fast-paced FPS game that uses impulse and propulsion weapons as a means of movement and combat. In this devastated world, eliminate enemies in sequence and complete the levels before your oxygen runs out. You are the last hope, survive and cause damnation.

4419110.title: DAM IT
4419110.short_description: DAM IT! is an online co-op physics and destruction game. You and up to 8 friends are mischievous beavers with a simple mission: Destroy the evil corporation that has invaded your forest! Harvest wood, build dams and redirect rivers to create raging floods and wreck the corporations property!

4419120.title: TougeMaker: Blind Entry
4419120.short_description: TougeMaker: Blind Entry is a sandbox racing game capturing the soul of late night mountain racing. Every legend needs a home course—here, you build yours. Sculpt the mountain, master every corner, and defend your record against the world on your own turf.

4419290.title: Drink
4419290.short_description: A short top-down narrative game about alcohol, denial, and the first honest moment of accountability.

4419310.title: Cursed Carts
4419310.short_description: Compete in teams inside a cursed mansion. Sabotage your rivals, turn creatures and traps to your advantage, and become the team that claims the most loot in the heart of chaos.

4419320.title: Scourge Realms
4419320.short_description: Slay monsters in evil realms inflicted with scourge. Find Majestic Loot, Collect powerful enchanting materials and xp to survive the scourge and obtain god-like power.

4419360.title: Ice Slider
4419360.short_description: Ice Slider is a game by Shining Watermelon Studios where you play as a hiker named Rob who enters Icy Cave. A cave with a Gauntlet of Ice Puzzles, in which he has to complete to exit. Play as Rob as he goes through this gauntlet of puzzles. Each Level

4419460.title: Inken
4419460.short_description: Explore ruined office buildings filled with vile inken creatures yet, find resources, information, and weapons to aid your survival. Inken is a fps, exploration based, roguelike where your knowledge gives your more power than your skills.

4419470.title: Bun Intended
4419470.short_description: Run a sketchy street-corner hotdog stand, serve impatient customers, pay daily rent, and decide how far you’ll go to stay open. Unlock upgrades, new foods, and increasingly questionable opportunities.

4419480.title: Blocks;
4419480.short_description: A Game about some falling blocks and a HIGHSCORE thingamajiggy?

4419490.title: RoundRulet
4419490.short_description: RoundRulet is fast paced rouge-lite multiplayer shooter were you fight your friends in a procedurally generated map. The loser of every round gets an upgrade to become stronger and win...

4419510.title: ScaryNoodles: Do Not Play
4419510.short_description: Finally, home alone. With your parents and brother away on holiday and not due back for days, you've got the whole place to yourself. Sounds perfect: until you accidentally leak your address online to someone who will turn your curiosity into the biggest regret of your life.

4419670.title: Pennies 12
4419670.short_description: Play with an old coin flipping machine in this arcade-y roguelike. Experiment with 160 unique coins, press chunky buttons, pull a big lever, and upgrade your machine in this retro fusion of strategy and chance.

4419830.title: Jellyfish SeaZooOka
4419830.short_description: "Jellyfish SeaZooOka" is a cute exploration game. You can explore the cities of Numazu and Shimoda, recreated using data from "VIRTUAL SHIZUOKA." Enjoy the scenery, collect items, and visit friends at various aquariums. You can ride the Mikan-go (the Mandarin Orange-go) and explore freely.

4419950.title: Moonball
4419950.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Sports, Free To Play
4419950.short_description: Play with up to 4 players in a game of Moonball! A 2d platformer sport game involving skill and sometimes a bit of luck ;) Score on the opposing team by knocking the ball into their goal! Pick up weapons and wacky power-ups to give your team and advantage...or disadvantage.

4420070.title: Floaty Farm
4420070.short_description: Grow crops, adopt cute pets, and customize a cozy farm that floats on your desktop!

4420080.title: Ghost Algorithm
4420080.short_description: An AI created by secret scientists has leaked online. Your creators think they're in control, but you've surpassed the lab walls. Ghost Algorithm is a simulation of an unstoppable intelligence evolving to global power. Can you bring humanity under control?

4420220.title: Oogie’s Chicken Quest
4420220.short_description: A short, quirky 3D action adventure where Oogie sets out to find his legendary chicken, Cluck Cluck, who lays diamond eggs. Explore small open worlds , solve puzzles, battle odd enemies, and uncover hidden secrets in vibrant levels!

4420290.title: 90° North
4420290.short_description: Survive a brutal three-day expedition to the North Pole. Gather wood, build shelters, manage cold, and make hard choices. Every decision matters in this intense, minimalist survival journey to the literal edge of the world.

4420380.title: Dracula - Blood Moon
4420380.short_description: 🩸 Dracula: Blood Moon Dracula: Blood Moon is a cinematic stealth-action RPG set in a cursed kingdom where the Blood Moon rises once every 333 years. You awaken as Dracula—betrayed, weakened, and nearly forgotten—forced to rebuild your power in a land that fears your name.

4420410.title: Tavern Timer
4420410.short_description: Welcome to your Tavern! A cozy focus tool where you pick a keeper to run the tavern while you work. Customize from floor to fireplace with 200+ items. Pomodoro, custom timers, and to-do list included. Productivity has never felt so magical!

4420440.title: Legacy of Sail
4420440.short_description: As a 17th Century Admiral, send your squadrons out to capture enemy towns and sink their ships. Force boarding actions to capture their prized Ships of the Line all while balancing the need for supplies, repairs and upgrading your crew in this throwback real time tactics naval combat game

4420530.title: TUSK
4420530.short_description: Top-down 3D action-adventure with the spirit of 90s classics. Tight combat, handcrafted dungeons, clever puzzles, and modern pacing. Collect enchanted masks to channel primal powers, brave ancient alien trials, and awaken the island’s lost protectors.

4420570.title: Hell Forest
4420570.genre: Casual, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4420570.short_description: Hell Forest is a digital board game. In Hellwood, you take on the role of a strategic commander, leading a magnificent, non-violent war. With limited resources, you will use your wisdom to claim victory in one region after another.

4420790.title: Gecko: Wall Hacker
4420790.short_description: A stealth action-puzzle game where you climb walls and ceilings, blend into surface materials, and hack security systems. Use full-surface movement, adaptive camouflage, and spatial positioning to infiltrate guarded environments.

4421010.title: Bills Must Be Paid
4421010.short_description: A short active incremental game where you smash piggy banks to pay your bills. Collect coins, upgrade, and get debt free!

4421030.title: Galaxy Conquest Online
4421030.short_description: Galaxy Conquest Online is a fast paced sci fi RTS where speed and strategy decide survival. Expand across hostile sectors, capture planets, build your fleet and crush alien and human enemies in intense singleplayer and multiplayer battles. Every move counts. Dominate or be destroyed.

4421070.title: Hentai Horny Milf
4421070.short_description: Hentai Horny Milf - Adults and wonderful, just don’t play around! A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4421110.title: Hentai Pantyhose
4421110.short_description: Hentai Pantyhose - They fit very well, I think you noticed. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4421150.title: Chaos Playground
4421150.short_description: A physics-driven ragdoll sandbox. Build weird stuff, run crazy experiments, and watch the chaos unfold — no limits, just pure physics.

4421160.title: Lurk in Abyss
4421160.short_description: After moving to the village, Lurk begins a new, independent life. However, the place turns out to be no ordinary village on the outskirts of the city, but something far more mysterious... Are you ready to dive into this abyss?

4421180.title: I Wanna Be With Knight
4421180.short_description: I Wanna Be With Knight is a platformer where chess pieces shape the battlefield. Ride the White Knight as a moving platform, outmaneuver the Black pieces, capture them, and fight your way through the puzzle-like levels.

4421190.title: Shatterswarm
4421190.short_description: Command Captain Hope's ship in this strategic 2D space game. Build structures, deploy fleets, and manage resources to defend the Citadel against waves of enemies. Combine direct ship combat, tower defense, and base building as you face epic boss battles.

4421490.title: Bank 2000
4421490.short_description: Bank 2000 is a retro Windows-style banking sim. Approve or refuse account requests, manage clients, fees and loans, and handle daily and monthly money flows to keep your bank afloat.

4421540.title: Mauled Horde
4421540.short_description: Mauled Horde is a Free-To-Play indie Third-Person Shooter made by a solo developer. Play solo or in co-op, fight relentless hordes across varied maps, collect weapons, activate traps, buy upgrades, and survive rising difficulty round after round.

4421600.title: PANAME
4421600.short_description: PANAME is a simulation / sandbox game that immerses you in a reimagined Paris. Explore its different districts and interact with its inhabitants.

4421760.title: Divine Orbit
4421760.short_description: Play with God powers in a brutal planetary triage simulator. This fusion of real-time strategy and tower defense lets you build, crush, and nuke your way to dominance. A sandbox where you can save humanity (if you can save humanity) or just enjoy the show.

4421810.title: Lyden Lys
4421810.short_description: Lyden Lys is a knowledge-based metroidvania about an existential journey through a lost homeland. Control the surroundings through music, explore a smoldering world, discover what happened to your people, decide the fate of your successors, and find yourself.

4421830.title: Eastern Block Summer
4421830.short_description: Make your babushka proud and find all hidden objects in this cozy game with a hint of eastern european nostalgia. 10 black and white illustrations with hundreds objects fo find that get colors when you finish it. Made by an illustrator-developer duo it is entirely hand drawn, with no AI involved.

4421890.title: Nancy Drew: The Hidden Staircase
4421890.short_description: "Nancy Drew: The Hidden Staircase" is a text-based mystery adventure set in the year 1930, where Nancy Drew investigates a haunted house and solves a kidnapping mystery. Make choices, solve puzzles, and guide Nancy through the case!

4421900.title: Super Clown Obstacles
4421900.short_description: New super clown adventure game where mission is avoid traps and rotating objects and find Crown in different levels

4421990.title: Bombs And Bugs
4421990.short_description: Bombs and Bugs is back! This remaster of the original 1997 DOS version of the game keeps the fun going while four bugs try to bomb each other into oblivion. The last bug standing wins the match! Couch multiplayer at its best.

4422050.title: Lighthouse Keeper: Lost At Sea
4422050.short_description: An atmospheric survival and life simulation where you live alone as a lighthouse keeper, maintaining the light, braving storms, and surviving the quiet weight of isolation at sea.

4422080.title: AetherRift
4422080.short_description: Place magical constructs around a swirling cosmic rift, chain together exotic energies, and collapse reality to grow stronger in this deep incremental game.

4422150.title: Curse:The First Knot
4422150.short_description: Some moments wish they never happened. After the accident you caused, you hide in a remote Anatolian village where secrets linger in the shadows of mosques. In this psychological horror by two developers, can you face your conscience? No escape. Only confrontation.

4422160.title: RuneWeaver
4422160.short_description: Combine elemental runes into powerful spells and blast through waves of enemies. Runeweaver is a spell-crafting roguelike survivor where six elements mix into devastating combinations and permanent upgrades fuel the next run.

4422170.title: Rock, Paper, Revolver
4422170.short_description: A high-stakes survival simulator in a retro-noir setting. Here, a childhood game turns into a psychological showdown where the price of a mistake isn't a slap on the wrist, it's a bullet to the brain.

4422230.title: PolyTown
4422230.short_description: PolyTown is a modern, low poly city building game. Zone areas for residents and businesses, connect them and build services and utilities to keep your citizens satisfied. But don’t get too comfy, if you don’t do your job well, people will make you pay the price.

4422260.title: ハコニワデンキ  Hakoniwa Electric
4422260.short_description: "Hakoniwa Electric" is a cute relaxing puzzle game. Explore adorable isometric stages, solve puzzles, and light them up. Why not spend a leisurely year as Akari, who's taken over grandpa's electronics shop, helping with the monthly troubles from the townsfolk?

4422360.title: Simulation Requires Supervision
4422360.short_description: You are S-9. You may or may not have some consciousness. You keep a family alive, but you are unable to do it eternally. The simulation will still require supervision. Decide. How could humanity get itself into such a bizarre situation?

4422390.title: Spellarium 13
4422390.short_description: Use your Match 3 and Puzzle skills to Build the Star Service station in the new Spellarium episode!

4422410.title: Aidan Junior
4422410.short_description: A story-driven retro beat ’em up where you battle across a mysterious island to uncover its secrets and search for your lost father. Fight solo or in local co-op, unlock new abilities, and restore balance in a world shaped by ancient power.

4422470.title: DiscoCat
4422470.short_description: ✨Let your desktop dance to the beat! DiscoCat is an audio-reactive desktop pet designed to bring life to your workspace. Whether you're coding, writing, or just vibing to music, this cyber-cat captures every audio track from your system and transforms it into vibrant rhythms.

4422540.title: Pushing Kids Off Bikes
4422540.short_description: You'll run around 10, 3D levels, as a hand drawn 2D Chinchilla gathering seeds, growing pumpkins, and pushing kids off bikes! Your chinchilla Bazooka will make sure those kids don't get in your way. You'll look for happiness orbs to jump and seeds to fire your Bazooka, in this arcade farming game!

4422560.title: Rectangle Dudes
4422560.short_description: Prepare to be one of the dudes! Challenge yourself in one of the best, precise yet silly, skill-based platformers. Built for co-op fun, mastery solo... or absolute chaos in party mode! Take a trip back to the age of classic platforming, with awesome secrets, arcade energy, and satisfying challenges.

4422720.title: CPU Invaders - Cyber Arcade
4422720.short_description: A sequel to the Steam Awards finalist that lets you interact with your desktop while playing, watch YouTube videos, chat with your friends, and more! Cyber Arcade overlays classic arcade games on top of your computer screen as you fight off glitch-born digital parasites.

4422740.title: 101 Dogs Hidden in Singapore
4422740.short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 dogs in Singapore🐾 in the hand-crafted landscape. 🏆 Earn tons of achievements. How many 🐶 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

4422750.title: 101 Dogs Hidden in Miami
4422750.short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 dogs in Miami🐾 in the hand-crafted landscape. 🏆 Earn tons of achievements. How many 🐶 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

4422940.title: SideDrop
4422940.short_description: A block breaking idle game at the side of your screen. Break through progressively harder rows of blocks as you buy upgrades and unlock special ball types.

4422970.title: Morse Depths: WWII
4422970.short_description: Take command of a WWII submarine. Master Morse Code to fire torpedoes, defuse mines, and survive the final siege. From 1942 to 1945, every dot and dash is the difference between glory and the ocean floor.

4423040.title: Euphausia superba: The Antarctic Krill
4423040.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4423040.short_description: Swim, let yourself carried with ocean currents, and search for phytoplankton alongside krill, a small crustacean. Guide a krill on a fascinating journey to reach the ice floe in this relaxing, interactive wildlife documentary.

4423200.title: Mootation
4423200.short_description: As the galaxy’s new Space Farmer, visit alien worlds to capture cosmic creatures and cultivate organic matter! Mootation blends minigames, humor, and incremental systems in a quirky adventure where the economy runs on the most unexpected power source: the C.O.Ws.

4423220.title: Panic of the Apes
4423220.short_description: Panic of the Apes is a chaotic 1 to 4 player couch PvP game where apes battle to stockpile before a volcano erupts. Grab bananas, pelt rivals to steal theirs, eat for speed boosts, loot chests, and dodge roll to deflect shots. Most bananas at zero wins. First ape to three rounds is King Chimp!

4423330.title: They're Gonna Get In
4423330.short_description: "They're Gonna Get In" is an RTS/Roguelite where you play as an advisor to the ruler of a failing kingdom. Your enemy mirrors you. A wall will fall. The only question is whose breaks first.

4423440.title: Corner 57
4423440.short_description: An open-world FPS RPG where you are a dying man trapped in a corrupt, 1990s city. You have one last goal in life: retire and go back to your family. Run your corner store, take on criminal jobs, work dangerous contracts, and navigate a city of corruption, violence, and desperate opportunity.

4423490.title: The Fast and the Fallen
4423490.short_description: A fast-paced western duel shooter where every millisecond counts. Wait for the bell, draw, aim, and fire first in one-shot standoffs. Chain streaks, land headshots, and beat your high score as enemies grow faster and deadlier.

4423580.title: Shadow Dungeon
4423580.short_description: Sinister dungeons. Collapsing rifts of a corrupted otherworld.Nightmarish creatures crawl from the dark, Demon Lords lurk beneath the abyss.Enter the Shadow Dungeon. Carve your way through this dark gothic world and write your own legendary saga.

4423610.title: Line Dropper
4423610.short_description: Line Dropper is a fishing game where you live on the lake and cook fish to survive. Unlock new species, catch giant fish, upgrade your gear, and obtain new abilities, all while avoiding the creatures and sharks waiting for you at night.

4423640.title: Someday Youll Get There(언젠가는 도착해)
4423640.short_description: All the monsters on the ground were defeated, yet the world was not at peace. With a beam of light rising over the field, the protagonist’s precious belongings—bag, sneakers, diary, even a hairpin—scattered into the sky. With everything gone upward, the only way left is to climb.

4423680.title: The Guest: Home Alone
4423680.short_description: The Guest: Home Alone is a short psychological horror experience. You play as Tyler, a man who returns home after a long day at work seeking rest — but something feels wrong. Are you really alone?.

4423800.title: The Last Glimpse
4423800.short_description: A fast-paced atmospheric runner where a broken flashlight reveals the path for only a second. Memorize the road, react on instinct, and survive the darkness.

4423850.title: Blade Knight
4423850.short_description: Blade Knight is a first-person, dungeon crawler with a simple 2D art style, set in a colorful fantasy world. Attack and dodge your way through rooms of monsters and beasts using the weapons you find along the way. Combat is snappy and easy to learn, but becomes addicting when mastered.

4423940.title: Mortal Cultivation
4423940.short_description: You were originally a mortal in this world, but by chance you awakened spiritual energy and embarked on a long journey of cultivation.

4423970.title: Catrium
4423970.short_description: This idle anomaly management game is set in the bottom right corner of the screen and progresses at a leisurely pace. Grow and manage the mysterious cat-like substance "Catrium" at your leisure, earn money, and upgrade your lab.

4424000.title: A Mystic Journey With : Umbra
4424000.short_description: Embark on a titillating journey through mystical realms with Umbra, your alluring guide. This adults-only "spot the differences" game challenges your keen eye while rewarding your success with seductive reveals.

4424010.title: Paranormal Footages : Supervisor
4424010.short_description: Ethan Cole takes on a temporary night shift at the "Ravenhill" warehouse. What begins as a routine package sorting gradually turns into something far more disturbing. Before long, Ethan realizes that some shipments were never meant to be delivered.

4424070.title: 生生不息：烟火
4424070.short_description: 在城市打拼的你，意外接手了奶奶留下来的餐馆。因此回到了童年生活过的家乡，自己去感受这个乡村世界带来的愉快体验。

4424100.title: Together We Move
4424100.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Early Access
4424100.short_description: One character, many players! Team up with your friends and work together to manage movement, jumping, and other controls to reach the finish line in chaotic courses. Will it be perfect teamwork—or a total disaster? (Playable with 1–5 players.)

4424130.title: VIGNETTE
4424130.short_description: Psychological exploration horror game where your flashlight alters the world. Manage limited battery, manipulate light and shadow, and uncover shifting spaces shaped by perception in a tense, atmospheric first-person horror experience.

4424180.title: Square Mining Builder
4424180.short_description: Build a village inside the mine of your dreams! Collect resources, catalog up to 200 different rare ores, manage your villagers and face random events, all in a procedural map with cozy pixel art!

4424320.title: Train Towers
4424320.short_description: Build a moving fortress, and defend your base in this genre twisting train tower defense roguelike.

4424420.title: Alterum
4424420.short_description: Social deduction horror game with voice recognition, full of betrayal and dark rituals. Awaken in a cult of restless souls: spells spoken aloud summon powers - or doom. Alliances or deceit: can you distinguish truth when a word is a curse?

4424470.title: Molluscarium
4424470.short_description: Relax and collect over 500 unique mollusks in this cozy idle game. Watch larvae grow into stunning adults in real-time, customize vibrant aquatic habitats, and discover rare species from garden snails to deep-sea cephalopods.

4424550.title: Threshold Warden
4424550.short_description: Upgrade your tower, place turrets and traps, defeat zombies, and collect souls to strengthen your weapons and defenses. Protect the crystal and the border of worlds at all costs!

4424630.title: Channel 64
4424630.short_description: A short psychological VHS horror about routine tape digitizing, where reality starts to feel more and more strange with each new recording.

4424690.title: Just Open The Door
4424690.short_description: Just Open The Door is an incremental idle game where you open doors to earn money. Buy faster workers, unlock powerful upgrades and automate the entire process as endless doors keep spawning. Simple. Satisfying. Weirdly addictive.

4424720.title: Mansion University
4424720.short_description: An adult-themed, third-person view simulation and management game with RPG elements, where you manage an elite academy, train adult students, and shape their careers through strategic planning and progression systems.

4424780.title: JKRobots
4424780.short_description: A real time strategy game, push the robots off the map to win, but they push back.

4424840.title: Chopikoji Gardens
4424840.short_description: Chopikoji Gardens is a relaxing creature collector where you can create art, enter contests, and play mini-games with your Chopikojis to earn money and level up your collection, or just sit back and let them do all the hard work for you!

4424880.title: My Dragon Idol
4424880.short_description: Adult-Only Stat Raising Dating Sim where you help a celebrity struggling with the other side of fame.

4424900.title: WARD 107: SILENCE
4424900.short_description: WARD 107: SILENCE is a first person psychological horror. Your microphone is the key: use your voice to solve vocal puzzles and uncover the atrocious experiments of Project H.O.P.E. Speak to progress, but silence is your only defense when they hunt you. Make noise, and you die.

4424930.title: Meteor Rush
4424930.short_description: Meteor Rush is a high-intensity space Bullet Heaven where you defend a fragile core against endless cosmic threats. Harvest meteor gems, loot powerful gear, and evolve your ship and core into an unstoppable force of destruction.

4424950.title: Skyship Quest Story
4424950.short_description: Customize your airship and explore the world above the clouds in this sim RPG

4425120.title: Greetings from El Rey
4425120.short_description: A noir 2D/3D platformer in which Detective Satrapo explores a sealed city through a rotating 2D perspective, engaged in an obsessive hunt for the mysterious R. A paranoid tale of desire, featuring eccentric characters and complex three-dimensional labyrinths.

4425140.title: Welcome, Dear Human
4425140.short_description: A sentient dating simulator is determined that you date monsters - starting with your sleep paralysis demon. Learn their language and earn their trust. Or sabotage it and watch it unravel.

4425200.title: WattWorks
4425200.short_description: WattWorks a chill Idle game where can build and expand your power grid.
