You play as the manager controlling your company by building power generators and expanding your company in your small world. To Expand further you have to sell your company and rebuild a stronger company

4425320.title: Protocol:Chrono
4425320.short_description: A fast-paced action roguelike where time is your vital resource. Battle digital hordes, harvest fragments to survive, and use Chrono Tokens for deep, ARPG-style weapon customization, traveling through planets to save the dimension.

4425480.title: Cats vs Trolls
4425480.short_description: Cats VS Trolls is a humorous and relaxing hidden object game with hand-drawn graphics.

4425500.title: CrazyFish Chapter 6: Into the Kitchen
4425500.short_description: Step into the CrazyFish Kitchen where cooking is fast, chaotic, and hilariously unpredictable! Chop, fling, and serve a wild variety of recipes, no thumbs required! Each level brings new challenges and one wrong move could set the whole kitchen ablaze. Go solo or team up to see if you can survive!

4425600.title: GODBOX
4425600.short_description: GODBOX is a coding god-sim where you program life, grow your power by unlocking divine domains, and compete against rival deities. Help your devoted Folk survive while you harness their faith to fuel your divine ascension.

4425610.title: KILLFLOW
4425610.short_description: KILLFLOW is an insanely fast retro-FPS set in a stylish procedurally generating world. Destroy red psychopaths with destructive weapons to save yourself from getting corrupted, and get the high score.

4425670.title: Rock Paper Scissors Mayhem
4425670.short_description: A Rock Paper Scissors arcade game, where your "tool" (rock, paper or scissors) is changed at random while you battle your way through a mayhem of moving enemy "tools".

4425710.title: HUNTED
4425710.short_description: A sit 'n' survive set on board a spaceship. Aliens have made it inside, and you need to defend yourself. Viewing cameras, shutting doors, blocking vents, and sounding alarms is your only hope. You must last 5 days while backup arrives.

4425750.title: Starshot Genesis
4425750.short_description: Starshot Genesis is a space combat arcade shooter built with Three.js, featuring neon visuals, responsive controls, adaptive combat scaling, and atmospheric audio. Use the controls mapped in the hud to move and engage in combat.

4425790.title: Static Maw
4425790.short_description: Work as a night operator at StaticCore Systems in a remote antenna station lost in the void. Monitor anomalous signals, repair broken transmitters using your computer and tools. This is a first-person psychological horror experience. Something out there is trying to reach you. Will you let it?

4425860.title: One Hundred Years Amazonian Dungeon
4425860.short_description: Dungeon Shop Indenture Adventure! The Amazon Goddess Kotakali has sentenced you to ONE HUNDRED YEARS of service in her dungeon realm! Can you pay it off before you die? A Ren'Py RPG and Visual Novel.

4425980.title: Legion Breaker
4425980.short_description: A short incremental game about defending from waves of monsters. Build your army, upgrade your magic attacks, and break the enemy's legions!

4426030.title: Aura
4426030.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4426030.short_description: Play as Aura, a powerful young sorcerer battling through monster-filled dungeons where chaotic portals spawn hordes of enemies. Level up, upgrade attributes and spells, and restore order to the dungeons with guidance from a mysterious mushroom companion.

4426100.title: The Faraway King
4426100.short_description: A narrative adventure with exploration and visual novel elements. Join J.D. on a journey through the nation of Yoom to find the mythical figure known as the Faraway King and rid himself of his supposed curse. But should J.D. trust his bizarre companion, Zxtabella?

4426150.title: Gobelinus: The Cursed Deck
4426150.short_description: Gobelinus: The Cursed Deck is a dark fantasy roguelike deckbuilder where a debt‑ridden goblin builds cursed card hands to survive. Equip bizarre relics and trigger outrageous score combos to defeat relentless monsters in each run.

4426210.title: Scanner Force
4426210.short_description: ​Pulled into a digital world of neon and sound, you must scan and blast your way out. Master iconic classical masterpieces with your high-tech Rhythm Scanner and prove you’re a true "Gosu" by hitting perfect streaks. Create your own rhythmic gauntlets in the Custom Stage Editor!

4426220.title: SuperTag
4426220.short_description: A first-person competitive parkour game where tag becomes a sport. Chase your opponent in intense 1v1 duels or perfect your routes in Climb The Tower time-attack maps to set the fastest record.

4426240.title: Iron Legacy
4426240.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4426240.short_description: Master the grind in Iron Legacy, a nostalgic 2D Action RPG inspired by the classics. Hunt hordes of monsters, master powerful spells, and push your limits with a deep Reset system. Whether solo or in co-op, forge your legacy through blood, loot, and infinite progression. Become a Legend!

4426250.title: Goldy's Garden
4426250.short_description: Create terrarium pods, plant colorful flowers, and discover tiny bug friends. Watch your garden come to life as butterflies flutter in, beetles crawl around, and adorable visitors stop by to explore! The more you grow your garden, the more surprises you’ll unlock! :)

4426280.title: Echoes of Sin: Confusion
4426280.short_description: Echoes of Sin: Confusion is a first-person psychological horror game built around looping structure, where each player experiences a different cycle. Surviving unpredictable anomalies opens new possibilities while closing others.

4426310.title: CAI UWE
4426310.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4426310.short_description: Experience CAI UWE: Your AI companion in Unreal Engine 5 graphics. Chat in real-time with a Metahuman that responds without scripts. The perfect "Idler" for your second monitor — connected with Twitch, YouTube & Discord. A next-generation experimental tech demo.

4426450.title: Hentai Marina
4426450.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Marina, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4426470.title: Zombie Survival 3D
4426470.short_description: You are not alone in this forest. Find 10 keys and get out alive.

4426500.title: Space & Pixels
4426500.short_description: Space & Pixels is a top-down space shooter with classic gameplay. Battle through each level, blast lots of enemies, upgrade your ship's firepower, and uncover the truth behind your dangerous mission.

4426510.title: Bomb Kitten
4426510.short_description: Play as a cunning black cat in a red cape in this old-school action puzzler! Blast your way through grid-based levels, outsmart enemies, and use bombs to clear a path — but beware of spikes and traps.

4426550.title: Space Warpster
4426550.short_description: A fast-paced retro arcade shooter inspired by classic 1980s side-scrolling space combat. Weave through organic obstacles, survive relentless enemy waves, and defeat powerful end-level bosses in a pure, skill-driven singleplayer experience.

4426560.title: CARDaCOMBS
4426560.short_description: A retro roguelike deckbuilder where cards cost more than just energy. Descend the CARDaCOMBS, defeat monsters, and upgrade your deck with cards that cost energy, discards, blood, and MORE!!!

4426580.title: Rage Rock
4426580.short_description: A challenging physics rage platformer where you launch a stubborn rock up a mountain.

4426660.title: Drone Gunner
4426660.short_description: A top-down weapon-operator shooter. Limited ammo, priority targets, EW and air defense - every shot has a cost.

4426670.title: Hunt Zombies Together
4426670.short_description: Hunt Zombies Together is a co-op multiplayer FPS survival horror game where you and your friends battle waves of zombies and supernatural enemies inside a cursed mansion.

4426730.title: STILL WATCHING: The Night Caregiver
4426730.short_description: Your real smartphone is your only weapon... Sync your phone with the game and pray it doesn't ring while you're hiding in the closet.

4426850.title: Little Girl On Earth Asking Why She Asking Why
4426850.short_description: "Life sometimes feels like it’s going in circles." Little Girl On Earth Asking Why She Asking Why is a short pixel art Visual Novel about a girl who tell herself this, forever. Maybe you can try to help her ?

4426920.title: Werewolf Hunter: Night of Horror
4426920.short_description: Werewolf Hunter is a survival horror game about tracking a deadly predator in a hostile wilderness. Manage hunger and thirst, collect DNA to uncover its weakness, set traps, and barricade shelters. Hunt a regenerating beast that grows more dangerous with every night.

4426980.title: Spirit & Steel
4426980.short_description: A 3rd person elemental combat game following an old shaman as she tries to save her spirit family from the evil, technologically advanced antagonist, William Von Pingleton III. She will use the powers gifted to her by the spirits to punch her way to victory!

4427060.title: Combat Playground
4427060.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4427060.short_description: Forget health bars. In Combat Playground, damage is physical. Shatter limbs, lose your balance, and fight through the pain in this physics-based brawler. Master spacing and momentum in chaotic local and online multiplayer battles where every impact breaks something.

4427080.title: Dubai Chewy Cookie Simulator
4427080.short_description: Craving something sweet? Play Dubai Chewy Cookie Simulator now! Experience the ultimate chewy, sugary delight. The catch? The developer has never actually baked one in real life. Dive in and enjoy!

4427200.title: NoOneKnowsME.
4427200.short_description: You are an impostor inhabiting the body of a dead crew member. Blend in and live out your days on the ship without raising suspicion. Complete seven daily tasks, even as a strange atmosphere begins to take hold. Can you survive all seven days without being exposed?
developers: 箱詰めプロダクション
publishers: 箱詰めプロダクション

4427210.title: Salt & Storms
4427210.short_description: Captain your own vessel in this cozy Caribbean sailing management sim. Hire crew with unique personalities, outfit your ship, trade between tropical ports, and weather dynamic storms with skill-based sailing physics.

4427280.title: Lingering Shadow
4427280.short_description: Dreamcore early-2000 atmosphere — nostalgic, warm… and quietly wrong • Psychological horror — fear born from subtle distortion, not cheap jumpscares • Environmental storytelling — every object remembers something • Multiple endings — your choices shape Lanlan is willing to face

4427540.title: P2W : The Party Show
4427540.short_description: "Forget skills—buy your way to victory!" <P2W: The Party Show> is a chaotic multiplayer party game where cash is king. Grab gold in hilarious minigames and shop for overpowered items to wreck your rivals. Ready to test your friendships? In this flashy show, the deepest pockets win it all!

4427620.title: Tile Rogue
4427620.short_description: Super Pop. Super Casual. The Ultimate Roguelike Adventure! Smash your way to the goal and experience insane power-ups as you level up to godhood! Adventure awaits! Team up with up to 4 players online for a high-energy, colorful blast with friends.

4427690.title: Heart & Steel: The Forsworn
4427690.short_description: Survive a brutal medieval world where every choice has consequences. Play solo with a companion or in co-op (2 players), shape your reputation, and influence the fate of a living kingdom.

4427720.title: Pigs On The Wings
4427720.short_description: In the co-op flight sim Pigs On The Wings, join a crew of fellow villagers to master a temperamental aircraft. Fight off ground forces, deliver vital cargo, and work together to repair, upgrade, and keep your bird in the sky by any means necessary.

4427980.title: THE WITCH'S GRIMOIRE
4427980.short_description: An atmospheric experience in the dark and eerie world of classic fairy tales, progressing solely through your choices. No complex mechanics; just sit back and focus on the story. Make the right decisions to avoid danger and try to survive the twisted endings of these tales.

4428060.title: Sex & Fast Food
4428060.short_description: Manage a high-octane fast food empire by day, and explore explicit, choice-driven adult narratives by night. Hire a unique staff, customize your restaurant, and unlock intimate encounters in this unapologetically mature 18+ business simulator. Can you handle the heat?

4428120.title: Nomad: Last Blade
4428120.short_description: Play as a cybernetic samurai hunted by the advanced artificial intelligence Mortiex. Master precise combat, tactical stealth, and intense encounters — and uncover the mystery of the blade encoded with Mortiex.

4428140.title: Mindrazer
4428140.short_description: Mindrazer is a roguelite action-strategy shooter against relentless cosmic horrors. Every run tests your skill, your strategy, and how much risk you’re willing to take. Traverse a dark maze to save the love of your life from the Mindrazer's grip.

4428150.title: The Dare
4428150.short_description: A horror experience where a simple dare leads you into an abandoned construction site hiding something far darker. Explore, solve environmental puzzles, and survive using stealth as every sound and decision shapes your fate.

4428200.title: DNOWHERE
4428200.short_description: Navigate a dark, industrial nightmare as "He"—a tiny survivor with a paper boat hat. In the city of DNO, ruled by grotesque animal overlords, you have no weapons. Solve puzzles, hide from the Pigmen, and uncover the island's secrets in this atmospheric 2.5D horror platformer.

4428210.title: Psps Dream Mart
4428210.short_description: Welcome to Psps Dream Mart Build, manage, and optimize the coziest supermarket ever created where every customer is a cat and every decision matters. From shelf placement to pricing strategy, your goal is simple: turn a humble mart into the ultimate feline shopping paradise

4428320.title: Perfectdom
4428320.short_description: This is a relaxing and stress-relieving puzzle collection game. Featuring hundreds of carefully designed levels, you’ll organize messy items in cozy settings like homes, cafés, and bedrooms. Simply tap or drag objects to put everything back in its place and clear the level.

4428410.title: Little Embers
4428410.short_description: Little Embers is a tactical turn-based deckbuilding roguelike focused on precision and synergy. Position cards, optimize your board, and chain high-scoring combos to defeat relentless foes.

4428510.title: 99 Nights
4428510.short_description: Chop down trees, gather fuel & scrap, search abandoned structures, and build a base camp strong enough to withstand what comes after the sun sets. The wilderness grows more dangerous with every passing night, and something is always watching from beyond the firelight. Survive all 99 Nights.

4428600.title: Pikku Adventure
4428600.short_description: A puzzle adventure game about learning an alien language. Explore a strange world and meet its cute inhabitants. Decipher the language and earn their trust. With every word learned, you will uncover more secrets. Can you solve the mystery of this world and decide the fate of the Pikku?

4428610.title: Moonlight Shadows
4428610.short_description: Moonlight Shadows is a dark fantasy Action RPG with stylish Soulslike combat . Forge your way through formidable foes in a cursed world and master deep and immersive combat.

4428700.title: Paranormal Division
4428700.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4428700.short_description: They don't want to be found. You have one job: remove every cursed artifact before the possession is complete. But something is already in there. It hunts. It hides. It kills. Paranormal Division. Clean the site. Before it cleans you.

4428770.title: Flying over the penguin's hollow
4428770.short_description: Meet Vinnie, aka "The Trickster." In his dreams, he's a criminal mastermind, the terror of banks and the ladies. In reality, he's the guy who tried to break into a gumball machine, mistaking it for a safe, got his hand stuck, and screamed at it until the cops arrived.

4428810.title: Escape 2049
4428810.short_description: Play Elena in this action shooting game set in 4 different worlds, featuring 12 levels and 12 bosses, challenging puzzles, a stunning intro and full motion videos!

4428890.title: 20 More, Somehow Even Smaller, Mazes
4428890.short_description: A puzzle game with twenty small mazes.

4429000.title: DICEPTION
4429000.short_description: Diception is DiceWars at laser speed. No fluff, no waiting. Conquer the map using 1- to 16-sided dice. Master the odds in the campaign and crush the AI in "Expert Mode" with near-instant moves. Optimized for ultra-fast keyboard and gamepad play.

4429110.title: Bastard's Throne
4429110.short_description: You are the Bastard, the secret heir to the dead King. The throne is yours, but the kingdom is ablaze with intrigue. Every decision is fateful: execute the traitors? Marry for convenience? Start a war? Weave conspiracies, uncover secrets, choose the path to greatness or ruin. Rule or perish!

4429130.title: Chess Defense
4429130.short_description: Chess Defense is a strategy tower defense game where chess pieces become your towers.

4429250.title: Pest Quest
4429250.short_description: A fast-paced roguelike action RPG where you fight as a hamster warrior, recruit animal armies, and command them as chess pieces in tactical battles.

4429260.title: Protect the Grimoire
4429260.short_description: Survive, protect, and strike back in Protect the Grimoire! A fast-paced roguelite bullet hell shoot ’em up. Face relentless Dark Wizards and fight your way toward the most powerful grimoires in existence.

4429400.title: Laura.ai
4429400.short_description: Welcome to Laura.ai, the world's leading AGI company. As our developer, you'll investigate logs, browse files, and monitor applications across our proprietary operating system. Your access is limited. Some directories are restricted for good reason. We trust you'll respect those boundaries.

4429440.title: Void Core
4429440.short_description: Start as a microscopic speck, become the end of everything. Void Core is a minimalist sci-fi idle game where you control a black hole. Harvest matter, bend spacetime to automate your growth, and consume entire galaxies. Consume. Grow. Evolve.

4429480.title: Apanana
4429480.short_description: A cozy idle incremental game about a curious monkey collecting strange trinkets, automating bananas, and growing stronger one adventure at a time.

4429560.title: Rotary Knights
4429560.short_description: A text-based RPG spanning the entire arc of WWI aviation. Fly 37 historical aircraft, survive dogfights against the Red Baron, manage your aerodrome on the Western Front, and make choices that determine whether your pilot lives to see the Armistice.

4429620.title: BreakThrough
4429620.short_description: High-octane fights and stunning 3D cel-shaded animations! BreakThrough is a fighting game where your greatest weapon is your Resolve. Powered by rollback netcode, choose from a diverse set of fighters and prove your strength in battle!

4429670.title: The Ayna
4429670.short_description: The Ayna is a psychological exploration game set in Türkiye, inspired by the music video aesthetics and lyrical themes of a female vocalist. The player is tasked with noticing anomalies in the concert venue and uncovering the truth.

4429690.title: Dreams Of A Visionary
4429690.short_description: Dreams Of A Visionary is a first-person exploration adventure set in a mysterious Victorian mansion. Explore richly detailed rooms, solve challenging puzzles, and gradually uncover the hidden secrets of this surreal dream.

4429710.title: Spellogger
4429710.short_description: Fell trees with your axe and magic in this cozy incremental RPG. Explore a quiet world full of small secrets, help villagers with their troubles, and steadily grow stronger as you gather resources and take down more trees.

4429720.title: Deductopia
4429720.short_description: Explore the scenes, find clues, and sort out people, pets, and belongings in this cozy slice-of-life detective puzzle game. Fans of Duck Detective, Little Problems, and The Case of the Worst Day Ever will enjoy this new deduction game for all ages.

4429960.title: Academy of Samsara
4429960.short_description: Answer right to deal damage, answer wrong to take it. Die and reincarnate with no items but the same level. 6,000+ trivia questions across 5 categories. Master challenging lore, interact with haunting characters, and break the loop in a world brought to life through 90s retro anime art.

4430020.title: Hamsteria
4430020.short_description: Hamsteria is a difficult 2 player co-op game where you play as two hamsters in attached wheels. Online co-op, local co-op, and single player all supported!

4430130.title: The Forgotten's Vault
4430130.short_description: Trapped in an abandoned ocean prison, you must explore claustrophobic cells, solve environmental puzzles, and evade relentless horrors. In The Forgotten’s Vault, survival means hiding, running… and never looking back.

4430240.title: Gravity Well
4430240.short_description: Grow a coin-devouring gravity engine, automate upgrades, and reset for massive progression in this relaxing incremental idle.

4430270.title: Rubbish Paper
4430270.short_description: RubbishPaper: Lab management meets Roguelite. You're a new lecturer, building a lab from scratch—juggling grants, papers, and students. Survive random chaos: funding crises, student meltdowns, rejection letters. No safe retirement—overwork, crash, restart. Until you're a legend, or nothing.

4430290.title: Mithril & Mud
4430290.short_description: A dwarven mining incremental game. Dig through 20+ depths, build 12 specialized rooms, automate your underground empire, and prestige for permanent power. Trade with nations, tame beasts, craft runestones, and ascend to unlock even deeper progression. Sounds and visuals are procedurally generated.

4430300.title: Retro Sniper
4430300.short_description: A fast-paced 2D tactical sniper shooter with retro arcade style. 49 missions across 15 campaigns — from desert warfare and cyber cities to zombie graveyards and dark carnivals. Unlock devastating weapons, fight helicopters, jets, sharks, and killer clowns. Spare the civilians or pay the price.

4430400.title: Little Backpack
4430400.short_description: A cozy pixel-art puzzle game about organizing items inside your backpack. There are 80 handcrafted levels made to be relaxing and satisfying to play.

4430420.title: Food Stacker
4430420.short_description: Drop food onto a sleeping character and stack as many as you can. If it falls, it's game over. A simple physics-based balance game anyone can play.

4430550.title: 우리집 반려소녀
4430550.short_description: One day, I got a pet. But it turned out… she was a beautiful girl!?

4430580.title: But in briefs
4430580.short_description: But in briefs is an arcade-platformer game. The objective is simple - reach the exit in each of 100 levels of action and unexpected events.

4430680.title: Gliding Through
4430680.short_description: A peaceful game about dealing with chaos.

4430780.title: she danced in the wind like a holographic dream before the world died
4430780.short_description: "The very last flower grew in concrete. She danced in the wind like a holographic dream before the world died." A short interactive poetry experience, and science fiction, about the end. Explore brutalist ruins to collect memories of a dead world.

4430840.title: GUN SOLVER
4430840.short_description: GUN SOLVER is a mind-bending top-down shooter where every gunfight is a puzzle to be solved. Use experimental bullets to dodge, teleport and kill enemies in slow motion. Strategize, improvise, and destroy the machines tearing the world apart at the seams.

4430890.title: Booker Blitz
4430890.short_description: The wrestling booking sim with live match control. Sit in Gorilla Position and call the shots in real time—change winners, trigger run-ins, cut matches short. Book entire shows without a mouse. Manage staff, choose arenas, mod everything. Pure booking chaos.

4430910.title: Delivery Driver Massacre - Definitive Edition
4430910.short_description: A late-night delivery turns into a PSX nightmare. Trapped in a house with a killer, you must solve puzzles and hide to survive. Multiple endings and authentic VHS visuals. Can you escape the rot?

4431060.title: Glaide
4431060.short_description: In Glaide you're in charge of a gladiator troupe that is in dire situation to save their friend who is imprisoned by Emperor Nero. However before they can save him, they have to survive fighting off all the enemies sent their way.

4431080.title: Horse Guys
4431080.short_description: Horse Guys is a 1-2 player game about becoming a horse, you or with your friend going to a journey to find peace as guys in a horse costume

4431090.title: Company is watching
4431090.short_description: Company is Watching is a horror incremental game. You have a debt to pay. The factory walls have eyes, and the machine at the end of the belt is hungry. Manage workers, discipline the weak, and process 'organic waste'.

4431140.title: Elven Desire
4431140.short_description: You’ll discover four distinct elven clans, each with their own natural charm and sensual presence: Forest Elves, Desert Elves, Mountain Elves and Dark Elves. They are free, relaxed, and unashamed of their beauty. The elven women embrace their bodies and their desires without restraint.

4431240.title: Savior
4431240.short_description: Savior, an action adventure RPG, has you travel across a vast, diverse world to put a stop to the Great Ending.

4431340.title: RAMMBOCK
4431340.short_description: Dodge bullets or plow right through with the RAMMBOCK. Utilize the hybrid technology of the twin moons! Ramm enemies into one another for chain bonuses. Tackle missions and increase your score to uncover the truth about your past.

4431380.title: BUG
4431380.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4431380.short_description: You're HR investigating a missing employee. On the surface, it seems like a routine personnel issue until you open his computer, and a dark world built on overtime work and psychological control slowly comes into view. Peer through the screen to uncover the truth and stay awake until the end.

4431460.title: The Excavation: Beneath The Cathedral
4431460.short_description: A first-person atmospheric horror experience focused on exploration, environmental storytelling, and psychological tension set beneath an abandoned cathedral.

4431580.title: Slick As The Devil
4431580.short_description: An experimental psychological-horror tabletop game based on 3-Cup Shuffle. Keep your eye on the ball, buy special items between rounds, and see if you can beat the devil himself at the ultimate conman game.

4431670.title: Ethos Mythos
4431670.short_description: Experience Balkan stubbornness first hand in this charming pixel art, co-op, rogue-like. Fend off your crops and streets from ancient Slavic demons and big corporation the only way you know: throwing garlic at your problems.

4432340.title: Nyan Nyan Maid: Sex Life!!
4432340.short_description: Enjoy endless sex with your personal maid attendant!! She'll serve you in countless ways!! CG scenes feature moans + dialogue voices for heightened immersion!! Smoothly animated CG events , with voice acting!!

4432360.title: PizzaCat
4432360.short_description: Ride a slice of pizza through space as PizzaCat. Collect toppings, dodge asteroids, and whatever you do…don’t cheese it.

4432380.title: Tsuki Journey
4432380.short_description: A relaxing slice of life adventure game where Tsuki travels between beautiful cities, meets new friends, uncovers stories, and fills out collection logs at his own pace, combining cozy idle activities with short, meaningful bursts of progression.

4432410.title: Sweet Hospital 2
4432410.short_description: Sweet Hospital 2 - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around a hospital. It depicts the daily work lives of five pretty and adorable medical girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4432470.title: Femboy Survivor
4432470.short_description: Master the four ancient elements! In Femboy Survivor, upgrade your magical spells to incinerate and freeze massive hordes of enemies. Survive the ever-growing waves in this fast-paced roguelite adventure and unleash your true power

4432600.title: Aye! My Liege
4432600.short_description: A grand strategy game set in an alternate history. Lead your noble house to power using a 4-tier command system that allows for granular management of every individual soldier. Master complex industrial chains, navigate tariffs, and balance diplomacy to shape the continent's ultimate fate.

4432620.title: StarshipFighter
4432620.short_description: Build and customize your own starship, then survive escalating waves of enemies and intense boss fights. Unlock new parts, upgrade your loadout, choose your difficulty, and climb the leaderboard in this fast-paced 2D top-down space shooter.

4432660.title: Kombucha Craft
4432660.short_description: Kombucha Craft is a sandbox game where you control every step of kombucha production. Experiment with recipes and flavors to find the perfect balance.

4432720.title: Central Sisatsophy
4432720.short_description: A short psychedelic trip: the passage of time in Central Sisatsophy.

4432810.title: Project Blood Sword - Rogue Like Power Fantasy Game
4432810.short_description: “You are a lone ex-mercenary, turned Demigod, the embodiment of wrath – an unstoppable force seeking revenge on a cult that has enslaved humanity, draining the blood of thousands each day with the means to resurrect the god of hatred.”

4432880.title: BeastBreak: Monster Horde Shooter
4432880.short_description: Fight for survival in a fast-paced monster shooter focused on intense encounters, powerful weapons, and escalating boss battles. Unlock new gear, master your loadout, and prove your skill on global leaderboards.

4433430.title: FLOWSXTY
4433430.short_description: FLOWSXTY is a minimal action game. A brutal trench runner where you WASD between four lanes.

4433530.title: Randomverse: Expedition
4433530.short_description: Randomverse: Expedition is an experimental platformer game with chaotic randomized elements that will test your luck. Explore procedurally generated levels, loot chests, fight monsters that can end your run in a single hit, and secure your items for future adventures.

4433790.title: Letterwork
4433790.short_description: Do your chores as fast as possible to survive. Upgrade your letters and abilities to create broken builds and beat your own high-score in this free typing-arcade-roguelike.

4433800.title: There Is No Next Stop
4433800.short_description: After the announcement "There is no next stop," you are trapped in an endless subway. But you’re not alone—the "GUESTS" are hunting you. Trust the "GUIDES" to survive. Or don't.

4433850.title: 到达彼岸
4433850.short_description: This is a survival adventure game. Use special cubes to navigate mazes, evade zombies, find keys and healing items, and escape. Solve puzzles with switches and portals across 8 moderately challenging levels. Block chasing zombies with the cube to make them retreat.

4433910.title: CITADEL
4433910.short_description: Awake from your slumber and venture out to the mighty CITADEL.

4433970.title: Lonelode
4433970.short_description: Lonelode is a turn-based, placement-focused mining battle game. Each turn, you randomly receive a mining tool; rotate it and choose the right position to dig, competing for control of lonelodes—watch out for hidden mines, which can blow up your tool.

4434040.title: Unseen - Someone
4434040.short_description: Michael, is a 14-year-old teenager living the ordinary life of a game developer. He usually preferred to work at night because he felt the calm and special atmosphere there. At one point, he needed to leave the room at night but it seems that was a mistake...

4434150.title: FossilFrontier
4434150.short_description: This game is about exploring the desert, digging up fossils, and reconstructing them.

4434200.title: REMNANT: Rebirth
4434200.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4434200.short_description: Explore the silent echoes of a fallen open-world in REMNANT: Rebirth. Navigate lush, overgrown ruins where nature has reclaimed its throne and zombies lurk in the shadows. Master survival, uncover secrets of a lost civilization, and endure the challenges of an untamed post-apocalyptic era.

4434250.title: 拜剑·我们的冒险
4434250.short_description: You are a commander, and you will strategically arrange all your cards to defeat opponents from various worlds. It's not just about sparring and combat; you may be able to achieve endings that those worlds never reached by reconstructing the storybook.

4434300.title: Market Mayhem
4434300.short_description: Market Mayhem is a professional-grade market strategy simulation where players build and scale a financial empire through disciplined decisions, risk management, and adaptive tactics. Designed for accessibility and depth, it delivers dynamic, replayable gameplay for both new and experienced players.

4434310.title: VampireBlaze
4434310.short_description: This is a classic platformer.Fight through over 10 stages—or take an alternate route—as you make your way to the demon lord.It offers a challenging, retro-style action experience focused on precise controls and skill-based gameplay.

4434410.title: Sin And Serve
4434410.short_description: A hellish shift-based cooking management sim. Review sinner profiles, craft sin-matched meals, and harvest body parts. Meet Satan's brutal quotas and rise through Hell's ranks, or secretly build trust to help souls escape to Heaven. In this kitchen, mercy is the most dangerous ingredient.

4434480.title: Applied Shamanism
4434480.short_description: A cozy 3D game about a rookie rabbit shaman. Diagnose quirky illnesses with X-ray spirit vision, gather and grow elemental ingredients, and brew always-useful potions. Each patient is a bite-size mystery of folk ailments and guardian spirits, with no combat, damage, or timers.

4434500.title: FILENDS
4434500.short_description: FILENDS is a dark multiplayer riddle-solving game for 3-7 players. Work together to solve levels filled with murder mysteries and tragic tales. Use environmental clues and real-time chat to uncover the truth. Will you solve the riddles or become a part of them?

4434510.title: The Old Parish
4434510.short_description: Your family's farm in rural Ireland has been sitting empty. Come home to work the land, grow spuds and cabbage, attend Sunday mass, and rebuild your place in the parish. A farming game about community, tradition, and the soil beneath your feet.

4434640.title: The Long Mine
4434640.short_description: Mine through hand sculpted caves, collect ore, earn money and experience, unlock tools, equipment, buffs and perks, and tear through the caves at insane speed.

4434770.title: We’re In Trouble
4434770.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4434770.short_description: A co-op stealth game about a problem that can’t wait until morning. 🕵️‍♂️ An empty office, a body, and absolute silence. Work together, avoid guards and cameras, handle unpredictable physics, and escape unnoticed. One mistake can ruin everything.

4434780.title: Buildia
4434780.short_description: Unleash your imagination in Buildia! Build massive structures in this creative voxel-based world using elemental blocks like Lava, Ice, and Forest. With precision controls and a serene atmosphere, Buildia invites you to shape your own world block by block.

4434910.title: HollowCity:EscapeFromSeoul
4434910.short_description: HollowCity is a top-down extraction shooter where you venture out from your safehouse to explore and scavenge for loot. Seize spoils from hostile enemies, rescue allies to upgrade your base, and find your way out of the devastated city.

4434980.title: Don't Wake the Queen
4434980.short_description: Protect the peaceful sleep of Your Meowness in this ever-growing incremental tower defense. Place defenders, build your own path, unlock new skills and units, infinitely upgrade EVERYTHING and optimize your strategy.

4435080.title: Tequila Moonrise
4435080.short_description: Take over a struggling bar on the politically tense Moon Village. Prepare and serve drinks, befriend and help your customers, find your purpose, and maybe even love... all while keeping the bar's lights on in this narrative driven bartending simulator set on the moon.

4435110.title: Bread Dog Vibe
4435110.short_description: A stray dog on the streets just wants to vibe. Type to the beat, build combos, and watch your pup come alive with physics-driven dance moves. How long can you keep the vibe going?

4435140.title: Skinwalker Hotel
4435140.short_description: In the apocalypse, many bizarre visitors of all shapes and sizes will seek shelter at your hotel, but BEWARE... Hidden among them are the deadly "Skinwalkers", who must be eliminated at all costs!

4435420.title: Simulation 9
4435420.short_description: In Simulation 9, you are trapped in an endless corridor. Observe and memorize your surroundings. If you find an anomaly, turn back. Otherwise, continue on your way.

4435770.title: PUT OKO GHETTA SA 80 GRAMA: THE GAME
4435770.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4435770.short_description: A fast and chaotic 2D balloon‑flying arcade game inspired by music album “Put oko Ghetta sa 80 grama”. Dodge obstacles, survive wild levels, and face the final laser challenge in Level 15. Simple controls, quick action, and a humorous vibe.

4435790.title: Sector War
4435790.short_description: Embark on an epic space strategy adventure!

4435800.title: Lickspittles
4435800.short_description: Lickspittles is a chaotic online co-op horror game for 4 players. As ghosts banished from hell, use proximity voice chat to explore dangerous spots, collect and sell scrap, build your base, grow illegal cactus, and survive the terror together.

4435820.title: Judy's Adventure DX
4435820.short_description: Judy fell asleep beneath a tree having a delightful picnic when a mysterious hand stole her house key! Judy’s Adventure is a retro-inspired platforming quest packed with charm, secrets, and handcrafted challenges.

4435830.title: Ajayu
4435830.short_description: Join Alaya on this spiritual adventure, who, with the help of his ability to control his own soul, will have to face dangerous enemies and solve challenging puzzles across the world's driest desert, to find the place where his ancestors rest.

4435840.title: Slime Slammer
4435840.short_description: Slime Slammer is an idle PvZ-like tower defense game that sits at the bottom of your screen!

4435880.title: Sitarane's Legacy
4435880.short_description: Descend into the shadows of the Tower, where only cunning and steel will ensure your survival. Sitarane's Legacy is an old-school, grid-based dungeon crawler that pays tribute to genre classics while introducing a ruthless modern competitive twist.

4435900.title: Yapori Dimensions 2
4435900.short_description: Yapori Dimensions 2 is a single-player action-adventure game set in multiple dimensions.

4435960.title: Only you
4435960.short_description: A school romance adventure where you foster unforgettable bonds with unique heroines. Every "Choice" you make shapes their futures, coloring their fates with joy or heartache. What truth awaits at the end of your chosen path? Are you prepared to witness it all until the final curtain?

4436000.title: Piano Children
4436000.short_description: A piano game training hand coordination, concentration and confidence, with some entry level music theory. Enriched with potential competition and a hint of philosophy. Use MIDI piano keyboard or computer keyboard.

4436020.title: X-Ray Pet Hospital
4436020.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4436020.short_description: Run your own animal hospital simulator and diagnose pets using real-time X-ray scanning. Inspect animals, uncover hidden objects, solve medical mysteries, and treat patients in this veterinary simulation game before it’s too late.

4436100.title: PacketRunner: Digital Resistance
4436100.short_description: A turn-based text adventure where you play as a data packet carrying whistleblower information through a hostile network. Solve puzzles, make moral choices, and survive.

4436200.title: FluxWerks
4436200.short_description: Build, automate, and expand in a vast, ever-expanding voxel world. Harness dynamic fluids, design sprawling factory lines, and research your way from early swarm-mining to quantum computing in FluxWerks.

4436290.title: Tomoshibi no Yoru
4436290.short_description: A cooperative puzzle adventure where a small flame and a girl journey together through the night. Guided by light, they brave wind and rain to reach the shrine.

4436320.title: Playback '94: Post Office
4436320.short_description: An abandoned 1850s Post Office. Four VHS tapes dated 1994. The last postmaster vanished without a trace. Explore, photograph the evidence with your Polaroid camera, and uncover the truth.

4436430.title: Fragments In Situ: Escape Room
4436430.short_description: Fragments In Situ is a psychological escape room experience about coercion, fractured perception, and the fragile boundary between interpretation and reality. Will you complete every puzzle to solve your past?

4436530.title: Oink & Collect
4436530.short_description: Open booster packs, collect absurd pig-themed cards, and complete your ultimate Oink-Collection. One pack every 30 seconds — patience (and luck) required.

4436730.title: ChitterPutt
4436730.short_description: ChitterPutt is a multiplayer chatroom based golfing game. Express yourself and socialize with others over a good game of golf!

4436780.title: Horse Craft
4436780.short_description: Horse Craft is a warm, retro‑inspired cozy game that's meant to be more calming than challenging. Mix, match, and discover new horse breeds. Each breed has a whimsical name and a cute journal entry that highlights its personality and quirks, creating a gentle world of exploration and discovery.

4436790.title: Gym Fitness Empire: Build, Coach, Expand
4436790.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Free To Play
4436790.short_description: Build and run a gym together in this co-op management sim. Design workout spaces, coach members, manage staff, and expand your fitness empire with friends as you grow from a small neighborhood gym into a full-scale fitness tycoon.
developers: Gym Fitness Empire: Build, Coach, Expand
publishers: Gym Fitness Empire: Build, Coach, Expand

4436880.title: The Silent Expedition Echo Protocol
4436880.short_description: Co-op first-person horror for 1–4 players. You and your friends are trapped in endless liminal backrooms where nothing makes sense. Explore, find keys and almond water, and work together to evade unstoppable monsters and escape.

4436910.title: Lake Town Stories
4436910.short_description: A romance adventure set in "Lake Town," a regional revitalization project. As a freelance writer on assignment, explore the town, meet four heroines, and shape the story through choices and affection. Features map exploration, time management, mini-games, and five endings.

4437010.title: rook
4437010.short_description: rook is a chess deckbuilding roguelike. cover your board in stickers and stack spare tiles to supercharge the cascading chaos and watch your scores go exponential, maybe then you might just survive the gauntlet.

4437020.title: Black Box: Infinite Arsenal
4437020.short_description: An AI-native Survivor roguelike where you synthesize everything. An AI Agent acts as a real-time designer, weaving hundreds of mechanics into exclusive, logical weapons based on your strategy. Experience true freedom and infinite possibilities. Every run is unique. Your imagination is your arsenal.

4437060.title: ChapuChapu
4437060.short_description: Would you like to splash around in the water with ducks? "ChapuChapu" is a casual game with an artistic concept of ducks and tiles. Shoot the ducks with a water gun to move them forward and carry them to the goal! One or two players can play using one PC and keyboard.

4437240.title: K2-18b: Legacy
4437240.short_description: In this walking simulator, you'll immerse yourself in a mysterious and unknown atmosphere accompanied by original, atmospheric music. As you navigate unique labyrinths, you'll uncover a fascinating storyline, explore the world of an exoplanet, and uncover its secrets.

4437260.title: Taco Tuesday
4437260.short_description: Recruit tacos, fight food enemies, survive the week. Build your team, pick your battles, and defeat the Health Inspector in this roguelike autobattler.

4437350.title: STILL SPINNING
4437350.short_description: A short psychological horror game where you continually choose whether to keep spinning the slot machine or quit. The controls are simple, but each spin changes the visuals and feel, with your choices branching the experience and ending.

4437380.title: Breve Bug: Champions of Destiny
4437380.short_description: STORY: You are a Roly Poly who works at a coffee shop. you are saving money so that you can expand your business to space. Why? 1. Because capitalism 2. Shut up GAME MECHANICS: - buy upgrades like lavender syrup - make coffee in point and click adventure - Dialogue affects how high your tips are

4437510.title: Juggo
4437510.short_description: It's Juggo tIme. Jump, punch, grab, kick and explore your way through this action packed 2D platformer, inspired by retro game systems and classic cartoons!

4437580.title: Dali’s Discovery
4437580.short_description: Step into cinematic 3D adventures and solve unique image & video-based puzzles inspired by real-world wonders. Explore mysterious temples, uncover hidden clues, and experience two distinct ways to play in one immersive journey.

4437710.title: Home Invader
4437710.short_description: A first-person psychological stealth thriller set inside a private villa. Infiltrate, gather critical intel, steal what you can, and escape unnoticed where silence is your only protection & every sound you make could be your last.

4437770.title: 迷失综合征 Disorientation Syndrome
4437770.short_description: Welcome to the company! A friendly boss, harmonious colleagues—everything seems almost too good to be true. But you always feel there's something strange about it. This is a psychological suspense and chilling visual novel that unveils the truth hidden beneath the surface of everyday illusions.

4437790.title: YEKO
4437790.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4437790.short_description: Ever said, “Let me finish this hand, then I can die”? We did and took our gaming addiction to the afterlife. Yeko tells the absurd tale of skeletons who couldn’t get enough of Okey in life and now set up the table beyond the grave low on calcium, but never on competitive spirit.

4438100.title: Idle RPG
4438100.short_description: Fight endless foes and mighty bosses, master dual progression, and hire assistants to generate damage or gold. Unlock unique perks and brave Hardcore mode. Empower enemies for huge bonuses — but lose and you'll pay the price. Risk everything. Become a champion.

4438110.title: Nightmare Conquest
4438110.short_description: A strategy-focused game: build your team, position your monsters, upgrade and unlock powers. Choose your upgrades carefully and create unique builds to overcome challenges.

4438120.title: Time to Sow!
4438120.short_description: Time to Sow! is a cozy farming game where you grow crops, automate your farm with Harvesting Robots, upgrade them through a skill tree, and transform the land with Terraforms to allow the planting of exotic new crops.

4438200.title: Ashline
4438200.short_description: Survive in a world devastated by infection. Explore a vast open world, scavenge abandoned towns, fight relentless hordes, and endure alone or in co-op.

4438290.title: GOD: B
4438290.short_description: After Earth’s fall, only distorted data remains. Join GOD Corp and restore the past in a virtual space.

4438300.title: Filltopia
4438300.short_description: The ultimate casual puzzle game that puts your brain to the test. Can you outsmart your opponents and claim the biggest territory? Divide, Fill and Win. Over 99 handcrafted levels and additionally countless computer-generated levels. Play against computer or up to 4 friends on one device.

4438370.title: Gym Rat Simulator
4438370.short_description: Grow a failing gym. Expand the facility, order and move equipment, run the gym shop. Hire staff and coaches. Train your own character. Compete in fitness contest to reach 5 stars.

4438510.title: Ezotoria
4438510.short_description: Revolutionary hero mechanics redefine tactical PvP. Ride dragons as Humans, lure enemy mobs as Wizards, build orc armies, craft dwarf blueprints. Each character transforms gameplay with unique systems. Master formations, coordinate strategies, and dominate in competitive 2.5D isometric arenas.

4438540.title: Limitless Survivors
4438540.short_description: A 2D top-down roguelite blending incremental progression and treasure hunting—defeat enemies to level up, loot powerful items from chests, permanently upgrade your stats with gathered materials, collect ultra-rare Artifacts, and Prestige to push your power to limitless heights.

4438560.title: Assessment
4438560.short_description: Assessment is a short psychological horror experience focused on tension, atmosphere, and player choice. You are trapped in a confined environment where you must read, think, and respond under pressure. As the test progresses, the situation becomes more disturbing, unpredictable, and dangerous.

4438660.title: Wriggle apple 2
4438660.short_description: A winter puzzle adventure where a hungry worm collects apples. Plan your path carefully as it grows longer and fragile icy blocks break beneath it.

4438670.title: NTR Tales - The Elf Next Stream
4438670.short_description: An adult RPG about love, streaming, and corruption. Help your elven girlfriend rebuild her lost memories, grow her audience, and repay your debt, one stream at a time.

4438740.title: Persuasion RPG
4438740.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Early Access
4438740.short_description: A game of logic, faith and perception. A Victorian roguelike mystery. Explore a haunted manor, gather clues, interrogate suspects and solve the disappearance of the Bishop before madness or darkness claims you! Can you see through the veil of fear, or will you be the next body found in the parlor?

4438870.title: Skyfell Mutation
4438870.short_description: Skyfell Mutation - this is a dynamic action shooter set in a biological post-apocalypse. Explore an Earth devastated by meteorite impacts, where flora and fauna have been transformed into deadly mutants. Develop supernatural abilities and try to unravel the mystery of civilization's demise.

4438940.title: Beat Bots
4438940.short_description: A casual musical puzzle game - make beats with bots! Listen to the target beat, then solve how to correctly replicate the beat by using a variety of tile types to manipulate bots that each represent a different drum sound

4438960.title: Death of a Grandmaster
4438960.short_description: A tactical chess roguelike where you build a custom board, survive escalating combats, and break enemy kings with powerful relic and piece synergies.

4439030.title: Rogue Slime: PC Edition
4439030.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4439030.short_description: Rogue Slime is a turn-based roguelite focused on an energy-driven item system. Use energies into your equipped items when they fill up, they activate automatically. Build synergies, manage resources, and adapt your strategy each fight

4439050.title: Curling
4439050.short_description: Curling is a strategy-based roguelike where you play in a tournament against progressively more difficult opponents all while building a deck of curling stones with special abilities.

4439070.title: Knead, Squeeze, Wrap!
4439070.short_description: A chaotic 1-4 player tycoon centered on Turkey’s iconic Çiğ Köfte! Step behind the counter, serve hungry customers, and upgrade your equipment. Diversify your menu to build the neighborhood’s most prestigious restaurant. Be fast, stay organized, and don't let anyone leave hungry!

4439510.title: Solitaire Nights
4439510.short_description: Solitaire Nights is a premium, standalone solitaire card game for PC and Mac, featuring smooth gameplay, atmospheric music, competitive scoring, and a refined desktop experience—designed for focused, relaxing play without ads or interruptions.

4439570.title: Splatsplasm
4439570.short_description: Playing as an astronaut you board a creaky, abandoned spaceship where you'll fend off relentless waves of musically synced weird alien creatures while using a variety of different bats to cover the walls evenly with splats to a certain percentage to progress to the next level in various arenas.

4439680.title: Cartridge Carnage
4439680.short_description: Loot, shoot, repeat. A mashup of rogue-like bullet heaven gameplay, mixed in with retro style top down dungeon crawler mechanics, and a dash of crude violence and humor.

4440510.title: Cliché Quest
4440510.short_description: A retro-inspired RPG made for beginners, newcomers, and anyone who just wants a cozy, classic adventure.

4440550.title: eethCross
4440550.short_description: Relax into eethCross, a stunning nonogram puzzle game blending logic and artistry. Solve 110 vibrant colored puzzles amid soothing ambience. Create and share custom grids via workshop integration, tackle the daily puzzle, or generate endless random challenges. Pure zen deduction awaits.

4416400.title: The Dumbgeon
4416400.short_description: The Dumbgeon is a fantasy bullet hell where you fight hordes of enemies with random and challenging modifiers. Unlock champions, items, and upgrades to aid you in your quest. Escape the dungeon for a more casual experience or test your limits with how long you can survive to earn greater rewards!

4416830.title: BATTLEDRIFT
4416830.short_description: A PvP 2D top-down shooter in space where your gun recoil is also your ship's propulsion! Master control of your ship better than your opponents and be the last one standing with up to 4 players.

4416970.title: Zombies Per Minute
4416970.short_description: Zombies Per Minute is a factory-building roguelite where everything you build is measured by one thing: how many zombies you can kill per minute. Yes, really. Use your imagination to grow your factory, make decisive choices each wave and progress from one outpost to the other. Until Earth is saved.

4417000.title: Monari Station
4417000.short_description: An ordinary commute becomes a moral crucible in Monar Station, a short psychological horror visual novel. Navigate an extreme situation, make value-defining choices... Discover what lingers after the train moves on...

4417120.title: Lunar Farer: Home Beginnings
4417120.short_description: Lunar Farer Home Beginnings is a room decorating game where stories of different characters are shown through the lenses of their homes, by decorating these homes you will get see the lives of these characters.

4417530.title: Find my key
4417530.genre: Adventure, Casual, Strategy, Free To Play
4417530.short_description: This is a maze game in which players must search for crucial items in darkness, in order to complete the game,these items are keys. There are four distinct difficulty levels, with each higher level demanding the discovery of more keys and presenting increasingly intricate pathways.

4417580.title: Soul Requiem
4417580.short_description: Soul Requiem is a 2D action roguelite blending flashy spear combat with deep progression. Face your kin turned into divine vessels and stand against the sacred horrors erupting from their flesh. Slay your enemies to liberate your mother’s soul trapped within.

4417660.title: Leaping Dungeon
4417660.short_description: Play as a deadly frog wielding 6 Weapons and 3 Tongues in this roguelike dungeon crawler. Fight your way through rooms swarming with flies and encounter powerful bosses. Find rare items and upgrade your weapons. Jump around, Lick stuff and Smack ugly flies on your mission to take down the Fly Lord!

4417770.title: Gambit's Escape
4417770.short_description: Gambit's Escape is a strategy puzzle game that blends minesweeper-inspired deduction with card mechanics. Analyze the board, manage risk, and guide a fleeing king as he uses his sword to overcome hidden dangers and rescue all villagers.

4418320.title: Trombone Rumble
4418320.short_description: Chaotic tail-chasing orchestra madness you can enjoy even after a few drinks! Rhythm + playful brawling smashed into the ultimate party game!

4420060.title: Furry Star Command – Hentai Jigsaw
4420060.short_description: Travel through distant sectors while assembling sensual jigsaw puzzles of furry officers, alien hybrids, and interstellar beauties — all featured in 30 exclusive artworks blending futuristic charm, voluptuous bodies, and that forbidden spark only the cosmos can ignite.🚀💗🦊

4420260.title: 大侠改命传
4420260.short_description: 一款文字类武侠人生模拟器游戏，你将扮演一名江湖中人，经历从出生到死亡的完整一生。体验多样身份，通过成长、游历、修炼、应对各种选择和战斗。改变自己的人生，同时也能影响他人的命运、左右门派的兴衰。

4420500.title: GoldenTime
4420500.short_description: Stop the public love proposal! No matter what happens...

4420690.title: Idle Tower Defense: Lil
4420690.short_description: This is an idle auto-battle tower defense game that runs quietly in the corner of the screen while you are busy with other things.

4420910.title: Clicksmith
4420910.short_description: Forge weapons, chase rarities, and build the ultimate blacksmith shop in this clicker/idle game. Sell your creations for profit or display rare weapons to unlock powerful stat boosts. All with a click of a button... or a hundred.

4421350.title: 关于我被学姐捡回家当女友这件事
4421350.short_description: Set in Hoshino City, a modern metropolis, you play as a runaway girl rescued by a reliable senpai, leading to an unexpected life together. A light yuri visual novel with branching choices that shape the relationship and lead to multiple endings. ~60–80k words, 2–3 hours playtime.

4421450.title: LEMMICK WORLD
4421450.short_description: Guide a tiny Steppe Lemming to the goal using a variety of clever mechanics. Featuring 100 levels filled with intricate puzzles built on creative gimmick combinations. A pure logic-based puzzle game with no action elements—perfect for players who love thoughtful, challenging brainteasers.

4421580.title: 找勺子LOOKING for MYSPOON
4421580.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4421580.short_description: A horror walking simulator play as a character searching for a lost spoon in a fantastical world You will experience a surreal world, from diverse swimming pools to strange houses. I hope you enjoy it.

4422040.title: Ludwig II - Virtual: Neuschwanstein
4422040.short_description: Ludwig II — Virtual: Neuschwanstein is a digital 3D experience centered on King Ludwig II of Bavaria and his famous castle, offering fascinating historical background. Explore exterior grounds and selected, partly unrealized interior spaces—on desktop or optionally in Virtual Reality.

4422430.title: DAICE
4422430.short_description: DAICE is a unique merge of turn-based dice-powered combat with inventory management, a roguelite where you control an evergrowing AI Core. Purchase and pilot unique spaceships, load your dice into weapons and systems, and unleash devastating combos and shape your own strategy-driven story.

4422440.title: SAM Arena
4422440.short_description: Collect, escape and hunt in a strategic rock-paper-scissors styled arena battler, where each player gains abilities based on their equipped masks.

4422760.title: 101 Cats in Rio de Janeiro
4422760.short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 kittens 🐾 in the hand-crafted Rio de Janeiro landscape. 🏆 Earn lots of achievements. How many 😺 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

4422770.title: 101 Cats in Saint Petersburg
4422770.short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 kittens 🐾 in the hand-crafted Saint Petersburg landscape. 🏆 Earn lots of achievements. How many 😺 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

4423270.title: Takeover 2
4423270.short_description: Take to the streets solo or with a partner in this fast paced, high-impact arcade beat ’em up. Takeover returns with refined gameplay, upgraded visuals and a pulse-pounding new soundtrack.

4423350.title: Rhythm Racer
4423350.short_description: Music-driven tunnel racing. Any song generates a unique 360° track. Collect gems on the beat, dodge obstacles, race through space. Deterministic generation + ghost racing = infinite replayability. Your music has never looked this fast.

4424830.title: Harap Alb
4424830.short_description: Inspired by the most famous Romanian fairy tale "Povestea lui Harap Alb", Eastern European folklore and the "Punch-Out!!" game series, a retro RPG that would probably make the original author Ion Creangă spin in his grave.

4425700.title: 技能贪吃蛇 , Skill Snake
4425700.short_description: "Skill Snake" is an innovative casual game that adds skills and new mechanisms to the traditional Snake game and combines it with simulation management.

4425770.title: The Phases of Abril
4425770.short_description: Narrative-driven bullet hell exploration with simple puzzles. Join Abril in a surreal plane as she fights weird people and creatures, stealing their balls.

4425880.title: God of Chaos
4425880.short_description: Defy nature’s laws and avenge your slain pantheon! Humanity once feared and hated you, but now, awakened from a thousand-year slumber, you are their only hope. A text-based interactive game.

4425990.title: Silk and Secrets: Rites of Pleasure
4425990.short_description: Beneath Versailles, desire still reigns. Indulge your ambition and taste a secret society’s most decadent pleasures while secrets decide your fate and history is reenacted behind locked doors. An interactive romance novel.

4426010.title: Seven Nights Ghost 2
4426010.short_description: "This Love, This Curse — Only 7 Days Left" Live together with a flashy ghost girl for seven days—and survive her over-the-top love attacks. A stylish, slightly dark, yet heartfelt horror romance about youth, fear, and self-control.

4426300.title: Subcontractors
4426300.short_description: 8-player physics-based co-op disaster simulator. You are a disposable subcontractor hauling volatile cargo through the dark abyss. The catch? The company trusts the cargo more than your loyalty so you’re all physically chained to the payload. Fight the environment, the contraband, and your own crew.

4426410.title: Potted Pets
4426410.short_description: Potted Pets is a cozy farming and pet simulator, with an adorable cast of living plant pots. Spend time cultivating a personal garden while growing a personal relationship with your collection of “Potted Pets!” Sit down for a relaxing, customizable experience that brightens up your busy day!

4426590.title: Dawn of Heroes
4426590.short_description: By day, you're just another citizen. By night, you defend the city. But don’t quit your day job, hero. A text-based superhero novel, 450,000 words and hundreds of choices, without graphics or sound effects.

4426610.title: <Code Breaker>
4426610.short_description: <CODE BREAKER> Is primarily about taking various ideas from some of the classics, such as Breakout, Peggle, Arcade Pinball, and the newer lust for bullet hells and roguelikes, and turning them into one semi-cohesive amalgamation.

4426690.title: Checkpoint 19
4426690.short_description: Checkpoint 19 is a border control tycoon where every decision balances speed and security. Build, optimize, and manage a high-pressure checkpoint where flow must never stop and risk never disappears.

4427130.title: Best Friend Quest
4427130.short_description: Rule over a town of customizable characters in this cozy simulation game. Dress up, feed, and play games with your townsfolk, build and break relationships as you please… But remember only the Best of Friends can handle the infamous Best Friend Quest!

4427250.title: False Flame
4427250.short_description: You are the voice in the impostor's head. In this single player social deduction thriller, manipulate cultists to build trust, stage alibis, and plan the perfect kill. Then gaslight the court at night to execute the innocent. Trust is a delicious resource to exploit, betrayal is the only way to win.

4427300.title: Chroma Surge
4427300.short_description: In Chroma Surge, every tap ignites a ripple of color. Matching areas flood like tides until the world unifies in one hue. Conquer 20 procedurally generated levels with locks, cannons, and more. Create your own pixel art in "Creation Mode." This isn’t just a puzzle—it’s a visual poem in color.

4427680.title: Rabbits Hunt
4427680.short_description: "The Needy Uncle Bunny" might be watching you... A creepy shadow lurks in a world of cute bunnies. Expect sudden RPG battles and jumpscares when you least expect it. Hilarious yet haunting—a pretty but chaotic horror experience. Presented by Usagi Lab, our first horror title.

4427790.title: Total Blade: Mythology
4427790.short_description: Gather soldiers on a 16th-century overworld map and lead over 1,300 troops in real-time TPS action. Manage your empire, command your army, and fight rival nations and mythical monsters in this grand-scale sandbox strategy.

4427810.title: DRAWCERY
4427810.short_description: Draw your spells. Command the elements. DRAWCERY is an online PvP spell-summoning game with unique, draw-to-cast combat. Sketch elemental symbols in the heat of battle to unleash real-time magic and outplay your rivals like a true wizard.

4427960.title: Banana Corp
4427960.short_description: Build your dream startup in Banana Corp. Grow from a tiny basement banana business into a thriving creative tech powerhouse. Click, automate, expand, and watch your cozy monkey run studio come to life.

4427990.title: Kinky Studio
4427990.short_description: Step into your own private bondage photography studio. Willing models await! Restrain them, pose them, gag them, and capture the perfect shot. Your studio, your rules, your fantasy.

4428090.title: Breach Squad
4428090.short_description: Breach. Fight. Loot. Repeat... Breach Squad is a top-down sci-fi auto-combat roguelike RPG built around corridor breaches. Your squad fights on its own - you command, manage loot, and grow marines permanently… But if they die, they’re gone.

4428310.title: Matrix Chess
4428310.short_description: Matrix Chess is a competitive online chess platform built for serious strategic players. Online 3D chess with global leaderboards and competitive multiplayer matches.

4428380.title: Infiniterra
4428380.short_description: An atmospheric voxel sandbox game focused on exploration, survival, and eerie nights. Explore dangerous caves, shape your world, and uncover what lurks beneath the surface.

4428590.title: Screams Echo
4428590.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4428590.short_description: Screams Echo is a dark roguelite featuring fully procedural levels, unique items, and powerful synergies that transform every run beyond recognition. Experiment with builds and turn desperate survival into destructive chaos.

4428660.title: Comet Busters
4428660.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4428660.short_description: Comet Busters is a game similar to asteroids with it's own flare and uniqueness. You pilot the Destiny, an ancient warship converted to a mining vessel. It has advanced weaponry such as bombs, missiles, laser bullets, and spread fire bullets. You will face enemies and unique bosses.

4428760.title: Stone to Silicon - Idle Clicker
4428760.short_description: Stone to Silicon: Build History, Click by Click From the spark of the first fire to the glow of the quantum circuit.

4428820.title: Endless Killer Sudoku
4428820.short_description: Abandon pre-made puzzle packs. Endless Killer Sudoku is a minimalist, infinite logic generator where every cage is meticulously calculated. No guessing, no 1-cell freebies—just pure, algorithmic deduction across handcrafted difficulty tiers.

4428930.title: Minecremental
4428930.short_description: Minecremental is a top-down pixel art idle incremental game about mining. Dig ores, earn gold, hire NPC workers, and unlock upgrades to build your mining empire. When progress slows, prestige for permanent bonuses and push even deeper. One more upgrade. One more prestige. Just one more...

4429120.title: Ambitious Road
4429120.short_description: Join the ambitious protagonist Michel as he rises through a war-torn world in this traditional turn-based war tale simulation RPG.

4429150.title: Typomon Hunter
4429150.short_description: A typing roguelike monster collector where every keystroke is combat. Type sentences to battle and catch 88+ species of Typomon, explore procedural dungeons, evolve your team, forge words, fuse hybrids, and climb the VS Battle ladder — all powered by your words-per-minute.

4429210.title: Emoji Wars
4429210.short_description: Emoji Wars is an exciting game inspired by the classic naval battle, where bright and funny emojis are used instead of ships.

4429420.title: The Birdsong Tree
4429420.short_description: A cozy building and light simulation game where you observe birds, create custom birdhouses, and help a living urban tree grow. Balance sound, diversity, and neighbor reactions as you shape a calm, reactive environment.

4429610.title: Nothing - the Video Game
4429610.short_description: Because at this point we would rather play NOTHING than what most of these american AAA game studios are putting out.

4429830.title: A Game About Going Up
4429830.short_description: A chaotic third-person precision platformer about climbing to the top of an unforgiving and brutal vertical level. Just go up and try not to fall. Your patience will be tested.

4429850.title: ASCII-RIFT
4429850.short_description: The music is the enemy. Dodge hazards generated directly from the soundtrack in fast, reactive arcade runs. Master precision and score in Chart Mode or survive escalating procedural loops in Rift Mode.

4429970.title: Echo of God
4429970.short_description: A world of discovery, ruled by the Gods. Inspired by the late 90s PlayStation era, a JRPG disguised as a Metroidvania. Filled with exploration, boss battles, party mechanics, dual ability skills, beautiful locations, collectibles, and character upgrades, while still being silly.

4430190.title: Soup Weather
4430190.short_description: A short narrative exploration game in which you play as Bean, an unemployed, 20-something, smart-ass. Wander around town, play mini games, feed the geese, and get to know the neighbours as Bean’s sanity begins to slip...

4431130.title: Snow Survival
4431130.short_description: Conquer the deadly snow mountain with wisdom and strength. Experience deep survival action through resource gathering, crafting, and fierce battles against wolves. Can you unlock all characters and survive this brutal winter?

4431270.title: Dark Fantasy
4431270.short_description: A kingdom enslaved by dark magic. Green altars control the people. Escape captivity, break the curse, and defeat the traitor who seized the throne in this retro-styled dark fantasy adventure.

4431390.title: ColdShift Derby
4431390.short_description: A fast‑paced vehicle‑combat survival game where you battle raiders, scavenge supplies, and upgrade your rig while managing scarce resources and fighting through a frozen wasteland on a desperate drive toward the last warm refuge.

4431610.title: PSYKOS
4431610.short_description: PSYKOS is a 1-4 player online co-op psychological horror set in a cursed psychiatric hospital. Work together to explore the abandoned asylum, solve puzzles, and survive the monsters that roam its halls. Rescue your friends before it’s too late.

4431630.title: Wizard Cleaning Simulator
4431630.short_description: Clean, repair, and explore in this 3rd person, single player cleaning simulator. In this story rich setting you explore as sentient cleaning tools where you will platform to new heights and solve puzzles to gain access to mysterious places in this magical castle.

4431680.title: Feed The Flame
4431680.short_description: Feed The Flame is a simple incremental game where you grow a flame to burn down the world. Buy better resources, unlock upgrades and employ thousands of workers to mine, chop and hunt down fuel for the flame. Easy. Satisfying. Highly addictive.

4431700.title: Tongue Tale Turbo
4431700.short_description: Tongue Tale Turbo is a fast 3D platformer: play as a frog, use your tongue to swing, push, and pull—then race through 60+ bite-sized levels.

4431750.title: Restitutor: Empire Restored
4431750.short_description: Restitutor is a historical incremental grand strategy game focused on statecraft, diplomacy, and calculated warfare. Strengthen your economy, research new technologies, form alliances, and outmaneuver rivals through high-level strategic decisions without micromanagement.

4431850.title: Audio Adventurers
4431850.short_description: Master critical listening skills through a fantasy-themed adventure! Battle through 10 magical realms that sharpen your ability to hear frequencies, compression, reverb, mixing, and synthesis. Perfect for aspiring audio engineers, producers, and sound designers. Train your ears, save the world!

4432180.title: The Eighth Loop
4432180.short_description: The Eighth Loop combines visual novel and platformer genres to bring you a unique experience. It has 1 platformer level that requires out of the box thinking to clear. The player needs to find out a way to escape out of a death loop.

4432610.title: FinalLoveMachine ~start retry polling with you in your most loved color~
4432610.short_description: In a world of ASCII characters and CRT scanlines, join the girls in Go Home Club activities, through moments of joy and sorrow, protecting a precious school life with everyone, striving to keep feeling this world together. But this world will not run forever — and you are the only one who knows.

4432770.title: Mouse O'Clock
4432770.short_description: Explore a vast unique 2.5D clockwork world. Play as a brave Mouse solving clever gear-based puzzles with levers, buttons, pipes and shifting mechanisms. Learn the past and the future of the world, and find out what happened to an ancient civilization of clock-keepers.

4433080.title: Hold The Roost
4433080.short_description: A strategic tower defense where you command a flock of chickens to gather resources, fortify defenses, and survive relentless predator attacks. Balance growth and survival as you protect the next generation through treacherous nights against tactical predators.

4433100.title: The Phone from Another World: My First Love
4433100.short_description: If she’s truly gone… Then who is answering the phone?

4433150.title: Idle Realms: The Eternal Spire
4433150.short_description: Train 18 skills, craft legendary gear, fight monsters across 6 realms, and conquer The Eternal Spire. A deep single-player idle RPG with full offline progression.

4433320.title: Trinkets and Gunpowder
4433320.short_description: Trinkets and Gunpowder is an exciting Russian Roulette inspired party game. React quickly to gain cards which can offer various strategic advantages, but take too long to pull the trigger and your opponent may get there first.

4433380.title: ChessSnake
4433380.short_description: Chess... chess never changes. How much can you do?! It's time for something new - a combination of chess and snake!

4433410.title: The Cave of Doubt
4433410.short_description: Lovecraftian horror game with elements of psychological and survival horror genres. Where Allen is lost in a cave and is forced to face horrors beyond his imagination. Survive the cave, solve mysteries, reveal the lore lost in time.

4433460.title: Is This the Way
4433460.short_description: Is This The Way is a chaotic 1–4 player online co-op survival game. Escape adaptive robot enemies, conquer physics-based parkour, and respawn to try again as teamwork turns into hilarious sabotage in unpredictable, fast-paced matches.

4433630.title: KritterRun
4433630.genre: Action, Casual, Racing, Sports, Free To Play, Early Access
4433630.short_description: Race and learn Japanese! KritterRun is a multiplayer racing game where you master vocabulary through fast-paced binary gates—left for correct, right for wrong. Fall Guys meets language learning. No flashcards, no punishment, just fun.

4433710.title: The Housekeeper
4433710.short_description: The Housekeeper is a psychological horror simulation game where you work as the new night shift housekeeper at an ominous hotel. As you work through your shifts, you start to experience strange events. Will these events reveal a dark secret, or will they be the cause of your demise?

4434000.title: Dream of Becoming
4434000.short_description: You will become “Dream”, exploring, growing, trading, building, and forging alliances across the boundless universe. Wielding multi-dimensional strategies in battle, you sail toward your own distant horizon within a constantly Becoming, ever-shifting reality.

4434030.title: 戚继光 Qi Jiguang: Art of War
4434030.short_description: This is a tower defense strategy + Auto Battler set during the Ming Dynasty's war against the Wokou pirates. You command the legendary general Qi Jiguang and achieve his astonishing 0:2000 kill-to-loss ratio—one of history's most remarkable military feats.

4434240.title: Just an Ordinary Bike Ride
4434240.short_description: In this adventure horror game you experience nothing but a calm bike ride home, your chauffeur is late and it's starting to rain. You only have a bike but you need to get home, it's a rather empty street aside from some debris. It's just a bike ride home.

4434290.title: Hentai Horny Alt Girl
4434290.short_description: Hentai Horny Alt Girl - They want you to notice them. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4434590.title: ReTower: Custom Defense
4434590.short_description: A modular tower defense strategy game where you design, build, and upgrade fully customizable towers to survive relentless enemy waves.

4434700.title: Postponed
4434700.short_description: An addictive wave-based arcade rougelite, in whch you are the manager of a game development studio. You get a project each week, that your team and you have to work on to get paid. With that money get upgrades, skill your employees and even unlock characters. Ever wanted to lead a game dev studio?

4434710.title: Retro Puzzles - Eviva L'arte
4434710.short_description: A museum inspired jigsaw journey: 225 masterpieces, 45 artists, 9 regions, and three difficulty tiers up to 4160 pieces, plus fact based artist bios and artwork notes.
