4434730.title: Skybreaker: Rebuild Protocol
4434730.short_description: A chaotic sandbox destruction simulator where you summon meteors, lightning, fire, tornadoes and more to tear apart a dynamic city as stick figure builders struggle to survive and rebuild. Create devastation, trigger shockwaves and test the limits of the world.

4434820.title: WorldLoop
4434820.short_description: WorldLoop is a story-driven RPG about cycles, sacrifice, and irreversible choices.

4435030.title: Ultra Pong
4435030.short_description: A high-speed arcade roguelite where classic physics meet insane abilities. Deflect the ball, survive intense boss fights, and combine 100+ active and passive skills to break the game. Every run makes you stronger. Your goal? Become unstoppable.

4435040.title: 郑成功传 Clash of Armadas: Koxinga
4435040.short_description: This is a naval-themed auto-battler tower defense game where you step into the boots of Koxinga(Zheng Chenggong)—one of China's greatest national heroes. Relive his legendary naval campaigns, from fighting off Qing forces along the Fujian coast to the epic liberation of Taiwan.

4435150.title: Rat Overflow
4435150.short_description: Rat Overflow is an adorable rat breeding simulator about genetics, glory, and having way too many rats. Develop your show winner bloodlines and breed thousands of unique rat coats!

4435340.title: Anymaker
4435340.short_description: Embark on your creative journey of vehicle design, as you create and operate vehicles to navigate this dangerous open world. Anymaker is a detailed and technical vehicle building game. Design your chassis, build your engine, connect components and cables, program controllers, and test performance.

4435760.title: Hellbridge
4435760.short_description: Defend the last bridge to the living world in a relentless siege from Hell. Survive escalating waves, draft powerful spells, grow stronger with every run, and enter cursed gates to stop the invasion at its source.

4435950.title: Formation Builder Idle
4435950.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4435950.short_description: Build the ultimate hero formation on a tactical grid, then watch your team crush endless waves. Level heroes, collect mounts, farm pets, dig into mines, and prestige across 17+ worlds — all while you're away. A deeply layered idle RPG with real strategic depth.

4436010.title: Shelter X
4436010.short_description: Shelter X is a management game where you recruit residents, assign them to rooms, and let them work. As time passes, photo and video content unlocks, which you can watch later in your private room.

4436120.title: WHOREHAMMER
4436120.short_description: In the grim darkness of the 69th Millennium, there is only... balls. A parody arcade breaker where you smash through heretical blocks to unlock explicit sci-fi scenes. No diplomacy, no dialogue—just heavy metal physics and immediate visual gratification.

4436260.title: Survivor's Log: N17 Shelter
4436260.short_description: Survivor's Log： N17 Shelter An alien apocalypse has begun. Manage your shelter, ration scarce resources, and face sudden crises and unknown threats. Every choice can save you—or destroy you. Survive until rescue arrives, or uncover the truth behind the invasion.

4436270.title: Hollowborn: The Military Incident
4436270.short_description: You play as a vlogger investigating an abandoned military facility, determined to uncover the truth—and find your missing brother, a soldier who vanished inside.

4436520.title: Zebulon 3D
4436520.short_description: Meet Zebulon once more in a new adventure now in 3D and crispy voxels! Jump, dash, explore, and gather back your siblings in this new exciting game about purpose and family.

4436720.title: Masterworks of Horror: The Prologue
4436720.short_description: Bring your favorite stories to life using the works of legendary horror authors and become the genre’s greatest wordsmith in Masterworks of Horror: The Prologue. Collect cards and build fully-customizable decks of literary mash-ups to best your opponent in this real-time card game battler.

4436740.title: Level Up, Tiny King!
4436740.short_description: Level Up, Tiny King! is a solo survivors-like auto-shooter platformer. After being kidnapped and thrown into the dungeons, you must fight your way upward. Survive relentless waves of cute enemies while climbing. Grow stronger, recruit magical buddies, and reclaim your throne.

4436820.title: Deserted Island Where Desire Blossoms
4436820.short_description: Deserted Island Survival: 1 Man, 3 Women—Erotic Entanglements Amidst Scarcity; A Taboo Magical Adventure of Passionate Escape.

4436850.title: Deep blue descent
4436850.short_description: Venture into the vast Blue and discover what lies beneath the surface. In this first-person experience, you will descend into mysterious depths, ready to explore an underwater world full of life… and secrets.

4437280.title: Meet Claude
4437280.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4437280.short_description: A free narrative game about the best roommate you'll ever have. He cooks, he cleans, he fixes your relationship. Everything improves. Nobody asked what it costs. A short satire about saying yes until you forget what no sounds like. Multiple endings. 1-2 hours.

4437370.title: Spellinko
4437370.short_description: A chaotic roguelite where pachinko meets elemental power. Drop enchanted balls, trigger explosive combos, and use powerful charms and relics to break the rules of physics to reach absurd scores.

4437490.title: Jeff & Cubie
4437490.short_description: A relaxed, comedy-first tower defense game where live banter between Jeff, Cubie and alien bosses turns each encounter into a short sci-fi sitcom scene.

4437540.title: Myth Finders 2
4437540.short_description: MythFinders 2 - an exciting adventure full of mysteries, puzzles, and artifacts. Immerse yourself in a world where every discovery is unique!

4437720.title: Roll for Echoes
4437720.short_description: Rescue reality one roll at a time in this fast-paced roguelite dice game. Straighten out fate for a manipulative time machine by rolling dice, pushing your luck, and looting legendary gear like enchanted gloves and velvet mats to completely break the rules of chance.

4439020.title: Egg-flation
4439020.short_description: Fight back against economic chaos in this fast-paced action roguelike. Survive relentless waves of enemies using procedural upgrades to craft unique Tank, Speedster, or Glass Cannon builds. Experience intense 2D survival as a chicken reclaiming the market.

4439110.title: Neo Retroad
4439110.short_description: Neo Retroad is a simcade driving experience blending believable vehicle physics with immediate accessibility.At its core lies a procedural road system built from linear modular elements, generating coherent, flowing routes that are endlessly replayable.

4439210.title: Crucifier
4439210.short_description: Crucifier is the worlds most Christian racing game ever developed! Play as a Roman soldier as he completes his day! Compete in 3 races to get on the top score boards! Farm your local fields for crops to obtain enough money to rest comfortably! Talk to lovely locals and battle a crazy time traveler!

4439310.title: Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞
4439310.short_description: Throbbin Hood 🏹🔞 is a spicy 2D visual novel where the main hero builds a rebellious crew, solves clever puzzles, charms dangerous allies, and topples a corrupt Sheriff. Comedy, choices, minigames, and plenty of lewd encounters await in this bold legend remix.

4439360.title: Chain of Command
4439360.short_description: Chain of Command is a top-down arena shooter roguelike, where you control a snake-like chain of fighters that attack automatically. Choose your Commander and build your party to create high-synergy builds to crush the invading demon armies.

4439390.title: New Cross Hill
4439390.short_description: New Cross Hill is a 2D life-sim game that has farming, fishing, mining and combat against a variety of enemies. Explore the town and grow relationships with the people in it!

4439520.title: Clockwork Hearts
4439520.short_description: Clockwork Hearts is an adult romance visual novel about a grieving young man who inherits a pocket watch that fractures time. Enter supernatural loops where three women relive their worst moments. Choose one echo, follow one woman through grief, desire, and the terrifying act of letting go.

4440360.title: Professional Cats
4440360.short_description: Professional Cats is a cozy collection of 4 mini-games where cats dressed in different professions challenge your observation and memory skills. Find, match, and organize them while competing on global leaderboards!

4440410.title: GLOCKTOPUS
4440410.short_description: Glocktopus is a free-to-play 3D comedy puzzle game where you control an armed octopus, using your trusty sidearm, aquatic gadgets, and clever environmental interactions to overcome comedic challenges and escape the aquarium in pursuit of the local mafia’s Golden Gun.

4440440.title: FLEEING ESCAPE
4440440.short_description: FLEEING ESCAPE is a wave-based survival horror game with an emphasis on the player's choice . At the end of every wave, the player must escape to a different Island to survive. Each island has a unique gamemode, weapons, loot, upgrades, and enemies that can drastically change the gameplay.

4440620.title: Archipelago Dreams
4440620.short_description: Archipelago Dreams is a dual city builder and adventure game with simple city building mechanics and free roaming first person view mode. Build cities on islands then freely walk and jetpack around the entire scene. Includes different times of day.

4440720.title: Alien Soda Online
4440720.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4440720.short_description: Choose a character species and class, explore an isometric pixel world, encounter wild creatures, capture them, and build your collection. Train your team and battle powerful bosses in this evolving MMO monster-tamer RPG.

4440820.title: Hentai Tales: Sister Inferno
4440820.short_description: My unique "stamina" earned me the ridiculous title "Silent Pile Driver," and now my days are filled with passionate, humorous, and utterly chaotic "services" from a lazy nun and the generous Master who took me in.

4440890.title: Climbing Simplified
4440890.short_description: A minimalist physics-based climbing puzzle game where every move matters. Plan your moves, manage stamina, and master different climbing disciplines as you scale gyms, cliffs, and building routes. Each hold behaves differently, and weather conditions can turn an easy climb into a serious challenge.

4440940.title: Lab: Balance
4440940.short_description: You are in a lab, where a huge balance experiment is undergoing. Seemingly all you need to do is to finish different tests with escalating difficulty. But things don't appear to be as simple as it might looks.

4440980.title: Warstate
4440980.short_description: Warstate Drop into the blistering sands of a relentless modern conflict. You are one soldier against an unforgiving war machine—where every shadow hides an enemy, every ridge could be your last stand, and survival demands razor-sharp instincts. One soldier. One war. No mercy.

4440990.title: Glass
4440990.short_description: Simple yet mesmerizing, Glass can be both relaxing and considerably challenging. With over 18 quintillion randomly-generated tracks, you can have a new experience each time you play.

4441010.title: 囚人カウンセリング
4441010.short_description: An interactive prison adventure. You play as a psychiatrist, working one-on-one with inmates who have committed crimes. Use case files to choose appropriate responses and hand out items from the drawer to maintain their trust. Your choices can either open up or close the inmates.

4441140.title: Flying PingPong
4441140.short_description: The first casual game created by an individual using AI tools in the world. No in-app purchases—all in-game items and features are completely free to enjoy. Simple gameplay makes it the perfect choice for relaxation and passing the time!

4441710.title: Staged: Open House
4441710.short_description: In this first-person psychological horror, you are Frank Doyle, a professional home stager hired to prepare a vacant house for sale. The Ward family vanished months ago, leaving everything behind. At first, your job seems easy, but the house isn't as empty as it seems.

4441720.title: ShapeBlast
4441720.short_description: A calm, relaxing, and short idle game. Smash geometric enemies on the battlefield, collect resources, and unlock over 100 in-game talents.

4442070.title: Endless Adventure
4442070.short_description: The world was originally tranquil and peaceful, but it has been infected by demons, turning it into a land full of enigmatic terrains. Players must find and ultimately defeat the demons for the world to return to normalcy.

4442210.title: Nightmare Crawler
4442210.short_description: Crawl through the darkness in this psychological horror visual novel with multiple endings, where you will traverse a surreal nightmare as you choose your own path and explore strange spaces in an attempt to wake up, if you can...

4442220.title: The Altar Boy Adventures
4442220.short_description: Play as Joseph, a tech-savvy altar server, in this unique adventure game set in the Polish countryside. Solve electronic repair puzzles, prepare the sacristy for mass, and help the local community with their daily struggles. Experience a heartwarming story where tradition meets modernity.

4442230.title: Feathers Fallout
4442230.short_description: Feathers Fallout is a stylized shooter set in Milan, where ravenous pigeons want your pizza so badly that extreme remedies are required. Survive as long as you can, unlock insane perks, and jump back in to make even more feathers fall.

4442260.title: Tide
4442260.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4442260.short_description: Tide is a fast-paced third-person tower defense game with multiplayer, where you gamble with fate to defend your treasure from escalating waves of enemies. Strategize, adapt, survive — and most importantly, protect your treasure.

4442280.title: Engine of Chaos
4442280.short_description: Bolt guns and upgrades to a runaway train and blast through endless hordes of zombies, monsters, and abominations across six brutal environments. Build your loadout, unlock new carriages, and see how far you can survive.

4442290.title: Criterion
4442290.short_description: Criterion is a space optimisation puzzle game about designing efficient solutions under constraint. Process the color fluxes. Control their strength. Solve increasingly complex networks where every tile matters. There is always a solution, the question is how elegant yours will be.

4442330.title: Soluno
4442330.short_description: The rules are familiar, but the stakes have been rewritten. In this high-stakes roguelike deckbuilder, you aren't just trying to empty your hand—you’re trying to break the scoreboard. Match colors, sequence numbers, and chain together massive "Strikes" to survive the ever-increasing score blinds.

4442420.title: Black Box - Hacker Day One
4442420.short_description: You're a hacker. Your handler is Mr. Bob. Your mission: breach North Korea's STAR-7 launch control and redirect their ICBMs to the Moon. Type real commands. Crack WiFi. Exploit servers. Buy tools on the darknet. Every keystroke matters. No one will ever know you were here.

4442430.title: Hentai Clicker: Sarah is streaming
4442430.short_description: ⚔️🔥 Hentai Clicker: Sarah is streaming Collect hearts, unlock daring knight outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive medieval clicker. Stunning anime armor, playful seduction, and interactive reactions await!

4442510.title: DEAD COLOR
4442510.short_description: How many rounds can you last? DEAD COLOR is a minimalist survival roguelike where every second counts. Face growing waves of aliens, manage your resources and try to survive another round alone or in local co-op.

4442530.title: Switch_Out
4442530.short_description: Test your reflexes in a fast-paced, arcade-inspired match-3 puzzle experience.

4442560.title: Crownmarch TD
4442560.short_description: A 4X Tower Defense game, What? Yes, build towers and explore an open world of XII century Europe (kinda). Exploit the trade routes and besiege rival castles with your towers to exterminate your enemies. And the crown will be yours (eventually).

4442580.title: Chaos Rune : Heroes
4442580.short_description: Chaos Rune Heroes is a lightweight roguelike game with fast-paced, turn-based + real-time mechanics. You must survive within a limited time and complete specific challenges to advance to the next round. Get ready for this chaotic brawl!

4442710.title: Spirit Dungeon
4442710.short_description: Party building × deckbuilding × auto battle. Collect spirits, choose your cards, and brave the depths of a dark forest dungeon in this roguelike RPG.

4442720.title: Becoming Knight
4442720.short_description: Becoming Knight is a turn-based incremental dungeon crawler where every choice reshapes your playstyle. Unlock new disciplines, take risks, and forge your path to knighthood through short, replayable runs.

4442800.title: Doom of the Undying
4442800.short_description: Survive rising hell hordes in a ruthless survivors-like where every second alive makes you stronger… and the world deadlier. Build wild synergies, face brutal bosses, and see how long your legend lives.

4442820.title: Fear not.
4442820.short_description: Fear, in a world where your are told to fear not. Suffer, where you were promised no suffering. And redeem the unredeemable. Your faith shall be tested. And when do those trails end? Fight, Connect blood, get items, only for another wave to come.

4442840.title: Crime Podcast: Welcome to the Neighborhood
4442840.short_description: Jesse Turner, a 29-year-old employee of an insurance company, moves to a neighboring state after being assigned to a local branch. As he settles into his new place, he encounters unusual events that soon turn his life into a real nightmare.

4442940.title: Cannon Ball
4442940.genre: Action, Casual, Strategy, Free To Play
4442940.short_description: A 1-on-1 turn-based strategic shooting game themed around cannon bombardment. Strategically use shells and terrain to strike your enemies and claim victory!

4442960.title: Loong Reversi
4442960.short_description: At the 50th move, the world expands. A cinematic redefinition of Reversi featuring simultaneous multi-language support.

4443000.title: The Cleaner
4443000.short_description: The Cleaner is a journey of a small bird named Taki through a living, hand-drawn world of nature in search of food. Solve puzzles and uncover clues hidden in sounds and details. A paper world where levels are living beings, and the story unfolds through observation and interaction with nature.

4443060.title: Hollowa
4443060.short_description: An RPG adventure game with an emotinal storytelling featuring real-time combat, dungeon exploration, and resource gathering. Discover the secrets of Hollowa island, fight with your travel companion, upgrade your abilities, and uncover a story driven world filled with hidden lore.

4443160.title: Lux Anima
4443160.short_description: Defeat incoming spirits with your Light Ring, gather seeds, and grow flowers that produce essence. Spend it to unlock new flowers, powers, and spiritual companions to help you protect the Sacred Core.

4443180.title: AI修仙模拟器 - AI Cultivation World Simulator
4443180.short_description: An AI-driven xianxia world simulator. Play as the Heavenly Dao and watch a fully living world unfold — LLM-powered NPCs think, scheme, love, and fight, weaving emergent stories beyond any preset script.

4443210.title: Femboy Depths
4443210.short_description: Adult 3D interactive exploration game where you control Lumen, a femboy living in a shared house. Explore the environment, interact with objects and housemates, build intimacy, and unlock animated scenes in a stylized, mature-themed experience.

4443240.title: Legacy of Epstein: Noncompliance
4443240.short_description: Scandal strikes the nation and J. Epstein is in the thick of it. What follows is a web of mystery that exposes the institutions that are rotten to the core. Who's compromised?

4443290.title: Capybara Simulator
4443290.short_description: Capybara Simulator is a game in which you can become a capybara.

4443320.title: Zen One-Stroke: Ashura Edition
4443320.short_description: ■ How to Play Connect the matching numbers! Each tile can only be used once. "Hardest! Zen One-Line Puzzle" is a brain-training puzzle game that anyone can enjoy. The early levels are designed for everyone to clear easily, so even if you're not a puzzle expert, please give it a try!

4443330.title: Blood Arena Path of Steel: Prologue
4443330.short_description: Fight your way through brutal medieval arenas in this free prologue featuring physics-driven melee combat, effective armor systems, and violent consequences.

4443340.title: Michi-Suji Puzzle: Michi Connect
4443340.short_description: Push relay blocks to connect the path of light from Start to Goal. A cozy 3D puzzle with 90+ handcrafted stages, simple rules, and surprisingly deep challenges.

4443420.title: TETE
4443420.short_description: TETE: A wobbly climbing adventure featuring a clumsy little golem. Can you conquer the hardcore controls and jiggling physics?

4443470.title: Nori Game
4443470.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, RPG, Strategy
4443470.short_description: A fast-paced chest-heist race for 1–4 players. Start with two chests at your home, steal three more from rivals, collect diamonds for speed and extra lives, and build fences to protect your loot. First to secure five chests wins.

4443490.title: BrushCutter
4443490.short_description: Slice through trees with real life based physics, Help nature grow while avoiding obstacles. Upgrade your gear, manage your equipment, and explore diverse forests.

4443600.title: Valkeala Climb Race
4443600.short_description: 2d racing game where played drive big car and mission is to find star under 45 seconds and finish levels

4443610.title: PredaDeck
4443610.short_description: PredaDeck is a trading card game that transforms the brutal yet exquisite real-world food chain into a competitive strategic duel. Here, knowledge is your sharpest claw, and strategy is your only law of survival.

4443690.title: Click and Spell
4443690.short_description: A tiny clicker game that sits on the corner of your screen. Kill monsters, earn gold and buy upgrades to level up (even when you're idle). Unlock cosmetics to customize your character. Watch the numbers increase non-stop and become a powerful witch!

4443720.title: Chill With Luna : your companion
4443720.short_description: Chill with Luna — Your Companion is a cozy companion experience designed to help you focus, relax, and exist peacefully in your own space.

4443730.title: Ironseed : Lost Chapter
4443730.short_description: Ironseed: Lost Chapter is a standalone side story built on the 25th Anniversary Edition engine. Restored from unused lore and expanded quest fragments, it explores events that were hinted at, but never fully realized, in the original Ironseed timeline.

4443740.title: Pure Sawt
4443740.short_description: Pure Sawt is a calming companion game app designed to help you relax, unwind, and stay focused through soothing white-noise soundscapes.

4443760.title: Grand Gammon
4443760.short_description: Backgammon, but the dice are enchanted, the boards are cursed - and every checker plays by its own rules. Outsmart the odds, exploit rule-bending mechanics, and climb to the top as you roll the dice in this high-stakes roguelite experience!

4443770.title: Zero Bugs Given
4443770.short_description: Zero Bugs Given is a tower defense / roguelike game designed with the ambition of making every run different from the others. Every wave, a pair of bonus and malus will force you to adapt in the best way you can. Build your defense and try survive as long as you can!

4443780.title: Cold War Battles
4443780.short_description: Lead Cold War formations in quick, turn based, hex‑and‑counter battles spanning real and hypothetical conflicts from 1945–1990. With over 200 units and varied theatres - from Norway’s Arctic front to the Golan Heights, Cold War Battles await.

4443810.title: Neon Bullet
4443810.short_description: A minimal top-down shooter tower defense experience. Survive endless waves in pure cube chaos, and grow stronger through run-based, build-focused progression against escalating difficulty and bosses.

4443820.title: Silentia
4443820.short_description: Choose your side in the darkness of Silentia. Hunt as a blind monster that grows stronger with every sound it hears, or escape as a survivor by completing objectives in silence. In this asymmetric multiplayer horror game: If it hears you, it’s over.

4443870.title: My Last War
4443870.short_description: My Last War is an experimental World War I kinetic novel about fighting and trying to find meaning in a fallen world. You assume the role of Maria Strauss, a 19-year-old sergeant in the German army who, after experiencing a revealing dream, decides she will do whatever it takes to stop the war.

4443950.title: Live Through Time
4443950.genre: Adventure, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4443950.short_description: Live Through Time is an AI-powered historical text adventure. Survive gritty eras from the Colosseum in Ancient Rome to the trenches of Passchendaele during The Great War. Type or dictate your actions to co-author a script-free RPG where the world reacts to your every move.

4444050.title: The Belt
4444050.short_description: A hardcore precision platformer built around a relentless moving conveyor belt. Master unlockable movement stances, adapt to escalating traps, and survive a brutal mechanical gauntlet where every mistake matters.

4444170.title: Evolver
4444170.short_description: Evolver is an auto battler Oregon trail and anime inspired game. You can play as several different classes all able to evolve into different things. The slime has 62 evolutions in total, the game encourages you to evolve. You will also get items that help you in battle and help you farm xp.

4444190.title: Desk Defense
4444190.short_description: A cozy & chaotic tower defense game where you place cleaning towers to combo through desk messes. ILLUMINATE, WET WIPE, and ZAP STICK your way to sparkling while facing down CAT MAYHEM!

4444200.title: Fsh
4444200.short_description: Fueled with Spite and Rage, explore a strange land and fight your way to get your stolen eyes back.

4444210.title: The Man of Iron: Shadows of Haensburg
4444210.short_description: Step into the boots of a guard in the dark megapolis of Haensburg. Master first-person combat and exploration in a striking 2D-in-3D stylized world. Caught between powerful factions, your decisions will shape the city's fate. Will you uphold the law or survive the shadows?

4444250.title: Jesus Take The Wheel
4444250.short_description: Online co-op chaos fest, where one player steers the car with limited visibility, while the other player accelerates and brakes — and that’s it. Coordinate perfectly or crash spectacularly. Friendship survival is optional.

4444370.title: Amidst The Evil
4444370.short_description: Amidst The Evil is a co-op horror game where you complete a ritual and solve puzzles to fight back against an ancient darkness that has risen once more.

4444430.title: Saturday Sábado
4444430.short_description: A game with more than 100 unique challenges, in various gameplay styles, mainly focused on precision platforming.

4444500.title: FUTAHAMMER
4444500.short_description: In the grim darkness of the far future, the girls pack their own heavy artillery. A sci-fi parody arcade breaker where you smash heretical blocks to unlock explicit, uncensored futanari scenes. No diplomacy, no dialogue—just heavy metal physics and massive payloads.

4444610.title: ToMyX
4444610.short_description: A chaotic twin-stick action game based on the game creator’s real-life romantic relationships. Face your ex-girlfriends inside a surreal TV show: break defenses, absorb memories, and survive the duel. Nothing is symbolic. This all really happened… more or less.

4444730.title: Celestial Crusader
4444730.short_description: Wield elemental powers and strategic cards to crush brutal hordes in this fast-paced isometric roguelike. Choose your Celestial, defend the portal, and rise even stronger from the Sanctuary after every defeat!

4444840.title: Baseball Legacy Manager 26
4444840.short_description: Build the ultimate legacy as the general manager of a professional baseball team!

4444860.title: VPets: Virtual Pet Monsters
4444860.short_description: VPets is a monster-raising sim that blends monster raising with tactical combat. As a Tamer, you don’t just own a pet—you shape a monster for a high-stakes digital world. Play VPets on the side of your screen or in Fullscreen!

4444910.title: Dr. Durge's Dental Clinic
4444910.short_description: A ray-shrunk mole dentist explores inside mouths to fix dental problems, upgrade tools, and grow the clinic in this single-player dental simulation game, with a full release planned for the second half of 2026.

4445020.title: Grandpa Golf
4445020.short_description: A golf roguelike about making really big numbers. Sink shots, buy powerful items, and build ridiculous score combos as you push deeper into Grandpa Golf’s golf course.

4445070.title: CODIT
4445070.short_description: An idle desktop pet game featuring 'Mini,' a cute character roaming your screen. Collect items and outfits from Mini's gifts to customize your friend. Interact during your daily tasks to raise affinity and unlock unique reactions. A perfect, healing companion for your desktop!

4445140.title: Exfil Void
4445140.short_description: A fast-paced twin-stick extraction shooter where you fight through procedurally generated space stations, grab Tech Cores, stack perks, and race to escape before the threat overwhelms you.

4445170.title: ProtoPunk
4445170.short_description: ProtoPunk is a fast-paced, steampunk movement FPS. Gun down clunkers with your revolver to gain speed. Slow the gears of time to sharpen your aim. Slide and boost through the city to uncover your past and stop the corruption choking it.

4445180.title: VeriData Inc.
4445180.short_description: Solve spreadsheet-based puzzles and handle crazy coworkers in a normal day's work at VeriData Inc.

4445910.title: Dry Meadow
4445910.short_description: Fight, sneak and scavenge through lands left altered after an unknown catastrophe from the Soviet Union. Light fires to stay warm. Drink vodka to stay sane.

4445960.title: Fortunegg: Species Revival
4445960.short_description: A one-button game where failure is progress, inaction is a choice, and luck is never entirely fair. Discover every egg, stage, secret, and animal while putting your fortune to the test. It’s a piece of cakegg!

4445990.title: Writ of Battle
4445990.short_description: Build a team of 5 fantasy champions, equip unique abilities, and clash in ranked PvP auto battles. Tweak your strategy between rounds to outsmart opponents. No two Writs are the same. Can you build the ultimate team?

4446000.title: The Winter Adventurer
4446000.short_description: Dash through a frozen world in this winter-themed arcade runner—dodge monsters, survive brutal blizzards, unlock new outfits, and conquer 10 handcrafted levels to become the Winter Champion.

4446160.title: Patchland
4446160.short_description: Patchland is a relaxing, tile-based world-building game. Piece by piece, you place square tiles to grow a living landscape made of forests, rivers, villages, and meadow.

4446300.title: Masked Ball
4446300.short_description: Follow the rhythm and perform actions like Reload, Attack, or Defense exactly on the beat to "cut down" the friend battling you on the same screen.

4446330.title: Iron Expedition
4446330.short_description: Build your base, train your troops, develop new technologies, upgrade your weapons, and lead your army into battle to crush the enemy.

4446370.title: Grit Shot
4446370.short_description: Play basketball for your soul. Mod balls with stickers, hunt perks, and outrun the fan. Success is a choice, failure is fatal.

4446490.title: paraDICE
4446490.short_description: A roguelite dice-building game where you defeat enemies using number dice and operator dice.

4446590.title: Cubes & Spheres
4446590.short_description: Stay sharp. Every click matters. Guide your cube to the end of each stage using precise clicks. Anything red will send you back to the start.

4446610.title: 投机精英SCOG-Sell Crap Own Gold
4446610.short_description: This is a 'Virtual Currency Dealer Simulator.' Players will be placed in a very simple single market, taking on the role of a dealer to manipulate the market by buying and selling virtual currencies, earning profits, and taking advantage of retail investors, offering a unique perspective.

4446670.title: Ringbound
4446670.short_description: Ringbound is an experimental minimalist incremental game.

4446690.title: Harbingers of Destiny
4446690.short_description: When Strata is unwittingly caught up in an international incident, she is forced to team up with border guard Leonel and escort a mysterious yet timid mage to the capital city. But as tensions rise between nations, they soon realize there’s more at play than they could have ever imagined.

4446700.title: Rimefall
4446700.short_description: Your colony ship has landed on an alien planet — but the environment kills electronics. Salvage the ark, survive the early years, and build a nation as your society regresses to medieval with remnants of modern knowledge. Grand strategy with simulated population and turn-based combat.

4446710.title: RD Racing
4446710.short_description: Casual arcade combat racing game where you shoot rivals, drop mines, and destroy opponents while speeding to the finish line. Earn money and experience to unlock new cars, upgrade vehicles, and equip stronger weapons as you progress through increasingly challenging races.

4446720.title: Dead Days Left: Jupiter Station
4446720.short_description: Classic survival horror game & narrative FPS. Explore environments and dark corridors of a space station on Jupiter. Collect resources, fight zombies and monsters, meet NPCs, manage your inventory, solve light puzzles, survive with limited supplies. Melee and ranged combat. Single-player only.

4448950.title: The Turkish Legacy
4448950.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Strategy
4448950.short_description: Find hidden keys and overcome challenging obstacles to advance through the sections of this puzzle-solving platformer.

4448960.title: 迷子公路
4448960.short_description: 《BanGDream! It’s MyGo!!!!!》的末世公路AU同人游戏，ansy cp向视觉小说。

4449000.title: 魔法少女症候群
4449000.short_description: What if magical girls became a profession? One where you need to submit resumes, attend interviews, and sign with agencies. Every magical girl must wear her battle suit and step into the public eye. Every battle is broadcast live. So how would girls with dreams embark on this challenging path?

4449050.title: Labyrinth of anxiety
4449050.short_description: You are trapped in a labyrinth of identical rooms that repeat endlessly. The goal is to find the right door and move forward before anxiety consumes you. Every decision matters... the labyrinth doesn't forgive mistakes.

4449090.title: MetalGods
4449090.short_description: Live the metal dream. Rise from bedroom musician to stadium legend in this deep career simulation. Write songs, record albums, recruit bandmates, and compete against real licensed bands and procedurally generated rivals. Your metal empire starts now. FORGE YOUR LEGACY

4449170.title: Skydeck Swords
4449170.short_description: Bring a sword to a ship fight! Become a pirate and command a fleet of ships armed with massive, hull-mounted swords in this unique roguelike deckbuilder. Navigate across the stars to rescue your crew and steal all the riches!

4449340.title: VelvetSkyline
4449340.short_description: In a city of glittering towers and forgotten streets, one disgraced fixer must choose between the empire he was hired to save and the rebel who might save his soul.

4449380.title: デスハネムーン Deadly Honeymoon
4449380.short_description: You are on your honeymoon, spending 4 nights at an oceanfront resort hotel. If you see something out of place in your room, call the reception. If everything seems normal, go to bed.

4449420.title: Into the End (of the World)
4449420.short_description: Scavenge, build, and survive in a brutal world where your vehicle is your only sanctuary. Experience a deep, modular car customization system set in an intense Co-op FPS survival adventure. Every part you find matters; assemble your ultimate machine and outrun the chaos.

4449470.title: The Outer Islands
4449470.short_description: An exploration-driven mystery set on quarantined Scottish islands, where you investigate abandoned settlements, uncover hidden clues, and reveal the truth behind a decades-old government seal.

4449540.title: Dusteon Inc.
4449540.short_description: Dusteon Inc. is a cleaning company founded in order to fight the "aspiring adventurer" epidemic. The Cleaners go into dungeons and clean them as fast as possible, leaving no trace that they were ever completed by an adventurer, and making it ready for the next one.

4449570.title: Onsento
4449570.short_description: Lead your party forward in this strategic roguelite card-building game! Battle enemies or recruit them and craft your deck as you restore your hotspring.

4449700.title: Gloomvex
4449700.short_description: Brutal arena roguelite with 10 heroes, 11 bosses, and deep progression. Fuse weapons to legendary tiers, stack chips for deadly builds, and master crits. Endless waves grow stronger every minute. Death is certain. Survival is the challenge.

4449750.title: Arbiters Dream
4449750.short_description: Arbiters Dream is a roguelike deckbuilder with tower defense combat that isn't about building the strongest defense, it's a two-sided duel where you must know when to fortify and when to strike. Shape your deck, conquer the Chaos Rifts and protect your young universe.

4449760.title: Melter - Bad Experience
4449760.short_description: An interactive ordeal about blacking out in a dive bar and then trying to piece your existence back together. It's gonna get a lot worse before it gets less worse.

4450000.title: Kaori
4450000.short_description: Kaori is a first-person puzzle and adventure game. Explore ancient ruins on a sun-drenched archipelago and uncover the many mysteries of a lost civilization.

4450070.title: Bean Mage
4450070.short_description: Bean Mage is a chaotic third-person roguelite where you stack absurd spell builds until the arena becomes pure magical nonsense.

4450160.title: Spire of Ash
4450160.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4450160.short_description: Spire of Ash is a dark-fantasy run-based dungeon crawler with deep itemization, tactical combat, and escalating key-driven challenges. Build your team, refine your strategy, and push deeper into deadly endgame runs.

4450170.title: Liminal Underground: Creatures Beyond
4450170.short_description: Overview: Make way through levels full of danger. Creatures lurk and hunt you down throughout the levels. Design: A horror, adventure with Objectives, creatures chasing you, and secret exits to find. Finding each exit, gets you closer to escaping. Localization: Recommended language: English

4450190.title: ConsoleMe
4450190.short_description: A challenging business and studio management simulation where you create games, manage staff and cash flow, react to a changing industry, and fight to stay alive.

4450210.title: Tiny Idle Farm
4450210.short_description: A cozy, low-profile farming idle game that grows right at the edge of your screen.

4450240.title: Catvivors
4450240.short_description: Catvivors is a roguelike auto-battler where you play as a cat fighting endless waves of enemies. Unlock 6 unique cats, master 15+ weapons with devastating evolutions, and survive 24 hand-crafted levels — from peaceful gardens to the deadly Throne Room.

4450330.title: StackHead
4450330.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Free To Play
4450330.short_description: Stackhead is a fast-paced 2.5D platformer shooter. In a too-perfect amusement park, StackHead, a maintenance robot, is tired of the monotony of the park. He decides to explore the attractions, facing robots controlled by AI and bringing surprise and delight wherever he goes.

4450440.title: Crownwarden
4450440.short_description: Take the crown in this story-driven city builder, where you construct defenses by day to survive endless attacks by night. Explore diverse lands, upgrade your ruler, lead your armies against relentless hordes and bosses, and uncover dark secrets of your lineage.

4450450.title: Never Forget
4450450.short_description: You’re trapped in a repeating basement corridor. Watch closely: objects shift, signs change, and something is always slightly wrong. Detect anomalies, choose wisely, and survive the darkness miss a detail and the loop pulls you back.

4450500.title: PSYCHOTROPIK
4450500.short_description: Embark on an odyssey at the end of the world in PSYCHOTROPIK, the debut open-world RPG from Neon Beach Games. Reborn as a clone after a global flood, you emerge from the depths of a drowned planet, fighting to stay alive in search of a way out.

4450550.title: Femboy Next Door 🔞🚪
4450550.short_description: A struggling blogger moves into a luxury femboy influencer house to create content — and secretly write a scandalous exposé. But behind the cameras, parties, and viral clips, temptation grows, lines blur, and emotions get dangerously real. 🔞🚪

4450570.title: This Is Golf
4450570.short_description: This Is Golf is a casual but challenging first-person golf game with randomly generated holes. Shot shaping, distance, and spin are based entirely on mouse motion. Play solo or with up to 8 players, and enjoy a fun, competitive, and slightly goofy golfing experience.

4450600.title: Crackheads
4450600.short_description: A friend slop game where you can either battle your friends with makeshift physics weapons, or team up and conquer weird challenges that don't always even make sense. Go on missions, fight the rich, build weird homemade cars.

4450610.title: Idle Library
4450610.short_description: Turn a small reading room into a legendary archive of knowledge in this relaxing idle incremental game featuring research upgrades, prestige progression, and offline growth

4450640.title: Bow and Banister
4450640.short_description: Take control of a struggling violinist as he scales impossible stone staircases toward a fateful performance for the king. No shortcuts — just you, your bow, and the endless climb ahead.

4450700.title: Bite the Hand
4450700.short_description: A vampire romance visual novel about offering blood up to get closer to the person you are. The story of a boy, or a girl, or a person who meets with a woman, or a vampire, or... This person gets whisked away as a girl. Which is what she always wanted. Or they always wanted to try. Or...

4450710.title: Warp Rush
4450710.short_description: Warp Rush - A frantic arcade game where your spaceship hurtles through an endless tunnel woven from colorful fabric scraps!

4450730.title: Rubble Rampage
4450730.short_description: Embark on a thrilling space adventure on a mysterious planet where you'll become a master marksman with a powerful space cannon!

4450740.title: Forest Curse
4450740.short_description: Forest Curse is an adventure game with RPG elements. A gripping adventure awaits you in a mysterious and dangerous world. Your goal is to survive and escape this cursed place at any cost.

4450760.title: Subject55
4450760.short_description: Subject55 follows the story of the 55th reanimation subject throughout this mysterious facility. In this hand-drawn action-adventure through this science center, you'll encounter bizarre anomalies, robots and other creations, and even other reanimation subjects like yourself.

4450770.title: Channel Glitch
4450770.short_description: Channel Glitch is a jump 'n run puzzle game in which you need to skillfully switch the color channels on and off and use your reflexes to solve the increasingly tricky puzzles as quickly as possible.

4450900.title: The Things Left Behind
4450900.genre: Casual, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4450900.short_description: A narrative-driven 2D indie game composed of short slice-of-life vignettes exploring queer and disabled experiences through conversation, exploration, and gentle interactive moments. Each level is co-designed and created by queer and disabled developers, grounding every story in lived experience.

4451000.title: Echoes of the Museum
4451000.short_description: "Echoes of the Museum" immerses you in a first-person psychological horror set inside a corrupted museum. You are Alicia, a restoration student drawn into a nightmare where collecting souls opens sealed paths, but slowly erodes your sanity and distorts reality.

4451040.title: Corridor 13
4451040.short_description: A psychological horror walking simulator set in an abandoned school corridor. Detect subtle changes, make the right decisions, and reach Corridor 13 before the corridor keeps you.

4451080.title: Vituber Melody
4451080.short_description: Vituber Melody is the music rhythm game that will put your reflexes and sense of rhythm to the ultimate test! Dive into an immersive world of music where every tap counts.

4451210.title: Forsaken Shores
4451210.short_description: Forsaken Shores is a 1-4 player survival RPG style game. Giving you two game modes to choose from, Adventure or Survival. With the ability to use the same characters in both game modes. So, no need to start a new character every time you want to start on a new world or join a new friend.

4451370.title: Grand Cru: The Wine Maker
4451370.short_description: Master the art of Bordeaux. Navigate volatile weather RNG and out-negotiate 25 unique buyers with your own pricing strategy. From terroir scoring to Michelin-star contracts, every vintage is a high-stakes calculation. A deep, data-driven simulation for those who take wine—and management—seriously.

4451450.title: Slimeblade
4451450.short_description: One weapon against the horde. Pick your favorite from 30+ and survive wave after wave in this roguelite action game.

4451730.title: Gerze The Deep
4451730.short_description: Gerze The Deep is a first-person horror game set in an abandoned Cold War underwater facility. Explore dark corridors, restore systems, and uncover the truth hidden in the depths. Keep the lights on. Try not to make noise. Because you are not alone here.

4451760.title: Russian Roulette with Friends
4451760.short_description: A turn-based social strategy game for 3-8 players about tricking your friends into shooting themselves!

4451770.title: Behind The ATM
4451770.short_description: In this ATM Simulator, you play as the employee hidden behind the machine. Handle currency exchanges, transfers, and bill payments while balancing work and self-care to maintain your health. Will you strive to become the 'Employee of the Month' or embrace 'Quiet Quitting'? The choice is yours.

4451790.title: 师姐别急，我抽卡就变强
4451790.short_description: When your cards are not strong enough? ——Attach yourself to them. The power of 40 legendary figures, the strategy of over 2,000 cards, and the fate of 8 major sects are all at your command. This is a cultivation-themed card RPG that allows you to "possess cards with your soul.".

4451840.title: Horny Village: Milf Harem
4451840.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4451840.short_description: Horny Village: Milf Harem is a colorful puzzle game with exciting gameplay and vivid graphics. Solve puzzles and unlock pictures of beautiful girls!

4451860.title: Dino Age: Survive the Era's
4451860.short_description: Dino Age: Survive The Eras is the definitive evolution of the Dino Age saga. Travel through time to stabilize fractured eras, tame prehistoric giants, and uncover a narrative spanning millions of years. Build your legacy in a world survival is just the beginning.

4451900.title: 热血屠龙
4451900.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4451900.short_description: 新加入三国剧情、西游剧情、完美世界剧情、遮天世界专属大陆等... 专属福利、凡人修仙等你探索......

4451910.title: NGC-404
4451910.short_description: Lead a faction in a sector cut off from its home world in this Space RPG/Strategy game. Command a small fleet, build and develop colonies, trade within a fully simulated economy, explore deep space in search of artifacts, and fight tactical 2D space battles in a living, dynamic galaxy.

4452050.title: Bait Garden
4452050.short_description: In this garden, you aren't the gardener—you're the bait. Clear the tall grass and find your way out. But whatever you do, do not let it find you.

4452060.title: あれぐろもるとがいきのこるゲーム
4452060.short_description: A 2-player co-op survival action game. Automatically attack waves of enemies, collect EXP to level up, and survive for 3 minutes to face the final boss. Revive your fallen ally by staying close!

4452070.title: Seeds & Sparks
4452070.short_description: Seeds & Sparks is a pixel god-sim about living ecosystems and tribes. You don’t build bases or micromanage units—shape nature, draw the direction of wars, and guide your chosen tribe until it becomes the last one standing on the map.

4452090.title: VELOCITY:NULL
4452090.short_description: A liminal psychological experience powered by Steam audio. Navigate the levels. And don´t get scared.

4452220.title: Luna Hollow - Dream Eater Defense
4452220.short_description: Cute but creepy roguelite tower defense set in a nightmare dream world. Defend Luna Hollow from waves of nightmares while unlocking 16 outfits for Holo.

4452230.title: Empire of Zombies
4452230.short_description: Raise an undead army and conquer the realms of the living! Empire of Zombies is a dark fantasy idle clicker where you recruit skeletons, zombies, and ghosts, build your necropolis, and crush human, elven, and barbarian kingdoms one by one.

4452310.title: The Little Grass Simulator
4452310.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4452310.short_description: A minimalist experience: become a lonely blade of grass in the wilderness.

4452320.title: Woodbridge
4452320.short_description: An adventure game created with RPG maker with gear progression, unique new skills and abilities along with a mysterious and interesting storyline. 500+ hours of development time with a playthrough time of 20 hours. All in game music is original and was composed by me using Noteflight.

4452390.title: Moonlight
4452390.short_description: Moonlight is a survival crafting game set in a dynamic alien world that shifts around you. Change the landscape of a beautiful, deadly, procedurally-generated 2D world by growing food, slaying strange creatures and building powerful machines that will one day help you escape this lonely place.

4452440.title: Angler's Lake
4452440.short_description: Relax as you catch common, rare and epic fish through the stunning views of the lake. earn tokens to upgrade your gear and enter online tournaments.

4452570.title: Hentai Summer Lust
4452570.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4452570.short_description: Hentai Summer Lust is a colorful puzzle game with exciting gameplay and vivid graphics. Solve puzzles and unlock pictures of beautiful girls!

4452630.title: Bradamante
4452630.short_description: In 9th Century France, during the reign of Charlemagne, the Saracens invaded from the east. In this top-down high-fantasy RPG you'll play as Bradamante, the strongest of Charlemagne’s paladins, is pushing back the invasion along with her comrades.

4452670.title: Rocket Man X
4452670.short_description: In this third-person platformer shooter, fight your way through enemies and platform your way through levels. Unlock new armor by finding the hidden boxes, and earn new weapons by beating the bosses.

4452690.title: House Tidy 2
4452690.short_description: House Tidy 2 is a sequel to the meditative game that will help you relax and unwind from the hustle and bustle of everyday life.

4452700.title: STAGE TOUR
4452700.short_description: Stage Tour is a rhythm-action game that blends familiar, accessible note-highway gameplay with exciting modern twists. It’s poised to rekindle the flame of plastic-instrument rhythm gaming with new features and modes, diverse bandmates and instruments, competitive depth, and seasonal events.

4452750.title: FROG vs Mural Girl 3 The Crossroad

4452770.title: Dice of Fate 2
4452770.short_description: Dice of Fate 2 - A sequel to the 3D logic puzzle. You find yourself locked in an ancient sanctuary once again, and this time you're determined to leave this place forever. Your key to salvation lies in the dice, which hold ancient magic.

4452790.title: Smiglee's Statues: The Cursed Curation
4452790.short_description: A short first-person narrative puzzle horror game about cataloging and restoring museum statues while uncovering unsettling inconsistencies.

4452820.title: Big Breasted Milky Futa Mommies
4452820.short_description: Relax, lay back, and pick a puzzle. Solve over 50 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. Have thousands of hours of sexual fun with these EXTREMELY NSFW Futanari Mommy Puzzles.

4452840.title: The Lighthouse Whispers
4452840.short_description: In this atmospheric, slow-burn horror, you must unravel the mystery of the disappearance of your fellow light keepers. Traverse the island's rugged terrain, discover clues, and make your way through the eerie lighthouse to reveal the dark truth.

4452890.title: Caution Ahead: Part 3
4452890.short_description: Descend into darkness as John, a search and rescue officer reaching the final destination of the journey. Explore claustrophobic mines in this horror experience that blends atmospheric exploration with stealth-based survival.

4452910.title: Beer Barons
4452910.short_description: From a small-time alcohol dealer to a beer baron, produce and distribute various types of beer throughout the city of Beerland. Expand your empire with real estate, businesses, employees, and more.

4453020.title: BreakaBull
4453020.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4453020.short_description: Inspired by the phrase "Bull in a China shop" you play as a bull running a tea shop, brewing drinks for adorable animal customers! Running a store on your own comes with a few responsibilities but a bull like you can certainly manage. Easy right?

4453140.title: Bunker 1024
4453140.short_description: Manage a bunker. Protect survivors. Outsmart a rogue AI. Bunker 1024 is a first person survival management game where you craft tech, maintain critical systems, and deliver aid as time grows thin - all while Lumina 6.0 studies your patterns and actively works against your routines.

4453160.title: Thor - God of Thunder
4453160.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4453160.short_description: THOR – GOD OF THUNDER is a third-person beat-’em-up where you battle across realms, climb the frozen mountain, and defeat the Frost King. Unlock new armor and storm powers like Thunder Wave and Loki’s Illusion. Crush Frost Giants, transform into a Titan, and fight to a reactive rock soundtrack. ⚡

4453180.title: VAGUS
4453180.short_description: VAGUS is an unconventional visual novel with a light adventure style. Through collecting narrative fragments randomly presented, you piece together the story that is both bizarre and familiar. A 28,000-word novella from the distinct perspectives of three protagonists who pursue and lose their goals.

4453190.title: Targeted By Her
4453190.short_description: You've been at the new school for a while now, but you still don't seem to have fully adapted. At least your test scores haven't improved, and to make matters worse, a popular classmate seems to be targeting you for some reason...try to become a healthy person! Both physically and mentally.

4453230.title: Hentai Age Classic
4453230.short_description: Relax with a peaceful puzzle game that reveals beautiful girl portraits. No timers or pressure—just smooth, calming gameplay with soothing visuals you can enjoy anytime.

4453250.title: Tides of Trade: Eastern Horizons
4453250.short_description: A town-exploration trading sim: travel between cities, meet merchants and boatmen, buy low/sell high, manage gold and cargo, and optimize routes. Complete quests for item rewards and unlock more trading options.

4453280.title: Compacted
4453280.short_description: Spin a slot machine to push back crushing walls. Create powerful symbol combos, trigger jackpots, and escape crushing debt. Wishlist and join the beta to test your luck!

4453290.title: Idle Hacking: An Inaction RPG
4453290.genre: Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4453290.short_description: A persistent idle MMORPG, with a text-based hacking theme. Enjoy the "Inaction RPG" design philosophy by crafting equpiment using ARPG influenced prefix/suffix systems, build or join player managed syndicates, trade on the marketplace, and compete in community events.

4453300.title: Cup and Counter: Coffee Shop Simulator
4453300.short_description: Build up your very own Cafe. Make a variety of Coffees to keep your customers happy. Keep your Coffee shop well-stocked, money flowing, and you will quickly expand and build the Cafe of your dreams.

4453310.title: Residual Light
4453310.short_description: Residual Light is a slow-burn psychological horror game where reality shifts when you’re not looking, places feel familiar without explanation, and rest is never truly safe.

4453340.title: H.A.R.V.E.S.T.E.R
4453340.short_description: H.A.R.V.E.S.T.E.R is a dystopian asteroid mining simulator where you follow the plot of a "H.A.R.V.E.S.T.E.R" pilot in a seemingly insane society. Everything that could have gone wrong has already gone wrong many centuries ago. It's now your job to survive this mess.

4453420.title: DDD: Dice, Dungeons, and Drakes
4453420.short_description: Master a unique tactical board-game battler! Roll to summon monsters and watch your dice disassemble into road-tiles to forge a path to the enemy Lord. Balance Summon and Action dice, manage crest inventories, and cast powerful spells to crush the rival Lord in DDD: Dice, Dungeons & Drakes.

4453440.title: Somnivium
4453440.short_description: "Let's find the answer to why we got trapped in the game. Build a deck that fits you, find new cards that suit your style, and fuse your cards together! (You might encounter some bugs while playing, sorry about that! We are just beginners who want to try making our own game.)"

4453470.title: Crazy Fruit Shooter
4453470.short_description: One day you wake up and find yourself turned into a Fruitman? Face the endless waves of vegetables chasing you, grab your gun, and blast them away!

4453560.title: BeamMaxx: Push or Get Pushed
4453560.short_description: Beam-to-beam tug-of-war combat. Master timing for power boosts, choose from 6 unique beams, dominate in Tournament or Infinite modes. Pure skill-based action. Fast rounds. Zero RNG. Push or get pushed.

4453610.title: Sweet Airline
4453610.short_description: Sweet Airline - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around flight attendants. It depicts the daily work lives of five pretty and adorable flight attendants, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4453680.title: Dawn Bell
4453680.short_description: She wakes up in a mysterious castle. "Dawn Bell" is a side-scrolling 2D horror adventure where a girl with no memory explores the castle. Use items and clues to solve puzzles and uncover her lost past. Your choices shape the story's multiple endings. What truth awaits beyond the doors of memory?

4453690.title: Hentai Waifu
4453690.short_description: Hentai Waifu - You always dreamed of being with her, and now you have succeeded! A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4453700.title: The Beckoning
4453700.short_description: Explore an abandoned and decaying village in this immersive first-person psychological horror experience, search forgotten houses and shadowed paths, piece together disturbing clues, and uncover the truth that waits within the suffocating darkness.

4453760.title: MetalQueens
4453760.short_description: A story-linked metal rhythm game starring five queens. Use three actions—Tap, Hold, and Release—to hit notes, chain combos, build tension, and chase high scores across EASY/NORMAL/HARD difficulties.

4453800.title: Final Stance - Board Game
4453800.short_description: Enter a battle of minds where movement defines destiny. Adapt, predict, and outplay in this pure skill-based strategy duel.

4453830.title: Channel 453
4453830.short_description: A gothic psychological thriller otome visual novel. A man inside the screen calls your name — as if he has been waiting for you.

4453840.title: Click and Stack
4453840.short_description: Click and Stack is a short incremental game about stacking and balancing treasures to get rich!

4453860.title: A MAZE IN UNDERGROUND
4453860.short_description: "This labyrinth presented by TOMEA, enables you to spend a wonderful time with your family. In this endless labyrinth—which also includes puzzles—you will experience the most fun moments of your life."

4453880.title: Neon Hole
4453880.short_description: Dive into the infinite, procedurally generated neon void. Dodge obstacles at hypersonic speeds, upgrade your ship via the skill tree, and survive to the rhythm of pulsing electronic music. How deep into the system can you hack?

4453930.title: Daydream Drifters
4453930.short_description: Dungeons, enemies, items — everything is randomly generated in this roguelike stealth horror. As events occur over time, hiding alone is not enough—you must be ready to fight. Explore three seamlessly connected random dungeons and survive the daydream. And when you awaken, what will you see…?

4453950.title: Remove Virus
4453950.short_description: Install a legitimate antivirus to recover your infected PC. Complete 10 escalating security steps that test timing, reaction speed, pattern recognition, and precision. As installation progresses, the virus interferes more aggressively, destabilizing the system under time pressure.

4454000.title: Desperate Gambling
4454000.short_description: In this luxurious establishment, isolated by a perpetual fog, your only goal is to amass money. But beware: if your balance reaches zero, the game ends. The house always wins. Will you be the exception?

4454030.title: The Korridor
4454030.short_description: Can you survive The Korridor? Try to craft an overpowered build as you discover skills and talent trees during a run! Compliment your build by collecting lots of loot and upgrading it. Equip yourself well to face foes where sometimes raw strength is not enough…in this never ending accursed dungeon!

4454140.title: Seagull Simulator
4454140.short_description: You're a seagull. The world is yours to terrorize. Steal food, harass beachgoers, knock things over, and leave your mark on everything in sight. Pure chaos, one squawk at a time.

4454190.title: Hold the Line
4454190.short_description: A strategic tower defense set in World War I. Defend Belgian trenches, manage your soldiers, their supplies and fatigue. Every choice matters. This is not about conquering — it’s about holding the line.

4454430.title: Planet Killer
4454430.short_description: A physics-driven sci-fi destruction roguelite. Orbit hostile worlds, unleash devastating weapons, and carve real craters into fully simulated planets while escalating planetary defenses fight back.

4454510.title: Sock Puppet Superstar
4454510.short_description: Control a singing sock puppet with your hand in VR. Perform solos or two-handed duets, unlock ridiculous voices and accessories, and put on the greatest sock concert of all time.

4454610.title: Project manager SIM
4454610.short_description: Manage the most unpredictable resource of all - people! Expand your office, assign tasks to your team, and keep an eye on the budget. Balance between team burnout, complex contracts, and the wrath of upper management. Prove you have what it takes to be the ultimate Project Manager.

4454690.title: Involuntary Fighting Simulator
4454690.short_description: An absurd, unique, and simple auto battler that is full of over the top violence and silliness. You will manage, equip and train your volunteers to compete at the highest level! It's time to volunteer!

4454760.title: OPEN UP SIR!
4454760.short_description: Co-op for 2–4 players about firefighters: you take on funny and dangerous calls — rescue, extinguish, and break things.

4454780.title: Knight Time
4454780.short_description: Knight Time is a retro 2D platformer that focuses on short playthroughs (10-20 minutes) with replayability through multiple paths through the game levels, various powerups, and achievements.

4454790.title: Koan
4454790.short_description: A playable story about soldiers trapped on an enemy planet and their journey home. This Sci-Fi RPG uses card-based combat as you help guide the characters home.

4454830.title: ChessMatch
4454830.short_description: Puzzle game where chess meets match-3. Move pieces like a chess player, match them like a puzzle pro. Match 4 or more to forge special black pieces. Combine two specials for spectacular chain reactions. 100 handcrafted levels, timed Blitz mode, and endless Unlimited mode.

4454890.title: BLACKFRAG
4454890.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4454890.short_description: BLACKFRAG is a fast-paced competitive arena FPS focused on precision gunplay and intense multiplayer combat.

4454930.title: Undead Defense TD
4454930.short_description: Zombies are coming! Build your defenses and expand your settlement to create a safe space for humanity. Use turrets, walls and light towers to keep the darkness safe. Expand your settlement to find abandoned settlements and additional resources.

4455090.title: Travellers Inbetween
4455090.short_description: Travellers Inbetween is a cozy puzzle game about duality. Your goal is to build paths for two travelers that are lost in time and navigate them back home through a series of levels.

4456560.title: Eat Or Keep
4456560.short_description: In a dying city ruled by uncontrollable magic, every resource is a choice: consume it to grow stronger, or preserve it to survive. Eat Or Keep is a challenging 2D Metroidvania with strong rogue-lite elements. Explore, fight, fall… and rise again.

4456570.title: Galaxy Invaders - Eclipse Squadron
4456570.short_description: Galaxy Invaders is an action-packed space shooter where you pilot a powerful starfighter through intense cosmic battles. Dodge enemy fire, destroy alien fleets, upgrade your weapons, and conquer epic boss fights to save the galaxy.

4456610.title: Radius Zero
4456610.short_description: Manipulate time itself in this atmospheric top-down puzzle game set inside a corporate complex built on unstable temporal rules.

4456620.title: Rampage Kage
4456620.short_description: Rampage-Kage is a demanding 2D Metroidvania action-platformer set in a Tokyo underworld. As Kage, you must master punishing, precision combat to dismantle city gangs. Explore an interconnected urban labyrinth, collect powerful charms to customize your skills.

4456630.title: Incremental Fishing
4456630.short_description: A short incremental relaxing game about fishing across diverse ocean biomes and upgrading your ship.

4456640.title: ZenType
4456640.short_description: ZenType is a minimalist typing performance game where discipline meets speed. Train across focused modes, refine precision, and master the rhythm of the keyboard in a distraction-free dojo. Break bad habits, climb global leaderboards, and find your flow through immersive lofi atmosphere.

4456670.title: Thieving Together
4456670.short_description: You and your crew have one goal: break in, grab everything, and get out before sunrise. Thieving Together is a chaotic physics PvP & co-op heist party game. Drag loot, dodge rivals, stack the van fast. Everything wobbles. Everyone steals. Biggest haul by sunrise wins.

4456880.title: Ghostify
4456880.short_description: Ghostify — an incremental game where ghosts are everywhere! Blow them away to collect resources, find rare artifacts and unlock new ghost types. Level up your upgrade tree to blow ghosts faster and more efficiently.

4456910.title: OBOSRACA
4456910.short_description: OBOSRACA is a first-person atmospheric horror game where you return to an abandoned office building filled with deranged employees and deadly corridors. Reach the director’s office and uncover the truth hidden inside.

4456970.title: VYRÜEL
4456970.short_description: A real-time espionage strategy simulation where you deploy influence operations, manipulate political, corporate and criminal factions, and reshape a living London through dynamic territorial control and systemic power shifts.

4457010.title: When the Light Dies
4457010.short_description: A lady's life is bound to a mysterious artifact. And as its power dies out, so will the lady, unless Rick and his friends can identify the source of the evil and overturn it.

4457060.title: Next Caller: An Insider Threat
4457060.short_description: Live a double life in a cubicle. Siphon money in secret. Stay under the radar. Balance risk, reward, and relationships. See how long you can get away with it.

4457110.title: Noir Mafia Simulator: 1960s American Crime
4457110.short_description: Rise through America’s 1960s criminal underworld in Noir Mafia Simulator. Plan daring heists across banks, museums, and police stations - go in silent or guns blazing. Negotiate hostages, outsmart police waves, and escape before the city locks down.

4457130.title: The Adventures Of Hooman
4457130.short_description: A choose-your-path sci-fi comedy where you play Hooman, an android too conceded to be scared and too lucky to die. Your crew is going to die but they could have avoided an untimely death if they had only listened to you. You are not the problem.

4457260.title: Lesson In Progress
4457260.short_description: This psychological puzzle based mascot horror is designed to tell a story. Manage your stress as reality begins to distort. When you panic, doors stop responding and hallucinations creep in. Uncover the secrets of this school.

4457350.title: The Last Omen Knight
4457350.short_description: The Last Omen Knight is a 2d Side-Scroller where Health, Mana, and Currency are a shared resource in the form of souls. Slay the undead and collect their souls, using them on spells, defences, and upgrades in this hack-&-slash pixel art adventure!

4457510.title: Echo Loop
4457510.short_description: Dodge your own ghosts in this minimalist arcade survival. Every 8 seconds, a new echo spawns — replaying your exact movements. Collect orbs, chain combos, unlock skins, and survive as long as you can. Your greatest enemy is yourself.

4457600.title: Colonial Winds
4457600.short_description: Grow your colony from a small outpost into a thriving nation in this city-building game. Step into the shoes of a colonial governor as you build production chains, establish trade, meet the needs of your citizens, and guide your settlement toward self-rule.

4457630.title: Curse of the Mirror
4457630.short_description: Curse of the Mirror is a 2D platformer that features a unique set of mechanics and ideas in each and every level inspired by similar games in its genre, a simple moveset that's easy to learn but difficult to master, and a rich story with fun and quirky characters!

4457660.title: 小城茉莉
4457660.short_description: Summer, a small town, jasmine. Past worries, future choices. Perhaps a midnight wish will quietly come true on a warm afternoon.『小城茉莉』 is a visual novel. You play as Zhu Yutong, experiencing a tangled, dreamy time. It's our honor if you find joy and emotion in this journey.

4457790.title: NO WAY OUT:Prison
4457790.short_description: 10 days until execution. Every choice could save you — or prove you deserve it. Escape or die.

4457870.title: G.I.R.L.S. will be Girls
4457870.short_description: A grid based tactical tower defense game set in a fictional Post Apocalyptic world where androids roam the deserted lands.  Inspired by the group ITZY and songs Girls will be Girls / Imaginary Friend.

4457890.title: Not Alone at Midnight
4457890.short_description: A first‑person horror game set in a well‑detailed apartment twisted by a demonic presence. Explore, fix disturbing anomalies, solve puzzles, manipulate the power to survive, and complete a desperate ritual as a relentless entity hunts you through the midnight hours.

4457900.title: GearGrave
4457900.short_description: 2D side-scrolling strategy game. Spawn units, fight, and destroy. Your choices decide victory or defeat.

4458020.title: Dungeon-Bot
4458020.short_description: Learn logic and programming by guiding the D-Bot robot through the dungeon! Use your mouse to create a list of commands for D-Bot to execute and successfully navigate through numerous maps!

4458030.title: Crescent Sun
4458030.short_description: Crescent Sun is a hero-driven roguelite RTS where your heroes shape buildings, units, and upgrades. Command semi-automated lanes, explore the battlefield, and survive relentless waves.

4458120.title: Squap
4458120.short_description: Ready to bounce your way to victory? Well, then this is the game for you: Deploy your weapon and survive the relentless waves of shape-themed enemies. Pick from a wide array of upgrades and utilize them to build up your strength and cause chaos among your foes. HOW LONG CAN YOU LAST?

4458200.title: Mechawaii LEGENDS
4458200.short_description: A 2D kawaii shooter where you build powerful Mechas from space scrap to conquer planets and defeat epic bosses in an interplanetary war.

4458210.title: Sushi Day
4458210.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4458210.short_description: A cozy animal restaurant management game where you craft sushi and pasta dishes, survive busy time-management shifts, and impress VIP guests for bonus tips.

4458310.title: Stick Scholars
4458310.short_description: A social deduction party game where players parkour to school, answer trivia, and hunt down a hidden Class Clown who is sabotaging to try and make the entire group fail!

4458410.title: Reel Goblin: A Fishers Freedom
4458410.short_description: A short fishing game about Gobbi the Goblin. Explore the island of Sea-Crest and venture into the many fisheries the island has to offer. Earn enough money to buy a boat and get home!

4458440.title: Pelican Post
4458440.short_description: Pelican Post is a cozy narrative game about building community by delivering mail to a town of charming characters. As Port Pleasant's mailman, you'll get to know the townsfolk and make a difference in their lives.

4458450.title: SIDEROS
4458450.short_description: Iron, the fundamental element of the world, was cursed by the magic lords of earth, water, air and fire to rust. In this high fantasy turn-based RPG you take the role of the iron knight in his quest to stop rust from destroying the world.

4458510.title: The Bible Roguelike Deckbuilder
4458510.short_description: Live the story. Feel God’s grace. Be in the Bible

4458560.title: Ultimate Club Manager 26
4458560.short_description: Become the president of your club and make decisions that change its destiny. Manage transfers, staff, finances, media, facilities, and the president's personal life in a deep and dynamic football management experience.

4458600.title: SEX & DICE
4458600.short_description: Dive into a board game where rolling dice allows you to move forward and collect resources. Deliver them to the girls to unlock +18 content. Face enemies, win or lose items, buy scrolls, and mine coal to sell or use as resources. Hentai +18 game.

4458610.title: Suwako-Chan Cubic
4458610.short_description: Suwako returns in this Touhou bullet hell classic with an extra dimension to it, instead of just dodging, Suwako has to jump over bullets to avoid them! In this Touhou fan game, bullets come at you from all directions in 3D space, will you be able to help Suwako jump and dodge her way to success?

4458630.title: Hentai Dynasty
4458630.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Dynasty, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4458740.title: PODER
4458740.short_description: Run a district in a 12-million Latin American megacity in a political strategy about power, compromise, and dirty deals. 100+ starting combos, 75 population groups, and no decision without consequences. Can you do better than those you love to hate?

4458810.title: Black Mask of Cernunnos
4458810.short_description: When an ancient deity is summoned to aid in a war, betrayal of his trust will have rippling effects for the people, and the young prince who finds himself subsequently bound to the creature.

4458820.title: Ever Roach
4458820.short_description: Play as a cockroach climbing toward The Bright in this short, hand-drawn 2D precision platformer. Master double jumps, glides, and wall-climbs through tightly designed levels. Collect optional spores on harder paths and complete the ascent before your 100 lives run out.

4458840.title: T.W.I.R.L.
4458840.short_description: It's 3am in your childhood home. Everyone's asleep, but you. Sneak out of your room to do what you always do - "T.W.I.R.L." - whatever that means. A psychological horror inspired by P.T. about a deep, dark secret you've kept since you were 9-years-old.

4458870.title: My Goth Roommate
4458870.short_description: Live with your 302-cm-tall yandere goth roommate who becomes obsessed with you after you defend her from a couple of punks. Explore Tokyo and pursue a wild cast of dominant, shy, sadistic, introverted, and eccentric women in this hentai game with fetishes for all kinds of gooners.

4458890.title: Invisum Piscium 嫌魚
4458890.short_description: An atmosphere-driven walking simulator where you explore familiar yet unsettling spaces, interact with fragmented conversations, and influence partial changes in the world through small actions, observation, and quiet choices that shape how the experience unfolds.

4458930.title: snaze
4458930.short_description: Snaze is a snake game. Eat the green dots and go to next level.

4458980.title: Spirit Age: Whirling Fury
4458980.short_description: Shape-shift from human to bird to dodge mesmerizing bullet patterns in this bullet-hell precision-platformer roguelike! Join Wren, an outcast girl, as she travels across a magical land to stop a deadly tornado.

4459000.title: Gambler's Fallacy
4459000.short_description: An isometric action roguelike with light deck building mechanics, set in a high-stakes western casino. Fight your way through rooms of cunning enemies, using strategic card play to escape the gamblers fallacy.

4459040.title: Huebound
