4459040.short_description: Mix light. Discover color. Idle forever. Place geometric nodes, connect them, and watch colored orbs flow through your factory. Combine primaries to create 256 named colors — each one waiting to be discovered.

4459080.title: MAGE: Mega Awesome Gregarious Encounters
4459080.short_description: An action-packed 2D projectile fighter inspired by controller couch party classics. Master one of 12 unique Mages across 50 maps in a simple but customizable and deep experience for up to 4 players local or online.

4459090.title: DiceRogue
4459090.short_description: This is a new type of strategic roguelike where you fight by combining "dice x cards x tiles." You can create your own strategy by linking the "special effects" of the rolling dice with the "cards" that are activated according to the roll.

4459150.title: The Legend of Wijaya
4459150.short_description: Experience a story-rich, classic 2D action RPG steeped in 13th-century Java. Play as Raden Wijaya using fluid hack-and-slash combat, archery, and magic. Outsmart the traitors and invading Mongols and forge the largest empire in Southeast Asia.

4459230.title: 字走三国
4459230.short_description: Hidden within the words lies a chilling killing intent; the chess pieces radiate a boundless fighting spirit. Tiny words weave the Three Kingdoms narrative, yet aspire to contain profound emotions.

4459310.title: Liquidia
4459310.short_description: Liquidia is a survival-crafting game about water. You're a cat-folk exploring islands, using magical water to wake ruins and restore the land. Build by day, fight monsters by night. Summon water spirits, grow plant defenses. Simple systems, pure creation and survival.

4459340.title: Perfect Execution
4459340.short_description: The roguelike RPG in which you die in one hit. Upend turn-based combat to defy your fate: Steal turns. Stack buffs. Amass overkill to slay your judges and escape in one PERFECT EXECUTION.

4459360.title: Legend of Realm
4459360.short_description: "Legend of Realm" is a strategy game blending dough figurine and facial makeup art. Spanning ancient to medieval, it condenses history into a polyhedral world. Control a region, use strategy and diplomacy, command troops, relive battles. Decisions shape history and battles forge legends.

4459570.title: Labyrinth: Veins of the Machine
4459570.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore an abandoned industrial facility, solve environmental puzzles, unlock sealed maintenance routes, and use hands-on interactions as the building reacts to your presence.

4459590.title: Slotbound
4459590.short_description: A roguelike auto-battler defense where luck meets strategy. Spin a 3x3 slot machine to summon units and grow your army by absorbing others. Use Items and Cores to manipulate the odds and survive challenging judgement waves and boss waves. Every spin and every choice counts.

4459650.title: Rogue Shell
4459650.short_description: Rogue Shell is an atmospheric action roguelike set far into a dark future, where you play as a small robot shell trying to escape the deepest layers of a decaying megastructure. Explore, scavenge, upgrade your equipment, fight to survive - and to uncover the structure's mysteries.

4459670.title: Menorca Talaiotica
4459670.short_description: Menorca Talaiotica is a strategy game where you will face the same problems as the first inhabitants of the island of Menorca; obtain natural resources, water, shelter, food and survive the calamities.

4459720.title: Cyber Demon Protocol
4459720.short_description: An antique computer has granted you the ability to summon cyber demons. Seeking power from demons is like dancing on a tightrope; from Lawful Good to Chaotic Evil, how will you choose? Will you collude with the wealthy, politicians, stars, and artists, or change this decadent society?

4459760.title: Warp Leap
4459760.short_description: Warp Leap is a platform-jumping game centered on "warping". You can nimbly move among scattered geometric platforms, relying on precise judgment and smooth rhythm control to perform instant warps and accurate traversals, overcoming challenges level by level.

4459780.title: Webgirls Programming Academy
4459780.short_description: Welcome to the Web Programming Academy!A school full of lovely girls.You can spend warm daily moments with them;or win their hearts with your programming skills! Whether you have programming experience or not,you can fully enjoy the gameand experience a relaxing and pleasant campus life here!

4459930.title: The Aether Project
4459930.short_description: A classic tower defense game with evolving battlefields and relentless waves. Build deadly defenses, adapt to new attack routes, and survive escalating enemy assaults.

4459940.title: AstralOutlaw
4459940.short_description: Astral Outlaw is a 3D sci-fi survival game made by Korean high schoolers. Explore an abandoned station, scavenge for scrap, and craft tools to repair your broken ship. Master repair mini-games and manage resources to escape the void.

4459950.title: A Good Tale
4459950.short_description: A cozy alchemy life-sim with shop management, exploration, and romance, where you bring a fading town back to life while investigating the mysterious disappearance of your grandmother.

4459980.title: Catventure
4459980.short_description: Welcome to《Catventure》! This is a relaxing idle game that can sit at the bottom of your screen—or anywhere you like—so while you’re working or taking a short break, you can enjoy a calm little adventure.

4460000.title: Overvoid
4460000.short_description: Overvoid - is a dark sci-fi third-person action roguelike. You are a starship pilot trapped in an endless cycle across hostile space sectors. Fight relentless enemy waves, experiment with builds, gather resources, and unlock weapons, ships, and modules to break the cycle.

4460230.title: Mockbuster Video
4460230.short_description: A first-person psychological horror set in a late-night 1990s video rental store. As disturbing tapes begin to surface, reality distorts and your decisions shape how the night unfolds.

4460310.title: Fun Park Simulator
4460310.short_description: Rebuild an abandoned theme park in this first-person simulation. Build rides, shops, and decorations, keep guests happy, earn stars, unlock upgrades, hire staff, stop troublemakers, and turn your park into a famous attraction.

4460390.title: LoopiaLike
4460390.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4460390.short_description: Survival is just the beginning. LoopiaLike is an action roguelite bullet heaven where you unleash devastating spell combos against endless hordes. Master unique magic, forge game-breaking builds, and climb the global leaderboards in this unforgiving survivors-like experience.

4460460.title: Miniature LAND -Four Seasons-
4460460.short_description: An escape room adventure set in a handcrafted miniature world. Can you find your way back home?

4460530.title: Towerix91
4460530.short_description: Towerix91 is an incremental tower defense inspired by PC games of the late 80s and early 90s. Collect crystals, unlock dozens of upgrades in the tech tree, place towers on walls, upgrade them and use abilities. Repel waves of enemies while steadily strengthening your defenses.

4460550.title: Eggs Les Bains
4460550.short_description: Go on a hunt for 238 eggs hidden in a spa town inspired by Aix-les-Bains. Explore, observe, and discover the mystery of the mischievous pigeons in this peaceful and immersive experience.

4460560.title: No Light Below
4460560.short_description: No Light Below is a co-op survival roguelite. Play as miner moles deep inside a dark mine. Manage the elevator, snack on bugs, survive the creatures of the deep, and make tough choices that won't always please your friends.

4460650.title: Lia Fail
4460650.short_description: "Free yourself from tedious controls and focus on skill builds. Explore a world inspired by Celtic myth, collect powerful loot, and defeat epic bosses. Here, your choices truly define your destiny."

4460660.title: Rolf
4460660.short_description: Welcome to Rolf (Ricochet Golf), a mouse-only 2D precision golf platformer where you can hit the ball immediately after it touches the grass, even when it's in the air! Climb walls, scale ceilings, no turf is off limits!

4461190.title: Valehona Tap!
4461190.short_description: Tap your way through Valehona Tap! A 2D pixel tap and idle game, Impress your friends with high Prestige Levels and Goons Slain. Can you reach the boss?

4461220.title: WHISPERWOOD
4461220.short_description: WhisperWood is a survival horror game inspired by the classics. Powered by Unreal Engine 5, it drops you into a nightmare where ammo is scarce and every shadow hides a threat. Solve puzzles, manage your inventory, and survive the darkness.

4461320.title: ESCAPE: Orphanage
4461320.short_description: A psychological thriller set in Scarlet Orphanage, where every choice shapes the fate of the residents. Nothing is as it seems. Are you facing ghosts… or something far worse?

4461390.title: And Then We Go Party At The Shore
4461390.short_description: Embark on a whimsical, surreal four-act journey in a handcrafted storybook theater. Take on different roles and uncover the mystery of Nomanland.

4461420.title: Kings Archer VR
4461420.short_description: In this atmospheric world dominated by darkness and snowstorms, you stand on the walls of a massive fortress, the kingdom's last line of defense.

4461430.title: Totally NOT a Game
4461430.short_description: A corporate spreadsheet idle game where you climb the ladder from Intern to C-Suite by generating KPIs, automating busywork, and satisfying a Board that demands exponential results. Totally NOT a Game.

4461440.title: Celene
4461440.short_description: A cozy game, yet it can be chaotic? Play as a deformed rabbit and make your way to the mountain peak alone or while getting tethered with your friends for additional chaos!

4461590.title: Roidgrinder
4461590.short_description: The origin story of a famous roidgrinder. It's a crossbreed of 2D arcade, lightweight simulation, resource management and some idler elements. You interact with the ship's systems through a state-of-the-art terminal interface. KEYBOARD REQUIRED.

4461640.title: Profit Sea Incremental
4461640.short_description: A short incremental game about fishing, earning gold, and unlocking powerful upgrades to dominate the waters.

4461710.title: The Paranormal is Happening
4461710.short_description: The Paranormal Is Happening is a psychological horror experience set in an isolated forest village abandoned after a mysterious event in the 1940s. Sent to investigate its disappearance, you must collect evidence and uncover the truth before something in the woods finds you.

4461810.title: Galloping Dream
4461810.short_description: Galloping Dream is a third-person, story-driven game where you play as Midnight, a wild stallion. Your mission is to find the captured members of your herd. Explore the world, help other animals, and uncover the legend of a winged horse — a symbol of hope between dream and reality.

4461920.title: Superstring Transition: The Warp Ancestor
4461920.short_description: An AI returns from a relativistic test flight to find humanity gone. Explore a real NASA‑based solar‑system ephemeris, pilot three spacecraft across accurate topological data, and push the limits of physics as you attempt escalating WARP.

4462060.title: Personality Imprint
4462060.short_description: In a post-apocalyptic world ruled by "The Chosen," a squad marked by Personality Imprint marches toward the edge of the world in rebellion.

4462080.title: Hidden Streets of SherloCAT
4462080.short_description: Find cats and hidden objects in illustrated streets full of detail.

4462090.title: Hotel 404
4462090.short_description: Wake up alone in the grand Colorado Hotel, a place where memories fade and reality distorts. Explore oppressive hallways, solve puzzles, and try to understand why you are here. Will you find the exit before the hotel forgets you?

4462330.title: corescapes
4462330.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4462330.short_description: liminal action roguelite blending exploration of surreal internet dreamscapes with coop wave-defense combat

4462370.title: Asteroids and Aliens
4462370.short_description: Test your skills in this immersive VR space opera by Star 1 Studio. Utilize lightning sabers to strike down hordes of bionic extraterrestrials. Fight your way to the heart of the planet to defeat Attackian Leader RahKah. Unlock 10 missions, 10 alien landscapes, 8 saber colors, and a secret weapon.

4462550.title: Franky Psychedelic Adventure
4462550.short_description: Join Franky on an epic journey across breathtaking dimensions to reclaim the stolen cookies. Harness powerful psychedelic abilities to overcome challenges, master impossible obstacles, and conquer extraordinary worlds.

4462580.title: BLIGHTEN
4462580.short_description: BLIGHTEN is a survival horror fps set in an abandoned facility overrun by mindless creatures infected by the Blight. Scavenge for resources and do whatever it takes to survive the industrial hellscape you're isolated within.

4462640.title: Blackjack 2D: Dealer's Gambit
4462640.short_description: A casual, narrative Blackjack game. Pop in for a quick game of 21 and watch yourself transform into a remarkable player! Single player, fictional, no real money used.

4462670.title: Easter Furry Temptation – Hentai Jigsaw
4462670.short_description: In Easter Furry Temptation – Hentai Jigsaw, Easter becomes irresistible. Assemble sensual puzzles of furry bunnies, sweet costumes, and tempting scenes in a deliciously engaging atmosphere — piece by piece. 🐰🔥

4462700.title: 白蛇之子 | The Son of White Snake: Roguelike Deckbuilder
4462700.short_description: The Son of White Snake is a dark roguelike deckbuilder twisting Chinese mythology. Explore the Leifeng Pagoda—actually the gullet of a primordial serpent—combining Ring of Pain exploration with Slay the Spire card combat. Inspired by the Legend of White Snake.
developers: Shanghai Watchman Network Technology Co., Ltd
publishers: Shanghai Watchman Network Technology Co., Ltd

4462810.title: Sicarius
4462810.short_description: Embark on a sci-fi roguevania as Sicarius, the ultimate assassin spider bot, where you craft devastating weaponry from scrap and hunt down 70+ unique mechs in procedurally generated levels. Customize your chassis and decide to dismantle the system or serve it.

4463000.title: Tinyverse: CatLord Catastrophe
4463000.short_description: Tinyverse: CatLord Catastrophe is a game about chasing cats across the solar system to stop them from taking over the internet. Control 2 sidekicks simultaneously, or split up the controls and play with a friend! Solve puzzles in this top-down world full of alien bros and crazy cats.

4463020.title: Treasure's Mine!
4463020.short_description: Build defenses on randomly generated archipelagos and fend off waves of pirates! Expand land plots, combine defense towers, and collect treasures to strengthen your islands. Guard your treasures and become the wealthiest lord!

4463060.title: SudokuGo
4463060.short_description: A relaxing and calming casual sudoku game with millions of puzzles, perfect for stress relief and logical thinking training.

4463190.title: Breach
4463190.short_description: YOU are a living bullet in a dungeon dashing through rooms trying to escape the dungeon.Breach is a top down action game that requires YOU to use your limited amount of abilities to max efficiency

4463320.title: Wukong: Heavenly Dash
4463320.short_description: Wukong: Heavenly Dash is a Chinese mythology themed arcade infinite side scroller 2D platformer where players take on the role of Wukong the Monkey King as he dashes through the heavens while defeating corrupt enemies and collecting items to gain bonuses.

4463550.title: Space Runner X
4463550.short_description: Space Runner X is a high speed, first-person infinite runner. You aren't just dodging obstacles—you’re shooting down drones and blasting enemies. The longer you run, the faster it gets. Earn credits, buy better weapons, and see how long you can last

4463590.title: Plateau
4463590.short_description: Build and sculpt your own peaceful settlement in this relaxing city builder. A sandbox that lets you freely edit the terrain, add forests, rivers, paths and buildings without the pressure of resource management, timers or a fail state. It's pure creation, relaxation and admiring your little plateau.

4463680.title: Dorts : A Darts Roguelike
4463680.short_description: First-person darts roguelike. Throw darts. Draft upgrades. Survive the chaos.

4463750.title: Touch My Boobs Click
4463750.short_description: A unique blend of "Touch" and "Physics Puzzle"! Strategically stack and collapse tiles dropped by your caresses. Avoid the risks of Voltage Tiles and aim for 1,000 Ecstasy Points. Experience unpredictable physical behavior and high-quality erotic rewards in this stress-free healing game.

4463820.title: Maze of Mask
4463820.short_description: Maze of Mask is a challenging and fun puzzle game that requires you to use 4 different masks at the right place and time as you progress through the maze.

4463860.title: 万妙之门
4463860.short_description: 万寿村的燕知槐有一天“醒过来”，他的眼前出现一扇门，门前的男人自称那栖措，他向你讲述你从未知晓的过去，从呱呱坠地的婴孩、到万寿村的阿槐，最后他向你展示生命中的一种可能，一种付出什么，得到“真相”的可能。

4463890.title: Nodwar
4463890.genre: Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4463890.short_description: A real-time grand strategy game where you conquer a seamless planetary map pixel by pixel. Build economies, research technologies across 8 ages, command fleets, launch nuclear strikes, forge alliances, and outmaneuver hundreds of AI nations — solo or in multiplayer.

4463950.title: Route 27
4463950.short_description: Route 27 has been flagged for escalating paranormal activity. Agent Daniel Kessler of the Bureau of Anomalous Threat Containment is dispatched to investigate a hostile presence. Drive into an active containment zone, document disturbances, and collect critical evidence before control is lost.

4464010.title: Kill the Slimes
4464010.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy
4464010.short_description: Cleanse the sacred forest from the Slime infestation! Master the elements, craft legendary weapons, and don't let their cuteness fool you—the forest's fate is in your hands.

4464040.title: Dodgecore
4464040.short_description: Dodge. Survive. Improve. Face escalating projectile chaos, powerful boss attacks and fast arcade gameplay. Unlock skins, use unique abilities and push your high score further with every run.

4464150.title: METROMAGE
4464150.short_description: MetroMage is an intense action roguelike where you combine elemental magic, stack damage multipliers, and create devastating builds. Explore procedurally generated maps, face escalating enemy waves, and grow overwhelmingly powerful with every new run.

4464180.title: Shogun's Stand
4464180.short_description: Aim, fire, and fortify. Shogun's Stand is a fast-paced tower defense rogue-lite where you take direct control of your castle against relentless waves of feudal enemies. Place traps, command the battlefield, and level up to survive!

4464260.title: Arrow Flow
4464260.short_description: Welcome to Arrow Flow - a stylish, minimalist puzzle game where every decision requires care and thoughtful strategy. Use logic and spatial thinking to direct all the arrows to the exit and prevent them from crossing.

4464350.title: Ignition to Extinction
4464350.short_description: A runner game about survival where you are the obstacle, and it's whatever that is on the road that gotta avoid you to survive. Ignite your might, outrun extinction!

4464390.title: Silence Archives Terminal
4464390.short_description: Hack into a classified archive of 120 intercepted documents. In this retro terminal investigation, every file you read alters reality — your observations are irreversible, the Federation is watching, and three divergent endings await based on how deep you dare to dig.

4465600.title: Bowling Alley Simulator
4465600.short_description: Bowling Alley Simulator lets you build, manage, and grow your own bowling alley. Run the lanes, cook classic food, hire staff, and expand your business into a thriving entertainment destination.

4465650.title: PinRogue
4465650.short_description: PinRogue is a pinball-inspired roguelike. Build up points and multiplier by hitting bumpers, score satisfying combos, purchase powerful upgrades in the shop and create game-breaking builds!

4465690.title: Quantum Coffee Conundrum
4465690.short_description: A science fiction Slice Of Death visual novel: follow two space miners as they spiral through the bureaucratic gears of a caffeine-fueled corporate time loop nightmare.

4465720.title: Planet Flipper
4465720.short_description: A short turn-based planet management sim about flipping a world for profit. Balance supply, unrest, famine, and conflict. Or let it collapse and cash out before it’s too late.

4465730.title: Volt Deck
4465730.short_description: Rewrite the rules. Transform the cards. Master the deck.

4465740.title: Happy Hungry Human
4465740.short_description: A chaotic 4-player co-op factory builder where you produce food to keep humanity alive. Feed humans, matchmake them, manage their quirks, and stop them from escaping — because a hungry humanity can’t survive.

4465830.title: Confessional: Reality TV Manager
4465830.short_description: A reality TV production management game. Cast, create or download contestants, design your season, and watch drama unfold in the most complex relationship sim ever created. Scout hidden talent, manage moods, watch challenges play out, and survive dramatic tribal councils. Build your franchise.

4465980.title: The Declutterers : No Dumpster Left Empty
4465980.short_description: A chaotic 4-player co-op cleanup game where you vacuum everything in sight. Empty messy houses, toss junk into dumpsters, and upgrade your gear — just don’t get sucked into the madness.
developers: The Declutterers : No Dumpster Left Empty
publishers: The Declutterers : No Dumpster Left Empty

4466070.title: Overclocked Arena: Instability Protocol
4466070.short_description: A fast-paced bullet heaven action roguelike set in a futuristic arena. Face overwhelming enemy waves, evolve your build with powerful upgrades, and survive escalating instability that constantly reshapes the battlefield.

4466190.title: Reefglider
4466190.short_description: You're a sugar glider under the ocean! Run, jump and glide through the great barrier reef as you acquire aquatic allies to cure coral colonies. Friendly fish join you on your journey allowing you to jump higher and access more areas in the environment!

4466240.title: Fox Shooter
4466240.short_description: This is a pick-up-and-play, pure stress-relief top-down pixel Roguelike game. Don't overthink it: there are no mind-bending build calculations, no obscure backstory—just raw combat instinct. Let your score do the talking. PLEASE DO NOT HAVE MUCH EXPECTATIONS!

4466360.title: 你就是缘由
4466360.short_description: Death, redemption, distortion, love, and... you are the reason.

4466450.title: SwingCat: Swing Me to the Moon?
4466450.short_description: Bend gravity. Sling asteroids. Smash planets. Control a tiny Earth with real gravitational pull, curving asteroids into enemy planets for chain combos. Switch to Cat Mode for nyan-powered chaos, or Chaos Mode where defeated cats pile up on screen. Simple controls, deep physics.

4466580.title: Kinguin: Become a Streaming Legend
4466580.short_description: Kinguin is a relaxing idle simulator about a penguin streamer. Leave the game in the corner of your screen while you work, upgrade your setup to turn views into valuable followers and subs, and climb the Global Rank. Dominate the algorithm and become the internet's greatest polar legend!

4466610.title: MysteryOS
4466610.genre: Adventure, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4466610.short_description: You wake up at a terminal you've never seen before. The language is alien. The interface is hostile. Every wrong click has consequences. Decode constructed languages, navigate unfamiliar operating systems, and survive the unknown in this puzzle-survival experience.

4466630.title: My Little MSP
4466630.short_description: Build and run a Managed Service Provider (MSP) in this top-down IT management sim: rack servers, patch networks, handle client contracts, and keep your service agreements intact as your tiny IT business grows

4466690.title: Super Battle Royale
4466690.short_description: Super Battle Royale is a 2D action game. Players defeat opponents by using movement/basic attack/skill buttons and collect dropped super crystals to enhance their superpowers.

4466830.title: Axe And Claw
4466830.short_description: Samuel’s life is shattered when the beast "Claw" attacks during a woodcutting lesson with his son, Jonah. Waking up alone with fragmented memories, Samuel must take up his axe and climb to the creature's mountain lair. A father’s desperate pixel-art journey to rescue his son.

4466860.title: SpaceShift
4466860.short_description: Save the crew in this 2D puzzle platformer! As a small robot, you manipulate gravity, time, and your size to repair a damaged ship. Use portals to change perspectives, avoid dangerous lasers, and solve creative puzzles in an unstable pixel world.

4466880.title: (TwwwT) The Witches Who Weave Timelines
4466880.short_description: A 2D action-focused roguelite where you control “witches from history,” battling endless enemies and dense bullet-hell barrages to correct fractured timelines

4466900.title: Overwords: Infinity
4466900.short_description: Overwords is back: Stack, fuse, and expand.

4466920.title: Okay, Panic
4466920.short_description: A top-down space survival roguelite. Harvest crystallized spacetime, build your arsenal from 40+ absurdly named weapons, and hold off increasingly hostile void entities until the universe runs out of things to throw at you. It usually doesn't.

4466990.title: The Guest II
4466990.short_description: The Guest II is a first-person psychological horror experience.

4467010.title: Nongla Scenic Area in Mashan County
4467010.short_description: Click on 'Start Game', the image will be grayed out, and the colored parts will be randomly scrambled into 16 small fragments, scattered randomly on the screen.Players click on the small image, drag it to its original position to restore it, until all the small fragments move to the correct position

4467410.title: Escape from Vacov
4467410.short_description: The system watches your every move. One wrong step — and you're banned. Escape from Vacov is a 2D platformer with vanishing floors, hidden traps, and levels that fight back.

4467540.title: Smile More
4467540.short_description: A short medical simulation horror game with multiple endings where the imperfect are made HAPPY. Perform tasks and operations on sedated patients to fix their defects before submitting your files to the Ministry of Happiness & Peace!

4467670.title: VYCE
4467670.short_description: VYCE is a tactical RPG where you collect and trade critters based on real-world vices in order to uncover the truth behind a town's decay. Value Your Choices Effectively in this bizarre twist of dark humor and strategy.

4467690.title: Susia - Wolf Life Simulator
4467690.short_description: Live the fun life of a wolf! Find a mate, start a pack, hunt together and survive in the wild! Befriend other packs or defeat them to become the sole wolf pack. Adventure through the island and settle down or keep moving, it's all up to you!

4467830.title: 家长看不见的日记
4467830.short_description: 跟随少年，揭开一页页被藏起的心事。在父母的言语风暴中，慢慢学会——不是所有爱都温柔。献给所有在中式教育背景下“不被理解”的孩子，和那些想爱却不知如何表达的大人。

4467880.title: T.R.K : BORDER LINE
4467880.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4467880.short_description: Experience an intense first-person shooter set in modern conflict zones. Engage in realistic combat, complete tactical missions, and survive hostile environments using skill, precision, and strategy where every decision can determine the outcome of the battlefield.

4467960.title: Tower Defense: The Envoy's Gambit
4467960.short_description: The kingdoms have sent for you. Place towers strategically, upgrade. Choose perks and modifiers. Defend each region against as many waves as you can, which synergies will be your gambit?

4468180.title: AI Society
4468180.short_description: Build a society powered by AI characters. Give your townsfolk unique personalities, hobbies, and traits; then step back and watch them work, argue, form friendships, and fight on their own. Runs 100% locally on your machine.

4468350.title: Voxelnova
4468350.short_description: Voxelnova is a voxel survival crafting game where you start with basic tools, hunt rare ores, upgrade workbenches and machines, and build a powerful base in a procedural world.

4468520.title: Rift Haul TD
4468520.short_description: Take direct control of your hero in this stylized 3D tower defense. Don’t just place your defenses—pick them up and rush them to the front lines as the tide of battle shifts. Strategize in real-time to protect your realm from ever-evolving threats.

4468570.title: The Last Show
4468570.short_description: Explore the dark in The Last Show, uncovering hidden truths through environmental clues and psychological storytelling in a tense, immersive experience.

4468640.title: 竞速驾驶
4468640.short_description: Classic Retro Cartoon Car Driving Simulator 2D Crisp visuals, authentic handling, and free-roaming fun on whimsical tracks. Drift, race, and conquer challenges—experience the purest retro driving joy!

4468680.title: Portable Ops 2
4468680.short_description: Every mission has consequences. PERMA DEATH – No respawns. Die in the field, you’re gone. STORY MODE – 9+ action levels with character and base progression. BASE BUILDING – Choose and customize your base to fit your tactics. OPERATOR GEAR – Use equipment wisely to survive.

4468830.title: Silent home
4468830.short_description: Silent home is a psychological horror created by the hands of a single developer. You have to explore your own house, so familiar, but so alien. Door after door, cycle after cycle, the only question haunts: Why am I here? From a fan of P.T., Silent Hill and other horrors.

4468880.title: The Chairman
4468880.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4468880.short_description: The Chairman is a football management sim built that lives in the bottomo corner of your screen. Matches simulate automatically while you work, study, or do anything else. Check in when you have a moment. Make your decisions. Let the season run. You choose the time lap.

4468950.title: Bruce's Gym
4468950.short_description: Corn-can dumbbells, plastic bottle bench presses, potato sack punching bags, and even a cable machine hooked to a gas tank — all in a random alley! Welcome to Bruce’s Gym, the most hardcore grassroots fitness sim that will flip your view of the workout world forever.

4469120.title: Martha's Dolls 2
4469120.short_description: Return to the decaying halls of the Martha Estate in this bone chilling sequel to the viral horror hit. As an urban explorer obsessed with the "Disappeared," you step into a nightmare where the porcelain faces aren't just decorations they are silent hunters.

4469140.title: The Last Inquisition
4469140.short_description: The witch hunt begins. Command your followers in a dark roguelike strategy experience. Evolve spells and units without limits through blood and faith. Shape formations, adapt tactics, and uncover the conspiracy in ever-changing battles.

4469180.title: Arcbound
4469180.short_description: A colony sim set on a starship. Build and manage a spacefaring civilisation, balance oxygen, power, and crew survival, and guide your ship through the final escape from Earth.

4469230.title: A Matter of Pain
4469230.short_description: Humanity is depraved. Judgment is inevitable. Build and manage Hell in this dark strategy simulation, process the damned, and extract suffering to sustain its endless machinery.

4469430.title: Bloodrust
4469430.short_description: Bloodrust is a minimalist, old-school first-person dungeon crawler. Lead a party of four Ferric Wardens into the Ashwoods to clear the Blood Rust; a curse that spreads through metal and turns the world wrong.

4469440.title: Particle Box
4469440.short_description: A strategic incremental game about using scientific-sounding probabilistic particle interactions to make a number go up. Generate quettawatt-hours of electricity in the Particle Box room and get promoted to Senior Staff Intern.

4469460.title: Black Demeter
4469460.short_description: Black Demeter is an open-world sci-fi action-adventure set on a planet in constant twilight and mystery. Turn movement into a weapon, earn the locals’ trust, or burn it all down.

4469990.title: Summon the Commoners
4469990.short_description: A hectic gambling auto-battler. Roll slot machines, smack enemies, and curate an unstoppable deck to overcome massive armies. Break the game through ridiculous jack-pot based synergies.

4470800.title: Solo Raid: Mage
4470800.short_description: A single-player dungeon experience built for fans of classic MMORPG combat. Solo Raid: Mage recreates the deliberate pacing, cooldown management, and rotational mastery of old-school raiding — layered with roguelite build progression. Each attempt is a new build, that you must learn to wield.

4470810.title: Gate Breaker: Ascension
4470810.short_description: Death was only the beginning. After falling to a power-hungry Demon Lord, Mikey must survive the 'Divine Trials' to live again. Master lethal weapons, combat styles, and magic in this cinematic action-adventure as a troubled hero learns the true meaning of humanity.

4470890.title: Expedition Idle
4470890.short_description: An online idle auto-battler ARPG where you create one-of-a-kind items with crafting materials you pick up from the ground, customize your adventurers with different abilities and stats, and strategize your way through difficult bosses, unique scenarios, and dynamic monsters!

4470920.title: Crack Mountain
4470920.short_description: You can wish for anything, all you need to do is climb this mountain... By throwing a ball that teleports you... Maybe try climbing too, I don't know I'm not the expert here.

4471000.title: Tower Defense Ultimate: Crashfall Protocol
4471000.short_description: Defend your base against relentless alien waves in a sci-fi tower defense strategy game. Build deadly kill zones, unlock new towers and special abilities, and adapt your loadout to survive escalating assaults across a hostile campaign.

4471120.title: Blink Atomic Music
4471120.short_description: This is a game where you dodge bullet patterns generated from music using movement and Blink (short warp). Each song lasts about 2 minutes, and there are 9 songs in total.

4474120.title: MoonNight Shift
4474120.short_description: MoonNight Shift is a first-person psychological horror game where you play as Conner Anderson, a 46 y/o former surgeon who resigned from his post because of his drinking addiction, now runs a super mart, working the night shift as a distraction.

4474500.title: Kvga
4474500.short_description: Fast-paced card battler with fighting game DNA. Build decks, chain Kombos, and dominate the tournament!

4474630.title: Rocky Park
4474630.short_description: Do you like rocks? Come to Rocky Park to discover and collect as many as you can! Explore a cozy natural park at your own pace, meet its inhabitants, and let yourself be surprised by the little secrets hidden around every corner.

4474640.title: Glyph Quest
4474640.short_description: A blend of nonogram puzzles and auto-battler combat. As you reveal tiles, both heroes and monsters build charge based on their Speed stat to perform actions.

4474830.title: Left 2 Fry
4474830.short_description: Left 2 Fry is a fast paced wave shooter with a food twist. You start with nothing. Fight through rounds of angry food, earn points, open up the map, and build your loadout as things get more chaotic.

4474950.title: LIFE EFFECT Survival
4474950.short_description: Alien invaders invaded the planet, having exterminated most of the population, humanity, being on the verge of annihilation, united the armies and gave a serious rebuff to the enemy. After several years of war, the climate on the planet has changed. The military founded fortifications.

4474960.title: Ratatouille Builder
4474960.short_description: In this cooking roguelike, inspired by many deckbuilder games, set up your garden to grow fresh vegetables and serve delicious dishes every day in your restaurant! Discover new recipes, exploit synergies, and learn your customers' favorite dishes!

4475130.title: Jolly Junction: Risky Rebellion
4475130.short_description: After the demolition of the Jolly Crew, you must escape from the Propmaker’s grasp. Only this time, you aren’t working alone. You discover new depths of the studio, encountering new threats that reside in the great beneath. Remember, your job isn’t over just yet…

4475290.title: RebelZ
4475290.short_description: Join the RebelZ and experience intense, action-driven single-player FPS gameplay. Stand against a powerful AI empire and protect the last surviving groups of humanity in a world on the brink of extinction.

4475300.title: Smash Dash: Demolition Run
4475300.short_description: Top-down PvE looter shooter. Fight, loot, and survive—extract to keep your items and clear the stage.

4475360.title: Omelet Rice Shop Simulator
4475360.short_description: Many customers visit the shop in search of the perfect Omurice. Work quickly and skillfully to serve them all! Can you satisfy the constant wave of hungry customers? The success and prosperity of your shop are entirely up to you!

4475560.title: Bright Light
4475560.short_description: Fantasy blast in the style of retro boomer shooters — an action-packed pixel carnage where hordes of monsters, dark magic, and devious trolls await. Relive the golden age of classic shooters with fast-paced gameplay, a brutal arsenal, and relentless enemies. Don’t forget to save the princess!

4475670.title: Last Float
4475670.short_description: Explore and survive in this shattered world. Build, defend, and repair your raft. Search for secrets and uncover information about what happened - and most importantly, don't drown!

4475900.title: CRO
4475900.short_description: In this game you play as the little fellow we know as CRO, navigate through the void while collecting cool upgrades, synergies and fighting unique bosses along the way. Every room you enter will contain a different boss each with their own bullet hell patterns.

4475950.title: System Status: SuperCritical
4475950.short_description: Defend your base by placing towers strategically, forming interconnected systems that depend on one another. Adapt your strategy to different environments and enemy waves, exploiting their weaknesses. In System Status: SuperCritical, resources are scarce and critical failure is always an option.

4476000.title: Remagotchi
4476000.short_description: Retro virtual pet game with total fidelity to the 90s classics. A pixel art simulator with multiple characters, including rare pets, where your choices shape the evolution of your virtual pet.

4476130.title: Crazy Bike
4476130.short_description: Race through the chaotic streets of New York in Crazy Bike, a modern reimagining of the arcade classic Crazy Courier. Deliver packages at breakneck speed, dodge traffic, pull off insane stunts, and master the art of urban biking in a fast-paced open city playground.

4476220.title: Arcana, Gas & Waterworks Inc.
4476220.short_description: Route magical energy through a fantasy realm as a mid-level utilities employee. Connect ley lines, manage complaints, and keep the mana flowing in this comedic puzzle-strategy game set in a mundane, magickal world. The benefits are not great, but neither is the pay! So there's that.

4476270.title: Crown & Coin: The Hundred Years
4476270.short_description: Survive the Hundred Years' War in this medieval ensemble sandbox. Play as 1,015 historical figures, from Joan of Arc to the imposter des Armoises. Gain glory as a knight, forge a new kingdom to crush England and France, or thrive as a bandit. Discover 22 tarot-based multiple endings!

4476320.title: Feed The Void
4476320.short_description: An incremental deckbuilder where you shape your deck the way you desire. Upgrade cards, unlock synergies, play massive combos, and constantly discover game-changing abilities.

4476350.title: The Beekeeper
4476350.short_description: A fast systemic strategy puzzle about ecological scarcity and timing. Place limited hives on a hex grid, protect fragile species, and optimize under pressure knowing some losses may be inevitable.

4476390.title: Lost Camp
4476390.short_description: After the death of your mother and with no other choice, you take the only job available: guarding and maintaining a lonely campsite in the mountains. But what seemed like a quiet place hides mysteries that will change everything.

4476590.title: Biomech Protocol
4476590.short_description: A man rescues you after a crash and takes you to a shelter, claiming the outside world is dangerous. But is it really?

4476610.title: Backrooms: Collision Not Found
4476610.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4476610.short_description: A 1-4 player co-op horror experience. Navigate hyper-realistic Backrooms levels and liminal spaces, survive unique entities, and uncover the dark mystery behind those levels. Extreme visual fidelity meets psychological dread.

4477180.title: The Pentastic Descent
4477180.short_description: Descend into pixelated hell, smashing pentagrams and slaughtering demons for orbs. Spend them on persistent upgrades between runs. Reach level 250 to Prestige and grow exponentially stronger in this fast-paced action roguelite.

4478080.title: Unknown App
4478080.short_description: Survive the fog-filled ruins of Murino. Play as Drun and Ch, uncover Mellstroy’s experiments, and escape—or destroy—the creeping Fog before it consumes everything.

4478350.title: Ten Color Days
4478350.short_description: "Block-breaking x jumping action"! Blow bubbles to destroy the map and collect "cloud fragments"! Use the fragments you collect to create cloud cubes! Slipping from a high place...could be bad... Use your strength to reach the top floor!

4478450.title: Link It
4478450.short_description: Classic link-matching, modern comfort. Connect identical tiles with a path of up to 2 turns to clear them, chase satisfying combo scores, and enjoy a clean UI with theme icons, hints, and limited shuffles.

4478460.title: Dusk Runners
4478460.short_description: Dusk Runners is a top-down roguelike zombie arena shooter where you clear rooms, loot randomized weapons with modifiers, and push deeper as the horde escalates. Build busted loadouts, survive the rush, and see how far you can run.

4478570.title: Hentai World Market
4478570.short_description: This calm yet addictive matching game challenges your focus and persistence. Pair identical images to progress, but success demands sharp observation, strong concentration, and determination to conquer every level.

4478680.title: The Long Drive Badland
4478680.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Racing, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4478680.short_description: A very long road journey, using the resources at each rest stop to try and reach the destination.

4478700.title: Nightwatch Protocol
4478700.short_description: Nightwatch Protocol is a tense CCTV horror game where you must survive until 7:00 AM. An intruder is inside your home, and your only defense is the security system. Watch camera feeds, track movement, and react fast. One mistake could cost you everything. Stay alert and make it through the night.

4478760.title: Abandoned Stories: Inherited Silence
4478760.short_description: A new home. A new family. A nightmare waiting inside. Adopted into a new family, Maria soon realizes she was never meant to feel safe there.

4478810.title: Lock Your Boyfriend
4478810.short_description: Is your boyfriend too ordinary? Transform him step by step into the city’s most iconic femboy. Lock Your Boyfriend is a stylized game that includes four distinct mini-games.

4478850.title: StripoRama
4478850.short_description: Help Jerry Wanker pass his entrance exam to the prestigious Nude York Film Academy! Drag and drop actors, props, and settings into storyboards to craft hilarious movie scripts. Pucture Pizzle!

4478970.title: ASEMA
4478970.short_description: Build a space factory. Mine, harvest, exploit. Manage logistics with railguns, ballistic payloads and gravity-bending haulers. Fight gravity with Focus, climb the tech tree. Expand and explore the solar system in this Newtonian automation sim. Everything is a potential resource - even the Locals.

4479020.title: SurrounDead Poly ‌Japan Sakura
4479020.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Racing, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4479020.short_description: An open-world survival adventure game where players will solve puzzles, collect items, and defeat all enemies to reach the end.

4479060.title: Iron Wasteland
4479060.short_description: After the bombs fell, civilization collapsed into chaos. Scavenge the ruins of a shattered world, gather vital resources, and fight off hostile enemies determined to claim what little remains.

4479110.title: A Game About Day Trading
4479110.short_description: A fast paced, roguelite day trading simulator where you start with $1,000 and a dream. Read candlestick charts, make fast decisions, and build your trading empire from nothing as you either become a trillionaire and escape the planet or watch as your account burns to the ground.

4479140.title: Rolic
4479140.short_description: Rolic is an adorable third-person adventurer/puzzler. Scoot, scramble, and glide your way through the wonderfully magical open-world, unraveling the mysteries of the mathematical mechanics that bond the land. Forage to find nuts. Then, use algebraic wizardry to crack them open for their goodies.

4479970.title: Scary Game 2: The Mad Shepherd
4479970.short_description: Your first day as the new shepherd in the village… and everything is going wrong. The animals are missing. The villagers are strange. And the truth is far more terrifying.

4480100.title: Dynamine
4480100.short_description: Dynamine is an incremental mining game based on Minesweeper. Dig for ores while avoiding explosives, sell what you found, buy better tools to dig more efficiently, then rinse and repeat!

4480190.title: Cozy Cats Fit
4480190.short_description: A fun cat puzzle game, with music and adorable cats keeping you company.

4480320.title: H3LLV3TE
4480320.short_description: H3LLV3TE is a PSX style horror experience that plunges you into a warped, nightmarish world where every step could lead to freedom or deeper into madness. Explore shifting corridors inspired by classic survival horror, solve unsettling puzzles.

4480380.title: Wasteland Horror Radio: Episode 2 - The Lighthouse
4480380.short_description: Wasteland Horror Radio: Ep. 2 - The Lighthouse: Back in the late 1890's.. While her friends wait, a young girl re-enters an old derelict lighthouse alone to retrieve a lost heirloom. Moments later, she would vanish forever..

4480720.title: Railwarden
4480720.short_description: Tower Defense meets Roguelike on a speeding train! Mount turrets, manage coal through harsh weather, and fight off bandits aiming to rob your cargo.

4480760.title: Surf Sandbox
4480760.short_description: Surf Sandbox is a tiny, casual surfing game with realistic water physics. Create your perfect wave, then go longboarding on a friendly ripple, get slammed bodysurfing a heavy shorebreak, hit an air section and get barreled on your shortboard, or just sit back, relax, and watch the waves roll in.

4480890.title: Between Stops
4480890.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4480890.short_description: Between Stops is a story-driven turn-based RPG with bullet-hell inspired combat. Dodge deadly boss patterns, shape character relationships, and unlock multiple routes where your choices permanently alter the story.

4481070.title: Nine to Never
4481070.short_description: Routine is safe. Predictable. Comfortable. But what if that comfort hides something… dangerous? In this game, your job isn’t just to work. Will you stay where it’s safe, or risk everything to uncover what’s beyond?

4481100.title: The Counseling Office at the End of the Path
4481100.short_description: Deep in a forgotten forest, at the end of a rainy path, lies a small workshop. Gather magical ingredients to craft mysterious items, and restore the lost smiles of the villagers. In this place free from combat and competition, your warm comfort can change someone's world.

4481110.title: Chud vs Soyjak
4481110.short_description: Play as Chud in this thrilling boomer shooter where you must defend against endless hordes of soyjaks. Experience an enthralling, fully voice-acted story. Enjoy the amazing custom soundtrack by the generational artist Baby Sneed™.

4481140.title: Synthwave Dice TD
4481140.short_description: Roll the dice, defend your tower, build your deck! Synthwave Dice TD is a neon-drenched roguelike tower defense where every roll matters. Demo: Pure roguelike TD action. Full Game: Adds deckbuilding with 5 playable cards that manipulate your dice fate!

4481280.title: Best Hero: Endless Run
4481280.short_description: Dash, jump, and slide through a fast-paced endless runner built for solo or co-op play. Team up in local split-screen, unleash Rage Mode, smash obstacles, and climb the global leaderboards with cloud-saved progress.

4481450.title: SkyDefender
4481450.short_description: SkyDefender is a high-octane arcade shooter inspired by the golden era of coin-op cabinets. Take control of a powerful anti-air machine gun, clear the skies of enemy squadrons, and test your reflexes in a relentless battle for the high score!

4481510.title: Prism Drift
4481510.short_description: Take control of a lone pilot in a hostile galaxy. In this incremental roguelike, every death is a lesson and every scrap of loot is progress. Battle through relentless waves of enemies, level up your skills, and return to base to turn your scavenged parts into ship upgrades.

4481520.title: Sweet Birthday
4481520.short_description: Sweet Birthday - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around birthdays. Five pretty and cute girls celebrate your birthday with relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

4481550.title: Color Splash: Fruits
4481550.short_description: Color Splash: Fruits is a charming and relaxing puzzle game that will lift your spirits and take You into the world of adorable fruits and art. Venture into the gallery, where you will find many extraordinary and colorful birds paintings.

4481610.title: Wriggle apple 3
4481610.short_description: Help the worm navigate the scorching desert, avoid traps, and grow longer with each apple. Solve puzzles, climb obstacles, and overcome new dangers in this thrilling desert adventure!

4481630.title: Gunja Tteokbokki
4481630.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4481630.short_description: Orders pouring in, broth bubbling over, and the daily pressure of balancing the books! Manage your ingredients, cook tteokbokki to perfection, and run your very own shop in this culinary tycoon simulation game.

4481670.title: Vlare
4481670.short_description: A supernova, a broken telescope, Lum, and a night full of strange encounters and painful memories. Join Eli on a short, emotional point-and-click journey through the city.

4481680.title: Nulphia
4481680.short_description: Explore a vibrant island full of magic and mystery in Nulphia, a top-down story-driven singleplayer adventure.

4481810.title: DVD Survivors
4481810.short_description: YOU are the DVD Survivor! Bounce off walls, collect bytes, stack weapons, evolve your build, close waves of pop-ups, destroy error windows, eliminate bosses (Slippy!), and destroy all the other digital threats! Short runs and ALL THE WEAPONS! This is the final CORNER SLAM!

4481880.title: Laser Seed
4481880.short_description: Select blocks, stack points and ascend to the next level before the timer runs down in this satisfying puzzle clicker based on correlation discernment, block relation and aesthetic variation.

4482070.title: Moonlit Dreams
4482070.short_description: A sokoban game with overlapping levels, inside a dreamscape you'll never want to leave. Push blocks, open doors, traverse mazes, and then do it again across and between three layers of psyche.

4482220.title: QDFracture
4482220.short_description: Fast-paced competitive FPS focused on precision, movement, and high-impact combat. Dominate intense online PvP battles or team up in cooperative modes against adaptive AI. Pure skill. Zero gimmicks.

4482360.title: Space Tormentor
4482360.short_description: Space Tormentor is a Shoot'Em Up Bullet Hell Game in which You immerse Yourself as an lonely pilot with mission to destroy as many alien enemies as it's possible. You have been traped and sent to unknown sector of galaxy. Your goal is to fight your way back to Earth.

4482680.title: NodeNodeNode
4482680.short_description: Start with one node in the center and expand the nodes. The more you defeat the thousands of enemies, the more nodes you have in your hands.

4482700.title: Kogama
4482700.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Free To Play
4482700.short_description: Create, share, and play user-made worlds in a modernized sandbox platform designed for the next generation of creators.

4482880.title: Janshin -infinity-
4482880.short_description: Mahjong meets roguelite loot-building: score big with skills and gear to defeat the gods. Pure damage won’t save you—choose hands that restore HP/MP and master deep mahjong decisions. Equip consumable ofuda and permanent omamori & special tiles; chase rare drops run after run.

4482970.title: Overbooked
4482970.short_description: Manage a chaotic hotel in this Roguelite deckbuilder! Meet your slacking Panda manager, arrange rooms for animal guests, and hit demanding KPIs in tight spaces. This hotel needs talent like you!

4483050.title: D.I.M
4483050.short_description: A top down Sci-Fi futuristic bullet-hell survivor-like where your choices spawn parallel mirror worlds with the other outcome.

4483140.title: Big Theft Valkeala 3 Revenge
4483140.short_description: Terentius Duval is dead and his Wife Mary Duval is coming to Valkeala to rob money and finish missions in this third part of third person open world action game

4483200.title: Corgi Survivor
4483200.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Early Access
4483200.short_description: Cute dogs. Brutal survival. Fight off relentless swarms of insects and wild beasts in this fast-paced roguelite survival game. Simple controls and fun upgrades keep the action going as you fight to survive. Reach Level 50 and defeat the final boss.

4483240.title: 選べ！メロス！～選択肢をミスるとセリヌンティウスが処刑～
4483240.short_description: Comical visual novel: Run as Melos to save your friend from execution! Solve mysteries, reminisce, and conquer dance, puzzle, and rock-paper-scissors mini-games with smart choices.

4483310.title: Firewall
4483310.short_description: Firewall is a tower defense game where You have to defend Your network against hackers and viruses.

4483380.title: Cozy Home Cleanup
4483380.short_description: Clean floors, fix crooked decorations, organize clutter, and transform messy rooms into warm, peaceful homes. Relax and enjoy a satisfying cozy cleanup experience.

4440650.title: KAGE
4440650.genre: Action, Adventure, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Simulation
4440650.short_description: Anime MEGABONK with friends. Unleash anime-style techniques — shout them to activate their true power! Fight hordes of enemies, hunt massive bosses, gather rare loot, and craft insane builds in a fast co-op action game for up to 4 players. Upgrade your village. Become a legend 👹

4440950.title: Vespers Edge
4440950.short_description: Defend humanity's last light in Vespers Edge, a fast-paced rogue-lite hero siege. Use your hero to harness the power of Constellations to survive relentless enemy waves. When you fall, the Core revives you with a defiant roar: "YOU ARE NOT FINISHED YET." Conquer the Void or vanish into the silence.

4441060.title: FRCTL
4441060.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play, Early Access
4441060.short_description: FRCTL is a fast-paced arcade shooter roguelike where you pilot a sleek spacecraft through waves of geometric enemies. Chain kills to build devastating combos, unlock powerful upgrades, and push your skills to the limit. Can you survive long enough to face the boss at 100,000 points?

4441180.title: Understander
4441180.short_description: Understander is a rhythm-infused 2D action-adventure. Master the "timing" to escape a mysterious laboratory alongside the protagonist, Meti!

4442120.title: PERDITION: TERMINUS
4442120.short_description: A psychological horror game where you explore the mind of a girl trapped in a coma. Avoid disturbing humanoid entities, search for tools, solve environmental challenges, and push deeper into your fractured psyche to wake up.

4442190.title: Lust Poker Club
4442190.short_description: Story-driven erotic poker set in a world where magic meets industry. Enter a high-stakes tournament in a grand mansion and face seven distinct women, each with her own style and motives. Master psychological bluffing in realistic, unscripted hands as parallel character stories unfold.

4442400.title: Vanishing In The Island Halphéra
4442400.short_description: Survive in a wild, mysterious world: build shelters, explore forests and caves, face hostile creatures, and uncover hidden secrets. Every night could be your last. Are you ready to survive?

4442740.title: My Cuckqueen Girlfriend
4442740.short_description: Your girlfriend doesn't mind you sleeping with other women. In fact — she loves it. But every secret you keep, every lie you tell, brings her one step closer to something dangerous. Choose carefully!

4442750.title: Void Hunters
4442750.short_description: Lead fearless rebels in a dark fantasy, turn-based RPG where tactical decisions and strategic squad-building shape every battle against the world-devouring Void.

4443390.title: Clank-Robotics
4443390.short_description: Build your own robot. Program your robots AI in the Visual Scripting logic editor. Compete against other people's robots in the ranked arena. Build the strongest and smartest robot and win.

4443670.title: Scale Of Survival
4443670.short_description: This game is for fans of giantesses growing to massive sizes. Play as a heroine defending the city against a robotic army while rescuing civilians. You can also import your own VRM to play as a custom character.

4443930.title: Across the Desk : Study Mate
4443930.short_description: Across the Desk : StudyMate is a cozy productivity sim where you work with a partner, Yeon-woo. Use a Pomodoro timer, To-Do list, and music player to boost efficiency. Follow her story via chat and enjoy mini-games for a perfect mental reset.

4444330.title: Quackoban
4444330.short_description: Master complex block-pushing puzzles in Quackoban, where blocks fuse, teleport, and refuse to move alone. Can you get your ducks in a row, or will these puzzles leave you ruffled?

4444450.title: Cards of Action
4444450.short_description: Cards of Action is the medieval-themed, real-time, roguelike deckbuilder! Craft a deck of hyper-synergistic cards to grow all-powerful, make split-second decisions on how play your cards so you can obliterate the hordes of evil stick figures coming your way.

4444710.title: Loopician: A Music Making Game
4444710.short_description: A creative music production simulator where every message is a new challenge. Create music from incoming video requests using collected loops, explore diverse genres, sharpen your talent in the Conservatory, and compete in themed online competitions with powerful studio tools and advanced effects.

4445030.title: Crimson Creed
4445030.short_description: Crimson Creed is a tower defense and action roguelike hybrid where you fight directly on the battlefield while building strategic defenses.Defend every lane, build strategic towers, combine powerful skills, and survive escalating waves - solo or local co-op. Kill. Collapse. Learn. Return stronger.

4445200.title: Nitro City Racing
4445200.short_description: Dodge traffic and maintain top speed on your mission to become the ultimate street racer!

4446010.title: The First Million
4446010.short_description: An idle deckbuilder where you constantly unlock new cards and upgrades and discover one game-breaking strategy after another to make THE FIRST MILLION — and then many more!

4446380.title: ColorShift
4446380.short_description: A minimalist 3D puzzle game where you shift colors to transform the world and solve tightly crafted spatial challenges.

4446400.title: MUTEIGHT
4446400.short_description: MUTEIGHT is a brutal, unapologetic tribute to the golden age of arcade gaming. Wake up mutated, unleash plasma carnage, and master the tentacle slingshot to survive a gruelling, high-score gauntlet. One credit. No saves. Can you survive the trial?

4446760.title: Lines Relined
4446760.short_description: Lines Relined is modern remake of the classic puzzle game Lines, the timeless puzzle where strategy meets simplicity. Place and move colored shapes across the board to form lines. Every move counts, three new shapes appear each turn, steadily filling the board.

4446770.title: Ikal
4446770.short_description: A cartoon-style puzzle platformer set in a mesoamerican civilization where a child must use the powers of an ancient magical artifact to alter the scenery around them, solve puzzles, and save their village from Spanish invaders.

4446810.title: The Lighthouse of Black Salt
4446810.short_description: A dark gamebook-inspired RPG where your choices, luck, and blade decide what the sea keeps. Climb a cursed lighthouse and uncover the name buried beneath the bell.

4446870.title: Medieval Tavern Simulator
4446870.short_description: Rebuild your medieval tavern from the ground up. Serve food and ale, manage staff, entertain guests, and shape the atmosphere with music and decor. Balance profit, reputation, and chaos as every night brings new stories and unexpected events.

4446920.title: King For a Week
4446920.short_description: Rule a Kingdom...for a week. Judge your subjects, make the big decisions and deal with the consequences. Every choice matters and any wrong move could bring about the destruction of the kingdom, or the premature end of your rule.

4446940.title: The Dream Sequence
4446940.short_description: Solve these unique handcrafted puzzles, some of which are inspired by dreams.

4447030.title: Welcome to Harmony
4447030.short_description: Build your timeline, execute your plan, and survive Harmony as it slowly slips into something darker in this 3D deckbuilding roguelite.

4447090.title: Master of Chaos
4447090.short_description: Play better. Get stronger. Counter, deflect, and chain combos to boost your stats mid-fight. Craft your upgrades, complete skill-based quests, and build synergies through skill and strategy. Not dumb luck. Think fast, play smart, or die like the rest.

4447250.title: Dark Bros
4447250.short_description: Launch your enemies off the arena in a high-speed PvP battle where precision parries, explosive knockback, and fast-paced movement decide who survives. Play it with friends or random players in a casual or competitive setting.

4447370.title: Amante VS Esposa
4447370.short_description: You are Shigeru, happily married to Ayaka, a wife as loving as she is passionate. One morning, at a bar, you meet Megumi—an unbelievably beautiful woman who might become your lover. Will you choose one of them… or live with secrets?

4447420.title: Firestorm
4447420.short_description: Firestorm is a deckbuilding strategy game in a fantasy world of weapons and magic. Compete alone or with friends in campaigns or generated battles managing units and spells on a tabletop hex board.

4447540.title: Break Like a Baby
4447540.short_description: BREAK EVERYTHING BEFORE SHE CATCHES YOU — a co-op online multiplayer comedy/survival game about breaking furniture in a house, as babies.

4447550.title: Linebound
4447550.short_description: One player navigates. One player creates. Linebound is a 2D asymmetric co-op puzzle platformer where one player navigates the world while the other draws platforms in real time. Progress is only possible through communication.

4447790.title: STEP ASIDE!
4447790.short_description: You are an invincible bodyguard. Your only weakness is the person you must protect. Control the crowd, spot the assassin, and execute the mission in this stylish, top-down tactical shooter.

4447880.title: What Happened At Sugar Hill?
4447880.short_description: A First Person Horror Walking Simulator set in a fictional town called Sugar Hill. Play as various characters trying to unravel the mystery of What Happened At Sugar Hill.

4447900.title: Static Condition
4447900.short_description: You are trapped in an endless parking garage with 100 unique anomalies. Spot the difference to reach the exit — or stay in the loop forever. If something changed — turn back. If nothing changed — move forward. Master every anomaly, fill your Trophy Room, and break the Static Condition.

4447940.title: Neon Angora: The Cabaret Club
4447940.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4447940.short_description: A social simulation set in a nightclub where people, gossip, and secrets constantly change. No dialogue trees. No correct choices. Talk, experiment, and live through a different story every time.

4448030.title: Streets of bums
4448030.short_description: In the city’s filth-soaked backstreets, the forgotten fight to the death with whatever they can scavenge, pipes, bottles, bricks, bare hands. No rules. No mercy. Just the promise of cash and a chance to escape the streets for good. Only one walks away rich..... The rest become part of the pavement.

4448050.title: TORION:Escape
4448050.short_description: TORION:Escape is a fast-paced parkour game where nothing stops you from going forward and Escaping the simulation in record time. Run, jump, and control the environment alongside a variety of relaxing drum and bass tracks playing in the background.

4448100.title: LasTar
4448100.short_description: Survive endless waves, stack powerful upgrades, and create broken builds in this fast-paced 2D spaceship roguelike. Unlock permanent progression, experiment with different weapons and amulets, and push your limits against escalating enemy threats

4448140.title: Spirits: Unbound
4448140.short_description: Build your own deck of Spirits to battle in Spirits: Unbound. Play against opponents, then alter your cards with stickers, to make them incredibly powerful.

4448200.title: Coffee Raccoons
4448200.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy
4448200.short_description: Run your intergalactic brewing business as you explore alien worlds in search of rare ingredients. Upgrade your machines, unlock quirky space gear, and journey to distant planets to discover new flavors. Craft irresistible menus and grow your café into a legendary coffee destination among the stars!

4448270.title: Crypt of the Shadow King
4448270.short_description: A terminal RPG for 1-4 players built on 5E rules. Build a party from 12 classes and races, fight through 100+ rooms of cursed crypts and the Shadowfell, cast 146 spells, and face a villain who won't stay dead. Grid combat, narrated audio, and a three-act campaign dark enough to earn its name.

4448360.title: A Game About Launching A Ball
4448360.short_description: A challenging game about launching a ball to collect stars. Collect the stars as fast as you can, discover the secrets, upgrade your ball, and unlock the awards. Grab a friend to play online or split screen!

4448550.title: Dumpster Dive Live
4448550.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Early Access
4448550.short_description: An interactive and cozy raccoon fueled trash digging game for your Twitch viewers. Viewers can dig through your garbage with commands, subs, gift subs, and bit donations. Ideal for keeping chat engaged during content that requires extra attention, or while on long breaks.

4448570.title: STILL BOUND
4448570.short_description: A short, story-driven first-person psychological horror game where a quiet forest scouting trip turns into a desperate night escape from a stalking presence. No combat—only movement, light, and fear.

4448610.title: Wizards and Warlocks
4448610.short_description: A dimly-lit PvPvE experience. Wizards and Warlocks. Pick a side. Use your voice to cast magic spells. Defeat your enemies and capture their Sacred Crystals to banish them back to the lobby of purgatory. Beware the Rogue Sorcerers who roam the Maze and Hall.

4448620.title: Rovi's Diary
4448620.short_description: Rovi's Diary – A 2D pixel-art adventure with anime storytelling. On planet Lumira, an ordinary girl Rovi is chosen by "Starlight." She grows from a passive observer into a protector, teaming up with Faye and Alice to uncover the mystery behind cosmic invaders.

4448670.title: Venus in Transit
4448670.short_description: The mother vessel is adrift in space, out of fuel and doomed. Your mission is the colony’s only hope for survival. Will you be able to navigate the claustrophobic canyons when your ship begins to fail?

4448690.title: Consumed
4448690.short_description: A co-op store simulation game where you and your friends stock shelves, manage inventory, and try to keep the store running as everything starts to fall apart.

4448720.title: Furry Master: Pawsluts
4448720.short_description: Horny furry babes are in heat this Easter! Solve multiple puzzle modes to unlock explicit scenes of paw-obsessed bunnies, foxes, deer, ducks & more! Gallery, favorites, character profiles & more! Spring never felt this filthy. 🌸🐾🔥

4448890.title: Battle Cloud
4448890.short_description: In Battle Cloud, freely equip and upgrade weapons and items as you sweep through waves of enemies. Grow stronger with the loot you collect, complete your own destructive build, and dominate the battlefield!

4448920.title: Tactics of Scarlet
4448920.short_description: Tactics of Scarlet is a Japanese-Style Tactical RPG inspired by the classics from the GBA era. Cross swords through 3 campaigns with radically different gameplay as you discover multiple sides of the story.

4448930.title: Dealer Bust! | Roguelike BlackJack
4448930.short_description: Break the rules. Build powerful hands, trigger insane combos, and survive brutal debuffs in Dealer Bust — a fast-paced roguelike deckbuilder where every play pushes you closer to the perfect bust.

4449220.title: Ogasm Simulator
4449220.short_description: From broke donor to city powerbroker earn money through unconventional private clinics, expand your influence, and shape population growth as the city shifts between love, fear, and chaos.

4449410.title: KYOTO XANADU -the Blooming Phantom-
4449410.short_description: Falcom’s latest juvenile RPG set in modern JAPAN! Based on the worldview of the "Tokyo Xanadu" released in 2015, it presents a completely original story for modern RPG players.

4449460.title: Summer Vacation
4449460.short_description: Summer Vacation is an adult visual novel about self-discovery, first love, and the chaos... of figuring out who you really are. Join Mateo through this summer, and his first year at university. Every choice shapes the bonds you build, and the person you'll become.

4449620.title: Greedcurse
4449620.short_description: A roguelike slot machine game where you choose your bet, spin the reels, and craft and enhance powerful cards and symbols to create game-breaking combos and unstoppable wins.

4449800.title: TaskFall
4449800.short_description: TaskFall is a co-op physics-based destruction game where you and your friends are assigned missions from the Citadel, survive deadly disasters, complete high-risk tasks, extract safely, buy new items, and uncover the mysteries behind the Citadel. Do you have what it takes to survive ?

4449990.title: Mega Marbles
4449990.short_description: Smash friends, enemies, and anything else in your way to score goals! Mega Marbles is a physics-driven party game for up to eight players that's easy to pick up and endlessly deep. Powered by rollback netcode for buttery-smooth online play, compete for marble mastery around the world!

4450060.title: Floppy Dick
4450060.short_description: You like milk? You like tits? Then you’ll love milky tits. Floppy Dick is a parody arcade game with an absurd and provocative theme. Survive rising speed, test your reflexes, choose your difficulty, and see how long you can last. You want it hard… right?

4450260.title: 666 Malevolence Lane
4450260.short_description: Trapped in a haunted Mansion filled with monsters and minigames, you must out maneuver, out think, and out play your friends to escape before your fear makes it impossible to do so.

4450350.title: Xvirus
4450350.short_description: Trapped inside your own computer—are you living a dream or a nightmare?

4450560.title: ASMR Toy VR
4450560.short_description: Create immersive ASMR soundscapes in full 3D. Grab, place, and shape satisfying audio clips around you, or import your own. Explore spatial reverb environments and relax inside your mix. Build interactive worlds of sound, then let them play as you unwind.

4450660.title: Flick
4450660.short_description: Shift realities with the flick of a light switch and plunge into the grotesque to uncover your family's twisted past. A psychological horror game where you must balance the light you need to progress with the terrifying nightmares it summons.

4450680.title: Wander Park
4450680.short_description: Explore an endless set of mazes through an abstract park, and try not to get lost. Big or small, dense or sprawling, you get to choose. Enjoy the sights and sounds of Wander Park. Take a load off and rest awhile. Or speedrun the daily park for a record.

4450840.title: Binded Souls
4450840.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG
4450840.short_description: Forged in history, breathed by myth. Binded Souls is a narrative-driven action adventure where the past and a machine-dominated future collide. Master the powers of Bulgarian folklore, survive the year 2252, and discover how what we do today determines what battles we will fight tomorrow.

4450910.title: TURTLE HAS WHEELS
4450910.short_description: A momentum-based platformer where you're a turtle with wheels. Roll your way through speedy courses to get to the end of each level. Compete with friends to see who can get the fastest time on each course, and enjoy the crunchy pixels!

4451190.title: Thou Shalt Be Rich
4451190.short_description: Interpret the crystal ball's prophecies to find tomorrow's soaring stocks and bet your entire fortune. Survive the madness of skyrocketing and crashing prices to become rich. You need to take revenge on the Fortune Teller Corp that fired you just for a little bit of embezzlement!

4451240.title: Colours of Courage
4451240.short_description: The Colours of Courage is a story-driven adventure where players help Sky navigate challenges, support others, and grow emotional strengths. Through choices and exploration, the game turns resilience, empathy, and mindset into an interactive journey.

4451310.title: MythicTale
4451310.short_description: Battle rivals, unleash energy attacks, explore dangerous zones, and take on platforming challenges as you fight to rise through the Super Fighter League in a 2.5D pixel-art action RPG.

4451320.title: Goth Femboy Desire
4451320.short_description: Femboy. Office boredom. Unexpected desire. Escape the corporate grind with Luna, a mysterious and alluring femboy who’s about to turn your world upside down. A steamy, humorous, and high-heat 30-minute visual novel.

4451400.title: Massage With Benefits
4451400.short_description: Step into the role of an exclusive private massage therapist operating right from your own home. When a stunning "Young Wife" arrives seeking relief from her daily aches, it’s your job to provide a touch she’ll never forget. Transition from soothing her muscles to make her yours!

4451610.title: Slots and Dungeons
4451610.genre: Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4451610.short_description: 'Slots and Dungeons' is a strategic roguelite game combining 3D dungeon exploration with slot machine mechanics. Defeat lethal bosses on every floor, discover treasure chests, and spin the roulette wheel for rewards. Combine symbols and equipment to reach the end. Luck favors the prepared.

4451740.title: Soul Reaper: Endless Harvest
4451740.short_description: A fast-paced incremental survival game where you harvest souls, master enemy patterns, and grow permanently stronger in short, intense sessions.

4451820.title: Swordless
4451820.short_description: A broken sword... The left hand controls the hilt, the right hand guides the blade. They work together to reach the end, and unite as one!

4451920.title: Galdromeda
4451920.short_description: Turn-based RPG with space combat. Assemble a crew, each having their own unique abilities, level up, upgrade your ship and your crew's abilities, collect new outfits for your crew.

4451970.title: Blockade Runner
4451970.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4451970.short_description: An arcade-style tactics/strategy mini-game set in space. Players pilot a spaceship or a fleet of spaceships and navigate them past a blockade of guard ships so they can arrive safely at their home planet. Players can complete the game's 19 levels in about 1 hour.

4452020.title: Turbo Trigger
4452020.short_description: Turbo Trigger is a local arena shooter for up to 4 players. Die, buy a better weapon, respawn, and get your revenge. Nobody sits out — the round doesn't stop until the final second.

4452250.title: 云之子：天空之战 / Cloudborn：Battle for the Skies
4452250.short_description: A high-speed Ace-style roguelike aerial action game. Fly through an endless world and experience fast, arcade-style dogfights in the sky. Upgrade your abilities and build powerful combos. Every battle is massive, every location is procedurally generated, and every encounter is a spectacular showdown

4452270.title: Winds of Rhei
4452270.short_description: Forge your legacy in a sandbox based in the ancient Mediterranean world. Carve out your own adventure in a living world where time never stops and earn a reputation that lasts decades. From your first step to your final breath, your choices shape a world that moves with or without you.

4452300.title: The Ghost Of Solaris
4452300.short_description: When a legendary enforcer returns to a city transformed into a corporate prison, he must coordinate a high-stakes revolution to save his family and settle a debt written in blood.
