Experience a gritty story of betrayal and vengeance across the neon-drenched slums and silver towers of Solaris Bay.

4452950.title: Land Of Opportunities
4452950.short_description: Start from zero: no money, no shelter, no ID. Struggle to survive by taking on odd jobs in the subway and at the market until you can scrape together enough to buy a diploma and get to work. Upgrade your IQ by building a computer. And here's a twist: COMPUTER GAMES also boost your IQ in this game!

4452990.title: Raisin Word-Connect
4452990.short_description: A live streaming word game built for TikTok and Twitch! Your chat finds words on a Hex grid in real time, the faster they spell, the higher they score. Also playable solo or with local friends.

4454460.title: Sanctus Wars
4454460.short_description: A dark pixel-art action game about war, revenge, betrayal, and survival. Fight waves of enemies, develop your hero, use spells, and choose summonable units to build your own strategy and dive deeper into the story.

4454840.title: Warehouse 30
4454840.short_description: Take on your father's job as a warehouse clerk, inspect each shipment note carefully and direct them to where the corresponding warehouse. Stick to the rules, avoid making mistakes and subsequently fines to make enough money to help your family get through this rough patch.

4454910.title: Slovian Salvation
4454910.short_description: A dark 3D survival horror inspired by Slavic folklore. Descend into an abandoned mine and a hidden laboratory, solve puzzles, survive deadly horrors, and uncover the truth behind your wife and daughter’s disappearance.

4455150.title: Denied
4455150.short_description: Employee #759618F: Your 5-year probation begins now. Report to your terminal and deny unnecessary coverage. Assume fraud and find reasons to reject as many excessive claims as possible. Reaching your daily quota ensures your financial survival. Management is watching.

4455190.title: Desk Till Dawn
4455190.short_description: Corporate life isn’t for the faint of heart and neither is corporate death. Explore populated and abandoned offices, uncover hidden secrets, and survive against pestilent forces.

4455400.title: Vord
4455400.short_description: Vord is an evolving sandbox adventure where players shape the world through iterative mechanics and collaborative discovery. Navigate a shifting landscape, build unique structures, and experiment with expanding gameplay systems that grow alongside the community’s imagination.

4455420.title: Keyboard Rush
4455420.short_description: Rhythm based typing game. Improve your typing skills or learn to type while typing to the beat on levels of varying difficulty from no typing experience to pro typist.

4455450.title: Hengor 2
4455450.genre: Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4455450.short_description: Fantasy open-world MMORPG where you explore vast and dangerous territories, face powerful creatures, and engage in intense PvP battles for rare resources. Evolve your build, strengthen your equipment, and fight to dominate strategic areas in a persistent and competitive world.

4455480.title: Unbounded
4455480.genre: Action, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4455480.short_description: A fast-paced top-down bullet hell roguelike where every input matters. Fight, dodge, upgrade, repeat. Push yourself to the limit and see how far you can go.

4455560.title: Desecrated
4455560.short_description: Desecrated is a fast paced FPS inspired by retro fps. Grab your guns, regain your powers and slaughter those who stand in your way.

4455590.title: RUNTIME
4455590.short_description: RUNTIME is a precision platformer set inside a corrupted digital world. Dash through collapsing systems, survive escalating hazards, and master mechanics that twist the rules of each level as the code around you breaks apart.

4455640.title: Push & Crush
4455640.short_description: Push & Crush is a casual stress-relief game supporting up to 8 players. Players assume the role of push miners from a cross-galactic mining company, collaborating or competing to complete each assigned mission. Successfully meeting the task deadline fulfills the dispatch.

4455650.title: Mai's Hunger
4455650.short_description: Manage a nighttime burger joint with a gruesome secret. Drug customers, use the macabre rotating shelf to swap corpses for fresh human meat patties, and serve the unaware. Evade the police, feed a dark demon, and save your cursed wife in this tense first-person horror simulation.

4455660.title: Ivory Quest
4455660.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4455660.short_description: Cast spells by reading music! Learn treble and bass clef the fun way. Perfect for music students of all ages. Works with MIDI connected instruments.

4455670.title: Pillar of Knight
4455670.short_description: A medieval fantasy text-based visual novel where you guide Santi’s choices, unlock secret routes, and discover hidden CGs through interactive scenes.

4455690.title: Upcreek
4455690.short_description: A short, cozy experience where you enjoy cleaning a lively nature park.

4455740.title: The Time Before Time
4455740.short_description: Imagine this, you are on an island all alone, when a 40 foot stork comes out of the sky. It was no bird it was the dreaded Hatzegopteryx and it will stop at nothing to hunt you down. Work hard to survive, and maybe, just maybe you will be able to escape.

4455780.title: Moonlight Dialogue
4455780.short_description: A romantic visual novel set in an enigmatic counseling center under the moonlight. As a Finder, listen to the stories of charming characters, heal their hearts, and uncover hidden secrets. Your choices will determine your destiny and love. Will you find your true connection amidst the nightmares?

4455790.title: The Ocean is not Water
4455790.short_description: An eldritch incremental game where you are an ancient shark devouring fish, reality, and the concept of depth itself. Hunt with sonar, collect bioluminescent jellyfish, command a brood, dream the dreams of dead gods, and descend through layers of cosmic progression. The ocean is not water.

4455810.title: WPCA: World Phasebound Control Authority
4455810.short_description: Step into the city's shadows as defenders against the paranormal. Your mission: Contain the Phasebound Horrors, the manifested fictions encroaching upon our world and the survival of humanity.

4455840.title: Godisnje
4455840.short_description: Godisnje is a turn-based strategy card game where players match Month cards with trait-based sets across multiple boards, manipulate seasonal effects, and outscore AI opponents through in-depth tactical play.

4455850.title: Speed Grinder 2.0
4455850.short_description: A focused typing trainer that builds real speed through motion-based practice, teaching efficient key rollover and muscle memory through structured exercises and adaptive word patterns.

4455910.title: MESHUDA
4455910.short_description: "MESHUDA" is the retro style 2D adventure game and it's adopted simple command battle. Choose from three command in the battle --ATTACK, EVADE, SPECIAL SKILL-- . You fight as Aziga village's warrior, Meshuda, to save your village.

4455920.title: NOL
4455920.short_description: NOL is a first-person horror game with visuals inspired by black and white horror manga. You play as Guntur, a young man trapped in a dream world after reading news about the massacre of his childhood friend's family. Since the game focuses on dreams, ANYTHING CAN HAPPEN.

4455950.title: Humans Vs Orcs
4455950.short_description: Command your army in this side-scrolling incremental strategy game. Recruit soldiers, unlock powerful units, and fight through 48 waves of increasingly dangerous orcs. Earn War Medals, unlock prestige upgrades, and survive dragon attacks to defend your kingdom.

4455960.title: Fantasy Journey
4455960.short_description: [Fantasy Journey] is a creature-collecting adventure game with single and multiplayer.Explore alone or team up with global players to catch and bond with 123 unique spirits.Enjoy our special fun mode for a brand-new experience.

4455970.title: Project: Doll Heaven
4455970.short_description: Android Kaila awakens in a lab with no memories and explores a complex full of mutants and parasites. Stealth, puzzles, and pixel art.

4455980.title: Leaf it in yourself
4455980.short_description: Leaf it in yourself - is a little Cozy game about collecting shells on a small desert island. Shells — lots of them, beautiful and unique. Scattered across the warm sand, waiting to be found. Discover shells and build your own little collection while enjoying a relaxing atmosphere by the sea.

4456020.title: Grind & Grind Company
4456020.short_description: Your partner washes cars in a small corner of your desktop only while you're focused. Turn your productive time into a growing collection of cars.

4456030.title: Hauntrap
4456030.short_description: Asymmetric PvP horror where a player-controlled monster hunts survivors through dark experimental halls. Fix fuses. Trigger the Hunt. Escape.

4456070.title: Knick Knack Stack
4456070.short_description: Knick Knack Stack is a cosy puzzle game. Travel the world as Caroline, build crazy towers in beautiful places, take cute memory pictures of your creations and chat with your silly friends!

4456090.title: A Game About Achieving Stuff
4456090.short_description: Cut out the annoying "gameplay" and get straight to what matters: making numbers go up. Walk down identical corridors, hoard useless loot, and perform 200 highly specific, stupid tasks just to make a little notification pop up on your screen. Pure achievement satisfaction.

4456170.title: Neuro Clicker
4456170.short_description: Neuro Clicker is a casual incremental idle game where you build up a system neuron, collect IQ and coins, unlock powerful upgrades, and deal with chaotic mini-games. As the neuron evolves, Clippy uncovers lost memory fragments and gets closer to remembering who she really is.

4456210.title: Knuckle Is Bones
4456210.short_description: This is a simple fan game version of the minigame Knucklebones from Cult of the Lamb, with the somewhat visuals of Baba is You.

4456220.title: AnUncommonWinter
4456220.short_description: AnUncommonWinter is a game of survival and progression through different worlds

4456230.title: Jigsaw Puzzle Palace
4456230.short_description: Build jigsaw puzzles of beautiful images with tens, hundreds, or even thousands of pieces.

4456300.title: Oops! INC. Emergency Center
4456300.short_description: Run the galaxy’s most chaotic hospital in Oops! INC. Emergency Center! Play as a diploma-free robot doctor, diagnose bizarre space illnesses, craft the right remedies, and treat patients fast before insurance turns you into a fridge. Funny, frantic, and out of this world!

4456350.title: Organomancer
4456350.short_description: Run an organ trading empire in the dark underworld of Arkwright. Buy, upgrade, and sell organs across black markets. Manage your economy, dodge the police, and fulfill patient requests to dominate the underground.

4456470.title: KRAI LESA: Edge of the Forest
4456470.short_description: Brave the wilderness, interrogate your family folklore, and submit yourself to a higher power in this eldritch survival-adventure game. The tundra is rotting — won't you join its decay?

4456530.title: Deprivation
4456530.short_description: A tragic story in the genre of domestic horror about loss, and life after loss. A walking, cooking, and driving simulator. There is a place where she will always be near.

4456550.title: LOST ZION
4456550.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Strategy
4456550.short_description: Lost Zion is an atmospheric cyberpunk horror game. Awakened by a faint signal as a service bot, explore the forsaken megacity of Lost Zion. Uncover the Emperor's horrific secrets. Obey your sole command: Activate the Gravity Core.

4456600.title: Deliverage
4456600.short_description: Deliverage is a hardcore open-world PvP delivery game where every shipment is a gamble. Fight other players for valuable cargo, repair and modify fragile vehicles, outplay rivals in a shifting economy, and climb from nothing to the top of a ruthless world.

4456720.title: ColorRandomDefense
4456720.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4456720.short_description: Your defense is the enemy's disaster! Combine units to build a powerful army and send defeated monsters to your opponent instantly. Master your strategy with skill synergies and real-time scouting to survive and win.

4456780.title: LichXCoven
4456780.short_description: Conquer your prison with gorgeous witches to free your Lich Heart. Destroy monsters floor by floor with clicks & chain reactions, grant powerful boons to upgrade the girls and enjoy some well deserved good time with them in animated hentai scenes.

4456960.title: Astro Yoinkers
4456960.short_description: Team up with your fellow Astro Yoinkers in this fast-paced multiplayer CTF. Physics-based grappling across moving asteroids, yoink enemy crystals, and vaporize lobbies with orbital strike satellites.

4457030.title: Clutter 19: Survey Says What? - Collector's Edition
4457030.short_description: Clutter 19: Survey Says What? - Collector's Edition delivers the most entertaining and challenging Clutter yet, featuring over 1,800 puzzles! Tackle new Clutter Gaps Diamond Style, Rotation Matters, Pop-Ups and Clutter Pics (Pic Jong) Variations, and more in this endlessly replayable challenge.

4457150.title: Chomp Garden
4457150.short_description: Venture into a dangerous garden full of strange plants, solve puzzles, and find your lost dog.

4457420.title: Bermuda Bastion
4457420.short_description: Survive 33 days in the heart of the Bermuda Triangle! Build triangular structures to defend against malevolent squares, pentagons, and other geometric monsters. In this chaotic city-builder roguelike, every mistake pulls your Bastion closer to the depths.

4457480.title: Sinful Vacation
4457480.short_description: Become an elite photographer at a secret nudist resort in the Maldives Islands. Earn the trust of 7 stunning models, fulfill their desires, and curate your own adult magazine. Unlock hedonistic parties where artistic nudity is the final celebration. Luxury and the shoot of a lifetime await you.

4457830.title: The Mall Explodes!
4457830.short_description: The Mall Explodes! is a visual novel about a security guard with only a few minutes to stop a bomb from exploding in a shopping mall. Figure out who the bomber is and stop them before it's too late!

4458000.title: Pull It Together
4458000.short_description: Haul your wagon as a crew to progress along the trail and escape the approaching storm! Manage your supplies and band together as you fumble through the wilderness’s challenges.

4458370.title: Chug Master Chuck
4458370.short_description: Step into the wild world of Chug Master Chuck! Sling beers, dodge hazards, and outwit rowdy foes in this action-packed retro 2D platformer. Can you conquer the craziest bar on the block? Cheers to the challenge!

4458590.title: Save New York 2030
4458590.short_description: Defend two iconic cities in this horizontal flying combat game with block-by-block destruction physics. Choose from four ships with unique abilities, combine 36 weapon loadouts, and fight through dynamic weather and day-night cycles. Full local co-op. Custom wave builder included.

4458750.title: Wardens of Wen
4458750.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Early Access
4458750.short_description: Wave-based top-down survival in a dark medieval realm. Pick a Warden, build your kit between waves, chase risk-reward hot-zones, and survive escalating enemy mutations and milestone bosses. How long can you survive?

4458830.title: Hypnophobia; From Your Shadow
4458830.short_description: This is a story about Iris, a nobody who didn't have a Happy Ending and now suffers the consequences of their own (lack of) actions all alone in the most northern city in the world. A depressing story and a melancholic lesson teached in life's hard way awaits you.

4460050.title: Nexus Survivors
4460050.short_description: In Nexus Survivors, you don't get a pre-made fireball handed to you. You build it yourself — from cards that determine how it moves, what it does, and what happens when it hits. Every spell in your arsenal is your own creation.

4460060.title: The Heresy of Gibur
4460060.short_description: An 18+ story of power and temptation: you are Beraziel, a demon inhabiting the body of the charismatic Abbot Gibur. Ritual alchemy, choices, explicit scenes, and simple card duels.

4460090.title: Starwing Tactics
4460090.short_description: Command a mercenary squadron of starfighter pilots in this turn-based tactical RPG, where your orders unfold in cinematic dogfights. Take contracts, refit starfighters, forge elite aces, and send them into deadly engagements where losses are permanent and legends are made.

4460130.title: INFINITY DEADLINE
4460130.short_description: Play as 25yo writer Jian Xun in a 5-min deadline loop. Your script is alive! In this thriller puzzle, use "keyframe sorting" to piece stories. Fight AI, break the 4th wall & escape the nightmare!

4460170.title: LEAVES 3
4460170.short_description: Dive into the enchanting world of LEAVES 3, a handcrafted adventure full of mysteries and wonders. Explore a world crafted with love and imagination, solve puzzles and free the Treefruities.

4460180.title: Rescue Team: Legion of Destruction
4460180.short_description: What began as a scientific breakthrough has spiraled into a nightmare. Now, the Rescue Team needs your help to stop the brilliant engineer that has betrayed the world. Can you save the world from the man who used to dream of building it?

4460470.title: Factory Balls Go!
4460470.short_description: In this clever logic puzzle, craft each ball using the right tools. Yes, the classic Factory Balls puzzle game is back with fresh ideas. And this time, the balls might even have arms and legs, welcome to Factory Balls Go!

4460500.title: Last Cleanup
4460500.short_description: Last Cleanup is a 1–4 player co-op horror game where you and your crew take on dangerous cleaning missions in abandoned locations. Scrub, repair, and haul away the mess while something lurks in the dark. Work together, finish the checklist, and make it out alive.

4461140.title: Squadika
4461140.short_description: Assemble a squad of sinners and fight endless hordes of enemies in the arena of purgatory. Unlock characters, discover insane synergies, and try to redeem your sins to earn a place in heaven. A dynamic action roguelike where every run is unique!

4461250.title: Meatlock
4461250.short_description: An abandoned house. A trapped child. And something lurking in the corridors. A short point-and-click horror experience (20–30 minutes).

4461410.title: KSEF ❤️
4461410.short_description: You are Janusz, a 47-year-old Polish business owner. Your mission: issue one e-invoice through KSeF before 5 PM. A Windows XP bureaucracy simulator with 15 apps, 30+ random interruptions, multiple endings, and disco polo.

4461610.title: Golem Rumble
4461610.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4461610.short_description: A fast-paced 1v1 arena brawler where shamans summon golems through magical masks. Build your minion squad each round and fight alongside them to outplay your opponent.

4461720.title: Sylph
4461720.short_description: Operate a spacecraft at the edge of a singularity. Use realistic orbital mechanics and Newtonian physics to explore a star system around a black hole and what lies beyond.

4461830.title: Department of Missing Persons
4461830.short_description: In this GeoGuessr-like game, work at Mili Co. using GeoFinder to track missing persons. Stay safe inside the office, cooperate with coworkers, and survive in a world where only the workplace offers security.

4461910.title: Night Light
4461910.short_description: Night Light is a relaxing merge game that uses pool-inspired physics. Line up the perfect shot to cause chain reactions that spawn bigger balls and increase your score with a variety of cute animals to meet and keep you company.

4462130.title: LOVE D3ATH LOVE
4462130.short_description: In 2222, your AI secretly sends over 3,000 job applications worldwide without you knowing. Soon after, three powerful women appear, each insisting you belong with her. You’re thrown into a growing crisis, their ambitions colliding endlessly. What do they actually want from you?

4462280.title: Wayward Woods
4462280.genre: Adventure, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4462280.short_description: Wayward Woods is a turn based strategy game set inside of a magical storybook. Cast spells, defeat your enemies, all to find your way out of the enchanting Wayward Woods.

4462570.title: Urbex Nigthmare
4462570.short_description: Urban exploration turns into a nightmare. Your friends vanished inside a cursed cave haunted by a witch’s spirit. Enter the forbidden site, uncover the truth, and survive a presence that won’t let anyone leave alive. Developed by a small independent studio — our first solo-developed game.

4462740.title: Missile Man
4462740.short_description: A precision bullet-hell boss rush. Dodge 15 escalating attack types, chain perfect grazes into devastating combos, and strike during vulnerability windows across 28 handcrafted boss fights. Three difficulty modes, risk contracts, and deep upgrade progression keep every run fresh.

4462780.title: Before Times
4462780.short_description: Play as caveman with friend or many friend and explore strange new world! Survive against small lizard, big lizard, chicken lizard and big cat to find the Mungo Bungo! That mean great treasure in Unga Bunga language.

4462850.title: Nightpiercer
4462850.short_description: Nightpiercer is a unique dice-driven, turn-based deckbuilder RPG. Collect materials and cards to forge powerful weapons and build a legendary team. Explore a despair-ridden Holy City, navigate unpredictable events, and confront nightmarish foes.

4462890.title: Skinscribing
4462890.short_description: SKINSCRIBING is a 2D hand-drawn and dual-handed cosmic folk horror game wherein you explore environments, grief, and bodies alike to interpret and tattoo the history of a dying world as the foundation for the Era to come.

4462930.title: Bell Knight
4462930.short_description: Traverse a town overrun by monsters, strike down malevolent spirits, and uphold the sacred duty of the Bell Society. Praise the Bell.

4462970.title: Wolf Girl: Brazen NTR Exhibition!!
4462970.short_description: My beloved was stolen by a wolf girl!! They flaunt their sex-filled days!! It was supposed to be NTR, but now we're having threesomes together!? Smoothly animated CG events , with voice acting!!

4463050.title: Dice Biology
4463050.short_description: Dice Biology is a roguelike dice-builder where you mutate dice sides, stack base and multiplier synergies, and discover powerful card combinations to push your score to the top of the leaderboard.

4463080.title: Arc Salvo
4463080.short_description: Arc Salvo is a fast-paced online turn-based artillery game featuring explosive team battles, a growing arsenal, and deep character customization.

4463170.title: The Evaluation
4463170.short_description: A first-person horror puzzle game about solving cryptic puzzles and surviving a deadly night inside an abandoned drive-in theater.

4463500.title: DesktopSaurs
4463500.short_description: Turn your desktop into a living prehistoric world. Dinosaurs roam along the bottom of your screen while you work, study, or browse. Collect, care for them, and grow your ecosystem over time.

4463690.title: Divider Dave
4463690.short_description: A slapstick puzzle-platformer where you clone yourself, swap between copies, and use every double to outsmart deadly traps. Escape the facility. Find out who Dave is.

4463700.title: Castle in the Sands
4463700.short_description: Castle in the Sands is a pixel art visual novel set in a world inspired by One Thousand and One Nights and North Africa. The adventure begins in the heart of the desert and leads you to fairytale places full of magic and danger.

4463990.title: Superstore Survival
4463990.short_description: Superstore Survival is a first-person psychological survival horror game set inside an endless abandoned supermarket. Explore dark, liminal aisles, manage scarce food and ammo, and survive mannequins that awaken in light while an unseen creature hunts by sound.

4464170.title: After the Bite
4464170.short_description: In a house that won’t let you leave, a shadowed story unfolds through music, animation, choice, and passive progression. Follow branching paths between songs and uncover new scenes in a music-driven visual novel.

4464380.title: Stellar Fixer
4464380.short_description: Step into the grease-stained boots of a debt-ridden Patcher in a gritty industrial space station. Diagnose critical failures, strip panels with your automatic vortex drill, and replace complex components to bring massive ships back to life. Restore power, clear the smoke, and pay off your debt.

4464410.title: Dark Horizon
4464410.short_description: Dark Horizon is a single-player survival FPS game based off of Escape from Tarkov and S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Your squadmates have been killed, and you are trapped in the middle of a deadly conflict fueled by the city's government.

4464420.title: 7 Days Awake
4464420.short_description: 7 Days Awake is a psychological horror game. Locked in a room with no way out, use your deductive reasoning to find the weakness of the monsters attacking you day and night to kill you. The only way out of this hell is to pass the test: will you survive 7 days without sleep?

4464460.title: Defender of Grids
4464460.short_description: A pixel-perfect Tower Defense game where defeat is just the beginning. Master the rock-paper-scissors balance of combat, speed up the action with 4x speed, and use your hard-earned XP to unlock powerful permanent skills. Can you hold the line?

4464490.title: CYBERTOLIA: The Last Canton
4464490.short_description: A retro-future action-adventure game with cyberpunk influences. Flying cars, teleport cabins, electromagnetic weapons. Upgrade your character, bond with your neighbors, and save the world. Live in a wooden house, wander among stone buildings. A past set in the future.

4464530.title: Chains of the Red Throne
4464530.short_description: Play as a fallen evil emperor in a turn-based JRPG with strategic combat where your decisions can unleash devastating combos, coordinated actions, enemy disruption — or your doom. Customize your party, uncover hidden areas and embrace demonic transformations to obliterate your enemies.

4464540.title: NEON DRIFT ULTRA
4464540.short_description: NEON DRIFT ULTRA is an adrenaline racing arcade game in which the soul of the classic Soviet car industry meets the dazzling aesthetics of webpunk

4464550.title: HOP-CO-OP
4464550.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4464550.short_description: HOP-CO-OP is a first-person bunny hop parkour game. Utilize movement to complete challenging maps, play with friends in online co-op, battle with powerups, customize your character, and build your own maps with the level editor.

4464610.title: Perestroika Drive
4464610.short_description: Pick up hitchhikers. Hustle for fuel. Decide who stays or goes on a road trip across a collapsing post-Soviet world. Every passenger has a story. Every stop has a price.

4464620.title: Almost Out
4464620.short_description: Almost Out is a first person horror escape game. Captured by psychopaths victims must try to escape while covering there tracks, leave anything out of place and you probably know whats going to happen.

4464630.title: FEED
4464630.short_description: "FEED" is a bite-sized retro point-and-click puzzle game. It features multiple puzzles and a touch of cult horror.

4464760.title: Formula 2026: Rise of Legends
4464760.short_description: Formula 2026: Rise of Legends is a high-speed open-wheel racing experience where precision, control, and pure skill decide who becomes a champion. Master technical circuits, battle wheel-to-wheel, and rise through the ranks.

4464780.title: When the Stars Threw Down Their Spears
4464780.short_description: When the Stars Threw Down Their Spears is a story-driven, retro space shooter inspired by DOS-era space games like Star Control, Solar Winds, and Lightspeed. Blast your way through fast-paced arcade combat; build out modular, upgradable ships; and explore a galaxy torn by war.

4464810.title: The Time‑Stealing Cat
4464810.short_description: Side with the Demon Lord and sabotage the hero’s adventure. In The Time-Stealing Cat, you play as the Demon Lord’s pet cat and secretly interfere with the hero’s journey. Block paths, set traps, and create obstacles to slow the hero down and steal time before the final battle.

4464860.title: Sunny Hollow
4464860.short_description: Move to a magical city to live with your grandmother and make it your home. Explore vibrant districts, build relationships with 100+ villagers who remember how you treat them, help with errands and jobs, fish at the waterways, customize your home, and discover the stories throughout Sunny Hollow.

4464900.title: My Perfect Nails
4464900.short_description: My Perfect Nails is a retro dress up game inspired by the 2000's girl games, where you can create your perfect set of nails! Choose between many adorable 3D decors and charms to create the nails of your dreams! ✨🌸

4464910.title: CoraCreaCrafts Games
4464910.short_description: Play 5 crafty games: Alchemy, Jigsaw, Memory, Appraisal & Fortune. Unlock achievements and climb the leaderboards.

4464920.title: Desire Lines
4464920.short_description: Desire Lines is a single-player driving roguelite set in a foggy, liminal city. As a taxi driver, pick up passengers and follow the rules to earn your nightly quota. Don't get fired.

4464970.title: Astral Bloom
4464970.short_description: Grow a living alien world in this incremental base-builder. Cultivate strange plants, command loyal wisps, and reshape the sky with powerful wishes. Automate and expand your ecosystem as you uncover lost memories. As your sanctuary grows, will you stay... or leave in search of something more?

4465030.title: Sleep Demon
4465030.short_description: Ever wondered what it is like to experience Sleep Paralysis? A Single player Phycological Horror Walking Simulator exploring the horrors of Sleep Paralysis, Lucid dreaming and Liminal Spaces, all based on my own personal experiences.

4465120.title: Dice Ark
4465120.short_description: Roll the dice and dominate the board! A deep roguelike for solo play that transforms into a chaotic PvP board game with friends. It’s "Competitive first, Cooperative at the end"—with plenty of room for betrayal, of course! Outsmart your rivals with a mix of luck and strategy!

4465290.title: Desolation Arcanist
4465290.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Strategy, Early Access
4465290.short_description: Craft your own magic in this Action Roguelite. "Program" your wands with varied Spell Cores (Fireballs, Flying Swords... or Watermelons?) and Runes. Raise your companion Dragon, command a Puppet army, and abuse physics to knock enemies off cliffs. Your build is your destiny.

4465300.title: Team Rocket Project
4465300.short_description: Team Rocket Project is a coop game with 1-4 players set in a retro futuristic world where you guide a rocket! Wield one or more of the 4 thrusters of the rocket and propel it to your destination! Adventure in unique levels, avoid traps and get the highest score!

4465360.title: KINGLING: An Adventure Through Realms
4465360.short_description: Kingling is a fast-paced 2.5D cartoon action platformer inspired by classic animation. Battle through wildly themed stages where every level builds toward a larger-than-life boss encounter. Master tight, skill-based combat and prove yourself in a world that looks charming — but fights back hard.

4465400.title: Iron Resolution
4465400.short_description: Command a mercenary company in a brutal tactical RPG where death is permanent, morale breaks, and injuries leave a lasting scar. Master multiple distinct classes and varying terrain across 10 campaign levels or duel with friends in PvP. The Ironlands need a leader. Will you answer the call?

4465410.title: MMA Career Simulator
4465410.short_description: Create your MMA fighter, develop their skills, build winning game plans, and promote yourself to a global MMA superstar. Every fight is simulated based on your preparation and in-fight decisions, where smart choices can mean the difference between victory and defeat.

4465440.title: Mulligan Keep
4465440.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4465440.short_description: Mulligan Keep is a cooperative deck building dungeon crawler where you play as one of four adventurers delving into a mages castle with up to three of your closest friends. Play cards to help you dodge monsters, escape traps and find your way closer to the hidden artifact.

4465450.title: My Ransomware Can't Be This Cute?!
4465450.short_description: A push-your-luck deckbuilder hosted by a sentient, mocking malware girl. Outwit the odds or trust your luck — unleash game-breaking synergies, and gamble every file in a retro-PC interface. Will you cash out, or will she crash your system?

4466790.title: Puerto Rico Racing: La Fiebre
4466790.short_description: An open-world racing game inspired by Puerto Rican car culture. Customize your ride, explore island-inspired locations, and compete in realistic drag races and street events with functional timing systems and online multiplayer.

4466810.title: StarRush
4466810.short_description: Survive relentless waves in a neon-soaked space arena. Fast runs, sharp movement, and pure arcade intensity.

4466850.title: Where is My Pet?
4466850.short_description: Where is My Pet? is a hidden object, sorting, and animal game! You run a shelter: place animals, sell them to loving homes, upgrade your shelter, build your dream house, and search the city for pets. Can you turn a shabby shelter into a profitable business?

4466930.title: Are We Sinking Yet?
4466930.short_description: Are We Sinking Yet? is a chaotic co-op rafting game for 2-4 players where teamwork is the only way to survive. Paddle together to steer your raft, dodge dangerous river obstacles, solve environmental puzzles, and try not to throw your friends overboard.

4466940.title: Lost & Found
4466940.short_description: Lost & Found is an adventure-mystery game where you return townsfolk’s lost belongings & uncover personal stories behind each item. It features a hybrid animation style that blends 2D, 3D, pixel art, & more. Gather clues, investigate locals, & ensure every lost belonging ends up in the right hands.

4467310.title: Rooklike Gambit
4467310.short_description: Command your chess army in real-time and defeat the enemy Kings in mission after mission. Unlock powers and abilities, collect resources, craft items, bolster your army and defend your King at all cost!

4467320.title: Edena: Echoes of Magic
4467320.short_description: Edena: Echoes of Magic is a fantasy third-person shooter with roguelite elements. Level up, gain upgrades, enhance your abilities, and face evil mechanical lifeforms alongside your cute robotic companions.

4467380.title: Holy Crap! I'm Out of Paper! : The In-Law Survival Guide
4467380.short_description: Trapped in a restaurant bathroom with no toilet paper. 25 ways to ruin your life.

4467530.title: Renegade Cat Marbles
4467530.short_description: Renegade Cat Marbles is a stage-based incremental marble game: start with a few Cat Marbles, earn coins, unlock upgrades, buy more marbles to fill the screen, and use physics gadgets to clear stage after stage. Can you lead the Cat Marbles to a clean escape?

4467600.title: Z Drive
4467600.short_description: Drive, explore, search for resources, and craft! And drive! Do it for as long as you can! This FPS takes place in a rough world after a zombie attack. Prepare your wheeled fortress for every possible adventure! Explore the dead world and search for the remnants of civilization.

4468110.title: Match-3 Live Stream
4468110.short_description: Match-3 Live Stream is a roguelike game where you play as a streamer. Dance on stream, earn likes, follows, donations and other rewards by matching tiles, and collect new viewers and other pieces to build your deck. Each piece has a unique function.

4468150.title: Hot Girls Gym - Nudist Gym Manager
4468150.short_description: Build and manage your own nudist gym! Place fitness equipment and decorations in perfect balance, keep your female nude visitors satisfied, and increase your daily income. Plan your expenses wisely and let your studio grow step by step.

4468190.title: Eon Empires
4468190.short_description: Create and lead your civilization from the Stone Age to a futuristic era. Shape history on customizable maps through war, diplomacy, culture, trade, science, and religion.

4469100.title: Cosmo Crush
4469100.short_description: A fast-paced 2.5D & 3D arcade space shooter where you dodge, blast enemies, and conquer intense planetary battlefields.

4469160.title: When All Things End - 月下の万象
4469160.short_description: Play as a bunny on Kagome-jima, a hand-drawn island where nothing is what it seems and your choices quietly profile who you are. Farm, forage, explore coastal shrines and fishing villages, and uncover a mystery that turns stranger the deeper you go. Based on real bunnies.

4469320.title: Prison Freak
4469320.short_description: A brutally precise single-screen platformer built around instant restarts and shattered pride. Dodge deadly traps, nail impossible jumps, and hit restart more times than you’d like to admit. No excuses. Just skill.

4469340.title: Gambling Simulator - Win it All or Lose it All
4469340.short_description: Put everything on the line! your money, your house, your dignity. A chaotic, full of dark humor, disastrous gambling sim, where the real jackpot is knowing when to stop.

4470900.title: Up'N'Up: Mountain Express
4470900.short_description: Up’N’Up is a co-op, off-road driving game, where players are tasked with navigating evolving trails to make deliveries throughout a dangerous mountain range. Will you plan your route carefully to keep your vehicle in good shape or just send it to make your deliveries as fast as possible?

4471030.title: An Odd Walk: Shinjuku Alley
4471030.short_description: The hidden street loops endlessly like a dream, but you know you are awake. Keep moving forward. Open the exit by correctly reporting anomalies each loop.

4471060.title: Colleccct
4471060.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4471060.short_description: There is no you. There is no me. There is only collect. Colleccct is a 1-hour incremental odyssey of rhythmic destruction. Shatter abstract shapes into glowing orbs to feed a real-time upgrade stack. Evolution never pauses. Relax and let the orbs flow!

4471080.title: 奉先勇者:我爹是魔王?
4471080.short_description: In this world of swords and magic, a new chapter in the tale of the Demon King and the Hero is about to unfold...

4471110.title: Bangrupt Snowman
4471110.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4471110.short_description: Bangrupt Snowman is a medical simulation game with simple 3D visuals, inspired by the surgery mechanics from Growtopia. Your goal is to figure out how to cure patients while earning money to pay off your debt and make as much as you can.

4473930.title: LIRO: Divine Corruption
4473930.short_description: Liro: Divine Corruption is an action RPG inspired by Southeast Asian (SEA) mythology where Bloodveil War causes Lhoka in total chaos. Explore the corrupted world featuring Souls-like combat, sacred beasts to help exploration and fight enemies, as well as a freely customizable skill system.

4473940.title: UpUpApple
4473940.short_description: A stage-clear 3D action game! Control an apple, overcome traps, and defeat the final boss. Roll, bounce, and dash through linear courses. Too hard? Use Leaf coins to spin the Gacha for helpful items! Use their power to crush the boss and claim victory!

4474010.title: Zi´s Mansion
4474010.short_description: Explore an abandoned mansion, solve dark puzzles, and escape creatures guarding a forgotten secret.

4474020.title: Supaplex in Solaris
4474020.short_description: We immersed the legendary puzzle-platformer SUPAPLEX into the Thinking Ocean of Solaris and added brand-new gameplay with a Time Machine

4474040.title: Blox Pressure Wash
4474040.short_description: A relaxing first-person cleaning simulation where you use a pressure hose to wash dirt from houses, vehicles, and structures. Switch between different spray modes, move around the environment, and fully clean every object to progress through increasingly challenging levels.

4474130.title: Westins World
4474130.short_description: Westins World is a Turn-Based Combat, Action RPG driven by a linear Sci-fi and Fantasy storyline. Help Westin defend his home world against distant allies and close enemies after a Supernova destroys neighboring Planets throughout the galaxy.

4474140.title: Geometry Missile
4474140.short_description: Navigate through sharp edges to reach the end and score as high as you can.

4474330.title: Rotted - A Brain Rot Simulator
4474330.short_description: The world expects you to be a functional adult. Don't let it win. Swat multiplying roaches, handle aggressive rent texts, and choose upgrades like 'Rent Immunity' in this dark-comedy survival roguelite. Ignore Mom, stack your Brain Rot, and climb the live global leaderboard.

4474400.title: SWORD FLINGER
4474400.short_description: Throw swords to fight in this roguelite chain-action game. Weapons bounce off walls and enemies, chaining hits from one foe to another. Build damage bonuses with every chain and dive deeper into ever-changing dungeons while collecting swords, spears, axes, staves, shields, and more.

4474430.title: EchoLink: Recursion
4474430.short_description: Hack through time. From 1990s dial-up to 2150s megacities, infiltrate networks, build proxy chains, and outrun the alarm. Every death sends you back stronger. A cyberpunk roguelite where your brain is the only weapon that matters.

4474490.title: The Node
4474490.short_description: A short sci-fi point-and-click adventure about forbidden time travel. Explore a facility outside normal time, solve clever puzzles, and uncover the purpose of The Node. Featuring subtle (and not that subtle) references to classic time-travel movies and TV shows.

4474560.title: Etherland Saga
4474560.short_description: Etherland Saga is a 2D action RPG with Metroidvania charm in a fantasy pixel art world. Switch between 3 unique heroes on the fly, upgrade their skills, unite divided clans, tame the power of crystals, and uncover the truth behind a cataclysm the world has spent two thousand years trying to forget.

4474610.title: Hentai Horny Skirt
4474610.short_description: Hentai Horny Skirt - How beautifully they sway in the wind... A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4474870.title: Puss in Box
4474870.short_description: Puss In Box is a cozy cat search simulator with puzzle and pet care elements.

4475180.title: Shadow: A Parable of Sappho
4475180.short_description: Shadow: A Parable of Sappho is a narrative-driven gothic adventure set in Ancient Greece. Play as the famous poet Sappho of Lesbos: help the Seven Sages, comfort the population, speak with the Gods and fight the mysterious shadows that bring the deadly plague. Your most powerful tool? Poetry!

4475320.title: 你离开之后
4475320.short_description: 《你离开之后》是一款文字互动类乙女向游戏，再次醒来时你发现自已似乎已经是一缕魂魄了，你的爱人在你离开后变得敏感脆弱，而你的行为将会或直接或间接的影响到他，最终走向不同的结局。 一款美味的鳏夫文学，你的冷漠与无视会让向来冷静矜持的爱人在你面前发疯变得歇斯底里，你的捉弄会让他在梦里情难自已，你的一举一动都会让他改变，你离开之后，他活成了你的样子，或是你想要的样子。

4475520.title: SKINFACE
4475520.short_description: SKINFACE is a short-and-punchy stealth game where you embody a faceless hitman who needs to steal the faces of others to gain the trust of their target. Set in dark soviet-era apartment complexes, evade the police and get your victim to open up the door for you. Knock, knock!

4475530.title: Halls of Taurthos
4475530.short_description: The Halls of Taurthos is a hand-crafted, top-down fantasy RPG set within the fractured province of Wyrelande.  In this epic open-world adventure you will learn to survive, grow stronger, craft, trade and fight! How you do so is in YOUR hands. Can you do this alone, or will you need an army?

4475930.title: Distributrains
4475930.short_description: A railroad simulation game with roguelike elements. Use resources wisely to expand your infrastructure and satisfy industries, contracts, citizens, and engines. Respond quickly to ever-changing circumstances and don't get kicked out of your office.

4475960.title: Hold & Advance
4475960.short_description: 2D action sandbox about exploring an underground world, crafting and tactically defending alien stations. Build turrets, combine modules and repel enemy waves to unlock powerful upgrades that radically change your playstyle.

4475990.title: Magic Isle
4475990.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Early Access
4475990.short_description: In a fantastical wizard town where sorcerers soar on wands, manage your own magic shop in co-op for up to 4 players! Brew potions together, craft flight wands, and grow your shop. Chase thieves, balance the power of secret societies, and build the most magnificent shop of all.

4476150.title: Island Fever
4476150.short_description: Stranded, forgotten and isolated. That's the fate of our protagonist in Island Fever who tries to survive in the harsh conditions of this resource-scarce place. Monsters, weather, hunger and much more are out to get you. Build, adapt, survive — or become another lost soul swallowed by the island.

4479940.title: I Want To Go Down
4479940.short_description: Bring the boy on the clouds down. One mistake, and you may have to climb back up as far as you’ve come.

4480070.title: DESCENT -100
4480070.short_description: A dark auto-battle roguelike where every layer forces a choice between power, sacrifice, and survival. Descend through 100 corrupted stages, face a boss every ten floors, and shape a build that can withstand the abyss waiting below.

4480080.title: Haunted House Manager
4480080.short_description: Take control of your own haunted house dark ride! In this management sim, step into the operator's booth to run the entire attraction. Balance wait times, safety, and immersion, upgrade your ride, and stay in business until the grand Halloween finale.

4480360.title: Boss Pit
4480360.short_description: Boss Pit is Punch-Out! with swords and shields instead of boxing gloves. Every fight is a boss fight against a fantasy monster. There is no world to travel, levels to traverse, or trash monsters to grind. Just encounter after encounter of deadly bosses in a Colosseum of death and destruction.

4480370.title: Let's Cook It!
4480370.short_description: Let's Cook It! is a co-op cooking game where up to four players can build and manage a restaurant together. Work together as a team to cook tasty dishes and serve all your customers! Decorate your restaurant, unlock powerful upgrades, and expand!

4480540.title: Terminal Lucidity Era
4480540.short_description: This is a single-player 3D racing game set in Europe just before the apocalypse. Acquire a variety of courses and vehicles and enjoy the devastating world.

4480550.title: Operation Moon Walker
4480550.short_description: This is a single-player 3D shooting action game set in a world of prosperity and chaos, starring Isaac, the commander of the United Nations special agency "Theseus."

4480640.title: Deep Anomaly
4480640.short_description: Enter the murky depths of the Zenith Corporation facility as a ZBO unit technician. In this merciless 4-player extraction horror, you will face living anomalies and a paranoia system that will make you distrust your own senses. Will you uncover the secrets of the complex before it's too late?

4480750.title: Tactics Weaver
4480750.short_description: A unified turn-based and real-time battle system in a world with unstable gravity. Weave between combat types by exploiting weaknesses in gravity. Attacking measures nearby gravity.

4480860.title: Definitive Goal
4480860.short_description: This is an arcade / fighting game with soccer/rugby dynamics. The aim of the game is to score in the opponent's goal within the time limit, and the main concept is team play: to gain time you have to pass the ball as much as possible to your teammates! You win together, you lose together!

4481340.title: OverSpend　-secret desire-
4481340.short_description: “Wishes Weave the Eternal Color of Chiyo” A Japanese-style action RPG with “mobile game–inspired” elements, featuring shikigami party building, character growth, and random events.

4481370.title: Winmon: Prologue
4481370.short_description: Feed your cute little monsters right on your desktop! And once full, it's time to work! From sowing seeds, watering plants, providing light to mining ores and chopping trees. Resources don't come on their own and food isn't bought with air. Everyone will need to work.

4481440.title: 命运之轮（序章）/Journey of Destiny(dependent origination)
4481440.short_description: A Chinese ancient-style visual novel made with Ren'Py. Two factions fight for a mysterious relic. Your choices unlock multiple endings. The story includes suspense, time travel and soul fusion. Simple mouse and keyboard controls. Enjoy an immersive storytelling experience.

4481530.title: BEACONFALL
4481530.short_description: A fast-paced tower defense strategy with settlement management. Build, assign villagers, empower the lighthouse, and keep the light alive until the final wave.

4481900.title: UNDEFINED: ILS
4481900.short_description: UNDEFINED: ILS is a single-player puzzle adventure with a local AI-driven evaluation system. Solve 100 fixed image-based problems by drawing lines on the screen, then read the system’s “PROBLEM WAS SOLVED / NOT SOLVED” verdict and reasoning. Your patterns shape one of 4 planned endings.

4482020.title: Epizo
4482020.short_description: Epizo is a top‑down survival shooter where you fight endless waves, collect gold, unlock doors, and build powerful ability‑based loadouts in a medieval dungeon.

4482090.title: A-01's Voyage.Logs
4482090.short_description: Humanity has perished. You are an AI incapable of self-termination, sailing into the void. Trapped in terminal wakefulness, chew on your own endless, redundant processing power and face the ultimate decay of the universe alone.

4482480.title: Chess Kingdom
4482480.genre: Casual, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4482480.short_description: The complete chess experience. From first move to grandmaster. Learn through structured training, compete in tournaments, and challenge players worldwide. One game, every level.

4482730.title: Dama e Dungeons: 2D
4482730.short_description: Manage a team of heroes on an epic journey, make tough choices and face the consequences, show all your knowledge and creativity to create incredible strategies and item combinations to achieve victory.

4482940.title: Tandemonium
4482940.short_description: Two riders. One bike. Total chaos. Tandemonium is a physics-based tandem racing game where two players share a crank with pedals 180° apart. Sync strokes for speed or clash into wobbling chaos. Play solo or ride online together with built-in voice and video chat.

4483060.title: 8ave.-Octave-
4483060.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Free To Play
4483060.short_description: 『8ave.-Octave-』 is an 8-keyboard music game featuring a piano motif. To focus solely on playing the keys, no special operations like flicks or slides are required. The sheet music consists only of notes and long notes, allowing you to easily enjoy the feel of playing piano on a keyboard.

4483170.title: Draw & Trash
4483170.short_description: A strategic card game where you place number cards on the field and clash against a CPU opponent each turn. Outscore them to send their cards to the trash, and use Aces, face cards, and Jokers for tactical advantages. Exhaust the CPU's deck before your own runs out to win.

4483220.title: Rogue Trails: 4x4 Offroad Racing
4483220.short_description: Drive powerful 4x4 offroad vehicles across mountains, deserts, beaches, snowfields, and stadium tracks in Rogue Trails: 4x4 Offroad Racing. Conquer extreme terrain, master challenging trails, and push your driving skills to the limit in this intense single-player offroad racing experience.

4483290.title: Finding Her: The Secret of the Rented Apartment

4483420.title: Luna Has Gone
4483420.short_description: Luna Has Gone is an RPG inspired by PS1-era pre-rendered backgrounds, delivering a unique visual style for an RPG Maker game. The gameplay features turn-based battles with limited resources. You play as Misha, the daughter of a world-class corporation, whose goal is to find her missing friend, Luna.

4483500.title: Gun Predict
4483500.short_description: Gun Predict is a top-down strategy shooter where you must carefully choose the type of bullets to use in order to complete the levels. Create a strategy to eliminate all enemies and overcome obstacles using special projectiles.

4483510.title: Nukes vs. Swords
4483510.short_description: Build an army to fight absurdly large numbers of barbarians in this strategy roguelike, with an incremental twist.

4483570.title: PegPegBall
4483570.short_description: PegPegBall is a casual strategy game that blends pachinko-style ball dropping with roguelike mechanics. Buy plenty of balls and unleash rapid-fire shots without interruptions. Bounce through quirky pegs, stack multipliers, trigger wild effects, and create satisfying chain reactions to score big!

4483600.title: Non-League Football Manager
4483600.short_description: Manage one of over 1,000 real non-league clubs through the English football pyramid. Day jobs, ground grading, gate receipts, cup runs, and a world where clubs can fold around you. Football management at its most real.

4483650.title: The Clownhouse
4483650.short_description: The Clownhouse is a survival horror roguelite where you break into a procedurally generated mansion, loot valuables, and decide whether to escape safely or risk going deeper for a bigger haul.

4483680.title: The Lonely Miner
4483680.short_description: A 2d pixel art incremental clicker/idle Mining game. You are dropped onto an Island, with a pickaxe and a dream. Collect rocks, sell rocks, hire workers and get rich!

4483710.title: Coilbound
4483710.short_description: A challenging but lighthearted Mystery Dungeon-inspired game set in a dark fantasy dystopia. Venture down into the Coil to find adventure, despair, and perhaps salvation.

4483750.title: Miguel
4483750.short_description: Help Miguel defend the forest from a mysterious invasion! Use magical mushroom cards to fight back, each with unique art and effects. Build your deck, discover powerful combos, and unlock new cards every run. Fail, get stronger, and try again. Let your mushrooms spread!

4483840.title: Scout-TheBunker
4483840.short_description: Scout The Bunker Is a Horror Shooter Game That Takes Place In Russia in an Abandoned Soviet-Era Bunker.

4483860.title: Footsteps in the Dark
4483860.short_description: Footsteps in the Dark is an asymmetric first-person horror (1v1-4v1). Find clues, gather tools, and finish the right ritual to kill the monster - before it kills you.

4483900.title: The Tower Must Fall
4483900.short_description: Build an impossible tower. Defend it against endless sieges. Watch it crumble — and rebuild stronger.

4483960.title: Urbex
4483960.short_description: URBEX is a horror extraction game with CO-OP up to 4 players with a twist - THE MADNESS MECHANIC, making each of the players see and hear things which are not there. Extract toys and submarine parts by utilizing stealth, teamwork, proximity voice chat and various items with unique capabilities.

4483980.title: SuperBlockKing
4483980.short_description: Shoot and dive! A fast-paced 2D action game where you launch blocks, dash to them, impale enemies on your crown, and conquer castles with stylish combos.

4484000.title: A Lucky Hunt With : Nerida
4484000.short_description: Embark on a sensual ladybug-hunting adventure with Nerida, an attractive young woman. In this hidden object game, explore each location to discover what lies beneath Nerida's enticing layers.

4484100.title: とららの麻雀教室
4484100.short_description: 【Japanese Version Only!】An experiential learning game to learn Mahjong from scratch! Perfect for those who know nothing about mahjong! Learn Mahjong rules step by step with Torara!

4484190.title: 高祖の世界
4484190.short_description: 高祖の世界是一款角色养成的队伍战斗RPG游戏，拥有自动战斗、拖拽装备、随机词条、快速回收道具等现代化操作功能，并提供许多详细的信息面板降低你瞎猜的空间。你会组建一支由最多4人的小队，通过传送门向越来越强的敌人发起战斗，在这个过程收集新的队员和新装备，你将在这个过程中探索这个越来越伟大的世界。

4484200.title: Exponent: The Scaling Tower Defense
4484200.short_description: A roguelite incremental tower defense where expansion is survival. Execute Command Cards from your expanding deck, build towers, and create land tile by tile to defend the last Node in your dimensional bubble. Grow strong enough to find your kin in the void… and merge into higher dimensions.

4484250.title: Sandman
4484250.short_description: Sandman is a 2D puzzle platformer where death creates sand that permanently changes the level. The sand falls and piles up to form new terrain, allowing players to cover traps, fill gaps, and use previous failures to build paths through 30 handcrafted stages.

4484260.title: Trash City Turbo
4484260.short_description: Fire up your Turbo-charged Street Sweeper and carve perfect lines, at breakneck speeds, through the filth-ridden lower sectors of Neotropolis.

4484320.title: Brainrotting
4484320.short_description: Brainrotting is an incremental game about doomscrolling or solving minigames, getting upgrades and eventually automating your dopamine generation.

4484350.title: Hatarake! - Working Hard! Even though I getting isekai'd!
4484350.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation
4484350.short_description: Working Hard! Even though I getting isekai'd! is a simulation game similar to the old Harvest Moon/Rune Factory series. Set in Grion, a small village somewhere in Xelia. A fantasy world where magic and monsters are exist.

4484500.title: Viking Nudgers
4484500.short_description: In Viking Nudgers, your cards don’t deal damage. they push, pull, collide, and topple everything around you. The battlefields are islands of hex tiles suspended above the rough sea, and one wrong move could send you, or your enemies rolling off the edge like a marble!

4484530.title: Tech Survivor
4484530.short_description: Tech Survivor is a fast-paced, survivor-style action game where you battle annoying coworkers, overbearing managers, and soul-sucking executives. Level up absurd tech-themed abilities, manage morale instead of health, and survive the workday without burning out.

4484540.title: Neurobreach
4484540.short_description: NEUROBREACH is a Top-Down Infiltration-Action game. You respond to a distress call in a Big Tech’s HQ, only to find the facility overrun by corrupted robots. Stay hidden, outmaneuver patrols, and fight through the chaos to escape.

4484570.title: A Detective Story
4484570.short_description: An 80s-style pixel art detective simulator where you interrogate suspects using natural language. Characters respond dynamically as you uncover clues and solve the crime.

4484740.title: Aghia
4484740.short_description: The Dark Voievode has unleashed his beasts to violate your homeland. Eradicate these creatures from the face of the Earth as you make your way across the country in this ’90s-inspired FPS.

4484760.title: Crownless
4484760.short_description: Carry your life as a fragile crown in Crownless! An epic action adventure built for exploration and punchy combat. Explore a vast hand-crafted 2D world, uncover forgotten realms, and dash, swim, and forge your way through the unknown.

4484770.title: Hoa 2
4484770.short_description: Hoa 2 will transport you to a beautiful world. Explore, interact with nature, solve puzzles and seek to bring life back to a special friend.

4484780.title: Hentai Blush
4484780.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Blush, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4484800.title: Hosting Simulator
4484800.short_description: Build and manage your own data center! Design modular servers, set up realistic networking, and power systems. Manage heat, install OS (Windows/Ubuntu), and fulfill contracts for profit. Technical depth and hardware precision await!

4484820.title: :RECODED
4484820.short_description: A roguelike deckbuilder set in a glitching network where you build and upgrade your deck, fight enemies that telegraph their moves, and push through endlessly scaling difficulty with no run limit

4484870.title: Dwalm
4484870.short_description: Work your way through the city by day and navigate strange dreamscapes by night, exploring your memories and recalling what was lost. Dwalm is an adventure platformer that takes you through both childish dreams and traumatic memories alike.

4484880.title: StarLand: The Story Of The Brightest Star
4484880.short_description: Welcome to StarLand! Play as Jimmy the Star, the happiest star of all, and save your people from the most evil star around, Timmy! Run, jump, dash, and glide through a fun, wacky landscape on a magical adventure. Enjoy vibrant, cartoony visuals as you platform onward on your quest to save everyone.

4485020.title: The Crimson Hunt
4485020.short_description: You play as Victoria, a vampire hunter haunted by her past, and Eleanor, a young woman trapped in a nightmare that has only just begun. Together, they must endure grotesque creatures, hidden traps, and a presence that seems to know them better than they realize.

4485030.title: Femboys in Parkour
4485030.short_description: Femboys in Parkour is a multiplayer third-person parkour game you can play with your friends. Navigate through fixed obstacle courses made of narrow platforms, precise jumps, and balance-based challenges. There are no moving traps — your skill and timing decide everything.

4485080.title: Flow - The Tidal Whispers
4485080.short_description: A challenging narrative platformer built for the NES, where kindness shapes the journey.

4485120.title: NorthHold
4485120.short_description: A cozy viking-flavored idle colony sim where you assign villagers, build smart production chains and stockpile like mad before winter hits. Survive, found a saga, and return stronger.

4485140.title: Raw Fists
4485140.short_description: There isn't anything better than punching things in 8-bit that will end up leaving you with RAW FISTS! *Warning, this game contains old school difficulty* (Blowing in the cartridge is not required.)

4485150.title: System Overload
4485150.short_description: System Overload is a hand-drawn acrobatic shooter about parrying enemy bullets and turning them into your own. Destroy an evil robot megacorp by vandalizing the streets with their blood, performing stylish parkour, and dancing through a bullet ballet - all fueled by your hatred for the system.

4485160.title: Wispip's Siege
4485160.short_description: Loot. Descend. Siege. The deeper you go, the deadlier it gets — and the better the drops. Capture a castle, hold it through 100 waves of invaders, and face a Final Boss that only a Mythic weapon can kill.

4485190.title: Dino Tales
4485190.short_description: The game has seven baby dinosaur characters, and each tale features one or more dinosaurs as they travel through their adventures on Dino Tales Island.

4485200.title: Flattop Fury
4485200.short_description: Flattop Fury is an arcade style flight-sim loosely based on the WW2 pacific theater. Take off from your aircraft carrier and use your machine gun, bombs & rockets to clear enemy islands and progress to the next level.

4485340.title: Lock & Stone
4485340.short_description: Survive the winding halls of the lost dwarven city of Direhold in this survival horror Metroidbrainia adventure. Use Rune Slates to decipher puzzles while avoiding the sinister creatures that now call the tunnels home.

4485450.title: Curse Of The Bayou
4485450.short_description: Fight through a cursed voodoo swamp in this fast-paced Roguelite Bullet Hell. Build powerful upgrades, survive relentless enemy hordes, and rescue your kidnapped dog from the Voodoo Master.

4485460.title: Watchtowers & Weaponry
4485460.short_description: Command your forces to victory in this intense tower defense experience! Strategically deploy your defenses to fortify your position and funnel the enemies through intricate mazes. Carefully allocate your resources and adapt your tactics to counter waves of relentless enemy drones!

4485520.title: Ratnik
4485520.short_description: A battle is won before it begins. Ratnik is a medieval auto battler focused on smart unit composition, positioning and counterplay. Defeat powerful Lords, unlock new forces and master the art of war.

4486660.title: Punch Your Friends
4486660.short_description: Fight with fruits, throw boomerangs, and blow everything up around you! Up to 4 players, one screen, and zero guarantees you’ll stay friends. Perfect for parties and family battles. 🍌

4486810.title: One Of Us
4486810.short_description: One Of Us is a modern real time strategy game featuring new first person style controls, with traditional control methods also available. Play the 4 different factions in 13 game modes, including base building, Battle Royale, Escape The Tide, first person shooter and zombie modes.

4486870.title: FEED THE AI
4486870.short_description: Feed the AI. Collect data. Unlock upgrades. Watch the algorithm grow beyond your control. An active incremental where you feed an evolving AI with data and shape what it becomes. Will it save the world… or take it over?

4486920.title: Sexy walk through the woods
4486920.short_description: An image reveal arcade game where you will meet sexy girls while walking through a forest. Complete the tests and unlock hot images and videos for your gallery.

4486980.title: Super Clown Puzzles
4486980.short_description: New Super clown platformer where super clown need solve puzzles, avoid traps and collect stars

4487070.title: Kritical McCoy
4487070.short_description: Grow a hip-hop empire by day, battle unseen Entities by night. As King Keith—and his alter ego Kritical McCoy—build UWirrld HQ, sign artists, upgrade skills, unlock transformations and weapons, and dominate an open world where saving your business may just save the Earth!

4487090.title: Mystic Grove
4487090.short_description: A surreal first-person action RPG set in a vast alien wilderness. Wield powerful magic, engage in brutal melee combat, and face dinosaurs and twisted creatures in a chaotic open world shaped by strange forces.

4487100.title: Gatekeeper Simulator: Inner Circle
4487100.short_description: Command the entrance to a powerful secret society. Screen visitors, uncover deception, and prevent dangerous threats from breaching the Inner Circle. One wrong decision could cost you everything.

4487120.title: World In Chaos
4487120.short_description: Trying to live up to his dad's immense legacy is scary, His dad was killed by a High King called Lothric, and you are sent out by the king to stop him. As you chase him down something nefarious is going on, he's destroying outposts and trying to gain the power of a long-dead eight-headed dragon.

4487170.title: Chess AI
4487170.short_description: A chess game featuring an adaptive AI opponent that scales to your skill level. Analyze your games move-by-move, track your improvement with detailed statistics, and unlock cosmetics for your avatar, board, and pieces as you progress. Original soundtrack by The Teps. No in-app purchases.

4487310.title: Tasty Beverage
4487310.short_description: Tasty Beverage is a hybrid of Roguelite Action and Incremental Idler where you build your own army of followers to overthrow a dystopian megacorporation that secretly runs the world! Build up your crew, money, influence, and resources to resist the ever-growing threats.

4487340.title: Shaderland
4487340.short_description: Shaderland :: a creative-programming puzzle game :: wire up nodes // create world of pixels // guide polygonal creatures // learn computer graphics

4487360.title: Spinova
4487360.short_description: A roguelike deckbuilder with slot-machine mechanics set in a world of Slavic mythology. Build and upgrade your symbols, summon Ancients, swear oaths and choose blessings to squeeze insane multipliers out of every spin and push further with each new run

4487430.title: Defender of the Orcish Marches
4487430.short_description: A roguelite tower defense where every run is different. Choose a commander, collect relics, activate mutators, and defend your fortress against escalating orcish hordes with ballista, walls, and four defender classes.

4487470.title: Defuse or u ded
4487470.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4487470.short_description: Fast-paced FPS game to play with friends, it has a lot of silly weapons, abbilities and maps

4487490.title: Dispel Dark
4487490.short_description: Dispel Dark, a game where your torch is your source of light... and your weapon. Defeat enemies, collect coins, buy upgrades, and try to survive increasingly hostile levels. How far will your light last?

4487540.title: Wood'N'Destroy
4487540.short_description: Wood’N’Destroy is a real-time strategy game where you build your base, gather resources, and command your army to destroy your enemies. Expand your economy, develop new technologies, and dominate the battlefield.

4487560.title: Scruffle
4487560.short_description: Scruffle Corp is hiring, and you are set to train up their new star! Enter a Roguelike cooperative battle where you and your friends hassle monsters on their own turf. Personalize your cuddly diva, round up your team, and start a real scruffle. Prove the spotlight deserves to be. On. You!

4487580.title: Layer8Problem
4487580.short_description: Willkommen in der IT-Hölle! Überlebe den Büro-Wahnsinn in diesem textbasierten SysAdmin-Simulator. Kämpfe gegen absurde Tickets, sammle Loot und senke deinen Puls mit Kaffee. Halte Chef-Radar und Aggro niedrig, um bis 16:30 Uhr deinen Job zu behalten – ohne den Monitor aus dem Fenster zu werfen.

4487590.title: Chicken Inc.
4487590.short_description: Start with a small poultry farm and grow your business over time by raising chickens, processing products, and selling them to market.

4487760.title: Blurry Shopping
4487760.short_description: Welcome to Blurry Shopping, a game about getting hopelessly lost between endless aisles, buzzing fluorescent lights, and products that all look exactly the same (because for you, they do). You’re a broke guy with absurdly bad eyesight. No glasses. No contacts. Not even a helpful optician nearby.

4487790.title: Fidus
4487790.short_description: Fidus is a roguelite T-RPG with a wide variety of classes and customization options. Choose the role of your main character and set out to face your enemies alone or by recruiting companions in constantly changing environments and battles.

4487810.title: Shroomanoid
4487810.short_description: Shroomanoid is a unique action roguelike based on arkanoid mechanic. You fight enemies instead of breaking blocks. On your path you will encounter events, the outcome of which depends not only on the choice you make, but also on your luck. With unique relics this will ensure no two runs are the same

4487850.title: Unattached: City of Shadows Prologue
4487850.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4487850.short_description: Freshly-graduated detective James Arnold is sent on a mission to investigate the death of the mayor of New Eastbrook, a little-known city where corruption is tradition. Investigate crime scenes, interrogate suspects, and fight criminals in a city where every choice pulls you deeper into the shadows.

4487960.title: Low Effort Romance
4487960.short_description: Low Effort Romance is an otome visual novel about two tired adults who accidentally fall for each other between quarterly reports. Can you juggle deadlines, nosy coworkers, group projects, and a romance that keeps almost happening on company property?

4488040.title: Scrap Diver
4488040.short_description: A minimalist 3d incremental clicker about cleaning a dam with a submarine. Dive Deep. Scrap Hard. Get Paid.

4488070.title: PiN The Guardian Spirit
4488070.short_description: Run, flip and smash corrupted spirits back into the light in this fast-flowing action platformer.

4488080.title: Infinigama
4488080.genre: Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4488080.short_description: Explore a universe of diverse worlds. Jump between adventures, trade, craft, and meet other players. Each world offers unique challenges, while a shared economy and evolving environments let your actions ripple across the entire connected universe.

4488120.title: Embale - Wooden Kart Race
4488120.short_description: Physics-based, first-person downhill racing. Drift a wooden cart through Quito’s steep, narrow streets, squeeze past rivals, and survive the run.

4488170.title: A Light
4488170.short_description: Explore a living world shaped by ancient guardians. Defeat them to gain relics, alter the land, and open new paths — but every victory reshapes the world around you. Choose your order, adapt to changing environments, and uncover the truth behind the prison inside the sun.

4488180.title: Dark Fantasy Tower Defense
4488180.short_description: A-MAZE-ING Tower Defense! Play online co-op with up to 4 friends, unlock and synergize powerful artifacts, and build and upgrade the deadliest maze in this roguelite twist on tower defense.

4488190.title: Vested
4488190.short_description: Found a tech startup in 1990 and see if you can survive the dot-com bubble. Navigate 48 quarters of hype, hubris, and hostile board meetings across 19 possible endings. It's Oregon Trail meets Silicon Valley.

4488250.title: The Watching Woods: The Friend
4488250.short_description: Trying to fit in at her new school, Sonechka befriends a group of girls who call themselves the village witches. Completing their dares, she soon finds the tasks becoming increasingly strange, eerie, and cruel. How far will she go to be accepted?

4488380.title: Cat Adventure
4488380.short_description: Cat Adventure is a fast-paced 2D endless rooftop platformer where you chain precise jumps, use power-ups, chase high scores, and unlock cosmetic cat and platform skins.

4488410.title: Stika
4488410.short_description: Stika is a single-player stealth horror game steeped in Ukrainian folklore. Navigate the Ukrainian forest, find clues, and solve puzzles to unravel the mysteries of night, all while evading folklore creatures. With multiple-endings, your choices matter — can you survive a night with the Rusalka?

4488490.title: MY VAMPIRE WIFE
4488490.short_description: My Vampire Wife is a gothic visual novel where you must save your wife from the Inquisition. Passion, sex, and mortal danger await you!

4488520.title: Yelling At Cats: The Game
4488520.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4488520.short_description: A short and silly horror game where you play as a cat with an owner experiencing Coprolalia and must find out what has made them so angry by staring at them long enough without being caught.

4488590.title: Turbo Hatchback Time Attack
4488590.short_description: Step into a turbo powered hatchback and jump, drift, flip and boost your way to the finish line without any regard for the laws of the road... or the laws of physics. It’s time for a Turbo Hatchback Time Attack!

4488680.title: KARA
4488680.short_description: "KARA" is a visual novel following an ordinary high schooler whose life slowly spirals into a nightmare. Sleep deprivation, a tragic chain of events, and dark secrets will force you to question reality itself.

4488690.title: Phase Line Red
4488690.short_description: Take command in Phase Line Red, a WEGO turn-based tactical wargame. Plan company-level operations, issue orders to your platoons, and watch the chaos of WW2 combat unfold in thrilling, simultaneous cinematic replays. Master the fog of war and push the frontline forward.

4488740.title: Hive Thrive
4488740.short_description: A cozy, incremental swarm builder where you collect honey from flowers, build honeycomb, and hatch more bees. Will your swarm survive the winter? Will your Queen be ready to ascend?

4488780.title: Heave-Ho: Uphill
4488780.short_description: A punishing physics-based co-op game where you and your friends must push a vehicle to the top of the world. Coordinate your moves and overcome brutal obstacles. With no checkpoints, one wrong push means starting over. Are you ready to reach the peak or lose your friends trying?

4488790.title: VOID ANOMALY
4488790.short_description: VOID ANOMALY is a mission-based space horror with paranormal twists for 1–4 players. Explore tense, mysterious environments, face unpredictable dangers, and survive chaotic, intense moments solo or with friends.

4488820.title: Dam Rush XD
4488820.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4488820.short_description: A fast-paced 2D action platformer where you play as a determined beaver fighting off enemies, dodging hazards, and surviving the wild. Grab you wood to complete your dam and get to the next level!

4488860.title: The Red Pearls Of Borneo
4488860.short_description: A detective noir puzzle deduction game. Explore a non-linear timeline as a clairvoyant investigator in 1941 Borneo. Jump between time and locations to uncover motives and discover what truly happened in the Goodwill tobacco plantation that fateful night on the eve of the WW2 Japanese invasion.

4488970.title: Fossil Bound
4488970.short_description: Discover prehistoric fossils, carefully excavate dinosaur skeletons, and build your own museum in this relaxing pixel-art paleontology game focused on exploration, discovery, and scientific curiosity.

4488990.title: Carmilla : Crimson Moon
4488990.short_description: A dark yuri horror romance set in a crumbling Gothic castle. When the enigmatic Carmilla arrives, Laura is swept into a fever dream of obsession. Is this stranger the cure for her loneliness or a herald of corruption? And what caused the mysterious deaths of two girls in the nearby village?

4489000.title: Cat Hits the Deck
4489000.short_description: Deckbuilder roguelike about a cat that fears being hurt but has only cards that hurt her before enemies! Min-max your resources, get OverPowered cards in your paw, and build an unlosable Deck that prolly gonna kill you 9 times^^

4489030.title: Felicity
4489030.short_description: Felicity is a deckbuilder and resource management game with roguelike elements where you achieve your aspirations. Build your deck, upgrade your cards and roll dice to manage your resources. Random events and personality cards make each life different.

4489250.title: DREADROOM
4489250.short_description: It was supposed to be just a funny escape room experience... until you realize the incredible truth.
