In this tense horror puzzle-adventure, solve complex mechanisms, navigate deadly corridors and evade terrifying entities lurking in the dark, while trying to find the true exit.

4489290.title: Shadowed Train
4489290.short_description: You are a detective, you are taking a luxury train ride though the Colorado mountains with 10 other passengers. One of you're fellow passengers is brutally murdered, now you rely on you're 44 magnum revolver and you're deductive skills to find the murder.

4489340.title: Twenty One
4489340.short_description: You wake up in a velvet-draped casino that seems suspended in a void, run by faceless dealers and watched by an unseen Host. You're told you owe a "debt of existence" and must earn your right to live another day by beating the Quota. You have 5 rounds to meet the quota, or… you're out. Permanently.

4489360.title: Wujiangyuan Gallery in GuiZhou
4489360.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game, where the position of each game image is random and can be repeated.At first, it may be very chaotic,Then gradually place the image in the corresponding position,The image gradually becomes complete,Come and give it a try!

4489400.title: CARGO:HUMAN
4489400.short_description: A dark delivery adventure through the slums as a state-licensed carrier. Load. Haul. Sell. ——Decide whether to look inside the unknown cargo.

4489410.title: DashForm
4489410.short_description: Escape Heaven in this satisfying movement based bullet hell.

4489420.title: Caesura
4489420.short_description: Explore caves, forest, and clouds to discover new secrets in the mysterious world of Caesura. A rhythm driven, hand drawn world. Match your jumps and dashes to the beat to solve challenging puzzles that ask you to dance along with the world as it also dances to the beat.

4489520.title: The Lost Shepherd
4489520.short_description: The Lost Shepherd is a cozy, narrative adventure game about escapism in the face of major world conflict. Journey through a shepherd’s dreams to gather sheep, discover lost artifacts, and find forgotten friends.

4489560.title: The Isle of Lost Bees
4489560.short_description: Welcome to the Isle of Lost Bees, a cozy idle game where you and your collection of Australian bees harvest pollen, research flowers, and uncover the island’s secrets. You're a bee-obsessed researcher on an island devoid of humans. You never seemed to need human contact anyway.

4489580.title: Scales of Silence
4489580.short_description: An ancient war between serpents. A living darkness feeding on the conflict. Slither through a 500-level campaign where no two snakes play alike. Then bring the chaos home as an 8-player couch party that'll test your friendships. The classic snake game has a story to tell.

4489660.title: Silicon Path
4489660.short_description: Play as a silicon atom guided by a mysterious navigator, silently infiltrating a massive carbon-based lifeform. From lungs to brain, embark on a hardcore microscopic stealth journey. Evade the deadly immune system and collect cognitive fragments. Can you reach the depths of consciousness alive?

4489820.title: DOGPIT
4489820.short_description: DOGPIT is a brutal, extraction-based battle royale where 100 players fight, scavenge, and escape with loot that unlocks cosmetic gear and elite game modes. Gritty, realistic, and unforgiving.

4489840.title: Tile Tale
4489840.short_description: Tile Tale is a 2D strategy sandbox blending clicker gathering, automation, and exploration. In a misty grid world, craft items, build factories, and keep conveyor belts moving. Defeat enemies and uncover the truth. What awaits at the end? Discover the world, one tile at a time!

4489870.title: OVERDEAD
4489870.short_description: Survive cursed mansions filled with zombies, puzzles, and locked doors. Use weapons and light to explore the world — and escape if you can.

4489900.title: Project OC
4489900.short_description: Project OC is a multiplayer online desktop idle game. Unlock 1000+ customization options through idle gameplay and freely mix appearances, outfits, expressions, and actions to create your unique OC. Invite friends to join and let their OCs live on your desktop!

4489920.title: Profound Dark Feathers
4489920.short_description: In this visual novel, you'll experience a major event in a futuristic, parallel world from a key character's perspective. As the story unfolds, you'll discover that the chosen one uses repeated self-sacrifice to reverse tragic endings, offering their world a chance at salvation.

4489940.title: [ABERRATION] THE ANALYST
4489940.short_description: Dexton-City is gone. A Class C Anomaly turned its citizens into the possessed before the city vanished. You are a PRISM analyst. To decode a dead agent's recording, you must retrace his exact steps inside a neuro-simulation. Can you uncover the truth without losing your mind?

4489950.title: Lullaby of Y
4489950.short_description: 《Lullaby of Y》是一款策略丰富的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过回合中的策略规划，巧妙平衡进攻与防守，并逐步提升角色能力，在严谨推进的战斗进程中体验经典的回合制RPG乐趣。

4489970.title: Funeral of Y
4489970.short_description: 《Funeral of Y》是一款充满情感深度的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家将在回合中精心规划行动，智慧地平衡攻防并不断提升角色能力，在稳定推进的战斗节奏中体验经典的回合制游戏乐趣。

4489980.title: Gaze of Y
4489980.short_description: 《Gaze of Y》是一款策略丰富的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过在回合中精准规划行动、巧妙平衡攻守并逐渐提升角色能力，在结构严谨的战斗节奏中体验经典的单人回合制游戏玩法。

4489990.title: Bard of Y
4489990.short_description: 《Bard of Y》是一款音乐主题的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家将在回合中精妙地规划活动，巧妙平衡进攻与音乐魔法，并逐步提升角色能力，在稳定而充满节奏感的战斗流程中享受经典的回合制游戏魅力。

4490000.title: Ash of Y
4490000.short_description: 《Ash of Y》是一款策略导向的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家将在回合中精确规划行动，平衡进攻与防守，并不断强化角色能力，享受在稳定推进的战斗节奏中体验经典的回合制乐趣。

4490020.title: 灵梦：女友引擎
4490020.short_description: LingMeng: Girlfriend Engine is an AI girlfriend sim focused on companionship, growth, and romance. Create your own digital partner, customize her looks, voice, and personality, and build a unique relationship through daily chats, shared moments, and emotional connection.

4490030.title: Beyond Constraints
4490030.short_description: A short, intimate third-person narrative experience about breaking free from a toxic relationship. Step into Emily's life as she confronts manipulation, rediscovers her identity, and finds the courage to reclaim her freedom. A deeply personal, voice-acted LGBTQ+ story — playable in under an hour.

4490050.title: Hentai Clicker: Scarlett is streaming
4490050.short_description: 🤠🔥 Hentai Clicker: Scarlett is streaming Collect hearts, unlock daring cowgirl outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive ranch-themed clicker. Enjoy beautiful anime art, playful reactions, and Scarlett’s irresistible western charm.

4490710.title: Hardware Tycoon
4490710.short_description: From 1986 to the present day, design and engineer the world's most advanced CPUs and GPUs. Manage your company's finances, research groundbreaking technologies, and build your office to become the ultimate hardware tycoon.

4490860.title: Scam Grandpa
4490860.short_description: Convince Grandpa into giving you 10 million dollars. A thriller and comedy visual novel that you can finish within 30 minutes.

4490880.title: Frost Muscle
4490880.short_description: Your speed, your turns, and your drifting, that's all that stands between the last of the humans and the freezing cold. So start your engine, it's going to be the last ride.

4490910.title: Hi, I`m Kali
4490910.short_description: Help Kali robot escape from the pursuit in this exciting roguelike platformer with over 70,000,000 levels! The levels are never repeated and always offer the player a choice of exciting new challenges to contend with.

4491050.title: The Comyths
4491050.short_description: Stop, slow, and rewind time in a bullet-hell action game. The Comyths is a reality-bending character-driven game where you wield the fundamental forces of Space, Time, Matter, Life, Mind, and Void. Chase S-ranks, unlock art rewards, and uncover story logs.

4491210.title: FUTA FIGHT & FUCK 🥊
4491210.short_description: FUTA FIGHT & FUCK🥊 is a fast-paced 2D adult cyberpunk fighting game where neon arenas, dangerous rivals, and wild encounters collide. Upgrade your cybernetic body, defeat unique fighters, and unlock mature scenes as you rise through the brutal underground combat scene. 🔞

4491220.title: Loop Tower: Prologue
4491220.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4491220.short_description: Loop Tower tells the story of adventurers climbing an endless tower. Place it on a corner of your desktop and help them continue their ascent. Experience a fresh blend of desktop idle gameplay + roguelike + RPG right now!

4491360.title: The 7th Guest Remake
4491360.short_description: The iconic game The 7th Guest has been brought back to life with modern technology, delivering an atmospheric story like no other. Explore a foreboding mansion, solve mind-bending puzzles, and uncover its dark secrets. The 7th Guest is the ultimate mystery adventure, reimagined for modern platforms.

4491420.title: Hex Harmony
4491420.short_description: Restore the balance between Nature and Human using futuristic technologies. Each island is a true puzzle. Build thoughtfully, observe interactions, and shape a durable world in a calm and accessible experience.

4491690.title: KUNTEYNIR
4491690.short_description: The setting is the Russian outback, the courtyards, garages, and entryways where underground hip-hop was born. Here, instead of outer space, there are residential areas, instead of fantasy, there's harsh reality, and instead of abstract blocks, there are fragments of the urban environment.

4492100.title: Spatial Puzzle 3D
4492100.short_description: This is a casual puzzle game that combines spatial logic and brain-teasing challenges.The game features simple controls and a relaxed pace with a satisfying level of challenge. It is designed for players who enjoy Sudoku, Rubik’s Cube, and other spatial logic puzzles.

4492110.title: Cardia: Keys Of The Old King
4492110.short_description: An adventure RPG where you explore dungeons and collect powerful cards — then use those same cards in strategic duels, and even bring some to life in the overworld as real, usable abilities.

4492120.title: PAIC: Moon Rider Story
4492120.short_description: Ride a motorcycle along a seaside coast at sunset, rendered in pixel art. A short visual novel game. Read through the story, survive the death game, and make it home safely!

4492130.title: Cicada Wing
4492130.short_description: Cicada Wing: is a casual action game that blends classic “line‑cutting” mechanics with modern visual effects. While dodging deadly pursuers, you gradually unveil a breathtaking visual feast hidden beneath the shadows.

4492150.title: Terminal Hacker: Override
4492150.short_description: Step into the shadows. Terminal Hacker: Override is an infinite, procedurally generated hacking simulator. Accept dark web contracts, bypass firewalls using pure word-deduction logic, and upgrade your system. No hand-holding, just you, the terminal, and the next target.

4492180.title: Infectica
4492180.short_description: A multiplayer open-world survival game where you gather resources, craft weapons, build shelters, and battle the infected while struggling to stay alive.

4492190.title: Hentai Furry Pig
4492190.short_description: Hentai Furry Pig is a puzzle game for those who love logic and a hot atmosphere. Two mini-games in each level: memory matching and a jigsaw puzzle. Unlock explicit biker-girl illustrations, earn achievements, and view unlocked content in the gallery.

4492260.title: Ducks in Disguise
4492260.short_description: Ducks in Disguise is a cozy hand-drawn hidden object game where you find hundreds of hidden rubber ducks in intricate 2D illustrations and collect them in your personal scrapbook.

4492280.title: Maiden Hand
4492280.short_description: A Tower Defense Deckbuilding Roguelike about saving four princesses with strategy, skill, and a bit of luck!

4492370.title: 律陀斯意志Ludos Will
4492370.short_description: Ludos Will is a 2D Roguelite tower defense game with high-quality anime-style art. You deploy Sentinels and turrets to build defenses across dynamic maps, fending off Human Resistance assaults to guard your core objective.

4492400.title: Click Flip
4492400.short_description: Click Flip is a short incremental game about clicking tiles, earning points, buying upgrades, and causing crazy tile combos.

4492420.title: Out of Body
4492420.short_description: James wakes up one morning—and his physical body is gone. Even worse, no one seems to notice he’s disappeared. After drifting through 1993 San Francisco for months unseen, he eventually stumbles onto what he must do to get his body back and live a life worth knowing.

4492450.title: El Cipitío: The Cuscatlecan Legends
4492450.short_description: El Cipitio and the Cuscatleca Legends is a retro game with 16-bit pixel art style. It is a top-down twin-stick shooter. This 2D shooting game with a top-down perspective combines retro gameplay mechanics with a story based on Salvadoran folklore.

4492480.title: Pick Squad
4492480.short_description: Pick Squad is a strategy game that blends deckbuilding, auto-battler, and roguelike elements. Recruit and upgrade units to build your squad. Draw random numbers to activate matching units’ skills on the board, earn points, and defeat the boss. Test your strategy and arrangement — with a little luck

4492500.title: The Cinder Throne
4492500.short_description: The Cinder Throne is an Idler RPG where you passively kill enemies, level up, loot enemies, change pieces of equipment and find spells. Create powerfull synergies. Rebirth and come back more powerfull.

4492520.title: Witch Switched
4492520.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4492520.short_description: A "man" is transformed into a woman by a vengeful witch and realizes she likes it better this way.

4492570.title: Fear
4492570.short_description: Hiding under the covers, quickly running to your room in the middle of the night from the bathroom, leaving lights on all hours of the night? Witness your childhood fears come to life. All of these non-sensical things we do when were scared will be necessary to survive the monsters of the night.

4492630.title: Lucky Paws
4492630.short_description: A cozy idle game where a lucky Maneki-neko quietly brings fortune while you relax. Watch bells ring, change shrine decorations, and grow prosperity over time in a peaceful Japanese setting designed to run gently in the background.

4492650.title: Cozy Petchi Cats
4492650.short_description: Adopt and take care of your kitten in a cozy virtual pet game. Feed, clean, and play with your little companion as you watch it grow while keeping it happy and healthy. Take care of your pet’s needs and enjoy cute moments alongside your feline friend.

4492680.title: Hibera, Requiem for the Forgotten
4492680.short_description: Follow the journey of two ordinary people as they struggle for survival in a continent shadowed by war. Guide them through strife and turmoil in this Strategy RPG, featuring a grand narrative, engaging weapon triangle combat, and permadeath.

4492730.title: Keeper - UnCorruptDead
4492730.short_description: Dungeon Keeper-like with electropunk elements. Dig out space for buildings to attract AI-controlled creatures and watch them do your bidding. Cast spells from the god-hand above, and protect your heart while sending minions to defeat theirs.

4492790.title: FURRY SUMMER
4492790.short_description: Welcome to the ultimate furry beach episode! A scorching hot arcade breaker where you smash blocks to unlock explicit, uncensored videos of gorgeous anthro girls. Grab your paddle, keep your beach balls bouncing, and dive deep into pure M/F summer fun.

4492810.title: WHOREHAMMER 69 000
4492810.short_description: In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only pleasure. A sci-fi parody arcade breaker where you smash heretical blocks to unlock explicit, uncensored videos of stunning sci-fi women. Wield your Power Paddle, purge the galaxy, and claim your spoils in pure M/F action.

4492860.title: Sisters' Aegis
4492860.short_description: Control Valkyria through a magical world where seven sisters battle for power. A twin-stick shooter with upgrade systems, resonance mechanics, and a story about competitive siblings, and the question of what you'd do with the power to grow.

4492950.title: Rebind
4492950.short_description: Rebind is a casual platformer where the controls change every level. With randomly swapped keys, every jump becomes a new challenge.

4492990.title: Dread Admiral
4492990.short_description: All fear the Dread Admiral. Reclaim the islands of a vast archipelago in this turn-based strategy game where your empire is a navy.

4493010.title: Amid the Grid
4493010.short_description: A poetic puzzle journey consisting of maze and jigsaw mechanics embedded in a relaxed surreal 3d platformer with existential tones. Walk, jump, and fly to collect puzzle pieces and maneuver through the grid.

4493090.title: Immortal Dao Idle
4493090.short_description: Immortal Dao Idle Reborn as a heaven-defying genius in a brutal mortal world, harness ancient Qi, shatter realm barriers, and crush rivals in this addictive idle cultivator inspired by xianxia or wuxia novels.

4493120.title: ひとりだるま | HITORI DARUMA Alone Rite
4493120.short_description: A protagonist attempts to play "Daruma-san ga Koronda" (Red Light, Green Light) entirely alone. Driven by a ritual found online, they gather the necessary items and begin the ceremony. However, eerie phenomena begin to occur one after another.

4498500.title: Kopno: Blightfall
4498500.short_description: Play as an Orc—or choose one of six unique races—and survive in a living open-world built on two layers, the Surface and the Underground. Gather resources, hunt, and build your own settlement. Shape your path through moral choices and explore dangerous lands in the cursed continent of Kopno.

4498540.title: Spooky's Playground
4498540.short_description: Spooky's Playground is an arcade-inspired Score Attack physics sandbox game where wreaking havoc is rewarded! Complete challenges, find secrets and perfect your scores with each new run!

4498620.title: Operation: All Out
4498620.short_description: Operation: All Out is a single player third person shooter where survival depends on smart shooting, limited ammo, and finding medical and ammo kits while eliminating enimies. One mission. Total retaliation. Become an unknown agent and infiltrate enemy bases to wipe out the terrorists responsible.

4498630.title: Commitment
4498630.short_description: Play as an aspiring software developer in a world dominated by soul-sucking corporations. Will you achieve your goals and build a career in the software industry, or will burnout crush you first?

4498670.title: Wonder Air: Lunara's Adventure
4498670.short_description: “Wonder Air: Lunara’s Adventure” is a fantasy flying action game where players can freely soar through a beautifully rendered 3D world.

4498690.title: Three Axes Bar: Paid or Pain
4498690.short_description: Three Axes Bar: Paid or Pain is a rogue-lite with elements of horror, at the center of which stands the story of a broken man. Modify your body, explore the bar, and break the rules! Your main task is to survive and remain human, whatever that may mean…

4498730.title: Lisa: The Lost Memories
4498730.short_description: Lisa The Lost Memories is a visual novel game where you help Lisa regain her memories. You'll choose your own path and unlock multiple endings. CONQUER THE MEMORY DUNGEON!

4498810.title: Jingle Blocks
4498810.short_description: Jingle blocks is a Christmas themed incemental in which you have to make enough toys for the whole world !

4498840.title: Symetria
4498840.short_description: A minimalist geometry puzzle game with a cyberpunk aesthetic. Master five transformation modes — symmetry, rotation, translation, and more — across 150 levels.

4498850.title: RIPCORE
4498850.short_description: KILL. EVOLVE. REPEAT. Fight through 9 circles of Hell in this high-octane roguelike FPS. Craft overpowered builds with stacking upgrades to crush thousands of demons and defeat legendary bosses. Hell is full—start cleaning.

4498860.title: The Last Survivor
4498860.short_description: The Last Survivor is a serious, narrative-driven visual novel set in a sudden zombie apocalypse. You play as an ordinary high school student forced to make difficult decisions as the world collapses. Every choice matters, and mistakes carry irreversible consequences.

4498870.title: DON'T OPEN
4498870.short_description: DONT OPEN is a PSX-style horror game about routine that falls apart before your eyes. A normal shift at a taco bar, an empty stairwell, and a persistent knock on the door that's impossible to ignore. Based on real events.

4498890.title: Those Who Stayed
4498890.short_description: A 60-minute first-person psychological horror game. Your new neighborhood hides a dark secret: previous residents either fled within weeks, or never left at all. Explore eight abandoned homes and discover their fate.

4498960.title: Watsonville
4498960.short_description: Watsonville is a first-person psychological horror VR game. Explore your family’s 1990s mobile home, uncover fragments of a troubled past, and solve environmental puzzles as childhood memory distorts familiar spaces while you try to escape the house and your family’s dark history.

4499010.title: The Restricted Index
4499010.short_description: Read between the lies in this first-person mystery puzzle game. You are the last librarian in Britain. Identify books. Recommend them. Ban them. Burn them. Uncover a catalogue of secrets and lost stories buried between the pages.

4499040.title: Tiny Slime Farm
4499040.short_description: A cozy desktop idle game where cute slimes bounce around your tiny farm while you work or study.

4499090.title: Mother Of All Battles
4499090.short_description: Conquer the world starting from your home city. Explore your island by building tanks or airplanes, then build transports to take your tanks to invade the other islands, and protect them with destroyers, submarines and battleships. But there are five enemy factions somewhere out there!

4499130.title: Totem TD
4499130.short_description: Build your totem from cards, defend against waves of enemies, and grow your deck in this roguelite tower defense adventure. Strategize, rotate, survive, repeat!

4499210.title: Cat Cook: Defense
4499210.short_description: Protect your simmering soup from relentless hordes in this action-packed, vertical Tower Defense! Take direct control of your Chef, build intricate mazes, merge towers on the fly, and unleash powerful spells. Level up mid-battle for roguelite buffs and unlock deep RPG loot to survive!!

4499300.title: The Sievert Scale
4499300.short_description: A surveillance horror based inside a nuclear power plant. Monitor CCTV, Identify hazards, document incidents and keep operations running. Report too much and you fail the weekly audit, too little and danger spreads. What’s happening deeper inside the plant was never meant to be monitored.

4499500.title: Ninja Dodgeball
4499500.short_description: A fast-paced ninja dodgeball arena where reflexes are everything. Reflect, dash, and strike the ball to send it flying at your opponents as its speed increases with every volley. Play with up to 12 of your friends today!

4467610.title: Essences of Power
4467610.short_description: Wield the elemental essences as the Elementalist. Survive endless waves, evolve your elementals, combine elements to forge new power. Every decision shapes your run. How far can you go in 25 minutes?

4467620.title: The Pirate: Republic of Nassau
4467620.short_description: Command iconic pirate ships of the early 18th century and experience life as a true sea captain, sailing freely across the open world. Engage in naval battles, expand your fleet, recruit legendary captains, and manage resources to support your life at sea.

4468420.title: Meowsic
4468420.short_description: You fell asleep. An orange cat has colonised your DAW soundtrack. Your real cat is mashing your keyboard. Your recycle bin is on fire, and the only way out is to make the music work. This is fine. This is Meowsic. A genre-bending rhythm platformer where the platforms are your audio loops.

4468470.title: Mega Bunny Blast 3D
4468470.short_description: It's time to blast in Mega Bunny Blast 3D! Compete against your friends in a variety of different game modes. Earn bunny coins and unlock different costumes. Try to become the true Bunny King!

4469200.title: Couples Therapy
4469200.short_description: Things go awry for Hazel and Dylan at their first couples therapy appointment. Their therapist? An evil wizard. The therapeutic method? Being tied together and forced to fight furniture come to life. Play as them in this co-op roguelike adventure!

4469420.title: Pixel Factory
4469420.short_description: Build and automate your own factory in Pixel Factory. Paint cubes in different colors and create unique patterns, design efficient production lines and upgrade your buildings to optimize production.

4469470.title: Investor Hubris
4469470.short_description: Investor Hubris turns the stock market into a multiplayer Rogue-like. Buy and sell stocks, select upgrades, and discover broken synergies. Play solo or rug pull in online multiplayer.

4469480.title: Walls
4469480.short_description: A physics-based puzzle game where every bounce matters. Plan your angles, use limited bounces, and solve thousands of levels. Test your precision, master tricky puzzles, and explore endless community-made challenges.

4474050.title: Milord Idle Defense
4474050.short_description: Defend your tower against enemies and survive as long as you can.

4474590.title: Hush
4474590.short_description: A co-op horror game where you and your friends break into monsters’ homes and wreck their stuff. Smash everything you can and escape the crime scene before they catch you — they hear every sound.

4475150.title: DeathMaze - Dungeon Crawler
4475150.short_description: A Brutal Top-Down Action Roguelike set in dark, procedurally generated dungeons. Fight monsters, manage your inventory, plan runs from the HUB, and survive increasingly dangerous sequences of labyrinths.

4475250.title: 奇兽异传
4475250.short_description: This is a 2D platform action shooting fantasy game where you play as four animal characters fighting against enemies. In the game, you level up by defeating enemies, learning new skills, and acquiring items and equipment. The game features a variety of amazing skills, items, and unique equipment.

4475370.title: The story of her
4475370.short_description: Dear sisters, In this game, you play as an elderly grandmother adventuring in hell. You will meet all kinds of women—intelligent, greedy, ambitious, kind, and selfish. This is a story about women. Due to many feminist expressions and local dialects, the game is only available in Chinese for now.

4475430.title: 四号对象 Object 4
4475430.short_description: You will play as a policewoman, who is in search of her missing sister at midnight. By accident, you encounter with a MANIAC, who will hunt you down until you die. Can you escape, or ... fight back?

4475600.title: Yuki Onna: Snowball Fight!
4475600.short_description: Yuki Onna: Snowball Fight! is a 3D online party game for 2-16 players. Nimbly fly and dodge attacks in a snowy world, wreak havoc with snowballs, and collect "Frost Cores" to upgrade your power and stats, winning this chaotic, hilarious brawl.

4475780.title: Block Shooter
4475780.genre: Indie, Massively Multiplayer, Strategy, Free To Play
4475780.short_description: Tactical multiplayer FPS in a fully destructible voxel world. Shoot through walls, blow open new sightlines, and watch the map fall apart around you. Skill-based gunplay with learnable spray patterns, real bullet physics, and per-limb damage. Community servers support fully custom Lua mods.

4476430.title: Net Gains
4476430.short_description: A fishing roguelite about drafting your gear and paying off your debt before the Loan Shark eats you.

4476600.title: PARADICE
4476600.short_description: Roll the dice, hunt your rivals, and survive the chaos. ParaDice is a fast-paced multiplayer dice racing game where strategy, luck, and betrayal collide.

4476630.title: Tethered To You
4476630.genre: Casual, RPG, Simulation, Free To Play
4476630.short_description: After you are unable to find a patron to provide you with a magic bond, you stumble into the abandoned temple of the Passion goddess - with four patrons waiting for you. Yet, as you grow closer to gaining magic, something else is drawn to this power...

4477170.title: Skully Seas
4477170.short_description: A pirate-themed tower defense roguelite where players build their crew to take on the Skully Seas, liberating islands, finding helpful treasures, and encountering new pirates to add to the adventure along the way!

4478200.title: 這遺虚配信
4478200.short_description: Photograph and repel the monsters that appear in the abandoned hotel using a mysterious camera! Uncover the mysteries surrounding the abandoned hotel by relying on comments from your viewers! Use the Super Chats you receive to buy items and gain the upper hand in battle!

4478420.title: Forgive or Finalize
4478420.short_description: A short-form psychological thriller. Confront the mysterious Finn through a monitor. No strategy or puzzles—just choices and their consequences. Simply answer his questions and witness the end.

4480350.title: Jumpy Horse Show Jumping
4480350.short_description: Sport game. Design your own courses, choose horse breeds, develop your horse's skills, take on challenging show jumping competitions. Experience the excitement of equestrian sport as you ride, jump, and aim for victory in this immersive horse-riding simulation perfect for all horse enthusiasts.

4480430.title: The Woods
4480430.short_description: The Woods is a short first-person horror game emphasizing atmosphere and tension, inspired by games like Slender or Seeking Evil: The Wendigo. Players explore a dark, eerie woods to collect 5 mementos with only a flashlight and limited stamina, all while being hunted by a creature of the forest.

4480490.title: The Specimen
4480490.short_description: A dying vessel. A terminal screen. A bioweapon that evolves. Navigate node-based star systems, fight alien organisms in automated combat, and scavenge what you can. When you die, launch a data capsule home. Upgrade. Relaunch. Push further. A roguelite played entirely from a retro command line.

4480570.title: Intelligence
4480570.short_description: A retro-sci-fi themed mystery investigation puzzle game. Search for clues across the solar system, gather intelligence using your cutting-edge investigation tools, and figure out what happened. When you find all 15 ships, you win!

4480710.title: Freelands
4480710.short_description: Freelands is a kingdom management game with a sandbox structure and RPG elements. Starting your journey by helping in a small and scattered settlement, you gradually gain trust, a voice, and transform an uncertain village into a powerful city, and then into your own kingdom.

4480810.title: COLD CALL
4480810.short_description: COLD CALL is a first-person retro horror game based on a dying Earth full of unexplained mysteries. Escape Northbridge's research facility as you explore and uncover the truth behind a dying world.

4481350.title: Pretty Agent 2
4481350.short_description: Urgent mission! According to reliable intelligence, international wanted criminal Miss S is currently hiding at Airport X in this city. To avoid causing unnecessary panic, players are requested to assume the role of female agent 33 and head to the destination to carry out a secret arrest mission!

4481490.title: Shrimpact
4481490.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4481490.short_description: In Shrimpact you'll need to fight your friends! Use your boxing skills to punch eachother of the arena, but beware of the Clam who shoots out exploding pearls! Punch, throw and dash all you can in this chaotic battle!

4482330.title: Death Eclipse: Reign of the Undying
4482330.short_description: Death Eclipse is a 2D dark fantasy action hack-and-slash where the God of Death wages war in a world consumed by immortality. When the cycle of life and death is broken, the realm descends into madness, and only the harbinger of the end can restore its finality.

4482390.title: Archimedes II: Some Like It Hot
4482390.short_description: Join Hercules to save Syracuse from erupting volcano fire in time management adventure! Gather resources, build and upgrade structures, complete strategic tasks, and banish mischievous ghosts to restore balance to the world

4482960.title: 驱入虚空
4482960.short_description: Into the Void is a sci-fi third-person action shooter focused on loot collection and build synergy. Freely combine armor, weapons, and mechs across diverse levels. Obtain all gear through gameplay. Befriend Chronomancers, and save a world plunged into chaos by the fall of the Celestial Palace.
developers: 杭州紧张树科技有限公司
publishers: 海南紧张树科技有限公司

4483210.title: The Too-Cute Girl Who Moved in Next Door
4483210.short_description: A 3D romance simulation game with point-and-click exploration and interaction with the heroine. The story branches into a pure romance route or a revenge route, leading to multiple endings.

4483990.title: Megaris
4483990.genre: Casual, Indie, Strategy, Free To Play
4483990.short_description: A casual classic puzzle game with lots of modes and extras.

4484420.title: FLESHCANCER
4484420.short_description: FLESHCANCER is a Fast-paced Boomer Shooter with surreal environments and old-school violence. Fight cannibal cultists, terrorists, grotesque aberrations and more. MAKE IT RAIN FLESH, ORGANS, AND BLOOD LIKE NEVER BEFORE.

4484700.title: Nocturnal Terror
4484700.short_description: Nocturnal Terror is a first-person survival horror experience where survival depends on what you cling to and what you let decay. Explore a world consumed by creeping corruption, manage scarce resources, and face the unknown beneath the palace.

4486350.title: Fantasy Bird Woods
4486350.short_description: Fantasy Bird Woods is a desktop idle game. Observe and guide mystical birds on the right side of your screen. They evolve alongside your work or study without window-switching. Enjoy light interaction and a sense of companionship during breaks with these evolving digital pets.

4486360.title: Missing Texture
4486360.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4486360.short_description: Missing Texture is a psychological horror experience told in chapters. Download the free Launcher and access all main chapters at no cost. The full story expands through additional games.

4486370.title: Banana Life Sim
4486370.short_description: Banana Life Sim is a game in which you can become a banana.

4486430.title: Tragedy is approaching
4486430.short_description: A first-person survival game set in a post-Soviet wasteland. Explore abandoned locations, fight the infected, scavenge resources, and build a base to survive

4486530.title: Educe
4486530.short_description: Educe is a 2D pixel art "Metroidbrainia" puzzle game where the world is your blueprint. Physically rearrange the screens of a forgotten laboratory to navigate a sprawling, non-linear maze. With no combat and a focus on logic, you must shift the environment itself to educe the path forward.

4486620.title: Dark Web Incremental
4486620.short_description: Dark web incremental is an incremental idle game where you earn money by doing criminal activities like selling drugs and hacking. Upgrade everything, and find all the pets and secrets around the map while unlocking a myriad of achievements!

4486650.title: Raspberry's Berry Match
4486650.short_description: Use one controller to play as Player 1 Eclair and Player 2 Spachaman. Control both characters solo, or grab the controller together and play cooperatively. Collect all four scattered marks at the concert venue and deliver them to the stage where Raspberry is waiting!

4486840.title: Perfect Son-In-Law: Hidden S-Rank
4486840.short_description: She needs you to play her boyfriend. You’re more than capable of the role. Step into the shoes of a secretly overpowered awakener navigating high society, dangerous expectations, and a fake relationship that slowly turns real in this story-driven NSFW visual novel.

4487300.title: Rock the Block
4487300.short_description: Ride falling blocks, jump between pieces, and clear rows in this physics puzzler

4487350.title: Royal Institute of Magic
4487350.short_description: RIM is a multiplayer magic school simulator. Compete in teams of 4 players in magical classes to earn points. Attend extracurricular activities and uncover the institute's secrets in your free time to gain an advantage over your peers. Only the best students may continue with their education.

4488610.title: The Outcast Bloom
4488610.short_description: Hack & Slash action dungeon crawler designed for intense 5-20 minute runs. Level your character Sylvie, find the perfect loot and combat normal, elite and boss creatures while exploring her story.

4488930.title: Smoke & Lottery Simulator
4488930.short_description: Manage your own tobacco shop and bar! Sell cigarettes and lottery tickets, serve drinks to your customers, manage your stocks, and grow your business in first-person. Can you juggle the counter and the shelves to build a thriving business?

4489380.title: Whalefall
4489380.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, Free To Play
4489380.short_description: A PSX-style survival horror game where you run, hide, and fight through a deep-sea prison overrun by cloning monsters that regenerate from severed limbs, forcing you to carefully choose when violence is worth the risk.

4489500.title: The Road of Rebirth
4489500.short_description: You can equipping your preferred weapons for your vehicle and you can swap out various components, including armor plating and flamethrower systems,etc. All weapons and parts are upgradeable. In short, you can forge your vehicle into formidable war machines and pilot them into the Doomsday battle.

4489540.title: Little Chain Game
4489540.short_description: A Chain connects you to where you started. Collect coins to extend your Chain. Walk into strangers, they become friends. Collect friends. Collect music. Collect more coins. Collect the Desire to Accumulate. Get a job. Talk to ghosts. Get lost. Go back to where you started. Find your Freedom.

4489570.title: One Man's Trash: Pawn Shop After Dark
4489570.short_description: One Man's Trash is a survival simulation game where you and up to 3 friends run a failing pawn shop by day... survive it by night. Buy, sell, and negotiate to meet a mysterious quota. Miss your quota, and something will come to collect.

4489770.title: Orbitmine
4489770.short_description: Orbit a planet, fire your laser, and mine it to the core. Upgrade your ship and conquer seasonal hazards across four unique zones. A satisfying incremental mining game set in space.

4489800.title: Alchemy Survivors
4489800.short_description: Alchemy Survivors is a time survival game that blends classic Survivors gameplay with infinite crafting and endless content to discover, generated while you play.

4490130.title: Eternal Sword Tomb
4490130.short_description: No chosen hero—just a **mortal soul**. In this hardcore cultivation Roguelike, build a sect and initiate a legacy across generations. Fall to become a **Sword Soul**, guarding your descendants forever. Master the Five Elements to defy fate. Every death is a step toward a mightier awakening!

4491190.title: FRESHMAN: Project SEX 🔞
4491190.short_description: FRESHMAN: Project SEX is an adult visual novel about university life, risky bets, and nerdy adventures. Meet campus girls from anime clubs, DnD sessions, and board game nights while trying to build your reputation on campus before the semester ends. Choices, chaos, and spicy encounters await. 🔞

4491280.title: Duck Dash Delivery
4491280.short_description: Duck Dash Delivery is a casual life management simulator where you play as a duck working to lift your family out of poverty. Navigate city traffic, avoid collisions, upgrade your scooter, and choose the most profitable delivery orders to save your family from their financial struggles.

4494800.title: Void Rhythm
4494800.short_description: Fight through unending swarms of enemies and blast your way out of the siege. When the odds are stacked against you, trigger Bullet Time to turn the tide, slowing the world down to dismantle your enemies one by one. Strike hard, strike fast—offense is your best defense.

4494830.title: The Vaults Below Durn: A Field Study
4494830.short_description: Three Doors. One Safe Path. Observe the signs, learn the patterns, and uncover the fate of the explorer who ventured before you.

4494970.title: 恐怖夜話
4494970.short_description: Late at night, a teacher shares two bizarre tales: a corpse stuffed in a sheet, and an abnormal presence in the mountains. It was just a ghost story, but a creepy "sense of unease" lurks within. A short psychological horror visual novel offering a dense, terrifying experience in about an hour.

4495180.title: One Dice Dungeon Delve
4495180.short_description: "One Die. One Life. Infinite Delving." Experience the digital evolution of a tabletop classic. Master unique class abilities, discover procedural loot that visually transforms your hero, and challenge global leaderboards in this high-stakes d6-powered roguelike. How deep will you delve?

4495390.title: Nian Monste
4495390.short_description: Spring Festival, a holiday rumored to have been born to suppress monsters, is now gradually aging in the current of the new era. The traditions passed down have become a "burden" to young people, while those ancient monsters have long been waiting for this moment for a thousand years...

4495870.title: Guild Manager 26
4495870.short_description: Collect over 1,300+ cards and build or draft a guild roster to compete in PvP/PvE leagues, tournaments, and dungeons! Free to play! New updates weekly!

4495990.title: 아무 일도 없었다.
4495990.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Free To Play
4495990.short_description: Endure the gaze inside the elevator.

4496220.title: Zero Point
4496220.short_description: Stranded in the future by the 'Zero Point' rift. Lead your mercenary crew from a spaceship hub in this Sci-Fi/Fantasy story-driven TPS. Master hybrid combat mixing heavy greatswords with firearms. Fight alongside the great dragon Loca and experience a deep tale of clashing eras.

4496250.title: CropChampion
4496250.short_description: Recruit heroes, arrange formations, and auto-battle through 100 stages of cozy chaos. Farm crops, cook battle buffs, hatch and evolve pets, build airships, craft gear — and steal your neighbor's harvest. A cozy idle RPG with prestige mechanics that keeps you coming back.

4496270.title: Pixel Pile
4496270.short_description: Stack, Assemble, and battle— Puzzle precision decides the battle! "Shape" your path to victory! Customize your "Shape" too! A falling-block puzzle where you create "Shape" based on challenges. Solo play, local, and online battles available.

4496340.title: 封魔剑魂
4496340.genre: Action, Adventure, RPG, Free To Play, Early Access
4496340.short_description: Feng Mo Jian Hun is an action RPG featuring the Three Kingdoms theme.Play as legendary warriors such as Zhao Yun, and exterminate demons in a chaotic world overrun by evil to protect the people.

4496400.title: Rogue Hex Mines
4496400.short_description: Hex Minesweeper meets Roguelike — on a fog-shrouded hexagonal board, use 16 tools like fireworks, black holes, and magnets to clear mines, collect rogue cards, to reveal more tiles and defeat 8 unique Bosses. Runs as a transparent overlay on your desktop. Pick up and play anytime.

4496410.title: Nocturne
4496410.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4496410.short_description: Nocturne is a story focused RPG about facing your fears and self discovery with grid turn based combat.

4496420.title: Elite MMA Manager
4496420.short_description: Create legends, ruin careers, and reshape the MMA world from behind the scenes.

4496440.title: Hentai Tales: Infinite Climax-Endless Ecstasy
4496440.short_description: I came to Longport with nothing. A year as a low-level enforcer for the Dragon Peace gang was just survival. until my first real job went to hell. Betrayed, shot at, and on the run with a wounded superior, I'm plunged into a vicious power struggle...

4496450.title: Silence of Dawn
4496450.short_description: A third-person horror survival game where Elena Ward uncovers a secret experiment hidden inside an abandoned mansion. Search for clues, evade terrifying creatures and escape before it’s too late.

4496460.title: Hentai Horny Crush
4496460.short_description: Hentai Horny Crush - My crush looks great as always. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4496690.title: Upward
4496690.short_description: Try to stay alive for as long as possible, by avoiding various enemies and obstacles while collecting as many apples as your heart desires. Play against friends, unlock cool cosmetics or achieve a new highscore. The choice is up to you.

4496840.title: BLASTER MAYHEM
4496840.short_description: Weave and cleave your way through walls of bullet and push your score to unknown limits in this aggressive Shoot'em'up to save humanity from its own hubris

4497170.title: Assassin of Monsters 2 Spacenator
4497170.short_description: FPS Shooter game where warrior with space weapon need kill 6 different bosses in 6 different levels and collect items. So be a hero and fight against several different big enemies

4497500.title: Conquering Other Planets Idle - COPI
4497500.genre: RPG, Simulation, Strategy, Free To Play
4497500.short_description: A deep idle RPG where numbers go up, gear gets weirdly strong, and prestige when you want to be stronger or weaker. Build your permanent wardrobe across prestiges, pick your gear to start a run with, but be prepared to upgrade.

4497850.title: Magic Ball Breaker
4497850.short_description: 《Magic Ball Breaker》is a strategic game that combines physics-based casual brick-breaking with 'Inventory Tetris' and 'Roguelite' elements. Form a contract with a spellbook claiming to be the Demon King, strategically pack magic into your limited inventory, and defeat your enemies!

4498100.title: 黄泉園（Yomi no Sono）
4498100.short_description: A Japanese horror exploration game set in Yomi, the realm between life and death, with thalassophobia elements. Exiled in the Edo era and cast into a river, you awaken in a sunken garden. Explore, evade what lurks below, and face the choice between sin and redemption.

4498110.title: 东方魔法块 ~ Touhou Magic Blocks
4498110.short_description: A Touhou Project fan game combining danmaku with block stacking! Survive bullet hell and special card attacks and counter with strategic block stacking!

4498210.title: Kinetic Foundry
4498210.short_description: Unleash neon balls and shatter digital blocks to build your fortune in this addictive cyberpunk idle/arcade game! Combine pinball mechanics with endless progression in Kinetic Foundry. Upgrade your Reactor, Launcher, and Bumpers to reach maximum system capacity!

4498270.title: SAMOPAL Protocol
4498270.short_description: A story-driven retro FPS. Fight through industrial zones, the districts of a dead city, and experimental areas to recover your memories and uncover the bloody truth of SAMOPAL Protocol.

4498350.title: Slimazing
4498350.short_description: Kill slimes. Collect juice. Upgrade your power. Craft potions and defeat elites and bosses in this juicy incremental roguelite.

4498360.title: Ara Gui Mano: Buscar y Escapar
4498360.genre: Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4498360.short_description: Ara Gui Mano: Search and Escape is an isometric, grid-based turn-based stealth survival horror game. Plan routes, manage action points, gather resources, and escape a threat you can’t kill. Approx. playtime: ~2 hours.

4498400.title: Winter Nest
4498400.short_description: You play as a beetle exploring the underground world, working together with ants. Expand the nest, gather resources, and maintain the nest’s temperature to survive the long winter.

4498650.title: Covert X Universe
4498650.short_description: An explosive combat sandbox where you train, build power, command battle pets, and fight powerful players across multiple worlds—on a path to conquer the universe.

4498660.title: Arcade Cafe Simulator
4498660.short_description: Run and manage your own arcade entertainment hall. Start with a small gaming space and expand it into a lively destination filled with arcade machines, gaming rooms. Decorate the venue, maintain machines, hire staff for repairs and service, and run a snack kiosk to keep customers happy.

4499030.title: Your Lil' Cow
4499030.short_description: Handle your cow—the world's most "straight" bovine. Your Lil' Cow is a cute, pixel-art desktop companion that lives for your touch. Drag to build momentum, trigger explosive "Milking Frenzies," and spend your hard-earned milk on gacha draws to collect a wide variety of cute accessories.

4499100.title: Shadown
4499100.short_description: A minimalist puzzle-platformer where the core mechanic revolves around 'walking through shadows.' By manipulating environmental triggers and contraptions, you guide your character to the goal to clear each level.

4499530.title: Don Quijote
4499530.short_description: An interactive graphic novel reimagining Cervantes' masterpiece in striking neo-noir style. Guide Don Quixote through La Mancha, make choices that shape his journey, and discover four unique endings in this tragicomic tale of idealism and madness.

4499610.title: Sovereign's Enigma
4499610.short_description: Explore a vast underground world in a 2D side-scrolling survival adventure. Find survivors, build a team, and battle powerful bosses in the ruins of a forgotten civilization. Uncover the truth behind the Sovereign's Enigma.

4499640.title: Silent Orbits
4499640.short_description: A text-based sci-fi cRPG adventure. Explore a Fallout 1 inspired tactical grid map, scavenge ships and derelict stations, craft items and survive turn-based combat. Narrative choices and stats shape your journey among the ruins of the Solar System.

4499650.title: Seven Relics
4499650.short_description: This is a card adventure game where you can choose 4 characters to form a team, select different routes to defeat enemies, and earn gold and experience points. Enemies will attack, and you can level up characters, purchase equipment, upgrade, enhance, and forge your cards to defeat powerful foes.

4499690.title: Keepers of Umbrasil
4499690.short_description: A cozy sanctuary-building adventure about befriending ancient spirits and exploring a magical forest.

4499850.title: Prolf
4499850.short_description: This is a platformer arcade-style game about a 9 year-old wolf who runs, jumps and punches through tough obstacles and random foes.

4499870.title: COHORT
4499870.short_description: In this single-player narrative game, you are just a clone. A simple clone wandering through a strange laboratory. You are on the cusp of a revolution, but something is amiss. Will you try to understand what is really happening, or will you join the Cohort to win your freedom?

4499900.title: Getting Stronger
4499900.short_description: Launch yourself upward in brutal, creative ways in Getting Stronger. A fast, arcade-style precision platformer inspired by classic Flash games. You can’t die but every mistake will hurt. Master the climb, endure the pain, and reach the top to save the one who matters.

4499950.title: KungPaw
4499950.short_description: A roguelike survivor where pawed heroes battle swarms of evil snakes. Dodge, dash, and let your weapons do the talking. Collect loot, unlock characters, and grow stronger with every run.

4500030.title: Miles Between Us
4500030.short_description: Collect stuff and scrapbook in this heartwarming indie game! Set off on a road trip and learn more about your older brother as you go to different locations together. Did we also mention that you’re a raccoon?

4500050.title: A Totally Normal Love Story
4500050.short_description: Made for people who love Hallmark movies — and people who love to hate them. A totally normal love story in a perfectly ordinary small town, where nothing weird ever happens…or so you’re told.

4500090.title: TeepyTime
4500090.short_description: TeepyTime is a shared ambient application. You appear as a glowing orb in space alongside other connected players. There are no objectives. Each player's orbit is procedurally generated and unique.

4500150.title: Table 9
4500150.short_description: A short first-person psychological anomaly hunt set in a looping late-night european-style cafe. Memorize what’s normal, spot what changed, and make the right call before the shift resets. Or you can just keep making latte art ☕️

4500240.title: Love in Every Note
4500240.short_description: An adult romance visual novel set at a mountain music festival. Play as Theo, a disgraced pianist, as he pursues one of three romance routes with Delphine, Kira, or Wren. Each route includes explicit adult scenes.

4500270.title: Global Protocol: New World Order
4500270.short_description: Command any nation in a modern grand strategy simulation set in 2026. Manage diplomacy, economy, espionage, and warfare while shaping the global balance of power. Lead a superpower or build a small state into a global force in a dynamic geopolitical sandbox.

4500280.title: Hecatomb
4500280.short_description: Hecatomb is a mythic deckbuilding roguelike that tests how much you're willing to sacrifice. Every action produces Offerings, which can be relinquished to the Gods in exchange for powerful effects. But which Gods you worship and which you scorn have lasting effects on your journey to the Underworld.

4500300.title: Pro Sports Boxing
4500300.short_description: It's fight time! Pro Sports Boxing brings the speed, the power and bone crunching action into the palm of your hands! A boxing game made for true boxing fans, simulating an authentic boxing experience.

4500310.title: Staatio
4500310.short_description: Fast-paced multiplayer territory conquest. Host your own server, invite friends over LAN, and battle for control of procedurally generated maps. Four game modes, alliances, bot opponents, and cross-platform play.

4500320.title: Risk & Responsibility
4500320.short_description: A corporate crisis management simulation where every decision has a cost, every audit has a deadline, and one wrong call can cost careers, compliance, and lives.

4500350.title: 5 days at grandpa
4500350.short_description: A dark horror game about a grandson who is staying at his grandpa's house for 5 days while his grandpa is gone. But something is off, maybe it's the house, or maybe it's you. You must survive 5 days of twisted sociological horror

4500370.title: OMVROS
4500370.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play, Early Access
4500370.short_description: Experience the deep fusion of rhythm and visuals in this innovative fixed-track rhythm game. Through meticulously designed charts and performance effects, every track presents a unique sensory world for you to explore.

4500390.title: Churu Please!
4500390.short_description: Give the cats exactly what they want, fast! Match the right 'Churu' to each cat's desire within the time limit. Test your reflexes and compete with cat lovers worldwide on the global leaderboards!

4500410.title: Killest Fights CRAW-Mech
4500410.short_description: Killest Fights CRAW-Mech is a turn based sci-fi RPG about Killest taking his revenge on the RDA (Robot Destruction Agency). Rampage through a robot-filled base, push around a weak-willed supervisor, hopefully run into no barrel puzzles, and face your past head first in this epic onslaught...

4500470.title: Ninja Vs Bomb
4500470.short_description: Step into the role of a webcam body-tracked Ninja and unleash shuriken strikes to survive waves of chaotic bomb creatures across 10 escalating levels of explosive action.

4500510.title: 天朝相亲图鉴
4500510.short_description: This is a realistic, high-freedom text-based romance simulation game with life simulation elements.You will experience a real, touching yet heartbreaking, ridiculous yet addictive blind date adventure, encounter more than a dozen blind dates with distinct personalities.

4500530.title: Raging Blasters 2
4500530.short_description: The sequel to the speed-and-destruction shmup "Raging Blasters" is here! It's called "Raging Blasters 2." This is an arcade-style vertical scrolling shmup in which players control a fighter jet and battle various enemies in outer space.

4500540.title: 无限接近
4500540.short_description: An epic ABO-themed sci-fi game is here, with a female protagonist who’ll have everyone thrilled! From the start, you play as the most powerful female Alpha who dominates the stars. With both charm and combat skills at their peak, this game offers non-stop excitement!

4500650.title: Cave of Mystery
4500650.short_description: Cave of Mystery is a single-player, story driven survival horror game set in a dark fantasy medieval time. Fight amalgamations of the grotesque fiend King Flute, solve sinister puzzles, use music to unlock secret passageways and venture the dark.

4500660.title: Cosmic Robots
4500660.short_description: Defend your planet from waves of robot invaders! Build powerful turrets, upgrade your defenses, and command robot units to fight drones, tanks, and massive bosses. Then send your own forces to attack the enemy planet in this action-packed sci-fi tower defense game.

4500690.title: Flora Nova
4500690.short_description: Flora Nova is a single player, cozy music gardening game set in a colorful sci-fi solarpunk world. Connect with your community and prevent an alien disease from spreading through the environment by tending to musical gardens that keep the disease at bay!

4500700.title: Amalgam
4500700.short_description: Partnered with your pet gun, descend to Earth's core and confront the Great Machine that reshaped the world. Craft chaotic synergies, grow your weapon, and strengthen your bond, rediscovering what it means to be human.

4500780.title: 东方求财史记 Touhou: Records of Wealth-Seeking
4500780.short_description: Touhou: Records of Wealth-Seeking is a funny, chaotic visual novel and perfect for Touhou newcomers. No prior knowledge needed to enjoy it. Play as Keine, buy up Gensokyo’s assets, and face the invasion from the Outside World. You’ll meet all kinds of weirdos—and you’re one of them too.

4500800.title: Goblins for Good
4500800.short_description: Spawn goblins at your cursor, merge them into massive units, and unleash wholesome chaos in this incremental RTS — all while supporting real-world good.

4500830.title: Mirolin: The Big Show
4500830.short_description: You accept a night shift in the depths of Sylvia Corp™. What starts as a simple cleaning job soon turns into a claustrophobic nightmare. Your perspective will change forever... if you manage to get out alive. The night shift has just begun.

4500850.title: Make Moku Proud
4500850.short_description: Uncover the truth behind a broken ritual in Make Moku Proud... a psychological visual novel where guilt and obedience, and what it means to make Moku proud, shape the fate of a witness watching his companions disappear.

4500870.title: What We Bring
4500870.short_description: What We Bring is a cozy puzzle game about the objects that shape a life. Organize, sort, and pack through the years, choosing what items to carry forward. The items you keep shape the character’s future, influencing the path they take in a branching narrative story.

4500890.title: Anomaly Street
4500890.short_description: In Anomaly Street you must look around for anything that doesn't seem quite right. Once you've decided if there's an anomaly or not, continue down the road you think is right.

4500910.title: GONERS
4500910.short_description: GONERS is a story-focused puzzle horror game about three supernaturally gifted teenagers who are seeking to get their wish granted by Yaroo the Wish-Granter. Solve puzzles by utilizing each character's unique abilities and free trapped ghosts in Yaroo's mansion to uncover the mystery.

4500980.title: Easter Bunny Girls – Hentai Jigsaw
4500980.short_description: In Easter Bunny Girls – Hentai Jigsaw, Easter becomes irresistibly tempting. Assemble sensual puzzles featuring charming bunny girls, delicate costumes, and 30 exclusive artworks full of color, style, and soft seduction — piece by piece. 🐰💖

4501000.title: Zwamman
4501000.short_description: Zwamman is a zero pressure single screen puzzle game in which you have to use your light to help Zwamman find crystals in dark forests and swamps. Use the crystals to light a path to Zwamman's home and reveal the true nature of the scary monsters!

4501030.title: Black Wedding
4501030.short_description: THE PLAYER IS Private detective to investigate serial killer but found out that cultists are behind the murder for the offering to demon lord . Player needs to stop the cultists before they finish the final Ritual of the demonic summoning.

4501080.title: SILENT CONFESSION
4501080.short_description: In a decaying urban apartment block, you become obsessed with the woman living across the hall. Watching her slowly turns into a daily ritual—until a very night...

4501170.title: SKY HARVEST
4501170.short_description: The Earth is dead. Take control of the ARC-7 terminal and manage the fate of 5,000 souls. Balance energy and credits, make moral choices, gamble, and survive the Loan Shark. Every keystroke has a price in this 100-day dystopian text-based simulation. Your shift begins now, Operator.

4501240.title: 帝王霸业
4501240.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4501240.short_description: 耗时两年!呕心沥血!诚意之作! 帝王霸业=原创剧情+超级大陆+不肝不氪

4501310.title: 8 Ball Pro Online
4501310.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Free To Play
4501310.short_description: 3D 8-ball pool game; featuring spin control, jump shots, and various game modes. Aim your shots, adjust the ball's position, and clear the table. Play against the computer, challenge a friend locally, or compete in online PvP.

4501360.title: Wrath of Skeletar: Last Breath
4501360.genre: Action, Adventure, RPG, Free To Play
4501360.short_description: Dark fantasy pixel-art action adventure with fast melee combat, undead hordes, and challenging boss fights. Fight through cursed lands and uncover the story behind a kingdom consumed by death and corruption.

4501410.title: INPUT AI
4501410.short_description: That Time I Got Isekai'd After Yapping With an AI A 100% pure rage-bait control game that will absolutely destroy your sanity! Mash up system commands to dodge troll traps and monsters. Experience a +1000 IQ brain blast and mental breakdown at the same time!

4501430.title: 8 Ball Pool: Play Together
4501430.short_description: Step into a lively bar and experience classic 8-ball pool in 8 Ball Pool: Play Together. Play locally with friends, challenge players online, or test your skills against AI. Master realistic mechanics, manage your cue with the chalk system, and rise through the ranks to unlock new customization.

4501510.title: Sorcery Mastery
4501510.genre: Action, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4501510.short_description: Magical duels meet roguelike builds in this fast-paced multiplayer action-RPG. Farm monster camps, craft your unique magic build with spells, items, and masteries, then outplay your rival as the arena shrinks and forces the final showdown.

4501550.title: Hentai Succubus Aura
4501550.short_description: Hentai Succubus Aura is an adult anime puzzle game featuring the seductive succubus Aura. Solve memory and puzzle challenges to unlock new illustrations, achievements, and gallery content.

4501650.title: Spinbot
4501650.short_description: A roguelite drenched in 00's competitive shooter vibes. In Spinbot, you trade your soul for cheats. Wipe out waves of bots and upgrade your "wordprocessor.exe" with some amazing features.

4501700.title: A Mystic Journey With : Marina
4501700.short_description: Embark on a titillating journey through mystical realms with Marina, your alluring guide. This adults-only "spot the differences" game challenges your keen eye while rewarding your success with seductive reveals.

4501720.title: Aluminium City
4501720.short_description: Crush empty cans and sell the aluminium, buy upgrades, automatic can presses, and robots to automatize and speed up your process, and pay off your debt.

4501730.title: Infernal Survivors
4501730.short_description: Infernal Survivors is a dynamic top-down action roguelike where the player fights against hordes of demons, upgrades abilities, and tries to survive increasingly dangerous waves of hell.

4501800.title: AL-SARAB
4501800.short_description: A PSX-style psychological horror game inspired by Silent Hill set in a distorted Gulf neighborhood, where familiar places turn hostile and every alley hides something wrong.

4503220.title: HONOR 2
4503220.short_description: Play as "Chris" as you explore a fleshed-out world, rich in personalities, Level grind with the Turn-Based Battle system as you unlock new Special attacks, and discover secret paths, enemies, and bosses along the way! Features beautiful artwork, music, and voice talent!

4503250.title: Father Forgets
4503250.short_description: A short atmospheric pixel-art story about the moment when a father, late at night, realizes his mistakes and remembers what truly matters. Inspired by a classic. Perfect for parents, sons, daughters, and anyone who knows the feeling of “what if…”.

4503300.title: Dope Wars - The Dopest
4503300.short_description: Hustle 6 cities. Dodge the cops. Stack millions. The dopest trading game — premium edition, no ads, no IAP, no PTW.

4503320.title: Kuessaria
4503320.short_description: Kuessaria is a 2D sandbox MMO where you explore, fight, and build with friends. Battle enemies, tackle dungeons in parties, craft gear, farm resources, and build your own persistent world. Blending common MMO concepts with survival base-building through a player owned world!

4503360.title: Paper Champions
4503360.short_description: "Paper Champions" is a simple 2.5D Boxing Simulation Game that puts the player into the shoes of fledgling boxer (or their manager) as they train and fight their way from shady Fight Clubs to Flashy Championship Arenas!

4503400.title: Scorched Incremental
4503400.short_description: An incremental game about shooting at blocks that can be long or short depending on how good your aim is.

4503410.title: Hüddam: The Cursed Mansion
4503410.short_description: Hüddam: The Cursed Mansion is a first-person psychological horror game. Explore a 19th-century cursed mansion in Istanbul. Armed with only a flashlight, find the hidden talismans, survive the relentless Djinn, and uncover the dark secrets of Molla Celil.

4503490.title: 少女的幻想乐园
4503490.short_description: This is a visual novel about loneliness and fantasy. You will play a student in a closed boarding school for girls, feeling lonely and alienated, communicating with an imaginary friend every day.Your choices will lead to an ending of either redemption or downfall.

4503530.title: Dream Corp 梦想公司
4503530.short_description: Build a company where you can indulge your whims, but remember, staff have tempers too; don't hurt their feelings. Beyond overseeing operations, manage every staff's life, emotions, and relationships. Direct them to fulfill your demands and discover their hobbies, embarrassing moments, and talents

4503570.title: MOLOKAUST
4503570.short_description: Delve into a ruthless cursed town in this first-person survival horror. With a hyper-realistic atmosphere and extreme survival mechanics, you must ration your inventory and face your worst nightmares to save your wife and daughter.

4503600.title: 街灯 -machinohi-
4503600.short_description: Do you remember? Those "rules" we made for the walk home. In the eighth grade, the rule I set for myself was: "I can only stay in the dark for five seconds." A silent Japanese night. You must reach the next pool of light before the five seconds are up. Can you make it back home safely?

4503610.title: Paranoia Vol I
4503610.short_description: A psychological horror where every choice you make determines the course of the game. You are Clark Turner, a student graduate who finds himself in an abandoned facility. But you aren't alone. A stranger using a radio guides your way ... but his motives may not be what it seems

4503630.title: Chow Them Down Quick
4503630.short_description: Welcome to the super awesome world of this fish game! Use WASD to steer your little fish around, hit the space bar to speed up, and click the mouse to fire bubble bombs. Have a blast with the exciting gameplay - gobble up smaller fish or unleash bubble bombs to catch 'em all!

4503640.title: Alchemist's Garden
4503640.short_description: Relax in Alchemist's Garden, a cozy incremental crafting game. Forage to uncover hidden ingredients across mystical lands. Experiment at your crucible to discover potion recipes, stock your shop's shelves, and watch your potion shop grow!

4503690.title: Fat Fleet
4503690.short_description: Grow in strength and sexy, adorable blubber as you destroy alien cakes in this fixed shooter arcade throwback!

4503810.title: Museum
4503810.short_description: A 4-player multiplayer treasure action game set in an empty museum. Navigate intricate halls to collect priceless treasures faster than your rivals. Strategize your route, outsmart opponents, and claim the high score in this fast-paced free-for-all!

4503910.title: Circus Survival
4503910.short_description: Kidnapped and forced into a deadly game show, survive a brutal obstacle course filled with swinging traps, snipers, mines and precision jumps. Reach the end of Circus Survival and win $1,000,000… or become part of the show.

4503950.title: MY IDEAL BOOBS
4503950.short_description: Experience maximum immersion with breasts crafted with meticulous attention to realistic expression using Live2D. While nothing particularly questionable is happening (presumably), you'll find the ultimate in relaxation and excitement.

4503960.title: Splash monsters 1+2
4503960.short_description: Cartoon musical chaos in two tap shoot 'em up games! Splash monsters through varied levels. Features classic soundtracks, simple controls and 30–40 minutes gameplay in these adventure from the lab to the desert

4503970.title: Dual Cultivation Trainer
4503970.short_description: Please, senior. I've hit a bottleneck in my cultivation and I have no way to breakthrough. My body is yours if you'll help me master my qi. Take me... teach me... dual cultivation!

4504000.title: UltraHero
4504000.short_description: The gods fear what you've become and they're coming for you. UltraHero is the ultimate power fantasy roguelite. Fight through endless dark armies, tear the world apart, and face the gods who dared to challenge you.

4504010.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: Lime
4504010.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful lime mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

4504030.title: 梦境管理公司：渡魂行者
4504030.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4504030.short_description: Guard every trapped soul. Step into the realm of dreams, and clear away the nightmares. DreamControl Inc—wishing you pleasant dreams!

4504100.title: Puzzles
4504100.short_description: This game is a classic puzzle game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

4504240.title: 搭搭大战（DaDa Wars）
4504240.short_description: City-building + Real-time Strategy game. Enjoy building synergies, unit combinations, resource management, and strategic combat, and experience the dual fun of management and conquest with ease.

4504350.title: 26 Moves: The Queen's Plot
4504350.short_description: Silence is a luxury you don't have. Unravel a dark noir point-and-click mystery where justice and revenge blur. You have exactly 26 moves to reach the end. In this psychological duel, are you the master of your own fate, or just a pawn in someone else’s game?

4504390.title: Game Pulse Payoff Pitch
4504390.short_description: Game Pulse is a tabletop-inspired baseball strategy sim based on Payoff Pitch—manage lineups, make critical decisions, and play or simulate full seasons with rich stats and immersive gameplay.

4504430.title: Crab Kingdom
4504430.short_description: The crab king needs your help to protect his treasure in this underwater tower defense!

4504450.title: Hentai FUTA
4504450.short_description: Hentai FUTA - Wow, it’s so huge! Be careful... A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.

4504460.title: Lihiman
4504460.short_description: <3 Bond with your Family, but there's something wrong going on in this house........

4504600.title: Anti-Anti-Cheat: a musical action game
4504600.short_description: This is a musical action game where you need to dodge many enemy bullets appearing to the rhythm of music. Can you defeat Anti-Cheat?

4504610.title: Paralegal
4504610.short_description: Jump into the stress of the working world, as [Law firm's name here]'s newest Paralegal with this 2d side-scroller! Do important and fulfilling tasks, such as bringing coffee, sorting decades old files and letting a client scream at you, all while the clock is ticking in the Background.

4504620.title: Hacker Clicker
4504620.short_description: Hunt signal words, decrypt stolen files, collect Steam Inventory drops, and fence prepared data for REP.

4504630.title: 人性游戏
4504630.short_description: “The Human Game” is an immersive interactive fiction game. You play as Jingchuan, a debt slave who risks his life on a high‑altitude bridge to break free. Surviving to uncover a conspiracy. Face the ultimate choice between survival and morality, and advance the story via exploration and choices.

4504640.title: Emi's Solo Ghost Hunting 2
4504640.short_description: Emi's Solo Ghost Hunting 2 is a 2D survival horror game based on the story of a solo paranormal investigator called Emi, who got a call from a client in order to investigate a haunted property called The Cold House, located just beside a cemetery in California, for proof of the paranormal.

4504710.title: Conquest
4504710.short_description: Conquest is a strategy board game where you fight against up to 7 computer or human controlled opponents to take over the world before you are eliminated by your enemies. The results of combat are calculated using dice throws for attackers and defenders.

4504720.title: Hentai Hijinks, Edge of oops
4504720.short_description: You know what you're looking for and here it is. The gameplay is simple and satisfying: select a puzzle, assemble the pieces, and complete the image at your own pace. Once finished, you can download the completed artwork and add it to your personal collection.

4504730.title: 澄心大学
4504730.short_description: 《澄心大学》是一款校园题材剧情向视觉小说。在鲜活而平静的大学日常中，走近四位拥有不同故事的女主角，并通过选择与分支推动人物关系，走向属于你的青春结局。

4504740.title: Blowhard
4504740.short_description: Blowhard is a leaf-blowing puzzle adventure, set in a cozy English village. Take on the role of Francis - a man with a loud leaf blower and a nose for trouble. Blow your way through a countryside mystery. Solve puzzles, clear autumn leaves, and annoy the locals.

4504810.title: Omnicore: Freiza's Retribution
4504810.short_description: A hardcore sci-fi survival game spanning 400+ procedurally generated star systems. Defend, mine, trade, fight, and command your way through a galaxy where five factions never stop expanding and every resource fuels your next desperate move.

4504840.title: Secret Files: Tunguska - Remastered
4504840.short_description: The award-winning adventure classic returns as a remaster with modernized visuals and updated technology. Join Nina and Max on a globe-spanning investigation filled with puzzles, conspiracies, and danger – and uncover the secret of Tunguska that changes everything!

4504930.title: A Dogday Odyssey
4504930.short_description: No dogs here. As a penguin stranded on a tropical island, collect bolts to fix your plane. Slide around, use violent rams to solve problems, and flatten annoying islanders. You'll also somehow get roped into pirate duels, racing, and even an intern detective gig.

4504940.title: Pharaoh's Secrets
4504940.short_description: Explore Ancient Egypt in search of its lost treasures. A relaxing low poly 3D spot-the-difference game set across beautiful, hand-crafted scenes.

4504950.title: One in a Thousand: Clover Book
4504950.short_description: A minimalist and relaxing hidden-object game about searching for the four-leaf clover in a clover patch. Go back to your youth and collect all variants in your collection book.

4505030.title: Gene Jackpot
4505030.short_description: A roguelike deckbuilder where you gamble with your own genes. Every card played mutates your body. Every defeat triggers unpredictable mutations. Become a different monster every run. Losing has never been this fun.

4505090.title: BFM 26
4505090.short_description: A deep football management simulation where you control tactics, transfers, training, and club development. Build your squad, outsmart rivals, and lead your team to glory.

4505110.title: DeadNot
4505110.short_description: DeadNot is a first-person psychological horror game where you the terminals to navigate, scan points of interest, manage camera feeds, and piece together what went wrong at this site. But you are not alone. A hostile entity stalks you. Don't look at it for too long.

4505120.title: Director of Management: Football Club
4505120.short_description: The deepest football management sim ever built. 577 territories. 15,000+ competitions. 20,000+ clubs. 500,000+ players and staff. Men's and women's football simulated equally. No microtransactions. Steam Deck ready.

4505250.title: PyroKite
4505250.short_description: Devour the swarm. In this vivid arcade torch 'em up, you play as a dragon growing its tail to expand its firepower. Dodge bullet-hell patterns, wield elemental magic, and slay massive mythic bosses!

4505290.title: Chessillo
4505290.short_description: A roguelike deck-building tactical game fused with chess. Choose a cursed Prince, collect pieces with magical abilities, and conquer three acts of boss encounters where the board itself fights against you.

4505350.title: Pogopa
4505350.short_description: In this funny & unconventional physics-based platformer, you help Grandpa conquer a treacherous mountain to rescue his granddaughter. Master the Pogo3000 and Grandma’s Balloon Helmet to reach the summit!

4505460.title: Creature Feature
4505460.short_description: A cursed arcade cartridge. A bullet heaven that remembers. Fight through waves of glitched creatures, evolve 20 weapons, hunt ARPG loot, and try not to notice when the game starts watching you back. The deeper you go, the more the corruption spreads.

4505500.title: MergePiece: Merge pixels into masterpieces
4505500.short_description: MergePiece is a pixel-merging puzzle game themed around world-famous paintings. On the board, every color fragment originates from a real masterpiece — your mission is to merge them back into the complete artwork.

4505520.title: こちら株式会社魔王軍接待課
