4505520.short_description: You’re the Demon Lord, but instead of "defeating" the Hero, you’re providing "hospitality"?! A Command Battle × Management Sim where you play as a middle manager hosting the Hero’s party to ensure they leave happy and satisfied.

4505530.title: Lucia Journey
4505530.short_description: A psychological story-driven RPG where your choices shape Lucia’s fate. Confront distorted inner voices in turn-based hallucination battles and navigate a fragile mind where reality slowly begins to fracture.

4505600.title: Final Stand Waves
4505600.short_description: Defend your tower against endless hordes of zombies in this 2D top-down game.

4505670.title: Hopfinity
4505670.short_description: Grapple to infinity as Hop! Ascend endless caves, castles & skies, dodging explosive Bombarders in this pixel-perfect vertical action-platformer!

4505680.title: The Unfamiliars
4505680.short_description: A rainy night, unfamiliar figures outside your mobile home and the growing feeling that something is terribly wrong.

4505730.title: Gunmetal Rails
4505730.short_description: A roguelite bullet hell where you build trains — that's right, TRAINS. Add carts, bolt on guns, stack upgrades, and see if you can survive. Playstyle? Up to you.

4505760.title: Polter Geists
4505760.short_description: Welcome to Ohm, a dead world where you collect spectral nightmares instead of cute animals. Throw coffins to capture Geists, master deep turn based combat, and explore a beautifully unhinged goth punk RPG where even the skeletons have terrible customer service.

4505860.title: Jax Vs. The World
4505860.short_description: Jax Vs. The World is a life sim turn based RPG about overcoming life's struggles. You play as Jax on a mission from a mysterious source. On this mission you come across obstacles and trials you might find in real life. In a world based on Birmingham AL. Can you accomplish mission impossible?

4506040.title: Super Disposition
4506040.short_description: A physics-driven action adventure where you roll, fly, slice, and break your way through a mysterious alien world featuring arcade-style combat, bullet-hell encounters, puzzles, and destructible environments.

4506060.title: Scrap Syndicate
4506060.short_description: Build, battle, and salvage your way to the top of the food chain in this gritty tactical auto-battler. Command a roster of customizable mechs, fuse illegal contraband parts to upgrade your stats, and survive the brutal Gauntlet. If your bot gets trashed? Scrap it, rebuild, and fight again.

4506110.title: Escape From Ground
4506110.short_description: Endless jumping adventure with procedural levels, power-ups, enemies, and unique biomes.

4506120.title: Animal Husbandry
4506120.short_description: Manage a charming bakery and bond with quirky neighbors by day in this unique social simulation. But as night falls, the cozy atmosphere shifts into a chilling survival horror experience. Explore a mysterious island, solve puzzles, and find your way out before the sun rises.

4506130.title: Rapid Fire Girls - BeachQueen -
4506130.short_description: With curiosity and determination, you repeatedly press buttons to reveal the illustrations hidden beneath the covers.

4506170.title: Breath of Digital God
4506170.short_description: Digital God breathes on its own. Experience the world's first breath-based rhythm odyssey. Master the original Triple-Input mechanics: Hold [SPACE] to Freeze the void, use [CTRL] to Reverse digital laws, and [SHIFT] to Boost through the chaos. Can you survive 7 Chakras and unlock the GODMODE?

4506190.title: CastleArena
4506190.short_description: Castle Arena is a classic real-time strategy (RTS) game where you defend your own castle while aiming to conquer the enemy's. Master the rock-paper-scissors dynamics between Warriors, Mages, and Knights, and command your troops with intuitive tap-and-drag controls.

4506200.title: InnKeeper
4506200.short_description: Serve customers by day. Fight the undead by night. Run your medieval tavern, upgrade your gear, and try to keep both your business and your life alive.

4506210.title: Report: Installation of Anchors to Sublimate FRs
4506210.short_description: A 3D Action Adventure: explore a rural island in Japan and defeat the enemies in the bottom of labyrinths.

4506220.title: Sly Apes
4506220.short_description: A retro PSX survival horror game for 1–4 players. Navigate randomly generated maps while hidden apes lurk in the shadows. Spot the threat, run, hide, or slam the door. One wrong move, and you're dead.

4506350.title: Normal Dev Guy - Inside Kenney World
4506350.short_description: Norman is just a regular game dev who jumped inside his own game to test it — and now he must fix bugs in the most unexpected way possible: by playing crazy minigames from within the code!

4506510.title: Again!? Yakuza: Reclaim Power, Interrogate Bodies, Subjugate
4506510.short_description: A point-and-click detective visual novel with a noir atmosphere, where everyone has their own interests! 5 girls, over 140 images, and complete freedom of action! Every playthrough is unique! The clan Boss was kicked out of his usual place? Well, it's just reason to remind everyone why he's the Boss

4506600.title: Orbital Decay
4506600.short_description: A catastrophic orbital decay threatens the station, and your math skills are the only defense. Solve rapid-fire math problems to calculate thrust vectors, stabilize the orbit, and climb the global leaderboards in this high-stakes educational simulation.

4506630.title: Praise To The Moon
4506630.short_description: PRAISE TO THE MOON- It is a Metroidvania, based on Momodora, Castlevania, and Souls-like games, with ARPG systems

4506710.title: Hentai Nitro
4506710.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Nitro, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4506900.title: Float Lord
4506900.short_description: Float. Fail. Fall. Repeat. Climb higher with precision or luck. Push yourself away from solid ground, avoid spikes, collect colorful fruits and veggies, and unlock silly skins. One pop and your hard-earned progress tumbles down.

4506920.title: Catapult Legend
4506920.short_description: A physics-based medieval destruction game. Build up power by increasing tension and release at the perfect moment. Hit multiple targets with pebbles or crush castles with massive boulders.

4506940.title: Spinnopoly
4506940.short_description: One reel away from glory. Starting with a 1 in 178 billion chance, some people would have given up by now. Your whole life you have always been a loser, is it gonna be different this time?

4506990.title: MYMEMORY
4506990.short_description: While having fun over the summer, Camille, a girl who can manipulate memories, suddenly encounters the SCP Foundation and is classified as SCP-9831. Relive her memories and uncover what the Foundation is hiding. Can you help Camille escape and get reality onto a different path?

4507020.title: Oopstacle Course
4507020.short_description: Oopstacle Course is a chaotic 3D multiplayer party platformer where you and other players build the obstacle course step by step every round and then try to reach the finish to gain points.

4507060.title: Vanguard Valiants
4507060.short_description: Reclaim the lands taken by the Zahar. Build and lead armies to recover the villages seized by the enemy. Acquire better weapons and manage your soldiers throughout the liberation campaign.

4507150.title: Micrographia
4507150.short_description: A brutal, surrealist top-down shooter set in a nameless city where reality unravels. Something is killing people in their dreams, nightmares are becoming real, and the apocalypse inches closer. Face relentless enemies in this horrific fight for survival.

4507390.title: 让你先跑40米
4507390.short_description: 🐼 40-Meter Axe: Stretch & Smash! Play a panda with a giant extendable axe. Hold to grow, release to slay monsters from any distance! Idle rewards, crazy weapons, and friend challenges. One-tap mayhem!

4507420.title: Kamisama's Diary:Tokoyo
4507420.short_description: This’s a story in a fantastical Japanese world. You will follow the perspective of Fushimi Kuu to gradually piece together the fragmented memories, overcome difficulties on the way and gradually uncover the truth within him. In this inferable story, can you discover the unexpected truth behind it?

4507440.title: 碰碰碰 BOP&POP
4507440.short_description: 《BOP&POP》 is a match-3 deck-building roguelike all about opening blind boxes! Collect adorable Slimes, execute exciting combos on a 3x3 board, and use unique abilities to manipulate the game. Strategize your moves or embrace the gamble to collect legendary Slimes and unlock an ultimate OP mode!

4507480.title: Luca: Dragon Hunter
4507480.short_description: Become Luca, a young dragon hunter, and battle powerful dragons in a stylized 2.5D action RPG. Master weapons, grow stronger, and uncover the secrets behind the dragons threatening the world.

4507520.title: GoblinLord
4507520.short_description: This Game is intended for Adults only Play as a Skittle Goblin Possessed by the DarkLord and Help Restore the DarkLords power and Dominion over the Realm, Use your Fellow Goblins Chained from Dark Energy as weapons , Defeat the Monster girls, and their Queens and Dominate them!

4507620.title: Crazy odyssey
4507620.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Free To Play
4507620.short_description: "Crazy odyssey" it's a super hilarious and relaxing idle ARPG game that combines wacky storylines, addictive art style, and classic Diablo-style gameplay, allowing you to laugh your way through the martial arts world!

4507670.title: Screen Fish:Desk Water World
4507670.short_description: Feeling Exhausted? Turn your desktop into a cute cartoon water world. Collect and raise lovely fish, decorate with corals and shells. Feed and play with them easily. Relaxing idle game, they grow in the background. A warm digital haven to ease your stress and tiredness.

4507690.title: Blind Touch VR
4507690.short_description: Experience blindness in VR. Navigate a world of darkness using your guide cane, immerse yourself in a sensory journey through sound and touch.

4507750.title: Mystologia: The Witch & The Noisy Forest
4507750.short_description: Survive waves of relentless bullets and defeat your enemies. Can you resolve this incident in peace and find the colleague you’ve been searching for?

4507910.title: Crown of the Nile: Cleopatra's Choice
4507910.short_description: Step into the role of Cleopatra in this historical otome game! Entangled in deadly political intrigue, you must romance and outwit Roman titans to survive. Your choices shape history. Will you succumb to fate's venomous bite, or rise to forge a new empire?

4507920.title: Cloud Infusion
4507920.short_description: Cloud Infusion is a casual social multiplayer game centered on free, rule-free play. With warm minimalist hand-drawn art and a unique “IV drip” recovery mechanic, it delivers a lighthearted, fun multiplayer experience that embodies gentle courage toward life, companionship, and overcoming hardship.

4507970.title: Sweet AI
4507970.short_description: Sweet AI - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around artificial intelligence. It depicts the daily lives of five pretty and adorable AI girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girl's photos in the gallery.

4508000.title: Hakurei Clicker
4508000.short_description: What I want your help with is repairing the shrine, getting rid of those pesky fairies... and, of course, putting plenty of money into the offertory box! Gather and combine relics from over 100 different types, and earn tons of money! You can even play it as a desktop mascot.

4508050.title: Undead Yet Again
4508050.short_description: You are patient zero. Punch humans. Spread the undead. Mutate your zombie horde into an unstoppable vessel of apocalypse. And then do it all over again.

4508060.title: Undead Tide: Light's Defense
4508060.short_description: Relaxed strategic bullet hell survival, defending against endless undead legions! A roguelite bullet hell shooter that blends hero development, talent builds, and weapon combinations, supporting multiple playstyles and strategies!

4508120.title: Hex Judge
4508120.short_description: Interrogate villagers, uncover their secrets, and decide who will burn before sunset.

4508270.title: Way to Hell 2 New era
4508270.short_description: FPS shooter sequel where mission is to kill big bloody monster and then destroy doors and find pentagrams in different levels

4508300.title: Idlings
4508300.short_description: A charming idle colony sim about digging through caves, rescuing lost Idlings, and rebuilding an underground world. Think Terraria meets Lemmings, with a little Oxygen Not Included — or perhaps Rusty’s Retirement underground.

4508380.title: Hentai Clicker: Amy is streaming
4508380.short_description: 🔥 Hentai Clicker: Amy is streaming Collect ❤️, unlock daring outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Meet Amy, a brilliant soldier who always follows orders… and loves attention!

4508480.title: Finisher
4508480.short_description: Fight endless waves of robots in a brutal factory combat test. Master a fast-paced melee system with punches, kicks, aerial attacks, sword strikes, dodging, blocking, and parrying. Push through increasingly difficult waves and record how far you can go.

4508520.title: Market Cashier Simulator
4508520.short_description: Run your own supermarket! Serve customers, and manage your store day by day.

4508590.title: Crafting in Berxley
4508590.short_description: Craft, trade and grow your business in the charming kingdom of Berxley. Test your crafting skills using more than 180 blueprints and 250 items. Buy properties and storage to bring more items into each level or sell them for profit in the world economy. Become the master craftsman the kingdom needs

4508610.title: 翻翻卡
4508610.genre: Action, Casual, Strategy, Free To Play
4508610.short_description: 翻翻卡是一款动作竞技3D卡牌游戏 玩家将扮演各种角色与其他玩家或boss进行趣味对战 自由组建属于自己的卡组，自由匹配对战 每回合双放各8张随从总计16张随从卡随机分散在战斗区域内 双方玩家轮流扇卡，随从卡初始正面朝上，翻转或出界视为退场 不同的扇卡姿势，距离远近，随从技能，行动卡特效都会影响扇卡结果！ 最后保留至少一张卡的是赢家！ 赢者不止获胜，更可以永久抽走败方上阵卡组中的一张卡，收为自己的战利品！ 完全还原童年的紧张刺激，等你来玩！
developers: 上海万宿朝元网络科技有限公司
publishers: 上海万宿朝元网络科技有限公司

4508710.title: The Last Letter
4508710.short_description: The Last Letter is a short VHS-style horror game about a film student who receives mysterious letters containing coordinates that lead to a house deep in the forest, where the truth about his past awaits.

4511130.title: Sad Virus Castle
4511130.short_description: Sad Virus is back in new walking simulation version. Now mission to find beer bottles in castle themed area

4511290.title: Stack Chaos: Alien Express
4511290.short_description: A physics-based arcade game where you pilot a UFO dropping possessed horror objects to build impossible towers. Swing the pendulum, time the drop, pray it doesn't collapse. 400+ objects, 11 game modes, and a sarcastic goblin that roasts your every move.

4511370.title: 非凡仙途
4511370.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Massively Multiplayer, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play
4511370.short_description: 天命已现，等你来战！独特的碰撞战斗玩法，轻操作、重策略——胜负取决于战前的排兵布阵。你可以自由搭配神将阵容，激活强力羁绊组合，体验从强力击退流到法师爆发流的千变玩法。 齐天大圣、哪吒、关羽、诸葛亮、共工等神话历史名人齐聚。通过多维养成打造神兵、唤醒神器、抓捕山海异兽，全方位提升战力。深入万象幻境探险，或在斗法大会中与天下英杰一决高下。 《非凡仙途》融合中国古典名著与上古传说，既适合休闲放置，也能满足策略钻研的深度需求。即刻踏上仙途，书写你的神话战纪！

4511460.title: Beneath Cloudvein
4511460.short_description: Beneath Cloudvein is a short story-driven RPG set in a small hand-crafted fantasy world. Investigate a missing dwarven mining expedition, meet the inhabitants of the Plateau, and shape the fate of its people through your choices.

4511600.title: ゼロから始まる終わりの村／The Village of the End Starting from Zero
4511600.short_description: A sandbox slow-life game x idle game! A book inn management SLG! Surrounded by books, you can catch bugs, fish, work in the fields, and even farm! Craft items to raise your inn rank to ★5 and advance your romance with the heroine! A relaxing and cozy game you can play in your spare time!

4511700.title: Femboy Wants To Be Mayor
4511700.short_description: Gather Your Crew, Win the Election! This isn't just a battle of ballots; it's a fight for freedom. Stand against Valeria’s corrupt system alongside your loyal team

4511710.title: Hus: The 4-Row Mancala
4511710.short_description: Hus: The 4-Row Mancala brings this traditional Mancala variant to the screen. Play locally with friends, challenge a bot, or compete online against others. With cross-platform support for Windows, Linux, and Android, you can play flexibly across multiple devices.

4511810.title: Idle Slot Machine
4511810.short_description: Build slot machines, automate them with monkeys, stop gorillas and eagles, unlock upgrades, earn more money, and grow your own chaotic idle empire.

4511830.title: Little Stronger
4511830.short_description: Little Stronger is a chill top-down pixel action RPG where you collect resources, craft better gear, and level up step by step. Explore colorful areas and challenge increasingly powerful bosses as you grow stronger with every fight.

4511850.title: The Great Beyond
4511850.short_description: Defeat the onslaught of aliens by building your own moon base, placing & upgrading tower defences, managing units, and mining resources!

4512010.title: Auction House
4512010.short_description: A fantasy economy simulator and idle crafting game. Build a massive guild of alternate characters to gather resources, refine epic gear, and manipulate a fluctuating AI-driven Auction House. Chase rare multicraft procs, monopolize the markets, and watch your gold go to the moon!

4512120.title: Hentai Remedy
4512120.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Remedy, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4512130.title: Sanguis OS
4512130.short_description: Sanguis OS is a dark, claustrophobic UI-based horror simulation. Take control of a blood-fueled drilling machine descending into the 9 layers of Hell. Manage engine heat, harvest demons for fuel, and fight off corrupting demonic malware before your system crashes and the hull is breached.

4512190.title: ZrOth
4512190.short_description: Use your resources to capture locations in this management game. Each location will give you different resources and effects. Create your own build to gather as many resources as possible to pay ZrOth’s tribute, but be careful, he’s getting greedier and greedier.

4512260.title: Neon Cowboy
4512260.short_description: A retro 2D platformer based around the story of Starletta's debut album "Neon Cowboy". Travel out west, defeat enemies with your tears, and fight for true love-it's out there. A world where 80s nostalgia and country live together to make THE Neon Cowboy come to life!

4512320.title: Stonecall
4512320.short_description: Stonecall is a top-down roguelike autoshooter where you must stand still to attack. Descend into the Stone Vault, fight awakened stone golems, and craft powerful relic synergies. Defeat sentinel bosses guarding each floor and uncover the vault's secrets.

4512410.title: Alchemic Apothecary
4512410.short_description: Alchemic Apothecary is a 3D first person singleplayer medieval market-simulator where the player has its own apothecary shop that sells alchemical potions or poisons and inscription scrolls or tomes.

4512440.title: Legendum
4512440.short_description: Rise from meagre peasant to legendary hero or forge a path entirely your own. Each life is a story formed of your deeds. But time is precious; history forgets those who squander it. Experience satisfying auto-battler combat, deep character progression, and a narrative that unfolds across lifetimes.

4512470.title: Bug Band
4512470.short_description: you’re a musician who is also a bug, and it's time to chase your dreams.

4512620.title: Eternal Quest: Ascended
4512620.short_description: An idle action RPG with absurd mechanical depth. Build your character, watch him fight, optimize, rinse and repeat!

4512740.title: Teckel Adventure
4512740.short_description: Play as Luna, a brave dachshund, and embark on a 2D platforming adventure full of secrets, enemies, and challenges to recover your favorite ball. Explore, overcome challenges, improve your scores, and discover multiple game modes to extend the adventure.

4512770.title: Once There Were Cats
4512770.short_description: Once There Were Cats is a game of wits and wizardry, an RPG where you fight enemies by solving trivia. Explore the harvest gothic world of The Gloam alongside your duck sidekick, gather powerful artifacts, and encounter mythical creatures on your way to the Quizards tower, where your fate awaits.

4512830.title: Null Root
4512830.short_description: A short roguelite / incremental game about protecting a network by destroying the invading nodes.

4512840.title: Break The Bank
4512840.short_description: Break The Bank is an incremental game about smashing piggy banks to get rich.

4512850.title: granny's toybox
4512850.short_description: draw your own characters and have them live and play with others in a vibrant toon city!

4512890.title: Forbidden Sight
4512890.short_description: FORBIDDEN SIGHT is a 4-player online co-op survival and stealth horror. Survive the Human Archive Museum (H.A.M)'s security system as you steal artifacts from different eras of human history, using electromagnetic waves to navigate through your heist.

4512970.title: Tiny Drift
4512970.short_description: TINY DRIFT is a unique retro-looking pixel-art drifting experience. Play in fast-paced, action-packed arenas, dodge everything that is thrown at you, and become the drift god. Charge through enemies, collect scraps, improve your driving skills, and try new styles of gameplay.

4513010.title: Goblin Quest III
4513010.short_description: After being brought back to life, you become the Warmaster, master of the Eben, and begin your quest to dominate everything. The Forest is just the beginning.

4513050.title: GODS OF VOLLEYBALL
4513050.short_description: A timing-based arcade volleyball game with martial arts flair! No player positioning—just perfect execution as you serve, spike, and block through stage-based matches. One fixed team, colorful characters, and hilarious cartoon violence.

4513060.title: Yandere Virus
4513060.short_description: An online co-op horror game for up to 4 players. Play solo or with your friends to collect Platonic Pumpkins and save your precious friend infected by the terrifying Yandere Virus.

4513090.title: MythGotchi
4513090.short_description: Upgrade your home. Go on adventures. Defend against demons. Challenge mini games. Go Fishing. Train and Fight.

4513120.title: Immortal Faces
4513120.short_description: Challenge your memory, test your nerves, and immerse yourself in a world where to forget is to die. Are you ready to look into the faces of the immortals and remember them forever?

4513140.title: Mythic Manager
4513140.genre: Indie, RPG, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4513140.short_description: The front office sports experience — but for an MMORPG guild. Scout talent, manage your roster, win arena tournaments, build raid teams, and climb the rankings one boss kill at a time.

4513150.title: Built the End
4513150.short_description: Harvest resources, build and upgrade towers, and defend your base against escalating waves of robotic enemies in this resource management turn-based tower defense. Use an arsenal of unique towers and their upgrades against the multitudes of different robots.

4513160.title: Toddler Tumble
4513160.short_description: A colorful party platformer where tiny daredevils race, bounce, and tumble through gigantic playrooms packed with pillows, ramps, spinning toys, and ridiculous obstacles.

4513210.title: Maybe It Meant Something
4513210.short_description: Platformer journeying a nightmare of meaning.

4513270.title: Myth-OS
4513270.short_description: Step into a limitless, genre-agnostic sandbox governed by a dynamic AI Game Master. MythOS combines deep Grand Strategy with Tabletop RPG freedom. Command autonomous factions, manipulate a simulated economy, and explore endlessly nested maps where your words reshape a living universe.

4513330.title: Paddy Slide
4513330.short_description: Slide your way to a lush green harvest in Paddy Slide, a cozy puzzle game with endless levels. Swipe to plant seedlings in the water grid, but watch out—you won't stop sliding until you hit an obstacle! Find the optimal path to minimize waste, earn perfect ratings, and unlock cute skins.

4513360.title: Zorbo
4513360.short_description: Step into the ruthless world of Zorbo. Every corner is full of danger, and every enemy brings a different challenge. Improve your skills, set your strategy, and survive against smart enemies. Discover secrets, choose your weapon, and write your own legend. Are you ready?

4513380.title: Idle AI Factory
4513380.short_description: Dive into the world of machine learning! Idle AI Architecture is a node-based automation incremental game where you harvest resources and train neural networks. Manage your economy, optimize your grid, and automate your way to a multi-million dollar tech empire.

4513390.title: We Were Here Before
4513390.short_description: The frontier does not want to be settled. A narrative roguelite where your choices build a settlement, shape its story, and seal its fate. Every run ends. Every obituary tells a story only you lived.

4513410.title: Yuki-Onna Checker
4513410.short_description: ❄️ Yuki-Onna loves cold temperatures. Be careful not to overheat your PC while making her happy! A desktop mascot that’s perfect to keep you company while gaming or working. ❄️

4513420.title: Dreaming Briar Rose -Demon's Temptation-
4513420.short_description: Saved from a near-fatal accident by a demon, you must spend two weeks recovering in the Demon’s Realm. Surrounded by eight dangerous yet alluring demons, your choices will decide whether you return to the human world—or choose a future in theirs.

4513510.title: Beefy Boi
4513510.short_description: Beefy Boi is a job simulator horror. Acquire the ingredients, and evade your boss. GET BACK TO WORK!!!

4513520.title: Atomic Particle Engine
4513520.short_description: Atomic Particle Engine (APE) is an interactive particle sandbox and music-reactive visualizer. Create explosive particle effects, generative patterns, and abstract visuals that respond to your input and audio in real time.

4513530.title: Dino Desolation
4513530.short_description: Dino Desolation is a modular-story-driven open-world game set in a non-sci-fi future after the collapse of civilization. It will be continued through a lot of small DLCs to have an always further continuing story. We are aiming for adding new stories, places and characters to Chapter I for years.

4513540.title: Pure College Football
4513540.short_description: Build your college football dynasty and compete for control. Master NIL recruiting, develop your coaching staff, and manage demanding boosters. Play solo or battle in online dynasties with up to 32 real players.

4513560.title: Balloon & You
4513560.short_description: One touch..one mistake..BOOM! Do you dare to carry a balloon to the end without it touching ANYTHING? First-person perspective: precise physical touches + extreme parkour. If it touches any surface..it explodes and you're back to the start! Patience, precision, and nerves of steel.

4513590.title: JumpLia
4513590.short_description: JumpLia is a platform action game. Lia, who has fallen into an unknown place, must escape. Use jumping and repeated climbing to make your way out. Explore a gloomy, eerie environment and carefully find the right path upward.

4513640.title: YGGDRA: SURVIVOR
4513640.short_description: "You want ME to save the world? I'm just a convenience store part-timer!" A black tower threatens Earth. Summon 30 legendary heroes to climb 100 floors! Roguelite defense meets bullet-hell survival. Command your champions from zero to hero!

4513650.title: YGGDRA: SPIN
4513650.short_description: The World Tree has withered, leaving the world to the mercy of luck. Master the 'Fate Roulette,' collect Yggdra's heroines as symbols, and spin to destroy your enemies! It's not just gambling; it's calculated strategy. Dive into this unique Roguelite Deck-building Auto-battler!

4513660.title: YGGDRA: DECKBUILDING
4513660.short_description: The World Tree is corrupted, and the Nine Worlds tremble. Assemble your deck with 50+ unique Valkyries and march toward Yggdrasil's heart! Only your strategy can prevent destruction. Experience Roguelite Deck-building meets Norse Mythology in Yggdrasil: Fragments of the World Tree."

4513700.title: Glider Sim Lite – Soaring Simulator
4513700.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Massively Multiplayer, Racing, Simulation, Sports, Free To Play
4513700.short_description: The sky is yours. Fly hang gliders, paragliders, paramotors, speed-wings, and ultralight trikes across the entire globe - powered by real Google Earth terrain. Tune the weather, fly solo or with friends, and experience flight the way it actually feels.

4513730.title: Unsettled : NIGHT SHIFT
4513730.short_description: Unsettled: NIGHT SHIFT is a horror game about the terrors of daily life experienced by someone who has moved to a new city to live alone.

4513880.title: Could You Be a Gal Master?
4513880.short_description: An introverted girl who is bad at games, an artist who struggles with drawing human anatomy, a wealthy young lady who wants to play visual novels for the rest of her life, and a younger sister trying her best to understand what anime is—you will play their protagonist and start a romantic comedy!

4513900.title: Ava Loveless
4513900.short_description: Fictional short story set in the United Kingdom under a Gothic/Steampunk aesthetic, where a young woman contemplates a discovery that could potentially change the world.

4513950.title: phase knight
4513950.short_description: In this cyber-knight action RPG, you are Renn Kale—part human, part machine, blessed with divine blood. Master three combat forms, slash through the war-torn galaxy, and decide the fate of flesh, steel, and data. The revolution begins with your blade

4514090.title: PSYCHOBYL
4514090.short_description: Survive the irradiated Zone. Raid hostile territories, loot rare gear, craft powerful equipment, and upgrade your bunker in this dark atmospheric idle RPG. Die, undergo Genesis, and return stronger. Turn-based combat, deep prestige layers, and endless progression — the Zone demands evolution.

4514100.title: Ally Me Or Vore
4514100.short_description: You are the giant. Every choice matters. Devour, slay, or show mercy — but choose wisely. One wrong move could cost you everything. A survival simulation with moral consequences.

4514120.title: Scenic
4514120.short_description: A relaxing pixel-art escape room game where you uncover hidden secrets and solve reality-bending puzzles. Interact with the environment and get lost in its liminal beauty.

4514140.title: CHEW YOUR FOOD
4514140.short_description: It didn't chew you properly. Escape its stomach by crawling, solving puzzles, listening carefully, and avoiding monsters in this horror dungeon-crawler.

4514270.title: Bust Evolution: Bunnygirl VIP Paizuri！
4514270.short_description: Merge small chips → endless bust inflation! Sexy bunny girl's breasts swell bigger and bigger until VIP massage unlocks! Slide your finger for the softest, hottest breast massage, Live2D eyes follow you, jazz + exclusive moans hit your soul. The ultimate remedy to release stress anytime!

4514310.title: MOOSA: Dirty Fate
4514310.short_description: A fierce action game set in 17th-century Korea during an age of famine and chaos. Fight as a fallen warrior using sword and bow to battle demons, corrupt factions, and colossal creatures from Korean folklore.

4514390.title: Singulost
4514390.short_description: Singulost is an exploratory interplanetary adventure. Explore forgotten worlds, pilot a spaceship, solve puzzles and uncover the mystery of the most ancient civilization that was here before you.

4514620.title: Midnight Matinee
4514620.short_description: A PSX-inspired horror game set during a seemingly normal night at the movies. You sit down in a quiet theater, expecting nothing more than a film and some peace. At first everything feels ordinary, but during the film something begins to feel… wrong. Do you dare to stay until the credits roll?

4514660.title: Satan's Fall
4514660.short_description: Satan has fallen. Now fight your way back up. A brutal top-down bullet hell roguelite where you play as the Devil himself. Upgrade your arsenal, unlock demonic powers, and face relentless hordes of Heaven's finest. Apparently, running Hell isn't as easy as it looks.

4514780.title: I WILL BE THERE: Remastered Edition
4514780.short_description: The definitive version of the beloved post-apocalyptic road trip. Fully remastered visuals, redesigned soundtrack, complete gamepad support. Tyler's journey begins again.

4514860.title: Weidengrund
4514860.short_description: Weidengrund is a meditative medieval village diorama builder woven into a living, breathing, painterly landscape. Snap together uniquely detailed Fachwerk architecture, design organic paths that wind through windswept meadows, and tend to your hamlet as it grows into a tranquil sanctuary.

4514880.title: Hyperlane Highway
4514880.short_description: VR roguelike meets endless arcade shooter with a new way to control and feel the movement. Lean and tilt your head to surf through neon hyperspace highways at lightspeed. Dual-wield energy weapons, blast rogue robots, and explore crazy upgrade combos. Die, unlock new sponsor cards, and ride again.

4514890.title: Moment Hunter
4514890.short_description: Test your timing and precision in Moment Hunter. Watch the scene carefully, find the perfect moment, and take the shot. Easy to learn, hard to master.

4514910.title: Maidendawn: A Heroine's Tale
4514910.short_description: Rise from obscurity and oppression. Unearth secrets best left buried. Become the salvation of your kingdom.

4514920.title: THORNSPELL
4514920.short_description: Craft a magical garden, trigger chain effects and score big numbers to win! THORNSPELL is a deckbuilding and gardenbuilding roguelike where you’ll use the power of your garden to fight enemies. Will you be able to dispel the corruption that spreads through the forest?

4514930.title: The Undercut: Racing Manager
4514930.short_description: Circuits come and go. Sponsors rise and fall. Every season reshuffles the deck. A retro motorsport management sim with physics-driven races, procedurally generated tracks, and a dynamic world that never plays the same way twice.

4515000.title: Injection
4515000.short_description: Injection is a first person puzzle horror game where you find yourself in an experiment you never signed up for, and the only way forward is to inject yourself with a variety of serums that change how you interact with the massive factory you must escape from.

4515070.title: Wrispell
4515070.short_description: Wrispell is a side-scrolling 3D magic action game where players combine runes to create spells. Play as the apprentice mage Lirabera, explore a collapsing world, collect runes, battle magical disasters, and solve puzzles. Discover new spell combinations and develop your own unique magic style.

4515080.title: Fantastical Maze
4515080.short_description: Navigate the maze and find your way out. Find keys to open doors of the same color and push deeper into the labyrinth.

4515180.title: Hentai Clicker: Alice is streaming
4515180.short_description: 🍰 Hentai Clicker: Alice is streaming Collect ❤️, unlock delicious outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Meet Alice, a playful pastry chef who knows exactly how to keep her audience coming back for more!

4515240.title: Heart of Ural
4515240.short_description: Heart of Ural is a pixel rhythm RPG based on the ancient epic Ural-Batyr and Bashkir myths. This is a deep story with many difficult decisions and unexpected twists, humor and drama. In this game, EVERYONE remembers what you did before.

4515250.title: Haydn In Plain Sight
4515250.short_description: Dive into a cozy hidden object adventure to save a fading sun! Travel through time to explore the quirky, historic worlds of legendary classical composers. Play as two conductors, find hidden items, and gather lost instruments to bring real music back to the world in Haydn in Plain Sight

4515290.title: GoblinChess
4515290.short_description: GoblinChess is a new type of chess game where we introduce ten different magical cards to the gameplay, and some chaos if you want. You can play online or against the built in robot.

4515350.title: Bullets & BlackJack
4515350.short_description: Local-multiplayer rogue-like based off blackjack. Gameplay focused on fun flowing platforming and combat.

4515440.title: The Final Chamber
4515440.short_description: The Final Chamber is a top-down psychological horror game focused on exploration and narrative discovery. Investigate an abandoned psychological recovery facility hidden in the mountains, uncover its disturbing past, and face the silent figure that seems to be waiting for you in the dark.

4515450.title: Hentai Onsen
4515450.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Onsen, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

4515470.title: Road to Brighton
4515470.short_description: Fight your way from London to Brighton in this retro arcade beat’em up inspired by the 1964 Mods and Rockers riots.

4515850.title: Pixel City
4515850.short_description: A fully pixelated city? Here, you take on the role of a penniless character, embarking on your life adventure starting in a rental house. You will try to survive, purchase, and interact ...And what else will you encounter??

4515870.title: GRIMOIRE - The Lost Ritual
4515870.short_description: “On the unseen side of everyday life, a story begins.”

4515890.title: Free Solo
4515890.short_description: A physics based climbing game about attempting to climb a very tall mountain while managing the pump in your arms. Climb through handcrafted routes while learning the mechanics and picking yourself up after you fall.

4515920.title: BABKA-TERROR
4515920.short_description: You are a real estate agent whose job is to determine which elderly woman is an ordinary seller and which one is a scammer granny.

4515950.title: Pulslink
4515950.short_description: Pulslink is a strategy tower defense with Roguelite building. Drag cables to route pulse energy to towers, design circuit networks, and defend the core against escalating enemy waves.

4516010.title: Slumber Craft
4516010.short_description: Slumber Craft is a narrative deckbuilder where your days shape your nights. Plan daily activities, build your deck, and combine cards into poker-style hands to raise Sleepiness, suppress racing Thoughts, and guide Chen Mo through 21 nights of deepening insomnia.

4516130.title: Second Chance at a Billion
4516130.short_description: A dark comedy roguelike set in the real stock market. Travel back in time armed with 25 years of hindsight, trade real historical assets, dodge the SEC, and try to turn $10,000 into $1 billion before you get arrested or fired.

4516150.title: 100 Swamp Cats
4516150.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4516160.title: 100 Panda Cats
4516160.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4516170.title: 100 Lunar Cats
4516170.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4516180.title: 100 Sherwood Cats
4516180.short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

4516190.title: My Beautiful Faraway, Please Don't Be Cruel To Me
4516190.short_description: A dreamlike, half-remembered void veiled in aching silence. Quietly wander through still environments, meet strange figures with their own stories to tell, read fragments of dialogue, uncover shrouded details, and solve opaque puzzles.

4516220.title: Asteroid Mining Empire
4516220.short_description: Asteroid Mining Empire is a sci-fi mining progression game where you harvest asteroid fields, earn credits, unlock upgrades, expand your ship and drone systems, and push toward powerful long-term rebirth progression as your small operation grows into a space industry.

4516370.title: It Breathes
4516370.short_description: First-person VHS horror game set in an abandoned Hungarian hospital. Hide, fight, or flee while working towards your only goal: to escape.

4516460.title: Miser King gamesforfarm
4516460.short_description: Help the greedy Miser King conquer the endless tower! He pursues treasures, regardless of danger, for he values ​​them more than his life. Jump over enemies, avoid deadly traps, and collect valuable items in this hardcore pixel platformer.

4516470.title: Deadset Darling
4516470.short_description: Deadset Darling is a mature, choice-driven adult visual novel about betrayal, desire, and starting over in a city that never forgives weakness.

4516540.title: Majestic Signs
4516540.short_description: Battle using your hands just like your favorite anime characters! Perform combat and cast a variety of spells using unique hand signs! Scream to power up! Learn the ultimate forms of magic! Defeat hordes of enemies, bosses and even your friends to solidify your place as the strongest wizard!

4516550.title: 112 Meters
4516550.short_description: The city has fallen. Rescue helicopters can’t land. Your only escape is reaching 112 meters but there are no buildings. Stack whatever you can find and climb before the infected catch you.

4516600.title: Quarry Kickin'
4516600.short_description: The Quarry's treasure is up for grabs in this fast-paced, physics-based party game! Compete in 2v2 action to collect and deposit the most gems. Kick bombs, sabotage your opponents and survive chaotic environments. When every second counts, can you emerge from the rubble as the richest team?

4516640.title: Megabait
4516640.short_description: A brutal top-down obstacle course where every second counts. Master precise movement to survive deadly hazard rooms, leave a bloody trail of your past mistakes, and uncover every secret on your path to 100% completion.

4516710.title: Solitaire Time Warp
4516710.short_description: Play solitaire card games, time travel and explore 100's of challenging levels!

4516770.title: Bloody Moon - First Fear
4516770.short_description: Survive the catacombs against a blind predator. A visceral, physics-driven horror game (Chaos Engine). Your panic is real : your hands physically tremble, you stumble when fleeing, and a snapped bone or loud breath brings death. Stay completely invisible to survive.

4516820.title: Tintoria
4516820.short_description: Explore a vibrant, colorful world where every corner hides a new challenge. Wield a magical brush to paint, transform, and interact with the environment while uncovering hidden secrets along the way.

4516840.title: Cataclyzm
4516840.short_description: A 2D arcade shoot 'em up forged in the age of fire, feedback and METAL! It's a fast, loud and unforgiving ride on an atomic warhead through a hellish concert of beer, bullets and riffs. Crank it up to eleven, and strap in for the ride!

4516880.title: Unusual Tales: After Bark
4516880.short_description: You, a simple dog named Mr Peanut, find yourself in a weird cabin full of secrets... Will you be able to warn the family of the dangers? A horror game filled with mystery!

4516890.title: Eclectic Deck
4516890.short_description: Eclectic Deck is a deckbuilder roguelike. Play cards to unlock combos, earn points, and win the game in a simple yet hard to master game.

4516900.title: Smile Protocol
4516900.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Simulation, Early Access
4516900.short_description: Smile Protocol is a fast-paced FPS survival game set in a locked-down facility. Clear waves, unlock doors, and survive the pressure as enemies keep coming.

4516990.title: ShardSpace
4516990.short_description: Shard Space is a minimalist strategy game. In the distant future, you awaken from a long slumber. Guided by a loyal lieutenant, you must rebuild your drone fleet and embark on a journey to uncover the ultimate truth of the universe.

4519280.title: Deep in the Fields
4519280.short_description: With no other option, you take a job as a farmhand on a remote ranch in the interior of Buenos Aires. But as time passes, you begin to uncover the dark secrets buried deep in the fields.

4519400.title: SPQR:Shadows of The Legion
4519400.short_description: Under the shadow of Rome’s lost legion, survival is only the beginning. Build your headquarters, manage scarce resources, and forge ruthless strategies. Every decision has a cost: become a legend or vanish into the dust of history.

4519430.title: Chess of Five Elements
4519430.short_description: The game is inspired by ancient Chinese concepts about five elements. In the game, a single tile may release up to five single tiles. A green tile means wood, and it releases red single tiles, which means wood generate fire. As fire restrains metal, a red tile can remove a while tile.

4519460.title: Operation: Black Genesis - The Immortal Trials
4519460.short_description: top-down co-op survival horror game where players deploy into a quarantined zone overrun by failed medical experiments. Fight terrifying creatures, explore ruined facilities, scavenge supplies, and work together to uncover the truth and secure the cure before the outbreak spreads.

4519490.title: Nyctophobia
4519490.short_description: Nyctophobia is a first person horror game where you play as a new motel worker who is afraid of the dark. As soon as you step into a dark area you start hallucinating scary faces, your goal is to survive your shift.

4519540.title: Investigation: Definitive Edition
4519540.short_description: Trapped between life and death, a troubled detective takes the most gruesome case of his life... now, you must help him explore the decaying halls of Ghillies Subway and escape what hunts him in the dark.

4519600.title: Scrap Battalion
4519600.short_description: A chaotic strategy autobattler where you draft units, build synergies, and unleash massive battles with bullets, rockets, tesla cannons, chickens, and industrial war machines.

4519750.title: Deep Space Merchant
4519750.short_description: Take command of a deep space trading outpost in this infinitely scaling, terminal-based economy simulator. Buy low, sell high, construct powerful station modules, manage trade fleets, and defend against deadly pirate raids. Can you build the wealthiest station in the galaxy?

4519820.title: Vanguard - Idle Auto Battler
4519820.short_description: An idle auto battler where your squad fights continuously while you optimize upgrades, trigger hero actives, and break through boss phases.

4519920.title: Unholy Roller
4519920.short_description: Unholy Roller is a bowling-inspired dungeon crawler where you play as the weapon. BONK and THWACK your way through a dungeon full of sentient pins, and build massive scores as you wreak havoc in style.

4519930.title: Clifton
4519930.short_description: You’re on holiday on a tropical island with your friends, but you find your tour guide DEAD on the beach, and someone on the island wants you to be next. Work together, search for materials and weapons to defend yourselves, build a raft and escape. Will you make it out alive?

4520010.title: Chef's Dogma
4520010.short_description: Chef’s Dogma is a Roguelike Turn-Based battler where you journey through the 7-layers of bean dip hell. Upgrade your team through Stats, Items, or ‘Entree’s creating even stronger foods. Experience a multitude of Play-styles, Enemies, and Locations to help the Chef ascend into purgatory…

4520070.title: Rockett Gear EX
4520070.short_description: Rockett Action. Rockett Speed. Rockett 2D Adventure. Rockett Gear EX is a fast-paced 2D retro action platformer inspired by classic mecha and arcade games. Experience intense combat, high-speed gameplay, and a nostalgic sci-fi atmosphere that pays tribute to the golden age of retro gaming.

4520390.title: 逆战勇士团
4520390.short_description: As a soul awakened in chaos, lead 17 heroes to revolt against the Dragon Empire. This SRPG blends tactics with Diablo-style loot. Conquer 31 battles, collect "Black Gold" gear, and break level limits. Every choice you make writes the final chapter of this epic redemption!

4520520.title: The Time After
4520520.short_description: A post-apocalyptic survival game with a focus on driving and third person shooting. Travel through open world locations on foot and in car while scavenging fuel, scrap, food, guns and ammo to continue the journey south and escape the killing heat. Learn how we ended up here as you journey,

4520650.title: 持镣铐者#735
4520650.short_description: 《The Shackles Holder #735》 is a female-oriented text-based game set in a steampunk world. On November 30, 1875, Police Chief Temis, known for his 100% case clearance rate, was transferred to the crime-ridden city of Nineveh.

4520720.title: Hentai World Bar
4520720.short_description: Relaxing puzzle game where you slide tiles to reveal beautiful girl artwork. Enjoy calming music, no time limits, and gradually challenging levels for a peaceful and satisfying gameplay experience.

4520940.title: Doom Survivor: Horde Rush
4520940.short_description: Bullet hell meets Survivor-like Roguelite! Battle endless zombie hordes as unique heroes. Combine talent trees with 11 weapons (dragon guns, laser rifles) and gear (masks/wings) for explosive fire, lightning, or summon builds. Unlock heroes, master dodge, and dominate the apocalypse!

4520960.title: IamMETEOR
4520960.short_description: Control a meteor and smash through endless waves of blocks in this fast-paced arcade brick breaker. Chase high scores as the game gets faster and more chaotic.

4520970.title: PinBall Escape
4520970.short_description: Navigate a celestial library in this roguelike vertical pinball adventure. Master agile flippers to overcome magical obstacles and reach new heights. Precision is everything in this high-stakes climb where one fall can reset your progress. Escape God's study!

4521110.title: The Polar Darkness
4521110.short_description: A slow-burning mystery set in the polar night of northern Finland. Investigate a missing child in an isolated village hiding an ancient secret beneath its church.

4521130.title: Eclipse
4521130.short_description: Sink into a gentle moonlit dream. Eclipse is a cozy, story-driven pixel RPG that blends cool-toned aesthetics with a warm, healing fairy tale. Wander the quiet subconscious, make friends with charming oddities, and find warmth in the shadows of fragmented memories.

4521140.title: Wriggle apple 4
4521140.short_description: Embark on a cosmic adventure with the worm! Solve space puzzles, avoid asteroid traps, and grow with each apple. Can you navigate the galaxy’s challenges and reach your goal?

4521270.title: Dealer's Doom
4521270.short_description: A single-player blackjack roguelike where every bet is a build choice and every floor rewrites the rules. Hit, stand, double, split, and insure your way through escalating bosses, brutal modifiers, and wildly synergetic runs.

4521280.title: Fogline protocol
4521280.short_description: randomized survivor locations, shifting fog density, and limited resources forcing quick decisions and risky pushes. Survive, extract, upgrade, and dive back in.

4521480.title: Election Train
4521480.short_description: A turn-based strategy card game where up to 4 players compete for votes across real-world maps. Play cards, control cities, dominate regions, and outsmart your rivals to win the election. 7 maps, 4 unique parties, and dynamic disaster events.

4521520.title: Greed Slash
4521520.short_description: Fast-paced stylized sword fighting game where timing and prediction decide every duel. Mirror your opponent’s attacks with precision parries and finish them with brutal cinematic finishers. Easy to learn, hard to master.

4521600.title: Popfall Arena
4521600.short_description: Popfall Arena is a fast-paced action arcade game set in an arena filled with colorful balloons. Pop the bouncing balloons, collect power-ups, and fight to survive for the highest score!

4521620.title: Deceptive Shadows: Final Case
4521620.short_description: A captive demon, a relentless detective, and a missing girl. In this top-down survival horror, interrogate a creature of the dark, piece together the clues, and outsmart its demonic mind games to uncover the truth.

4521650.title: Farm & Feast
4521650.short_description: Grow fresh ingredients and run your own little restaurant. Enjoy a peaceful day that stretches from field to table. Plan a fresh menu for a delightful day, keep your pantry stocked, and make your customers happy. Earn your own money and build your little world step by step.

4521690.title: Boot the Beet
4521690.short_description: Boot the Beet is a high-impact arcade brawler where the only thing between your harvest and a swarm of hungry aliens is a heavy steel toe. Forget guns and magic—this is about the raw stopping power of a well-placed kick.

4522040.title: SIGKILL
4522040.short_description: Whether you speak nmap or have never touched a terminal, SIGKILL meets you where you are. Multiple play modes. One living world powered by a simulation with four warring factions trained on historical events. Every hack has consequences.

4522110.title: Hentai Police Trio
4522110.short_description: Solve hentai puzzles and unlock uncensored anime police girls in a relaxing adult game.

4522130.title: KILL THEM ALL
4522130.short_description: A frantic, 3D top-down shooter where the gameplay loop constantly evolves as you rip cybernetic implants from your defeated bosses.

4522150.title: Crazy Caveman
4522150.genre: Action, Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
4522150.short_description: Become a caveman, survive by building, fishing, and hunting.

4522300.title: Lil Planet Explorer
4522300.short_description: A cozy idle game that lives on your desktop. Watch a tiny astronaut explore 84 alien planets, collect resources, befriend strange creatures, and uncover a mystery hidden among the stars. Three playthroughs. Three perspectives. One truth.

4522320.title: Meltdown Dropper
4522320.short_description: A dropper game designed to overload your senses. Spiral tunnels, neon patterns, and shifting environments challenge your perception as the descent grows faster and more chaotic with every level.

4522380.title: Realize in Peace
4522380.short_description: If we were to bring a loved one back to life as an AI, and then, for whatever reason, we had to let them go or part ways, would we be able to turn them off?

4522480.title: Slime Slayer
4522480.short_description: An idle clicker game with looter ARPG elements. Defeat slimes, collect hundreds of items, unlock talent trees, create unique skills, build powerful builds, and reach the highest floor!

4522500.title: Riding Shotgun
4522500.short_description: Riding Shotgun is an arcade car combat game. Players commandeer the Crimson Crucible -- driving and shooting across the Mojave mowing down hordes of relentless demons. Keep your wits about you to reach your destination; the City of Sin - Las Vegas.

4522520.title: 若诅咒以爱之名
4522520.short_description: A Denpa Bishoujo Psychological Horror Curio: A Visual Novel ❦ Mild Horror, Mild Suspense, and a Hint of Whimsical Madness ❦ We Hope You Find Your Own "Happy Ending" Among Multiple Conclusions ❦ A Major Plot Twist, Perhaps? ❦ Glimpse a sliver of truth in the liminal space between life and death.

4522530.title: Baize
4522530.short_description: Play classic card and board games with friends on any device. Host a game from your PC and invite others to join — no accounts needed for local play. Includes Hearts, Spades, Whist, Sevens, Gin Rummy, Backgammon, FreeCell, and more. Play against bots or with up to 8 players.

4522660.title: Futanari Mermaids
4522660.short_description: While you’re fucking on the beach with Sayaka, the hottest trans woman you’ve ever known, four mermaids are watching you. They ask the queen of the sea to make them like her, and their wish comes true: now four futanari want to explore every pleasure with you.

4522870.title: Islandustry
4522870.short_description: Find the best island, outbid your rivals and start exploiting it. Automate your production and watch the market to sell your goods at the right price. Use your profits to buy upgrades and make your production chain even faster.

4522960.title: SpellCarved
4522960.genre: Action, Casual, Indie, Free To Play
4522960.short_description: A casual wave-survival action game where you fight through enemies, loot chests, and build your loadout with upgrades and power-ups between rounds. With randomly generated maps and 20 power-ups to discover, every run plays out differently.

4522980.title: Dino-Tipping
4522980.short_description: Dino-Tipping is a fast-paced infinite pixel art runner where you control a tiny dinosaur dashing at break-neck speed. Dodge barrels, rocks, birds, and more - glide, double jump, and dart left or right to survive as long as you can. How far can you go? It's said to be impossible to reach MAX lvl!

4522990.title: Veil Breach: Raven County
4522990.short_description: A fast-paced 3D paranormal horde survival roguelite. Choose your field operative, survive wave after wave of escalating anomalies, build a devastating mid-run loadout from randomized upgrades and pray ten minutes is long enough.

4523040.title: Judge SIM
4523040.short_description: Step into the role of a judge and decide the fate of every case. Listen to witnesses, examine evidence, uncover contradictions, and deliver verdicts that will change lives. Every decision matters in this tense courtroom simulation full of twists.

4523140.title: Legend's Duty: The Rifted World
4523140.short_description: Fight through a fractured fantasy world in this single-player third-person action RPG. Use sword strikes, ranged attacks, bombs, and magic alongside your companion Layla as you explore dangerous lands, conquer dungeons, and defeat powerful bosses.

4523160.title: Slot Theory
4523160.short_description: Draft towers and upgrades. Build deadly synergies. Then watch your defenses trigger massive chain reactions. Slot Theory is a minimalist roguelike tower defense where every decision happens before the wave starts.

4523170.title: Glory Hole Barista
4523170.short_description: A short, sweet, 3D simulation about a café with a unique marketing strategy! And in case you were wondering, no, you won't be preparing much coffee...

4523310.title: Megalophobia
4523310.short_description: Megalophobia is an atmospheric, narrative experience driven by your powerless feeling. You cannot fight. You cannot win. You can only hide in the shadows of colossal, impossible entities that have claimed our world, trying to survive in a landscape that shifts with every deafening footstep.

4523350.title: Collusion
4523350.short_description: Collusion is a relentless top-down shooter where national politics are settled with lead. Blast your way through a dystopian Mexico, defeat surreal regional bosses, and reclaim all states in a frantic bullet-hell struggle for power. Unify the country under your command or die trying

4523530.title: Will or Water
4523530.short_description: In this point-and-click puzzle-adventure RPG, you play a brave explorer searching an ancient temple for magical secrets. The ruin is filled with deadly traps and danger. Survive, manage your resources, and you may uncover the mysteries buried beneath the sand.

4523630.title: Tread Heavy
4523630.short_description: Tread Heavy is a a Twin-Stick Tank Shooter. Use your main gun, dash, and your expanding series of upgrades to blow up waves of robots. Battle across your arena to collect XP from defeated enemies and return to the centre console to upgrade your tank further!

4523770.title: Sim: Heavyweight Boxing Champion
4523770.short_description: Manage a heavyweight boxer from turning pro to undisputed champion. 500+ AI fighters, 4 world titles, 7 regional belts, live round-by-round commentary, rivalries, awards, and a deep career mode spanning 1,000+ years. Chase greatness. Unify them all.

4523790.title: HASHIRU
4523790.short_description: A game about exploring your own mind. Escape the harsh world of stress and anxiety, solve puzzles, explore more about yourself, figure out your own consciousness. But most importantly - don't get too attached. After all, it's just a dream.

4523800.title: CPU Clicker
4523800.short_description: Click to generate cycles and power up your processor. Upgrade attributes to boost your production, push your CPU to its limits, and manage overheating before your system overloads and crashes.

4523810.title: Super Loot Runner
4523810.short_description: Follow the epic hero, pick up the loot, and keep him alive! With his unique adventure style of running directly into the monsters, he'll need all the help he can get, as well as all the money. Super Loot Runner is an inventory management / endless runner / auto battler with retro sound and visuals.

4523920.title: Armeria In Bloom
4523920.short_description: Train body and mind to defy fate. This action RPG blends growth, training, and battle. Build strength, agility, core power, and mental resilience to survive brutal fights. Form Shift changes your combat style, and the right choice can decide victory. Face a dangerous world and challenge destiny.

4523960.title: Epicurean
4523960.short_description: Play a deadly food-themed card game with a criminal syndicate and uncover the stories of the two central characters.

4523970.title: Breast Inspector
4523970.short_description: Take the role of the Breast Inspector, a fantasy job where you get to look at women’s boobs. Explore the map in look for these events which are short linear dialogue interactions. The game features fourteen inspections for you to perform.

4524120.title: Hollow Heart
4524120.short_description: Hollow Heart is a growth‑simulation game about forbidden human transmutation and twisted sisterly devotion. As the elder sister, you gather materials, rebuild your little sister’s soul and body, and attempt to revive her in a more “perfect” form.

4524170.title: Suicide Drive
4524170.short_description: Speed headfirst into oncoming traffic with your eyes closed. For fun.

4524240.title: Orpheus: Echo of Hades
4524240.short_description: Eurydice died on an ordinary autumn day — in a garden, among flowers, while Orpheus sat beneath an apple tree finishing his melody. Now the greatest musician of his time packs a bag and heads somewhere the living aren't usually allowed to go.

4524270.title: Love Album / 爱相集
4524270.short_description: Welcome to LoveAlbum. Meet six unique girls and embark on a heart-fluttering journey from strangers to lovers. With over 200,000 words across six life paths, ~600 stunning CGs, and 36 touching soundtracks, every secretly racing heartbeat will be collected in your shared album.

4524290.title: Hentai Reina
4524290.short_description: Hentai Reina is an adult game about a sexy police girl. Unlock new revealing illustrations, complete levels, earn achievements, and enjoy hot content in the gallery.

4524310.title: 王者争雄
4524310.genre: Casual, Indie, RPG, Strategy, Free To Play, Early Access
4524310.short_description: A Chinese-style simulation game. You run an ancient inn or bathhouse, accumulate wealth amid the lively marketplace atmosphere, build your own business legend, and compete for the title of "King" through strategic management.

4524430.title: Plume
4524430.short_description: As one of the few survivors of a lost civilization of flightless birds, fight your way up the vulcano that wiped out your ancestors. Collect artifacts and find seeds to grow them into powerful crops to boost your stats.

4524460.title: Redline JDM Drift
4524460.short_description: Experience stylish JDM drifting with online multiplayer, smooth handling, and striking visuals. Drive legendary-inspired cars, score massive drift combos, explore the roads solo or with friends, and rise as the next Drift King.

4524630.title: Tillandsia
4524630.short_description: Venture through the shifting dungeons of Akirume in a mystery dungeon roguelike featuring a unique real-time / turn-based combat system and over 1900 spells. Gather threads of mana, uncover powerful magic, and carve your path across a continent shaped by ancient forces.

4524680.title: My Bloodsucking 9-to-5
4524680.short_description: You're James, a middle-aged office worker who just so happens to be vampire. Someone stole your lunch. Find the thief, feed your goldfish, explore the building and DO. NOT. KILL. ANYONE. Easy!

4524700.title: CHARGE.R
4524700.short_description: A sci-fi puzzle game set in the body of a robot on an abandoned lunar station following a catastrophic event. The station was once part of Earth's defense against cosmic threats. All that remains are voices from the past. Now, it lies silent. The ring system have shut down and needs to be recharged.

4524800.title: Shellshock
4524800.short_description: You are a British WW1 soldier, trapped in an endless looping trench. Inspect your surroundings and report anything that is out of place. Will you escape? Shellshock is a short anomaly hunting experience (-30 minutes) inspired by liminal spaces and psychological horror.

4524850.title: Geisha Spring Party
4524850.short_description: A relaxing puzzle game featuring beautiful anime geishas. Solve puzzles, unlock elegant artworks, and enjoy a calm, atmospheric journey inspired by Japanese aesthetics.

4524940.title: Rush Hour Relay
4524940.short_description: Run a high-stakes neighborhood delivery network. Dispatch drivers, beat the clock, outmaneuver your rival, and never let the milk expire. Manage routes, fuel your vehicles, and build the ultimate delivery empire.

4525150.title: 强哥快点跑
4525150.short_description: This casual puzzle game lets you control a character in grid levels. Avoid enemies, bombs and slowdown traps to collect all small tree seeds. With limited brick-breaking chances per level, plan your path wisely, balance risk and progress, and make every choice count to clear stages.

4525180.title: Angel Zero
4525180.short_description: "Angel Zero" is an action game I'm solo developing right now. You play as an (angel?) girl belonging to an "Organization," taking on missions to hunt down all sorts of bizarre creatures. I want to lean into that wild contrast between realistic combat and an angel girl to create a fresh experience.

4525210.title: Zodiac Echoes
4525210.short_description: Build powerful synergies, unleash invocations, and adapt to spreading corruption in this roguelike deckbuilder.

4525220.title: Farm to Restaurant Simulator
4525220.short_description: Grow crops on your farm, cook delicious meals, and manage your own restaurant in this relaxing farm-to-restaurant simulation game.

4525370.title: Master Alchemist Simulator: Arcane Workshop
4525370.short_description: Build and run your own arcane workshop. Explore a dangerous fantasy world, gather rare ingredients, grow magical crops, craft powerful potions, manage your shop, and fight with blades, bows, and spells—alone or with friends in co-op.

4525380.title: ColorIt!
4525380.short_description: A cozy adventure where you fly around in a car and paint a grey world back to life — with the help of little monsters living in your trunk. Care for your monsters, harvest pigments, brew colors, and bring the outside world back to life — helping its residents find their way back to each other.

4525410.title: The Book of Tornaluna Cats
4525410.short_description: A cozy, story-driven life sim about caring for a mysterious cat-eared girl who fell from the sky with no memories. Farm, fish, cook, and explore while helping Tanya recover her strength — and uncover the truth about her past.

4525470.title: Shoku Pain
4525470.short_description: This isn't just any bakery—it's your last chance to survive. Bake bread in the quarantine zone, monitor the security cameras, and follow the rules. The virus has changed people—but they all look the same. Fill the quota, or the lights will go out. Trust no one.

4525480.title: Grim Shift
4525480.short_description: Grab your flashlight and explore the cursed graveyard in Grim Shift, a tense co-op survival horror game for 1-4 players. Forced by the cult to go out everynight and gather treasures for them. But you are not alone... the cemetery hides a lot of secrets along with the deadly monsters.

4525520.title: Jarred Defense
4525520.short_description: A mazing tower defense where tower placement is everything. Force enemies the long way around, build choke points, push through lava, and adapt as levels change beneath you. No spells, no card modifiers. Just planning, placement, and a cat stuck in a jar.

4525590.title: Fusion Core: Black Hole
4525590.short_description: Experience a satisfying cosmic idle game where you control an all-consuming black hole. Devour thousands of atoms to build your mass and expand your reach. Unleash a Singularity Collapse to reset the universe, harvest rare Antimatter, and purchase permanent upgrades for your core.

4525600.title: Outpost Liberation
4525600.short_description: A fast-paced tactical shooter about clearing enemy outposts as efficiently as possible. Scout, plan your attack, eliminate targets, and escape before reinforcements arrive.

4525630.title: Broken Divide
4525630.short_description: Build your guild, gear your party, and send them into battle. Broken Divide is a tactical autobattler RPG with deep skill trees, real-time ATB combat, and a growing roster of heroes to master.

4525690.title: Tessera
4525690.genre: Casual, Indie, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Early Access
4525690.short_description: You've been handed a Tessera — a ticket into an underground tactical combat league. Build your roster, manage the money, call the strategy, and fight for the championship from behind your broker's desk.

4525740.title: VERITAS
4525740.short_description: Be gay, kill eldritch horrors. VERITAS is a gothic fantasy metroidvania and narrative immersive sim, with fast paced party based combat, large maps, and a linear story.

4525820.title: Missed Call
4525820.short_description: You have only days to pay off the debt on your newly bought mansion. Search for hidden treasure, solve puzzles, and whatever you do — Do not miss your wife's calls. Missing just one could end it all.

4525840.title: Star Castles 2
4525840.short_description: Physics-based space combat where every battle escalates into chaos. Destroy ships, star bases, and hyperspace carriers before they overwhelm you.

4525850.title: Molesweeper
4525850.short_description: Dig underground to locate a hidden bomb before time runs out. Plan your tunnels carefully — rising water will flood the paths you create, forcing you to think ahead and choose your route wisely in this strategic digging challenge.

4525890.title: Kick&Rip
4525890.short_description: A lightweight, animated skateboarding game where you link grabs, tricks, and grinds in smooth, flowy lines through colorful environments—easy to pick up, satisfying to master, and punishing if you wipe out!

4525920.title: Gem Crush Match-3
4525920.short_description: Gem Crush Match-3 is a colorful match-3 puzzle game where players match identical gems, create powerful combinations, and complete a variety of levels.

4526000.title: LOGOMANCY
4526000.short_description: Your words rewrite reality. LOGOMANCY is a physics-infused word-merging puzzle. Drop letters, forge powerful incantations, and watch your vocabulary manifest as a force of nature. In this world, your LOGOS is the ultimate law.

4526010.title: Prototech
4526010.short_description: Be careful, in the darkness there are surveillance robots ready to kill you at any time. Will you discover the strangeness and secrets behind Prototech's presence at the school.

4526080.title: Kukata: Word of Ghosts
4526080.short_description: Your words are your only weapon. Banish the restless dead in this Malaysian folklore typing horror. Face the Pocong and Pontianak in an abandoned school using fast-paced typing combat and ritual crafting. Can you find the words to survive? Start typing now.

4526100.title: Colorful Slots
4526100.short_description: Colorful Slots is a short incremental game where you play slot machines to achieve increasingly higher scores.

4526260.title: Explodey Towers
4526260.short_description: A roguelike tower defense where you manage a single tower. Build your tower blocks to fend of waves of enemies. Enemies will adapt to your build, so don't be afraid to explode and rebuild!

4526280.title: Ice's Big Adventure
4526280.genre: Action, Adventure, Indie, RPG, Free To Play
4526280.short_description: You play as Ice, a young sorcerer with powerful ice magic and absolutely no memory of her past. She’s not trying to save the world, she mostly just wants to chill, hang out with her friends, and maybe avoid causing another disaster.

4526310.title: Polychoron Explorer
4526310.short_description: Tired of 2D and 3D games? Check out this sandbox game and primer for people curious about Euclidean 4D space. Learn how rotations work in 4D space. Explore all 6 known regular polychorons (4D figures made of 3D bodies for faces), or create your own by cutting existing figures or by programming.

4526330.title: Deep Space Remnant
4526330.short_description: This space survival sim lets you build a space station, construct ships to gather resources for expansion, and upgrade tech for stronger shields to withstand cosmic radiation, all while surviving in a radioactive environment.

4526400.title: 電影大戦
4526400.short_description: Time is your penalty! No lives—getting hit drains your clock. Slay enemies and harvest energy before time runs out! "Strike first, strike fast!" Shatter shields and unleash massive counter lasers with a Perfect Parry! "Den-ei Taisen" evolves every play. Pick 1 of 3 skills. High-speed roguelite!

4526420.title: Amarta: Kingdom of Shadows
4526420.short_description: Amarta is a Kingdom-like game based on the Wayang story of Babad Wanamarta, where players build a new nation and kingdom from a forbidden forest. This harmonious kingdom is ruled by the wise leaders, the Pandawa Lima.

4526440.title: Futa Succubus Slay!
4526440.short_description: Futanari succubi! Fuccubi? Succunari? It doesn't matter, they're here and they're horny! Engage in card battles to seduce your way up the tower of heaven itself. Leave your conquests forever altered in your wake! Enjoy the consequences of your actions in future runs!

4526490.title: Spooky Action: at a distance
4526490.short_description: Two objects. One bond. Move one — the other reacts. A minimalist logic puzzle game about quantum entanglement. 100+ levels. No randomness. No mercy.

4526600.title: Trouble in Potion High
4526600.short_description: Something has gone very wrong in Potion High. As an outside specialist for "hopeless cases," you must fight your way through corridors overrun by interdimensional creatures. Restore order using potions and your own pocket laboratory. Can you contain this chaos?

4526660.title: 桌宠小然
4526660.short_description: Cute Diana is a desktop companion game focusing on deep cultivation and interactive companionship. More than just a static decoration, Cute Diana is a virtual partner with an independent attribute system, a career path, and a life full of details.

4528950.title: THE Fart King
4528950.short_description: "THE Fart King" is a challenging and dynamic parkour game with a rich plot.Different choices will lead to different storylines.If you choose the high difficulty,falling will result in losing some progress having to start over.Overcome challenging climb reach top witness the conclusion of Fart King

4528970.title: TCG The Lion Gambles Everything He Owns
4528970.short_description: The Lion was trapped. The Lion never wanted this life. Cursed to gamble for generations, the Lion risks everything he owns. Gamble to earn money, gamble more by opening booster packs, and collect every card in a desperate attempt to escape this endless loop of high dopamine pumps.

4528990.title: 마이썸머 베케이션 - 민유린 Story
4528990.short_description: A story of a wandering youth who rediscovers color and themselves after an unexpected encounter in a small art studio during their final summer before graduation.

4529020.title: Neo Kinetic
4529020.short_description: Neo Kinetic is a fast-paced anti-gravity racer inspired by classics like Wipeout and F-Zero. Race across the world on over-the-top tracks, tearing through futuristic cities and megastructures at supersonic speeds.

4529030.title: Do Not Destroy
4529030.short_description: Do Not Destroy is a single-player first-person action game set in randomly generated, fully destructible cities. As the “Concerned Citizen,” you’ll fight against Pluto’s corporate invaders, scavenging their alien technology as you tear through your city and take it back.

4529140.title: Oceanborne
4529140.short_description: Set sail in Oceanborne, a colourful 3D adventure RPG set on a sea wrapped in clouds. Explore mysterious islands, gather resources, and craft what you need to fix what’s broken. Meet friendly characters, help people along the way, and improve your abilities to reach new places.

4529230.title: Circuit Defense
4529230.short_description: Circuit Defense is a grid-based tower defense game. Build power lines, connect functional modules, and energize your turrets to create a high-efficiency network. Master your layout and optimize module synergies to survive the relentless enemy swarm.

4529260.title: Infinite Dungeon: Idle Adventure
4529260.genre: Adventure, Casual, Indie, RPG, Simulation, Strategy
4529260.short_description: Idle Dungeon Crawling x Incremental Clicker: Experience the thrill of limitless growth. Master hero synergies and upgrade priorities to bring strategic depth to every dungeon run

4529300.title: De profundis 1454
4529300.short_description: 1454 is a turn-based tactical game set in 15th-century Prussia. Lead a desperate band of outcasts- peasants, fugitives, the forgotten- through brutal skirmishes shaped by terrain, supply, and survival. A tabletop wargame reborn for history lovers and fans of raw, grounded strategy.

4529360.title: Bus Manager 26
4529360.short_description: Manage the bus network of any city you choose. Buy buses, place stops, plan routes, and transport passengers while keeping your company financially stable in cities all around the world.

4529370.title: NODEMIND - Dynamic Core
4529370.short_description: Build and evolve a dynamic computing network. Manage resources and automate complex systems in a strategic sandbox where every connection shapes the outcome.

4529380.title: VENOY
4529380.short_description: VENOY is a relaxing real-time strategy game with deep settler logistics and true sandbox freedom. Build your medieval colony, optimize production chains and defend it against enemies!

4529410.title: Rage Box
4529410.short_description: Challenge yourself in a tough platformer! Collect coins, avoid enemies and obstacles, and use your Double Jump at the right moment to reach the end of each stage!
